Matthew1:1 ibraaheem kee santan, daud kee santan, yeeshu maseeh kee vanshaavalee." 
Matthew1:2 ibraaheem se isahak utpann hua isahak se yakoob utpann hua aur yakoob se yahooda aur usake bhai utpann hue. 
Matthew1:3 yahooda se firis, aur yahooda aur tamar se jorah utpann hue aur firis se hisron utpann hua, aur hisron se aeram utpann hua." 
Matthew1:4 aur aeram se ammeenadab utpann hua aur ammeenadab se nahashaen aur nahashaen se salamon utpann hua. 
Matthew1:5 aur salamon aur rahab se boaj utpann hua. aur boaj aur root se obed utpann hua aur obed se yishau utpann hua. 
Matthew1:6 aur yishau se daud raja utpann hua.. 
Matthew1:7 aur daud se sulaaiman us sree se utpann hua jo pahile uriyyah kee patnee thee. 
Matthew1:8 aur sulaaiman se rahabam utpann hua aur rahabam se aabiyyah utpann hua aur aabiyyah se asa utpann hua aur asa se yahoshafaat utpann hua aur yahoshaafaat se yoram utpann hua, aur yoram se ujjaiyah utpann hua." 
Matthew1:9 aur ujjaiyah se yotam utpann hua aur yotam se ahaj utpann hua aur ahaj se hijaakiyyah utpann hua. 
Matthew1:10 aur hijikiyyah se manaashshiah utpann hua. aur manaashshiah se amon utpann hua aur amon se yoshaiyyah utpann hua. 
Matthew1:11 aur bandee hokar babool jane ke samay men yoshaiyyah se yakunyah, aur us ke bhai utpann huae.." 
Matthew1:12 bandee hokar babul pahunchaae jane ke bad yakunyah se shaalaatiael utpann hua aur shaalatiael se jaroobbabil utpann hua. 
Matthew1:13 aur jaroobbabil se abeehood utpann hua, aur abeehood se ilyakeem utpann hua aur ilyakeem se ajor utpann hua." 
Matthew1:14 aur ajor se sadok utpann hua aur sadok se akheem utpann hua aur akheem se ileehood utpann hua. 
Matthew1:15 aur ileehood se iliyajar utpann hua aur ialiyajar se mattan utpann hua aur mattan se yakoob utpann hua. 
Matthew1:16 aur yakoob se yoosufa utpann hua jo mariyam ka paati tha jis se yeeshu jo maseeh kahalata haai utpann hua.. 
Matthew1:17 ibraaheem se daud tak sab chaudah peeddhee hui aur daud se babul ko bandee hokar pahunchaae jane tak chaudah peeddhee aur bandee hokar babul ko pahunchaae jane ke samay se lekar maseeh tak chaudah peeddhee hui.. 
Matthew1:18 ab yeeshu maseeh ka janm is prakar se hua, ki jab us kee mata maariyam kee manganee yoosufa ke sath ho gai, to un ke ikatthe hone ke pahile se vah paavitra atma kee or se garbhvatee pai gai." 
Matthew1:19 so usake paati yoosufa ne jo dharmee tha aur use badanam karana naheen chahata tha, use chupake se tyag dene kee manasa kee." 
Matthew1:20 jab vah in baton ke soch hee men tha to prabhu ka svargadoot use svapn men dikhai dekar kahane laga he yoosufa daud kee santan, too apanee patnee mariyam ko apane yahan le ane se mat dra kyonki jo usake garbh men haai, vah pavitra atma kee or se haai." 
Matthew1:21 vah putra janegee aur too usaka nam yeeshu rakhna kyonaki vah apane logon ka un ke papon se udar karega. 
Matthew1:22 yah sab kuchh isaliye hua ki jo vachan prabhu ne bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha vah poora ho. 
Matthew1:23 ki, dekho aek kunvaree garbhvatee hogee aur aek putra janegee aur usaka nam immanuel rakha jaaega jis ka arth yah haai parameshvar hamare sath." 
Matthew1:24 so yoosufa neend se jagakar prabhu ke doot kee agyaa anusar apanee patnee ko apane yahan le aya. 
Matthew1:25 aur jab tak vah putra n janee tab tak vah usake pas n gaya: aur us ne usaka nam yeeshu rakha.. 
Matthew2:1 herodes raja ke dinon men jab yahoodiya ke baaitalaham men yeeshu ka janm hua, to dekho, poorva se kai jyotishaee yarooshalem men akar poochhne lage." 
Matthew2:2 ki yahoodiyon ka raja jis ka janm hua haai, kahan haai? kyonaki ham ne poorva men usaka tara dekha haai aur us ko pranam karane aae haain." 
Matthew2:3 yah sunakar herodes raja aur usake sath sara yarooshalem ghabara gaya. 
Matthew2:4 aur us ne logon ke sab mahayajakon aur shaaastriayon ko ikatthe karake un se poochha, ki maseeh ka janm kaha hona chahiae?" 
Matthew2:5 unhon ne us se kaha, yahoodiya ke baaitalaham men kyonki bhvishyadvkta ke dara yon likha haai." 
Matthew2:6 ki he baaitalaham, jo yahooda ke desh men haai, too kisee reeati se yahooda ke aadhaikaariyon men sab se chhotta naheen kyonki tujh men se aek adhaipaati nikalega, jo meree praja israael kee rakhvalee karega." 
Matthew2:7 tab herodes ne jyotishaiyon ko chupake se bulakar un se poochha, ki tara tteek kis samay dikhai diya tha." 
Matthew2:8 aur us ne yah kahakar unhen baaitalaham bheja, ki jakar us balak ke vishay men tteek tteek maloom karo aur jab vah mil jaae to mujhe samachar do taki maain bhee akar us ko pranam karoon." 
Matthew2:9 ve raja kee bat sunakar chale gaa, aur dekho, jo tara unhon ne poorva men dekha tha, vah un ke age age chala, aur janha balak tha. us jagah ke upar panhuchakar tthar gaya.." 
Matthew2:10 us tare ko dekhkar ve ati anaandait hue. 
Matthew2:11 aur us ghar men pahunchakar us balak ko us kee mata maariyam ke sath dekha, aur munh ke bal girakar use pranam kiya aur apana apana thaila kholakar use sona, aur lohaban, aur gandharas kee bhentt chaddhai." 
Matthew2:12 aur svapn men yah chitaunee pakar ki herodes ke pas fir n jana, ve doosare marga se hokar apane desh ko chale gaae.." 
Matthew2:13 un ke chale jane ke bad dekho, prabhu ke ek doot ne svapn men yoosufa ko dikhai dekar kaha, utt us balak ko aur us kee mata ko lekar misr desh ko bhag ja aur jab tak maain tujh se n kahoo, tab tak vahee rahana kyonaki herodes is balak ko ddoonddhne par haai ki use marava dale." 
Matthew2:14 vah rat hee ko uttkar balak aur us kee mata ko lekar misr ko chal diya. 
Matthew2:15 aur herodes ke marane tak vaheen raha isaliye ki vah vachan jo prabhu ne bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha tha ki maain ne apane putra ko misr se bulaya poora ho. 
Matthew2:16 jab herodes ne yah dekha, ki jyotishaiyon ne mere sath ttttha kiya haai, tab vah krodha se bhr gaya aur logon ko bhejakar jyotishaiyon se tteek tteek poochhe huae samay ke anusar baaitalaham aur usake as pas ke sab ladkon ko jo do varsha ke, va us se chhotte the, marava dala." 
Matthew2:17 tab jo vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha, vah poora hua," 
Matthew2:18 ki ramah men aek karoon-nad sunai diya, rona aur bada vilap, rahel apane balakon ke liye ro rahee thee, aur shaant hona n chahatee thee, kyonki ve haain naheen.." 
Matthew2:19 herodes ke marane ke bad dekho, prabhu ke doot ne misr men yoosufa ko svapn men dikhai dekar kaha." 
Matthew2:20 ki ut, balak aur us kee mata ko lekar israael ke desh men chala ja kyonankai jo balak ke praan lena chahate the, ve mar gaae." 
Matthew2:21 vah utta, aur balak aur us kee mata ko sath lekar israael ke desh men aya." 
Matthew2:22 parantu yah sunakar ki araakhailaus apane pita herodes kee jagah yahoodiya par rajy kar raha haai, vahan jane se dra aur svapn men chitaunee pakar galeel desh men chala gaya." 
Matthew2:23 aur nasarat nam nagar men ja basa taaki vah vachan poora ho, jo bhavishyadvktaon ke dara kaha gaya tha, ki vah nasaree kahalaaega.." 
Matthew3:1 un dinon men yoohanna bapaatisma denevala akar yahoodiya ke jangal men yah prachar karane laga. ki 
Matthew3:2 man firao kyonki svarga ka rajy nikatt a gaya haai. 
Matthew3:3 yah vahee haai jis kee charcha yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kee gai ki jangal men aek pukaranevale ka shabd ho raha haai, ki prabhu ka marga taaiyar karo, us kee sadken seedhaee karo." 
Matthew3:4 yah yoohanna untt ke rom ka vasr paahine tha, aur apanee kamar men chamade ka pattuka bandho huae tha, aur usaka bhojan ttiiddayan aur banamadha tha." 
Matthew3:5 tab yarooshalem ke aur sare yahoodiya ke, aur yaradan ke as pas ke sare desh ke log usake pas nikal aae." 
Matthew3:6 aur apane apane papon ko manakar yaradan nadee men us se bapatisma liya. 
Matthew3:7 jab us ne bahutere fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon ko bapatisma ke liye apane pas ate dekha, to un se kaha, ki he sanp ke bachchon tumhen kis ne jata diya, ki anevale krodha se bhago?" 
Matthew3:8 so man firav ke yogy fal lao. 
Matthew3:9 aur apane apane man men yah n socho, ki hamara pita ibraaheem haai kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki parameshvar in patthron se ibraaheem ke liye santan utpann kar sakata haai." 
Matthew3:10 aur ab kulhada pedon kee jad par rakha hua haai, isaliye jo jo ped achchha fal naheen lata, vah katta aur ag men jhonka jata haai." 
Matthew3:11 maain to panee se tumhen man firav ka bapatisma deta hoo, parantu jo mere bad anevala haai, vah mujh se shaktaishaalee haai maain us kee jootee uttane ke yogy nahee, vah tumhen pavitra atma aur ag se bapatisma dega." 
Matthew3:12 usaka soop us ke hath men haai, aur vah apana khalihan achchhee reeati se safa karega, aur apane gehoon ko to khtte men ikattha karega, parantu boosee ko us ag men jalaega jo bujhne kee naheen.." 
Matthew3:13 us samay yeeshu maseeh galeel se yaradan ke kinare par yoohanna ke pas us se bapaatisma lene aya. 
Matthew3:14 parantu yoohanna yah kahakar use rokane laga, ki mujhe tere hath se bapaatisma lene kee avashyakta haai, aur too mere pas aya haai?" 
Matthew3:15 yeeshu ne us ko yah uttr diya, ki ab to aeesa hee hone de, kyonki hamen isee reeti se sab dhaaarmikata ko poora karana uchit haai, tab us ne us kee bat man lee." 
Matthew3:16 aur yeeshu bapaatisma lekar turant panee men se upar aya, aur dekho, usake liye akash khul gaya aur us ne parameshvar ke atma ko kabootar kee nai utarate aur apane upar ate dekha." 
Matthew3:17 aur dekho, yah akashavanee hui, ki yah mera piry putra haai, jis se maain atyant prasann hoon.." 
Matthew4:1 tab us samay atma yeeshu ko jangal men le gaya taki ibalees se us kee pareeksha ho. 
Matthew4:2 vah chalees din, aur chalees rat, nirahar raha, ant men use bookh lagee." 
Matthew4:3 tab parakhnevale ne pas akar us se kaha, yadi too parameshvar ka putra haai, to kah de, ki ye patthr rottyaian ban jaaen." 
Matthew4:4 us ne uttr diya ki likha haai ki manushy keval rottee hee se nahee, parantu har ek vachan se jo parameshvar ke mukh se nikalata haai jeeavit rahega." 
Matthew4:5 tab ibalees use pavitra nagar men le gaya aur maandair ke kangoore par khda kiya. 
Matthew4:6 aur us se kaha yadi too parameshvar ka putra haai, to apane ap ko neeche gira de kyonaki likha haai, ki vah tere vishay men apane svargadooton ko agyaa dega aur ve tujhe hathon hath utta lenge kaheen aeesa n ho ki tere panvon men patthr se ttes lage." 
Matthew4:7 yeeshu ne us se kaha yah bhee likha haai, ki too prabhu apane parameshvar kee pareeksha n kara." 
Matthew4:8 fir shautan use aek bahut unche pahad par le gaya aur sare jagat ke rajy aur usaka vibhv dikhakar 
Matthew4:9 us se kaha, ki yadi too girakar mujhe pranam kare, to maain yah sab kuchh tujhe de doonga." 
Matthew4:10 tab yeeshu ne us se kaha he shautan door ho ja, kyonaki likha haai, ki too prabhu apane parameshvar ko pranam kar, aur keval usee kee upasana kara." 
Matthew4:11 tab shautan usake pas se chala gaya, aur dekho, svargadoot akar us kee seva karane lage.." 
Matthew4:12 jab us ne yah suna ki yoohanna pakadva diya gaya, to vah galeel ko chala gaya." 
Matthew4:13 aur nasarat ko chhodkar kafaranahoom men jo jheel ke kinare jabooloon aur napatalee ke desh men haai jakar rahane laga. 
Matthew4:14 taaki jo yashaayah bhavishdvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha, vah poora ho." 
Matthew4:15 ki jabooloon aur napatalee ke desha, jheel ke marga se yaradan ke pas anyajatiyon ka galeela." 
Matthew4:16 jo log andhakar men baaitte the unhon ne badee jyonti dekhee aur jo mratyu ke desh aur chhaya men baaitte the, un par jyoti chamakee.." 
Matthew4:17 us samay se yeeshu prachar karana aur yah kahana arambh kiya, ki man firao kyonki svarga ka rajy nikatt aya haai." 
Matthew4:18 us ne galeel kee jheel ke kinare firate huae do bhaiyon arthata shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai, aur usake bhai aandairyas ko jheel men jal dalate dekha kyonaki ve machhve the." 
Matthew4:19 aur un se kaha, mere peechhe chale ao, to maain tum ko manushyon ke pakadnevale banaunga." 
Matthew4:20 ve turant jalon ko chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae. 
Matthew4:21 aur vahan se age baddhkar, us ne aur do bhaiyon arthata jabadee ke putra yakoob aur usake bhai yoohanna ko apane pita jabdee ke sath nav par apane jalon ko sudhaarate dekha aur unhen bhee bulaya" 
Matthew4:22 ve turant nav aur apane pita ko chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae.. 
Matthew4:23 aur yeeshu sare galeel men firata hua un kee sabhaon men upadesh karata aur rajy ka susamachar prachar karata, aur logon kee har prakar kee beemaree aur durbalata ko door karata raha." 
Matthew4:24 aur sare sooriya men usaka yash faail gaya aur log sab beemaron ko, jo nana prakar kee beemaariyon aur dukhon men jakade huae the, aur jin men dushttatmaaen theen aur mirgeevalon aur jhole ke mare huon ko usake pas laae aur us ne unhen changa kiya." 
Matthew4:25 aur galeel aur dikapulis aur yarooshalem aur yahoodiya se aur yaradan ke par se bheed kee bheed usake peechhe ho lee.. 
Matthew5:1 vah is bheed ko dekhkar, pahad par chaddh gaya aur jab baaitt gaya to usake chele usake pas aae." 
Matthew5:2 aur vah apana munh kholakar unhen yah upadesh dene laga," 
Matthew5:3 dhany haain ve, jo man ke deen haai, kyonki svarga ka rajy unheen ka haai." 
Matthew5:4 dhany haain ve, jo shaek karate haai, kyonki ve shaanti paaenge." 
Matthew5:5 dhany haain ve, jo namra haai, kyonki ve prathvee ke adhaikaree honge." 
Matthew5:6 dhany haain ve, jo dayavant haai, kyonki un par daya kee jaaegee." 
Matthew5:7 dhany haain ve, jin ke man shuuddh haai, kyonki ve parameshvar ko dekhenge." 
Matthew5:8 dhany haain ve, jo mel karavanevale haai, kyonki ve parameshvar ke putra kahalaaenge." 
Matthew5:9 dhany haain ve, jo dharma ke karan sataae jate haai, kyonki svarga ka rajy unheen ka haai." 
Matthew5:10 dhany ho tum, jab manushy mere karan joott bol bolakar tumharo virodha men sab prakar kee buree bat kahen." 
Matthew5:11 anandait aur magan hona kyonki tumhare liye svarga men bada fal haai isaliye ki unhon ne un bhvishyadvktaon ko jo tum se pahile the isee reeti se sataya tha.. 
Matthew5:12 tum prathvee ke namak ho parantu yaadi namak ka svad bigad jaa, to vah fir kis vastu se namakeen kiya jaaega?" 
Matthew5:13 tum prathvee ke namak ho parantu yaadi namak ka svad bigad jaa, to vah fir kis vastu se namakeen kiya jaaega? fir vah kisee kam ka nahee, keval is ke ki bahar faenka jaae aur manushyon ke paairon tale rauna jaae." 
Matthew5:14 tum jagat kee jyoti ho jo nagar pahad par basa hua haai vah chhpai naheen sakata. 
Matthew5:15 aur log diya jalakar paaimane ke neeche naheen parantu deevatt par rakhte haai, tab us se ghar ke sab logon ko prakash pahunchata haai." 
Matthew5:16 usee prakar tumhara ujiyala manushyon ke samhane chamake ki ve tumhare bhle kamon ko dekhkar tumhare pita kee, jo svarga men haai, badai karen.." 
Matthew5:17 yah n samajho, ki maain vyavastha ya bhavishyadvktaon kee pustakon ko lop karane aya hoon." 
Matthew5:18 lop karane nahee, parantu poora karane aya hoo, kyonki maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jab tak akash aur prathvee ttl n jaae, tab tak vyavastha se aek matra ya bindu bhee bina poora huae naheen ttlega." 
Matthew5:19 isaliye jo koi in chhottee se chhottee agyaaon men se kisee aek ko tode, aur vaaisa hee logon ko sikhaa, vah svarga ke rajy men sab se chhotta kahalaaega parantu jo koi un ka palan karega aur unhen sikhaaega, vahee svarga ke rajy men mahan kahalaaega." 
Matthew5:20 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki yadi tumharee dhaarmikata shaaastriayon aur fareeasiyon kee dhaarmikata se baddhkar n ho, to tum svarga ke rajy men kabhee pravesh karane n paoge.." 
Matthew5:21 tum sun chuke ho, ki poorvakal ke logon se kaha gaya tha ki hatya n karana, aur jo koi hatya karega vah kachaharee men dand ke yogy hoga." 
Matthew5:22 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo, ki jo koi apane bhai par krodha karega, vah kachaharee men dand ke yogy hoga: aur jo koi apane bhai ko nikamma kahega vah mahasabha men dand ke yogy hoga aur jo koi kahe are moorkh vah narak kee ag ke dand ke yogy hoga." 
Matthew5:23 isaliye yaadi too apanee bhentt vedee par laa, aur vahan too smaran kare, ki mere bhai ke man men meree or se kuchh virodha haai, to apanee bhentt vaheen vedee ke samhane chhod de." 
Matthew5:24 aur jakar pahile apane bhai se mel milap kara tab akar apanee bhentt chaddha. 
Matthew5:25 jab tak too apane mui ke sath marga men haai, us se jhttpatt mel milap kar le kaheen aeesa n ho ki mui tujhe hakim ko saunpe, aur hakim tujhe sipahee ko saunp de aur too bandeegrah men dal diya jaae." 
Matthew5:26 maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki jab tak too kaudee kaudee bhr n de tab tak vahan se choottne n paaega.. 
Matthew5:27 tum sun chuke ho ki kaha gaya tha, ki vyaabhaichar n karana." 
Matthew5:28 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo, ki jo koi kisee sree par kudrashtti dale vah apane man men us se vyabhaichar kar chuka." 
Matthew5:29 yaadi teree daahinee ankh tujhe ttokar khailaa, to use nikalakar apane pas se faenk de kyonki tere liye yahee bhla haai ki tere angon men se aek nash ho jaae aur tera sara shareer narak men n dala jaae." 
Matthew5:30 aur yaadi tera daahina hath tujhe ttokar khailaa, to us ko kattkar apane pas se faenk de, kyonki tere liye yahee bhla haai, ki tere angon men se aek nash ho jaae aur tera sara shareer narak men n dala jaae.." 
Matthew5:31 yah bhee kaha gaya tha, ki jo koi apanee patnee ko tyag de to use tyagapatra de." 
Matthew5:32 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoon ki jo koi apanee patnee ko vyabhaichar ke siva kisee aur karan se chhod de, to vah us se vyabhaichar karavata haai aur jo koi us tyagee hui se byah kare, vah vyabhaichar karata haai.." 
Matthew5:33 fir tum sun chuke ho, ki poorvakal ke logon se kaha gaya tha ki joottee shapath n khana, parantu prabhu ke liye apanee shapath ko pooree karana." 
Matthew5:34 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo, ki kabhee shapath n khana n to svarga kee, kyonaki vah parameshvar ka sinhasan haai." 
Matthew5:35 n dharatee kee, kyonki vah usake panvon kee chaukee haai n yarooshalem kee, kyonki vah maharaja ka nagar haai." 
Matthew5:36 apane sir kee bhee shapath n khana kyonaki too aek bal ko bhee n ujala, n kala kar sakata haai." 
Matthew5:37 parantu tumharee bat han kee ha, ya naheen kee naheen ho kyonki jo kuchh is se adhaik hota haai vah burai se hota haai.." 
Matthew5:38 tum sun chuke ho, ki kaha gaya tha, ki ankh ke badale ank, aur dant ke badale danta." 
Matthew5:39 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo, ki bure ka samana n karata parantu jo koi tere daahine gal par thppad mare, us kee or doosara bhee faer de." 
Matthew5:40 aur yaadi koi tujh par naalish karake tera kurata lena chahe, to use dohar bhee le lene de." 
Matthew5:41 aur jo koi tujhe kos bhr begar men le jaae to usake sath do kos chala ja. 
Matthew5:42 jo koi tujh se mange, use de aur jo tujh se udhaar lena chahe, us se munh n mod.." 
Matthew5:43 tum sun chuke ho, ki kaha gaya tha ki apane padosee se praem rakhna, aur apane baairee se baaira." 
Matthew5:44 parantu maain tum se yah kahata hoo, ki apane baaiariyon se praem rakho aur apane satanevalon ke liye praarthna karo." 
Matthew5:45 jis se tum apane svargeey pita kee santan ttharoge kyonki vah bhlon aur buron dono par apana soorya uday karata haai, aur dhaarmiyon aur adharmiyon donon par menh barasata haai." 
Matthew5:46 kyonaki yadi tum apane praem rakhnevalon hee se praem rakho, to tumhare liye kya labh hoga? kya mahasool lenevale bhee aeesa hee naheen karate?" 
Matthew5:47 aur yaadi tum keval apane bhaiyon kee ko namaskar karo, to kaun sa bada kam karate ho? kya anyajaati bhee aeesa naheen karate?" 
Matthew5:48 isaliye chaahiye ki tum siddh bano, jaaisa tumhara svargeey pita siddh haai.." 
Matthew6:1 savadhaan raho! tum manushyon ko dikhane ke liye apane dharma ke kam n karo, naheen to apane svargeey pita se kuchh bhee fal n paoge." 
Matthew6:2 isaliye jab too dan kare, to apane age turahee n bajava, jaaisa kapattee, sabhaon aur galiyon men karate haai, taki log un kee badai kare, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki ve apana fal pa chuke." 
Matthew6:3 parantu jab too dan kare, to jo tera dahina hath karata haai, use tera banya hath n janane paae." 
Matthew6:4 taaki tera dan gupt rahe aur tab tera pita jo gupt men dekhta haai, tujhe pratifal dega.." 
Matthew6:5 aur jab too praarthna kare, to kapattyaien ke saman n ho kyonaki logon ko dikhane ke liye sabhaon men aur sadkon ke modon par khde hokar praarthna karana un ko achchha lagata haai maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki ve apana pratifal pa chuke." 
Matthew6:6 parantu jab too praarthna kare, to apanee kottree men ja aur dar band kar ke apane pita se jo gupt men haai praarthna kara aur tab tera pita jo gupt men dekhta haai, tujhe pratifal dega." 
Matthew6:7 praarthna karate samay anyajatiyon kee nai bak bak n karo kyonki ve samajhte haain ki unake bahut bolane se un kee sunee jaaegee. 
Matthew6:8 so tum un kee nai n bano, kyonki tumhara pita tumhare mangane se paahile hee janata haai, ki tumharee kya kya avashyakta haai." 
Matthew6:9 so tum is reeati se praarthna kiya karo he hamare pita, too jo svarga men haain tera nam pavitra mana jaae." 
Matthew6:10 tera rajy aae teree ichchha jaaisee svarga men pooree hotee haai, vaaise prathvee par bhee ho." 
Matthew6:11 hamaree din bhr kee rottee aj hamen de. 
Matthew6:12 aur jis prakar ham ne apane aparaadhaiyon ko kshama kiya haai, vaaise hee too bhee hamare aparadhaen ko kshama kara." 
Matthew6:13 aur hamen pareeksha men n la, parantu burai se bacha kyonaki rajy aur parakram aur maahima sada tere hee haai. ameena." 
Matthew6:14 isaliye yaadi tum manushy ke aparadha kshama karoge, to tumhara svargeey pita bhee tumhen kshama karega." 
Matthew6:15 aur yaadi tum manushyon ke aparadha kshama n karoge, to tumhara pita bhee tumhare aparadha kshama n karega.." 
Matthew6:16 jab tum upasana karo, to kapattyaien kee nain tumhare munh par udasee n chhai rahe, kyonaki ve apana munh banaae rahate haai, taki log unhen upavasee jaten maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki ve apana pratifal pa chuke." 
Matthew6:17 parantu jab too upavas kare to apane sir par tel mal aur munh dhae. 
Matthew6:18 taaki log naheen parantu tera pita jo gupt men haai, tujhe upavasee jane is dasha men tera pita jo gupt men dekhta haai, tujhe pratifal dega.." 
Matthew6:19 apane liye prathvee par dhan ikattha n karo jahan keeda aur kai bigadte haai, aur jahan chor sendha lagate aur churate haain." 
Matthew6:20 parantu apane liye svarga men dhan ikattha karo, jahan n to keeda, aur n kai bigadte haai, aur jahan chor n sendha lagate aur n churate haain." 
Matthew6:21 kyonaki jahan tera dhan haai vahan tera man bhee laga rahega. 
Matthew6:22 shareer ka diya ankh haai: isaliye yaadi teree ankh nirmal ho, to tera sara shareer bhee ujiyala hoga." 
Matthew6:23 parantu yadi teree ankh buree ho, to tera sara shareer bhee andhiayara hoga is karan vah ujiyala jo tujh men haai yadi andhakar ho to vah andhakar kaaisa bada hoga." 
Matthew6:24 koi manushy do svaamiyon kee seva naheen kar sakata, kyonaki vah aek se baair or doosare se praem rakhega, va aek se mila rahega aur doosare ko tuchchh janega tum parameshvar aur dhan dono kee seva naheen kar sakate." 
Matthew6:25 isaliye maain tum se kahata hoo, ki apane praan ke liye yah chinta n karana ki ham kya khaaenge? aur kya peeaenge? aur n apane shareer ke liye ki kya paahinenge? kya praan bhojan se, aur shareer vasr se baddhkar naheen?" 
Matthew6:26 akash ke paakshiayon ko dekho! ve n bote haai, n kattte haai, aur n khton men battorate haain taubhee tumhara svargeey pita un ko khailata haai kya tum un se adhaik mooly naheen rakhte." 
Matthew6:27 tum men kaun haai, jo chinta karake apanee avastha men aek ghadee bhee baddha sakata haai?" 
Matthew6:28 aur vasr ke liye kyon chinta karate ho? jangalee sosanon par dhyan karo, ki vaai kaaise baddhte haai, ve n to paarishram karate haai, n katate haain." 
Matthew6:29 taubhee maain tum se kahata hoo, ki sulaaiman bhee, apane sare vibhv men un men se kisee ke saman vasr paahine huae n tha." 
Matthew6:30 isaliye jab parameshvar maaidan kee ghaas ko, jo aj haai, aur kal bhad men jhonkee jaaegee, aeesa vasr paahinata haai, to he alpaavishvasiyo, tum ko vah kyonkar n pahinaaega?" 
Matthew6:31 isaliye tum chinta karake yah n kahana, ki ham kya khaaenge, ya kya peeaenge, ya kya pahinenge?" 
Matthew6:32 kyonaki anyajaati in sab vastuon kee khoj men rahate haai, aur tumhara svargeey pita janata haai, ki tumhen ye sab vastuen chahiae." 
Matthew6:33 isaliye paahile tum use rajy aur dharma kee khoj karo to ye sab vastuaen tumhen mil jaaengee. 
Matthew6:34 so kal ke liye chinta n karo, kyoki kal ka din apanee chinta ap kar lega aj ke liye aj hee ka dukh bahut haai.." 
Matthew7:1 dosh mat lagao, ki tum par bhee dosh n lagaya jaae." 
Matthew7:2 kyonaki jis prakar tum dosh lagate ho, usee prakar tum par bhee dosh lagaya jaaega aur jis nap se tum napate ho, usee se tumhare liye bhee napa jaaega." 
Matthew7:3 too kyon apane bhai kee ankh ke tinake ko dekhta haai, aur apanee ankh ka lattha tujhe naheen soojhta?" 
Matthew7:4 aur jab teree hee ankh me lattha haai, to too apane bhai se kyonkar kah sakata haai, ki la maain teree ankh se tinaka nikal doon." 
Matthew7:5 he kapattee, pahale apanee ankh men se lattha nikal le, tak too apane bhai kee ankh ka tinaka bhlee bhanti dekhkar nikal sakega.." 
Matthew7:6 paavitra vastu kuton ko n do, aur apane motee sooaron ke age mat dalo aeesa n ho ki ve unhen panvon tale raunden aur palattkar tum ko faad dalen.." 
Matthew7:7 mongo, to tumhen diya jaaega ddoonddho, to tum paoge khttkhttao, to tumhare liye khola jaaega." 
Matthew7:8 kyonaki jo koi mangata haai, use milata haai aur jo ddoonddhta haai, vah pata haai? aur jo khttkhttata haai, usake liye khola jaaega." 
Matthew7:9 tum men se aeesa kaun manushy haai, ki yadi usaka putra us se rottee mange, to vah use patthr de?" 
Matthew7:10 va machhlee mange, to use sanp de?" 
Matthew7:11 so jab tum bure hokar, apane bachchon ko achchhee vastuen dena janate ho, to tumhara svargeey pita apane manganevalon ko achchhee vastuen kyon n dega?" 
Matthew7:12 is karan jo kuchh tum chahate ho, ki manushy tumhare sath kare, tum bhee un ke sath vaaisa hee karo kyonaki vyavastha aur bhvishyadvktaon kee shaiksha yahee haai.." 
Matthew7:13 saket faattk se pravesh karo, kyonki chauda haai vah faattk aur chakal haai vah marga jo vinash ko pahunchata haai aur bahutere haain jo us se pravesh karate haain." 
Matthew7:14 kyonaki saket haai vah faattk aur sakara haai vah marga jo jeevan ko pahunchata haai, aur thode haain jo use pate haain." 
Matthew7:15 jootte bhavishyadvktaon se savadhaan raho, jo bhedon ke bhesh men tumhare pas ate haai, parantu antar men faadnevale bheadiae haain." 
Matthew7:16 un ke falon se tum unhen pahachan loge kya jhadiyon se angoor, va unttkattaron se anjeer todte haain?" 
Matthew7:17 isee prakar har aek achchha ped achchha fal lata haai aur nikamma ped bura fal lata haai. 
Matthew7:18 achchha ped bura fal naheen la sakata, aur n nikamma ped achchha fal la sakata haai." 
Matthew7:19 jo jo ped achchha fal naheen lata, vah katta aur ag men dala jata haai." 
Matthew7:20 so un ke falon se tum unhen pahachan loge. 
Matthew7:21 jo mujh se, he prabhu, he prabhu kahata haai, un men se har aek svarga ke rajy men pravesh karega, parantu vahee jo mere svargeey pita kee ichchha par chalata haai." 
Matthew7:22 us din bahutere mujh se kahenge he prabhu, he prabhu, kya ham ne tere nam se bhvishyadanee naheen kee, aur tere nam se dushttatmaon ko naheen nikala, aur tere nam se bahut achambhe ke kam naheen kie?" 
Matthew7:23 tab maain un se khulakar kah doonga ki maain ne tum ko kabhee naheen jana, he kukarma karanevalo, mere pas se chale jao." 
Matthew7:24 isaliye jo koi meree ye baten sunakar unhen manata haai vah us budiman manushy kee nai ttharega jis ne apana ghar chattan par banaya. 
Matthew7:25 aur menh barasa aur baddhen ai, aur andhiayan chalee, aur us ghar par ttkkaren lagee, parantu vah naheen gira, kyonaki us kee nev chattan par dalee gai thee." 
Matthew7:26 parantu jo koi meree ye baten sunata haai aur un par naheen chalata vah us nirbuaddh imanushy kee nain ttharega jis ne apana ghar baloo par banaya. 
Matthew7:27 aur menh barasa, aur baddhen ai, aur andhiayan chalee, aur us ghar par ttkkaren lageen aur vah girakar satyanash ho gaya.." 
Matthew7:28 jab yeeshu ye baten kah chuka, to aeesa hua ki bheed usake upadesh se chakit hui." 
Matthew7:29 kyonaki vah un ke shaaastriayon ke saman naheen parantu aadhaikaree kee nai unhen upadesh deta tha.. 
Matthew8:1 jab vah us pahad se utara, to aek badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee." 
Matthew8:2 aur dekho, aek koddhee ne pas akar use pranam kiya aur kaha ki he prabhu yaadi too chahe, to mujhe shuuddh kar sakata haai." 
Matthew8:3 yeeshu ne hath baddhakar use chooa, aur kaha, maain chahata hoo, too shuuddh ho ja aur vah turant koddh se shuuddh ho gaya." 
Matthew8:4 yeeshu ne us se kaha dek, kisee se n kahana parantu jakar apane ap ko yajak ko dikhla aur jo chaddhava moosa ne ttharaya haai use chaddha, taaki un ke liye gavahee ho." 
Matthew8:5 aur jab vah kafaranahoom men aya to aek soobedar ne usake pas akar us se binatee kee. 
Matthew8:6 ki he prabhu, mera sevak ghar men jhole ka mara bahut dukhee pada haai." 
Matthew8:7 us ne us se kaha maain akar use changa karoonga. 
Matthew8:8 soobedar ne uttr diya ki he prabhu maain is yogy nahee, ki too meree chht ke tale aa, par keval mukh se kah de to mera sevak changa ho jaaega." 
Matthew8:9 kyonaki maain bhee paradhaeen manushy hoo, aur sipahee mere hath men haai, aur jab aek se kahata hoo, ja, to vah jata haai aur doosare ko ki a, to vah ata haai aur apane das se kahata hoo, ki yah kar, to vah karata haai." 
Matthew8:10 yah sunakar yeeshu ne achambha kiya, aur jo usake peechhe a rahe the un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki maain ne israael men bhee aeesa vishvas naheen paya." 
Matthew8:11 aur maain tum se kahata hoo, ki bahutere poorva aur paashchaim se akar ibraaheem aur isahak aur yakoob ke sath svarga ke rajy men baaittenge." 
Matthew8:12 parantu rajy ke santan bahar andhiayare men dal diae jaaenge: vahan rona aur danton ka peesana hoga. 
Matthew8:13 aur yeeshu ne soobedar se kaha, jo jaaisa tera vishvas haai, vaaisa hee tere liye ho: aur usaka sevak usee ghadee changa ho gaya.." 
Matthew8:14 aur yeeshu ne pataras ke ghar men akar us kee sans ko jvar men padee dekha. 
Matthew8:15 us ne usaka hath chooa aur usaka jvar utar gaya aur vah uttkar us kee seva karane lagee. 
Matthew8:16 jab sandhya hui tab ve usake pas bahut se logon ko laae jin men dushttatmaaen theen aur us ne un atmaon ko apane vachan se nikal diya, aur sab beemaron ko changa kiya." 
Matthew8:17 taaki jo vachan yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara ka gaya tha vah poora ho, ki us ne ap hamaree durbalataon ko le liya aur hamaree beemariyon ko utta liya.." 
Matthew8:18 yeeshu ne apanee charon or aek badee bheed dekhkar us par jane kee agyaa dee. 
Matthew8:19 aur aek shaasree ne pas akar us se kaha, he guro, jahan kaheen too jaaega, maain tere peechhe peechhe ho loonga." 
Matthew8:20 yeeshu ne us se kaha, lomadiyon ke bhtt aur akash ke paakshiayon ke basere hote haain parantu manushy ke putra ke liye sir dharane kee bhee jagah naheen haai." 
Matthew8:21 aek aur chele ne us se kaha, he prabhu, mujhe paahile jane de, ki apane pita ko gaddh doon." 
Matthew8:22 yeeshu ne us se kaha, too mere peechhe ho le aur muradon ko apane murade gadne de.." 
Matthew8:23 jab vah nav par chaddha, to usake chele usake peechhe ho liae." 
Matthew8:24 aur dekho, jheel men aek aesa bada toofaan utta ki nav laharon se ddhnpane lagee aur vah so raha tha." 
Matthew8:25 tab unhon ne pas akar use jagaya, aur kaha, he prabhu, hamen bacha, ham nash huae jate haain." 
Matthew8:26 us ne un se kaha he alpavishvasiyo, kyon drate ho? tab us ne uttkar andhaee aur panee ko dantta, aur sab shaant ho gaya." 
Matthew8:27 aur log achambha karake kahane lage ki yah kaaisa manushy haai, ki andhaee aur panee bhee us kee agyaa manate haain." 
Matthew8:28 jab vah us par gadareaniyon ke desh men pahuncha, to do manushy jin men dushttatmaaen theen kabraen se nikalate huae use mile, jo itane prachand the, ki koi us marga se ja naheen sakata tha." 
Matthew8:29 aur dekho, unhon ne chillakar kaha he parameshvar ke putra, hamara tujh se kya kaha? kya too samay se paahile hamen du:kh dene yahan aya haai?" 
Matthew8:30 un se kuchh door bahut se sooaron ka jhund char raha tha. 
Matthew8:31 dushttatmaon ne us se yah kahakar binatee kee, ki yadi too hamen nikalata haai, to sooaron ke jhund men bhej de." 
Matthew8:32 us ne un se kaha, jao, ve nikalakar sooaron men paaitt gaae aur dekho, sara jhund kadade par se jhpattkar panee men ja pada aur oob mara." 
Matthew8:33 aur charavahe bhage, aur nagar men jakar ye sab baten aur jin men dushttatmaaen bheen un ka sara hal kah sunaya." 
Matthew8:34 aur dekho, sare nagar ke loge yeeshu se bhentt karane ko nikal aae aur use dekhkar binatee kee, ki hamare sivanon se bahar nikal ja.." 
Matthew9:1 fir vah nav par chaddhkar par gaya aur apane nagar men aya. 
Matthew9:2 aur dekho, kai log aek jhole ke mare huae ko khatt par rakhkar usake pas laae yeeshu ne un ka vishvas dekhkar, us jhole ke mare huae se kaha he putra, ddhaddhs bandha tere pap kshama hue." 
Matthew9:3 aur dekho, kai shaastriayon ne socha, ki yah to parameshvar kee ninda karata haai." 
Matthew9:4 yeeshu ne un ke man kee baten maloom karake kaha, ki tum log apane apane man men bura vichar kyon kar rahe ho?" 
Matthew9:5 sahaj kya haai, yah kahana, ki tere pap kshama hue ya yah kahana ki utt aur chal fira." 
Matthew9:6 parantu isaaliye ki tum jan lo ki manushy ke putra ko prathvee par pap kshama karane ka adhaikar haai us ne jhole ke mare huae se kaha utt: apanee khatt utta, aur apane ghar chala ja." 
Matthew9:7 vah uttkar apane ghar chala gaya. 
Matthew9:8 log yah dekhkar dr gaae aur parameshvar kee maahima karane lage jis ne manushyon ko aeesa adhaikar diya haai.. 
Matthew9:9 vahan se age baddhkar yeeshu ne mattee nam aek manushy ko mahasool kee chaukee par baaitte dekha, aur us se kaha, mere peechhe ho le. vah uttkar usake peechhe ho liya.." 
Matthew9:10 aur jab vah ghar men bhojan karane ke liye baaitta to bahutere mahasool lenevalon aur papee akar yeeshu aur usake chelon ke sath khane baaitte. 
Matthew9:11 yah dekhkar fareesiyon ne usake chelon se kaha tumhara guroo mahasool lenevalon aur papiyon ke sath kyon khata haai? 
Matthew9:12 us ne yah sunakar un se kaha, vaaidh bhle changon ko naheen parantu beemaron ko avashy haai." 
Matthew9:13 so tum jakar is ka arth seekh lo, ki maain baalidan naheen parantu daya chahata hoon kyonki maain dhaarmiyon ko naheen parantu paapiyon ko bulane aya hoon.." 
Matthew9:14 tab yoohanna ke chelon ne usake pas akar kaha kya karan haai ki ham aur fareesee itana upavas karate haai, par tere chele upavas naheen karate?" 
Matthew9:15 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya baratee, jab tak dulha un ke sath haai shaek kar sakate haain? par ve din aaenge ki doolha un se alag kiya jaaega, us samay ve upavas karenge." 
Matthew9:16 kore kapade ka paaiband purane pahiravan par koi naheen lagata, kyonki vah paaiband paahiravan se aur kuchh kheench leta haai, aur vah aadhaik fatt jata haai." 
Matthew9:17 aur naya dakhras puranee mashakon men naheen bhrate haain kyonaki aeesa karane se mashken fatt jatee haai, aur dakhras bah jata haai aur mashaken nash ho jatee haai, parantu naya dakhras nai mashkon men bhrate haain aur vah donon bachee rahatee haain." 
Matthew9:18 vah un se ye baten kah hee raha tha, ki dekho, aek saradar ne akar use pranam kiya aur kaha meree putraee abhee maree haai parantu chalakar apana hath us par rak, to vah jeeavit ho jaaegee." 
Matthew9:19 yeeshu uttkar apane chelon samet usake peechhe ho liya. 
Matthew9:20 aur dekho, aek sree ne jis ke barah varsha se lohoo bahata tha, usake peechhe se akar usake vasr ke anchal ko choo liya." 
Matthew9:21 kyonaki vah apane man men kahatee thee ki yadi maain usake vasr hee ko choo loonbee to changee ho jaungee. 
Matthew9:22 yeeshu ne firakar use dekha, aur kaha putraee ddhaddhs bandha tere vishvas ne tujhe changa kiya haai so vah sree usee ghadee changee ho gai." 
Matthew9:23 jab yeeshu us saradar ke ghar men pahuncha aur bansalee bajanevalon aur bheed ko hullad machate dekha tab kaha. 
Matthew9:24 hatt jao, ladkee maree nahee, par sotee haai is par ve us kee hansee karane lage." 
Matthew9:25 parantu jab bheed nikal dee gai, to us ne bheetar jakar ladkee ka hath pakada, aur vah jee uttee." 
Matthew9:26 aur is bat kee charcha us sare desh men faail gai. 
Matthew9:27 jab yeeshu vahan se age baddha, to do andho usake peechhe yah pukarate huae chale, ki he daud kee santan, ham par daya kara." 
Matthew9:28 jab vah ghar men pahuncha, to ve andho us ke pas aae aur yeeshu ne un se kaha kya tumhen vishvas haai, ki maain yah kar sakata hoon? unhon ne us se kaha han prabhu." 
Matthew9:29 tab us ne un kee ankhe chookar kaha, tumhare vishvas ke anusar tumhare liye ho." 
Matthew9:30 aur un kee ankhe khul gai aur yeeshu ne unhen chitakar kaha savadhaan, koi is bat ko n jane." 
Matthew9:31 par unhon ne nikalakar sare desh men usaka yash faaila diya.. 
Matthew9:32 jab ve bahar ja rahe the, to dekho, log aek goonge ko jis men dushttatma thee us ke pas laae." 
Matthew9:33 aur jab dushttatma nikal dee gai, to goonga bolane laga aur bheed ne achambha karake kaha ki israael men aeesa kabhee naheen dekha gaya." 
Matthew9:34 parantu fareeasiyon ne kaha, yah to dushttatmaon ke saradar kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata haai.." 
Matthew9:35 aur yeeshu sab nagaron aur ganvon men firata raha aur un kee sabhaon men upadesh karata, aur rajy ka susamachar prachar karata, aur har prakar kee beemaree aur durbalata ko door karata raha." 
Matthew9:36 jab us ne bheed ko dekha to us ko logon par taras aya, kyonki ve un bhedon kee nai jinaka koi rakhvala n ho, vyakul aur bhttke huae se the." 
Matthew9:37 tab us ne apane chelon se kaha, pakke khet to bahut haain par majadoor thode haain." 
Matthew9:38 isaliye khet ke svamee se binatee karo ki vah apane khet kattne ke liye majadoor bhej de.. 
Matthew10:1 fir us ne apane barah chelon ko pas bulakar, unhen ashuuddh atmaon par adhaikar diya, ki unhen nikalen aur sab prakar kee beemariyon aur sab prakar kee durbalataon ko door karen.." 
Matthew10:2 aur barah praeariton ke nam ye haain: paahila shamaun, jo pataras kahalata haai, aur usaka bhai andairyasa jabdee ka putra yakoob, aur usaka bhai yoohanna" 
Matthew10:3 firaalippus aur bara-tulmaai thoma aur mahasool lenevala mattee, halafaai ka putra yakoob aur taai." 
Matthew10:4 shamaun kananee, aur yahooda iskaariyotee, jis ne use pakadva bhee diya.." 
Matthew10:5 in barahon ko yeeshu ne yah agyaa dekar bheja ki anyajaatiyon kee or n jana, aur samariyon ke kisee nagar men pravesh n karana." 
Matthew10:6 parantu israael ke gharane hee kee khoi hui bhedon ke pas jana. 
Matthew10:7 aur chalate chalate prachar kar kaho ki svarga ka rajy nikatt a gaya haai. 
Matthew10:8 beemaron ko changa karo: mare huon ko jilao: koddhiyon ko shuuddh karo: dushttatmaon ko nikalo: tum ne sentament paya haai, sentament do." 
Matthew10:9 apane pattukon men n to sona, aur n roopa, aur n tanba rakhna." 
Matthew10:10 marga ke liye n jholee rakho, n do kurate, n joote aur n lattee lo, kyonki majadoor ko usaka bhojan milana chahiae." 
Matthew10:11 jis kisee nagar ya ganv men jao to pata lagao ki vahan kaun yogy haai? aur jab tak vahan se n nikalo, usee ke yahan raho." 
Matthew10:12 aur ghar men pravesh karate huae us ko ashaeesh dena. 
Matthew10:13 yaadi us ghar ke log yogy honge to tumhara kalyan un par pahunchega parantu yaadi ve yogay n hon to tumhara kalyan tumhare pas lautt aaega. 
Matthew10:14 aur jo koi tumhen grahan n kare, aur tumharee baten n sune, us ghar ya us nagar se nikalate huae apane panvon kee dhool jhad dalo." 
Matthew10:15 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki nyay ke din us nagar kee dasha se sadom aur amora ke desh kee dasha aadhaik sahane yogy hogee.." 
Matthew10:16 dekho, maain tumhen bhedon kee nai bhediyon ke beech men bhejata hoon so sanpon kee nai buaddhmaian aur kabootaron kee nai bhole bano." 
Matthew10:17 parantu logon se savadhaan raho, kyonaki ve tumhen mahasabhaon men saupenge, aur apanee panchayat men tumhen kode marenge." 
Matthew10:18 tum mere liye haakimon or rajaon ke samhane un par, aur anyajatiyon par gavah hone ke liye pahunchaae jaoge." 
Matthew10:19 jab ve tumhen pakadvaaenge to yah chinta n karata, ki ham kis reeti se ya kya kahenge: kyonki jo kuchh tum ko kahana hoga, vah usee ghadee tumhen bata diya jaaega." 
Matthew10:20 kyonaki bolanevale tum naheen ho parantu tumhare pita ka atma tum men bolata haai. 
Matthew10:21 bhai, bhai ko aur pita putra ko, ghaat ke liye saunpenge, aur ladkebale mata-apita ke virodha men uttkar unhen marava dalenge." 
Matthew10:22 mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge, par jo ant tak dhaeeraj dhare rahega usee ka uddhar hoga." 
Matthew10:23 jab ve tumhen aek nagar men sataae, to doosare ko bhag jana. maain tum se sach kahata hoo, tum israael ke sab nagaron men n fir chukoge ki manushy ka putra a jaaega.." 
Matthew10:24 chela apane guroo se bada naheen aur n das apane svamee se. 
Matthew10:25 chele ka guroo ke, aur das ka svamee ke barabar hona hee bahut haai jab unhon ne ghar ke svamee ko shautan kaha to usake gharavalon ko kyon n kahenge?" 
Matthew10:26 so un se mat drana, kyonaki kuchh ddhpa nahee, jo khola n jaaega aur n kuchh chhpai haai, jo jana n jaaega." 
Matthew10:27 jo maain tum se andhiayare me kahata hoo, use ujiyale men kaho aur jo kanon kan sunate ho, use kotton par se prachar karo." 
Matthew10:28 jo shareer ko ghaat karate haai, par atma ko ghaat naheen kar sakate, un se mat drana par usee se dro, jo atma aur shareer donon ko narak men nash kar sakata haai." 
Matthew10:29 kya paaise me do gauraaiye naheen bikatee? taubhee tumhare pita kee ichchha ke bina un men se aek bhee boomi par naheen gir sakatee. 
Matthew10:30 tumhare sir ke bal bhee sab gine huae haain. 
Matthew10:31 isaliye, dro naheen tum bahut gauraaiyon se baddhkar ho." 
Matthew10:32 jo koi manushyon ke samhane mujhe man lega, use maain bhee svargeey pita ke samhane man loonga." 
Matthew10:33 par jo koi manushyon ke samhane mera inkar karega us se maain bhee apane svargeey pita ke samhane inkar karoonga. 
Matthew10:34 yah n samajho, ki maain prathvee par milap karane ko aya hoon maain milap karane ko nahee, par talavar chalavane aya hoon." 
Matthew10:35 maain to aya hoo, ki manushy ko usak pita se, aur bettee ko us kee man se, aur bahoo ko us kee sas se alag kar doon." 
Matthew10:36 manushy ke baairee usak ghar hee ke log honge. 
Matthew10:37 jo mata ya pita ko mujh se aadhaik piry janata haai, vah mere yogy naheen aur jo betta ya bettee ko mujh se aadhaik piry janata haai, vah mere yogy naheen." 
Matthew10:38 aur jo apana kroos lekar mere peechhe n chale vah mere yogy naheen. 
Matthew10:39 jo apane praan bachata haai, vah use khoaega aur jo mere karan apana praan khota haai, vah use paaega." 
Matthew10:40 jo tumhen grahan karata haai, vah mujhe grahan karata haai aur jo mujhe grahan karata haai, vah mere bhejanevale ko grahan karata haai." 
Matthew10:41 jo bhavishyadvkta ko bhavishyadvkta janakar grahan kare, vah bhavishyadvkta ka badala paaega aur jo dharmee janakar dharmee ko grahan kare, vah dharmee ka badala paaega." 
Matthew10:42 jo koi in chhotton men se aek ko chela janakar keval aek kattora ttnda panee pilaa, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, vah kisee reeati se apana pratifal n khoaega.." 
Matthew11:1 jab yeeshu apane barah chelon ko agyaa de chuka, to vah un ke nagaron men upadesh aur prachar karane ko vahan se chala gaya.." 
Matthew11:2 yoohanna ne bandeegrah men maseeh ke kamon ka samachar sunakar apane chelon ko us se yah poochhne bheja. 
Matthew11:3 ki kya anevala too hee haai: ya ham doosare kee batt johen? 
Matthew11:4 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki jo kuchh tum sunate ho aur dekhte ho, vah sab jakar yoohanna se kah do." 
Matthew11:5 ki andho dekhte haain aur langade chalate firate haain koddhee shuuddh kiae jate haain aur bahire sunate haai, murde jilaae jate haain aur kangalon ko susamachar sunaya jata haai." 
Matthew11:6 aur dhany haai vah, jo mere karan ttokar n khaae." 
Matthew11:7 jab ve vahan se chal dia, to yeeshu yoohanna ke vishay men logon se kahane laga tum jangal men kya dekhte gaae the? kya hava se hilate huae sarakande ko?" 
Matthew11:8 fir tum kya dekhne gaae the? dekho, jo komal vasr pahinate haai, ve rajabhvanon men rahate haain." 
Matthew11:9 to fir kyon gaae the? kya kisee bhavishyadvkta ko dekhne ko? han maain tum se kahata hoo, baran bhavishyadvkta se bhee bade ko." 
Matthew11:10 yah vahee haai, jis ke vishay men likha haai, ki dekh maain apane doot ko tere age bhejata hoo, jo tere age tera marga taaiyar karega." 
Matthew11:11 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jo striayon se janme haai, un men se yoohanna bapatisma denevalon se koi bada naheen hua par jo svarga ke rajy men chhotte se chhotta haai vah us se bada haai." 
Matthew11:12 yoohanna bapaatisma denevale ke dinon se ab tak svarga ke rajy par jor hota raha haai, aur balaval use chheen lete haain." 
Matthew11:13 yoohanna tak sare bhavishyadvkta aur vyavastha bhavishyadvvanee karate rahe. 
Matthew11:14 aur chaho to mano, aeliyyah jo anevala tha, vah yahee haai." 
Matthew11:15 jis ke sunane ke kan ho, vah sun le." 
Matthew11:16 maain is samay ke logon kee upama kis se doon? ve un balakon ke saman haai, jo bajaron men baaitte huae aek doosare se pukarakar kahate haain." 
Matthew11:17 ki ham ne tumhare liye bansalee bajai, aur tum n nache ham ne vilap kiya, aur tum ne chhatee naheen peettee." 
Matthew11:18 kyonaki yoohanna n khata aya aur n peeta, aur ve kahate haain ki us men dushttatma haai." 
Matthew11:19 manushy ka putra khata-peeta aya, aur ve kahate haain ki dekho, petoo aur piyakkad manushy, mahasool lenevalon aur paapiyon ka mitra par gyaan apane kamon men sachcha ttharaya gaya haai." 
Matthew11:20 tab vah un nagaron ko ulahana dene laga, jin men us ne bahutere samarth ke kam kiae the kyonki unhon ne apana man naheen firaya tha." 
Matthew11:21 hay, khurajeena hay, baaitasaaida jo samarth ke kam tum men kiae gaa, yaadi ve soor aur saaida men kiae jate, to ttatt oddhkar, aur rakh men baaittkar, ve kab se man fira lete." 
Matthew11:22 parantu maain tum se kahata hoon ki nyay ke din tumharee dasha se soor aur saaida kee dasha adhaik sahane yogy hogee. 
Matthew11:23 aur he kafaranahoom, kya too svarga tak uncha kiya jaaega? too to adhaelok tak neeche jaaega jo samarth ke kam tujh men kiae gaae haai, yaadi sadom men kiae jate, to vah aj tak bana rahata." 
Matthew11:24 par maain tum se kahata hoo, ki nyay ke din teree dasha se sadom ke desh kee dasha aadhaik sahane yogy hogee." 
Matthew11:25 usee samay yeeshu ne kaha, he pita, svarga aur prathvee ke prabhu maain tera dhanyavad karata hoo, ki too ne in baton ko gyaaaniyon aur samajhdaron se chhpai dakha, aur balakon par pragatt kiya haai." 
Matthew11:26 ha, he pita, kyonaki tujhe yahee achchha laga." 
Matthew11:27 mere pita ne mujhe sab kuchh saunpa haai, aur koi putra ko naheen janata, keval pita aur koi pita ko naheen janata, keval putra aur vah jis par putra use pragatt karana chahe." 
Matthew11:28 he sab paarishram karanevalon aur bojh se dabe logo, mere pas ao maain tumhen vishraam doonga." 
Matthew11:29 mera jooa apane upar utta lo aur mujh se seekho kyonaki maain namra aur man men dee hoon: aur tum apane man men vishraam paoge. 
Matthew11:30 kyonaki mera jooa sahaj aur mera bojh halka haai.. 
Matthew12:1 us samay yeeshu sabt ke din kheton men se hokar ja raha tha, aur usake chelon ko bookh lagee, so ve balen tod todkar khane lage." 
Matthew12:2 fareesiyon ne yah dekhkar us se kaha, dekh tere chele vah kam kar rahe haai, jo sabt ke din karana uchit naheen." 
Matthew12:3 us ne un se kaha kya tum ne naheen paddha, ki daud ne, jab vah aur usake sathee bookhe huae to kya kiya?" 
Matthew12:4 vah kyonkar parameshvar ke ghar men gaya, aur bhentt kee rottyaian khai, jinhen khana n to use aur usake saathaiyon ko, par keval yajakon ko uchit tha?" 
Matthew12:5 ya tum ne vyavastha men naheen paddha, ki yajak sabt ke din mandair men sabt ke din ke vidhai ko todne par bhee nirdosh ttharate haain." 
Matthew12:6 par maain tum se kahata hoo, ki yahan vah haai, jo mandair se bhee bada haai." 
Matthew12:7 yaadi tum is ka arth janate ki maain daya se prasann hoo, balidan se nahee, to tum nirdosh ko doshaee n ttharate." 
Matthew12:8 manushy ka putra to sabt ke din ka bhee prabhu haai.. 
Matthew12:9 vahan se chalakar vah un kee sabha ke ghar men aya. 
Matthew12:10 aur dekho, aek manushy tha, jis ka hath sookha hua tha aur unhon ne us par dosh lagane ke liey us se poochha, ki kya sabt ke din changa karana uchit haai?" 
Matthew12:11 us ne un se kaha tum men aeesa kaun haai, jis kee ek bhed ho, aur vah sabt ke din gadhe men gir jaa, to vah use pakadkar n nikale?" 
Matthew12:12 bhla, manushy ka mooly bhed se kitana baddh kar haai isaaliye sabt ke din bhlai karana uchit haai: tab us ne us manushy se kaha, apana hath baddha." 
Matthew12:13 us ne baddhaya, aur vah fir doosare hath kee nai achchha ho gaya." 
Matthew12:14 tab fareesiyon ne bahar jakar usake virodha men sammati kee, ki use kis prakar nash karen?" 
Matthew12:15 yah janakar yeeshu vahan se chala gaya aur bahut lage usake peechhe ho liye aur us ne sab ko changa kiya. 
Matthew12:16 aur unhen chitaya, ki mujhe pragatt n karana." 
Matthew12:17 ki jo vachan yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha, vah poora ho." 
Matthew12:18 ki dekho, yah mera sevak haai, jise maain ne chuna haai mera piry, jis se mera man prasann haai: maain apana atma us par daloonga aur vah anyajaatiyon ko nyay ka samachar dega." 
Matthew12:19 vah n jhgada karega, aur n dhoom machaaega aur n bajaron men koi usaka shabd sunega." 
Matthew12:20 vah kuchale huae sarakande ko n todega aur dhooan detee hui battee ko n bujhaaega, jab tak nyay ko prabal n karaae." 
Matthew12:21 aur anyajatiyan usake nam par asha rakhengee. 
Matthew12:22 tab log aek andho-goonge ko jis men dushttatma thee, usake pas laae aur us ne use achchha kiya aur vah goonga bolane aur dekhne laga." 
Matthew12:23 is par sab log chaakit hokar kahane lage, yah kya daud kee santan ka haai?" 
Matthew12:24 parantu fareeasiyon ne yah sunakar kaha, yah to dushttatmaon ke saradar shautan kee sahayata ke bina dushttatmaon ko naheen nikalata." 
Matthew12:25 us ne un ke man kee bat janakar un se kaha jis kisee rajy men foott hotee haai, vah ujad jata haai, aur koi nagar ya gharana jis men foott hotee haai, bana n rahega." 
Matthew12:26 aur yaadi shautan hee shautan ko nikale, to vah apana hee virodhaee ho gaya haai fir usaka rajy kyonkar bana rahega?" 
Matthew12:27 bhla, yadi maain shautan kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata hoo, to tumhare vansh kis kee sahayata se nikalate haain? isaliye ve hee tumhara nyay chukaaenge." 
Matthew12:28 par yaadi maain parameshvar ke atma kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata hoo, to parameshvar ka rajy tumhare pas a pahuncha haai." 
Matthew12:29 ya kyonkar koi manushy kisee balavant ke ghar men ghausakar usaka mal loott sakata haai jab tak ki pahile us balavant ko n bandha le? aur tab vah usaka ghar loott lega. 
Matthew12:30 jo mere sath nahee, vah mere virodha men haai aur jo mere sath naheen battorata, vah bithrata haai." 
Matthew12:31 isaliye maain tum se kahata hoo, ki manushy ka sab prakar ka pap aur ninda kshama kee jaaegee, par atma kee ninda kshama n kee jaaegee." 
Matthew12:32 jo koi manushy ke putra ke virodha men koi bat kahega, usaka yah aparadha kshama kiya jaaega, parantu jo koi pavitraatma ke virodha men kuchh kahega, usaka aparadha n to is lok men aur n paralok men kshama kiya jaaega." 
Matthew12:33 yaadi ped ko achchha kaho, to usake fal ko bhee achchha kaho ya ped ko nikamma kaho kyonki ped fal hee se pahachana jata haai." 
Matthew12:34 he sanp ke bachcho, tum bure hokar kyonkar achchhee baten kah sakate ho? kyonki jo man men bhra haai, vahee munh par ata haai." 
Matthew12:35 bhla, manushy man ke bhle bhndar se bhlee baten nikalata haai aur bura manushy bure bhndar se buree baten nikalata haai." 
Matthew12:36 aur maai tum se kahata hoo, ki jo jo nikammee baten manushy kahenge, nyay ke din har aek bat ka lekha denge." 
Matthew12:37 kyonaki too apanee baton ke karan nirdosh aur apanee baton hee ke karan doshaee ttharaya jaaega.. 
Matthew12:38 is par kitane shaaastriayon aur fareeasiyon ne us se kaha, he guro, ham tujh se aek chinh dekhna chahate haain." 
Matthew12:39 us ne unhen uttr diya, ki is yug ke bure aur vyabhaicharee log chinh ddoonddhte haain parantu yoonus bhvishyadvkta ke chinh ko chhod koi aur chinh un ko n diya jaega." 
Matthew12:40 yoonus teen raj din jal jantu ke pett men raha, vaaise hee manushy ka putra teen rat din prathvee ke bheetar rahega." 
Matthew12:41 neenave ke log nyay ke din is yug ke logon ke sath uttkar unhen doshaee ttharaaenge, kyonki unhon ne yoonus ka prachar sunakar, man firaya aur dekho, yahan vah haai jo yoonus se bada haai." 
Matthew12:42 daakkhian kee ranee nyay ke din is yug ke logon ke sath uttkar unhen doshaee ttharaaegee, kyonaki vah sulaaiman ka gyaan sunane ke liye prathvee kee chhor se ai, aur dekho, yahan vah haai jo sulaaiman se bhee bada haai." 
Matthew12:43 jab ashuuddh atma manushy men se nikal jatee haai, to sookhee jagahon men vishraam ddoonddhtee firatee haai, aur patee naheen." 
Matthew12:44 tab kahatee haai, ki maain apane usee ghar men jahan se nikalee thee, lautt jaungee, aur akar use soona, jhada-buhara aur saja sajaya patee haai." 
Matthew12:45 tab vah jakar apane se aur buree sat atmaon ko apane sath le atee haai, aur ve us men paaittkar vahan vas karatee haai, aur us manushy kee pichhlee dasha paahile se bhee buree ho jatee haai is yug ke bure logon kee dasha bhee aeesee hee hogee." 
Matthew12:46 jab vah bheed se baten kar hee raha tha, to dekho, us kee mata aur bhai bahar khde the, aur us se baten karana chahate the." 
Matthew12:47 kisee ne us se kaha dekh teree mata aur tere bhai bahar khde haai, aur tujh se baten karana chahate haain." 
Matthew12:48 yah sun us ne kahanevale ko uttr diya kaun haai meree mata? 
Matthew12:49 aur kaun haai mere bhai? aur apane chelon kee or apana hath baddha kar kaha dekho, meree mata aur mere bhai ye haain." 
Matthew12:50 kyonaki jo koi mere svargeey pita kee ichchha par chale, vahee mera bhai aur baahin aur mata haai.." 
Matthew13:1 usee din yeeshu ghar se nikalakar jheel ke kinare ja baaitta. 
Matthew13:2 aur usake pas aeesee badee bheed ikatthee hui ki vah nav par chaddh gaya, aur saree bheed kinare par khdee rahee." 
Matthew13:3 aur us ne un se drashttanton men bahut see baten kahee, ki dekho, aek bonevala beej bone nikala." 
Matthew13:4 bote samay kuchh beej marga ke kinare gire aur paakshiayon ne akar unhen chug liya. 
Matthew13:5 kuchh patthreelee boomi par gire, jahan unhen bahut mittee n milee aur gaharee mittee n milane ke karan ve jald ug aae." 
Matthew13:6 par sooraj nikalane par ve jal gaa, aur jad n pakadne se sookh gaae." 
Matthew13:7 kuchh jhaadiyon men gire, aur jhaadiyon ne baddhkar unhen daba dala." 
Matthew13:8 par kuchh achchhee boomi par gire, aur fal laa, koi sau guna, koi satt guna, koi tees guna." 
Matthew13:9 jis ke kan hon vah sun le.. 
Matthew13:10 aur chelon ne pas akar us se kaha, too un se drashttanton men kyon baten karata haai?" 
Matthew13:11 us ne uttr diya, ki tum ko svarga ke rajy ke bhedon kee samajh dee gai haai, par un ko naheen." 
Matthew13:12 kyonaki jis ke pas haai, use diya jaaega aur usake pas bahut ho jaaega par jis ke pas kuchh naheen haai, us se jo kuchh usake pas haai, vah bhee le liya jaaega." 
Matthew13:13 maain un se drashttanton men isaaliye baten karata hoo, ki ve dekhte huae naheen dekhte aur sunate huae naheen sunate aur naheen samajhte." 
Matthew13:14 aur un ke vishay men yashaayah kee yah bhvishyadvvanee pooree hotee haai, ki tum kanon se to sunoge, par samajhoge naheen aur ankhon se to dekhoge, par tumhen n soojhega." 
Matthew13:15 kyonaki in logon ka man motta ho gaya haai, aur ve kanon se uncha sunate haain aur unhon ne apanee ankhen moond leen haain kaheen aeesa n ho ki ve ankhon se dekhe, aur kanon se sunen aur man se samajhe, aur fir jaae, aur maain unhen changa karoon." 
Matthew13:16 par dhany haai tumharee ankhe, ki ve dekhtee haain aur tumhare kan, ki ve sunate haain." 
Matthew13:17 kyonaki maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki bahut se bhavishyadvktaon ne aur dharmiyon ne chaha ki jo baten tum dekhte ho, dekhen par n dekheen aur jo baten tum sunate ho, sune, par n suneen." 
Matthew13:18 so tum banevale ka drashttant suno. 
Matthew13:19 jo koi rajy ka vachan sunakar naheen samajhta, usake man men jo kuchh boya gaya tha, use vah dushtt akar chheen le jata haai yah vahee haai, jo marga ke kinare boya gaya tha." 
Matthew13:20 aur jo patthreelee boomi par boya gaya, yah vah haai, jo vachan sunakar turant anand ke sath man leta haai." 
Matthew13:21 par apane men jad n rakhne ke karan vah thode hee din ka haai, aur jab vachan ke karan klesh ya upadrav hota haai, to turant ttokar khata haai." 
Matthew13:22 jo jhaadiyon men boya gaya, yah vah haai, jo vachan ko sunata haai, par is sansar kee chinta aur dhan ka dhaekha vachan ko dabata haai, aur vah fal naheen lata." 
Matthew13:23 jo achchhee boomi men boya gaya, yah vah haai, jo vachan ko sunakar samajhta haai, aur fal lata haai koi sau guna, koi satt guna, koi tees guna." 
Matthew13:24 us ne unhen ek aur drashttant diya ki svarga ka rajy us manushy ke saman haai jis ne apane khet men achchha beej boya. 
Matthew13:25 par jab log so rahe the to usaka baairee akar gehoon ke beech jangalee beej bokar chala gaya. 
Matthew13:26 jab ankur nikale aur balen lagee, to jangalee dane bhee dikhai diae." 
Matthew13:27 is par grahasth ke dason ne akar us se kaha, he svamee, kya too ne apane khet men achchha beej n boya tha? fir jangatee dane ke paudho us men kahan se aae?" 
Matthew13:28 us ne un se kaha, yah kisee baairee ka kam haai. dason ne us se kaha kya teree ichchha haai, ki ham jakar un ko battor len?" 
Matthew13:29 us ne kaha, aeesa nahee, n ho ki jangatee dane ke paudho battorate huae un ke sath gehoon bhee ukhad lo." 
Matthew13:30 kattnee tak donon ko aek sath baddhne do, aur kattnee ke samay maain kattnevalon se kahoonga paahile jangalee dane ke paudho battorakar jalane ke liye un ke gatthe bandha lo, aur gehoon ko mere khtte men ikattha karo.." 
Matthew13:31 us ne unhen ek aur drashttant diya ki svarga ka rajy rai ke ek dane ke saman haai, jise kisee manushy ne lekar apane khet men bo diya." 
Matthew13:32 vah sab beejon se chhotta to haai par jab baddh jata haai tab sab sag pat se bada hota haai aur aeesa ped ho jata haai, ki akash ke pakshaee akar us kee daliyon par basera karate haain.." 
Matthew13:33 us ne ek aur drashttant unhen sunaya ki svarga ka rajy khmeer ke saman haai jis ko kisee sree ne lekar teen paseree atte men mila diya aur hote hote vah sab khmeer ho gaya.. 
Matthew13:34 ye sab baten yeeshu ne drashttanton men logon se kahee, aur bina drashttant vah un se kuchh n kahata tha." 
Matthew13:35 ki jo vachan bhavishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha, vah poora ho ki maain drashttant kahane ko apana munh kholoonga: maain un baton ko jo jagat kee utpati se gupt rahee haain pragatt karoonga.." 
Matthew13:36 tab vah bheed ko chhodkar ghar men aya, aur usake chelon ne usake pas akar kaha, khet ke jangalee dane ka drashttant hamen samajha de." 
Matthew13:37 us ne un ko uttr diya, ki achchhe beej ka bonevala manushy ka putra haai." 
Matthew13:38 khet sansar haai, achchha beej rajy ke santan, aur jangalee beej dushtt ke santan haain." 
Matthew13:39 jis baairee ne un ko boya vah shautan haai kattnee jagat ka ant haai: aur kattnevale svargadoot haain. 
Matthew13:40 so jaaise jangalee dane battore jate aur jalaae jate haain vaaisa hee jagat ke ant men hoga. 
Matthew13:41 manushy ka putra apane svargadooton ko bhejega, aur ve usake rajy men se sab ttokar ke karanon ko aur kukarma karanevalon ko ikattha karenge." 
Matthew13:42 aur unhen ag ke kund men dalenge, vahan rona aur dant peesana hoga." 
Matthew13:43 us samay dharmee apane pita ke rajy men soorya kee nai chamakenge jis ke kan hon vah sun le.. 
Matthew13:44 svarga ka rajy khet men chhpai huae dhan ke saman haai, jise kisee manushy ne pakar chhpai diya, aur mare anand ke jakar aur apana sab kuchh bechakar us khet ko mol liya.." 
Matthew13:45 fir svarga ka rajy aek vyoparee ke saman haai jo achchhe motiyon kee khoj men tha. 
Matthew13:46 jab use aek bahumooly motee mila to us ne jakar apana sab kuchh bech dala aur use mol le liya.. 
Matthew13:47 fir svarga ka rajy us bade jal ke saman haai, jo samudra men dala gaya, aur har prakar kee machhaliyon ko samett laya." 
Matthew13:48 aur jab bhr gaya, to us ko kinare par kheench laa, aur baaittkar achchhee achchhee to baratanon men ikattha kiya aur nikammee, nikammeen faenk dee." 
Matthew13:49 jagat ke ant men aeesa hee hoga: svargadoot akar dushtton ko dharmiyon se alag karenge, aur unhen ag ke kund men dalenge." 
Matthew13:50 vahan rona aur dant peesana hoga. 
Matthew13:51 kya tum ne ye sab baten samajheen? 
Matthew13:52 unhon ne us se kaha, han us ne un se kaha, isaaliye har ek shaasree jo svarga ke rajy ka chela bana haai, us grahasth ke saman haai jo apane bhndar se nai aur puranee vastuen nikalata haai.." 
Matthew13:53 jab yeeshu ne sab drashttant kah chuka, to vahan se chala gaya." 
Matthew13:54 aur apane desh men akar un kee sabha men unhen aeesa upadesh dene laga ki ve chakit hokar kahane lage ki is ko yah gyaan aur samarth ke kam kahan se mile? 
Matthew13:55 kya yah baddhi ka betta naheen? aur kya is kee mata ka nam mariyam aur is ke bhaiyon ke nam yakoob aur yoosufa aur shamaun aur yahooda naheen? 
Matthew13:56 aur kya is kee sab bahinen hamare beech men naheen rahatee? fir is ko yah sab kahan se mila? 
Matthew13:57 so unhon ne usake karan ttokar khai, par yeeshu ne un se kaha, bhvishyadvkta apane desh aur apane ghar ko chhod aur kaheen niradar naheen hota." 
Matthew13:58 aur us ne vahan un ke avishvas ke karan bahut samarth ke kam naheen kiae.. 
Matthew14:1 us samay chauthai desh ke raja herodes ne yeeshu kee charcha sunee. 
Matthew14:2 aur apane sevakon se kaha, yah yoohanna bapatisma denevala haai: vah mare huon men se jee utta haai, isee liye us se samarth ke kam pragatt hote haain." 
Matthew14:3 kyonaki herodes ne apane bhai filippus kee patnee herodiyas ke kara, yoohanna ko pakadkar bandha, aur jelakhane men dal diya tha." 
Matthew14:4 kyonaki yoohanna ne us se kaha tha, ki is ko rakhna tujhe uchit naheen haai." 
Matthew14:5 aur vah use mar dalana chahata tha, par logon se drata tha, kyonaki ve use bhavishyadvkta janate the." 
Matthew14:6 par jab herodes ka janm din aya, to herodiyas kee bettee ne utsav men nach dikhakar herodes ko khush kiya." 
Matthew14:7 isaliye us ne shapath khakar vachan diya, ki jo kuchh too mangegee, maain tujhe doonga." 
Matthew14:8 vah apanee mata kee uskai hui bolee, yoohanna bapaatisma denevale ka sir thal men yaheen mujhe mangava de." 
Matthew14:9 raja dukhait hua, par apanee shapath ke, aur sath baaittnevalon ke kara, agyaa dee, ki de diya jaae." 
Matthew14:10 aur jelakhane men logon ko bhejakar yoohanna ka sir kattva diya. 
Matthew14:11 aur usaka sir thal men laya gaya, aur ladkee ko diya gaya aur vah us ko apanee man ke pas le gai." 
Matthew14:12 aur usake chelon ne akar aur us kee loth ko le jakar gaddh diya aur jakar yeeshu ko samachar diya.. 
Matthew14:13 jab yeeshu ne yah suna, to nav par chaddhkar vahan se kisee sunasan jagah aekant men chala gaya aur log yah sunakar nagar nagar se paaidal usake peechhe ho liae." 
Matthew14:14 us ne nikalakar badee bheed dekhee aur un par taras khaya aur us ne un ke beemaron ko changa kiya. 
Matthew14:15 jab sanjh hui, to usake chelon ne usake pas akar kaha yah to sunasan jagah haai aur der ho rahee haai, logon ko vida kiya jaae ki ve bastaiyon men jakar apane liye bhojan mol len." 
Matthew14:16 yeeshu ne un se kaha un ka jana avashyak naheen! tum hee inhen khane ko do. 
Matthew14:17 unhon ne us se kaha yahan hamare pas panch rottee aur do machhliyon ko chhod aur kuchh naheen haai. 
Matthew14:18 us ne kaha, un ko yahan mere pas le ao." 
Matthew14:19 tab us ne logon ko ghaas par baaittne ko kaha, aur un panch rottyaien aur do machhliyon ko liya aur svarga kee or dekhkar dhanyavad kiya aur rottyaian tod todkar chelon ko dee, aur chelon ne logon ko." 
Matthew14:20 aur sab khakar trapt ho gaa, aur unhon ne bache huae ttukadon se bhree hui barah ttokaariyan uttai." 
Matthew14:21 aur khanevale striayon aur balakon ko chhodkar panch hajar purooshaen ke attkal the.. 
Matthew14:22 aur us ne turant apane chelon ko barabas nav par chaddhaya, ki ve us se pahile par chale jaae, jab tak ki vah logon ko vida kare." 
Matthew14:23 vah logon ko vida karake, praarthna karane ko alag pahad par chaddh gaya aur sanjh ko vahan akela tha." 
Matthew14:24 us samay nav jheel ke beech laharon se dgamaga rahee thee, kyonki hava samhane kee thee." 
Matthew14:25 aur vah rat ke chauthe pahar jheel par chalate huae un ke pas aya. 
Matthew14:26 chele us ko jheel par chalate huae dekhkar ghabara gaae! aur kahane lage, vah boot haai aur dar ke mare chilla utte." 
Matthew14:27 yeeshu ne turant un se baten kee, aur kaha ddhaddhs bandhae maain hoon dro mata." 
Matthew14:28 pataras ne us ko uttr diya, he prabhu, yadi too hee haai, to mujhe apane pas panee par chalakar ane kee agyaa de." 
Matthew14:29 us ne kaha, a: tab pataras nav par se utarakar yeeshu ke pas jane ko panee par chalane laga." 
Matthew14:30 par hava ko dekhkar dr gaya, aur jab oobane laga, to chillakar kaha he prabhu, mujhe bacha." 
Matthew14:31 yeeshu ne turant hath baddhakar use tham liya, aur us se kaha, he alpa-avishvasee, too ne kyon sandeh kiya?" 
Matthew14:32 jab ve nav par chaddh gaa, to hava thm gai." 
Matthew14:33 is par jo nav par the, unhon ne use dandvat karake kaha sachamuch too parameshvar ka putra haai.." 
Matthew14:34 ve par utarakar gannesarat desh men pahunche. 
Matthew14:35 aur vahan ke logon ne use pahachanakar as pas ke sare desh men kahala bheja, aur sab beemaron ko usake pas laae." 
Matthew14:36 aur us se binatee karane lage, ki vah unhen apane vasr ke anchal hee ko choone de: aur jitanaen ne use chooa, ve change ho gaae.." 
Matthew15:1 tab yarooshalem se kitane fareesee aur shaasree yeeshu ke pas akar kahane lage. 
Matthew15:2 tere chele puraniyon kee reeton ko kyon ttalate haai, ki bina hath dhaeae rottee khate haain?" 
Matthew15:3 us ne un ko uttr diya, ki tum bhee apanee reeton ke karan kyon parameshvar kee agyaa ttalate ho?" 
Matthew15:4 kyonaki parameshvar ne kaha tha, ki apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana: aur jo koi pita ya mata ko bura kahe, vah mar dala jaae." 
Matthew15:5 par tum kahate ho, ki yadi koi apane pita ya mata se kahe, ki jo kuchh tujhe mujh se labh pahunch sakata tha, vah parameshvar ko bhentt chaddhai ja chukee." 
Matthew15:6 to vah apane pita ka adar n kare, so tum ne apanee reeton ke karan parameshvar ka vachan ttal diya." 
Matthew15:7 he kapattyaie, yashaayah ne tumhare vishay men yah bhavishyadanee tteek kee." 
Matthew15:8 ki ye log hotton se to mera adar karate haai, par un ka man mujh se door rahata haai." 
Matthew15:9 aur ye vyarth meree upasana karate haai, kyonki manushy kee vidhaiyon ko dhamorpadesh karake sikhate haain." 
Matthew15:10 aur us ne logon ko apane pas bulakar un se kaha, suno aur samajho." 
Matthew15:11 jo munh men jata haai, vah manushy ko ashuuddh naheen karata, par jo munh se nikalata haai, vahee manushy ko ashuuddh karata haai." 
Matthew15:12 tab chelon ne akar us se kaha, kya too janata haai ki fareeasiyon ne yah vachan sunakar ttokar khai?" 
Matthew15:13 us ne uttr diya, har paudha jo mere svargeey pita ne naheen lagaya, ukhada jaega." 
Matthew15:14 un ko jane do ve andho marga dikhanevale haain: aur andha yadi andho ko marga dikhaa, to donon gadhe men gir padenge." 
Matthew15:15 yah sunakar, pataras ne us se kaha, yah drashttant hamen samajha de." 
Matthew15:16 us ne kaha, kya tum bhee ab tak na samajh ho?" 
Matthew15:17 kya naheen samajhte, ki jo kuchh munh men jata, vah pett men padta haai, aur sandas men nikal jata haai?" 
Matthew15:18 par jo kuchh munh se nikalata haai, vah man se nikalata haai, aur vahee manushy ko ashuuddh karata haai." 
Matthew15:19 kyonaki kuchinta, hatya, parasreegaman, vyaabhaichar, choree, joottee gavahee aur ninda man hee se nikalatee haai." 
Matthew15:20 yahee haain jo manushy ko ashuuddh karatee haai, parantu hath bina dhaeae bhojan karana manushy ko ashuuddh naheen karata.." 
Matthew15:21 yeeshu vahan se nikalakar, soor aur saaida ke deshaen kee or chala gaya." 
Matthew15:22 aur dekho, us desh se aek kananee sree nikalee, aur chillakar kahane lagee he prabhu daud ke santan, mujh par daya kar, meree bettee ko dushttatma bahut sata raha haai." 
Matthew15:23 par us ne use kuchh uttr n diya, aur usake chelon ne akar us se binatee kar kaha ise vida kara kyonki vah hamare peechhe chillatee atee haai." 
Matthew15:24 us ne uttr diya, ki israel ke gharane kee khoi hui bhedon ko chhod maain kisee ke pas naheen bheja gaya." 
Matthew15:25 par vah ai, aur use pranam karake kahane lagee he prabhu, meree sahayata kara." 
Matthew15:26 us ne uttr diya, ki ladkon kee rottee lekar kuton ke age dalana achchha naheen." 
Matthew15:27 us ne kaha, saty haai prabhu par kutte bhee vah choorachar khate haai, jo un ke svaamiyon kee mej se girate haain." 
Matthew15:28 is par yeeshu ne us ko uttr dekar kaha, ki he sre, tera vishvas bada haai: jaaisa too chahatee haai, tere liye vaaisa hee ho aur us kee bettee usee ghadee changee ho gai.." 
Matthew15:29 yeeshu vahan se chalakar, galeel kee jheel ke pas aya, aur pahad par chaddhkar vahan baaitt gaya." 
Matthew15:30 aur bheed par bheed langado, andhae, goongo, ttundo, aur bahut auron ko lekar usake pas aae aur unhen usake panvon par dal diya, aur us ne unhen changa kiya." 
Matthew15:31 so jab logon ne dekha, ki goonge bolate aur ttunde change hote aur langade chalate aur andho dekhte haai, to achambha karake israael ke parameshvar kee badai kee.." 
Matthew15:32 yeeshu ne apane chelon ko bulakar kaha, mujhe is bheed par taras ata haai kyonaki ve teen din se mere sath haain aur un ke pas kuchh khane ko naheenn aur maain unhen bookha vida karana naheen chahata kaheen aeesa n ho ki marga men thkakar rah jaaen." 
Matthew15:33 chelon ne us se kaha, hamen jangal men kahan se itanee rottee milegee ki ham itanee badee bheed ko trapt karen?" 
Matthew15:34 yeeshu ne un se poochha, tumhare pas kitanee rottyaian haain? unhon ne kaha sat aur thodee see chhottee machhliyan." 
Matthew15:35 tab us ne logon ko boomi par baaittne kee agyaa dee. 
Matthew15:36 aur un sat rottyaien aur machhliyon ko le dhanyavad karake toda aur apane chelon ko deta gaya aur chele logon ko. 
Matthew15:37 so sab khakar trapt ho gaae aur bache huae ttukadon se bhre huae sat ttokare uttaae. 
Matthew15:38 aur khanevale striayon aur balakon ko chhod char hajar puroosh the. 
Matthew15:39 tab vah bheed ko vida karake nav par chaddh gaya, aur magadan desh ke sivanon men aya.." 
Matthew16:1 aur fareesiyon aur sadookiyon ne pas akar use parakhne ke liye us se kaha, ki hamen akash ka koi chinh dikha." 
Matthew16:2 us ne un ko uttr diya, ki sanjh ko tum kahate ho ki khula rahega kyonaki akash lal haai." 
Matthew16:3 aur bhor ko kahate ho, ki aj andhaee aaegee kyonaki akash lal aur dhaumala haai tum akash ka lakshan dekhkar bhed bata sakate ho par samayon ke chinhon ko bhed naheen bata sakate?" 
Matthew16:4 is yug ke bure aur vyaabhaicharee log chinh ddoonddhte haain par yoonus ke chinh ko chhod koi aur chinh unhen n diya jaaega, aur vah unhen chhodkar chala gaya.." 
Matthew16:5 aur chele par jate samay rottee lena bool gaae the. 
Matthew16:6 yeeshu ne un se kaha, dekho fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon ke khmeer se chaukas rahana." 
Matthew16:7 ve apas men vichar karane lage, ki ham to rottee naheen laae." 
Matthew16:8 yah janakar, yeeshu ne un se kaha, he alpavishvasiyo, tum apas men kyon vichar karate ho ki hamare pas rottee naheen?" 
Matthew16:9 kya tum ab tak naheen samajhe? aur un panch hajar kee panch rottee smaran naheen karate, aur n yah ki kitanee ttokaariyan uttain theen?" 
Matthew16:10 aur n un char hajar kee sat rottee aur n yah ki kitane ttokare uttaae gaae the? 
Matthew16:11 tum kyon naheen samajhte ki maain ne tum se rottyaien ke vishay men naheen kaha? fareesiyon aur sadookiyon ke khmeer se chaukas rahana. 
Matthew16:12 tab un ko samajh men aya, ki us ne rottee ke khmeer se nahee, par fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon kee shaiksha se chaukas rahane ko kaha tha." 
Matthew16:13 yeeshu kaaisariya filippee ke desh men akar apane chelon se poochhne laga, ki log manushy ke putra ko kya kahate haain?" 
Matthew16:14 unhon ne kaha, kitane to yoohanna bapatisma denevala kahate haain aur kitane eliyyah, aur kitane yirmayah ya bhvishyadvktaon men se koi ek kahate haain." 
Matthew16:15 us ne un se kaha parantu tum mujhe kya kahate ho? 
Matthew16:16 shamaun pataras ne uttr diya, ki too jeevate parameshvar ka putra maseeh haai." 
Matthew16:17 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya, ki he shamaun yona ke putra, too dhany haai kyonaki mans aur lohoo ne nahee, parantu mere pita ne jo svarga men haai, yah bat tujh par pragatt kee haai." 
Matthew16:18 aur maain bhee tujh se kahata hoo, ki too pataras haai aur maain is patthr par apanee kaleeasiya banaunga: aur adhaelok ke faattk us par prabal n honge." 
Matthew16:19 maain tujhe svarga ke rajy kee kunajiyan doonga: aur jo kuchh too prathvee par bandhoga, vah svarga men bandhoga aur jo kuchh too prathvee par kholega, vah svarga men khulega." 
Matthew16:20 tab us ne chelon ko chitaya, ki kisee se n kahana! ki maain maseeh hoon." 
Matthew16:21 us samay se yeeshu apane chelon ko batane laga, ki mujhe avashy haai, ki yarooshalem ko jau, aur puraaniyon aur mahayajakon aur shaastriayon ke hath se bahut dukh uttaun aur mar dala jaun aur teesare din jee utoon." 
Matthew16:22 is par pataras use alag le jakar jhdikane laga ki he prabhu, parameshvar n kare tujh par aeesa kabhee n hoga." 
Matthew16:23 us ne firakar pataras se kaha, he shautan, mere samhane se door ho: too mere liye ttokar ka karan haai kyonki too parameshvar kee baten nahee, par manushyon kee baton par man lagata haai." 
Matthew16:24 tab yeeshu ne apane chelon se kaha yadi koi mere peechhe ana chahe, to apane ap ka inkar kare aur apana kroos uttaa, aur mere peechhe ho le." 
Matthew16:25 kyonaki jo koi apana praan bachana chahe, vah use khoaega aur jo koi mere liye apana praan khoaega, vah use paaega." 
Matthew16:26 yaadi manushy sare jagat ko praapt kare, aur apane praan kee hati uttaa, to use kya labh hoga? ya manushy apane praan ke badale men kya dega?" 
Matthew16:27 manushy ka putra apane svargadooton ke sath apane pita kee maahima men aaega, aur us samay vah har aek ko usake kamon ke anusar praatifal dega." 
Matthew16:28 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jo yahan khde haai, un men se kitane aeese haain ki jab tak manushy ke putra ko usake rajy men ate huae n dekh lenge, tab tak mratyu ka svad kabhee n chakhenge." 
Matthew17:1 chh: din ke bad yeeshu ne pataras aur yakoob aur usake bhai yoohanna ko sath liya, aur unhen aekant men kisee unche pahad par le gaya." 
Matthew17:2 aur unake samhane usaka roopantar hua aur usaka munh soorya kee nai chamaka aur usaka vasr jyoti kee nain ujala ho gaya. 
Matthew17:3 aur dekho, moosa aur aeliyyah usake sath baten karate huae unhen dikhai diae." 
Matthew17:4 is par pataras ne yeeshu se kaha, he prabhu, hamara yahan rahana achchha haai ichchha ho to yahan teen mandp banaun aek tere liye, aek moosa ke liye, aur aek aeliyyah ke liye." 
Matthew17:5 vah bol hee raha tha, ki dekho, aek ujale badal ne unhen chha liya, aur dekho us badal men se yah shabd nikala, ki yah mera piry putra haai, jis se maain prasann hoon: is kee suno." 
Matthew17:6 chele yah sunakar munh ke bal gir gaae aur atyant dr gaae. 
Matthew17:7 yeeshu ne pas akar unhen chooa, aur kaha, utto dro mata." 
Matthew17:8 tab unhon ne apanee ankhe uttakar yeeshu ko chhod aur kisee ko n dekha. 
Matthew17:9 jab ve pahad se utar rahe the tab yeeshu ne unhen yah agyaa dee ki jab tak manushy ka putra mare huon men se n jee utte tab tak jo kuchh tum ne dekha haai kisee se n kahana. 
Matthew17:10 aur usake chelon ne us se poochha, fir shaasree kyon kahate haai, ki aeliyyah ka pahale ana avashy haai?" 
Matthew17:11 us ne uttr diya, ki eliyyah to aega: aur sab kuchh sudhaarega." 
Matthew17:12 parantu maain tum se kahata hoo, ki aeliyyah a chuka aur unhon ne use naheen pahachana parantu jaaisa chaha vaaisa hee usake sath kiya: isee reeti se manushy ka putra bhee un ke hath se dukh uttaaega." 
Matthew17:13 tab chelon ne samajha ki us ne ham se yoohanna bapatisma denevale ke vishay men kaha haai. 
Matthew17:14 jab ve bheed ke pas pahunche, to aek manushy usake pas aya, aur ghauttne ttekakar kahane laga." 
Matthew17:15 he prabhu, mere putra par daya kara kyonki us ko mirgee atee haai: aur vah bahut dukh uttata haai aur bar bar ag men aur bar bar panee men gir padta haai." 
Matthew17:16 aur maain us ko tere chelon ke pas laya tha, par ve use achchha naheen kar sake." 
Matthew17:17 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki he avishvasee aur hatteele logon maain kab tak tumhare sath rahoonga? kab tak tumharee sahoonga? use yahan mere pas lao." 
Matthew17:18 tab yeeshu ne use ghaudka, aur dushttatma us men se nikala aur ladka usee ghadee achchha ho gaya." 
Matthew17:19 tab chelon ne aekant men yeeshu ke pas akar kaha ham ise kyon naheen nikal sake? 
Matthew17:20 us ne un se kaha, apane vishvas kee ghattee ke karan: kyonaki maain tum se sach kahata hoo, yadi tumhara vishvas rai ke dane ke barabar bhee ho, to is pahad se kah sakoge, ki yahan se sarakakar vahan chala ja, to vah chala jaega aur koi bat tumhare liye anhonee n hogee." 
Matthew17:21 jab ve galeel men the, to yeeshu ne un se kaha manushy ka putra manushyon ke hath men pakadvaya jaaega." 
Matthew17:22 aur ve use mar dalenge, aur vah teesare din jee uttega." 
Matthew17:23 is par ve bahut udas huae.. 
Matthew17:24 jab ve kafaranahoom men pahunche, to maandair ke liye kar lenevalon ne pataras ke pas akar poochha, ki kya tumhara guroo mandair ka kar naheen deta? us ne kaha, han deta to haai." 
Matthew17:25 jab vah ghar men aya, to yeeshu ne usake poochhne se pahile us se kaha, he shamaun too kya samajhta haai? prathvee ke raja mahasool ya kar kin se lete haain? apane putraen se ya parayon se? pataras ne un se kaha, parayon se." 
Matthew17:26 yeeshu n us se kaha, to putra bach gaae." 
Matthew17:27 taubhee isaaliye ki ham unhen ttokar n khailaae, too jheel ke kinare jakar bansee dal, aur jo machhlee pahile nikale, use le to tujhe usaka munh kholane par aek sikka milega, usee ko lekar mere aur apane badale unhen de dena.." 
Matthew18:1 usee ghadee chele yeeshu ke pas akar poochhne lage, ki svarga ke rajy men bada kaun haai?" 
Matthew18:2 is par us ne aek balak ko pas bulakar un ke beech men khda kiya. 
Matthew18:3 aur kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, yadi tum n firo aur balakon ke saman n bano, to svarga ke rajy men pravesh karane naheen paoge." 
Matthew18:4 jo koi apane ap ko is balak ke saman chhotta karega, vah svarga ke rajy men bada hoga." 
Matthew18:5 aur jo koi mere nam se aek aeese balak ko grahan karata haai vah mujhe grahan karata haai. 
Matthew18:6 par jo koi in chhotton men se jo mujh par vishvas karate haain aek ko ttokar khailaa, usake liye bhla hota, ki badee chakkee ka patt usake gale men lattkaya jata, aur vah gaahire samudra men dubaya jata." 
Matthew18:7 ttokaron ke karan sansar par haya! ttokaron ka lagana avashy haai par hay us manushy par jis ke dara ttokar lagatee haai. 
Matthew18:8 yaadi tera hath ya tera panv tujhe ttokar khailaa, to kattkar faenk de ttunda ya langada hokar jeevan men pravesh karana tere liye is se bhla haai, ki do hath ya do panv rahate huae too anant ag men dala jaae." 
Matthew18:9 aur yaadi teree ankh tujhe ttokar khailaa, to use nikalakar faenk de." 
Matthew18:10 kana hokar jeevan men pravesh karana tere liye is se bhla haai, ki do ankh rahate huae too narak kee ag men dala jaae." 
Matthew18:11 dekho, tum in chhotton men se kisee ko tuchchh n janana kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki svarga men un ke doot mere svargeey pita ka munh sada dekhte haain."
