Matthew18:12 tum kya samajhte ho? yaadi kisee manushy kee sau bheden ho, aur un men se aek bhttk jaa, to kya ninnanave ko chhodkar, aur pahadon par jakar, us bhttkee hui ko n ddoonddhega?" 
Matthew18:13 aur yaadi aeesa ho ki use paa, to maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki vah un ninnanave bhedon ke liye jo bhttkee naheen theen itana anand naheen karega, jitana ki is bhed ke liye karega." 
Matthew18:14 aeesa hee tumhare pita kee jo svarga men haai yah ichchha nahee, ki in chhotton men se aek bhee nash ho." 
Matthew18:15 yaadi tera bhai tera aparadha kare, to ja aur akele men batacheet karake use samajha yadi vah teree sune to too ne apane bhai ko pa liya." 
Matthew18:16 aur yaadi vah n sune, to aur aek do jan ko apane sath le ja, ki har aek bat do ya teen gavahon ke munh se ttharai jaae." 
Matthew18:17 yaadi vah un kee bhee n mane, to kaleeasiya se kah de, parantu yadi vah kaleeasiya kee bhee n mane, to too use anyajaati aur mahasool lenevale ke aeesa jana." 
Matthew18:18 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, jo kuchh tum prathvee par bandhaege, vah svarga par bandhoga aur jo kuchh tum prathvee par khologe, vah svarga par khulega." 
Matthew18:19 fir maain tum se kahata hoo, yadi tum men se do jan prathvee par kisee bat ke liye jise ve mange, aek man ke ho, to vah mere pita kee or se svarga men haai un ke liye ho jaaegee." 
Matthew18:20 kyonaki jahan do ya teen mere nam par ikatthe hote haain vahan maain un ke beech men hota hoon.. 
Matthew18:21 tab pataras ne pas akar, us se kaha, he prabhu, yaadi mera bhai aparadha karata rahe, to maain kitanee bar use kshama karoo, kya sat bar taka?" 
Matthew18:22 yeeshu ne us se kaha, maain tujh se yah naheen kahata, ki sat bar, baran sat bar ke sattr gune taka." 
Matthew18:23 isaliye svarga ka rajy us raja ke saman haai, jis ne apane dason se lekha lena chaha." 
Matthew18:24 jab vah lekha lene laga, to aek jan usake samhane laya gaya jo das hajar tode dhaarata tha." 
Matthew18:25 jab ki chukane ko usake pas kuchh n tha, to usake svamee ne kaha, ki yah aur is kee patnee aur ladkebale aur jo kuchh is ka haai sab becha jaa, aur vah karja chuka diya jaae." 
Matthew18:26 is par us das ne girakar use pranam kiya, aur kaha he svamee, dhaeeraj dhar, maain sab kuchh bhr doonga." 
Matthew18:27 tab us das ke svamee ne taras khakar use chhod diya, aur usaka dhaar kshama kiya." 
Matthew18:28 parantu jab vah das bahar nikala, to usake sangee dason men se aek us ko mila, jo usake sau deenar dhaarata tha us ne use pakadkar usaka gala ghaentta, aur kaha jo kuchh too dhaarata haai bhr de." 
Matthew18:29 is par usaka sangee das girakar, us se binatee karane laga ki dhaeeraj dhar maain sab bhr doonga." 
Matthew18:30 us ne n mana, parantu jakar use bandeegrah men dal diya ki jab tak karja ko bhr n de, tab tak vaheen rahe." 
Matthew18:31 usake sangee das yah jo hua tha dekhkar bahut udas hua, aur jakar apane svamee ko poora hal bata diya." 
Matthew18:32 tab usake svamee ne us ko bulakar us se kaha, he dushtt das, too ne jo mujh se binatee kee, to maain ne to tera vah poora karja kshama kiya." 
Matthew18:33 so jaaisa maain ne tujh par daya kee, vaaise hee kya tujhe bhee apane sangee das par daya karana naheen chaahiae tha?" 
Matthew18:34 aur usake svamee ne krodha men akar use dand denevalon ke hath men saunp diya, ki jab tak vah sab karja bhr n de, tab tak un ke hath men rahe." 
Matthew18:35 isee prakar yaadi tum men se har aek apane bhai ko man se kshama n karega, to mera pita jo svarga men haai, tum se bhee vaaisa hee karega.." 
Matthew19:1 jab yeeshu ye baten kah chuka, to galeel se chala gaya aur yahoodiya ke desh men yaradan ke par aya." 
Matthew19:2 aur badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee, aur us ne unhen vahan changa kiya.." 
Matthew19:3 tab fareesee us kee pareeksha karane ke liye pas akar kahane lage, kya har aek karan se apanee patnee ko tyagana uchit haai?" 
Matthew19:4 us ne uttr diya, kya tum ne naheen paddha, ki jis ne unhen banaya, us ne arambh se nar aur naree banakar kaha." 
Matthew19:5 ki is karan manushy apane mata pita se alag hokar apanee patnee ke sath rahega aur ve donon aek tan honge? 
Matthew19:6 so v ab do nahee, parantu aek tan haain: isaliye jise parameshvar ne joda haai, use manushy alag n kare." 
Matthew19:7 unhon ne us se kaha, fir moosa ne kyon yah ttharaya, ki tyagapatra dekar use chhod de?" 
Matthew19:8 us ne un se kaha, moosa ne tumhare man kee kattorata ke karan tumhen apanee patnee ko chhod dene kee agyaa dee, parantu arambh men aeesa naheen tha." 
Matthew19:9 aur maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jo koi vyabhaichar ko chhod aur kisee karan se apanee patnee ko tyagakar, doosaree se byah kare, vah vyabhaichar karata haai: aur jo chhodee hui ko byah kare, vah bhee vyabhaichar karata haai." 
Matthew19:10 chelon ne us se kaha, yaadi puroosh ka sree ke sath aeesa sambandha haai, to byah karana achchha naheen." 
Matthew19:11 us ne un se kaha, sab yah vachan grahan naheen kar sakate, keval ve jin ko yah dan diya gaya haai." 
Matthew19:12 kyonaki kuchh napunsak aeese haain jo mata ke garbh hee se aeese janmen aur kuchh nanpusak aeese haai, jinhen manushy ne napunsak banaya: aur kuchh napunsak aese haai, jinhon ne svarga ke rajy ke liye apane ap ko napunsak banaya haai, jo is ko grahan kar sakata haai, vah grahan kare." 
Matthew19:13 tab log balakon ko usake pas laa, ki vah un par hath rakhe aur praarthna kare par chelon ne unhen dantta." 
Matthew19:14 yeeshu ne kaha, balakon ko mere pas ane do: aur unhen mana n karo, kyonki svarga ka rajy aeeson hee ka haai." 
Matthew19:15 aur vah un par hath rakhkar, vahan se chala gaya." 
Matthew19:16 aur dekho, aek manushy ne pas akar us se kaha, he guroo maain kaun sa bhla kam karoo, ki anant jeevan paun?" 
Matthew19:17 us ne us se kaha, too mujh se bhlai ke vishay men kyon poochhta haai? bhla to ek hee haai par yadi too jeevan men pravesh karana chahata haai, to agyaaon ko mana kara." 
Matthew19:18 us ne us se kaha, kaun see agyaaen? yeeshu ne kaha, yah ki hatya n karana, vyabhaichar n karana, choree n karana, joottee gavahee n dena." 
Matthew19:19 apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana, aur apane padosee se apane saman praem rakhna." 
Matthew19:20 us javan ne us se kaha, in sab ko to maain ne mana haai ab mujh men kis bat kee ghattee haai?" 
Matthew19:21 yeeshu ne us se kaha, yaadi too siddh hona chahata haai to ja, apana mal bechakar kangalon ko de aur tujhe svarga men dhan milega aur akar mere peechhe ho le." 
Matthew19:22 parantu vah javan yah bat sun udas hokar chala gaya, kyonaki vah bahut dhanee tha.." 
Matthew19:23 tab yeeshu ne apane chelon se kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki dhanavan ka svarga ke rajy men pravesh karana kaattnai haai." 
Matthew19:24 fir tum se kahata hoo, ki parameshvar ke rajy men dhanavan ke pravesh karane se untt ka sooi ke nake men se nikal jana sahaj haai." 
Matthew19:25 yah sunakar, chelon ne bahut chakit hokar kaha, fir kis ka uddhar ho sakata haai?" 
Matthew19:26 yeeshu ne un kee or dekhkar kaha, manushyon se to yah naheen ho sakata, parantu parameshvar se sab kuchh ho sakata haai." 
Matthew19:27 is par pataras ne us se kaha, ki dek, ham to sab kuchh chhod ke tere peechhe ho liye haain: to hamen kya milega?" 
Matthew19:28 yeeshu ne un se kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki nai utpaati se jab manushy ka putra apanee maahima ke sihansan par baaittega, to tum bhee jo mere peechhe ho liye ho, barah sinhasanon par baaittkar israael ke barah gotraen ka nyay karoge." 
Matthew19:29 aur jis kisee ne gharon ya bhaiyon ya bahinon ya pita ya mata ya ladkebalon ya kheton ko mere nam ke liye chhod diya haai, us ko sau guna milega: aur vah anant jeevan ka aadhaikaree hoga." 
Matthew19:30 parantu bahutere jo paahile haai, pichhle honge aur jo pichhle haai, pahile honge.." 
Matthew20:1 svarga ka rajy kisee grahasth ke saman haai, jo sabere nikala, ki apane dakh kee baree men majadooron ko lagaae." 
Matthew20:2 aur us ne majadooron se aek deenar raj par ttharakar, unhen apane dakh kee baree men bheja." 
Matthew20:3 fir pahar aek din chaddhe, nikalakar, aur auron ko bajar men bekar khde dekhkar," 
Matthew20:4 un se kaha, tum bhee dakh kee baree men jao, aur jo kuchh tteek haai, tumhen doonga so ve bhee gae." 
Matthew20:5 fir us ne doosare aur teesare pahar ke nikatt nikalakar vaaisa hee kiya. 
Matthew20:6 aur aek ghantta din rahe fir nikalakar auron ko khde paya, aur un se kaha tu kyon yahan din bhr bekar khde rahe? unhon ne us se kaha, isaliye, ki kisee ne hamen majadooree par naheen lagaya." 
Matthew20:7 us ne un se kaha, tum bhee da,a kee baree men jao." 
Matthew20:8 sanjh ko dakh baree ke svamee ne apane bhndaree se kaha, majadooron ko bulakar pichhlon se lekar paahilon tak unhen majadooree de de." 
Matthew20:9 so jab ve aa, jo ghantta bhr din rahe lagaae gaae the, to unhen aek aek deenar mila." 
Matthew20:10 jo paahile aa, unhon ne yah samajha, ki hamen aadhaik milega parantu unhen bhee aek hee aek deenar mila." 
Matthew20:11 jab mila, to vah grahasth par kudkuda ke kahane lage." 
Matthew20:12 ki in pichhlon ne aek hee ghantta kam kiya, aur too ne unhen hamare barabar kar diya, jinhon ne din bhr ka bhar uttaya aur ghaam saha?" 
Matthew20:13 us ne un men se ek ko uttr diya, ki he mitra, maain tujh se kuchh anyay naheen karata kya too ne mujh se ek deenar n ttharaya?" 
Matthew20:14 jo tera haai, utta le, aur chala ja meree ichchha yah haai ki jitana tujhe, utana hee is pichhle ko bhee doon." 
Matthew20:15 kya uchit naheen ki man apane mal se jo chahoon so karoon? kya too mere bhle hone ke karan buree drashtti se dekhta haai? 
Matthew20:16 isee reeti se jo pichhle haai, vah pahile honge, aur jo paahile haai, ve pichhle honge.." 
Matthew20:17 yeeshu yarooshalem ko jate huae barah chelon ko aekant men le gaya, aur marga men un se kahane laga." 
Matthew20:18 ki dekho, ham yarooshalem ko jate haain aur manushy ka putra mahayajakon aur shaaastriayon ke hath pakadvaya jaaega aur ve us ko ghaat ke yogy ttharaaenge." 
Matthew20:19 aur us ko anyajatiyon ke hath sonpenge, ki ve use tttthon men udaae, aur kode mare, aur kroos par chaddhaae, aur vah teesare din jilaya jaaega.." 
Matthew20:20 jab jabdee ke putraen kee mata ne apane putraen ke sath usake pas akar pranam kiya, aur us se kuchh mangane lagee." 
Matthew20:21 us ne us se kaha, too kya chahatee haai? vah us se bolee, yah kah, ki mere ye do putra tere rajy men ek tere daahine aur ek tere baen baaitten." 
Matthew20:22 yeeshu ne uttr diya, tum naheen janate ki kya mangate ho? jo kattora maain peene par hoo, kya tum pee sakate ho? unhon ne us se kaha, pee sakate haain." 
Matthew20:23 us ne un se kaha, tum mera kattora to peeoge par apane daahine baen kisee ko bittana mera kam nahee, par jin ke liye mere pita kee or se taaiyar kiya gaya, unhen ke liye haai." 
Matthew20:24 yah sunakar, dason chele un donon bhaiyon par kruddh huae." 
Matthew20:25 yeeshu ne unhen pas bulakar kaha, tum janate ho, ki any jaatiyon ke haakim un par prabhuta karate haain aur jo bade haai, ve un par adhaikar jatate haain." 
Matthew20:26 parantu tum men aeesa n hoga parantu jo koi tum men bada hona chahe, vah tumhara sevak bane." 
Matthew20:27 aur jo tum men pradhaan hona chahe vah tumhara das bane. 
Matthew20:28 jaaise ki manushy ka putra, vah isaliye naheen aya ki us kee seva tthal kii jaa, parantu isaaliye aya ki ap seva tthal kare aur bahuton kee chhudautee ke liye apane praan de.." 
Matthew20:29 jab ve yareeho se nikal rahe the, to aek badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee." 
Matthew20:30 aur dekho, do andho, jo sadkar ke kinare baaitte the, yah sunakar ki yeeshu ja raha haai, pukarakar kahane lage ki he prabhu, daud kee santan, ham par daya kara." 
Matthew20:31 logon ne unhen dantta, ki chup rahe, par ve aur bhee chillakar bole, he prabhu, daud kee santan, ham par daya kara." 
Matthew20:32 tab yeeshu ne khde hokar, unhen bulaya, aur kaha" 
Matthew20:33 tum kya chahate ho ki maain tumhare liye karoon? unhon ne us se kaha, he prabhu yah ki hamaree ankhe khul jaaen." 
Matthew20:34 yeeshu ne taras khakar un kee ankhe chooi, aur ve turant dekhne lage aur usake peechhe ho liae.." 
Matthew21:1 jab ve yarooshalem ke nikatt pahunche aur jaaitoon pahad par baaitafage ke pas aa, to yeeshu ne do chelon ko yah kahakar bheja." 
Matthew21:2 ki apane samhane ke ganv men jao, vahan panhuchate hee aek gadahee bandhaee hui, aur usake sath bachcha tumhen milega unhen kholakar, mere pas le ao." 
Matthew21:3 yaadi tum men se koi kuchh kahe, to kaho, ki prabhu ko in ka prayojan haai: tab vah turant unhen bhej dega." 
Matthew21:4 yah isaliye hua, ki jo vachan bhavishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha, vah poora ho" 
Matthew21:5 ki siyyon kee bettee se kaho, dek, tera raja tere pas ata haai vah namra haai aur gadahe par baaitta haai baran ladoo ke bachche para." 
Matthew21:6 chelon ne jakar, jaaisa yeeshu ne un se kaha tha, vaaisa hee kiya." 
Matthew21:7 aur gadahee aur bachche ko lakar, un par apane kapade dale, aur vah un par baaitt gaya." 
Matthew21:8 aur bahutere logon ne apane kapade marga men bichhaa, aur aur logon ne pedon se daaliyan kattkar marga men bichhai." 
Matthew21:9 aur jo bheed age age jatee aur peechhe peechhe chalee atee thee, pukar pukar kar kahatee thee, ki daud kee santan ko hoshaana dhany haai vah jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai, akash men hoshaana." 
Matthew21:10 jab us ne yarooshalem men pravesh kiya, to sare nagar men halachal mach gai aur log kahane lage, yah kaun haai?" 
Matthew21:11 logon ne kaha, yah galeel ke nasarat ka bhvishyadvkta yeeshu haai.." 
Matthew21:12 yeeshu ne parameshvar ke mandair men jakar, un sab ko, jo mandair men len den kar rahe the, nikal diya aur sarrafaon ke peeddhe aur kabootaron ke bechanevalon kee chauakiyan ulatt deen." 
Matthew21:13 aur un se kaha, likha haai, ki mera ghar praarthna ka ghar kahalaaega parantu tum use dakuon kee khoh banate ho." 
Matthew21:14 aur andho aur langade, maandair men usake pas laa, aur us ne unhen changa kiya." 
Matthew21:15 parantu jab mahayajakon aur shaaastriayon ne in adabhut kamon ko, jo us ne kia, aur ladkon ko maandair men daud kee santan ko hoshaana pukarate huae dekha, to krodhait hokar us se kahane lage, kya too sunata haai ki ye kya kahate haain?" 
Matthew21:16 yeeshu ne un se kaha, han kya tum ne yah kabhee naheen paddha, ki balakon aur doodha peete bachchon ke munh se tu ne stuati siddh karai?" 
Matthew21:17 tab vah unhen chhodkar nagar ke bahar baaitaaniyyah ko gaya, or vahana rat bitai.." 
Matthew21:18 bhor ko jab vah nagar ko lautt raha tha, to use bookh lagee." 
Matthew21:19 aur anjeer ke ped sadk ke kinare dekhkar vah usake pas gaya, aur paton ko chhod us men aur kuchh n pakar us se kaha, ab se tujh men fir kabhee fal n lage aur anjeer ka ped turant sukh gaya." 
Matthew21:20 yah dekhkar chelon ne achambha kiya, aur kaha, yah anjeer ka ped kyonkar turant sookh gaya?" 
Matthew21:21 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya, ki maain tum se sach kahata hoon yaadi tum vishvas rakho, aur sandeh n karo to n keval yah karoge, jo is anjeer ke ped se kiya gaya haai parantu yadi is pahad se bhee kahoge, ki ukhd jo aur samudra men ja pad, to yah ho jaaega." 
Matthew21:22 aur jo kuchh tum praarthna men vishvas se mangoge vah sab tum ko milega.. 
Matthew21:23 vah maandair men jakar upadesh kar raha tha, ki mahayajakon aur logon ke puraniyon ne usake pas akar poochha, too ye kam kis ke adhaikar se karata haai? aur tujhe yah aadhaikar kis ne diya haai?" 
Matthew21:24 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya, ki maain bhee tum se aek bat poochhta hoon yadi vah mujhe bataoge, to maain bhee tumhen bataunga ki ye kam kis adhaikar se karata hoon." 
Matthew21:25 yoohanna ka bapaatisma kahan se tha? svarga kee or se ya manushyon kee or se tha? tab ve apas men vivad karane lage, ki yadi ham kahen svarga kee or se, to vah hame se kahega, fir tum ne us kee prateeati kyon n kee?" 
Matthew21:26 aur yaadi kahen manushyon kee or se to hamen bheed ka dr haai kyonaki ve sab yuhanna ko bhvishyadvkta janate haain. 
Matthew21:27 so unhon ne yeeshu ko uttr diya, ki ham naheen janate us ne bhee un se kaha, to maain bhee tumhen naheen batata, ki ye kam kis adhaikar se karata hoon." 
Matthew21:28 tum kya samajhte ho? kisee manushy ke do putra the us ne pahile ke pas jakar kaha he putra aj dakh kee baree men kam kara. 
Matthew21:29 us ne uttr diya, maain naheen jaunga, parantu peechhe pachhta kar gaya." 
Matthew21:30 fir doosare ke pas jakar aeesa hee kaha, us ne uttr diya, jee han jata hoo, parantu naheen gaya." 
Matthew21:31 in donon men se kis ne pita kee ichchha pooree kee? unhon ne kaha, pahile ne: yeeshu ne un se kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki mahasool lenevale aur veshya tum se pahile parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karate haain." 
Matthew21:32 kyonaki yoohanna dharma ke marga se tumhare pas aya, aur tum ne us kee prateeti n kee: par mahasool lenevalon aur veshyaon ne us kee prateeati kee: aur tum yah dekhkar peechhe bhee n pachhtaae ki us kee prateeati kar lete.." 
Matthew21:33 aek aur drashttant suno: aek grahasth tha, jis ne dakh kee baree lagai aur usake charon or bada bandhaa aur us me ras ka kund khoda aur gummatt banaya aur kisanon ko usaka tteeka dekar paradesh chala gaya." 
Matthew21:34 jab fal ka samay nikatt aya, to us ne apane dason ko usaka fal lene ke liye kisanon ke pas bheja." 
Matthew21:35 par kisanon ne usake dason ko pakad ke, kisee ko peetta, aur kisee ko mar dala aur kisee ko patthravah kiya." 
Matthew21:36 fir us ne aur dason ko bheja, jo pahilon se aadhaik the aur unhon ne un se bhee vaaisa hee kiya." 
Matthew21:37 ant men us ne apane putra ko un ke pas yah kahakar bheja, ki ve mere putra ka adar karenge." 
Matthew21:38 parantu kisanon ne putra ko dekhkar apas men kaha, yah to vaaris haai, ao, use mar dalen: aur us kee meeras le len." 
Matthew21:39 aur unhon ne use pakada aur dakh kee baree se bahar nikalakar mar dala. 
Matthew21:40 isaliye jab dakh kee baree ka svamee aaega, to un kisanon ke sath kya karega?" 
Matthew21:41 unhonne us se kaha, vah un bure logon ko buree reeati se nash karega aur dakh kee baree ka tteeka aur kisanon ko dega, jo samay par use fal diya karenge." 
Matthew21:42 yeeshu ne un se kaha, kya tum ne kabhee paavitra shaasr men yah naheen paddha, ki jis patthr ko rajaamistriayon ne nikamma ttharaya tha, vahee kone ke sire ka patthr ho gaya?" 
Matthew21:43 yah prabhu kee or se hua, aur hamare dekhte men adabhut haai, isaaliye maain tum se kahata hoo, ki parameshvar ka rajy tum se le liya jaaega aur aeesee jaati ko jo usaka fal laa, diya jaaega." 
Matthew21:44 jo is patthr par girega, vah chakanachoor ho jaaega: aur jis par vah girega, us ko pees dalega." 
Matthew21:45 mahayajak aur fareesee usake drashttanton ko sunakar samajh gaa, ki vah hamare vishay men kahata haai." 
Matthew21:46 aur unhon ne use pakadna chaha, parantu logon se dr gaae kyonki ve use bhavishyadvkta janate the.." 
Matthew22:1 is par yeeshu fir un se drashttanton men kahane laga. 
Matthew22:2 svarga ka rajy us raja ke saman haai, jis ne apane putra ka byah kiya." 
Matthew22:3 aur us ne apane dason ko bheja, ki nevatahaariyon ko byah ke bhoj men bulaaen parantu unhon ne ana n chaha." 
Matthew22:4 fir us ne aur dason ko yah kahakar bheja, ki nevatahaariyon se kaho, dekho maain bhoj taaiyar kar chuka hoo, aur mere baail aur pale huae pashu mare gaae haain: aur sab kuchh taaiyar haai byah ke bhoj men ao." 
Matthew22:5 parantu ve beparavai karake chal diae: koi apane khet ko, koi apane byopar ko." 
Matthew22:6 auron ne jo bach rahe the usake dason ko pakadkar un ka anadar kiya aur mar dala. 
Matthew22:7 raja ne krodha kiya, aur apanee sena bhejakar un hatyaron ko nash kiya, aur un ke nagar foonk diya." 
Matthew22:8 tab us ne apane dason se kaha, byah ka bhoj to taaiyar haai, parantu nevataharee yogy n tthare." 
Matthew22:9 isaliye chaurahon men jao, aur jitane log tumhen mile, sab ko byah ke bhoj men bula lao." 
Matthew22:10 so un dason ne sadkon par jakar kya bure, kya bhle, jitane mile, sab ko ikatthe kiya aur byah ka ghar jevanaharon se bhr gaya." 
Matthew22:11 jab raja jevanaharon ke dekhne ko bheetar aya to us ne vahan aek manushy ko dekha, jo byah ka vasr naheen paahine tha." 
Matthew22:12 us ne usase poochha he mitra too byah ka vasr paahine bina yahan kyon a gaya? usaka munh band ho gaya. 
Matthew22:13 tab raja ne sevakon se kaha, is ke hath panv bandhakar use bahar aandhiayare men dal do, vahan rona, aur dant peesana hoga." 
Matthew22:14 kyonaki bulaae huae to bahut parantu chune huae thode haain.. 
Matthew22:15 tab fareesiyon ne jakar apas men vichar kiya, ki us ko kis prakar baton men fansaaen." 
Matthew22:16 so unhon ne apane chelon ko herodiyon ke sath usake pas yah kahane ko bheja, ki he guroo ham janate haai, ki too sachcha haai aur parameshvar ka marga sachchai se sikhata haai aur kisee kee parava naheen karata, kyonki too manushyon ka munh dekhkar baten nahee karata." 
Matthew22:17 is liye hamen bata too kya samajhta haai? kaaisar ko kar dena uchit haai, ki naheen." 
Matthew22:18 yeeshu ne un kee dushttta janakar kaha, he kapaattyaien mujhe kyon parakhte ho?" 
Matthew22:19 kar ka sikka mujhe dikhao: tab ve usake pas aek deenar le aae. 
Matthew22:20 us ne, un se poochha, yah mootira aur nam kis ka haai?" 
Matthew22:21 unhon ne us se kaha, kaaisar ka tab us ne, un se kaha jo kaaisar ka haai, vah kaaisar ko aur jo parameshvar ka haai, vah parameshvar ko do." 
Matthew22:22 yah sunakar unhon ne achambha kiya, aur use chhodkar chale gaae.." 
Matthew22:23 usee din sadookee jo kahate haain ki mare huon ka punarootthan haai hee naheen usake pas aa, aur us se poochha." 
Matthew22:24 ki he guroo moosa ne kaha tha, ki yadi koi bina santan mar jaa, to usaka bhai us kee patnee ko byah karake apane bhai ke liye vansh utpann kare." 
Matthew22:25 ab hamare yahan sat bhai the paahila byah karake mar gaya aur santan n hone ke karan apanee patnee ko apane bhai ke liye chhod gaya. 
Matthew22:26 isee prakar doosare aur teesare ne bhee kiya, aur saton tak yahee hua." 
Matthew22:27 sab ke bad vah sree bhee mar gai. 
Matthew22:28 so jee uttne par, vah un saton men se kis kee patnee hogee? kyonaki vah sab kee patnee ho chukee thee." 
Matthew22:29 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya, ki tum pavitra shaasr aur parameshvar kee samarth naheen janate is karan bool men pad gaae ho." 
Matthew22:30 kyonaki jee uttne par byah shaadee n hogee parantu ve svarga men parameshvar ke dooton kee nai honge. 
Matthew22:31 parantu mare huon ke jee uttne ke vishay men kya tum ne yah vachan naheen paddha jo parameshvar ne tum se kaha. 
Matthew22:32 ki maain ibraaheem ka parameshvar, aur isahak ka parameshvar, aur yakoob ka parameshvar hoon? vah to mare huon ka nahee, parantu jeevaton ka parameshvar haai." 
Matthew22:33 yah sunakar log usake upadesh se chakit hue. 
Matthew22:34 jab fareesiyon ne suna, ki us ne sadookiyon ka munh band kar diya to ve ikatthe huae." 
Matthew22:35 aur un men se aek vyavasthapak ne parakhne ke liye, us se poochha." 
Matthew22:36 he guroo vyavastha men kaun see agyaa badee haai? 
Matthew22:37 us ne us se kaha, too parameshvar apane prabhu se apane sare man aur apane sare praan aur apanee saree buaddh ike sath praem rakh." 
Matthew22:38 badee aur mukhy agyaa to yahee haai. 
Matthew22:39 aur usee ke saman yah doosaree bhee haai, ki too apane padosee se apane saman praem rakh." 
Matthew22:40 ye hee do agyaaaen saree vyavastha aur bhvishyadvktaon ka adhaar haai.. 
Matthew22:41 jab fareesee ikatthe the, to yeeshu ne un se poochha." 
Matthew22:42 ki maseeh ke vishay men tum kya samajhte ho? vah kis ka santan haai? unhon ne us se kaha, daud ka." 
Matthew22:43 us ne un se poochha, to daud atma men hokar use prabhu kyon kahata haai?" 
Matthew22:44 ki prabhu ne, mere prabhu se kaha mere daahine baait, jab tak ki maain tere baaiariyon ko tere panvon ke neeche n kar doon." 
Matthew22:45 bhla, jab daud use prabhu kahata haai, to vah usaka putra kyonkar tthara?" 
Matthew22:46 usake uttr men koi bhee ek bat n kah saka parantu us din se kisee ko fir us se kuchh poochhne ka hiyav n hua.. 
Matthew23:1 tab yeeshu ne bheed se aur apane chelon se kaha. 
Matthew23:2 shaasree aur fareesee moosa kee gaee par baaitte haain. 
Matthew23:3 isaliye ve tum se jo kuchh kahen vah karana, aur manana parantu un ke se kam mat karana kyonaki ve kahate to haain par karate naheen." 
Matthew23:4 ve aek aeese bharee bojh ko jin ko uttana kattnai haai, bandhakar unhen manushyon ke kandhaen par rakhte haain parantu ap unhen apanee ungalee se bhee sarakana naheen chahate." 
Matthew23:5 ve apane sab kam logon ko dikhane ke liye karate haain: ve apane taveejon ko chaude karate, aur apane vasren kee koren baddhate haain." 
Matthew23:6 jevanaron men mukhy mukhy jagahe, aur sabha men mukhy mukhy asana." 
Matthew23:7 aur bajaron men namaskar aur manushy men rabbee kahalana unhen bhata haai. 
Matthew23:8 parantu, tum rabbee n kahalana kayonki tumhara aek hee guroo haai: aur tum sab bhai ho." 
Matthew23:9 aur prathvee par kisee ko apana pita n kahana, kayonki tumhara aek hee pita haai, jo svarga men haai." 
Matthew23:10 aur svamee bhee n kahalana, kyonaki tumhara aek hee svamee haai, arthata maseeha." 
Matthew23:11 jo tum men bada ho, vah tumhara sevak bane." 
Matthew23:12 jo koi apane ap ko bada banaaega, vah chhotta kiya jaaega: aur jo koi apane ap ko chhotta banaaega, vah bada kiya jaaega.." 
Matthew23:13 he kapattee shaastriayon aur fareeasiyon tum par haya! tum manushyon ke virodha men svarga ke rajy ka dar band karate ho, n to ap hee us men pravesh karate ho aur n us men pravesh karanevalon ko pravesh karane dete ho.." 
Matthew23:14  
Matthew23:15 he kapattee shaastriayon aur fareeasiyon tum par haya! tum aek jan ko apane mat men lane ke liye sare jal aur thl men firate ho, aur jab vah mat men a jata haai, to use apane se doona narakeey bana dete ho.." 
Matthew23:16 he andho aguvo, tum par hay, jo kahate ho ki yadi koi maandair kee shapath khaae to kuchh nahee, parantu yaadi koi maandair ke sone kee saugandha khaae to us se bandha jaaega." 
Matthew23:17 he moorkho,, aur andhae, kaun bada haai, sona ya vah mandair jis se sona paavitra hota haai?" 
Matthew23:18 fir kahate ho ki yadi koi vedee kee shapath khaae to kuchh nahee, parantu jo bhentt us par haai, yaadi koi us kee shapath khaae to bandha jaaega." 
Matthew23:19 he andhae, kaun bada haai, bhentt ya vedee: jis se bhentt paavitra hota haai?" 
Matthew23:20 isaliye jo vedee kee shapath khata haai, vah us kee, aur jo kuchh us par haai, us kee bhee shapath khata haai." 
Matthew23:21 aur jo maandair kee shapath khata haai, vah us kee aur us men rahanevalon kee bhee shapath khata haai." 
Matthew23:22 aur jo svarga kee shapath khata haai, vah parameshvar ke sihansan kee aur us par baaittnevale kee bhee shapath khata haai.." 
Matthew23:23 he kapattee shaastriayo, aur fareeasiyo, tum par haya tum podeene aur saunfa aur jeere ka dasavan ansh dete ho, parantu tum ne vyavastha kee gambheer baton ko chhod diya haai chahiye tha ki inhen bhee karate rahate, aur unhen bhee n chhodte." 
Matthew23:24 he andho aguvo, tum machchhd ko to chhan dalate ho, parantu untt ko nigal jate ho." 
Matthew23:25 he kapattee shaastriayo, aur fareeasiyo, tum par hay, tum kattore aur thalee ko upar upar se to manjate ho parantu ve bheetar andhor asanyam se bhre huae haain." 
Matthew23:26 he andho fareesee, paahile kattore aur thalee ko bheetar se manj ki ve bahar se bhee svachchh hon.." 
Matthew23:27 he kapattee shaastriayo, aur fareeasiyo, tum par haya tum choona firee hui kabraen ke saman ho jo upar se to sundar dikhai detee haai, parantu bheetar murdon kee haddiyon aur sab prakar kee malinata se bhree haain." 
Matthew23:28 isee reeti se tum bhee upar se manushyon ko dharmee dikhai dete ho, parantu bheetar kapatt aur adharma se bhre huae ho.." 
Matthew23:29 he kapattee shaastriayo, aur fareeasiyo, tum par haya tum bhavishyadvktaon kee kabraen sanvarate aur dharmiyon kee kabraen banate ho." 
Matthew23:30 aur kahate ho, ki yadi ham apane bapadadon ke dinon men hote to bhvishyadvktaon kee hatya men un ke sajhee n hote." 
Matthew23:31 is se to tum apane par ap hee gavahee dete ho, ki tum bhvishyadvktaon ke ghaatakon kee santan ho." 
Matthew23:32 so tum apane bapadadon ke pap ka ghada bhr do. 
Matthew23:33 he sanpo, he karaaiton ke bachcho, tum narak ke dand se kyonkar bachoge?" 
Matthew23:34 isaliye dekho, maain tumhare pas bhvishyadvktaon aur buddhmaianon aur shaaastriayon ko bhejata hoon aur tum un men se kitanon ko mar daloge, aur kroos par chaddhaoge aur kitanon ko apanee sabhaon men kode maroge, aur aek nagar se doosare nagar men khdedte firoge." 
Matthew23:35 jis se dharmee haabil se lekar birikyah ke putra jakarayah tak, jise tum ne maandair aur vedee ke beech men mar dala tha, jitane dharmiyon ka lohoo prathvee par bahaya gaya haai, vah sab tumhare sir par padega." 
Matthew23:36 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ye sab baten is samay ke logon par a padengee.." 
Matthew23:37 he yarooshalem, he yarooshalema too jo bhavishyadvktaon ko mar dalata haai, aur jo tere pas bheje gaa, unhen patthravah karata haai, kitanee hee bar maain ne chaha ki jaaise murgee apane bachchon ko apane pankhon ke neeche ikatthe karatee haai, vaaise hee maain bhee tere balakon ko ikatthe kar loo, parantu tum ne n chaha." 
Matthew23:38 dekho, tumhara ghar tumhare liye ujad chhoda jata haai." 
Matthew23:39 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki ab se jab tak tum n kahoge, ki dhany haai vah, jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai, tab tak tum mujhe fir kabhee n dekhoge.." 
Matthew24:1 jab yeeshu mandair se nikalakar ja raha tha, to usake chele us ko maandair kee rachana dikhane ke liye us ke pas aae." 
Matthew24:2 us ne un se kaha, kya tum yah sab naheen dekhte? maain tum se sach kahata hoo, yahan patthr par patthr bhee n choottega, jo ddhaya n jaega." 
Matthew24:3 aur jab vah jaaitoon pahad par baaitta tha, to chelon ne alag usake pas akar kaha, ham se kah ki ye baten kab hongee? aur tere ane ka, aur jagat ke ant ka kya chinh hoga?" 
Matthew24:4 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya, savadhaan raho! koi tumhen n bhramane paae." 
Matthew24:5 kyonaki bahut se aeese honge jo mere nam se akar kahenge, ki maain maseeh hoon: aur bahuton ko bhramaaenge." 
Matthew24:6 tum ladaiyon aur ladaiyon kee charcha sunoge dekho ghabara n jana kyonaki in ka hona avashy haai, parantu us samay ant n hoga." 
Matthew24:7 kyonaki jati par jati, aur rajy par rajy chaddhai karega, aur jagah jagah akal padenge, aur bhuidol honge." 
Matthew24:8 ye sab baten peedaon ka arambh hongee. 
Matthew24:9 tab ve klesh dilane ke liye tumhen pakadvaaenge, aur tumhen mar dalenge aur mere nam ke karan sab jatiyon ke log tum se baair rakhenge." 
Matthew24:10 tab bahutere ttokar khaaenge, aur aek doosare se baair rakhenge." 
Matthew24:11 aur bahut se jootte bhvishyadvkta utt khde honge, aur bahuton ko bhramaaenge." 
Matthew24:12 aur adharma ke baddhne se bahuton ka praem ttnda ho jaaega. 
Matthew24:13 parantu jo ant tak dhaeeraj dhare rahega, usee ka uddhar hoga." 
Matthew24:14 aur rajy ka yah susamachar sare jagat men prachar kiya jaaega, ki sab jatiyon par gavahee ho, tab ant a jaaega.." 
Matthew24:15 so jab tum us ujadnevalee gharanait vastu ko jis kee charcha daaniyyel bhvishyadvkta ke dara hui thee, paavitra sthan men khdee hui dekho, jo paddhe, vah samajhe." 
Matthew24:16 tab jo yahoodiya men hon ve pahadon par bhag jaaen. 
Matthew24:17 jo kotte par ho, vah apane ghar men se saman lene ko n utare." 
Matthew24:18 aur jo khet men ho, vah apana kapada lene ko peechhe n lautte." 
Matthew24:19 un dinon men jo garbhvatee aur doodha pilatee hongee, un ke liye hay, haya." 
Matthew24:20 aur praarthna karo ki tumhen jade men ya sabt ke din bhagana n pade. 
Matthew24:21 kyonaki us samay aeesa bharee klesh hoga, jaaisa jagat ke arambh se n ab tak hua, aur n kabhee hoga." 
Matthew24:22 aur yaadi ve din ghattaae n jate, to koi praanee n bachata parantu chune huon ke karan ve din ghattaae jaaenge." 
Matthew24:23 us samay yadi koi tum se kahe, ki dekho, maseeh yahan haain! ya vahan haai to prateeati n karana." 
Matthew24:24 kyonaki jootte maseeh aur jootte bhavishyadvkta utt khde honge, aur bade chinh aur adabhut kam dikhaaenge, ki yadi ho sake to chune huon ko bhee bhrama den." 
Matthew24:25 dekho, maain ne paahile se tum se yah sab kuchh kah diya haai." 
Matthew24:26 isaliye yaadi ve tum se kahe, dekho, vah jangal men haai, to bahar n nikal jana dekho, vah kottriyon men haai, to prateeati n karana." 
Matthew24:27 kyonaki jaaise bijalee poorva se nikalakar paashchaim tak chamakatee jatee haai, vaaisa hee manushy ke putra ka bhee ana hoga." 
Matthew24:28 jahan loth ho, vaheen giddh ikatthe honge.." 
Matthew24:29 un dinon ke klesh ke bad turant soorya aandhiayara ho jaega, aur chand ka prakash jata rahega, aur tare akash se gir padenge aur akash kee shaktaiyan hilai jaengee." 
Matthew24:30 tab manushy ke putra ka chinh akash men dikhai dega, aur tab prathvee ke sab kulon ke log chhatee peettenge aur manushy ke putra ko badee samarth aur aeeshvarya ke sath akash ke badalon par ate dekhenge." 
Matthew24:31 aur vah turahee ke bade shabd ke sat, apane dooton ko bhejega, aur ve akash ke is chhor se us chhor tak, charon disha se usake chune huon ko ikatthe karenge." 
Matthew24:32 anjeer ke ped se yah drashttant seekho: jab us kee dalee komal ho jatee aur patte nikalane lagate haai, to tum jan lete ho, ki graeeshm kal nikatt haai." 
Matthew24:33 isee reeti se jab tum in sab baton ko dekho, to jan lo, ki vah nikatt haai, baran dar par haai." 
Matthew24:34 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jabatab ye sab baten pooree n ho le, tab tak yah peeddhee jatee n rahegee." 
Matthew24:35 akash aur prathvee ttl jaaenge, parantu meree baten kabhee n ttlengee." 
Matthew24:36 us din aur us ghadee ke vishay men koi naheen janata, n svarga ke doot, aur n putra, parantu keval pita." 
Matthew24:37 jaaise nooh ke din the, vaaisa hee manushy ke putra ka ana bhee hoga." 
Matthew24:38 kyonaki jaaise jala-pralay se pahile ke dinon me, jis din tak ki nooh jahaj par n chaddha, us din tak log khate-peete the, aur un men byah shaadee hotee thee." 
Matthew24:39 aur jab tak jala-pralay akar un sab ko baha n le gaya, tab tak un ko kuchh bhee maloom n pada vaaise hee manushy ke putra ka ana bhee hoga." 
Matthew24:40 us samay do jan khet men honge, ek le liya jaega aur doosara chhod diya jaega." 
Matthew24:41 do striayan chakkee peesatee rahengee, aek le lee jaaegee, aur doosaree chhod dee jaaegee." 
Matthew24:42 isaliye jagate raho, kyonki tum naheen janate ki tumhara prabhu kis din aaega." 
Matthew24:43 parantu yah jan lo ki yadi ghar ka svamee janata hota ki chor kis pahar aaega, to jagata rahata aur apane ghar men sengha lagane n deta." 
Matthew24:44 isaliye tum bhee taaiyar raho, kyonki jis ghadee ke vishay men tum sochate bhee naheen ho, usee ghadee manushy ka putra a jaaega." 
Matthew24:45 so vah vishvasayogy aur buaddhmaian das kaun haai, jise svamee ne apane naukar chakaron par saradar ttharaya, ki samay par unhen bhojan de?" 
Matthew24:46 dhany haai, vah das, jise usaka svamee akar aeesa kee karate paae." 
Matthew24:47 maain tum se sach kahata hoon vah use apanee saree sanpati par saradar ttharaaega. 
Matthew24:48 parantu yadi vah dushtt das sochane lage, ki mere svamee ke ane men der haai." 
Matthew24:49 aur apane sathee dason ko peettne lage, aur piyakkadon ke sath khaae peeae." 
Matthew24:50 to us das ka svamee aeese din aaega, jab vah us kee batt n johata ho." 
Matthew24:51 aur aeesee ghadee ki vah n janata ho, aur use bharee tadna dekar, usaka bhag kapattyaien ke sath ttharaaega: vahan rona aur dant peesana hoga.." 
Matthew25:1 tab svarga ka rajy un das kunvariyon ke saman hoga jo apanee mashaalen lekar doolhe se bhentt karane ko nikaleen. 
Matthew25:2 un men panch moorkh aur panch samajhdar theen. 
Matthew25:3 moorkhon ne apanee mashaalen to lee, parantu apane sath tel naheen liya." 
Matthew25:4 parantu samajhdaron ne apanee mashaalon ke sath apanee kuappaiyon men tel bhee bhr liya. 
Matthew25:5 jab dulhe ke ane men der hui, to ve sab unghane lagee, aur so gai." 
Matthew25:6 adhaee rat ko dhoom machae, ki dekho, doolha a raha haai, us se bhentt karane ke liye chalo." 
Matthew25:7 tab ve sab kunvaariyan uttkar apanee apanee mashalen tteek karane lageen. 
Matthew25:8 aur moorkhon ne samajhdaron se kaha, apane tel men se kuchh hamen bhee do, kyonki hamaree mashaalen bujhee jatee haain." 
Matthew25:9 parantu samajhdaron ne uttr diya ki kadaachit hamare aur tumhare liye poora n ho bhla to yah haai, ki tum bechanevalon ke pas jakar apane liye mol le lo." 
Matthew25:10 jab ve mol lene ko ja rahee thee, to doolha a pahuncha, aur jo taaiyar thee, ve usake sath byah ke ghar men chaleen gai aur dar band kiya gaya." 
Matthew25:11 isake bad ve doosaree kunvariyan bhee akar kahane lagee, he svamee, he svamee, hamare liye dar khol de." 
Matthew25:12 us ne uttr diya, ki maain tum se sach kahata hoo, maain tumhen naheen janata." 
Matthew25:13 isaliye jagate raho, kyonki tum n us din ko janate ho, n us ghadee ko.." 
Matthew25:14 kyonaki yah us manushy kee see dasha haai jis ne paradesh ko jate samay apane dason ko bulakar, apanee sanpaati un ko saunp dee." 
Matthew25:15 us ne ek ko panch tod, doosare ko do, aur teesare ko eka arthata har ek ko us kee samarth ke anusar diya, aur tab paradesh chala gaya." 
Matthew25:16 tab jis ko panch tode mile the, us ne turant jakar un se len den kiya, aur panch tode aur kamaae." 
Matthew25:17 isee reeti se jis ko do mile the, us ne bhee do aur kamaae." 
Matthew25:18 parantu jis ko aek mila tha, us ne jakar mittee khodee, aur apane svamee ke roopaye chhpai diae." 
Matthew25:19 bahut dinon ke bad un dason ka svamee akar un se lekha lene laga. 
Matthew25:20 jis ko panch tode mile the, us ne panch tode aur lakar kaha he svamee, too ne mujhe panch tode saunpe the, dekh maain ne panch tode aur kamaae haain." 
Matthew25:21 usake svamee ne usase kaha, dhany haai achchhe aur vishvasayogy das, too thode men vishvasayogy raha maain tujhe bahut vastuon ka adhaikaree banaunga apane svamee ke anand men sambhagee ho." 
Matthew25:22 aur jis ko do tode mile the, us ne bhee akar kaha he svamee too ne mujhe do tode saunpen the, dek, maain ne do tode aur kamaaen." 
Matthew25:23 usake svamee ne us se kaha, dhany he achchhe aur vishvasayogy das, too thode men vishvasayogy raha, maain tujhe bahut vastuon ka adhaikaree banaunga apane svamee ke anand men sambhagee ho." 
Matthew25:24 tab jis ko aek toda mila tha, us ne akar kaha he svamee, maain tujhe janata tha, ki too kattor manushy haai, aur jahan naheen chheettta vahan se battorata haai." 
Matthew25:25 so maain dr gaya aur jakar tera toda mittee men chhpai diya dek, jo tera haai, vah yah haai." 
Matthew25:26 usake svamee ne use uttr diya, ki he dushtt aur alasee dasa jab yah too janata tha, ki jahan maain ne naheen boya vahan se kattta hoon aur jahan maain ne naheen chheetta vahan se battorata hoon." 
Matthew25:27 to tujhe chahiae tha, ki mera roopaya sarrafaon ko de deta, tab maain akar apana dhan byaj samet le leta." 
Matthew25:28 isaliye vah toda us se le lo, aur jis ke pas das tode haai, us ko de do." 
Matthew25:29 kyonaki jis kisee ke pas haai, use aur diya jaaega aushra usake pas bahut ho jaaega: parantu jis ke pas naheen haai, us se vah bhee jo usake pas haai, le liya jaaega." 
Matthew25:30 aur is nikamme das ko bahar ke andhore men dal do, jahan rona aushra dant peesana hoga." 
Matthew25:31 jab manushy ka putra apanee mahima men aaega, aur sab svarga doot usake sath aaenge to vah apanee mahima ke sihansan par virajaman hoga." 
Matthew25:32 aur sab jaatiyan usake samhane ikatthee kee jaaengee aur jaaisa charavaha bhedon ko bakariyon se alag kar deta haai, vaaisa hee vah unhen aek doosare se alag karega." 
Matthew25:33 aur vah bhedon ko apanee daahinee or aur bakariyon ko bai aur khdee karega. 
Matthew25:34 tab raja apanee dahinee or valon se kahega, he mere pita ke dhany logo, ao, us rajy ke adhaikaree ho jao, jo jagat ke adi se tumhare liye taaiyar kiya hua haai." 
Matthew25:35 kayonaki maai. bookha tha, aur tum ne mujhe khane ko diya maain piyasa tha, aur tum ne mujhe panee pilaya, maain paradeshaee tha, tum ne mujhe apane ghar men ttharaya." 
Matthew25:36 maain nanga tha, tum ne mujhe kapade pahinaae maain beemar tha, tum ne meree sudhai lee, maain bandeegrah men tha, tum mujh se milane aae." 
Matthew25:37 tab dharmee us ko uttr denge ki he prabhu, ham ne kab tujhe bookha dekha aur sikhaya? ya piyasa dekha, aur pilaya?" 
Matthew25:38 ham ne kab tujhe paradeshaee dekha aur apane ghar men ttharaya ya nanga dekha, aur kapade paahinaae?" 
Matthew25:39 ham ne kab tujhe beemar ya bandeegrah men dekha aur tujh se milane aae? 
Matthew25:40 tab raja unhen uttr dega maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki tum ne jo mere in chhotte se chhotte bhaiyon men se kisee aek ke sath kiya, vah mere hee sath kiya." 
Matthew25:41 tab vah bain or valon se kahega, he sraapit logo, mere samhane se us anant ag men chale jao, jo shautan aur usake dooton ke liye taaiyar kee gai haai." 
Matthew25:42 kyonaki maain bookha tha, aur tum ne mujhe khane ko naheen diya, maain piyasa tha, aur tum ne mujhe panee naheen pilaya." 
Matthew25:43 maain paradeshaee tha, aur tum ne mujhe apane ghar men naheen ttharaya maain nanga tha, aur tum ne mujhe kapade naheen pahinaae beemar aur bandeegrah men tha, aur tum ne meree sudhai n lee." 
Matthew25:44 tab ve uttr denge, ki he prabhu, ham ne tujhe kab bookha, ya piyasa, ya paradeshae, ya nanga, ya beemar, ya bandeegrah men dekha, aur teree seva tthal n kee?" 
Matthew25:45 tab vah unhen uttr dega, maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki tum ne jo in chhotte se chhotton men se kisee aek ke sath naheen kiya, vah mere sath bhee naheen kiya." 
Matthew25:46 aur yah anant dand bhogenge parantu dharmee anant jeevan men pravesh karenge. 
Matthew26:1 jab yeeshu ye sab baten kah chuka, to apane chelon se kahane laga." 
Matthew26:2 tum janate ho, ki do din ke bad fasah ka pavrva hoga aur manushy ka putra kroos par chaddhaae jane ke liye pakadvaya jaaega." 
Matthew26:3 tab mahayajak aur praja ke puraniae kaifaa nam mahayajak ke angan men ikatthe huae. 
Matthew26:4 aur apas men vichar karane lage ki yeeshu ko chht se pakadkar mar dalen. 
Matthew26:5 parantu ve kahate the, ki pavrva ke samay naheen kaheen aeesa n ho ki logon men balava mach jaae." 
Matthew26:6 jab yeeshu baaitaniyyah men shamaun koddhee ke ghar men tha. 
Matthew26:7 to aek sree sangamaramar ke patra men bahumol itra lekar usake pas ai, aur jab vah bhojan karane baaitta tha, to usake sir par undel diya." 
Matthew26:8 yah dekhkar, usake chele risayaae aur kahane lage, is ka kyon satyanash kiya gaya?" 
Matthew26:9 yah to achchhe dam par bikakar kangalon ko bantta ja sakata tha. 
Matthew26:10 yah janakar yeeshu ne un se kaha, sree ko kyon satate ho? us ne mere sath bhlai kee haai." 
Matthew26:11 kangal tumhare sath sada rahate haai, parantu maain tumhare sath sadaaiv n rahoonga." 
Matthew26:12 us ne meree deh par jo yah itra undela haai, vah mere gaddhe jane ke liye kiya haai" 
Matthew26:13 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki sare jagat men jahan kaheen yah susamachar prachar kiya jaaega, vahan usake is kam ka varnn bhee usake smaran men kiya jaaega." 
Matthew26:14 tab yahooda iskariyotee nam barah chelon men se aek ne mahayajakon ke pas jakar kaha. 
Matthew26:15 yaadi maain use tumhare hath pakadva doo, to mujhe kya doge? unhon ne use tees chandee ke sikke taulakar de diae." 
Matthew26:16 aur vah usee samay se use pakadvane ka avasar ddoonddhne laga.. 
Matthew26:17 akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva ke paahile din, chele yeeshu ke pas akar poochhne lage too kahan chahata haai ki ham tere liye fasah khane kee taaiyaree karen?" 
Matthew26:18 us ne kaha, nagar men faulane ke pas jakar us se kaho, ki guroo kahata haai, ki mera samay nikatt haai, maain apane chelon ke sath tere yahan pavrva manaunga." 
Matthew26:19 so chelon ne yeeshu kee agyaa manee, aur fasah taaiyar kiya." 
Matthew26:20 jab sanjh hui, to vah barahon ke sath bhojan karane ke liye baaitta." 
Matthew26:21 jab ve kha rahe the, to us ne kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki tum men se aek mujhe pakadvaaega." 
Matthew26:22 is par ve bahut udas hua, aur har aek us se poochhne laga, he guro, kya vah maain hoon?" 
Matthew26:23 us ne uttr diya, ki jis ne mere sath thalee men hath dala haai, vahee mujhe pakadvaega." 
Matthew26:24 manushy ka putra to jaaisa usake vishay men likha haai, jata hee haai parantu us manushy ke liye shaek haai jis ke dara manushy ka putra pakadvaya jata haai: yadi us manushy ka janm n hota, to usake liye bhla hota." 
Matthew26:25 tab usake pakadvanevale yahooda ne kaha ki he rabbee, kya vah maain hoon?" 
Matthew26:26 us ne us se kaha, too kah chuka: jab ve kha rahe the, to yeeshu ne rottee lee, aur ashaeesh mangakar todee, aur chelon ko dekar kaha, lo, khao yah meree deh haai." 
Matthew26:27 fir us ne kattora lekar, dhanyavad kiya, aur unhen dekar kaha, tum sab is men se peeo." 
Matthew26:28 kyonaki yah vacha ka mera vah lohoo haai, jo bahuton ke liye papon kee kshama ke nimitt bahaya jata haai." 
Matthew26:29 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki dakh ka yah ras us din tak kabhee n peeunga, jab tak tumhare sath apane pita ke rajy men naya n peeun.." 
Matthew26:30 fir ve bhjan gakar jaaitoon pahad par gaae.. 
Matthew26:31 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha tum sab aj hee rat ko mere vishay men ttokar khaoge kyonki likha haai, ki maain charavahe ko maroonga aur jhund kee bheden tittr bittr ho jaaengee." 
Matthew26:32 parantu maain apane jee uttne ke bad tum se pahale galeel ko jaunga. 
Matthew26:33 is par pataras ne us se kaha, yadi sab tere vishay men ttokar khaaen to khaae, parantu maain kabhee bhee ttokar n khaunga." 
Matthew26:34 yeeshu ne us se kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki aj hee raj ko murga ke bang dene se paahile, too teen bar mujh se mukar jaaega." 
Matthew26:35 pataras ne us se kaha, yadi mujhe tere sath marana bhee ho, taubhee, maain tujh se kabhee n mukaroonga: aur aeesa hee sab chelon ne bhee kaha.." 
Matthew26:36 tab yeeshu ne apane chelon ke sath gatasamanee nam aek sthan men aya aur apane chelon se kahane laga ki yaheen baaitte rahana, jab tak ki maain vahan jakar praarthna karoon." 
Matthew26:37 aur vah pataras aur jabdee ke donon putraen ko sath le gaya, aur udas aur vyakul hone laga." 
Matthew26:38 tab us ne un se kaha mera jee bahut udas haai, yahan tak ki mere praan nikala chahate: tum yaheen ttharo, aur mere sath jagate raho." 
Matthew26:39 fir vah thoda aur age baddhkar munh ke bal gira, aur yah praarthna karane laga, ki he mere pita, yaadi ho sake, to yah kattora mujh se ttl jaae taubhee jaaisa maain chahata hoon vaaisa nahee, parantu jaaisa too chahata haai vaaisa hee ho." 
Matthew26:40 fir chelon ke pas akar unhen sote paya, aur pataras se kaha kya tum mere sath aek ghadee bhee n jag sake?" 
Matthew26:41 jagate raho, aur praarthna karate raho, ki tum pareeksha men n pado: atma to taaiyar haai, parantu shareer durbal haai." 
Matthew26:42 fir us ne doosaree bar jakar yah praarthna kee ki he mere pita, yaadi yah mere peeae bina naheen hatt sakata to teree ichchha pooree ho." 
Matthew26:43 tab us ne akar unhen fir sote paya, kyonki un kee ankhen neend se bhree theen." 
Matthew26:44 aur unhen chhodkar fir chala gaya, aur vahee bat fir kahakar, teesaree bar praarthna kee." 
Matthew26:45 tab us ne chelon ke pas akar un se kaha ab sote raho, aur vishraam karo: dekho, ghadee a pahunchee haai, aur manushy ka putra papiyon ke hath pakadvaya jata haai." 
Matthew26:46 utto, chalen dekho, mera pakadvanevala nikatt a pahuncha haai.." 
Matthew26:47 vah yah kah hee raha tha, ki dekho yahooda jo barahon men se aek tha, aya, aur usake sath mahayajakon aur logon ke puraaniyon kee or se badee bheed, talavaren aur laattyaian liae huae ai." 
Matthew26:48 usake pakadvanevale ne unhen yah pata diya tha ki jis ko maain choom loon vahee haai use pakad lena. 
Matthew26:49 aur turant yeeshu ke pas akar kaha he rabbee namaskara aur us ko bahut chooma. 
Matthew26:50 yeeshu ne us se kaha he mitra, jis kam ke liye too aya haai, use kar le. tab unhon ne pas akar yeeshu par hath dale, aur use pakad liya." 
Matthew26:51 aur dekho, yeeshu ke saathaiyon men se aek ne hath baddhakar apanee talavar kheench lee aur mahayajak ke das par chalakar us ka kan uda diya." 
Matthew26:52 tab yeeshu ne us se kaha apanee talavar kattee men rakh le kyonki jo talavar chalate haai, ve sab talavar se nash kiae jaaenge." 
Matthew26:53 kya too naheen samajhta, ki maain apane pita se binatee kar sakata hoo, aur vah svargadooton kee barah palattn se adhaik mere pas abhee upaasthiat kar dega?" 
Matthew26:54 parantu pavitra shaasr kee baten ki aeesa hee hona avashy haai, kyonkar pooree hongee?" 
Matthew26:55 usee ghadee yeeshu ne bheed se kaha kya tum talavaren aur laattyaian lekar mujhe dakoo ke saman pakadne ke liye nikale ho? maain har din mandair men baaittkar upadesh diya karata tha, aur tum ne mujhe naheen pakada." 
Matthew26:56 parantu yah sab isaaliye hua haai, ki bhvishyadvktaon ke vachan ke poore hon: tab sab chelen use chhodkar bhag gaae.." 
Matthew26:57 aur yeeshu ke pakadnevale us ko kaifaa nam mahayajak ke pas le gaa, jahan shaasree aur puraaniae ikatthe huae the." 
Matthew26:58 aur pataras door se usake peechhe peechhe mahayajak ke angan tak gaya, aur bheetar jakar ant dekhne ko pyadon ke sath baaitt gaya." 
Matthew26:59 mahayajak aur saree mahasabha yeeshu ko mar dalane ke liye usake virodha men joottee gavahee kee khoj men the. 
Matthew26:60 parantu bahut se jootte gavahon ke ane par bhee n pai. 
Matthew26:61 ant men do janon ne akar kaha, ki us ne kaha haai ki maain parameshvar ke maandair ko ddha sakata hoon aur use teen din men bana sakata hoon." 
Matthew26:62 tab mahayajak ne khde hokar us se kaha, kya too koi uttr naheen deta? ye log tere virodha men kya gavahee dete haain? parantu yeeshu chup raha: mahayajak ne us se kaha." 
Matthew26:63 maain tujhe jeevate parameshvar kee shapath deta hoo, ki yadi too parameshvar ka putra maseeh haai, to ham se kah de." 
Matthew26:64 yeeshu ne us se kaha too ne ap hee kah diya: baran maain tum se yah bhee kahata hoo, ki ab se tum manushy ke putra ko sarvashaaktaiman kee daahinee or baaitte, aur akash ke badalon par ate dekhoge." 
Matthew26:65 tab mahayajak ne apane vasr faadkar kaha, is ne parameshvar kee ninda kee haai, ab hamen gavahon ka kya prayojana?" 
Matthew26:66 dekho, tum ne abhee yah ninda sunee haai! tum kya samajhte ho? unhon ne uttr diya, yah vadha hone ke yogy haai." 
Matthew26:67 tab unhon ne us se munh par tooka, aur use ghoonse mare, auron ne thppad mar ke kaha." 
Matthew26:68 he maseeh, ham se bhavishyadvvanee karake kaha: ki kis ne tujhe mara?" 
Matthew26:69 aur pataras bahar angan men baaitta hua tha: ki aek laundee ne usake pas akar kaha too bhee yeeshu galeelee ke sath tha. 
Matthew26:70 us ne sab ke samhane yah kah kar inkar kiya aur kaha, maain naheen janata too kya kah rahee haai." 
Matthew26:71 jab vah bahar devaddhee men chala gaya, to doosaree ne use dekhkar un se jo vahan the kaha yah bhee to yeeshu nasaree ke sath tha." 
Matthew26:72 us ne shapath khakar fir inkar kiya ki maain us manushy ko naheen janata. 
Matthew26:73 thodee der ke bad, jo vahan khde the, unhon ne pataras ke pas akar us se kaha, sachamuch too bhee un men se aek haai kyonki teree bolee tera bhed khol detee haai." 
Matthew26:74 tab vah dhaikkar dene aur shapath khane laga, ki maain us manushy ko naheen janata aur turant murga ne bang dee." 
Matthew26:75 tab pataras ko yeeshu kee kahee hui bat smaran ai kee murga ke bang dene se pahile too teen bar mera inkar karega aur vah bahar jakar foott foott kar rone laga.. 
Matthew27:1 jab bhor hui, to sab mahayajakon aur logon ke puraniyon ne yeeshu ke mar dalane kee sammati kee." 
Matthew27:2 aur unhon ne use bandha aur le jakar peelatus haakim ke hath men saunp diya.. 
Matthew27:3 jab usake pakadvanevale yahooda ne dekha ki vah doshaee ttharaya gaya haai to vah pachhtaya aur ve tees chandee ke sikke mahayajakon aur puraaniyon ke pas faer laya. 
Matthew27:4 aur kaha, maain ne nirdoshaee ko ghaat ke liye pakadvakar pap kiya haai? unhon ne kaha, hamen kya? too hee jana." 
Matthew27:5 tab vah un sikkon ko mandair men faenkakar chala gaya, aur jakar apane ap ko faansee dee." 
Matthew27:6 mahayajakon ne un sikkon ko lekar kaha, inhen bhndar men rakhna uchit nahee, kyonki yah lohoo ka dam haai." 
Matthew27:7 so unhon ne sammaati karake un sikkon se paradeshaiyon ke gadne ke liye kumhar ka khet mol le liya. 
Matthew27:8 is karan vah khet aj tak lohoo ka khet kahalata haai. 
Matthew27:9 tab jo vachan yirmayah bhvishyadvkta ke dara kaha gaya tha vah poora hua ki unhon ne ve tees sikke arthata us ttharaae huae mooly ko jise israael kee santan men se kitanon ne ttharaya tha le liae. 
Matthew27:10 aur jaaise prabhu ne mujhe agyaa dee thee vaaise hee unhen kumhar ke khet ke mooly men de diya.. 
Matthew27:11 jab yeeshu hakim ke samhane khda tha, to haakim ne us se poochha ki kya too yahoodiyon ka raja haai? yeeshu ne us se kaha, too ap hee kah raha haai." 
Matthew27:12 jab mahayajak aur puraaniae us par dosh laga rahe the, to us ne kuchh uttr naheen diya." 
Matthew27:13 is par peelatus ne us se kaha: kya too naheen sunata, ki ye tere virodha men kitanee gavaahiyan de rahe haain?" 
Matthew27:14 parantu us ne us ko aek bat ka bhee uttr naheen diya, yahan tak ki hakim ko bada ashcharya hua." 
Matthew27:15 aur haakim kee yah reeti thee, ki us pavrva men logon ke liye kisee aek bandhauae ko jise ve chahate the, chhod deta tha." 
Matthew27:16 us samay baraabba nam unheen men ka ek namee bandhaua tha. 
Matthew27:17 so jab ve ikatthe hua, to peelatus ne un se kaha tum kis ko chahate ho, ki maain tumhare liye chhod doon? baraabba ko, ya yeeshu ko jo maseeh kahalata haai?" 
Matthew27:18 kyonaki vah janata tha ki unhon ne use dah se pakadvaya haai. 
Matthew27:19 jab vah nyay kee gaee par baaitta hua tha to us kee patnee ne use kahala bheja, ki too us dharmee ke mamale men hath n dalana kyonki maain ne aj svapn men usake karan bahut dukh uttaya haai." 
Matthew27:20 mahayajakon aur puraniyon ne logon ko ubhara, ki ve baraabba ko mang le, aur yeeshu ko nash karaaen." 
Matthew27:21 haakim ne un se poochha, ki in donon men se kis ko chahate ho, ki tumhare liye chhod doon? unhon ne kaha baraabba ko." 
Matthew27:22 peelatus ne un se poochha fir yeeshu ko jo maseeh kahalata haai, kya karoon? sab ne us se kaha, vah kroos par chaddhaya jaae." 
Matthew27:23 haakim ne kaha kyon us ne kya burai kee haai? parantu ve aur bhee chilla, chillakar kahane lage, vah kroos par chaddhaya jaae." 
Matthew27:24 jab peelatus ne dekha, ki kuchh ban naheen padta parantu is ke vipareet hullad hota jata haai, to us ne panee lekar bheed ke samhane apane hath dhaea, aur kaha maain is dharmee ke lohoo se nirdosh hoon tum hee jano." 
Matthew27:25 sab logon ne uttr diya, ki is ka lohoo ham par aur hamaree santan par ho." 
Matthew27:26 is par us ne baraabba ko un ke liye chhod diya, aur yeeshu ko kode lagavakar saunp diya, ki kroos par chaddhaya jaae.." 
Matthew27:27 tab haakim ke sipaahiyon ne yeeshu ko kile men le jakar saree palattn usake chahun or ikatthee kee. 
Matthew27:28 aur usake kapade utarakar use kiraamijee baga pahinaya. 
Matthew27:29 aur katton ko mukutt goonthkar usake sir par rakha aur usake daahine hath men sarakanda diya aur usake age ghauttne ttekakar use tttthe men udane lage, ki he yahoodiyon ke raja namaskara." 
Matthew27:30 aur us par tooka aur vahee sarakanda lekar usake sir par marane lage. 
Matthew27:31 jab ve usaka ttttha kar chuke, to vah baga us par se utarakar fir usee ke kapade use paahinaa, aur kroos par chaddhane ke liye le chale.." 
Matthew27:32 bahar jate huae unhen shamaun nam aek kurenee manushy mila, unhonne use begar men pakada ki usaka kroos utta le chale." 
Matthew27:33 aur us sthan par jo gulaguta nam kee jagah arthata khopadee ka sthan kahalata haai pahunchakara. 
Matthew27:34 unhon ne pitt milaya hua dakhras use peene ko diya, parantu us ne chakhkar peena n chaha." 
Matthew27:35 tab unhon ne use kroos par chaddhaya aur chitthiyan dalakar usake kapade bantt liae. 
Matthew27:36 aur vahan baaittkar usaka pahara dene lage. 
Matthew27:37 aur usaka doshapatra, usake sir ke upar lagaya, ki yah yahoodiyon ka raja yeeshu haai." 
Matthew27:38 tab usake sath do dakoo aek dahine aur aek baaen krooson par chaddhaae gaae. 
Matthew27:39 aur ane jane vale sir hila hilakar us kee ninda karate the. 
Matthew27:40 aur yah kahate the, ki he mandair ke ddhanevale aur teen din men bananevale, apane ap ko to bacha yaadi too parameshvar ka putra haai, to kroos par se utar a." 
Matthew27:41 isee reeti se mahayajak bhee shaastriayon aur puraaniyon samet ttttha kar karake kahate the, is ne auron ko bachaya, aur apane ko naheen bacha sakata." 
Matthew27:42 yah to israael ka raja haai. ab kroos par se utar aa, to ham us par vishvas karen." 
Matthew27:43 us ne parameshvar ka bhrosa rakha haai, yaadi vah is ko chahata haai, to ab ise chhuda le, kyonki is ne kaha tha, ki maain parameshvar ka putra hoon." 
Matthew27:44 isee prakar dakoo bhee jo usake sath krooson par chaddhaae gaae the us kee ninda karate the.. 
Matthew27:45 dopahar se lekar teesare pahar tak us sare desh men andhora chhaya raha. 
Matthew27:46 teesare pahar ke nikatt yeeshu ne bade shabd se pukarakar kaha, aelee, aelee, lama shabaktanee? arthata he mere parameshvar, he mere parameshvar, too ne mujhe kyon chhod diya?" 
Matthew27:47 jo vahan khde the, un men se kitanon ne yah sunakar kaha, vah to aeliyyah ko pukarata haai." 
Matthew27:48 un men se ek turant dauda, aur spanj lekar sirake men duboya, aur sarakande par rakhkar use chusaya." 
Matthew27:49 auron ne kaha, rah jao, dekhe, aeliyyah use bachane ata haai ki naheen." 
Matthew27:50 tab yeeshu ne fir bade shabd se chillakar praan chhod diae. 
Matthew27:51 aur dekho mandair ka parada upar se neeche tak fatt kar do ttukade ho gaya: aur dharatee dol gai aur chattanen tadkar gain. 
Matthew27:52 aur kabraen khul gain aur soae huae pavitra logon kee bahut lothen jee utteen. 
Matthew27:53 aur usake jee uttne ke bad ve kabraen men se nikalakar paavitra nagar men gaa, aur bahuton ko dikhai diae." 
Matthew27:54 tab soobedar aur jo usake sath yeeshu ka pahara de rahe the, bhuidol aur jo kuchh hua tha, dekhkar atyant dr gaa, aur kaha, sachamuch yah parameshvar ka putra tha." 
Matthew27:55 vahan bahut see striayan jo galeel se yeeshu kee seva karatee huin usake sath ain thee, door se dekh rahee theen." 
Matthew27:56 un men maariyam magadaleelee aur yakoob aur yoses kee mata maariyam aur jabdee ke putraen kee mata theen. 
Matthew27:57 jab sanjh hui to yoosufa nam aarimaatiyah ka aek dhanee manushy jo ap hee yeeshu ka chela tha aya: us ne peelatus ke pas jakar yeeshu kee loth mangee. 
Matthew27:58 is par peelatus ne de dene kee agyaa dee. 
Matthew27:59 yoosufa ne loth ko lekar use ujjaval chadar men lapetta. 
Matthew27:60 aur use apanee nai kabra men rakha, jo us ne chattan men khudavai thee, aur kabra ke dar par bada patthr luddhkakar chala gaya." 
Matthew27:61 aur maariyam magadaleenee aur doosaree mariyam vahan kabra ke samhane baaittee theen.. 
Matthew27:62 doosare din jo taaiyaree ke din ke bad ka din tha, mahayajakon aur fareeasiyon ne peelatus ke pas ikatthe hokar kaha." 
Matthew27:63 he maharaj, hamen smaran haai, ki us bhramanevale ne apane jeete jee kaha tha, ki maain teen din ke bad jee utoonga." 
Matthew27:64 so agyaa de ki teesare din tak kabra kee rakhvalee kee jaa, aeesa n ho ki usake chele akar use chura le jaae, aur logon se kahanen lage, ki vah mare huon men se jee utta haai: tab pichhla dhaekha pahile se bhee bura hoga." 
Matthew27:65 peelatus ne un se kaha, tumhare pas paharooae to haain jao, apanee samajh ke anusar rakhvalee karo." 
Matthew27:66 so ve paharooon ko sath le kar gaa, aur patthr par muhar lagakar kabra kee rakhvalee kee.." 
Matthew28:1 sabt ke din ke bad saptaah ke paahile din pah fattte hee mariyam magadaleenee aur doosaree mariyam kabra ko dekhne ai. 
Matthew28:2 aur dekho aek bada bhuindol hua, kyonki prabhu ka aek doot svarga se utara, aur pas akar usane patthr ko luddhka diya, aur us par baaitt gaya." 
Matthew28:3 usaka roop bijalee ka sa aur usaka vasr pale kee nai ujjval tha. 
Matthew28:4 usake bhy se paharooae kanp utte, aur mratak saman ho gae." 
Matthew28:5 svargadoot ne striyon se kaha, ki tum mat dro: maai janata hoo ki tum yeeshu ko jo kraus par chaddhaya gaya tha ddoonddhtee ho." 
Matthew28:6 vah yaha naheen haai, parantu apane vachan ke anusar jee utta haai ao, yah sthan dekho, jaha prabhu pada tha." 
Matthew28:7 aur shaeegha jakar usake chelon se kaho, ki vah mratakon men se jee utta haai aur dekho vah tum se paahile galeel ko jata haai, vaha usaka darshan paoge, dekho, maain ne tum se kah diya." 
Matthew28:8 aur ve bhy aur bade anand ke sath kabra se shaeegha lauttkar usake chelon ko samachar dene ke liye daud gai. 
Matthew28:9 aur dekho, yeeshu unhen mila aur kaha 'salaman aur unhon ne pas akar aur usake pav pakadkar usako dandvat kiya." 
Matthew28:10 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha, mat dro mere bhaiyon se jakar kaho, ki galeel ko chalen jaaen vaha mujhe dekhenge.." 
Matthew28:11 ve ja hee rahee thee, ki dekho, paharooon men se kitanon ne nagar men akar poora hal mahayajakon se kah sunaya." 
Matthew28:12 tab unhon ne puraniyon ke sath ikatthe hokar sammati kee, aur sipaahiyon ko bahut chandee dekar kaha." 
Matthew28:13 ki yah kahana, ki rat ko jab ham so rahe the, to usake chele akar use chura le gaae." 
Matthew28:14 aur yaadi yah bat hakim ke kan tak pahunchegee, to ham use samajha lenge aur tumhen jokhaim se bacha lenge." 
Matthew28:15 so unhon ne roopaae lekar jaaisa sikhaae gaae the, vaaisa hee kiya aur yah bat aj tak yahoodiyon men prachalit haai.." 
Matthew28:16 aur gyarah chele galeel men us pahad par gaa, jise yeeshu ne unhen bataya tha." 
Matthew28:17 aur unhon ne usake darshan pakar use pranam kiya, par kisee kisee ko sandeh hua." 
Matthew28:18 yeeshu ne un ke pas akar kaha, ki svarga aur prathvee ka sara aadhaikar mujhe diya gaya haai." 
Matthew28:19 isaliye tum jakar sab jatiyon ke logon ko chela banao aur unhen pita aur putra aur pavitraatma ke nam se bapaatisma do. 
Matthew28:20 aur unhen sab baten jo maain ne tumhen agyaa dee haai, manana sikhao: aur dekho, maain jagat ke ant tak sadaaiv tumhare sang hoon.." 
Mark1:1 parameshvar ke putra yeeshu maseeh ke susamachar ka arambh. 
Mark1:2 jaaise yashaayah bhvishyadvkata kee pustak men likha haai ki dekh maain apane doot ko tere age bhejata hoo, jo tere liye marga sudhaarega." 
Mark1:3 jangal men aek pukaranevale ka shabd sunai de raha haai ki prabhu ka marga taaiyar karo, aur us kee sadken seedhaee karo." 
Mark1:4 yoohanna aya, jo jangal men bapatisma deta, aur papon kee kshama ke liye manafirav ke bapatisma ka prachar karata tha." 
Mark1:5 aur sare yahoodiya desh ke, aur yarooshalem ke sab rahanevale nikalakar usake pas gaa, aur apane papon ko manakar yaradan nadee men us se bapaatisma liya." 
Mark1:6 yoohanna untt ke rom ka vasr pahine aur apanee kamar men chamaden ka pattuka bandho rahata tha or ttiiddayan aur van madha khaya karata tha. 
Mark1:7 aur yah prachar karata tha, ki mere bad vah ane vala haai, jo mujh se shaktaiman haai maain is yogy naheen ki jhukakar usake jooton ka bandha kholoon." 
Mark1:8 maain ne to tumhen panee se bapatisma diya haai par vah tumhen paavitra atma se bapatisma dega.. 
Mark1:9 un dinon men yeeshu ne galeel ke nasarat se akar, yaradan men yoohanna se bapaatisma liya." 
Mark1:10 aur jab vah panee se nikalakar upar aya, to turant us ne akash ko khulate aur atma ko kabootar kee nain apane upar utarate dekha." 
Mark1:11 aur yah akashavanee hai, ki too mera piry putra haai, tujh se maain prasann hoon.." 
Mark1:12 tab atma ne turant us ko jangal kee or bheja. 
Mark1:13 aur jangal men chalees din tak shautan ne us kee pareeksha kee aur vah van pashuuon ke sath raha aur svargadoot un kee seva karate rahe.. 
Mark1:14 yoohanna ke pakadvaae jane ke bad yeeshu ne galeel men akar parameshvar ke rajy ka susamachar prachar kiya. 
Mark1:15 aur kaha, samay poora hua haai, aur parameshvar ka rajy nikatt a gaya haai man firao aur susamachar par vishvas karo.." 
Mark1:16 galeel kee jheel ke kinare kinare jate hua, us ne shamaun aur usake bhai aandairyas ko jheel men jal dalate dekha kyonaki ve machhuve the." 
Mark1:17 aur yeeshu ne un se kaha mere peechhe chale ao maain tum ko manushyon ke machhuve banaunga. 
Mark1:18 ve turant jalon ko chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae. 
Mark1:19 aur kuchh age baddhkar, us ne jabadee ke putra yakoob, aur usake bhai yahoonna ko, nav par jalon ko sudhaarate dekha." 
Mark1:20 us ne turant unhen bulaya aur ve apane pita jabadee ko majadooree ke sath nav par chhodkar, usake peechhe chale gae.." 
Mark1:21 aur ve kafaranahoom men aa, aur vah turant sabt ke din sabha ke ghar men jakar upadesh karane laga." 
Mark1:22 aur log usake upadesh se chakit hue kyonki vah unhen shaaastriayon kee nain nahee, parantu aadhaikaree kee nai upadesh deta tha." 
Mark1:23 aur usee samay, un kee sabha ke ghar men aek manushy tha, jis men aek ashuuddh atma thee." 
Mark1:24 us ne chillakar kaha, he yeeshu nasaree, hamen tujh se kya kama? kya too hamen nash karane aya haai? maain tujhe janata hoo, too kaun haai? parameshvar ka paavitra jana!" 
Mark1:25 yeeshu ne use danttkar kaha, chup raha aur us men se nikal ja." 
Mark1:26 tab ashuuddh atma us ko marodkar, aur bade shabd se chillakar us men se nikal gai." 
Mark1:27 is par sab log ashcharya karate huae apas men vada-vivad karane lage ki yah kya bat haai? yah to koi naya upadesh haai! vah adhaikar ke sath ashuuddh atmaon ko bhee agyaa deta haai, aur ve us kee agyaa manatee haain." 
Mark1:28 so usaka nam turant galeel ke as pas ke sare desh men har jagah faail gaya.. 
Mark1:29 aur vah turant aradhanalay men se nikalakar, yakoob aur yoohanna ke sath shamaun aur andairyas ke ghar aya." 
Mark1:30 aur shamaun kee sas jvar se peeadit thee, aur unhon ne turant usake vishay men us se kaha." 
Mark1:31 tab us ne pas jakar usaka hath pakad ke use uttaya aur usaka jvar us par se utar gaya, aur vah un kee seva-tthal karane lagee.." 
Mark1:32 sandhya ke samay jab soorya oob gaya to log sab beemaron ko aur unhen jin men dushttatma bheen usake pas laae. 
Mark1:33 aur sara nagar dar par ikattha hua. 
Mark1:34 aur us ne bahuton ko jo nana prakar kee beemariyon se dukhee the, changa kiya aur bahut se dushttatmaon ko nikala aur dushttatmaon ko bolane n diya, kyonaki ve use pahachanatee theen.." 
Mark1:35 aur bhor ko din nikalane se bahut pahile, vah uttkar nikala, aur aek jangalee sthan men gaya aur vahan praarthna karane laga." 
Mark1:36 tab shamaun aur usake sathee us kee khoj men gaae. 
Mark1:37 jab vah mila, to us se kaha ki sab log tujhe ddoonddh rahe haain." 
Mark1:38 us n un se kaha, ao ham or kaheen as pas kee baastaiyon men jae, ki maain vahan bhee prachar karoo, kyonki maai. isee liye nikala hoon." 
Mark1:39 so vah sare galeel men un kee sabhaon men ja jakar prachar karata aur dushttatmaon ko nikalata raha.. 
Mark1:40 aur aek koddhee ne usake pas akar, us se binatee kee, aur usake samhane ghauttne ttekakar, us se kaha yadi too chahe to mujhe shuuddh kar sakata haai." 
Mark1:41 us ne us par taras khakar hath baddhaya, aur use chookar kaha maain chahata hoon too shuuddh ho ja." 
Mark1:42 aur turant usaka koddh jata raha, aur vah shuuddh ho gaya." 
Mark1:43 tab us ne use chitakar turant vida kiya. 
Mark1:44 aur us se kaha, dek, kisee se kuchh mat kahana, parantu jakar apane ap ko yajak ko dikha, aur apane shuuddh hone ke vishay men jo kuchh moosa ne ttharaya haai use bhentt chaddha, ki un par gavahee ho." 
Mark1:45 parantu vah bahar jakar is bat ko bahut prachar karane aur yahan tak faailane laga, ki yeeshu fir khullamakhulla nagar men n ja saka, parantu bahar jangalee sthanon men raha aushra chahunor se lage usake pas ate rahe.." 
Mark2:1 kai din ke bad vah fir kafaranahoom men aya aur suna gaya, ki vah ghar men haai." 
Mark2:2 fir itane log ikatthe hua, ki dar ke pas bhee jagah naheen milee aur vah unhen vachan suna raha tha." 
Mark2:3 aur log aek jhole ke mare huae ko char manushyon se uttvakar usake pas le aae. 
Mark2:4 parantu jab ve bheed ke karan usake nikatt n panhuch sake, to unhon ne us chht ko jis ke neeche vah tha, khol diya aur jab use udhod chuke, to us khatt ko jis par jhole ka mara hua pada tha, lattka diya." 
Mark2:5 yeeshu n, un ka vishvas dekhkar, us jhole ke mare huae se kaha he putra, tere pap kshama hue." 
Mark2:6 tab kai aek shaasree jo vahan baaitte the, apane apane man men vichar karane lage." 
Mark2:7 ki yah manushy kyon aeesa kahata haai? yah to parameshvar kee ninda karata haai, parameshvar ko chhod aur kon pap kshama kar sakata haai?" 
Mark2:8 yeeshu ne turant apanee atma men jan liya, ki ve apane apane man men aeesa vichar kar rahe haai, aur un se kaha, tum apane apane man men yah vichar kyon kar rahe ho?" 
Mark2:9 sahaj kya haai? kya jhole ke mare se yah kahata ki tere pap kshama hua, ya yah kahana, ki utt apanee khatt utta kar chal fira?" 
Mark2:10 parantu jis se tum jan lo ki manushy ke putra ko prathvee par pap kshama karane ka bhee adhaikar haai us ne us jhole ke mare huae se kaha. 
Mark2:11 maain tujh se kahata hoon ut, apanee khatt uttakar apane ghar chala ja." 
Mark2:12 aur vah utta, aur turant khatt uttakar aur sab ke samhane se nikalakar chala gaya, is par sab chaakit hua, aur parameshvar kee badai karake kahane lage, ki ham ne aeesa kabhee naheen dekha.." 
Mark2:13 vah fir nikalakar jheel ke kinare gaya, aur saree bheed usake pas ai, aur vah unhen upadesh dene laga." 
Mark2:14 jate huae us ne halafai ke putra levee ko chungee kee chaukee par baaitte dekha, aur us se kaha mere peechhe ho le." 
Mark2:15 aur vah uttkar, usake peechhe ho liya: aur vah usake ghar men bhojan karane baaitte kyonki ve bahut se the, aur usake peechhe ho liye the." 
Mark2:16 aur shaastriayon aur fareeasiyon ne yah dekhkar, ki vah to papiyon aur chungee lenevalon ke sath bhojan kar raha haai, usak chelon se kaha vah to chungee lenevalon aur paapiyon ke sath khata pita haai!!" 
Mark2:17 yeeshu ne yah sunakar, un se kaha, bhle changon ko vaaidh kee avashyakata nahee, parantu beemaron ko haai: maain dhaarmiyon ko nahee, parantu paapiyon ko bulane aya hoon.." 
Mark2:18 yoohanna ke chele, aur fareesee upavas karate the so unhon ne akar us se yah kaha ki yoohanna ke chele aur fareeasiyon ke chele kyon upavas rakhte haain? parantu tere chele upavas naheen rakhte." 
Mark2:19 yeeshu ne un se kaha, jab tak dulha baratiyon ke sath dahata haai kya ve upavas kar sakate haain? so jab tak doolha un ke sath haai, tab tak ve upavas naheen kar sakate." 
Mark2:20 parantu ve din aaenge, ki doolha un se alag kiya jaaega us samay ve upavas karenge." 
Mark2:21 kore kapade ka paaiband purane pahiravan par koi naheen lagata naheen to vah paaiband us men se kuchh kheench lega, arthata naya, purane se, aur vah aur fatt jaaega." 
Mark2:22 naye dakhras ko puranee mashakon men koi naheen rakhta, naheen to dakhras mashkon ko faad dega, aur dakhras aur mashken donon nashtt ho jaaengee parantu dakh ka naya ras nai mashkon men bhra jata haai.." 
Mark2:23 aur aeesa hua ki vah sabt ke din kheton men se hokar ja raha tha aur usake chele chalate huae balen todne lage. 
Mark2:24 tab fareesiyon ne us se kaha, dekh ye sabt ke din vah kam kyon karate haain jo uchit naheen?" 
Mark2:25 us ne un se kaha, kya tum ne kabhee naheen paddha, ki jab daud ko avashyakata hui aur jab vah aur usake sathee bookhe hua, tab us ne kya kiya tha?" 
Mark2:26 us ne kyonkar abiyatar mahayajak ke samay, parameshvar ke bhvan men jakar, bhentt kee rottyaian khai, jisaka khana yajakon ko chhod aur kisee ko bhee uchit nahee, aur apane sathaiyon ko bhee deen?" 
Mark2:27 aur us ne un se kaha sabt ka din manushy ke liye banaya gaya haai, n ki manushy sabt ke din ke liye." 
Mark2:28 isaliye manushy ka putra sabt ke din ka bhee svamee haai.. 
Mark3:1 aur vah aradhanalay men fir gaya aur vahan aek manushy tha, jas ka hath sookh gaya tha." 
Mark3:2 aur ve us par dosh lagane ke liye us kee ghaat men lage huae the, ki dekhe, vah sabt ke din men use changa karata haai ki naheen." 
Mark3:3 us ne sookhe hathvale manushy se kaha beech men khda ho. 
Mark3:4 aur un se kaha kya sabt ke din bhla karana uchit haai ya bura karata, praan ko bachana ya marana? par ve chup rahe." 
Mark3:5 aur us ne un ke man kee kattorata se udas hokar, un ko krodha se charon or dekha, aur us manushy se kaha, apana hath baddha us ne baddhaya, aur usaka hath achchha ho gaya." 
Mark3:6 tab fareesee bahar jakar turant herodiyon ke sath usake virodha men sammati karane lage, ki use kis prakar nash karen.." 
Mark3:7 aur yeeshu apane chelon ke sath jheel kee or chala gaya: aur galeel se aek badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee. 
Mark3:8 aur yahoodiya, aur yarooshalem aur idoomiya se, aur yaradan ke par, aur soor aur saaida ke asapas se aek badee bheed yah sunakar, ki vah kaaise achambhe ke kam karata haai, usake pas ai." 
Mark3:9 aur us ne apane chelon se kaha, bheed ke karan aek chhottee nav mere liye taaiyar rahe taki ve mujhe daba n saken." 
Mark3:10 kyonaki us ne bahuton ko changa kiya tha isaliye jitane loge rog se graasit the, use choone ke liye us par gire padte the." 
Mark3:11 aur ashuuddh atmanae bhee, jab use dekhtee thee, to usake age gir padtee thee, aur chillakar kahatee theen ki too parameshvar ka putra haai." 
Mark3:12 aur us ne unhen bahut chitaya, ki mujhe pragatt n karana.." 
Mark3:13 fir vah pahad par chaddh gaya, aur jinhen vah chahata tha unhen apane pas bulaya aur ve usake pas chale aae." 
Mark3:14 tab us ne barah purooshaen ko niyukt kiya, ki ve usake sath sath rahe, aur vah unhen bheje, ki prachar karen." 
Mark3:15 aur dushttatmaon ke nikalane ka aadhaikar rakhen. 
Mark3:16 aur ve ye haain: shamaun jis ka nam us ne pataras rakha. 
Mark3:17 aur jabadee ka putra yakoob, aur yakoob ka bhai yoohanna, jinaka nam us ne booanaragis, arthata garjan ke putra rakha." 
Mark3:18 aur aandairyas, aur filippus, aur baratulmaai, aur mattee, aur thoma, aur halafai ka putra yakooba aur taee, aur shamaun kananee." 
Mark3:19 aur yahooda iskariyotee, jis ne use pakadva bhee diya.." 
Mark3:20 aur vah ghar men aya: aur aeesee bheed ikatthee ho gai, ki ve rottee bhee n kha sake." 
Mark3:21 jab usake kuttumbaiyon ne yah suna, to use pakadne ke liye nikale kyonki kahate the, ki usaka chitt ttkaiane naheen haai." 
Mark3:22 aur shaasree jo yarooshalem se aae the, yah kahate the, ki us men shautan haai, aur yah bhee, ki vah dushttatmaon ke saradar kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata haai." 
Mark3:23 aur vah unhen pas bulakar, un se dushttanton men kahane laga shautan kyonkar shautan ko nikal sakata haai?" 
Mark3:24 aur yaadi kisee rajy men foott pade, to vah rajy kyonkar sthiar rah sakata haai?" 
Mark3:25 aur yaadi kisee ghar men foott pade, to vah ghar kyonkar sthiar rah sakega?" 
Mark3:26 aur yaadi shautan apana hee virodhaee hokar apane men foott dale, to vah kyonkar bana rah sakata haai? usaka to ant hee ho jata haai." 
Mark3:27 kintu koi manushy kisee balavant ke ghar men ghausakar usaka mal loott naheen sakata, jab tak ki vah pahile us balavant ko n bandha le aur tab usake ghar ko loott lega." 
Mark3:28 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki manushyon kee santan ke sab pap aur ninda jo ve karate haai, kshama kee jaaegee." 
Mark3:29 parantu jo koi paavitraatma ke virooddh ninda kare, vah kabhee bhee kshama n kiya jaaega: varan vah anant pap ka aparadhaee ttharata haai." 
Mark3:30 kyonaki ve yah kahate the, ki us men ashuuddh atma haai.." 
Mark3:31 aur us kee mata aur usake bhai aa, aur bahar khde hokar use bulava bheja." 
Mark3:32 aur bheed usake asapas baaittee thee, aur unhon ne us se kaha dek, teree mata aur tere bhai bahar tujhe ddoonddhte haain." 
Mark3:33 us ne unhen uttr diya, ki meree mata aur mere bhai kaun haain?" 
Mark3:34 aur un par jo usake as pas baaitte the, draashtti karake kaha, dekho, meree mata aur mere bhai yah haain." 
Mark3:35 kyonaki jo koi parameshvar kee ichchha par chale, vahee mere bhai, aur baahin aur mata haai.." 
Mark4:1 vah fir jheel ke kinare upadesh dene laga: aur aeesee badee bheed usake pas ikatthee ho gai, ki vah jheel men aek nav par chaddhkar baaitt gaya aur saree bheed boomi par jheel ke kinare khdee rahee." 
Mark4:2 aur vah unhen drashttanton men bahut see baten sikhane lage, aur apane upadesh men un se kaha." 
Mark4:3 suno: dekho, aek bonevala, beej bane ke liye nikala!" 
Mark4:4 aur bote samay kuchh to marga ke kinare gira aur paakshiayon ne akar use chug liya. 
Mark4:5 aur kuchh patthreelee boomi par gira jahan us kee bahut mittee n milee, aur gaharee mittee n milane ke karan jald ug aya." 
Mark4:6 aur jab soorya nikala, to jal gaya, aur jad n pakadne ke karan sookh gaya." 
Mark4:7 aur kuchh to jhaadiyon men gira, aur jhaadiyon ne baddhkar use daba liya, aur vah fal n laya." 
Mark4:8 parantu kuchh achchhee boomi par gira aur vah uga, aur baddhkar falavant hua aur koi tees guna, koi satt guna aur koi sau guna fal laya." 
Mark4:9 aur us ne kaha jis ke pas sunane ke liye kan hon vah sun le.. 
Mark4:10 jab vah akela rah gaya, to usake sathaiyon ne un barah samet us se in drashttanton ke vishay men poochha." 
Mark4:11 us ne un se kaha, tum ko to parameshvar ke rajy ke bhed kee samajh dee gai haai, parantu baharavalon ke liye sab baten drashttanton men hotee haain." 
Mark4:12 isaliye ki ve dekhte huae dekhen aur unhen sujhai n pade aur sunate huae sunen bhee aur n samajhen aeesa n ho ki ve fire, aur kshama kiae jaaen." 
Mark4:13 fir us ne un se kaha kya tum yah drashttant naheen samajhte? to fir aur sab drashttanton ko kyonkar samajhoge? 
Mark4:14 banevala vachan bota haai. 
Mark4:15 jo marga ke kinare ke haain jahan vachan boya jata haai, ye ve haai, ki jab unhon ne suna, to shautan turant akar vachan ko jo un men boya gaya tha, utta le jata haai." 
Mark4:16 aur vaaise hee jo patthreelee boomi par boae jate haai, ye ve haai, ki jo vachan ko sunakar turant anand se grahan kar lete haain." 
Mark4:17 parantu apane bheetar jad n rakhte ke karan ve thode bhee dinon ke liye rahate haain is ke bad jab vachan ke karan un par klesh ya upadrav hota haai, to ve turant ttokar khate haain." 
Mark4:18 aur jo jhaadyaien men boae gaae ye ve haain jinhon ne vachan suna. 
Mark4:19 aur sansar kee chinta, aur dhan ka dhaekha, aur aur vastuon ka lobh un men samakar vachan ko daba deta haai. aur vah nishfal rah jata haai." 
Mark4:20 aur jo achchhee boomi men boae gaa, ye ve haai, jo vachan sunakar grahan karate aur fal late haai, koi tees guna, koi satt guna, aur koi sau guna.." 
Mark4:21 aur us ne un se kaha kya diye ko isaliye late haain ki paaimane ya khatt ke niche rakha jaae? kya isaliye nahee, ki deevatt par rakha jaae?" 
Mark4:22 kyonaki koi vastu chhpaiee nahee, parantu isaliye ki pragatt ho jaae" 
Mark4:23 aur n kuchh gupt haai par isaliye ki pragatt ho jaae. yaadi kisee ke sunane ke kan ho, to sun le." 
Mark4:24 fir us ne un se kaha chaukas raho, ki kya sunate ho? jis nap se tum napate ho usee se tumhare liye bhee napa jaaega, aur tum ko aadhaik diy jaaega." 
Mark4:25 kyonaki jis ke pas haai, us ko diya jaaega parantu jis ke pas naheen haai us se vah bhee jo usake pas haai le liya jaaega.." 
Mark4:26 fir us ne kaha parameshvar ka rajay aeesa haai, jaaise koi manushy boomi par beej chheentte." 
Mark4:27 aur rat ko soa, aur din ko jage aur vah beech aeese uge aur baddhe ki vah n jane." 
Mark4:28 prathvee ap se ap fal latee haai pali ankur, tab bal, aur tab balon men taaiyar dana." 
Mark4:29 parantu jab dana pak jata haai, tab vah turant hansiya lagata haai, kyonki kattnee a pahunchee haai.." 
Mark4:30 fir us ne kaha, ham parameshvar ke rajy kee upama kis se de, aur kis drashttant se usaka varnn karen?" 
Mark4:31 vah rai ke dane ke saman haain ki jab boomi men boya jata haai to boomi ke sab beejon se chhotta hota haai. 
Mark4:32 parantu jab boya gaya, to ugakar sab sag pat se bada ho jata haai, aur usakee aeesee badee daaliyan nikalatee haai, ki akash ke pakshaee usakee chhaya men basera kar sakate haain.." 
Mark4:33 aur vah unhen is prakar ke bahut se drashttant de dekar un kee samajh ke anusar vachan sunata tha. 
Mark4:34 aur bina drashttant kahe un se kuchh bhee naheen kahata tha parantu aekant men vah apane nij chelon ko sab baton ka arth batata tha.. 
Mark4:35 usee din jab sanjh hui, to us ne un se kaha ao, ham par chale,."
