Mark4:36 aur ve bheed ko chhodkar jaaisa vah tha, vaaisa kee use nav par sath le chale aur usake sat, aur bhee naven theen." 
Mark4:37 tab badee andhaee ai, aur laharen nav par yahan tak lagee, ki vah ab panee se bhree jatee thee." 
Mark4:38 aur vah ap pichhle bhag men gaee par so raha tha tab unhon ne use jagakar us se kaha he guro, kya tujhe chinta nahee, ki ham nash huae jate haain?" 
Mark4:39 tab us ne uttkar andhaee ko dantta, aur panee se kaha shaant rah, thm ja: aur andhaee thm gai aur bada chaain ho gaya." 
Mark4:40 aur un se kaha tum kyon drate ho? kya tumhen ab tak vishvas naheen? 
Mark4:41 aur ve bahut hee dr gaae aur apas men bole yah kaun haai, ki andhaee aur panee bhee us kee agyaa manate haain?" 
Mark5:1 aur ve jheel ke par giraseniyon ke desh men pahunche. 
Mark5:2 aur jab vah nav par se utara to turant aek manushy jis men ashuuddh atma thee kabraen se nikalakar use mila. 
Mark5:3 vah kabraen men raha karata tha. aur koi use sankalon se bhee n bandha sakata tha. 
Mark5:4 kyonaki vah bar bar bediyon aur sankalon se bandha gaya tha, par us ne sakalon ko tod diya, aur beadiyon ke ttukade ttukade kar diae the, aur koi use vash men naheen kar sakata tha." 
Mark5:5 vah lagatar rata-adin kabraen aur pahado men chillata, aur apane ko patthron se ghaayal karata tha." 
Mark5:6 vah yeeshu ko door hee se dekhkar dauda, aur use pranam kiya." 
Mark5:7 aur unche shabd se chillakar kaha he yeeshu, paramapradhaan parameshvar ke putra, mujhe tujh se kya kama? maain tune parameshvar kee shapath deta hoo, ki mujhe peeda n de." 
Mark5:8 kyonaki us ne us se kaha tha, he ashuuddh atma, is manushy men se nikal a." 
Mark5:9 us ne us se poochha tera kaya nam haai? us ne us se kaha mera nam sena haai kyonki ham bahut haain. 
Mark5:10 aur us ne us se bahut binatee kee, hamen is desh se bahar n bheja." 
Mark5:11 vahan pahad par sooaron ka aek bada jhund char raha tha. 
Mark5:12 aur unhon ne us se binatee karake kaha, ki hamen un sooaron men bhej de, ki ham un ke bheetar jaaen." 
Mark5:13 so us ne unhen agyaa dee aur ashuuddh atma nikalakar sooaron ke bheetar paaitt gai aur jhun, jo koi do hajar ka tha, kadade par se jhpattkar jheel men ja pada, aur oob mara." 
Mark5:14 aur un ke charavahon ne bhagakar nagar aur ganvon men samachar sunaya. 
Mark5:15 aur jo hua tha, log use dekhne aae. aur yeeshu ke pas akar, ve us men sena samai thee, kapade paahine aur sachet baaitte dekhkar, dr gaae." 
Mark5:16 aur dekhnevalon ne usaka jis men dushttatmaaen thee, aur sooaron ka poora hal, un ko kah sunaya." 
Mark5:17 aur ve us se binatee kar ke kahane lage, ki hamare sivanon se chala ja." 
Mark5:18 aur jab vah nav par chaddhne laga, to vah jis men pahile dushttatmaaen thee, us se binatee karane laga, ki mujhe apane sath rahane de." 
Mark5:19 parantu us ne use agyaa n dee, aur us se kaha, apane ghar jakar apane logon ko bata, ki tujh par daya karake prabhu ne tere liye kaaise bade kam kiae haain." 
Mark5:20 vah jakar dikapulis men is bat ka prachar karane laga, ki yeeshu ne mere liye kaaise bade kam kiae aur sab achambha karate the.." 
Mark5:21 jab yeeshu fir nav se par gaya, to aek badee bheed usake pas ikatthee ho gai aur vah jheel ke kinare tha." 
Mark5:22 aur yair nam aradhanalay ke saradaron men se aek aya, aur use dekhkar, usake panvon par gira." 
Mark5:23 aur us ne yah kahakar bahut binatee kee, ki meree chhottee bettee marane par haai: too akar us par hath rak, ki vah changee hokar jeeavit rahe." 
Mark5:24 tab vah usake sath chala aur badee bheed usake peede ho lee, yahan tak ki log us par gire padte the.." 
Mark5:25 aur aek sre, jis ko barah varsha se lohoo bahane ka rog tha." 
Mark5:26 aur jis ne bahut vaaidhon se bada dukh uttaya aur apana sab mal vyay karane par bhee kuchh labh n uttaya tha, parantu aur bhee rogee ho gai thee." 
Mark5:27 yeeshu kee charcha sunakar, bheed men usake peechhe se ai, aur usake vasr ko choo liya." 
Mark5:28 kyonaki vah kahatee thee, yadi maain usake vasr hee ko choo loongee, to changee ho jaungaha." 
Mark5:29 aur turant usaka lohoo bahana band ho gaya aur us ne apanee deh men jan liya, ki maain us beemaree se achchhee ho gai." 
Mark5:30 yeeshu ne turant apane men jan liya, ki mujh se samarth nikalee haai, aur bheed men peechhe firakar poochha mera vasr kis ne chooa?" 
Mark5:31 usake chelon ne us se kaha too dekhta haai, ki bheed tujh par giree padtee haai, aur too kahata haai ki kis ne mujhe chhua?" 
Mark5:32 tab us ne use dekhne ke liye jis ne yah kam kiya tha, charon or drashtti kee." 
Mark5:33 tab vah sree yah janakar, ki meree kaaisee bhlai hui haai, dratee aur kanpatee hui ai, aur usake panvon par girakar, us se sab hal sach sach kah diya." 
Mark5:34 us ne us se kaha putraee tere vishvas ne tujhe changa kiya haai: kushal se ja, aur apanee is beemaree se bachee raha.." 
Mark5:35 vah yah kah hee raha tha, ki aradhanalay ke saradar ke ghar se logon ne akar kaha, ki teree bettee to mar gai ab guroo ko kyon dukh deta haai?" 
Mark5:36 jo bat ve kah rahe the, us ko yeeshu ne anasunee karake, aradhanalay ke saradar se kaha mat dra keval vishvas rakh." 
Mark5:37 aur us ne pataras aur yakoob aur yakoob ke bhai yoohanna ko chhod, aur kisee ko apane sath ane n diya." 
Mark5:38 aur aradhanalay ke saradar ke ghar men pahunchakar, us ne logon ko bahut rote aur chillate dekha." 
Mark5:39 tab us ne bheetar jakar us se kaha, tum kyon halla machate aur rote ho? ladkee maree nahee, parantu so rahee haai." 
Mark5:40 ve us kee hansee karane lage, parantu us ne sab ko nikalakar ladkee ke matapita aur apane saathaiyon ko lekar, bheetar janha ladkee padee thee, gaya." 
Mark5:41 aur ladkee ka hath pakadkar us se kaha, 'taleeta koomeen jis ka arth yah haai ki 'he ladkee, maain tujh se kahata hoo, uttn." 
Mark5:42 aur ladkee turant uttkar chalane firane lagee kyonaki vah barah varsha kee thee. aur is par log bahut chaakit ho gaae. 
Mark5:43 fir us ne unhen chitakar agyaa dee ki yah bat koi janane n paae aur kaha ki use kuchh khane ko diya jaae.. 
Mark6:1 vahan se nikalakar vah apane desh men aya, aur usake chele usake peechhe ho liae." 
Mark6:2 sabt ke din vah aradhanalay men upadesh karane laga aur bahut log sunakar chaakit huae aur kahane lage, is ko ye baten kahan se a gai? aur yah kaun sa gyaan haai jo us ko diya gaya haai? aur kaaise samarth ke kam isake hathon se pragatt hote haain?" 
Mark6:3 kya yah vahee baddhi nahee, jo mariyam ka putra, aur yakoob aur yoses aur yahooda aur shamaun ka bhai haai? aur kya us kee bahinen yahan hamare beech men naheen rahateen? isaaliye unhon ne usake vishay meen ttokar khai." 
Mark6:4 yeeshu ne un se kaha, ki bhvishyadvkta apane desh aur apane kuttumb aur apane ghar ko chhod aur kaheen bhee niradar naheen hota." 
Mark6:5 aur vah vahan koi samarth ka kam n kar saka, keval thode beemaron par hath rakhkar unhen changa kiya.." 
Mark6:6 aur us ne un ke aavishvas par ashcharya kiya aur charon or se gavon men upadesh karata fira.. 
Mark6:7 aur vah barahon ko apane pas bulakar unhen do do karake bhejane laga aur unhen ashuuddh atmaon par aadhaikar diya. 
Mark6:8 aur us ne unhen agyaa dee, ki marga ke liye lattee chhod aur kuchh n lo n to rottee, n jholee, n pattuke men paaise." 
Mark6:9 parantu jootiyan paahino aur do do kurate n pahino. 
Mark6:10 aur us ne un se kaha jahan kaheen tum kisee ghar men utaro to jab tak vahan se vida n ho, tab tak usee men tthare raho." 
Mark6:11 jis sthan ke log tumhen grahan n kare, aur tumharee n sune, vahan se chalate hee apane talavon kee dhool jhad dalo, ki un par gavahee ho." 
Mark6:12 aur unhon ne jakar prachar kiya, ki man firao." 
Mark6:13 aur bahutere dushttatmaon ko nikala, aur bahut beemaron par tel malakar unhen changa kiya.." 
Mark6:14 aur herodes raja ne us kee charcha sunee, kyonki usaka nam faail gaya tha, aur us ne kaha, ki yoohanna bapatisma denevala mare huon men se jee utta haai, isee liye us se ye samarth ke kam pragatt hote haain." 
Mark6:15 aur auron ne kaha, yah aeliyyah haai, parantu auron ne kaha, bhvishyadvkta ya bhavishyadvktaon men se kisee aek ke saman haai." 
Mark6:16 herodes ne yah sun kar kaha, jis yoohanna ka sir maain ne kattvaya tha, vahee jee utta haai." 
Mark6:17 kyonaki herodes ne ap apane bhai filippus kee patnee herodiyas ke kara, jis se us ne byah kiya tha, logon ko bhejakar yoohanna ko pakadvakar bandeegrah men dal diya tha." 
Mark6:18 kyonaki yoohanna ne herodes se kaha tha, ki apane bhai kee patnee ko rakhna tujhe uchit naheen." 
Mark6:19 isaliye herodiyas us se baair rakhtee thee aur yah chahatee thee, ki use marava dale, parantu aeesa n ho saka." 
Mark6:20 kyonaki herodes yoohanna ko dharmee aur pavitra puroosh janakar us se drata tha, aur use bachaae rakhta tha, aur us kee sunakar bahut ghabarata tha, par anand se sunata tha." 
Mark6:21 aur tteek avasar par jab herodes ne apane janm din men apane pradhaanon aur senapaatiyo, aur galeel ke bade logon ke liye jevanar kee." 
Mark6:22 aur usee herodiyas kee bettee bheetar ai, aur nachakar herodes ko aur usake sath baaittnevalon ko prasann kiya tab raja ne ladkee se kaha, too jo chahe mujh se mang maain tujhe doonga." 
Mark6:23 aur us ne shapath khai, ki maain apane adho rajy tak jo kuchh too mujh se mangegee maain tujhe doonga." 
Mark6:24 us ne bahar jakar apanee mata se poochha, ki maain kya mangoon? vah bolee yoohanna bapatisma denevale ka sira." 
Mark6:25 vah turant raja ke pas bheetar ai, aur us se binatee kee maain chahatee hoo, ki too abhee yoohanna bapaatisma denevale ka sir aek thal men mujhe mangava de." 
Mark6:26 tab raja bahut udas hua, parantu apanee shapath ke karan aur sath baaittnevalon ke karan use ttalana n chaha." 
Mark6:27 aur raja ne turant aek sipahee ko agyaa dekar bheja, ki usaka sir katt laae." 
Mark6:28 us ne jelakhane men jakar usaka sir katta, aur ek thal men rakhkar laya aur ladkee ko diya, aur ladkee ne apanee man ko diya." 
Mark6:29 yah sunakar usake chele aa, aur us kee loth ko uttakar kabra men rakha." 
Mark6:30 praeriton ne yeeshu ke pas ikatthe hokar, jo kuchh unhon ne kiya, aur sikhaya tha, sab us ko bata diya." 
Mark6:31 us ne un se kaha tum ap alag kisee jangalee sthan men akar thoda vishraam karo kyonki bahut log ate jate the, aur unhen khane ka avasar bhee naheen milata tha." 
Mark6:32 isaliye ve nav par chaddhkar, sunasan jagah men alag chale gaae." 
Mark6:33 aur bahuton ne unhen jate dekhkar pachian liya, aur sab nagaron se ikatthe hokar vahan paaidal daude aur un se paahile ja pahunche." 
Mark6:34 us ne nikalakar badee bheed dekhee, aur un par taras khaya, kyonaki ve un bhedon ke saman the, jin ka koi rakhvala n ho aur vah unhen bahut see baten sikhane laga." 
Mark6:35 jab din bahut ddhl gaya, to usake chele usake pas akar kahane lage yah sunasan jagah haai, aur din bahut ddhl gaya haai." 
Mark6:36 unhen vida kar, ki charon or ke ganvon aur baastaiyon men jakar, apane liye kuchh khane ko mol len." 
Mark6:37 us ne unhen uttr diya ki tum hee unhen khane ko do: unahon ne us se kaha kya ham sau deenar kee rottyaian mol le, aur unhen khailaen?" 
Mark6:38 us ne un se kaha jakar dekho tumhare pas kitanee rottyaian haain? unhon ne maloom karake kaha panch aur do machhlee bhee. 
Mark6:39 tab us ne unhen agyaa dee, ki sab ko haree ghaas par panati panati se baaitta do." 
Mark6:40 ve sau sau aur pachas pachas karake panti panati baaitt gaae. 
Mark6:41 aur us ne un panch rottyaien ko aur do machhliyon ko liya, aur svarga kee or dekhkar dhanyavad kiya aur rottyaian tod tod kar chelon ko deta gaya, ki ve logon ko parose, aur ve do machhaliyan bhee un sab men bantt deen." 
Mark6:42 aur sab khakar trapt ho gaae. 
Mark6:43 aur unhon ne ttukadon se barah ttokaariyan bhr kar uttai, aur kuchh machhliyon se bhee." 
Mark6:44 jinhon ne rottyaian khai, ve panch hajar puroosh the.." 
Mark6:45 tab us ne turant apane chelon ko barabas nav par chaddhaya, ki ve us se pahile us par baaitasaaida ko chale jana, jab tak ki vah logon ko vida kare." 
Mark6:46 aur unhen vida karake pahad par praarthna karane ko gaya. 
Mark6:47 aur jab sanjh hui, to nav jheel ke beech men thee, aur vah akela boomi par tha." 
Mark6:48 aur jab us ne dekha, ki ve khete khete ghabara gaae haai, kyonki hava un ke virooddh thee, to rat ke chauthe pahar ke nikatt vah jheel par chalate huae un ke pas aya aur un se age nikal jana chahata tha." 
Mark6:49 parantu unhon ne use jheel par chalate dekhkar samajha, ki boot haai, aur chilla utte, kyonaki sab use dekhkar ghabara gaae the." 
Mark6:50 par us ne turant un se baten keen aur kaha ddhaddhs bandhaen: maain hoon dro mata. 
Mark6:51 tab vah un ke pas nav par aya, aur hava thm gai: ve bahut hee ashcharya karane lage." 
Mark6:52 kyonaki ve un rottyaien ke vishay men ne samajhe the parantu un ke man kattor ho gaae the.. 
Mark6:53 aur ve par utarakar gannesarat men pahunche, aur nav ghaa par lagai." 
Mark6:54 aur jab ve nav par se utare, to log turant us ko pahachan kara." 
Mark6:55 asapas ke sare desh men dode, aur beemaron ko khantton par dalakar, jahan jahan samachar paya ki vah haai, vahan vahan liae fire." 
Mark6:56 aur jahan kaheen vah ganvo, nagaro, ya bastaiyon men jata tha, to log beemaron ko bajaron men rakhkar us se binatee karate the, ki vah unhen apane vasr ke anchal hee ho choo lene de: aur jitane use choote the, sab change ho jate the.." 
Mark7:1 tab fareesee aur kai aek shaasree jo yarooshalem se aae the, usake pas ikatthe huae." 
Mark7:2 aur unhon ne usake kai chelon ko ashuuddh arthata bina hath dhaeae rottee khate dekha. 
Mark7:3 kyonaki fareesee aur sab yahoodee, puraniyon kee reeati par chalate haain aur jab tak bhlee bhanati hath naheen dhae lete tab tak naheen khate." 
Mark7:4 aur bajar se akar, jab tak snan naheen kar lete, tab tak naheen khate aur bahut see aur baten haai, jo un ke pas manane ke liye pahunchai gai haai, jaaise kattoro, aur lotto, aur tanbe ke baratanon ko dhaena-manajana." 
Mark7:5 isaliye un fareesiyon aur shaastriayon ne us se poochha, ki tere chele kyon puraniyon kee reeton par naheen chalate, aur bina hath dhaeae rottee khate haain?" 
Mark7:6 us ne un se kaha ki yashaayah ne tum kapattyaien ke vishay men bahut tteek bhvishyadvvanee kee jaaisa likha haai ki ye log hotton se to mera adar karate haai, par un ka man mujh se door rahata haai." 
Mark7:7 aur ye vyarth meree upasana karate haai, kyonki manushyon kee agyaaon ko dhamornpadesh karake sikhate haain." 
Mark7:8 kyonaki tum parameshvar kee agyaa ko ttalakar manushyon kee reetiyon ko manate ho. 
Mark7:9 aur us ne un se kaha tum apanee reetiyon ko manane ke liye parameshvar agyaa kaaisee achchhee tarah ttal dete ho! 
Mark7:10 kyonaki moosa ne kaha haai ki apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar kara or jo koi pita va mata ko bura kahe, vah avashy mar dala jaae." 
Mark7:11 parantu tum kahate ho ki yadi koi apane pita va mata se kahe, ki jo kuchh tujhe mujh se labh pahunch sakata tha, vah kuraban arthata sankalp ho chuka." 
Mark7:12 to tum us ko usake pita va us kee mata kee kuchh seva karane naheen dete. 
Mark7:13 is prakar tum apanee reetiyon se, jinhen tum ne ttharaya haai, parameshvar ka vachan ttal dete ho aur aeese aeese bahut se kam karate ho." 
Mark7:14 aur us ne logon ko apane pas bulakar un se kaha, tum sab meree suno, aur samajho." 
Mark7:15 aeesee to koi vastu naheen jo manushy ko bahar se samakar ashuuddh kare parantu jo vastuaen manushy ke bheetar se nikalatee haai, ve hee use ashuuddh karatee haain." 
Mark7:16 yaadi kisee ke sunane ke kan hon to sun le. 
Mark7:17 jab vah bheed ke pas se ghar men gaya, to usake chelon ne is drashttant ke vishay men us se poochha." 
Mark7:18 us ne un se kaha kya tum bhee aeese na samajh ho? kya tum naheen samajhte, ki jo vastu bahar se manushy ke bheetar jatee haai, vah use ashuuddh naheen kar sakatee?" 
Mark7:19 kyonaki vah usake man men nahee, parantu pett men jatee haai, aur sandas men nikal jatee haai? yah kahakar us ne sab bhojan vastuon ko shuuddh ttharaya." 
Mark7:20 fir us ne kaha jo manushy men se nikalata haai, vahee manushy ko ashuuddh karata haai." 
Mark7:21 kyoenki bheetar se arthata manushy me man se, buree buree chinta vyaabhaichara." 
Mark7:22 choree, hatya, parasreegaman, lob, dushttta, chhl, luchapan, kudraashtti, ninda, abhaiman, aur moorkhta nikalatee haain." 
Mark7:23 ye sab buree baten bheetar hee se nikalatee haain aur manushy ko ashuuddh karatee haain.. 
Mark7:24 fir vah vahan se uttkar soor aur saaida ke deshaen men aya aur aek ghar men gaya, aur chahata tha, ki koi n jane parantu vah chhpai n saka." 
Mark7:25 aur turant aek sree jis kee chhottee bettee men ashuuddh atma thee, us kee charcha sun kar ai, aur usake panvon par giree." 
Mark7:26 yah yoonanee aur sooroofineekee jati kee thee aur us ne us se binatee kee, ki meree bettee men se dushttatma nikal de." 
Mark7:27 us ne us se kaha, pahile ladkon ko trapt hone de, kyonaki ladkon ko rottee lekar kuton ke age dalana uchit naheen haai." 
Mark7:28 us ne us ko uttr diya ki sach haai prabhu taubhee kutte bhee to mej ke neeche balakon kee rottee ka choor char kha lete haain. 
Mark7:29 us ne us sake kaha is bat ke karan chalee ja dushttatma teree bettee men se nikal gai haai. 
Mark7:30 aur us ne apane ghar akar dekha ki ladkee khatt par padee haai, aur dushttatma nikal gai haai.." 
Mark7:31 fir vah soor aur saaida ke deshaen se nikalakar dikapulis desh se hota hua galeel kee jheel par pahuncha. 
Mark7:32 aur logon ne aek bahire ko jo hakala bhee tha, usake pas lakar us se binatee kee, ki apana hath us par rakhe." 
Mark7:33 tab vah us ko bheed se alag le gaya, aur apanee ungaliyan usake kanon men dalee, aur took kar us kee jeebh ko chooa." 
Mark7:34 aur svarga kee or dekhkar ah bhree, aur us se kaha ipfatth, arthata khul ja." 
Mark7:35 aur usake kan khul gaa, aur us kee jeebh kee gantt bhee khul gai, aur vah safa safa bolane laga." 
Mark7:36 tab us ne unhen chitaya ki kisee se n kahana parantu jitana us ne unhen chitaya utana hee ve aur prachar karane lage. 
Mark7:37 aur ve bahut hee ashcharya men hokar kahane lage, us ne jo kuchh kiya sab achchha kiya haai vah bahiron ko sunane, kee, aur goongon ko bolane kee shaktai deta haai.." 
Mark8:1 un dinon me, jab fir badee bheed ikatthee hui, aur un ke pas kuchh khane ko n tha, to us ne apane chelon ko pas bulakar un se kaha." 
Mark8:2 mujhe is bheed par taras ata haai, kyonki yah teen din se barabar mere sath haai, aur un ke pas kuchh bhee khane ko naheen." 
Mark8:3 yaadi maain unhen bookha ghar bhej doo, to marga men thk kar rah jaaenge kyoki in men se koi koi door se aae haain." 
Mark8:4 usake chelon ne us ko uttr diya, ki yahan jangal men itanee rottee koi kahan se laae ki ye trapt hon?" 
Mark8:5 us ne un se poochha tumhare pas kitanee rottyaian haain? unhon ne kaha, sata." 
Mark8:6 tab us ne logon ko boomi par baaittne kee agyaa dee, aur ve sat rottyaian lee, aur dhanyavad karake todee, aur apane chelon ko deta gaya ki un ke age rakhe, aur unhon ne logon ke age paros diya" 
Mark8:7 un ke pas thodee see chhottee machhaliyon bhee theen aur usane dhanyavad karake unhen bhee logon ke age rakhne kee agyaa dee. 
Mark8:8 so ve khakar trapt ho gaae aur shosh ttrakadon ke sat ttokare bhrakar uttaae. 
Mark8:9 aur log char hajar ke lagabhg the aur us ne un ko vida kiya. 
Mark8:10 aur vah turant apane chelon ke sath nav par chaddhkar dalamanoota desh ko chala gaya.. 
Mark8:11 fir fareesee nikalakar us se vada-avivad karane lage, aur use janchane ke liye us se koi svargeey chinh manga." 
Mark8:12 us ne apanee atma men ah mar kar kaha, is samay ke log kyon chinh ddoonddhte haain? maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki is samay ke logon ko koi chinh naheen diya jaega." 
Mark8:13 aur vah unhen chhodkar fir nav par chaddh gaya aur par chala gaya.. 
Mark8:14 aur ve rottee lena bool gaae the, aur nav men un ke pas aek hee rottee thee." 
Mark8:15 aur us ne unhen chitaya, ki dekho, fareesiyon ke khmeer aur herodes ke khmeer se chaukas raho." 
Mark8:16 ve apas men vichar karake kahane lage, ki hamare pas to rottee naheen haai." 
Mark8:17 yah janakar yeeshu ne un se kaha tum kyon apas men vichar kar rahe ho ki hamare pas rottee naheen? kya ab tak naheen janate aur naheen samajhte? 
Mark8:18 kya tumhara man kattor ho gaya haai? kya ankhe rakhte huae bhee naheen dekhte, aur kan rakhte huae bhee naheen sunate? aur tumhen smaran naheen." 
Mark8:19 ki jab maain ne panch hajar ke liye panch rottee todee theen to tum ne ttukadon kee kitanee ttokaariyan bhrakar uttain? unhon ne us se kaha, sat ttokare." 
Mark8:20 us ne un se kaha, sat ttokare." 
Mark8:21 us ne un se kaha, kya tum ab tak naheen samajhte?" 
Mark8:22 aur ve baaitasaaida men aae aur log aek andho ko usake pas le aae aur us se binatee kee, ki us ko chooae." 
Mark8:23 vah us andho ka hath pakadkar use ganv ke bahar le gaya, aur us kee ankhon men tookakar us par hath rakhe, aur us se poochha kya too kuchh dekhta haai?" 
Mark8:24 us ne ankh utta kar kaha maain manushyon ko dekhta hoon kyonki ve mujhe chalate huae dikhai dete haai, jaaise ped." 
Mark8:25 tab us ne fir dobara us kee ankhon par hath rakhe, aur us ne dhyan se dekha, aur changa ho gaya, aur sab kuchh safa safa dekhne laga." 
Mark8:26 aur us ne us se yah kahakar ghar bheja, ki is ganv ke bheetar panv bhee n rakhna.." 
Mark8:27 yeeshu aur usake chele kaaisaariya filippee ke gavon men chale gaae: aur marga men us ne apane chelon se poochha ki log mujhe kya kahate haain? 
Mark8:28 unhon ne uttr diya, ki yoohanna bapatisma denevala par koi koi ealiyyaha aur koi koi bhavishyadvktaon men se ek bhee kahate haain." 
Mark8:29 us ne un se poochha parantu tum mujhe kya kahate ho? pataras ne us ko uttr diya too maseeh haai. 
Mark8:30 tab us ne unhen chitakar kaha, ki mere vishay men yah kisee se n kahana." 
Mark8:31 aur vah unhen sikhane laga, ki manushy ke putra ke liye avashy haai, ki vah bahut dukh uttaa, aur puraniae aur mahayajak aur shaasree use tuchchh samajhkar mar dalen aur vah teen din ke bad jee utte." 
Mark8:32 us ne yah bat un se safa safa kah dee: is par pataras use alag le jakar jhdikane laga. 
Mark8:33 parantu us ne firakar, aur apane chelon kee or dekhkar pataras ko jhdikar kar kaha ki he shautan, mere samhane se door ho kyonaki too parameshvar kee baton par nahee, parantu manushy kee baton par man lagata haai." 
Mark8:34 us ne bheed ko apane chelon samet pas bulakar un se kaha, jo koi mere peechhe ana chahe, vah apane ape se inkar kare aur apana kroos uttakar, mere peechhe ho le." 
Mark8:35 kyonaki jo koi apana praan bachana chahe vah use khoaega, par jo koi mere aur susamachar ke liye apana praan khoaega, vah use bachaaega." 
Mark8:36 yaadi manushy sare jagat ko praapt kare aur apane praan kee hani uttaa, to use kya labh hoga?" 
Mark8:37 aur manushy apane praan ke badale kya dega? 
Mark8:38 jo koi is vyaabhaicharee aur papee jaati ke beech mujh se aur meree baton se lajaaega, manushy ka putra bhee jab vah paavitra dooton ke sath apane pita kee maahima saahit aaega, tab us se bhee lajaaega." 
Mark9:1 aur us ne un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jo yahan khde haai, un men se koi aeese haai, ki jab tak parameshvar ke rajy ko samarth saahit ata hua n dekh le, tab tak mratyu ka svad kadapi n chakhenge.." 
Mark9:2 chh: din ke bad yeeshu ne pataras aur yakoob aur yoohanna ko sath liya, aur aekant men kisee unche pahad par le gaya aur un ke samhane usaka roop badal gaya." 
Mark9:3 aur usaka vasr aeesa chamakane laga aur yahan tak ati ujjaval hua, ki prathvee par koi dhaebee bhee vaaisa ujjaval naheen kar sakata." 
Mark9:4 aur unhen moosa ke sath aeliyyah dikhai diya aur ve yeeshu ke sath baten karate the. 
Mark9:5 is par pataras ne yeeshu se kaha he rabbee, hamara yahan rahana achchha haai: isaliye ham teen mandp banaaen aek tere liye, aek moosa ke liye, aur aek aeliyyah ke liye." 
Mark9:6 kyonaki vah n janata tha, ki kya uttr de isaaliye ki ve bahut dr gaae the." 
Mark9:7 tab aek badal ne unhen chha liya, aur us badal men se yah shabd nikala, ki yah mera piry putra haai us kee suno." 
Mark9:8 tab unhon ne aekaaek charon aur draashtti kee, aur yeeshu ko chhod apane sath aur kisee ko n dekha.." 
Mark9:9 pahad se utarate hua, us ne unhen agyaa dee, ki jab tak manushy ka putra mare huon men se jee n utte, tab tak jo kuchh tum ne dekha haai vah kisee se n kahana." 
Mark9:10 unhon ne is bat ko smaran rakha aur apas men vada-avivad karane lage, ki mare huon men se jee uttne ka kya arth haai?" 
Mark9:11 aur unhon ne us se poochha, shaasree kyon kahate haai, ki aeliyyah ka pahile ana avashy haai?" 
Mark9:12 us ne unhen uttr diya ki eliyyah sachamuch pahile akar sab kuchh sudhaarega, parantu manushy ke putra ke vishay men yah kyon likha haai, ki vah bahut dukh uttaega, aur tuchchh gina jaega?" 
Mark9:13 parantu maain tum se kahata hoo, ki aeliyyah to a chuka, aur jaaisa usake vishay men likha haai, unhon ne jo kuchh chaha usake sath kiya.." 
Mark9:14 aur jab vah chelon ke pas aya, to dekha ki un ke charon aur badee bheed lagee haai aur shaasree un ke sath vivad kar rahen haain." 
Mark9:15 aur use dekhte hee sab bahut hee ashcharya karane lage, aur us kee or daudkar use namaskar kiya." 
Mark9:16 us ne un se poochha tum in se kya vivad kar rahe ho? 
Mark9:17 bheed men se aek ne use uttr diya, ki he guro, maain apane putra ko, jis men goongee atma samai haai, tere pas laya tha." 
Mark9:18 jahan kaheen vah use pakadtee haai, vaheen pattkar detee haai: aur vah munh men faen bhr lata, aur dant peesata, aur sookhta jata haai: aur maain ne chelon se kaha i ki ve use nikal den parantu vah nikal n sake." 
Mark9:19 yah sunakar us ne un se uttr deke kaha: ki he avishvasee logo, maain kab tak tumhare sath rahoonga? aur kab tak tumharee sahoonga? use mere pas lao." 
Mark9:20 tab ve use usake pas le aae: aur jab us ne use dekha, to us atma ne turant use maroda aur vah boomi par gira, aur munh se faen bahate huae lottne laga." 
Mark9:21 us ne usake pita se poochha is kee yah dasha kab se haai? 
Mark9:22 us ne kaha, bachapan se: us ne ise nash karane ke liye kabhee ag aur kabhee panee men giraya parantu yaadi too kuchh kar sake, to ham par taras khakar hamara upakar kara." 
Mark9:23 yeeshu ne us se kaha yaadi too kar sakata haai yah kya bata haai? vishvas karanevale ke liye sab kuchh ho sakata haai. 
Mark9:24 balak ke pita ne turant gidgidakar kaha he prabhu, maain vishvas karata hoo, mere aavishvas ka upay kara." 
Mark9:25 jab yeeshu ne dekha, ki log daudkar bheed laga rahe haai, to us ne ashuuddh atm ko yah kahakar dantta, ki he goongee aur baahiree atma, maain tujhe agyaa deta hoo, us men se nikal a, aur us men fir kabhee pravesh n kara." 
Mark9:26 tab vah chillakar, aur use bahut marod kar, nikal ai aur balak mara hua sa ho gaya, yahan tak ki bahut lage kahane lage, ki vah mar gaya." 
Mark9:27 parantu yeeshu ne usaka hath pakad ke use uttaya, aur vah khda ho gaya." 
Mark9:28 jab vah ghar men aya, to usake chelon ne aekant men us se poochha, ham use kya n nikal sake?" 
Mark9:29 us ne un se kaha, ki yah jati bina praarthna kisee aur upay se nikal naheen sakatee.." 
Mark9:30 fir ve vahan se chale, aur galeel men hokar ja rahe the, aur vah apane chelon ko upadesh deta aur un se kahata tha, ki manushy ka putra manushyon ke hath men pakadvaya jaaega, aur ve use mar dalenge, aur vah marane ke teen din bad jee uttega." 
Mark9:31 par yah bat un kee samajh men naheen ai, aur ve us se poochhne se drate the.." 
Mark9:32 fir ve kafaranahoom men aae aur ghar men akar us ne un se poochha ki raste men tum kis bat par vivad karate the? 
Mark9:33 ve chup rahe, kyonki marga men unhon ne apas men yah vada-vivad kiya tha, ki ham men se bada kaun haai?" 
Mark9:34 ve chup rahe, kyonki marga men unhon ne apas men yah vada-vivad kiya tha, ki ham men se bada kaun haai?" 
Mark9:35 tab us ne baaittkar barahon ko bulaya, aur un se kaha, yaadi koi bada hona chahe, to sab se chhotta aur sab ka sevak bane." 
Mark9:36 aur us ne aek balak ko lekar un ke beech men khda kiya, aur usake god men lekar un se kaha." 
Mark9:37 jo koi meere nam se aeese balakon men se kisee aek ko bhee grahan karata haai, vah mujhe grahan karata haai aur jo koi mujhe grahan karata, vah mujhe nahee, baran mere bhejanevale ko grahan karata haai.." 
Mark9:38 tab yoohanna ne us se kaha, he guroo ham ne aek manushy ko tere nam se dushttatmaon ko nikalate dekha aur ham use mana karane lage, kyonaki vah hamare peechhe naheen ho leta tha." 
Mark9:39 yeeshu ne kaha, us ko mat mana karo kyonaki aeesa koi naheen jo mere nam se samarth ka kam kare, aur jaldee se mujhe bura kah sake." 
Mark9:40 kyonaki jo hamare virodha men nahee, vah hamaree or haai." 
Mark9:41 jo koi aek kattora panee tumhen isaliye pilaae ki tum maseeh ke ho to maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki vah apana pratifal kisee reeati se n khoaega. 
Mark9:42 par jo koi in chhotton men se jo mujh par vishvas karate haai, kisee ko ttokar khaialaae to usake liye bhla yah he ki aek badee chakkee ka patt usake gale men lattkaya jaae aur vah samudra men dal diya jaae." 
Mark9:43 yaadi tera hath tujhe ttokar khailaae to use katt dal ttunda hokar jeevan men pravesh karana, tere liye is se bhla haai ki do hath rahate huae narak ke beech us ag men dala jaae jo kabhee bujhne kee naheen." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 aur yaadi tera panv tujhe ttokar khailaae to use katt dala. 
Mark9:46 langada hokar jeevan men pravesh karana tere liye is se bhla haai, ki do panv rahate huae narak men dala jaae." 
Mark9:47 aur yaadi teree ankh tujhe ttokar khailaae to use nikal dal, kana hokar parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karana tere liye is se bhla haai, ki do ankh rahate huae too narak men dala jaae." 
Mark9:48 jahan un ka keeda naheen marata aur ag naheen bujhtee. 
Mark9:49 kyonaki har aek jan ag se namakeen kiya jaaega. 
Mark9:50 namak achchha haai, par yaadi namak kee namakeenee jatee rahe, to use kis se svaadit karoge? apane men namak rakho, aur apas men mel milap se raho.." 
Mark10:1 fir vah vahan se uttkar yahoodiya ke sivanon men aur yaradan ke par aya, aur bheed usake pas fir ikatthee ho gai, aur vah apanee reeati ke anusar unhen fir upadesh dene laga." 
Mark10:2 tab fareesiyon ne usake pas akar us kee pareeksha karane ko us se poochha, kya yah uchit haai, ki puroosh apanee patnee ko tyage?" 
Mark10:3 us ne un ko uttr diya, ki moosa ne tumhen kya agyaa dee haai?" 
Mark10:4 unhon ne kaha, moosa ne tyag patra likhne aur tyagane kee agyaa dee haai." 
Mark10:5 yeeshu ne un se kaha, ki tumhare man kee kattorata ke karan us ne tumhare liye yah agyaa likhee." 
Mark10:6 par sraashtti ke arambh se parameshvar ne nar aur naree karake un ko banaya haai. 
Mark10:7 is karan manushy apane mata-pita se alag hokar apanee patnee ke sath rahega, aur ve donon aek tan honge." 
Mark10:8 isaliye ve ab do naheen par aek tan haain. 
Mark10:9 isaliye jise parameshvar ne joda haai use manushy alag n kare. 
Mark10:10 aur ghar men chelon ne is ke vishay men us se fir poochha. 
Mark10:11 us ne un se kaha, jo koi apanee patnee ko tyagakar doosaree se byah kare to vah us paahilee ke virodha men vyaabhaichar karata haai." 
Mark10:12 aur yaadi patnee apane pati ko chhodkar doosare se byah kare, to vah vyaabhaichar karata haai." 
Mark10:13 fir log balakon ko usake pas lane lage, ki vah un par hath rakhe, par chelon ne unako dantta." 
Mark10:14 yeeshu ne yah dekh krudha hokar un se kaha, balakon ko mere pas ane do aur unhen mana n karo, kyonki parameshvar ka rajy aeeson hee ka haai." 
Mark10:15 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jo koi parameshvar ke rajy ko balak kee nai grahan n kare, vah us men kabhee pravesh karane n paaega." 
Mark10:16 aur us ne unhen god men liya, aur un par hath rakhkar unhen ashaeesh dee.." 
Mark10:17 aur jab vah nikalakar marga men jata tha, to aek manushy usake pas daudta hua aya, aur usake age ghauttne ttekakar us se poochha? he uttm guro, anant jeevan ka adhaikaree hone ke liye maain kyan karoon?" 
Mark10:18 yeeshu ne us se kaha, too mujhe uttm kyon kahata haai? koi uttm nahee, keval aek arthata parameshvara." 
Mark10:19 too agyaaon ko to janata haai hatya n karana, vyabhaichar n karana, choree n karana, joottee gavahee n dena, chhl n karana, apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana." 
Mark10:20 us ne us se kaha, he guro, in sab ko maain ladkapan se manata aya hoon." 
Mark10:21 yeeshu ne us par drashtti karake us se praem kiya, aur us se kaha, tujh men aek bat kee ghattee haai ja, jo kuchh tera haai, use bech kar kangalon ko de, aur tujhe svarga men dhan milega, aur akar mere peechhe ho le." 
Mark10:22 is bat se usake chihare par udasee chha gai, aur vah shaek karata hua chala gaya, kyonaki vah bahut dhanee tha." 
Mark10:23 yeeshu ne charon or dekhkar apane chelon se kaha, dhanavanon ko parameshvarake rajy men pravesh karana kaaisa kaattnai haai!" 
Mark10:24 yeeshu ne charon aur dekhkar apane chelon se kaha, dhanavanon ko parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karana kaaisa kaattnai haai!" 
Mark10:25 chele us kee baton se achambhiat hua, is par yeeshu ne fir un ko uttr diya, he balako, jo dhan par bhrosa rakhte haai, un ke liye parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karana kaaisa kattnai haai!" 
Mark10:26 ve bahut hee chakit hokar apas men kahane lage to fir kis ka uddhar ho sakata haai. 
Mark10:27 yeeshu ne un kee or dekhkar kaha, manushyon se to yah naheen ho sakata, parantu parameshvar se ho sakata haai kyonaki parameshvar se sab kuchh ho sakata haai." 
Mark10:28 pataras us se kahane laga, ki dek, ham to sab kuchh chhodkar tere peechhe ho liye haain." 
Mark10:29 yeeshu ne kaha, maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki aeesa koi nahee, jis ne mere aur susamachar ke liye ghar ya bhaiyon ya baahinon ya mata ya pita ya ladke-balon ya kheton ko chhod diya ho." 
Mark10:30 aur ab is samay sau guna n paa, gharon aur bhaiyon aur baahinon aur mataon aur ladke-balon aur kheton ko par upadrav ke sath aur paralok men anant jeevana." 
Mark10:31 par bahutere jo pahile haai, pichhle honge aur jo pichhle haai, ve pahile honge." 
Mark10:32 aur ve yarooshalem ko jate huae marga men the, aur yeeshu un ke age age ja raha tha: aur ve achambha karane lage aur jo usake peechhe peechhe chalate the drane lage, tab vah fir un barahon ko lekar un se ve baten kahane laga, jo us par anevalee theen." 
Mark10:33 ki dekho, ham yarooshalem ko jate haai, aur manushy ka putra mahayajakon aur shaastriayon ke hath pakadvaya jaaega, aur ve us ko ghaat ke yogy ttharaaenge, aur anyajatiyon ke hath men saunpenge." 
Mark10:34 aur ve us ko tttthon men udaaenge, aur us par tookenge, aur use kode marenge, aur use ghaat karenge, aur teen din ke bad vah jee uttega.." 
Mark10:35 tab jabadee ke putra yakoob aur yoohanna ne usake pas akar kaha, he guro, ham chahate haai, ki jo kuchh ham tujh se mange, vahee too hamare liye kare." 
Mark10:36 us ne un se kaha, tum kya chahate ho ki maain tumhare liye karoon?" 
Mark10:37 unhon ne us se kaha, ki hamen yah de, ki teree maahima men ham men se ek tere dahine aur doosara tere banae baaitte." 
Mark10:38 yeeshu n un se kaha, tum naheen janate, ki kya mangate ho? jo kattora maain peene par hoo, kya pee sakate ho? aur jo bapatisma maain lene par hoo, kya le sakate ho?" 
Mark10:39 unhon ne us se kaha, ham se ho sakata haai: yeeshu ne un se kaha: jo kattora maain peene par hoo, tum peeonge aur jo bapatisma maain lene par hoo, use loge." 
Mark10:40 par jin ke liye taaiyar kiya gaya haai, unhen chhod aur kisee ko apane daahine aur apane baaen bittana mera kam naheen." 
Mark10:41 yah sunakar dason yakoob aur yoohanna par risiyane lage. 
Mark10:42 aur yeeshu ne un ko pas bula kar un se kaha, tum janate ho, ki jo anyajaatiyon ke haakim samajhe jate haai, ve un par prabhuta karate haain aur un men jo baden haai, un par adhaikar jatate haain." 
Mark10:43 par tum men aeesa naheen haai, baran jo koi tum men bada hona chahe vah tumhara sevak bane." 
Mark10:44 aur jo koi tum men pradhaan hona chahe, vah sab ka das bane." 
Mark10:45 kyonaki manushy ka putra isaliye naheen aya, ki us kee seva ahal kee jaa, par isaaliye aya, ki ap seva tthal kare, aur bahuton kee chhudautee ke liye apana praan de.." 
Mark10:46 aur ve yareeho men aa, aur jab vah aur usake chele, aur aek badee bheed yareeho se nikalatee thee, to timai ka putra baratimai aek andha bhaikharee sadk ke kinare baaitta tha." 
Mark10:47 vah yah sunakar ki yeeshu nasaree haai, pukar pukar kar kahane laga ki he daud kee santan, yeeshu mujh par daya kara." 
Mark10:48 bahuton ne use dantta ki chup rahe, par vah aur bhee pukarane laga, ki he daud kee santan, mujh par daya kara." 
Mark10:49 tab yeeshu ne ttharakar kaha, use bulao aur logon ne us andho ko bulakar us se kaha, ddhaddhs bandha, ut, vah tujhe bulata haai." 
Mark10:50 vah apana kapada faenkakar shaeegha utta, aur yeeshu ke pas aya." 
Mark10:51 is par yeeshu ne us se kaha too kya chahata haai ki maain tere liye karoon? andho ne us se kaha, he rabbee, yah ki maain dekhne lagoon." 
Mark10:52 yeeshu ne us se kaha chala ja, tere vishvas ne tujhe changa kar diya haai: aur vah turant dekhne laga, aur marga men usake peechhe ho liya.." 
Mark11:1 jab ve yarooshalem ke nikatt jaaitoon pahad par baaitafage aur baaitaniyyah ke pas aa, to us ne apane chelon men se do ko yah kahakar bheja." 
Mark11:2 ki apane samhane ke ganv men jao, aur us men panhuchate hee aek gadahee ka bachcha jis par kabhee koi naheen chaddha, bandhaahua tumhen milega, use khol lao." 
Mark11:3 yaadi tum se koi poochhe, yah kyon karate ho? to kahana, ki prabhu ko is ka prayojan haai aur vah shaeegha use yahan bhej dega." 
Mark11:4 unhon ne jakar us bachche ko bahar dar ke pas chauk men bandha hua paya, aur kholate lage." 
Mark11:5 aur un men se jo vahan khde the, koi koi kahane lage ki yah kya karate ho, gadahee ke bachche ko kyon khelate ho?" 
Mark11:6 unhon ne jaaisa yeeshu ne kaha tha, vaaisa hee un se kah diya tab unhon ne unhen jane diya." 
Mark11:7 aur unhon ne bachche ko yeeshu ke pas lakar us par apane kapade dale aur vah us par baaitt gaya. 
Mark11:8 aur bahuton ne apane kapade marga men bichhaae aur auron ne kheton men se daaliyan katt katt kar faaila deen. 
Mark11:9 aur jo usake age age jate aur peechhe peechhe chale ate the, pukar pukar kar kahate jate the, ki hoshaana dhany haai vah jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai." 
Mark11:10 hamare pita daud ka rajy jo a raha haai dhany haai: akash men hoshaana.. 
Mark11:11 aur vah yarooshalem pahunchakar mandair men aya, aur charon or sab vastuon ko dekhkar barahon ke sath baaitaaniyyah gaya kyonaki sanjh ho gai thee.." 
Mark11:12 doosare din jab ve baaitaniyyah se nikale to us ko bookh lagee. 
Mark11:13 aur vah door se anjeer ka aek hara ped dekhkar nikatt gaya, ki kya jane us men kuchh paae: par paton ko chhod kuchh n paya kyonki fal ka samay n tha." 
Mark11:14 is par us ne us se kaha ab se koi tera fal kabhee n khaae. aur usake chele sun rahe the. 
Mark11:15 fir ve yarooshalem men aa, aur vah mandair men gaya aur vahan jo lena-den kar rahe the unhen bahar nikalane laga, aur sarrafaon ke peeddhe aur kabootar ke bechanevalon kee chauakiyan ulatt deen." 
Mark11:16 aur maandair men se hokar kisee ko baratan lekar ane jane n diya. 
Mark11:17 aur upadesh karake un se kaha, kya yah naheen likha haai, ki mera ghar sab jaatiyon ke liye praarthna ka ghar kahalaaega? par tum ne ise dakuon kee khoh bana dee haai." 
Mark11:18 yah sunakar mahayajak aur shaasree usake nash karane ka avasar ddoonddhne lage kyonki us se drate the, isaaliye ki sab log usake upadesh se chaakit hote the.." 
Mark11:19 aur praati din sanjh hote hee vah nagar se bahar jaya karata tha. 
Mark11:20 fir bhor ko jab ve udhar se jate the to unhon ne us anjeer ke ped ko jad tak sookha hua dekha. 
Mark11:21 pataras ko vah bat smaran ai, aur us ne us se kaha, he rabbee, dek, yah anjeer ka ped jise too ne srap diya tha sookh gaya haai." 
Mark11:22 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya, ki parameshvar par vishvas rakho." 
Mark11:23 maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki jo koi is pahad se kahe ki too ukhd ja, aur samudra men ja pad, aur apane man men sandeh n kare, varan prateeti kare, ki jo kahata hoon vah ho jaaega, to usake liye vahee hoga." 
Mark11:24 isaliye maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jo kuchh tum praarthna karake mangon to prateeti kar lo ki tumhen mil gaya, aur tumhare liye ho jaaega." 
Mark11:25 aur jab kabhee tum khde huae praarthna karate ho, to yadi tumhare man men kisee kee aur se kuchh virodha, ho to kshama karo: isaaliye ki tumhara svargeey pita bhee tumhare aparadha kshama kare.." 
Mark11:26 aur yaadi tum kshama n karo to tumhara pita bhee jo svarga men haai, tumhara aparadha kshama n karega." 
Mark11:27 ve fir yarooshalem men aa, aur jab vah mandair men tthal raha tha to mahayajak aur shaasree aur puraniae usake pas akar poochhne lage." 
Mark11:28 ki too ye kam kis adhaikar se karata haai? aur yah adhaikar tujhe kis ne diya haai ki too ye kam kare? 
Mark11:29 yeeshu ne us se kaha: maain bhee tum se aek bat poochhta hoon mujhe uttr do: to maain tumhen bataunga ki ye kam kis adhaikar se karata hoon. 
Mark11:30 yoohanna ka bapaatisma kya svarga kee or se tha va manushyon kee or se tha? mujhe uttr do. 
Mark11:31 tab ve apas men vivad karane lage ki yadi ham kahe, svarga kee or se, to vah kahega fir tum ne us kee prateeati kyon naheen kee?" 
Mark11:32 aur yaadi ham kahe, manushyon kee or se to logon ka dr haai, kyonaki sab janate haain ki yoohanna sachamuch bhavishyadvkta haai." 
Mark11:33 so unhon ne yeeshu ko uttr diya, ki ham naheen janate: yeeshu ne un se kaha, maain bhee tum ko naheen batata, ki ye kam kis adhaikar se karata hoon.." 
Mark12:1 fir vah drashttant men un se baten karane laga: ki kisee manushy ne dakh kee baree lagai, aur usake charon or bada bandha, aur ras ka kund khoda, aur gummatt banaya aur kisanon ko usaka tteeka dekar paradesh chala gaya." 
Mark12:2 fir fal ke mausam men us ne kisanon ke pas aek das ko bheja ki kisan se dakh kee baree ke falon ka bhag le. 
Mark12:3 par unhon ne use pakadkar peetta aur choochhe hath lautta diya. 
Mark12:4 fir us ne aek aur das ko un ke pas bheja aur unhon ne usaka sir faod dala aur usaka apaman kiya. 
Mark12:5 fir us ne aek aur ko bheja, aur unhon ne use mar dala: tab us ne aur bahuton ko bheja: un men se unhon ne kitano ko peetta, aur kitanon ko mar dala." 
Mark12:6 ab aek hee rah gaya tha, jo usaka piry putra tha ant men us ne use bhee un ke pas yah sochakar bheja ki ve mere putra ka adar karenge." 
Mark12:7 par un kisanon ne apas men kaha yahee to vaaris haai ao, ham use mar dale, tab meeras hamaree ho jaaegee." 
Mark12:8 aur unhon ne use pakadkar mar dala, aur dakh kee baree ke bahar faenk diya." 
Mark12:9 isaliye dakh kee baree ka svamee kya karega? vah akar un kisanon ko nash karega, aur dakh kee baree auron ko de dega." 
Mark12:10 kya tum ne pavitra shaasr men yah vachan naheen paddha, ki jis patthr ko rajaamisryon ne nikamma ttharaya tha, vahee kone ka sira ho gaya?" 
Mark12:11 yah prabhu kee or se hua, aur hamaree duashtti me adabhut haai." 
Mark12:12 tab unhon ne use pakadna chaha kyonki samajh gaae the, ki us ne hamare virodha men yah drashttant kaha haai: par ve logon se dre aur use chhod kar chale gaae.." 
Mark12:13 tab unhon ne use baton men fansane ke liye kai aek fareeasiyon aur herodiyon ko usake pas bheja. 
Mark12:14 aur unhon ne akar us se kaha he guro, ham janate haai, ki too sachcha haai, aur kisee kee parava naheen karata kyonki too manushyon ka munh dekh kar baten naheen karata, parantu parameshvar ka marga sachchaai se batata haai." 
Mark12:15 to kya kaaisa ko kar dena uchit haai, ki naheen? ham de, ya n den? us ne un ka kapatt janakar un se kaha mujhe kyon parakhte ho? aek deenar mere pas lao, ki maain dekoon." 
Mark12:16 ve le aa, aur us ne un se kaha yah moorti aur nam kis ka haai? unhon ne kaha, kaaisar ka." 
Mark12:17 yeeshu ne un se kaha jo kaaisar ka haai vah kaaisar ko, aur jo parameshvar ka haai parameshvar ko do: tab ve us par bahut achambha karane lage.." 
Mark12:18 fir sadookiyon ne bhee, jo kahate haain ki mare huon ka jee uttna haai hee nahee, usake pas akar use poochha." 
Mark12:19 ki he guro, moosa ne hamare liye likha haai, ki yadi kisee ka bhai bina santan mar jaa, aur us kee patnee rah jaa, to usaka bhai us kee patnee ko byah le aur apane bhai ke liye vansh utpann kare: sat bhai the." 
Mark12:20 paahila bhai byah karake bina santan mar gaya. 
Mark12:21 tab doosare bhai ne us sree ko byah liya aur bina santan mar gaya aur vaaise hee teesare ne bhee. 
Mark12:22 aur saton se santan n hui: sab ke peechhe vah sree bhee mar gai. 
Mark12:23 so jee uttne par vah un men se kis kee patnee hogee? kyonaki vah saton kee patnee ho chukee thee. 
Mark12:24 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya tum is karan se bool men naheen pade ho, ki tum n to paavitra shaasr hee ko janate ho, aur n parameshvar kee samarth ko." 
Mark12:25 kyonaki jab ve mare huon men se jee uttenge, to un men byah shaadee n hogee par svarga men dooton kee nai honge." 
Mark12:26 mare huon ke jee uttne ke vishay men kya tum ne moosa kee pustak men jhadee kee katha men nahee paddha, ki parameshvar ne us se kaha, maain ibraaheem ka parameshvar, aur isahak ka parameshvar, aur yakoob ka parameshvar hoon?" 
Mark12:27 parameshvar mare huon ka nahee, varan jeevaton ka parameshvar haai: so tum badee bool men pade ho.." 
Mark12:28 aur shaastriayon men se aek ne akar unhen vivad karate suna, aur yah janakar ki us ne unhen achchhee reeti se uttr diya us se poochha, sab se mukhy agyaa kaun see haai?" 
Mark12:29 yeeshu ne use uttr diya, sab agyaaon men se yah mukhy haai he israael suna prabhu hamara parameshvar aek hee prabhu haai." 
Mark12:30 aur too prabhu apane parameshvar se apane sare man se aur apane sare praan se, aur apanee saree buddh ise, aur apanee saree shaktai se praem rakhna." 
Mark12:31 aur doosaree yah haai, ki too apane padosee se apane saman praem rakhna: is se badee aur koi agyaa naheen." 
Mark12:32 shaasree ne us se kaha he guro, bahut tteeka! too ne sach kaha, ki vah aek hee haai, aur use chhod aur koi naheen." 
Mark12:33 aur us se sare man aur saree buaddh iddh aur sare praan aur saree shaktai ke sath praem rakhna aur padosee se apane saman praem rakhna, sare homon aur balidanon se baddhkar haai." 
Mark12:34 jab yeeshu ne dekha ki us ne samajh se uttr diya, to us se kaha too parameshvar ke rajy se door naheen: aur kisee ko fir us se kuchh poochhne ka sahas n hua.." 
Mark12:35 fir yeeshu ne maandair men upadesh karate huae yah kaha, ki shaasree kyonkar kahate haai, ki maseeh daud ka putra haai?" 
Mark12:36 daud ne apahee pavitra atma men hokar kaha haai, ki prabhu ne mere prabhu se kaha mere daahine baait, jab tak ki maain tere baaiariyon ko tere panvon kee peeddhee n kar doon." 
Mark12:37 daud to ap hee use prabhu kahata haai, fir vah usaka putra kahan se tthara? aur bheed ke log us kee anand se sunate the.." 
Mark12:38 us ne apane upadesh men un se kaha, shaastriayon se chaukas raho, jo lambe vasr paahine huae firana." 
Mark12:39 aur bajaron men namaskar, aur aradhanalayon men mukhy mukhy asan aur jevanaron men mukhy mukhy sthan bhee chahate haain." 
Mark12:40 ve vidhavaon ke gharon ko kha jate haai, aur dikhane ke liye badee der tak praarthna karate rahate haai, ye adhaik dand paaenge.." 
Mark12:41 aur vah maandair ke bhndar ke samhane baaittkar dekh raha tha, ki log mandair ke bhndar men kis prakar paaise dalate haai, aur bahut dhanavanon ne bahut kuchh dala." 
Mark12:42 itane men aek kangal vidhava ne akar do damadiya, jo aek adhole ke barabar hotee haai, dalee." 
Mark12:43 tab us ne apane chelon ko pas bulakar un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki mandair ke bhndar men dalane valon men se is kangal vidhava ne sab se baddhkar dala haai." 
Mark12:44 kyonaki sab ne apane dhan kee baddhtee men se dala haai, parantu is ne apanee ghattee men se jo kuchh usaka tha, arthata apanee saree jeevika dal dee haai." 
Mark13:1 jab vah maandair se nikal raha tha, to usake chalon men se aek ne us se kaha he guro, dek, kaaise kaaise patthr aur kaaise kaaise bhvan haain!" 
Mark13:2 yeeshu ne us se kaha kya tum ye bade bade bhvan dekhte ho: yahan patthr par patthr bhee bacha n rahega jo ddhaya n jaaega.. 
Mark13:3 jab vah jaaitoon ke pahad par mandair ke samhane baaitta tha, to pataras aur yakoob aur yoohanna aur andairyas ne alag jakar us se poochha." 
Mark13:4 ki hamen bata ki ye baten kab hongee? aur jab ye sab baten pooree hone par hongee us samay ka kya chinh hoga? 
Mark13:5 yeeshu un se kahane laga chaukas raho ki koi tumhen n bhramaae. 
Mark13:6 bahutere mere nam se akar kahenge, ki maain vahee hoon aur bahuton ko bhramaaenge." 
Mark13:7 aur jab tum ladaiya, aur ladaiyon kee charcha suno to n ghabarana: kyonki in ka hona avashy haai parantu us samay ant n hoga." 
Mark13:8 kyonaki jati par jati, aur rajy par rajy chaddhai karega, aur har kaheen booindol honge, aur akal padenge yah to peedaon ka arambh hee hoga.." 
Mark13:9 parantu tum apane vishay men chaukas raho kyonaki log tumhen mahasabhaon men saunpenge aur tum panchayaton men peette jaoge aur mere karan haakimon aur rajaon ke age khde kiae jaoge, taki un ke liye gavahee ho." 
Mark13:10 par avashy haai ki pahile susamachar sab jatiyon men prachar kiya jaae. 
Mark13:11 jab ve tumhen le jakar saunpenge, to pahile se chinta n karana, ki ham kya kahenge par jo kuchh tumhen usee ghadee bataya jaa, vahee kahana kyonki bolanevale tum naheen ho, parantu pavitra atma haai." 
Mark13:12 aur bhai ko bhai, aur pita ko putra ghaat ke liye saunpenge, aur ladkebale mata-apita ke virodha men uttkar unhen marava dalenge." 
Mark13:13 aur mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge par jo ant tak dhaeeraj dhare rahega, usee ka uddhar hoga.." 
Mark13:14 so jab tum us ujadnevalee gharanait vastu ko jahan uchit naheen vahan khdee dekho, paddhnevala samajh le tab jo yahoodiya men ho, ve pahadon par bhag jaaen." 
Mark13:15 so kotte par ho, vah apane ghar se kuchh lene ko neeche n utare aur n bheetar jaae." 
Mark13:16 aur jo khet men ho, vah apana kapada lene ke liye peechhe n lautte." 
Mark13:17 un dinon men jo garbhvatee aur doodha pilatee hongee, un ke liye hay haya!" 
Mark13:18 aur praarthna kiya karo ki yah jade men n ho. 
Mark13:19 kyonaki ve din aeese klesh ke honge, ki srashtti ke arambh se jo parameshvar ne srajee haai ab tak n to hua, aur n kabhee fir honge." 
Mark13:20 aur yaadi prabhu un dinon ko n ghattata, to koi praanee bhee n bachata parantu un chune huon ke karan jin ko us ne chuna haai, un dinon ko ghattaya." 
Mark13:21 us samay yadi koi tum se kahe dekho, maseeh yahan haai, ya dekho, vahan haai, to prateeti n karana." 
Mark13:22 kyonaki jootte maseeh aur jootte bhavishyadvkta utt khde honge, aur chinh aur adabhut kam dikhaaenge ki yadi ho sake to chune huon ko bhee bhrama den." 
Mark13:23 par tum chaukas raho: dekho, maain ne tumhen sab baten pahile hee se kah dee haain." 
Mark13:24 un dinon me, us klesh ke bad sooraj andhora ho jaega, aur chand prakash n dega." 
Mark13:25 aur akash se taragan girane lagenge: aur akash kee shaaktaiyan hilai jaaengeee. 
Mark13:26 tab log manushy ke putra ko badee samarth aur mahima ke sath badalon men ate dekhnege. 
Mark13:27 us samay vah apane dooton ko bhejakar, prathvee ke is chhor se akash kee us chhor tak charon disha se apane chune huae logon ko ikatthe karega." 
Mark13:28 anjeer ke ped se yah drashttant seekho: jab us kee dalee komal ho jatee aur patte nikalane lagate haain to tum jan lete ho, ki graeeshmakal nikatt haai." 
Mark13:29 isee reeti se jab tum in baton ko hote dekho, to jan lo, ki vah nikatt haai varan dar hee par haai." 
Mark13:30 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jab tak ye sab baten n ho lengee, tab tak yah log jate n rahenge." 
Mark13:31 akash aur prathvee al jaaenge, parantu meree baten kabhee n ttlengee." 
Mark13:32 us din ya us ghadee ke vishay men koi naheen janata, n svarga ke doot aur n putra parantu keval pita." 
Mark13:33 dekho, jagate aur praarthna karate raho kyonki tum naheen janate ki vah samay kab aaega." 
Mark13:34 yah us manushy kee see dasha haai, jo paradesh jate samay apana ghar chhod jaa, aur apane dason ko adhaikar de: aur har aek ko usaka kam jata de, aur darapal ko jagate rahane kee agyaa de." 
Mark13:35 isaliye jagate raho kyonki tum naheen janate ki ghar ka svamee kab aaega, sanjh ko ya adhaee rat ko, ya murga ke bang dene ke samay ya bhor ko." 
Mark13:36 aeesa n ho ki vah achanak akar tumhen sote paae. 
Mark13:37 aur jo maain tum se kahata hoo, vahee sab se kahata hoo, jagate raho.." 
Mark14:1 do din ke bad fasah aur akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva honevala tha: aur mahayajak aur shaasree is bat kee khoj men the ki use kyonkar chhl se pakad kar mar dalen. 
Mark14:2 parantu kahate the, ki pavrva ke din nahee, kaheen aeesa n ho ki logon me balava mache.." 
Mark14:3 jab vah baaitaaniyyah men shamaun koddhee ke ghar bhojan karane baaitta hua tha jab aek sree sangamaramar ke patra men jattamansee ka bahumooly shuuddh itra lekar ai aur patra tod kar itra ko usake sir par undela. 
Mark14:4 parantu koi koi apane man men risiyakar kahane lage, is itra ko kyon satyanash kiya gaya?" 
Mark14:5 kyoki yah itra to tee sau deenar se adhaik mooly men bechakar kangalon ko bantta ja sakata tha, or ve us ko jhdikane lage." 
Mark14:6 yeeshu ne kaha use chhod do use kyon satate ho? us ne to mere sath bhalai kee haai. 
Mark14:7 kangal tumhare sath sada rahate haain: aur tum jab chaho tab un se bhlai kar sakate ho par maain tumhare sath sada n rahoonga. 
Mark14:8 jo kuchh vah kar sakee, us ne kiya us ne mere gade jane kee taaiyaree men pahile se meree deh par itra mala haai." 
Mark14:9 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki sare jagat men jahan kaheen susamachar prachar kiya jaaega, vahan usake is kam kee charcha bhee usake smaran men kee jaaegee.." 
Mark14:10 tab yahooda isakariyotee jo barah men se aek tha, mahayajakon ke pas gaya, ki use un ke hath pakadva de." 
Mark14:11 ve yah sunakar anandait hua, aur us ko roopaye dena sveekar kiya, aur yah avasar ddoonddhne laga ki use kisee prakar pakadva de.." 
Mark14:12 akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva ke paahile din, jis men se fasah ka baalidan karate the, usake chelon ne us se poochha, too kahan chahata haai, ki ham jakar tere liye fasah khane kee taaiyaree kare?" 
Mark14:13 us ne apane chelon men se do ko yah kahakar bheja, ki nagar men jao, aur ek manushy jal ka ghada uttaa, huae tumhen milega, usake peechhe ho lena." 
Mark14:14 aur vah jis ghar men jaae us ghar ke svamee se kahana guroo kahata haai, ki meree pahunashaala jis men maain apane chelon ke sath fasah khaun kahan haai?" 
Mark14:15 vah tumhen aek sajee sajai, aur taaiyar kee hui badee attaree dikha dega, vahan hamare liye taaiyaree karo." 
Mark14:16 so chele nikalakar nagar men aye aur jaaisa us ne un se kaha tha, vaaisa kee paya, aur fasah taaiyar kiya.." 
Mark14:17 jab sanjh hui, to vah barahon ke sath aya." 
Mark14:18 aur jab ve baaitte bhojan kar rahe the, to yeeshu ne kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki tum men se aek, jo mere sath bhojan kar raha haai, mujhe pakadvaaega." 
Mark14:19 un par udasee chha gai aur ve ek ek karake us se kahane lage kya vah maain hoon? 
Mark14:20 us ne un se kaha, vah barahon men se ek haai, jo mere sath thalee men hath dalata haai." 
Mark14:21 kyonaki manushy ka putra to, jaaisa usake vishay men likha haai, jata hee haai parantu us manushy par hay jis ke dara manushy ka putra pakadvaya jata haai! yadi us manushy ka janm hee n hotakh to usake liye bhla hota.." 
Mark14:22 aur jab ve kha hee rahe the to us ne rottee lee, aur ashaeesh mangakar todee, aur unahen dee, aur kaha, lo, yah meree deh haai." 
Mark14:23 fir us ne kattora lekar dhanyavad kiya, aur unhen diya aur un sab ne us men se peeya." 
Mark14:24 aur us ne un se kaha, yah vacha ka mera vah lohoo haai, jo bahuton ke liye bahaya jata haai." 
Mark14:25 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki dakh ka ras us din tak fir kabhee n peeunga, jab tak parameshvar ke rajy men naya n peeun.." 
Mark14:26 fir ve bhjan gakar bahar jaaitoon ke pahad par gaae.. 
Mark14:27 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha tum sab ttokar khaoge, kyonki likha haai, ki maain rakhvale ko maroonga, aur bhed tittr bittr ho jaaengee." 
Mark14:28 parantu maain apane jee uttne ke bad tum se paahile galeel ko jaunga. 
Mark14:29 pataras ne us se kaha yadi aek ttokar khaaen to khana, par maain ttokar naheen khaunga." 
Mark14:30 yeeshu ne us se kaha maain tujh se sach kahata hoo, ki aj hee isee rat ko murge ke do bar bang dene se pahile, too teen bar mujh se mukar jaaega." 
Mark14:31 par us ne aur bhee jor dekar kaha, yaadi mujhe tere sath marana bhee pade taubhee tera inkar kabhee n karoonga: isee prakar aur sab ne bhee kaha.." 
Mark14:32 fir ve gatasamane nam aek jagah men aa, aur us ne apane chelon se kaha, yahan baaitte raho, jab tak maain praarthna karoon." 
Mark14:33 aur vah pataras aur yakoob aur yoohanna ko apane sath le gaya: aur bahut hee adhaeer, aur vyakul hone laga." 
Mark14:34 aur un se kaha mera man bahut udas haai, yahan tak ki maain marane par hoon: tum yahan ttharo, aur jagate raho." 
Mark14:35 aur vah thoda age baddha, aur boomi par girakar praarthna karane laga, ki yadi ho sake to yah ghadee mujh par se ttl jaae." 
Mark14:36 aur kaha, he abba, he pita, tujh se sab kuchh ho sakata haai is kattore ko mere pas se hatta le: taubhee jaaisa maain chahata hoon vaaisa nahee, par jo too chahata haai vahee ho." 
Mark14:37 fir vah aya, aur unhen sote pakar pataras se kaha he shamaun too so raha haai? kya too aek ghadee bhee n jag saka?" 
Mark14:38 jagate aur praarthna karate raho ki tum pareeksha men n pado: atma to taaiyar haai, par shareer durbal haai." 
Mark14:39 aur vah fir chala gaya, aur vahee bat kahakar praarthna kee." 
Mark14:40 aur fir akar unhen sote paya, kyonaki un kee ankhe neend se bhree theen aur naheen janate the ki use kya uttr den." 
Mark14:41 fir teesaree bar akar un se kaha ab sote raho aur vishraam karo, bas, ghadee a pahunchee dekho manushy ka putra papiyon ke hath pakadvaya jata haai." 
Mark14:42 utto, chalen: dekho, mera pakadvanevala nikatt a pahuncha haai.." 
Mark14:43 vah yah kah hee raha tha, ki yahooda jo barahon men se tha, apane sath mahayajakon aur shaastriayon aur puraaniyon kee or se aek badee bheed talavaren aur laattyaian liae huae turant a pahunchee." 
Mark14:44 aur usake pakadnevale ne unhen yah pata diya tha, ki jis ko maain choomoon vahee haai, use pakadkar yatan se le jana." 
Mark14:45 aur vah aya, aur turant usake pas jakar kaha he rabbee aur us ko bahut chooma." 
Mark14:46 tab unhon ne us par hath dalakar use pakad liya. 
Mark14:47 un men se jo pas khde the, ek ne talavar kheench kar mahayajak ke das par chalai, aur usaka kan uda diya." 
Mark14:48 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya tum dakoo janakar mere pakadne ke liye talavaren aur lattyaian lekar nikale ho? 
Mark14:49 maain to har din mandair men tumhare sath rahakar upadesh diya karata tha, aur tab tum ne mujhe n pakada: parantu yah isaliye hua haai ki pavitra shaasr kee baten pooree hon." 
Mark14:50 is par sab chele use chhodkar bhag gaae.. 
Mark14:51 aur aek javan apanee nangee deh par chadar oddhe huae usake peede ho liya aur logon ne use pakada. 
Mark14:52 par vah chadar chhodkar nanga bhag gaya.. 
Mark14:53 fir ve yeeshu ko mahayajak ke pas le gaae aur sab mahayajak aur puraaniae aur shaasree usake yahan ikatthe ho gaae. 
Mark14:54 pataras door hee door se usake peechhe peechhe mahayajak ke angan ke bheetar tak gaya, aur pyadon ke sath baaitt kar ag tapane laga." 
Mark14:55 mahayajak aur saree mahasabha yeeshu ke mar dalane ke liye usake virodha men gavahee kee khoj men the, par n milee." 
Mark14:56 kyonaki bahutere usake virodha men joottee gavahee de rahe the, par un kee gavahee aek see n thee." 
Mark14:57 tab kitanon ne uttkar us par yah joottee gavahee dee. 
Mark14:58 ki ham ne ise yah kahate suna haai ki maain is hath ke banaae huae mandair ko ddha doonga, aur teen din men doosara banaunga, jo hath se n bana ho." 
Mark14:59 is par bhee un kee gavahee aek see n nikalee. 
Mark14:60 tab mahayajak ne beech men khde hokar yeeshu se poochha ki too koi uttr naheen deta? ye log tere virodha men kya gavahee dete haain? 
Mark14:61 parantu vah maun sadho raha, aur kuchh uttr n diya: mahayajak ne us se fir poochha, kya too us param dhany ka putra maseeh haai?" 
Mark14:62 yeeshu ne kaha han maain hoon: aur tum manushy ke putra ko sarvashaaktaiman kee daahinee aur baaitte, aur akash ke badalon ke sath ate dekhoge." 
Mark14:63 tab mahayajak ne apane vasr faadkar kaha ab hamen gavahon ka kya prayojan haai? 
Mark14:64 tum ne yah ninda sunee: tumharee kya ray haai un sab ne kaha, vah vadha ke yogy haai." 
Mark14:65 tab koi to us par tookane, aur koi usaka munh ddhanpane aur use ghoose marane, aur us se kahane lage, ki bhvishyadanee kara: aur pyadon ne use lekar thppad mare.." 
Mark14:66 jab pataras neeche angan men tha, to mahayajak kee laundyaien men se aek vahan ai." 
Mark14:67 aur pataras ko ag tapate dekhkar us par ttkattkee lagakar dekha aur kahane lagee, too bhee to us nasaree yeeshu ke sath tha." 
Mark14:68 vah mukar gaya, aur kaha, ki maain to naheen janata aushra naheen samajhta ki too kya kah rahee haai: fir vah bahar devaddhee men gaya aur murge ne bang dee." 
Mark14:69 vah laundee use dekhkar un se jo pas khde the, fir kahane lagee, ki un men se aek haai." 
Mark14:70 parantu vah fir mukar gaya aur thodee der bad unhon ne jo pas khde the fir pataras se kaha nishchay too un men se aek haai kyonaki too galeelee bhee haai. 
Mark14:71 tab vah dhaikkar den aur shapath khane laga, ki maain us manushy ko, jis kee tum charcha karate ho, nahaneen janata." 
Mark14:72 tab turant doosaree bar murga ne bang dee: pataras ko yah bat jo yeeshu ne us se kahee thee smaran ai, ki murga ke do bar bang dene se paahile too teen bar mera inkar karega: vah is bat ko sochakar rone laga.." 
Mark15:1 aur bhor hote hee turant mahayako, puraaniyo, aur shaaastriayon ne varan saree mahasabha ne salah karake yeeshu ko bandhavaya, aur use le jakar peelatus ke hath saunp diya." 
Mark15:2 aur peelatus ne us se poochha, kya too yahoodiyon ka raja haai? us ne us ko uttr diya ki too ap hee kah raha haai." 
Mark15:3 aur mahayajak us par bahut baton ka dosh laga rahe the. 
Mark15:4 peelatus ne us se fir poochha, kya too kuchh uttr naheen deta, dekh ye tujh par kitanee baton ka dosh lagate haain?" 
Mark15:5 yeeshu ne fir kuchh uttr naheen diya yahan tak ki peelatus ko bada ashcharya hua.. 
Mark15:6 aur vah us pavrva men kisee aek bandhauae ko jise ve chahate the, un ke liye chhod diya karata tha." 
Mark15:7 aur baraabba nam aek manushy un balavaiyon ke sath bandhaua tha, jinhon ne balave men hatya kee thee." 
Mark15:8 aur bheed upar jakar us se binatee karane lagee, ki jaaisa too hamare liye karata aya haai vaaisa hee kara." 
Mark15:9 peelatus ne un ko yah uttr diya, kya tum chahate ho, ki maain tumhare liye yahoodiyon ke raja ko chhod doon?" 
Mark15:10 kyonaki vah janata tha, ki mahayajakon ne use dah se pakadvaya tha." 
Mark15:11 parantu mahayajakon ne logon ko ubhara, ki vah baraabba hee ko un ke liye chhod de." 
Mark15:12 yah soon peelatus ne un se fir poochha to jise tum yahoodiyon ka raja kahate ho, us ko maain kya karoon? ve fir chillaa, ki use kroos par chaddha de." 
Mark15:13 peelatus ne un se kaha kyo, is ne kya burai kee haai?" 
Mark15:14 parantu ve aur bhee chillaa, ki use kroos par chaddha de." 
Mark15:15 tak peelatus ne bheed ko prasann karane kee ichchha se, baraabba ko un ke liye chhod diya, aur yeeshu ko kode lagavakar saunp diya, ki kroos par chaddhaya jaae." 
Mark15:16 aur sipahee use kile ke bheetar angat men le gaae jo praeettoriyun kahalata haai, aur saree palattn ko bula laae." 
Mark15:17 aur unhon ne use baainjanee vasr paahinaya aur kantton ka mukutt goonthkar usake sir par rakha. 
Mark15:18 aur yah kahakar use namaskar karane lage, ki he yahoodiyon ke raja, namaskara!" 
Mark15:19 aur ve usake sir par sarakande marate, aur us par tookate, aur ghauttne ttekakar use pranam karate rahe." 
Mark15:20 aur jab ve usaka ttttha kar chuke, to us par baainjanee vasr utarakar usee ke kapade paahinaae aur tab use kroos par chaddhane ke liye bahar le gaae." 
Mark15:21 aur sikandar aur roofaus ka pita, shamaun nam aek kurenee manushy, jo ganv se a raha tha udhar se nikala unhon ne use begar men pakada, ki usaka kroos utta le chale." 
Mark15:22 aur ve use gulaguta nam jagah par jis ka arth khopadee kee jagah haai laae. 
Mark15:23 aur use murra mila hua dakhras dene lage, parantu us ne naheen liya." 
Mark15:24 tab unhon ne us ko kroos par chaddhaya, aur usake kapadon par chitthiyan dalakar, ki kis ko kya mile, unhen bantt liya." 
Mark15:25 aur pahar din chaddha tha, jab unhon ne us ko kroos par chaddhaya." 
Mark15:26 aur usaka doshapatra likhkar usake upar laga diya gaya ki yahoodiyon ka raja. 
Mark15:27 aur unhon ne usake sath do dako, aek us kee daahinee aur aek us kee bain or kroos par chaddhaae." 
Mark15:28 tab dharmashaasr ka vah vachan ki vah aparadhaiyon ke sang gina gaya poora hua. 
Mark15:29 aur marga men janevale sir hila hilakar aur yah kahakar us kee ninda karate the, ki vaha! maandair ke ddhanevale, aur teen din men bananevale! kroos par se utar kar apane ap ko bacha le." 
Mark15:30 isee reeti se mahayajak bhee, shaastriayon samet," 
Mark15:31 apas men tttthe se kahate the ki is ne auron ko bachaya, aur apane ko naheen bacha sakata." 
Mark15:32 israael ka raja maseeh ab kroos par se utar aae ki ham dekhkar vishvas karen: aur jo usake sath krooson par chaddhaae gaae the, ve bhee us kee ninda karate the.." 
Mark15:33 aur dopahar hone par, sare desh men aandhiayara chha gaya aur teesare pahar tak raha." 
Mark15:34 teesare pahar yeeshu ne bade shabd se pukar kar kaha, iloi, iloi, lama shabaktanee? jis ka arth haai he mere parameshvar, he mere parameshvar, too ne mujhe kyon chhod diya?" 
Mark15:35 jo pas khde the, un men se kitanon ne yah sunakar kaha: dekho yah aeliyyah ko pukarata haai." 
Mark15:36 aur aek ne daudkar ispanj ko sirake se duboya, aur sarakande par rakhkar use chusaya aur kaha, tthar jao, dekhe, ki aeliyyah use utarane ki liye ata haai ki naheen." 
Mark15:37 tab yeeshu ne bade shabd se chillakar praan chhod diye. 
Mark15:38 aur maandair ka parda upar se neeche tak fattkar do ttukade ho gaya. 
Mark15:39 jo soobedar usake samhane khda tha, jab use yoon chillakar praan chhodte huae dekha, to us ne kaha, sachamuch yah manushy, parameshvar ka putra tha." 
Mark15:40 kai striayan bhee door se dekh rahee theen: un men maariyam magadaleenee aur chhotte yakoob kee aur yoses kee mata mariyam aur shalomee theen. 
Mark15:41 jab vah galeel men t, to ye usake peechhe ho letee theen aur us kee sevatthal kiya karatee theen aur aur bhee bahut see striayan thee, jo usake sath yarooshalem men ai theen.." 
Mark15:42 jab sandhya ho gai, to isaliye ki taaiyaree ka din tha, jo sabt ke aek din pahile hota haai." 
Mark15:43 aarimitiya ka rahenavala yoosuufa aya, jo praatishttit mantraee aur ap bhee parameshvar ke rajy kee batt johata tha vah hiyav karake peelatus ke pas gaya aur yeeshu kee loth mangee." 
Mark15:44 peelatus ne ashcharya kiya, ki vah itana shaeegha mar gaya aur soobedar ko bulakar poochha, ki kya us ko mare huae der hui?" 
Mark15:45 so jab soobedar ke dara hal jan liya, to loth yoosufa ko dila dee." 
Mark15:46 tab us ne aek patalee chadar mol lee, aur loth ko utarakar chadar men lapetta, aur aek kabra me jo chattan men khodee gai thee rakha, aur kabra ke dar par aek patthr luddhkar diya." 
Mark15:47 aur maariyam magadaleenee aur yoses kee mata maariyam dekh rahee thee, ki vah kahan rakha gaya haai.." 
Mark16:1 jab sabt ka din beet gaya, to maariyam magadaleenee aur yakoob kee mata mariyam aur shalomee ne sugandhiat vastuaen mol lee, ki akar us par malen." 
Mark16:2 aur saptah ke paahile din badee bhor, jab sooraj nikala hee tha, ve kabra par ain." 
Mark16:3 aur apas men kahatee thee, ki hamare liye kabra ke dar par se patthr kaun luddhaaega?" 
Mark16:4 jab unhon ne ankh uttai, to dekha ki patthr luddhka hua haai! kyonaki vah bahut hee bada tha." 
Mark16:5 aur kabra ke bheetar jakar, unhon ne aek javan ko shvet vasr pahine huae dahinee or baaitte dekha, aur bahut chaakit hui." 
Mark16:6 us ne un se kaha, chakit mat ho, tum yeeshu nasaree ko, jo kroos par chaddhaya gaya tha, ddoonddhtee ho: vah jee utta haai yahan naheen haai dekho, yahee vah sthan haai, jahan unhon ne use rakha tha." 
Mark16:7 parantu tum jao, aur usake chelon aur pataras se kaho, ki vah tum se pahile galeel ko jaaega jaaisa us ne tum se kaha tha, tum vahee use dekhoge." 
Mark16:8 aur ve nikalakar kabra se bhag gain kyonki kapakapee aur ghabarahatt un par chha gai theen aur unhon ne kisee se kuchh n kaha, kyonaki dratee theen.." 
Mark16:9 saptah ke paahile din bhor hote hee vah jee utt kar paahile paahil mariyam magadaleenee ko jis men se us ne sat dushttatmaaen nikalee thee, dikhai diya." 
Mark16:10 us ne jakar usake sathaiyon ko jo shaek men oobe huae the aur ro rahe the, samachar diya." 
Mark16:11 aur unhon ne yah sunakar kee vah jeeavit haai, aur us ne use dekha haai prateeti n kee.." 
Mark16:12 is ke bad vah doosare roop men un men se do ko jab ve ganv kee or ja rahe the, dikhai diya." 
Mark16:13 unhon ne bhee jakar auron ko samachar diya, parantu unhon ne un kee bhee prateeati n kee.." 
Mark16:14 peechhe vah un gyarahon ko bhee, jab ve bhojan karane baaitte the dikhai diya, aur un ke aavishvas aur man kee kattorata par ulahana diya, kyonaki jinhon ne usake jee uttne ke bad use dekha tha, inhon ne un kee prateeati n kee thee." 
Mark16:15 aur us ne un se kaha, tum sare jagat men jakar saree srashtti ke logon ko susamachar prachar karo." 
Mark16:16 jo vishvas kare aur bapatisma le usee ka uddhar hoga, parantu jo vishvas ne karega vah doshaee ttharaya jaaega." 
Mark16:17 aur vishvas karanevalon men ye chinh honge ki ve mere nam se dushttatmaon ko nikalenge. 
Mark16:18 nai nai bhasha bolenge, sanpon ko utta lenge, aur yadi ve nashak vastu bhee pee janae taubhee un kee kuchh haani n hogee, ve beemaron par hath rakhenge, aur ve change ho jaaenge." 
Mark16:19 nidan prabhu yeeshu un se baten karane ke bad svarga par utta liya gaya, aur parameshvar kee dahinee or baaitt gaya." 
Mark16:20 aur unhon ne nikalakar har jagah prachar kiya, aur prabhu un ke sath kam karata raha, aur un chinhon ke dara jo sath sath hote the vachan ko, draddh karata raha. ameena.." 
Luke1:1 isaliye ki bahuton ne un baton ko jo hamare beech men hotee haain iatihas likhne men hath lagaya haai. 
Luke1:2 jaaisa ki unhon ne jo pahile hee se in baton ke dekhnevale aur vachan ke sevak the ham tak pahunchaya. 
Luke1:3 isaliye he shraeeman thaiyuafilus mujhe bhee yah uchit maloom hua ki un sab baton ka sampoorn hal arambh se tteek tteek janch karake unhen tere liye kramanusar likoon. 
Luke1:4 ki too yah jan le, ki ye baten jinakee too ne shaiksha pai haai, kaaisee attl haain.." 
Luke1:5 yahoodiyon ke raja herodes ke samay aabiyyah ke dal men jakarayah nam ka aek yajak tha, aur us kee patnee haroon ke vansh kee thee, jis ka nam ileeashaiba tha." 
Luke1:6 aur ve donon parameshvar ke samhane dharmee the: aur prabhu kee saree agyaaon aur vidhaiyon par nirdosh chalanevale the. un ke koi santan n thee," 
Luke1:7 kyonaki ileeashaiba banjh thee, aur ve donon booddhe the.." 
Luke1:8 jab vah apane dalakee paree par parameshvar ke samhane yajak ka kam karata tha. 
Luke1:9 to yajakon kee reeati ke anusar usake nam par chitthee nikalee, ki prabhu ke maandair men jakar dhoop jalaae." 
Luke1:10 aur dhoop jalane ke samay logon kee saree mandlee bahar praarthna kar rahee thee. 
Luke1:11 ki prabhu ka aek svargadoot dhoop kee vedee kee dahinee or khda hua us ko dikhai diya. 
Luke1:12 aur jakarayah dekhkar ghabaraya aur us par bada bhy chha gaya. 
Luke1:13 parantu svargadoot ne us se kaha, he jakarayah, bhyabheet n ho kyonki teree praarthna sun lee gai haai aur teree patnee ileeashaiba se tere liye aek putra utpann hoga, aur too usaka nam yoohanna rakhna." 
Luke1:14 aur tujhe anand aur harsha hoga: aur bahut log usake janm ke karan anandait honge. 
Luke1:15 kyonaki vah prabhu ke samhane mahan hoga aur dakhras aur madira kabhee n piaega aur apanee mata ke garbh hee se pavitra atma se paaripoorn ho jaaega. 
Luke1:16 aur israaeliyon men se bahuteron ko un ke prabhu parameshvar kee or faerega. 
Luke1:17 vah aeliyyah kee atma aur samarth men ho kar usake age age chalega, ki pitaron ka man ladkebalon kee or faer de aur agyaa n mananevalon ko dhaarmiyon kee samajh par laae aur prabhu ke liye aek yogy praja taaiyar kare." 
Luke1:18 jakarayah ne svargadoot se poochha yah maain kaaise janoon? kyonki maain to booddha hoon aur meree patnee bhee booddhee ho gai haai. 
Luke1:19 svargadoot ne us ko uttr diya, ki maain jibraail hoo, jo parameshvar ke samhane khda rahata hoon aur maain tujh se baten karane aur tujhe yah susamachar sunane ko bheja gaya hoon." 
Luke1:20 aur dekh jis din tak ye baten pooree n ho le, us din tak too maun rahega, aur bol n sakega, isaliye ki too ne meree baton kee jo apane samay par pooree hongee, prateeti n kee." 
Luke1:21 aur log jakarayah kee batt dekhte rahe aur achambha karane lage ki use maandair men aeesee der kyon lagee? 
Luke1:22 jab vah bahar aya, to un se bol n saka: so ve jan gaa, ki us ne mandair men koi darshan paya haai aur v un se sanket karata raha, aur goonga rah gaya." 
Luke1:23 jab us kee seva ke din poore hua, to vah apane ghar chala gaya.." 
Luke1:24 in dinon ke bad us kee patnee ileeshaiba garbhvatee hui aur panch maheene tak apane ap ko yah kah ke chhpaiaae rakha. 
Luke1:25 ki manushyon men mera apaman door karane ke liye prabhu ne in dinon men krapadraashtti karake mere liye aeesa kiya haai.. 
Luke1:26 chhttven maheene men parameshvar kee or se jibraail svargadoot galeel ke nasarat nagar men aek kunvaree ke pas bheja gaya. 
Luke1:27 jis kee manganee yoosufa nam daud ke gharane ke aek puroosh se hui thee: us kunvaree ka nam mariyam tha. 
Luke1:28 aur svargadoot ne usake pas bheetar akar kaha anand aur jay teree ho, jis par ishvar ka anugrah hua haai, prabhu tere sath haai." 
Luke1:29 vah us vachan se bahut ghabara gai, aur sochane lagee, ki yah kis prakar ka aabhaivadan haai?" 
Luke1:30 svargadoot ne us se kaha, he mariyama bhyabheet n ho, kyonaki parameshvar ka anugrah tujh par hua haai." 
Luke1:31 aur dek, too garbhvatee hogee, aur tere aek putra utpann hoga too usaka nam yeeshu rakhna." 
Luke1:32 vah mahan hoga aur paramapradhaan ka putra kahalaaega aur prabhu parameshvar usake pita daud ka sinhasan us ko dega. 
Luke1:33 aur vah yakoob ke gharane par sada rajy karega aur usake rajy ka ant n hoga. 
Luke1:34 maariyam ne svargadoot se kaha, yah kyonkar hoga? maain to puroosh ko janatee hee naheen." 
Luke1:35 svargadoot ne us ko uttr diya ki pavitra atma tujh par utarega, aur paramapradhaan kee samarth tujh par chhaya karegee isaaliye vah paavitra jo utpann honevala haai, parameshvar ka putra kahalaaega." 
Luke1:36 aur dek, aur teree kuttumbainee ileeshaiba ke bhee buddhape men putra honevala haai, yah usaka, jo banjh kahalatee thee chhttvan maheena haai." 
Luke1:37 kyonaki jo vachan parameshvar kee or se hota haai vah prabhavaraahit naheen hota. 
Luke1:38 maariyam ne kaha, dek, maain prabhu kee dasee hoo, mujhe tere vachan ke anusar ho: tab svargadoot usake pas se chala gaya.." 
Luke1:39 un dinon men maariyam uttkar shaeegha hee pahadee desh men yahooda ke ek nagar ko gai. 
Luke1:40 aur jakarayah ke ghar men jakar ileeshaiba ko namaskar kiya. 
Luke1:41 jyonhee ileeashaiba ne maariyam ka namaskar suna, tyonhee bachcha usake pett men uchhla, aur ileeashaiba paavitra atma se paaripoorn ho gai." 
Luke1:42 aur us ne bade shabd se pukar kar kaha, too striayon men dhany haai, aur tere pett ka fal dhany haai." 
Luke1:43 aur yah anugrah mujhe kahan se hua, ki mere prabhu kee mata mere pas ai?" 
Luke1:44 aur dekh jyonhee tere namaskar ka shabd mere kanon men pada tyonhee bachcha mere pett men anand se uchhl pada. 
Luke1:45 aur dhany haai, vah jis ne vishvas kiya ki jo baten prabhu kee or se us se kahee gai, ve pooree hongee." 
Luke1:46 tab maariyam ne kaha, mera praan prabhu kee badai karata haai." 
Luke1:47 aur meree atma mere uddhar karanevale parameshvar se anaandait hui. 
Luke1:48 kyonaki us ne apanee dasee kee deenata par draashtti kee haai, isaliye dekho, ab se sab yug yug ke log mujhe dhany kahenge." 
Luke1:49 kyonaki us shaktaiman ne mere liye bade bade kam kiae haai, aur usaka nam pavitra haai." 
Luke1:50 aur us kee daya un par, jo us se drate haai, peeddhee se peeddhee tak banee rahatee haai." 
Luke1:51 us ne apana bhujabal dikhaya, aur jo apane ap ko bada samajhte the, unhen tittra-abittr kiya." 
Luke1:52 us ne balavanon ko sinhasanon se gira diya aur deenon ko uncha kiya. 
Luke1:53 us ne bookhon ko achchhee vastuon se trapt kiya, aur dhanavanon ko choochhe hath nikal diya." 
Luke1:54 us ne apane sevak israel ko sambhal liya. 
Luke1:55 ki apanee us daya ko smaran kare, jo ibraaheem aur usake vansh par sada rahegee, jaaisa us ne hamare bapa-dadon se kaha tha." 
Luke1:56 maariyam lagabhg teen maheene usake sath rahakar apane ghar lott gai.. 
Luke1:57 tab ileeshaiba ke janane ka samay poora hua, aur v putra janee." 
Luke1:58 usake padosiyon aur kuttumbaiyon ne yah sun kar, ki prabhu ne us par badee daya kee haai, usake sath anandait hue." 
Luke1:59 aur aeesa hua ki attven din ve balak ka khtana karane aae aur usaka nam usake pita ke nam par jakarayah rakhne lage. 
Luke1:60 aur us kee mata ne uttr diya ki naheen baran usaka nam yoohanna rakha jaae. 
Luke1:61 aur unhon ne us se kaha, tere kuttumb men kisee ka yah nam naheen." 
Luke1:62 tab unhon ne usake pita se sanket karake poochha. 
Luke1:63 ki too usaka nam kya rakhna chahata haai? aur us ne likhne kee pattee mangakar likh diya, ki usaka nam yoohanna haai: aur sabhon ne achambha kiya." 
Luke1:64 tab usaka munh aur jeebh turant khul gai aur vah bolane aur parameshvar ka dhanyavad karane laga. 
Luke1:65 aur usake as pas ke sab rahanevalon par bhy chha gaya aur un sab baton kee charcha yahoodaya ke sare pahadee desh men faail gai. 
Luke1:66 aur sab sunanevalon ne apane apane man men vichar karake kaha, yah balak kaaisa hoga kyonki prabhu ka hath usake sath tha.." 
Luke1:67 aur usaka pita jakarayah pavitra atma se paaripoorn ho gaya, aur bhvishyadvvanee karane laga." 
Luke1:68 ki prabhu israael ka parameshvar dhany ho, ki us ne apane logon par draashtti kee aur un ka chhuttkara kiya haai." 
Luke1:69 or apane sevak daud ke gharane men hamare liye aek uddhar ka seeng nikala. 
Luke1:70 jaaise us ne apane paavitra bhavishyadvktaon ke dara jo jagat ke adi se hote aae haai, kaha tha." 
Luke1:71 arthata hamare shatrauon se, aur hamare sab baaiariyon ke hath se hamara uddhar kiya haai." 
Luke1:72 ki hamare bapa-dadon par daya karake apanee paavitra vacha ka smaran kare. 
Luke1:73 aur vah shapath jo us ne hamare pita ibraaheem se khai thee. 
Luke1:74 ki vah hamen yah dega, ki ham apane shatrauon ke hath se chhuttkara." 
Luke1:75 usake samhane pavitrata aur dhaaarmikata se jeevan bhr nidr rahakar us kee seva karate rahen. 
Luke1:76 aur too he balak, paramapradhaan ka bhvishyadvkta kahalaaega, kyonki too prabhu ke marga taaiyar karane ke liye usake age age chalega," 
Luke1:77 ki usake logon ko uddhar ka gyaan de, jo un ke papon kee kshama se praapt hota haai." 
Luke1:78 yah hamare parameshvar kee usee badee karoona se hoga jis ke karan upar se ham par bhor ka prakash uday hoga. 
Luke1:79 ki andhakar aur mratyu kee chhaya men baaittnevalon ko jyoti de, aur hamare panvon ko kushal ke marga men seedho chalaae.." 
Luke1:80 aur vah balak baddhta aur atma men balavant hota gaya, aur israael par pragatt hone ke din tak jangalon men raha." 
Luke2:1 un dinon men augoostus kaaisar kee or se agyaa nikalee, ki sare jagat ke logon ke nam likhe jaen." 
Luke2:2 yah paahilee nam likhai us samay hui, jab kvairiniyus sooriya ka haakim tha." 
Luke2:3 aur sab log nam likhvane ke liye apane apane nagar ko gaae. 
Luke2:4 so yoosufa bhee isaliye ki vah daud ke gharane aur vansh ka tha, galeel ke nasarat nagar se yahoodiya men daud ke nagar baaitalaham ko gaya." 
Luke2:5 ki apanee mangetar maariyam ke sath jo garbhvatee thee nam likhvaae. 
Luke2:6 us ke vahan rahate huae usake janane ke din poore hue. 
Luke2:7 aur vah apana paahilautta putra janee aur use kapade men lapettkar charanee men rakha: kyonki un ke liye saray men jagah n thee. 
Luke2:8 aur us desh men kitane gaderiye the, jo rat ko maaidan men rahakar apane jhund ka pahara dete the." 
Luke2:9 aur prabhu ka aek doot un ke pas a khda hua aur prabhu ka tej un ke charon or chamaka, aur ve bahut dr gaae."
