Luke2:10 tab svargadoot ne un se kaha, mat dro kyonaki dekho maain tumhen bade anand ka susamachar sunata hoon jo sab logon ke liye hoga." 
Luke2:11 ki aj daud ke nagar men tumhare liye aek uddharakarta janma haai, aur yahee maseeh prabhu haai." 
Luke2:12 aur is ka tumhare liye yah pata haai, ki tum aek balak ko kapade me lipatta hua aur charanee men pada paoge." 
Luke2:13 tab aekaaek us svargadoot ke sath svargadooton ka dal parameshvar kee stuti karate huae aur yah kahate dikhai diya. 
Luke2:14 ki akash men parameshvar kee mahima aur prathvee par un manushyon men jinase vah prasann haai shaaantai ho.. 
Luke2:15 jab svargadoot un ke pas se svarga ko chale gaa, to gadeariyon ne apas men kaha, ao, ham baaitalaham jakar yah bat jo hui haai, aur jise prabhu ne hamen bataya haai, dekhen." 
Luke2:16 aur unhon ne turant jakar mariyam aur yoosufa ko aur charanee men us balak ko pada dekha. 
Luke2:17 inhen dekhkar unhon ne vah bat jo is balak ke vishay men un se kahee gai thee, pragatt kee." 
Luke2:18 aur sab sunanevalon ne un baton se jo gadriyon ne un se kaheen ashcharya kiya. 
Luke2:19 parantu mariyam ye sab baten apane man men rakhkar sochatee rahee. 
Luke2:20 aur gadriye jaaisa un se kaha gaya tha, vaaisa hee sab sunakar aur dekhkar parameshvar kee maahima aur stuti karate huae lautt gaae.." 
Luke2:21 jab att din poore hua, aur usake khtane ka samay aya, to usaka nam yeeshu rakha gaya, jo svargadoot ne usake pett men ane se pahile kaha tha." 
Luke2:22 aur jab moosa ko vyavastha ke anusar un ke shuuddh hone ke din poore huae to ve use yarooshalem men le gaa, ki prabhu ke samane laaen." 
Luke2:23 jaaisa ki prabhu kee vyavastha men likha haai ki har aek pahilautta prabhu ke liye paavitra ttharega. 
Luke2:24 aur prabhu kee vyavastha ke vachan ke anusar pandukon ka aek joda, ya kabootar ke do bachche la kar baalidan karen." 
Luke2:25 aur dekho, yarooshalem men shamaun nam aek manushy tha, aur vah manushy dharmee aur bhkt tha aur israael kee shaantai kee batt joh raha tha, aur paavitra atma us par tha." 
Luke2:26 aur paavitra atma se us ko chitavanee hui thee, ki jab tak too prabhu ke maseeh ko dekh ne lega, tak tak mratyu ko n dekhega." 
Luke2:27 aur vah atma ke sikhane se mandair men aya aur jab mata-apita us balak yeeshu ko bheetar laa, ki usake liye vyavastha kee reeati ke anusar karen." 
Luke2:28 to us ne use apanee god men liya aur parameshvar ka dhanyavad karake kaha," 
Luke2:29 he svamee, ab too apane das ko apane vachan ke anusar shaaantai se vida karata haai." 
Luke2:30 kyonaki meree ankho ne tere uddhar ko dekh liya haai. 
Luke2:31 jise too ne sab deshaen ke logon ke samhane taaiyar kiya haai. 
Luke2:32 ki vah any jaatiyon ko prakash dene ke liye jyoti, aur tere nij log israael kee maahima ho." 
Luke2:33 aur usaka pita aur us kee mata in baton se jo usake vishay men kahee jatee thee, ashcharya karate the." 
Luke2:34 tab shamaun ne un ko ashaeesh dekar, us kee mata mariyam se kaha dek, vah to israael men bahuton ke girane, aur uttne ke liye, aur aek aeesa chinh hone ke liye ttharaya gaya haai, jis ke virodha men baten kee jaaegeen ," 
Luke2:35 varan tera praan bhee talavar se var par chhdai jaaega, is se bahut dayon ke vichar pragatt honge. 
Luke2:36 aur ashor ke gotra men se hannah nam fanooael kee bettee aek bhavishyadvaktain thee: vah bahut booddhee thee, aur byah hone ke bad sat varsha apane paati ke sath rah pai thee." 
Luke2:37 vah chaurasee varsha se vidhava thee: aur mandair ko naheen chhodtee thee par upavas aur praarthna kar karake rata-din upasana kiya karatee thee. 
Luke2:38 aur vah us ghadee vahan akar prabhu ka dhanyavad karane lagee, aur un sabhon se, jo yarooshalem ke chhuttkare kee batt johate the, usake vishay men baten karane lagee." 
Luke2:39 aur jab ve prabhu kee vyavastha ke anusar sab kuchh nipatta chuke to galeel men apane nagar nasarat ko fir chale gaae.. 
Luke2:40 aur balak baddhta, aur balavant hota, aur buaddh ise paaripoorn hota gaya aur parameshvar ka anugrah us par tha." 
Luke2:41 usake mata-apita praati varsha fasah ke pabrba men yarooshalem ko jaya karate the. 
Luke2:42 jab vah barah varsha ka hua, to ve pabrba kee reeti ke anusar yarooshalem ko gaae." 
Luke2:43 aur jab ve un dinon ko poora karake lauttne lage, to vah ladka yeeshu yarooshalem men rah gaya aur yah usake mata-pita naheen janate the." 
Luke2:44 ve yah samajhkar, ki vah aur yatraiyon ke sath hoga, aek din ka padav nikal gaae: aur use apane kuttumbaiyon aur janapahachanon men ddoonddhne lage." 
Luke2:45 par jab naheen mila, to ddoonddhte-ddoonddhte yarooshalem ko fir lautt gaae." 
Luke2:46 aur teen din ke bad unhon ne use maandair men upadeshakon ke beech men baaitte, un kee sunate aur un se prashn karate huae paya." 
Luke2:47 aur jitane us kee sun rahe the, ve sab us kee samajh aur usake uttron se chakit the." 
Luke2:48 tab ve use dekhkar chakit huae aur us kee mata ne us se kaha he putra, too ne ham se kyon aeesa vyavahar kiya? dek, tera pita aur maain kuddhte huae tujhe ddoonddhte the." 
Luke2:49 us ne un se kaha tum mujhe kyon ddoonddhte the? kya naheen janate the, ki mujhe apane pita ke bhvan men hona avashy haai?" 
Luke2:50 parantu jo bat us ne un se kahee, unhon ne use naheen samajha." 
Luke2:51 tab vah un ke sath gaya, aur nasarat men aya, aur un ke vash men raha aur us kee mata ne ye sab baten apane man men rakheen.." 
Luke2:52 aur yeeshu buddh iddh aur deela-daul men aur parameshvar aur manushyon ke anugrah men baddhta gaya.. 
Luke3:1 tibiriyus kaaisar ke rajy ke pandrahaven varsha men jab puantaiyus peelatus yahoodiya ka haakim tha, aur galeel men herodes nam chauthai ka itooraaiya, aur trakhoneetis me, usaka bhai filippus, aur aabilene men lisaaniyas chauthai ke raja the." 
Luke3:2 aur jab hanna aur kaaifaa mahayajak the, us samay parameshvar ka vachan jangal men jakarayah ke putra yoohanna ke pas pahuncha." 
Luke3:3 aur vah yaradan ke as pas ke sare desh men akar, papon kee kshama ke liye man firav ke bapatisma ka prachar karane laga." 
Luke3:4 jaaise yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ke kahe huae vachanon kee pustak men likha haai, ki jangal men aek pukaranevale ka shabd ho raha he ki prabhu ka marga taaiyar karo, us kee sadken seedhaee banao." 
Luke3:5 har aek ghaattee bhr dee jaaegee, aur har aek pahad aur tteela neecha kiya jaaega aur jo tteddha haai seedha, aur jo uncha neecha haai vah chauras marga banega." 
Luke3:6 aur har praanee parameshvar ke uddhar ko dekhega.. 
Luke3:7 jo bheed kee bheed us se bapatisma lene ko nikal kar atee thee, un se vah kahata tha he sanp ke bachcho, tumhen kis ne jata diya, ki anevale krodha se bhago." 
Luke3:8 so man firav ke yogy fal lao: aur apane apane man men yah n socho, ki hamara pita ibraaheem haai kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki parameshvar in patthron se ibraaheem ke liye santan utpann kar sakata haai." 
Luke3:9 aur ab hee kulhada pedon kee jad par dhara haai, isaaliye jo jo ped achchha fal naheen lata, vah katta aur ag men jhonka jata haai." 
Luke3:10 aur logon ne us se poochha, to ham kya karen?" 
Luke3:11 us ne unahen utar diya, ki jis ke pas do kurate hon? vah usake sath jis ke pas naheen haain bantt de aur jis ke pas bhojan ho, vah bhee aeesa hee kare." 
Luke3:12 aur mahasool lenevale bhee bapatisma lene aa, aur us se poochha, ki he guro, ham kya karen?" 
Luke3:13 us ne un se kaha, jo tumhare liye ttharaya gaya haai, us se adhaik n lena." 
Luke3:14 aur sipaahiyon ne bhee us se yah poochha, ham kya karen? us ne un se kaha, kisee par upadrav n karana, aur n jootta dosh lagana, aur apanee majadooree par santosh karana.." 
Luke3:15 jab log as lagaae huae the, aur sab apane apane man men yoohanna ke vishay men vichar kar rahe the, ki kya yahee maseeh to naheen haai." 
Luke3:16 to yoohanna ne un sab ke uttr men kaha: ki maain to tumhen panee se bapaatisma deta hoo, parantu vah anevala haai, jo mujh se shaaktaiman haai maain to is yogy bhee nahee, ki usake jooton ka bandha khol sakoo, vah tumhen pavitra atma aur ag se bapatisma dega." 
Luke3:17 usaka soop, usake hath men haai aur vah apana khlihan achchhee tarah se safa karega aur gehoon ko apane khtte men ikattha karega, parantu boosee ko us ag men jo bujhne kee naheen jala dega.." 
Luke3:18 so vah bahut see shaiksha de dekar logon ko susamachar sunata raha. 
Luke3:19 parantu us ne chauthai desh ke raja herodes ko usake bhai filippus kee patnee herodiyas ke vishay, aur sab kukamorn ke vishay men jo us ne kiae the, ulahana diya." 
Luke3:20 isaliye herodes ne un sab se baddhkar yah kukarma bhee kiya, ki yoohanna ko bandeegrah men dal diya.." 
Luke3:21 jab sab logon ne bapaatisma liya, aur yeeshu bhee bapaatisma lekar praarthna kar raha tha, to akash khul gaya." 
Luke3:22 aur paavitra atma shaareearik roop men kabootar kee nai us par utara, aur yah akashavanee hui, ki too mera piry putra haai, maain tujh se prasann hoon.." 
Luke3:23 jab yeeshu ap upadesh karane laga, jo lagabhg tees varsha kee ayu ka tha aur jaaisa samajha jata tha yoosufa ka putra tha aur v aelee ka." 
Luke3:24 aur vah mattat ka, aur vah levee ka, aur vah malakee ka, aur vah yanna ka, aur vah yoosufa ka." 
Luke3:25 aur vah maatianyah ka, aur vah amos ka, aur vah nahoom ka, aur vah asalyah ka, aur vah nogah ka." 
Luke3:26 aur vah mat ka, aur vah maatiatyah ka, aur vah shaimee ka, aur vah yosekh ka, aur vah yodah ka." 
Luke3:27 aur vah yoohanna ka, aur vah resa ka, aur vah jaroobbaabil ka, aur vah shalaatiyel ka, aur vah neree ka." 
Luke3:28 aur vah malakee ka, aur vah aee ka, aur vah kosam ka, aur vah ilamodam ka, aur vah aer ka." 
Luke3:29 aur vah yeshoo ka, aur vah ilajar ka, aur vah yoreem ka, or vah mattat ka, aur vah levee ka." 
Luke3:30 aur vah shamaun ka, aur vah yahoodah ka, aur vah yoosufa ka, aur vah yonan ka, aur vah ilayakeem ka." 
Luke3:31 aur vah maleah ka, aur vah minnah ka, aur vah mattta ka, aur vah natan ka, aur vah daud ka." 
Luke3:32 aur vah yishau ka, aur vah obed ka, aur vah boaj ka, aur vah salamon ka, aur vah nahashaen ka." 
Luke3:33 aur vah ammeenadab ka, aur vah aranee ka, aur vah hisron ka, aur vah firis ka, aur vah yahoodah ka." 
Luke3:34 aur vah yakoob ka, aur vah isahak ka, aur vah ibraaheem ka, aur vah tirah ka, aur vah nahor ka." 
Luke3:35 aur vah saroog ka, aur vah ra ka, aur vah filig ka, aur vah aebir ka, aur vah shailah ka." 
Luke3:36 aur vah kenan ka, vah arafagyad ka, aur vah shom ka, vah nooh ka, vah limik ka." 
Luke3:37 aur vah matooshailah ka, aur vah hanok ka, aur vah yirid ka, aur vah mahalalel ka, aur vah kenan ka." 
Luke3:38 aur vah inosh ka, aur vah shot ka, aur vah adam ka, aur vah parameshvar ka tha.." 
Luke4:1 fir yeeshu paavitraatma se bhra hua, yaradan se lautta aur chalees din tak atma ke sikhane se jangal men firata raha aur shautan us kee pareeksha karata raha." 
Luke4:2 un dinon men us ne kuchh n khaya aur jab ve din poore ho gaa, to use bookh lagee." 
Luke4:3 aur shautan ne us se kaha yaadi too parameshvar ka putra haai, to is patthr se kah, ki rottee ban jaae" 
Luke4:4 yeeshu ne use uttr diya ki likha haai, manushy keval rottee se jeevit n rahega." 
Luke4:5 tab shautan use le gaya aur us ko pal bhr men jagat ke sare rajy dikhaae. 
Luke4:6 aur us se kaha maain yah sab aadhaikar, aur in ka vibhv tujhe doonga, kyonaki vah mujhe saunpa gaya haai: aur jise chahata hoo, usee ko de deta hoon." 
Luke4:7 isaliye, yaadi too mujhe pranam kare, to yah sab tera ho jaaega." 
Luke4:8 yeeshu ne use uttr diya likha haai ki too prabhu apane parameshvar ko pranam kara aur keval usee kee upasana kara. 
Luke4:9 tab us ne use yarooshalem men le jakar mandair ke kangoore par khda kiya, aur us se kaha yadi too parameshvar ka putra haai, to apane ap ko yahan se neeche gira de." 
Luke4:10 kyonaki likha haai, ki vah tere vishay men apane svargadooton ko agyaa dega, ki ve teree raksha karen." 
Luke4:11 aur ve tujhe hathon hath utta lenge aeesa n ho ki tere panv men patthr se ttes lage. 
Luke4:12 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya yah bhee kaha gaya haai, ki too prabhu apane parameshvar kee pareeksha n karana." 
Luke4:13 jab shautan sab pareeksha kar chuka, tab kuchh samay ke liye usake pas se chala gaya.." 
Luke4:14 fir yeeshu atma kee samarth se bhra hua galeel ko lautta, aur us kee charcha as pas ke sare desh men faail gai." 
Luke4:15 aur vah un hee aradhanalayon men upadesh karata raha, aur sab us kee badai karate the.." 
Luke4:16 aur vah nasarat men aya jahan pala posa gaya tha aur apanee reeti ke anusar sabt ke din aradhanalay men ja kar paddhne ke liye khda hua. 
Luke4:17 yashaayah bhvishyadvkta kee pustak use dee gai, aur us ne pustak kholakar, vah jagah nikalee jahan yah likha tha." 
Luke4:18 ki prabhu ka atma mujh par haai, isaaliye ki us ne kangalon ko susamachar sunane ke liye mera abhaishok kiya haai, aur mujhe isaliye bheja haai, ki bandhauon ko chhuttkare ka aur andhaen ko drashtti pane ka susamachar prachar karoon aur kuchale huon ko chhudaun." 
Luke4:19 aur prabhu ke prasann rahane ke varsha ka prachar karoon. 
Luke4:20 tab us ne pustak band karake sevak ke hath men de dee, aur baaitt gaya: aur aradhanalay ke sab logon kee ankh us par lagee thee." 
Luke4:21 tab vah un se kahane laga, ki aj hee yah lekh tumhare samhane poora hua haai." 
Luke4:22 aur sab ne use saraha, aur jo anugrah kee baten usake munh se nikalatee theee, un se achambha kiya aur kahane lage kya yah yoosufa ka putra naheen?" 
Luke4:23 us ne us se kaha tum mujh par yah kahavat avashy kahoge, ki he vaaidh, apane ap ko achchha kara! jo kuchh ham ne suna haai ki kafaranahoom men kiya gaya haai use yahan apane desh men bhee kara." 
Luke4:24 aur us ne kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo, koi bhavishyadvkta apane desh men mana-samman naheen pata." 
Luke4:25 aur maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki aeliyyah ke dinon men jab saddhe teen varsha tak akash band raha, yahan tak ki sare desh men bada akal pada, to israael men bahut see vidhavaaen theen." 
Luke4:26 par aeliyyah un men se kisee ke pas naheen bheja gaya, keval saaida ke sarafat men aek vidhava ke pasa." 
Luke4:27 aur ileesha bhavishyadvkta ke samay israael men bahut se koddhee the, par naman soorayanee ko chhod un men se kai shuuddh naheen kiya gaya." 
Luke4:28 ye baten sunate hee jitane aradhanalay men the, sab krodha se bhr gaae." 
Luke4:29 aur uttkar use nagar se bahar nikala, aur jis pahad par un ka nagar basa hua tha, us kee chottee par le chale, ki use vahan se neeche gira den." 
Luke4:30 par vah un ke beech men se nikalakar chala gaya.. 
Luke4:31 fir vah galeel ke kafaranahoom nagar men gaya, aur sabt ke din logon ko upadesh de raha tha." 
Luke4:32 ve us ke upadesh se chakit ho gaae kyonki usaka vachan aadhaikar saahit tha. 
Luke4:33 aradhanalay men aek manushy tha, jis men ashuuddh atma thee." 
Luke4:34 vah unche shabd se chilla utta, he yeeshu nasaree, hamen tujh se kya kama? kya too hamen nash karane aya haai? maain tujhe janata hoon too kaun haai? too parameshvar ka pavitra jan haai." 
Luke4:35 yeeshu ne use danttkar kaha, chup raha: aur us men se nikal ja: tab dushttatma use beech men pattkakar bina haani pahunchaae us men se nikal gai." 
Luke4:36 is par sab ko achambha hua, aur ve apas men baten karake kahane lage, yah kaaisa vachan haai? ki vah adhaikar aur samarth ke sath ashuuddh atmaon ko agyaa deta haai, aur ve nikal jatee haain." 
Luke4:37 so charon or har jagah us kee dhoom mach gai.. 
Luke4:38 vah aradhanalay men se uttkar shamaun ke ghar men gaya aur shamaun kee sas ko jvar chaddha hua tha, aur unhon ne usake liye us se binatee kee." 
Luke4:39 us ne usake nikatt khde hokar jvar ko dantta aur vah us par se utar gaya aur vah turant uttkar un kee seva tthal karane lagee.. 
Luke4:40 sooraj oobate samay jin jin ke yahan log nana prakar kee beemariyon men pade huae the, ve sab unhen usake pas le aae, aur us ne aek aek par hath rakhkar unhen changa kiya." 
Luke4:41 aur dushttatma chillatee aur yah kahatee hui ki too parameshvar ka putra haai, bahuton men se nikal gai par vah unhen danttta aur bolane naheen deta tha, kyonaki ve janate the, ki yah maseeh haai.." 
Luke4:42 jab din hua to vah nikalakar aek jangalee jagah men gaya, aur bheed kee bheed use ddoonddhtee hui usake pas ai, aur use rokane lagee, ki hamare pas se n ja." 
Luke4:43 parantu us ne un se kaha mujhe aur aur nagaron men bhee parameshvar ke rajy ka susamachar sunana avashy haai, kyonaki maain isee liye bheja gaya hoon.." 
Luke4:44 aur vah galeel ke aradhanalayon men prachar karata raha.. 
Luke5:1 jab bheed us par giree padtee thee, aur parameshvar ka vachan sunatee thee, aur vah gannesarat kee jheel ke kinare par khda tha, to aeesa hua." 
Luke5:2 ki us ne jheel ke kinare do naven lagee hui dekhee, aur machhuve un par se utarakar jal dhae rahe the." 
Luke5:3 un navon men se ek par jo shamaun kee thee, chaddhkar, us ne us se binatee kee, ki kinare se thoda hatta le chale, tab vah baaittkar logon ko nav par se upadesh dene laga." 
Luke5:4 jab ve baten kar chuka, to shamaun se kaha, gaahire men le chal, aur machhaliyan pakadne ke liye apane jal dalo." 
Luke5:5 shamaun ne usako uttr diya, ki he svamee, ham ne saree rat mihanat kee aur kuchh n pakada taubhee tere kahane se jal daloonga." 
Luke5:6 jab unhon ne aeesa kiya, to bahut machhaliyan ghor laa, aur un ke jal fattne lage." 
Luke5:7 is par unhon ne apane saathaiyon ko jo doosaree nav par the, sanket kiya, ki akar hamaree sahayata karo: aur unhon ne akar, dono nav yahan tak bhr leen ki ve oobane lageen." 
Luke5:8 yah dekhkar shamaun pataras yeeshu ke panvon par gira, aur kaha he prabhu, mere pas se ja, kyonki maain papee manushy hoon." 
Luke5:9 kyonaki itanee machhaliyon ke pakade jane se use aur usake sathaiyon ko bahut achambha hua. 
Luke5:10 aur vaaise hee jabadee ke putra yakoob aur yoohanna ko bhee, jo shamaun ke sahabhagee the, achambha hua: tab yeeshu ne shamaun se kaha, mat dra: ab se too manushyon ko jeevata pakada karega." 
Luke5:11 aur v navon ko kinare par le aae aur sab kuchh chhodkar usake peechhe ho liae.. 
Luke5:12 jab vah kisee nagar men tha, to dekho, vahan koddh se bhra hua aek manushy tha, aur vah yeeshu ko dekhkar munh ke bal gira, aur binatee kee ki he prabhu yaadi too chahe ho mujhe shuuddh kar sakata haai." 
Luke5:13 us ne hath baddhakar use chooa aur kaha maain chahata hoon too shuuddh ho ja: aur usaka koddh turant jata raha. 
Luke5:14 tab us ne use chitaya, ki kisee se n kah, parantu jake apane ap ko yajak ko dikha, aur apane shuuddh hone ke vishay men jo kuchh moosa ne chaddhava ttharaya haai use chaddha ki un par gavahee ho." 
Luke5:15 parantu us kee charcha aur bhee faailatee gai, aur bheed kee bheed us kee sunane ke liye aur apanee bimaariyon se change hone ke liye ikatthee hui." 
Luke5:16 parantu vah jangalon men alag jakar praarthna kiya karata tha.. 
Luke5:17 aur aek din hua ki vah upadesh de raha tha, aur fareesee aur vyavasthapak vahan baaitte huae the, jo galeel aur yahoodiya ke har aek ganv se, aur yarooshalem se aae the aur changa karane ke liye prabhu kee samarth usake sath thee." 
Luke5:18 aur dekho kai log aek manushy ko jo jhole ka mara hua tha, khatt par laa, aur ve use bheetar le jane aur yeeshu ke samhane rakhne ka upay ddoonddh rahe the." 
Luke5:19 aur jab bheed ke karan use bheetar n le ja sake to unhon ne kotte par chaddh kar aur khpraail hattakar, use khatt samet beech men yeeshu ke samhane utara diya." 
Luke5:20 us ne un ka vishvas dekhkar us se kaha he manushy, tere pap kshama hue." 
Luke5:21 tab shaasree aur fareesee vivad karane lage, ki yah kaun haai, jo parameshvar kee ninda karata haai? parameshvar ka chhod kaun papon kee kshama kar sakata haai?" 
Luke5:22 yeeshu ne un ke man kee baten janakar, un se kaha ki tum apane manon men kya vivad kar rahe ho?" 
Luke5:23 sahaj kya haai? kya yah kahana, ki tere pap kshama hua, ya yah kahana ki ut, aur chal fira?" 
Luke5:24 parantu isaaliye ki tum jano ki manushy ke putra ko prathvee par pap kshama karane ka bhee adhaikar haai us ne us jhole ke mare huae se kaha, maain tujh se kahata hoo, utt aur apanee khatt uttakar apane ghar chala ja." 
Luke5:25 vah turant un ke samhane utta, aur jis par vah pada tha use uttakar, parameshvar kee badai karata hua apane ghar chala gaya." 
Luke5:26 tab sab chaakit huae aur parameshvar kee badai karane lage, aur bahut drakar kahane lage, ki aj ham ne anokhee baten dekhee haain.." 
Luke5:27 aur isake bad vah bahar gaya, aur levee nam aek chungee lenevale ko chungee kee chaukee par baaitte dekha, aur us se kaha, mere peechhe ho le." 
Luke5:28 tab vah sab kuchh chhodkar utta, aur usake peechhe ho liya." 
Luke5:29 aur levee ne apane ghar men usake liye badee javanar kee aur chungee lenevalon kee aur auron kee jo usake sath bhojan karane baaitte the aek badee bheed thee. 
Luke5:30 aur fareesee aur un ke shaasree us ke chelon se yah kahakar kudkudane lage, ki tum chungee lenevalon aur paapiyon ke sath kyon khate-peete ho?" 
Luke5:31 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya ki vaaidh bhle changon ke liye nahee, parantu beemaron ke liye avashy haai." 
Luke5:32 maain dharmiyon ko nahee, parantu paapiyon ko man firane ke liye bulane aya hoon." 
Luke5:33 aur unhon ne us se kaha, yoohanna ke chele to barabar upavas rakhte aur praarthna kiya karate haai, aur vaaise hee fareeasiyon ke bhee, parantu tere chele to khate peete haain!" 
Luke5:34 yeeshu ne un se kaha kya tum baraatiyon se jab tak doolha un ke sath rahe, upavas karenge." 
Luke5:35 parantu ve din aaenge, jin men doolha un se alag kiya jaaega, tab ve un dinon men upavas karenge." 
Luke5:36 us ne ek aur drashttant bhee un se kaha ki koi manushy naye pahiravan men se faadkar purane paahiravan men paaiband naheen lagata, naheen to naya fatt jaega aur vah paaiband purane men mel bhee naheen khaega." 
Luke5:37 aur koi naya dakhras puranee mashakon men nahee bhrata, naheen to naya dakhras mashakon ko faadkar bah jaaega, aur mashaken bhee nash ho jaaengee." 
Luke5:38 parantu naya dakhras nai mashakon men bhrana chahiye. 
Luke5:39 koi manushy purana dakhras peekar naya naheen chahata kyonaki vah kahata haai, ki purana hee achchha haai.." 
Luke6:1 fir sabt ke din vah kheton men se hokar ja raha tha, aur usake chele balen tod todkar, aur hathon se mal mal kar khate jate the." 
Luke6:2 tab fareesiyon men se kai aek kahane lage, tum vah kam kyon karate ho jo sabt ke din karana uchit naheen?" 
Luke6:3 yeeshu ne un ka uttr diya kya tum ne yah naheen paddha, ki daud ne jab vah aur usake sathee bookhe the to kya kiya?" 
Luke6:4 vah kyonkar parameshvar ke ghar men gaya, aur bhentt kee rottyaian lekar khai, jinhen khana yajakon ko chhod aur kisee ko uchit nahanee, aur apane sathaiyon ko bhee dee?" 
Luke6:5 aur us ne un se kaha manushy ka putra sabt ke din ka bhee prabhu haai. 
Luke6:6 aur aeesa hua ki kisee aur sabt ke din ko vah aradhanalay men jakar upadesh karane laga aur vahan aek manushy tha, jis ka dahina hath sookha tha." 
Luke6:7 shaasree aur fareesee us par dosh lagane ka avasar pane ke liye us kee tak men the, ki dekhen ki vah sabt ke din changa karata haai ki naheen." 
Luke6:8 parantu vah un ke vichar janata tha isaliye usane sookhe hathvale manushy se kaha ut, beech men khda ho: vah utt khda hua." 
Luke6:9 yeeshu ne un se kaha maain tum se yah poochhta hoon ki sabt ke din kya uchit haai, bhla karan ya bura karana praan ko bachana ya nash karana?" 
Luke6:10 aur us ne charon or un sabhon ko dekhkar us manushy se kaha apana hath baddha: us ne aeesa hee kiya, aur usaka hath fir changa ho gaya." 
Luke6:11 parantu ve ape se bahar hokar apas men vivad karane lage ki ham yeeshu ke sath kya karen? 
Luke6:12 aur un dinon men vah pahad par praarthna karane ko nikala, aur parameshvar se praarthna karane men saree rat bitai." 
Luke6:13 jab din hua, to us ne apane chelon ko bulakar un men se barah chun lia, aur un ko praerit kaha." 
Luke6:14 aur ve ye haain shamaun jis ka nam us ne pataras bhee rakha aur usaka bhai andairyas aur yakoob aur yoohanna aur filippus aur baratulamaai. 
Luke6:15 aur mattee aur thoma aur halafai ka putra yakoob aur shamaun jo jelotes kahalata haai. 
Luke6:16 aur yakoob ka betta yahooda aur yahooda isakariyotee, jo usaka pakadvanevala bana." 
Luke6:17 tab vah un ke sath utarakar chauras jagah men khda hua, aur usake chelon kee badee bheed, aur sare yahoodiya aur yarooshalem aur soor aur saaida ke samudra ke kinare se bahutere log, jo us kee sunane aur apanee beemaariyon se changa hone ke liy usake pas aae the, vahan the." 
Luke6:18 aur ashuuddh atmaon ke sataae huae log bhee achchhe kiae jate the. 
Luke6:19 aur sab use choona chahate the, kyonki us men se samarth nikalakar sab ko changa karatee thee.." 
Luke6:20 tab us ne apane chelon kee or dekhkar kaha dhany ho tum, jo deen ho, kyonaki parameshvar ka rajy tumhara haai." 
Luke6:21 dhany ho tum, jo ab bookhe ho kyonaki trapt kiae jaoge dhany ho tum, jo ab rote ho, kyonaki hansoge." 
Luke6:22 dhany ho tum, jab manushy ke putra ke karan log tum se baair karenge, aur tumhen nikal denge, aur tumharee ninda karenge, aur tumhara nam bura janakar katt denge." 
Luke6:23 us din anaandait hokar uchhlana, kyonki dekho, tumhare liye svarga men bada praatifal haai: un ke bapa-dade bhvishyadvktaon ke sath bhee vaaisa hee kiya karate the." 
Luke6:24 parantu hay tum para jo dhanavan ho, kyonaki tum apanee shaaantai pa chuke." 
Luke6:25 parantu hay tum para jo ab trapt ho, kyonki bookhe hoge: hay, tum para jo ab hansate ho, kyonki shaek karoge aur rooge." 
Luke6:26 hay, tum para jab sab manushy tumhen bhla kahe, kyonki un ke bapa-dade jootte bhvishyadvktaon ke sath bhee aeesa hee kiya karate the.." 
Luke6:27 parantu maain tum sunanevalon se kahata hoo, ki apane shatrauon se praem rakho jo tum se baair kare, un ka bhla karo." 
Luke6:28 jo tumhen srap de, un ko ashaeesh do: jo tumhara apaman kare, un ke liye praarthna karo." 
Luke6:29 jo tere aek gal par thppad mare us kee or doosara bhee faer de aur jo teree dohar chheen le, us ko kurata lene se bhee n roka." 
Luke6:30 jo koi tujh se mange, use de aur jo teree vastu chheen le, us se n manga." 
Luke6:31 aur jaaisa tum chahate ho ki log tumhare sath kare, tum bhee un ke sath vaaisa hee karo." 
Luke6:32 yaadi tum apane praem rakhnevalon ke sath praem rakho, to tumharee kya badai? kyonki papee bhee apane praem rakhnevalon ke sath praem rakhte haain." 
Luke6:33 aur yaadi tum apane bhlai karanevalon hee ke sath bhlai karate ho, to tumharee kya badai? kyonaki papee bhee aeesa hee karate haain." 
Luke6:34 aur yaadi tum use udhaar do, jin se fir pane kee asha rakhte ho, to tumharee kya badai? kyonaki papee paapiyon ko udhaar dete haai, ki utana hee fir paaen." 
Luke6:35 baran apane shatrauon se praem rakho, aur bhlai karo: aur fir pane kee as n rakhkar udhaar do aur tumhare liye bada fal hoga aur tum paramapradhaan ke santan ttharoge, kyonki vah un par jo dhanyavad naheen karate aur buron par bhee krapalu haai." 
Luke6:36 jaaisa tumhara pita dayavant haai, vaaise hee tum bhee dayavant bano." 
Luke6:37 dosh mat lagao to tum par bhee dosh naheen lagaya jaaega: doshaee n ttharao, to tum bhee doshaee naheen ttharaae jaoge: kshama karo, to tumharee bhee kshama kee jaaegee." 
Luke6:38 diya karo, to tumhen bhee diya jaaega: log poora nam daba dabakar aur hila hilakar aur ubhrata hua tumharee god men dalenge, kyonki jis nam se tum napate ho, usee se tumhare liye bhee napa jaaega.." 
Luke6:39 fir us ne un se aek drashttant kaha kya andha, andho ko marga bata sakata haai? kya dono gadhe men naheen girenge?" 
Luke6:40 chela apane guroo se bada nahee, parantu jo koi siddh hoga, vah apane guroo ke saman hoga." 
Luke6:41 too apane bhai kee ankh ke tinake ko kyon dekhta haai, aur apanee hee ankh ka lattha tujhe naheen soojhta?" 
Luke6:42 aur jab too apanee hee ankh ka lattha naheen dekhta, to apane bhai se kyonkar kah sakata haai, he bhai, tthar ja teree ankh se tinake ko nikal doon? he kapattee, paahile apanee ankh se lattha nikal, tab jo tinaka tere bhai kee ankh men haai, bhlee bhanti dekhkar nikal sakega." 
Luke6:43 koi achchha ped nahee, jo nikamma fal laa, aur n to koi nikamma ped haai, jo achchha fal laae." 
Luke6:44 har aek ped apane fal se pahachana jata haai kyonaki log jhadiyon se anjeer naheen todte, aur n jhdberee se angoora." 
Luke6:45 bhla manushy apane man ke bhle bhndar se bhlee baten nikalata haai aur bura manushy apane man ke bure bhndar se buree baten nikalata haai kyonki jo man men bhra haai vahee usake munh par ata haai.. 
Luke6:46 jab tum mera kahana naheen manate, to kyon mujhe he prabhu, he prabhu, kahate ho?" 
Luke6:47 jo koi mere pas ata haai, aur meree baten sunakar unhen manata haai, maain tumhen batata hoon ki vah kis ke saman haai?" 
Luke6:48 vah us manushy ke saman haai, jis ne ghar banate samay boomi gaharee khodakar chattan kee nev dalee, aur jab baddh ai to dhaara us ghar par lagee, parantu use hila n sakee kyonaki vah pakka bana tha." 
Luke6:49 parantu jo sunakar naheen manata, vah us manushy ke saman haai, jis ne mittee par bina nev ka ghar banaya. jab us par dhaara lagee, to vah turant gir pada, aur vah girakar satyanash ho gaya.." 
Luke7:1 jab vah logon ko apanee saree baten suna chuka, to kafaranahoom men aya." 
Luke7:2 aur kisee soobedar ka aek das jo usaka piry tha, beemaree se marane par tha." 
Luke7:3 us ne yeeshu kee charcha sunakar yahoodiyon ke kai puraaniyon ko us se yah binatee karane ko usake pas bheja, ki akar mere das ko changa kara." 
Luke7:4 ve yeeshu ke pas akar us se badee binatee karake kahane lage, ki vah is yogy haai, ki too usake liye yah kare." 
Luke7:5 kyonaki vah hamaree jati se praem rakhta haai, aur usee ne hamare aradhanalay ko banaya haai." 
Luke7:6 yeeshu un ke sath sath chala, par jab vah ghar se door n tha, to soobedar ne sake pas kai mitraen ke dara kahala bheja, ki he prabhu dukh n utta, kyonaki maain is yogy nahee, ki too meree chht ke tale aae." 
Luke7:7 isee karan maain ne apane ap ko is yogy bhee n samajha, ki tere pas au, par vachan hee kah de to mera sevak changa ho jaaega." 
Luke7:8 maain bhee paradhaeen manushy hoon aur sipahee mere hath men haai, aur jab aek ko kahata hoo, ja, to vah jata haai, aur doosare se kahata hoon ki a, to ata haai aur apane kisee das ko ki yah kar, to vah use karata haai." 
Luke7:9 yah sunakar yeeshu ne achambha kiya, aur us ne munh faerakar us bheed se jo usake peechhe a rahee thee kaha, maain tum se kahatah hoo, ki maain ne israael men bhee aeesa vishvas naheen paya." 
Luke7:10 aur bheje huae logon ne ghar lauttkar, us das ko changa paya.." 
Luke7:11 thode din ke bad vah nain nam ke aek nagar ko gaya, aur usake chele, aur badee bheed usake sath ja rahee thee." 
Luke7:12 jab vah nagar ke faattk ke pas pahuncha, to dekho, log aek murade ko bahar liae ja rahe the jo apanee man ka aekalauta putra tha, aur vah vidhava thee: aur nagar ke bahut se log usake sath the." 
Luke7:13 use dekh kar prabhu ko taras aya, aur us ne kaha mat ro." 
Luke7:14 tab us ne pas akar, arthee ko chhua aur uttanevale tthar gaa, tab us ne kaha he javan, maain tujh se kahata hoo, utt." 
Luke7:15 tab vah murada utt baaitta, aur bolane laga: aur us ne use us kee man ko saup diya." 
Luke7:16 is se sab par bhy chha gaya aur ve parameshvar kee badai karake kahane lage ki hamare beech men aek bada bhvishyadvkta utta haai, aur parameshvar ne apane logon par krapa draashtti kee haai." 
Luke7:17 aur usake vishay men yah bat sare yahoodiya aur as pas ke sare desh men faail gai.. 
Luke7:18 aur yoohanna ko usake chelon ne in sab baton ka samachar diya. 
Luke7:19 tab yoohanna ne apane chelon men se do ko bulakar prabhu ke pas yah poochhne ke liye bheja ki kya anevala too hee haai, ya ham kisee aur doosare kee batt dekhen?" 
Luke7:20 unhon ne usake pas akar kaha, yoohanna bapatisma denevale ne hamen tere pas yah poochhne ko bheja haai, ki kya anevala too hee haai, ya ham doosare kee batt johen?" 
Luke7:21 usee ghadee us ne bahuton ko beemaariyon aur peedao, aur dushttatmaon se chhudaya aur bahut se andhaen ko ankhe dee." 
Luke7:22 aur us ne un se kaha jo kuchh tum ne dekha aur suna haai, jakar yoohanna se kah do ki andho dekhte haai, langade chalate firate haai, koddhee shuuddh kiae jate haain aur kangalon ko susamachar sunaya jata haai." 
Luke7:23 aur dhany haai vah, jo mere karan ttokar n khaae.." 
Luke7:24 jab yoohanna ke bheje huae log chal dia, to yeeshu yoohanna ke vishay men logon se kahane laga, tum jangal men kya dekhne gaae the? kya hava se hilate huae sarakande ko?" 
Luke7:25 to tum fir kya dekhne gaae the? kya komal vasr pahine huae manushy ko? dekho, jo bhdkeela vasr paahinate, aur sukh vilas se rahate haai, ve rajabhvanon men rahate haain." 
Luke7:26 to fir kya dekhne gaae the? kya kisee bhavishyadvkta ko? ha, maain tum se kahata hoo, varan bhavishyadvkta se bhee bade ko." 
Luke7:27 yah vahee haai, jis ke vishay men likha haai, ki dek, maain apane doot ko tere age age bhejata hoo, jo tere age marga seedha karega." 
Luke7:28 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jo striayon se janmen haai, un men se yoohanna se bada koi naheen: par jo parameshvar ke rajy men chhotte se chhotta haai, vah us se bhee bada haai." 
Luke7:29 aur sab sadhaaran logon ne sunakar aur chungee lenevalon ne bhee yoohanna ka bapaatisma lekar parameshvar ko sachcha man liya. 
Luke7:30 par fareesiyon aur vyavasthapakon ne us se bapatisma n lekar parameshvar kee manasa ko apane vishay men ttal diya. 
Luke7:31 so maain is yug ke logon kee upama kis se doon ki ve kis ke saman haain? 
Luke7:32 ve un balakon ke saman haain jo bajar men baaitte huae aek doosare se pukarakar kahate haai, ki ham ne tumhare liye bansalee bajai, aur tum n nache, ham ne vilap kiya, aur tum n roae." 
Luke7:33 kyonaki yoohanna bapaatisma denevala ne rottee khata aya, n dakhras peeta aya, aur tum kahate ho, us men dushttatma haai." 
Luke7:34 manushy ka putra khata-peeta aya haai aur tum kahate ho, dekho, petoo aur piyakkad manushy, chungee lenevalon ka aur papiyon ka mitra." 
Luke7:35 par gyaan apanee sab santanon se sachcha ttharaya gaya haai.. 
Luke7:36 fir kisee fareesee ne us se binatee kee, ki mere sath bhojan kara so vah us fareesee ke ghar men jakar bhojan karane baaitta." 
Luke7:37 aur dekho, us nagar kee aek paapinee sree yah janakar ki vah fareesee ke ghar men bhojan karane baaitta haai, sangamaramar ke patra men itra lai." 
Luke7:38 aur usake panvon ke pas, peechhe khdee hokar, rotee hui, usake panvon ko ansuon se bhaigane aur apane sir ke balon se ponchhne lagee aur usake panv barabar choomakar un par itra mala." 
Luke7:39 yah dekhkar, vah fareesee jis ne use bulaya tha, apane man men sochane laga, yadi yah bhvishyadvkta hota to jan leta, ki yah jo use choo rahee haai, vah kaun aur kaaisee sree haai? kyashonaki vah to papinee haai." 
Luke7:40 yah sun yeeshu ne usake uttr men kaha ki he shamaun mujhe tujh se kuchh kahana haai vah bola, he guroo kaha." 
Luke7:41 kisee mahajan ke do denadar the, aek panch sau, aur doosara pachas deenar dhaarata tha." 
Luke7:42 jab ki un ke pas pattane ko kuchh n raha, to us ne dono ko kshama kar diya: so un men se kaun us se aadhaik praem rakhega." 
Luke7:43 shamaun ne uttr diya, meree samajh men vah, jis ka us ne adhaik chhod diya: us ne us se kaha, too ne tteek vichar kiya haai." 
Luke7:44 aur us sree kee or firakar us ne shamaun se kaha kya too is sree ko dekhta haai? maain tere ghar men aya parantu too ne mere panv dhaane ke liye panee n diya, par is ne mere panv ansuon se bhaigaa, aur apane balon se ponchha!" 
Luke7:45 too ne mujhe chooma n diya, par jab se maain aya hoon tab se is ne mere panvon ka choomana n chhoda." 
Luke7:46 too ne mere sir par tel naheen mala par is ne mere panvon par itra mala haai. 
Luke7:47 isaliye maain tujh se kahata hoon ki is ke pap jo bahut the, kshama hua, kyonki is ne bahut praem kiya par jis ka thoda kshama hua haai, vah thoda praem karata haai." 
Luke7:48 aur us ne sree se kaha, tere pap kshama hue." 
Luke7:49 tab jo log usake sath bhojan karane baaitte the, ve apane apane man men sochane lage, yah kaun haai jo papon ko bhee kshama karata haai?" 
Luke7:50 par us ne sree se kaha, tere vishvas ne tujhe bacha liya haai, kushal se chalee ja.." 
Luke8:1 is ke bad vah nagar nagar aur ganv ganv prachar karata hua, aur parameshvar ke rajy ka susamachar sunata hua, firane laga." 
Luke8:2 aur ve bahar usake sath the: aur kitanee striayan bhee jo dushttatmaon se aur beemariyon se chhudai gai thee, aur ve yah haai, mariyam jo magadaleenee kahalatee thee, jis men se sat dushttatmaaen nikalee theen." 
Luke8:3 aur herodes ke bhndaree khoja kee patnee yoanna aur soosannah aur bahut see aur striayan: ye to apanee sampaati se us kee seva karatee theen.. 
Luke8:4 jab badee bheed ikatthee hui, aur nagar nagar ke log usake pas chale ate the, to us ne drashttant men kaha." 
Luke8:5 ki aek bone vala beej bone nikala: bote huae kuchh marga ke kinare gira, aur raunda gaya, aur akash ke pakshiayon ne use chug liya." 
Luke8:6 aur kuchh chattan par gira, aur upaja, parantu taree n milane se sookh gaya." 
Luke8:7 kuchh jhaadiyon ke beech men gira, aur jhaadiyon ne sath sath baddhkar use daba liya." 
Luke8:8 aur kuchh achchhee boomi par gira, aur ugakar sau guna fal laya: yah kahakar us ne unche shabd se kaha jis ke sunane ke kan hon vah sun len.." 
Luke8:9 usake chelon ne us se poochha, ki yah drashttant kya haai? us ne kaha" 
Luke8:10 tum ko parameshvar ke rajy ke bhedon kee samajh dee gai haai, par auron ko drashttanton men sunaya jata haai, isaliye ki ve dekhte huae bhee n dekhe, aur sunate huae bhee n samajhen." 
Luke8:11 drashttant yah haai beej to parameshvar ka vachan haai. 
Luke8:12 marga ke kinare ke ve haai, jinhon ne suna tab shautan akar un ke man men se vachan utta le jata haai, ki kaheen aeesa n ho ki ve vishvas karake uddhar paaen." 
Luke8:13 chattan par ke ve haai, ki jab sunate haai, to anand se vachan ko grahan to karate haai, parantu jad n pakadte se ve thodee der tak vishvas rakhte haai, aur pareeksha ke samay bahak jate haain." 
Luke8:14 jo jhaadiyon men gira, so ve haai, jo sunate haai, par hote hote chinta aur dhan aur jeevan ke sukh vilas men fans jate haai, aur un ka fal naheen pakata." 
Luke8:15 par achchhee boomi men ke ve haai, jo vachan sunakar bhle aur uttm man men sambhale rahate haai, aur dhaeeraj se fal late haain.." 
Luke8:16 koi deeya bar ke baratan se naheen chhpaiata, aur n khatt ke neeche rakhta haai, parantu deevatt par rakhta haai, ki bheetar anevale prakash panae." 
Luke8:17 kuchh chhpai nahee, jo pragatt n ho aur n kuchh gupt haai, jo jana n jaa, aur pragatt n ho." 
Luke8:18 isaliye chaukas raho, ki tum kis reeti se sunate ho? kyonki jis ke pas haai, use diya jaaega aur jis ke pas naheen haai, us ve vah bhee le liya jaaega, jise vah apana samajhta haai.." 
Luke8:19 us kee mata aur bhai usake pas aa, par bheed ke karan us se bhentt n kar sake." 
Luke8:20 aur us se kaha gaya, ki teree mata aur tere bhai bahar khde huae tujh se milana chahate haain." 
Luke8:21 us ne usake uttr men un se kaha ki meree mata aur mere bhai ye hee haai, jo parameshvar ka vachan sunate aur manate haain.." 
Luke8:22 fir aek din vah aur usake chele nav par chaddhe, aur us ne un se kaha ki ao, jheel ke par chalen: so unhon ne nav khol dee." 
Luke8:23 par jab nav chal rahee thee, to vah so gaya: aur jheel par andhaee ai, aur nav panee se bhrane lagee aur ve jokhaim men the." 
Luke8:24 tab unhon ne pas akar use jagaya, aur kaha he svamee! svamee! ham nash huae jate haain: tab us ne uttkar andhaee ko aur panee kee laharon ko dantta aur ve thm gaa, aur chaain ho gaya." 
Luke8:25 aur us ne un se kaha tumhara vishvas kahan tha? par ve dr gaa, aur achaambhiat hokar apas men kahane lage, yah kaun haai? jo andhaee aur panee ko bhee agyaa deta haai, aur ve us kee manate haain.." 
Luke8:26 fir ve giraseniyon ke desh men pahunche, jo us par galeel ke samhane haai." 
Luke8:27 jab vah kinare par utara, to us nagar ka aek manushy use mila, jis men dushttatmaaen theen aur bahut dinon se n kapade paahinata tha aur n ghar men rahata tha varan kabraen men raha karata tha." 
Luke8:28 vah yeeshu ko dekhkar chillaya, aur usake samhane girakar unche shabd se kaha he param pradhaan parameshvar ke putra yeeshu, mujhe tujh se kya kama! maain teree binatee karata hoo, mujhe peeda n de!" 
Luke8:29 kyonaki vah us ashuuddh atma ko us manushy men se nikalane kee agyaa de raha tha, isaliye ki vah us par bar bar prabal hotee thee aur yadhyapi log use sankalon aur bediyon se bandhate the, taubhee vah bandhanon ko tod dalata tha, aur dushttatma us men paaitt gai thee." 
Luke8:30 aur unhon ne us se binatee kee, ki hamen athah gadhe men jane kee agyaa n de." 
Luke8:31 vahan pahad par sooaron ka aek bada jhund char raha tha, so unhon ne us se binatee kee, ki hamen un men paaittne de, so us ne unhen jane diya." 
Luke8:32 vahan pahad par sooaron ka aek bada jhund char raha tha, so unhon ne us se binatee kee, ki hamen un men paaittne de, so us ne unhen jane diya." 
Luke8:33 tab dushttatmaaen us manushy se nikalakar sooaron men gai aur vah jhund kadade par se jhpattkar jheel men ja gira aur oob mara. 
Luke8:34 charavahe yah jo hua tha dekhkar bhage, aur nagar me, aur ganvon men jakar usaka samachar kaha." 
Luke8:35 aur log yah jo hua tha usake dekhne ko nikale, aur yeeshu ke pas akar jis manushy se dushttatmaaen nikalee thee, use yeeshu ke panvon ke pas kapade paahine aur sachet baaitte huae pakar dr gaae." 
Luke8:36 aur dekhnevalon ne un ko bataya, ki vah dushttatma ka sataya hua manushy kis prakar achchha hua." 
Luke8:37 tab giraseniyon ke as pas ke sab logon ne yeeshu se binatee kee, ki hamare yahan se chala ja kyonki un par bada bhy chha gaya tha: so vah nav par chaddhkar lautt gaya." 
Luke8:38 jis manushy se dushttatmaaeen nikalee theen vah us se binatee karane laga, ki mujhe apane sath rahane de, parantu yeeshu ne use vida karake kaha." 
Luke8:39 apane ghar men lautt ja aur logon se kah de, ki parameshvar ne tere liye kaaise bade kam kiae haain: vah jakar sare nagar men prachar karane laga, ki yeeshu ne mere liye kaaise bade kam kiae.." 
Luke8:40 jab yeeshu lautt raha tha, to log us se anand ke sath mile kyonaki ve sab us kee batt joh rahe the." 
Luke8:41 aur dekho, yair nam aek manushy jo aradhanalay ka saradar tha, aya, aur yeeshu ke panvon par gir ke us se binatee karane laga, ki mere ghar chala." 
Luke8:42 kyonaki usake barah varsha kee aekalautee bettee thee, aur vah marane par thee: jab vah ja raha tha, tab log us par gire padte the.." 
Luke8:43 aur aek sree ne jis ko barah varsha se lohoo bahane ka rog tha, aur jo apanee saree jivika vaaidhon ke peechhe vyay kar chukee thee aur taubhee kisee ke hath se changee n ho sakee thee." 
Luke8:44 peechhe se akar usake vasr ke anchal ko chooa, aur turant usaka lohoo bahana thm gaya." 
Luke8:45 is par yeeshu ne kaha, mujhe kis ne chooa? jab sab mukarane lage, to pataras aur usake sathaiyon ne kaha he svamee, tujhe to bheed daba rahee haai aur tujh par giree padtee haai." 
Luke8:46 parantu yeeshu ne kaha: kisee ne mujhe chooa haai kyonki maain ne jan liya haai ki mujh men se samarth nikalee haai. 
Luke8:47 jab sree ne dekha, ki maain chhpai naheen sakatee, tab kanpatee hui ai, aur usake panvon par girakar sab logon ke samhane bataya, ki maain ne kis karan se tujhe chooa, aur kyonkar turant changee ho gai." 
Luke8:48 us ne us se kaha, bettee tere vishvas ne tujhe changa kiya haai, kushal se chalee ja." 
Luke8:49 vah yah kah hee raha tha, ki kisee ne aradhanalay ke saradar ke yahan se akar kaha, teree bettee mar gai: guru ko du:kh n de." 
Luke8:50 yeeshu ne sunakar use uttr diya, mat dra keval vishvas rakh to vah bach jaaegee." 
Luke8:51 ghar men akar us ne pataras aura yoohanna aur yakoob aur ladkee ke mata-apita ko chhod aur kisee ko apane sath bheetar ane n diya. 
Luke8:52 aur sab usake liye ro peett rahe the, parantu us ne kaha roo mata vah maree naheen parantu so rahee haai." 
Luke8:53 ve yah janakar, ki mar gai haai, us kee hansee karane lage." 
Luke8:54 parantu us ne usaka hath pakada, aur pukarakar kaha, he lakadee utt!" 
Luke8:55 tab usake praan fir aae aur vah turant uttee fir us ne agyaa dee, ki use kuchh khane ko diya jaae." 
Luke8:56 usake mata-apita chaakit hua, parantu us ne unhen chitaya, ki yah jo hua haai, kisee se n kahana.." 
Luke9:1 fir us ne barahon ko bulakar unhen sab dushttatmaon aur bimaariyon ko door karane kee samarth aur adhaikar diya. 
Luke9:2 aur unhen parameshvar ke rajy ka prachar karane, aur bimaron ko achchha karane ke liye bheja." 
Luke9:3 aur us ne usase kaha, marga ke liye kuchh n lena: n to lattee, n jholee, n rottee, n roopaye aur n do do kurate." 
Luke9:4 aur jis kisee ghar men tum utaro, vaheen raho aur vaheen se vida ho." 
Luke9:5 jo koi tumhen grahan n karega us nagar se nikalate huae apane panvon kee dhool jhad dalo, ki un par gavahee ho." 
Luke9:6 so ve nikalakar ganv ganv susamachar sunate, aur har kaheen logon ko changa karate huae firate rahe.." 
Luke9:7 aur desh kee chauthai ka raja herodes yah sab sunakar ghabara gaya, kyonki kitanon ne kaha, ki yoohanna mare huon men se jee utta haai." 
Luke9:8 aur kitanon ne yah, ki aeliyyah dikhai diya haai: auron ne yah, ki purane bhvishyadvktaon men se koi jee utta haai." 
Luke9:9 parantu herodes ne kaha, yuhanna ka to maain ne sir kattvaya ab yah kaun haai, jis ke vishay men aeesee baten sunata hoon? aur us ne use dekhne kee ichchha kee.." 
Luke9:10 fir praeariton ne lauttkar jo kuchh unhon ne kiya tha, us ko bata diya, aur vah unhen alag karake baaitasaaida nam aek nagar ko le gaya." 
Luke9:11 yah janakar bheed usake peechhe ho lee: aur vah anand ke sath un se mila, aur un se parameshvar ke rajy kee baten karane laga: aur jo change hona chahate the, unhen changa kiya." 
Luke9:12 jab din ddhlane laga, to barahon ne akar usase kaha, bheed ko vida kar, ki charon or ke gavon aur bastaiyon men jakar ttkaie, aur bhojan ka upay kare, kyonki ham yahan sunasan jagah men haain." 
Luke9:13 us ne un se kaha, tum hee unhen khane ko do: unhon ne kaha, hamare pas panch rottyaian aur do machhlee ko chhod aur kuchh naheen: parantu ha, yadi ham jakar in sab logon ke liye bhojan mol le, to ho sakata haai: ve log to panch hajar purooshaen ke lagabhg the." 
Luke9:14 jab us ne apane chelon se kaha, unhen pachas pachas karake panti men baaitta do." 
Luke9:15 unhon ne aeesa hee kiya, aur sab ko baaitta diya." 
Luke9:16 tab us ne ve panch rottyaian aur do machhlee lee, aur svarga kee aur dekhkar dhanyavad kiya, aur tod todkar chelon ko deta gaya, ki logon ko parosen." 
Luke9:17 so sab khakar trapt hua, aur bache huae ttukadon se barah ttokaree bhrakar uttai.." 
Luke9:18 jab vah aekant men praarthna kar raha tha, aur chele usake sath the, to us ne un se poochha, ki log mujhe kya kahate haain?" 
Luke9:19 unhon ne uttr diya, yuhanna bapaatisma denevala, aur koi koi ealiyyah, aur koi yah ki purane bhvishyadvktaon men se koi jee utta haai." 
Luke9:20 us ne un se poochha, parantu tum mujhe kya kahate ho? pataras ne uttr diya, parameshvar ka maseeha." 
Luke9:21 tab us ne unhen chitakar kaha, ki yah kisee se n kahana." 
Luke9:22 aur us ne kaha, manushy ke putra ke liye avashy haai, ki vah bahut dukh uttaa, aur puraniae aur mahayajak aur shaasree use tuchchh samajhkar mar dale, aur vah teesare din jee utte." 
Luke9:23 us ne sab se kaha, yadi koi mere peechhe ana chahe, to apane ap se inkar kare aur prati din apana kroos uttaae huae mere peechhe ho le." 
Luke9:24 kyonaki jo koi apana praan bachana chahega vah use khoaega, parantu jo koi mere liy apana praan khoaega vahee use bachaaega." 
Luke9:25 yaadi manushy sare jagat ko praapt kare, aur apana praan kho de, ya us kee hani uttaa, to use kya labh hoga?" 
Luke9:26 jo koi mujh se aur meree baton se lajaaega manushy ka putra bhee jab apanee, aur apane pita kee, aur paavitra svarga dooton kee, maahima saahit aaega, to us se lajaaega." 
Luke9:27 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jo yahan khde haai, un men se koi koi aeese haain ki jab tak parameshvar ka rajy n dekh le, tab tak mratyu ka svad n chakhenge." 
Luke9:28 in baton ke koi att din bad vah pataras aur yoohanna aur yakoob ko sath lekar praarthna karane ke liye pahad par gaya. 
Luke9:29 jab vah praarthna kar hee raha tha, to usake chehare ka roop badal gaya: aur usaka vasr shvet hokar chamakane laga." 
Luke9:30 aur dekho, moosa aur aeliyyah, ye do puroosh usake sath baten kar rahe the." 
Luke9:31 ye maahima saahit dikhai diae aur usake marane kee charcha kar rahe the, jo yarooshalem men honavala tha." 
Luke9:32 pataras aur usake sathee neend se bhre the, aur jab achchhee tarah sachet hua, to us kee mahima aur un do purooshaen ko, jo usake sath khde the, dekha." 
Luke9:33 jab ve usake pas se jane lage, to pataras ne yeeshu se kaha he svamee, hamara yahan rahana bhla haai: so ham teen mandp banaae, aek tere liye, aek moosa ke liye, aur aek aeliyyah ke liye. vah janata n tha, ki kya kah raha haai." 
Luke9:34 vah yah kah hee raha tha, ki aek badal ne akar unhen chha liya, aur jab ve us badal se ghairane lage, to dr gaae." 
Luke9:35 aur us badal men se yah shabd nikala, ki yah mera putra aur mera chuna hua haai, is kee suno." 
Luke9:36 yah shabd hote hee yeeshu akela paya gaya: aur ve chup rahe, aur kuchh dekha tha, us kee koi bat un dinon men kisee se n kahee.." 
Luke9:37 aur doosare din jab ve pahad se utare, to aek badee bheed us se a milee." 
Luke9:38 aur dekho, bheed men se aek manushy ne chilla kar kaha, he guro, maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, ki mere putra par krapadrashtti kara kyonaki vah mera aekalauta haai." 
Luke9:39 aur dek, aek dushttatma use pakadta haai, aur vah aekaaek chilla uttta haai aur vah use aeesa marodta haai, ki vah munh men faen bhr lata haai aur use kuchalakar kaattnaiai se chhodta haai." 
Luke9:40 aur maai ne tere chelon se binatee kee, ki use nikalen parantu ve n nikal sake." 
Luke9:41 yeeshu n uttr diya, he aavishvasee aur haattlai logo, maain kab tak tumhare sath rahoonga, aur tumharee sahoonga? apane putra ko yahan le a." 
Luke9:42 vah a hee raha tha ki dushttatma ne use pattkakar maroda, parantu yeeshu ne ashuuddh atma ko dantta aur lakade ko achchha karake usake pita ko saunp diya." 
Luke9:43 tab sab log parameshvar ke mahasamarth se chaakit hue.. 
Luke9:44 parantu jab sab log un sab kamon se jo vah karata tha, achambha kar rahe the, to us ne apane chelon se kaha ye baten tumhare kanon men padee rahe, kyonki manushy ka putra manushyon ke hath men pakadvaya jane ko haai." 
Luke9:45 parantu ve is bat ko n samajhte the, aur yah un se chhpaiee rahee ki ve use janane n paae, aur ve is bat ke vishay men us se poochhne se drate the.." 
Luke9:46 fir un men yah vivad hone laga, ki ham men se bada kaun haai?" 
Luke9:47 par yeeshu ne un ke man ka vichar jan liya: aur aek balak ko lekar apane pas khda kiya. 
Luke9:48 aur un se kaha jo koi mere nam se is balak ko grahan karata haai, vah mujhe grahan karata haai, vah mere bhejanevale ko grahan karata haai kyonki jo tum men sab se chhotte se chhotta haai, vahee bada haai." 
Luke9:49 tab yuhanna ne kaha, he svamee, ham ne aek manushy ko tere nam se dushttatmaon ko nikalate dekha, aur ham ne use mana kiya, kayonaki vah hamare sath hokar tere peechhe naheen ho leta." 
Luke9:50 yeeshu ne us se kaha, use mana mat karo kyonki jo tumhare virodha men nahee, vah tumharee or haai.." 
Luke9:51 jab usake upar uttaae jane ke din poore hone par the, jo us ne yarooshalem ko jane ka vichar draddh kiya." 
Luke9:52 aur us ne apane age doot bheje: ve samaariyon ke aek ganv men gaa, ki usake liye jagah taaiyar karen." 
Luke9:53 parantu un logon ne use utarane n diya, kyonaki vah yarooshalem ko ja raha tha." 
Luke9:54 yah dekhkar usake chele yakoob aur yoohanna ne kaha he prabhu kya too chahata haai, ki ham agyaa de, ki akash se ag girakar unhen bhsm kar de." 
Luke9:55 parantu us ne firakar unhen dantta aur kaha, tum naheen janate ki tum kaaisee atma ke ho." 
Luke9:56 kyonaki manushy ka putra logon ke praanon ko nash karane naheen baran bachane ke liye aya haai: aur ve kisee aur ganv men chale gaae.. 
Luke9:57 jab ve marga men chale jate the, to kisee n us se kaha, jahan jahan too jaaega, maain tere peechhe ho loonga." 
Luke9:58 yeeshu ne us se kaha, lomadiyon ke bhtt aur akash ke paakshiayon ke basere hote haai, par manushy ke putra ko sir dharane kee bhee jagah naheen." 
Luke9:59 us ne doosare se kaha, mere peechhe ho le us ne kaha he prabhu, mujhe pahile jane de ki apane pita ko gad doon." 
Luke9:60 us ne us se kaha, mare huon ko apane murade gadne de, par too jakar parameshvar ke rajy kee katha suna." 
Luke9:61 aek aur ne bhee kaha he prabhu, maain tere peechhe ho loonga par paahile mujhe jane de ki apane ghar ke logon se vida ho aun." 
Luke9:62 yeeshu ne us se kaha jo koi apana hath har par rakhkar peechhe dekhta haai, vah parameshvar ke rajy ke yogy naheen.." 
Luke10:1 aur in baton ke bad prabhu ne sattr aur manushy niyukt kiae aur jis jis nagar aur jagah ko vah ap jane par tha, vahan unhen do do karake apane age bheja." 
Luke10:2 aur us ne un se kaha pakke khet bahut haain parantu majadoor thode haain: isaliye khet ke svamee se binatee karo, ki vah apane khet kattne ko majadoor bhej de." 
Luke10:3 jao dekhon maain tumhen bhedon kee nain bheadyaien ke beech men bhejata hoon. 
Luke10:4 isaliye n battua, n jholee, n joote lo aur n marga men kisee ko namaskar karo." 
Luke10:5 jis kisee ghar men jao, pahile kaho, ki is ghar par kalyan ho." 
Luke10:6 yaadi vahan koi kalyan ke yogy hoga to tumhara kalyan us par ttharega, naheen to tumhare pas lautt aaega." 
Luke10:7 usee ghar men raho, aur jo kuchh un se mile, vahee khao peeo, kyonki majadoor ko apanee majadooree milanee chahie: ghar ghar n firana." 
Luke10:8 aur jis nagar men jao, aur vahan ke log tumhen utare, to to kuchh tumhare samhane rakha jaae vahee khao." 
Luke10:9 vahan ke beemaron ko changa karo: aur un se kaho, ki parameshvar ka rajy tumhare nikatt a pahuncha haai." 
Luke10:10 parantu jis nagar men jao, aur vahan ke log tumhen grahan n kare, to usake bajaron men jakar kaho." 
Luke10:11 ki tumhare nagar kee dhool bhee, jo hamare panvon men lagee haai, ham tumhare samhane jhad dete haai, taubhee yah jan lo, ki parameshvar ka rajy tumhare nikatt a pahuncha haai." 
Luke10:12 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki us din us nagar kee dasha se sadom kee dasha sahane yogy hogee." 
Luke10:13 hay khurajeen! hay baaitasaaida! jo samarth ke kam tum men kiae gaa, yaadi ve soor aur saaida men kiae jate, to ttatt oddhkar aur rakh men baaittkar ve kab ke man firate." 
Luke10:14 parantu nyay ke din tumharee dasha se soor aur saaida kee dasha sahane yogy hogee. 
Luke10:15 aur he kafaranahoom, kya too svarga tak uncha kiya jaaega? too to adhaelok tak neeche jaaega." 
Luke10:16 jo tumharee sunata haai, vah meree sunata haai, aur jo tumhen tuchchh janata haai, vah mujhe tuchchh janata haai aur jo mujhe tuchchh janata haai, vah mere bhejanevale ko tuchchh janata haai." 
Luke10:17 ve sattr anand se fir akar kahane lage, he prabhu, tere nam se dushttatma bhee hamare vash men haai." 
Luke10:18 us ne un se kaha maain shautan ko bijalee kee nai svarga se gira hua dekh raha tha. 
Luke10:19 dekho, maaine tumhe sanpon aur bichchhuon ko raundane ka, aur shatra kee saree samarth par adhaikar diya haai aur kisee vastu se tumhen kuchh haani n hogee." 
Luke10:20 taubhee is se anaandait mat ho, ki atma tumhare vash men haai, parantu is se anandait ho ki tumhare nam svarga par likhe haain.." 
Luke10:21 usee ghadee vah pavitra atma men hokar anand se bhr gaya, aur kaha he pita, svarga aur prathvee ke prabhu, maain tera dhanyavad karata hoo, ki too ne in baton ko gyaaaniyon aur samajhdaron se chhpai rakha, aur balakon par pragatt kiya: ha, he pit, kyonaki tujhe yahee achchha laga." 
Luke10:22 mere pita ne mujhe sab kuchh saunp diya haai aur koi naheen janata ki putra kaun haai keval pita aur pita kaun haai yah bhee koi naheen janata, keval putra ke aur vah jis par putra use prakatt karana chahe." 
Luke10:23 aur chelon kee or firakar nirale men kaha, dhany haain ve ankhe, jo ye bate jo tum dekhte ho dekhtee haain." 
Luke10:24 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki bahut se bhavishyadvktaon aur rajaon ne chaha, ki jo baten tum dekhte ho dekhen par n dekheen aur jo baten tum sunate ho sune, par n suneen.." 
Luke10:25 aur dekho, aek vyavasthapak utta aur yah kahakar, us kee pareeksha karane laga ki he guro, anant jeevan ka varis hone ke liye maain kya karoon?" 
Luke10:26 us ne us se kaha ki vyavastha men kya likha haai? too kaaise paddhta haai? 
Luke10:27 us ne uttr diya, ki too prabhu apane parameshvar se apane sare man aur apane sare praan aur apanee saree shaaktai aur apanee saree buaddh ike sath praem rakh aur apane padosee se apane saman praem rakh." 
Luke10:28 us ne us se kaha, too ne tteek uttr diya haai, yahee kara: to too jeevit rahega." 
Luke10:29 parantu us ne apanee tain dharmee ttharane kee ichchha se yeeshu se poochha, to mera padosee kaun haai?" 
Luke10:30 yeeshu ne uttr diya ki aek manushy yarooshalem se yareeho ko ja raha tha, ki dakuon ne ghorakar usake kapade utar lia, aur marapeettkar use adhamooa chhodkar chale gaae." 
Luke10:31 aur aeesa hua ki usee marga se aek yajak ja raha tha: parantu use dekh ke katarakar chala gaya. 
Luke10:32 isee reeti se aek levee us jagah par aya, vah bhee use dekh ke katarakar chala gaya." 
Luke10:33 parantu aek samaree yatraee vahan a nikala, aur use dekhkar taras khaya." 
Luke10:34 aur usake pas akar aur usake ghaavon par tel aur dakhras dalakar pattiyan bandhae, aur apanee savaree par chaddhakar saray men le gaya, aur us kee seva tthal kee." 
Luke10:35 doosare din us ne do dinar nikalakar bhattyaiare ko dia, aur kaha is kee seva tthal karana, aur jo kuchh tera aur lagega, vah maain lauttne par tujhe bhr doonga." 
Luke10:36 ab meree samajh men jo dakuon men ghair gaya tha, in teenon men se usaka padosee kaun tthara?" 
Luke10:37 us ne kaha, vahee jis ne us par taras khaya: yeeshu ne us se kaha, ja, too bhee aeesa hee kara.." 
Luke10:38 fir jab ve ja rahe the, to vah aee ganv men gaya, aur martha nam aek sree ne use apane ghar men utara." 
Luke10:39 aur maariyam nam us kee aek baahin thee vah prabhu ke panvon ke pas baaittkar usaka vachan sunatee thee. 
Luke10:40 par martha seva karate karate ghabara gai aur usake pas akar kahane lagee he prabhu, kya tujhe kuchh bhee soch naheen ki meree baahin ne mujhe seva karane ke liye akelee hee chhod diya haai? so us se kah, ki meree sahayata kare." 
Luke10:41 prabhu ne use uttr diya, martha, he martha too bahut baton ke liye chinta karatee aur ghabaratee haai." 
Luke10:42 parantu aek bat avashy haai, aur us uttm bhag ko mariyam ne chun liya haai: jo us se chheena n jaaega.." 
Luke11:1 fir vah kisee jagah praarthna kar raha tha: aur jab vah praarthna kar chuka, to usake chelon men se aek ne us se kaha he prabhu, jaaise yoohanna ne apane chelon ko praarthna karana sikhlaya vaaise hee hamen bhee too sikha de." 
Luke11:2 us ne un se kaha jab tum praarthna karo, to kaho he pita, tera nam pavitra mana jaa, tera rajy ae." 
Luke11:3 hamaree din bhr kee rottee har din hamen diya kara. 
Luke11:4 aur hamare papon ko kshama kar, kyonki ham bhee apane har aek aparadhaee ko kshama karate haai, aur hamen pareeksha men n la.." 
Luke11:5 aur us ne un se kaha, tum men se kaun haai ki usaka aek mitra ho, aur vah adhaee rat ko usake pas akar us se kahe, ki he mitra mujhe teen rottyaian de." 
Luke11:6 kyonaki aek yatraee mitra mere pas aya haai, aur usake age rakhne ke liye mere pas kuchh naheen haai." 
Luke11:7 aur vah bheetar se uttr de, ki mujhe dukh n de ab to dar band haai, aur mere balak mere pas bichhaune par haai, isaaliye maain uttkar tujhe de naheen sakata?" 
Luke11:8 maain tum se kahata hoo, yadi usaka mitra hone par bhee use uttkar n de, taubhee usake lajja chhodkar mangane ke karan use jitanee avashyakata ho utanee uttkar dega." 
Luke11:9 aur maain tum se kahata hoon ki mango, to tumhen diya jaaega ddoonddhon to tum paoge khttkhttao, to tumhare liye khola jaaega." 
Luke11:10 kyonaki jo koi mangata haai, use milata haai aur jo ddoonddhta haai, vah pata haai aur jo khttkhttata haai, usake liye khola jaaega." 
Luke11:11 tum men se aeesa kaun pita hoga, ki jab usaka putra rottee mange, to use patthr de: ya machhlee mange, to machhlee ke badale use sanp de?" 
Luke11:12 ya anda mange to use bichchoo de? 
Luke11:13 so jab tum bure hokar apane ladkebalon ko achchhee vastuaee dena janate ho, to svargeey pita apane manganevalon ko pavitra atma kyon n dega.." 
Luke11:14 fir us ne aek goongee dushttatma ko nikala: jab dushttatma nikal gai, to goonga bolane laga aur logon ne achambha kiya." 
Luke11:15 parantu un men se kitanon ne kaha, yah to shautan nam dushttatmaon ke pradhaan kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata haai." 
Luke11:16 auron ne us kee pareeksha karane ke liye us se akash ka aek chinh manga. 
Luke11:17 parantu us ne, un ke man kee baten janakar, un se kaha jis jis rajy men foott hotee haai, vah rajy ujad jata haai: aur jis ghar men foott hotee haai, vah nash ho jata haai." 
Luke11:18 aur yaadi shautan apana hee virodhaee ho jaa, to usaka rajy kyonkar bana rahega? kyonaki tum mere vishay men to kahate ho, ki yah shautan kee sahayata se dushttatma nikalata haai." 
Luke11:19 bhla yadi maain shautan kee sahayata se dushttatmaon ko nikalata hoo, to tumharee santan kis kee sahayata se nikalate haain? isaliye ve hee tumhara nyay chukaaenge." 
Luke11:20 parantu yadi maain parameshvar kee samarth se dushttatmaon ko nikalata hoo, to parameshvar ka rajy tumhare pas a pahuncha." 
Luke11:21 jab balavant manushy hathaiyar bandho huae apane ghar kee rakhvalee karata haai, to us kee sanpati bachee rahatee haai." 
Luke11:22 par jab us se baddhkar koi aur balavant chaddhai karake use jeet leta haai, to usake ve haathaiyar jin par usaka bhrosa tha, chheen leta haai aur us kee sanpaati loottkar bantt deta haai." 
Luke11:23 jo mere sath naheen battorata vah bithrata haai. 
Luke11:24 jab ashuuddh atma manushy men se nikal jatee haai to sookhee jagahon men vishraam ddoonddhtee firatee haai aur jab naheen patee to kahatee haai ki maain apane usee ghar men jahan se nikalee thee lautt jaungee. 
Luke11:25 aushra akar use jhada-buhara aur saja-sajaya patee haai. 
Luke11:26 tab vah akar apane se aur buree sat atmaon ko apane sath le atee haai, aur ve us men paaittkar vas karatee haai, aur us manushy kee pichhlee dasha paahile se bhee buree ho jatee haai.." 
Luke11:27 jab vah ye baten kah hee raha tha to bheed men se kisee sree ne unche shabd se kaha, dhany vah garbh jis men too raha aur ve stan, jo too ne choose." 
Luke11:28 us ne kaha, han parantu dhany ve haai, jo parameshvar ka vachan sunate aur manate haain.." 
Luke11:29 jab badee bheed ikatthee hotee jatee thee to vah kahane laga ki is yug ke log bure haain ve chinh ddoonddhte haain par yoonus ke chinh ko chhod koi aur chinh unhen n diya jaaega. 
Luke11:30 jaaisa yoonus neenave ke logon ke liye chinh tthara, vaaisa hee manushy ka putra bhee is yug ke logon ke liye ttharega." 
Luke11:31 daakkhian kee ranee nyay ke din is samay ke manushyon ke sath uttkar, unhen doshaee ttharaaegee, kyonaki vah sulaaiman ka gyaan sunane ko prathvee kee chhor se ai, aur dekho yahan vah haai jo sulaaiman se bhee bada haai." 
Luke11:32 neenave ke log nyay ke din is samay ke logon ke sath khde hokar, unhen doshaee ttharaaenge kyonaki unhon ne yoonus ka prachar sunakar man firaya aur dekho, yahan vah haai, jo yoonus se bhee bada haai.." 
Luke11:33 koi manushy deeya bar ke talaghare me, ya paaimane ke neeche naheen rakhta, parantu deevatt par rakhta haai ki bheetar anevale ujiyala paaen." 
Luke11:34 tere shareer ka deeya teree ankh haai, isaliye jab teree ankh nirmal haai, to tera sara shareer bhee ujiyala haai parantu jab vah buree haai, to tera shareer bhee andhora haai." 
Luke11:35 isaliye chaukas rahana, ki jo ujiyala tujh men haai vah andhora n ho jaae." 
Luke11:36 isaliye yaadi tera sara shareer ujiyala ho, or usaka koi bhag andhora n rahe, to sab ka sab aeesa uliyala hoga, jaaisa us samay hota haai, jab deeya apanee chamak se tujhe ujala deta haai.." 
Luke11:37 jab vah baten kar raha tha, to kisee fareesee ne us se binatee kee, ki mere yahan bhejan kara aur vah bheetar jakar bhojan karane baaitta." 
Luke11:38 fareesee ne yah dekhkar achambha diya ki us ne bhojan karane se paahile snan naheen kiya. 
Luke11:39 prabhu ne us se kaha, he fareesiyo, tum kattore aur thalee ko upar upar to manjate ho, parantu tumhare bheetar andhor aur dushttta bhree haai." 
Luke11:40 he nirbuaddhyaie, jis ne bahar ka bhag banaya, kya us ne bheetar ka bhag naheen banaya?" 
Luke11:41 parantu ha, bheetaravalee vastuon ko dan kar do, to dekho, sab kuchh tumhare liye shuuddh ho jaaega.." 
Luke11:42 par he fareesiyo, tum par hay! tum podeene aur sudab ka, aur sab bhanati ke saga-pat ka dasavan ansh dete ho, parantu nyay ko aur parameshvar ke praem ko ttal dete ho: chahiae to tha ki inhen bhee karate rahate aur unhen bhee n chhodte." 
Luke11:43 he fareesiyo, tum par hay! tum aradhanalayon men mukhy mukhy asan aur bajaron men namaskar chahate ho." 
Luke11:44 hay tum par! kyonki tum un chhpaiee kabraen ke saman ho, jin par log chalate haai, parantu naheen janate.." 
Luke11:45 tab aek vyavasthapak ne us ko uttr diya, ki he guro, in baton ke kahane se too hamaree ninda karata haai." 
Luke11:46 us ne kaha he vyavasthapako, tum par bhee hay! tum aeese bojh jin ko uttana kattnai haai, manushyon par ladate ho parantu tum ap un bojhon ko apanee ek ungalee se bhee naheen choote." 
Luke11:47 hay tum par! tum un bhvishyadvktaon kee kabraen banate ho, jinhen tumhare bapa-dadon ne mar dala tha." 
Luke11:48 so tum gavah ho, aur apane bapa-dadon ke kamon men sammat ho kyonaki unhon ne to unhen mar dala aur tum un kee kabraen banate ho." 
Luke11:49 isaliye parameshvar kee buaddh ine bhee kaha haai, ki maain un ke pas bhavishyadvktaon aur praeariton ko bhejoongee: aur ve un men se kitanon ko mar dalenge, aur kitanon ko sataaenge." 
Luke11:50 taaki jitane bhvishyadvktaon ka lohoo jagat kee utpati se bahaya gaya haai, sab ka lekha, is yug ke logon se liya jaae." 
Luke11:51 habeel kee hatya se lekar jakarayah kee hatya tak jo vedee aur maandair ke beech men ghaat kiya gaya: maain tum se sach kahata hoon usaka lekha isee samay ke logon se liya jaaega. 
Luke11:52 hay tum vyavasthapakon par! ki tum ne gyaan kee kunjee le to lee, parantu tum ne apahee pravesh naheen kiya, aur pravesh karanevalon ko bhee rok diya." 
Luke11:53 jab vah vahan se nikala, to shaasree aur fareesee bahut peechhe pad gaae aur chhedne lage, ki vah bahut see baton kee charcha kare." 
Luke11:54 aur us kee ghaat men lage rahe, ki usake munh kee koi bat pakaden.." 
Luke12:1 itane men jab hajaron kee bheed lag gai, yahan tak ki aek doosare par gire padte the, to vah sab se paahile apane chelon se kahane laga, ki fareeasiyon ke kapattroopee khmeer se chaukas rahana." 
Luke12:2 kuchh ddhpa nahee, jo khola n jaaega aur n kuchh chhpai haai, jo jana n jaaega." 
Luke12:3 isaliye jo kuchh tum ne andhore men kaha haai, vah ujane men suna jaaega: aur jo tum ne kottariyon men kanon kan kaha haai, vah kotton par prachar kiya jaaega." 
Luke12:4 parantu maain tum se jo mere mitra ho kahata hoo, ki jo shareer ko ghaat karate haain parantu usake peechhe aur kuchh naheen kar sakate un se mat dro." 
Luke12:5 maain tumhen chitata hoon ki tumhen kis se drana chahia, ghaat karate ke bad jis ko narak men dalane ka aadhaikar haai, usee se dro: baran maain tum se kahata hoon usee se dro." 
Luke12:6 kya do paaise kee panch gauraaiyan naheen bikatee? taubhee parameshvar un men se aek ko bhee naheen boolata. 
Luke12:7 baran tumhare sir ke sab bal bhee gine huae haai, so dro nahee, tum bahut gauraaiyon se baddhkar ho." 
Luke12:8 maain tum se kahata hoon jo koi manushyon ke samhane mujhe man lega use manushy ka putra bhee parameshvar ke svargadooton ke samahane man lega. 
Luke12:9 parantu jo manushyon ke samhane mujhe inkar kare usaka parameshvar ke svargadooton ke samhane inkar kiya jaaega. 
Luke12:10 jo koi manushy ke putra ke virodha men koi bat kahe, usaka vah aparadha kshama kiya jaaega." 
Luke12:11 jab log tumhen sabhaon aur haakimon aur aadhaikaariyon ke samhane le jaae, to chinta n karana ki ham kis reeti se ya kya uttr de, ya kya kahen." 
Luke12:12 kyonaki pavitra atma usee ghadee tumhen sikha dega, ki kya kahana chaahiae.." 
Luke12:13 fir bheed men se aek ne us se kaha, he guro, mere bhai se kah, ki pita kee sanpaati mujhe bantt de." 
Luke12:14 us ne us se kaha he manushy, kis ne mujhe tumhara nyayee ya banttnevala niyukt kiya haai?" 
Luke12:15 aur us ne un se kaha, chaukas raho, aur har prakar ke lobh se apane ap ko bachaae rakho: kyonki kisee ka jeevan us kee sanpati kee bahutayat se naheen hota." 
Luke12:16 us ne un se ek drashttant kaha, ki kisee dhanavan kee boomi men badee upaj hui." 
Luke12:17 tab vah apane man men vichar karane laga, ki maain kya karoo, kyonki mere yahan jagah nahee, jahan apanee upaj ityadi rakoon." 
Luke12:18 aur us ne kaha maain yah karoonga: maain apanee bakhariyan tod kar un se badee banaunga 
Luke12:19 aur vahan apana sab ann aur sanpaati rakoonga: aur apane praan se kahoonga, ki praa, tere pas bahut vasharen ke liye bahut sanpati rakhee haai chaain kar, kha, pee, sukh se raha." 
Luke12:20 parantu parameshvar ne us se kaha he moorkh, isee rat tera praan tujh se le liya jaaega: tab jo kuchh too ne ikattha kiya haai, vah kis ka hoga?" 
Luke12:21 aeesa hee vah manushy bhee haai jo apane liye dhan battorata haai, parantu parameshvar kee drashtti men dhanee naheen.." 
Luke12:22 fir us ne apane chelon se kaha isaaliye maain tum se kahata hoo, apane praan kee chinta n karo, ki ham kya khaaenge n apane shareer kee ki kya paahinenge." 
Luke12:23 kyonaki bhojan se praa, aur vasr se shareer baddhkar haai." 
Luke12:24 kauvon par dhyan do ve n bote haai, n kattte n un ke bhndar aur n khtta hota haai taubhee parameshvar unhen palata haai tumhara mooly paakshiayon se kaheen aadhaik haai." 
Luke12:25 tum men se aeesa kaun haai, jo chinta karane se apanee avastha men aeek ghadee bhee bada sakata haai?" 
Luke12:26 isaliye yaadi tum sab se chhotta kam bhee naheen kar sakate, to aur baton ke liye kyon chinta karate ho?" 
Luke12:27 sosanon ke pedon par dhyan karo ki ve kaaise baddhte haain ve n parishram karate, n katate haain: taubhee maain tum se kahata hoo, ki sulaaiman bhee, apane sare vibhv me, un men se kisee aek ke saman vasr paahine huae n tha." 
Luke12:28 isaliye yaadi parameshvar maaidan kee ghaas ko jo aj haai, aur kar bhad men jhonkee jaaegee, aeesa paahinata haai to he alp vishvasiyo, vah tumhen kyon n pahinaaega?" 
Luke12:29 aur tum is bat kee khoj men n raho, ki kya khaaenge aur kya peeaenge, aur n sandeh karo." 
Luke12:30 kyonaki sansar kee jatiyan in sab vastuon kee khoj men rahatee haain: aur tumhara pita janata haai, ki tumhen in vastuon kee avashyakata haai." 
Luke12:31 parantu usake rajy kee khoj men raho, to ye vastuaeen bhee tumhen mil jaaengee." 
Luke12:32 he chhotte jhun, mat dra kyonaki tumhare pita ko yah bhaya haai, ki tumhen rajy de." 
Luke12:33 apanee sanpaati bechakar dan kar do aur apane liye aeese battuae banao, jo purane naheen hote, arthata svarga par aeesa dhan ikattha karo jo ghattta naheen aur jis ke nikatt chor naheen jata, aur keeda naheen bigadta." 
Luke12:34 kyonaki jahan tumhara dhan haai, vahan tumhara man bhee laga rahega.." 
Luke12:35 tumharee kamaren bandhaee rahe, aur tumhare deeye jalate rahen." 
Luke12:36 aur tum un manushyon ke saman bano, jo apane svamee kee batt dekh rahe ho, ki vah byah se kab lauttega ki jab vah akar dar khttkhttaa, ate turant usake khol den." 
Luke12:37 dhany haain ve das, jinhen svamee akar jagate paae maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki vah kamar bandha kar unhen bhojan karane ko baaittaaega, aur pas akar un kee seva karega." 
Luke12:38 yaadi vah rat ke doosare pahar ya teesare pahar men akar unhen jagate paa, to ve das dhany haain." 
Luke12:39 parantu tum yah jan rakho, ki yadi ghar ka svamee janata, ki chor kis ghadee aaega, to jagata rahata, aur apane ghar men sengha lagane n deta." 
Luke12:40 tum bhee taaiyar raho kyonki jis ghadee tum sochate bhee nahee, us ghadee manushy ka putra a javega." 
Luke12:41 tab pataras ne kaha, he prabhu, kya yah drashttant too ham hee se ya sab se kahata haai." 
Luke12:42 prabhu ne kaha vah vishvasayogy aur buaddhmaian bhndaree kaun haai, jis ka svamee use naukar chakaron par saradar ttharaae ki unhen samay par seedha de." 
Luke12:43 dhany haai vah das, jise usaka svamee akar aeesa hee karate paae." 
Luke12:44 maain tum se sach kahata hoon vah use apanee sab sanpaati par saradar ttharaaega. 
Luke12:45 parantu yadi vah das sochane lage, ki mera svamee ane men der kar raha haai, aur dason aur daasiyon ko marane peettne aur khane peene aur piyakkad hone lage." 
Luke12:46 to us das ka svamee aeese din ki vah us kee batt jahata n rahe, aur aeesee ghadee jise vah janata n ho aaega, aur use bharee tadna dekar usaka bhag avishvasiyon ke sath ttharaaega." 
Luke12:47 aur vah das jo apane svamee kee ichchha janata tha, aur taaiyar n raha aur n us kee ichchha ke anusar chala bahut mar khaaega." 
Luke12:48 parantu jo naheen janakar mar khane ke yogy kam kare vah thodee mar khaaega, isaaliye jise bahut diya gaya haai, us se bahut manga jaaega, aur jise bahut saunpa gaya haai, us se bahut mangengen.." 
Luke12:49 maain prathvee par ag lagane aya hoon aur kya chahata hoon keval yah ki abhee sulag jatee! 
Luke12:50 mujhe to aek bapaatisma leta haai aur jab tak vah n ho le tab tak maain kaaisee saketee men rahoonga? 
Luke12:51 kya tum samajhte ho ki maain prathvee par milap karane aya hoon? maain kahata hoon nahee, baran alag karane aya hoon." 
Luke12:52 kyonaki ab se aek ghar men panch jan apas men virodha rakhenge, teen do se do teen se." 
Luke12:53 pita putra se, aur putra pita se virodha rakhega man bettee se, aur bettee man se, sas bahoo se, aur bahoo sas se virodha rakhegee.." 
Luke12:54 aur us ne bheed se bhee kaha, jab badal ko pachchhim se uttte dekhte ho, to turant kahate ho, ki vashara hogee aur aeesa hee hota haai." 
Luke12:55 aur jab daakkhiana chalatee dakhte ho to kahate ho, ki looh chalegee, aur aeesa hee hota haai." 
Luke12:56 he kapattyaie, tum dharatee aur akash ke roop men bhed kar sakate ho, parantu is yug ke vishay men kyon bhed karana naheen janate?" 
Luke12:57 aur tum ap hee nirny kyon naheen kar lete, ki uchit kya haai?" 
Luke12:58 jab too apane mui ke sath haakim ke pas ja raha haai, to marga hee men us se choottne ka yatn kar le aeesa n ho, ki vah tujhe nyayee ke pas kheench le jaa, aur nyayee tujhe pyade ko saunpe aur pyada tujhe bandeegrah men dal de." 
Luke12:59 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jab tak too damadee damadee bhr n dega tab tak vahan se choottne n paaega.." 
Luke13:1 us samay kuchh log a pahunche, aur us se un galeeliyon kee charcha karane lage, jin ka lohoo peelatus ne un hee ke baalidanon ke sath milaya tha." 
Luke13:2 yah sun us ne un se uttr men yah kaha, kya tum samajhte ho, ki ye galeelee, aur sab galeealiyon se papee the ki un par aeesee vipaati padee?" 
Luke13:3 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki naheen parantu yaadi tum man n firaoge to tum sab bhee isee reeti se nash hoge." 
Luke13:4 ya kya tum samajhte ho, ki ve attarah jan jin par shaeeloh ka gummatt gira, aur ve dab kar mar gaae: yarooshalem ke aur sab rahanevalon se aadhaik aparadhaee the?" 
Luke13:5 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki naheen parantu yaadi tum man n firaoge to tum bhee sab isee reeti se nash hoge." 
Luke13:6 fir us ne yah drashttant bhee kaha, ki kisee kee angoor kee baree men aek anjeer ka ped laga hua tha: vah us men fal ddoonddhne aya, parantu n paya." 
Luke13:7 tab us ne baree ke rakhvale se kaha, dekh teen varsha se maain is anjeer ke ped men fal ddoonddhne ata hoo, parantu naheen pata, ise katt dal ki yah boomi ko bhee kyon roke rahe." 
Luke13:8 us ne us ko uttr diya, ki he svamee, ise is varsha to aur rahane de ki maain is ke charo or khodakar khad daloon." 
Luke13:9 so age ko fale to bhla, naheen to use katt dalana." 
Luke13:10 sabt ke din vah aek aradhanalay men upadesh kar raha tha.. 
Luke13:11 aur dekho, aek sree thee, jise attarah varsha se aek durbal karanevalee dushttatma lagee thee, aur vah kubadee ho gai thee, aur kisee reeati se seedhaee naheen ho sakatee thee." 
Luke13:12 yeeshu ne use dekhkar bulaya, aur kaha he naree, too apanee durbalata se choott gai." 
Luke13:13 tab us ne us par hath rakhe, aur vah turant seedhaee ho gai, aur parameshvar kee badai karane lagee." 
Luke13:14 isaliye ki yeeshu ne sabt ke din use achchha kiya tha, aradhanalay ka saradar risiyakar logon se kahane laga, chh: din haai, jin men kam karana chahia, so un hee dinon men akar change hoo parantu sabt ke din men naheen." 
Luke13:15 yah sun kar prabhu ne uttr dekar kaha he kapattyaie, kya sabt ke din tum men se har aek apane baail ya gadahe ko than se kholakar panee pilane naheen le jata?" 
Luke13:16 aur kya uchit n tha, ki yah sree jo ibraaheem kee bettee haai jise shautan ne attarah varsha se bandha rakha tha, sabt ke din is bandhan se chhudai jatee?" 
Luke13:17 jab us ne ye baten kahee, to usake sab virodhaee lajjait ho gaa, aur saree bheed un maahima ke kamon se jo vah karata tha, anaandait hui.." 
Luke13:18 fir us ne kaha, parameshvar ka rajy kis ke saman haai? aur maain us kee upama kis se doon?" 
Luke13:19 vah rai ke aek dane ke saman haai, jise kisee manushy ne lekar apanee baree men boya: aur vah baddhkar ped ho gaya aur akash ke paakshiayon ne us kee daliyon par basera kiya." 
Luke13:20 us ne fir kaha maain parameshvar ke rajy ki upama kis se doon? 
Luke13:21 vah khmeer ke saman haai, jis ko kisee sree ne lekar teen paseree atte men milaya, aur hote hote sab atta khmeer ho gaya.." 
Luke13:22 vah nagar nagar, aur ganv ganv hokar upadesh karata hua yarooshalem kee or ja raha tha." 
Luke13:23 aur kisee ne us se poochha he prabhu, kya uddhar panevale thode haain?" 
Luke13:24 us ne un se kaha saket dar se pravesh karane ka yatn karo, kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki bahutere pravesh karana chahenge, aur n kar sakenge." 
Luke13:25 jab ghar ka svamee uttkar dar band kar chuka ho, aur tum bahar khde huae dar khttkhttakar kahane lago, he prabhu, hamare liye khol de, aur vah uttr de ki maain tumhen naheen janata, tum kahan ke ho?" 
Luke13:26 tab tum kahane lagoge, ki ham ne tere samhane khaya peeya aur too ne hamare bajaron men upadesh kiya." 
Luke13:27 parantu vah kahega, maain tum se kahata hoo, maain naheen janata tum kahan ke ho, he kukarma karanevalo, tum sab mujh se dur ho." 
Luke13:28 vahan rona aur dant peesana hoga: jab tum ibraaheem aur isahak aur yakoob aur sab bhvishyadvktaon ko parameshvar ke rajy men baaitte, aur apane ap ko bahar nikale huae dekhoge." 
Luke13:29 aur poorva aur paachchhima uttr aur dakkhian se log akar parameshvar ke rajy ke bhoj men bhagee honge. 
Luke13:30 aur dekho, kitane pichhle haain ve prathm honge, aur kitane jo prathm haai, ve pichhle honge.." 
Luke13:31 usee ghadee kitane fareeasiyo ne akar us se kaha, yahan se nikalakar chala ja kyonki herodes tujhe mar dalana chahata haai." 
Luke13:32 us ne un se kaha jakar us lomadee se kah do, ki dekh maain aj aur kal dushttatmaon ko nikalata aur bimaron ko changa karata hoon aur teesare din poora karoonga." 
Luke13:33 taubhee mujhe aj aur kal aur parason chalana avashy haai, kyonki ho nahee sakata ki koi bhavishyadvkta yarooshalem ke bahar mara jaae." 
Luke13:34 he yarooshalem! he yarooshalem! too jo bhavishyadvktaon ko mar dalatee haai, aur jo tere pas bheje gaae unhen patthravah karatee haai kitanee bar maain ne yah chaha, ki jaaise murgee apane bachchon ko apane pankho ke neeche ikatthe karatee haai, vaaise hee maain bhee tere balakon ko ikatthe karoo, par tum ne yah n chaha." 
Luke13:35 dekho, tumhara ghar tumhare liye ujad chhoda jata haai, aur maain tum se kahata hoon jab tak tum ne kahoge, ki dhany haai vah, jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai, tab tak tum mujhe fir kabhee n dekhoge.." 
Luke14:1 fir vah sabt ke din fareeasiyon ke saradaron men se kisee ke ghar men rottee khane gaya: aur ve us kee ghaat men the. 
Luke14:2 aur dekho, aek manushy usake samhane tha, jise jalandhar ka rog tha." 
Luke14:3 is par yeeshu ne vyavasthapakon aur fareeasiyon se kaha kya sabt ke din achchha karana uchit haai, ki naheen? parantu ve chupachap rahe." 
Luke14:4 tab us ne use hath laga kar changa kiya, aur jane diya." 
Luke14:5 aur un se kaha ki tum men se aeesa kaun haai, jis ka gadaha ya baail kuaen men gir jaae aur vah sabt ke din use turant bahar n nikal le?" 
Luke14:6 ve in baton ka kuchh uttr n de sake..
