Luke14:7 jab us ne dekha, ki nevataharee log kyonkar mukhy mukhy jagahen chun lete haain to aek drashttant dekar un se kaha." 
Luke14:8 jab koi tujhe byah men bulaa, to mukhy jagah men n baaittna, kaheen aeesa n ho, ki us ne tujh se bhee kisee bade ko nevata diya ho." 
Luke14:9 aur jis ne tujhe aur use donon ko nevata diya haai: akar tujh se kahe, ki is ko jagah de, aur tab tujhe lajjait hokar sab se neechee jagah men baaittna pade." 
Luke14:10 par jab too bulaya jaa, to sab se neechee jagah ja baait, ki jab vah, jis ne tujhe nevata diya haai aa, to tujh se kahe ki he mitra, age baddhkar baaitt tab tere sath baaittnevalon ke samhane teree badai hogee." 
Luke14:11 aur jo koi apane ap ko bada banaaega, vah chhotta kiya jaaega aur jo koi apane ap ko chhotta banaaega, vah bada kiya jaaega.." 
Luke14:12 tab us ne apane nevata denevale se bhee kaha, jab too din ka ya rat ka bhoj kare, to apane mitraen ya bhaiyon ya kuttuambaiyon ya dhanavan padosiyon ko n bula, kaheen aeesa n ho, ki ve bhee tujhe nevata de, aur tera badala ho jaae." 
Luke14:13 parantu jab too bhoj kare, to kangalo, ttundo, langadon aur andhaen ko bula." 
Luke14:14 tab too dhany hoga, kyonaki un ke pas tujhe badala dene ko kuchh nahee, parantu tujhe dharmiyon ke jee uttne par is ka praatifal milega." 
Luke14:15 usake sath bhojan karanevalon men se ek ne ye baten sunakar us se kaha, dhany haai vah, jo parameshvar ke rajy men rottee khaegaa." 
Luke14:16 us ne us se kaha kisee manushy ne badee jevanar kee aur bahuton ko bulaya. 
Luke14:17 jab bhojan taaiyar ho gaya, to us ne apane das ke hath nevatahariyon ko kahala bheja, ki ao ab bhojan taaiyar haai." 
Luke14:18 par ve sab ke sab kshama mangane lage, pahile ne us se kaha, maain ne khet mol liya haai aur avashy haai ki use dekoon: maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, mujhe kshama kara de." 
Luke14:19 doosare ne kaha, maain ne panch jode baail mol liae haain: aur unhen parakhne jata hoon: maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, mujhe kshama kara de." 
Luke14:20 aek aur ne kaha maai ne byah kiya haai, isaaliye maain naheen a sakata." 
Luke14:21 us das ne akar apane svamee ko ye baten kah sunai, tab ghar ke svamee ne krodha men akar apane das se kaha, nagar ke bajaron aur galiyon men turant jakar kangalo, ttundo, langadon aur andhaen ko yahan le ao." 
Luke14:22 das ne fir kaha he svamee, jaaise too ne kaha tha, vaaise hee kiya gaya haai fir bhee jagah haai." 
Luke14:23 svamee ne das se kaha, sadkon par aur badon kee or jakar logon ko barabas le hee a taaki mera ghar bhr jaae." 
Luke14:24 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki un nevate huon men se koi meree jevanar ko n chakhega." 
Luke14:25 aur jab badee bheed usake sath ja rahee thee, to us ne peechhe firakar un se kaha." 
Luke14:26 yaadi koi mere pas aa, aur apane pita aur mata aur patnee aur ladkebalon aur bhaiyon aur baahinon baran apane praan ko bhee aapiry n jane, to vah mera chela naheen ho sakata." 
Luke14:27 aur jo koi apana kroos n uttaae aur mere peechhe n aae vah bhee mera chela naheen ho sakata. 
Luke14:28 tum men se kaun haai ki gaddh banana chahata ho, aur paahile baaittkar khrcha n jode, ki poora karane kee bisat mere pas haai ki naheen?" 
Luke14:29 kaheen aeesa n ho, ki jab nev dalakar taaiyar n kar sake, to sab dekhnevale yah kahakar use tttthon men udane lagen." 
Luke14:30 ki yah manushy banane to laga, par taaiyar n kar saka?" 
Luke14:31 ya kaun aeesa raja haai, ki doosare raja se yuddh karane jata ho, aur paahile baaittkar vichar n kar le ki jo bees hajar lekar usaka samhana kar sakata hoo, ki naheen?" 
Luke14:32 naheen to usake door rahate hee, vah dooton ko bhejakar milap karana chahega." 
Luke14:33 isee reeti se tum men se jo koi apana sab kuchh tyag n de, to vah mera chela naheen ho sakata." 
Luke14:34 namak to achchha haai, parantu yadi namak ka svad bigad jaa, to vah kis vastu se svaadishtt kiya jaaega." 
Luke14:35 vah n to boomi ke aur n khad ke liye kam men ata haai: use to log bahar faenk dete haain: jis ke sunane ke kan hon vah sun le.. 
Luke15:1 sab chungee lenevale aur papee usake pas aya karate the taki us kee sunen. 
Luke15:2 aur fareesee aur shaasree kudkudakar kahane lage, ki yah to papiyon se milata haai aur un ke sath khata bhee haai.." 
Luke15:3 tab us ne un se yah drashttant kaha. 
Luke15:4 tum men se kaun haai jis kee sau bheden ho, aur un men se aek kho jaae to ninnanave ko jangal men chhodkar, us khoi hui ko jab tak mil n jaae khojata n rahe?" 
Luke15:5 aur jab mil jatee haai, tab vah bade anand se use kandho par utta leta haai." 
Luke15:6 aur ghar men akar mitraen aur padosiyon ko ikatthe karake kahata haai, mere sath anand karo, kyonki meree khoi hui bhed mil gai haai." 
Luke15:7 maain tum se kahata hoon ki isee reeati se aek man firanevale papee ke vishay men bhee svarga men itana hee anand hoga, jitana ki ninnanave aeese dharmiyon ke vishay naheen hota, jinhen man firane kee avashyakata naheen.." 
Luke15:8 ya kaun aeesee sree hogee, jis ke pas das sikke ho, aur un men se aek kho jaae to vah deeya barakar aur ghar jhad buharakar jab tak mil n jaa, jee lagakar khojatee n rahe?" 
Luke15:9 aur jab mil jata haai, to vah apane sakhaiyon aur padosiniyon ko ikatthee karake kahatee haai, ki mere sath anand karo, kyonki mera khoya hua sikka mil gaya haai." 
Luke15:10 maain tum se kahata hoon ki isee reeati se aek man firanevale papee ke vishay men parameshvar ke svargadooton ke samhane anand hota haai.. 
Luke15:11 fir us ne kaha, kisee manushy ke do putra the." 
Luke15:12 un men se chhuttke ne pita se kaha ki he pita sanpaati men se jo bhag mera ho, vah mujhe de deejie. us ne un ko apanee sanpaati bantt dee." 
Luke15:13 aur bahut din n beete the ki chhuttka putra sab kuchh ikattha karake aek door desh ko chala gaya aur vahan kukarma men apanee sanpati uda dee. 
Luke15:14 jab vah sab kuchh khrcha kar chuka, to us desh men bada akal pada, aur vah kangal ho gaya." 
Luke15:15 aur vah us desh ke nivaasiyon men se aek ke yahana jo pada: us ne use apane kheton men sooar charane ke liye bheja. 
Luke15:16 aur vah chahata tha, ki un faliyon se jinhen sooar khate the apana pett bhre aur use koi kuchh naheen deta tha." 
Luke15:17 jab vah apane ape men aya, tab kahane laga, ki mere pita ke kitane hee majadooron ko bhojan se aadhaik rottee milatee haai, aur maain yahan bookha mar rahan hoon." 
Luke15:18 maain ab uttkar apane pita ke pas jaunga aur us se kahoonga ki pita jee maain ne svarga ke virodha men aur teree draashtti men pap kiya haai. 
Luke15:19 ab is yogy naheen raha ki tera putra kahalau, mujhe apane aek majadoor kee nain rakh le." 
Luke15:20 tab vah uttkar, apane pita ke pas chala: vah abhee door hee tha, ki usake pita ne use dekhkar taras khaya, aur daudkar use gale lagaya, aur bahut chooma." 
Luke15:21 putra n us se kaha pita jee, maain ne svarga ke virodha men aur teree draashtti men pap kiya haai aur ab is yogy naheen raha, ki tera putra kahalaun." 
Luke15:22 parantu pita ne apane dason se kaha jhtt achchhe se achchha vasr nikalakar use pahinao, aur usake hath men angoottee, aur panvon men jootiyan paahinao." 
Luke15:23 aur pala hua bachhda lakar maro taki ham khanae aur anand manaven. 
Luke15:24 kyonaki mera yah putra mar gaya tha, fir jee gaya haai: kho gay tha, ab mil gaya haai: aur ve anand karane lage." 
Luke15:25 parantu usaka jetta putra khet men tha: aur jab vah ate huae ghar ke nikatt pahuncha, to us ne gane bajane aur nachane ka shabd suna." 
Luke15:26 aur us ne aek das ko bulakar poochha yah kya ho raha haai? 
Luke15:27 us ne us se kaha, tera bhai aya haai aur tere pita ne pala hua bachhda kattvaya haai, isaaliye ki use bhla changa paya haai." 
Luke15:28 yah sunakar vah krodha se bhr gaya, aur bheetar jana n chaha: parantu usaka pita bahar akar use manane laga." 
Luke15:29 us ne pita ko uttr diya, ki dekh maain itane varsha se taree seva kar raha hoo, aur kabhee bhee teree agyaa naheen ttalee, taubhee too ne mujhe kabhee ek bakaree ka bachcha bhee n diya, ki maain apane mitraen ke sath anand karata." 
Luke15:30 parantu jab tera yah putra, jis ne teree sanpaati veshyaon men uda dee haai, aya, to usake liye too ne pala hua bachhda kattvaya." 
Luke15:31 us ne us se kaha putra, too sarvada mere sath haai aur jo kuchh mera haai vah sab tera hee haai." 
Luke15:32 parantu ab anand karana aur magan hona chahiae kyonki yah tera bhai mar gaya tha fir jee gaya haai kho gaya tha, ab mil gaya haai.." 
Luke16:1 fir us ne chelon se bhee kaha kisee dhanavan ka aek bhndaree tha, aur logon ne usake samhane us par yah dosh lagaya ki yah teree sab sanpaati udaae deta haai." 
Luke16:2 so us ne use bulakar kaha, yah kya haai jo maai tere vishay men sun raha hoon? apane bhndareepan ka lekha de kyonaki too age ko bhndaree naheen rah sakata." 
Luke16:3 tab bhndaree sochane laga, ki ab maain kya karoon? kyonki mera svamee ab bhndaree ka kam mujh se chheen le raha haai: mittee to mujh se khodee naheen jatee: aur bheekh mangane se mujhe lajja atee haai." 
Luke16:4 maain saman gaya, ki kya karoonga: taki jab maain bhndaree ke kam se chhudaya jaun to log mujhe apane gharon men le len." 
Luke16:5 aur us ne apane svamee ke denadaro men se aek aek ko bulakar pahile se poochha, ki tujh par mere svamee ka kya ata haai?" 
Luke16:6 us ne kaha, sau man tela tab us ne us se kaha, ki apanee khata-bahee le aur baaittkar turant pachas likh de." 
Luke16:7 fir doosare se poochha tujh par kya ata haai? us ne kaha, sau man gehoon tab us ne us se kaha apanee khata-bahee lekar assee likh de." 
Luke16:8 svamee ne us adharmee bhndaree ko saraha, ki us ne chaturai se kam kiya haai kyonki is sansar ke log apane samay ke logon kee reeti vyavaharon men jyoti ke logon se aadhaik chatur haain." 
Luke16:9 aur maain tum se kahata hoo, ki adharman ke dhan se apane liye mitra bana lo taki jab vah jata rahe, to ve tumhen anant nivason men le len." 
Luke16:10 jo thode se thode men sachcha haai, vah bahut men bhee sachcha haai: aur jo thode se thode men adharmee haai, vah bahut men bhee adharmee haai." 
Luke16:11 isaliye jab tum adharma ke dhan men sachche n tthare, to sachcha tumhen kaun saunpega." 
Luke16:12 aur yaadi tum paraye dhan men sachche n tthare, to jo tumhara haai, use tumhen kaun dega?" 
Luke16:13 koi das do svaamiyon kee seva naheen kar sakata: kyonaki vah to aek se baair aur doosare se praem rakhega ya aek se mil rahega aur doosare ko tuchchh janega: tum parameshvar aur dhan donon kee seva naheen kar sakate.. 
Luke16:14 fareesee jo lobhee the, ye sab baten sunakar use tttthon men udane lage." 
Luke16:15 us ne un se kaha tum to manushyon ke samhane apane ap ko dharmee ttharate ho: parantu parameshvar tumhare man ko janata haai, kyonaki jo vastu manushyon kee draashtti men mahan haai, vah parameshvar ke nikatt gharanait haai." 
Luke16:16 vyavastha aur bhavishyadvkta yoohanna tak rahe, us samay se parameshvar ke rajy ka susamachar sunaya ja raha haai, aur har koi us men prabalata se pravesh karata haai." 
Luke16:17 akash aur prathvee ka ttl jana vyavastha ke aek bindu ke mitt jane se sahaj haai. 
Luke16:18 jo koi apanee patnee ko tyagakar doosaree se byah karata haai, vah vyaabhaichar karata haai, aur jo koi aeesee tyagee hui sree se byah karata haai, vah bhee vyabhaichar karata haai." 
Luke16:19 aek dhanavan manushy tha jo baainjanee kapade aur malamal pahinata aur prati din sukh-vilas aur dhooma-dhaam ke sath rahata tha. 
Luke16:20 aur lajar nam ka aek kangal ghaavon se bhra hua us kee devaddhee par chhod diya jata tha. 
Luke16:21 aur vah chahata tha, ki dhanavan kee mej par kee joottn se apana pett bhre baran kutte bhee akar usake ghaavon ko chattte the." 
Luke16:22 aur aeesa hua ki vah kangal mar gaya, aur svargadooton ne use lekar ibraaheem kee god men pahunchaya aur vah dhanavan bhee mara aur gada gaya." 
Luke16:23 aur adhaelok men us ne peeda men pade huae apanee ankhen uttai, aur door se ibraaheem kee god men lajar ko dekha." 
Luke16:24 aur us ne pukar kar kaha, he pita ibraaheem, mujh par day karake lajar ko bhej de, taki vah apanee ungulee ka sira panee men bhaigokar meree jeebh ko ttndee kare, kyonki maain is jvaala men tadp raha hoon." 
Luke16:25 parantu ibraaheem ne kaha he putra smaran kar, ki too apane jeevan men achchhee vastuaen le chuka haai, aur vaaise hee lajar buree vastuaen: parantu ab vah yahan shaaantai pa raha haai, aur too tadp raha haai." 
Luke16:26 aur in sab baton ko chhod hamare aur tumhare beech aek bharee gadha ttharaya gaya haai ki jo yahan se us par tumhare pas jana chahe, ve n ja sake, aur n koi vahan se is par hamare pas a sake." 
Luke16:27 us ne kaha to he pita maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, ki too use mere pita ke ghar bheja." 
Luke16:28 kyonaki mere panch bhai haai, vah un ke samhane in baton kee gavahee de, aeesa n ho ki ve bhee is peeda kee jagah men aaen." 
Luke16:29 ibraaheem ne us se kaha, un ke pas to moosa aur bhavishyadvktaon kee pustaken haai, ve un kee sunen." 
Luke16:30 us ne kaha nahee, he pita ibraaheema par yaadi koi mare huon men se un ke pas jaa, to ve man firaenge." 
Luke16:31 us ne us se kaha, ki jab ve moosa aur bhvishyadvktaon kee naheen sunate, to yaadi mare huon men se koi bhee jee utte taubhee us kee naheen manenge.." 
Luke17:1 fir us ne apane chelon se kaha ho naheen sakata ki ttokaren n lage, parantu hay, us manushy par jis ke karan ve atee haai!" 
Luke17:2 jo in chhotton men se kisee aek ko ttokar khailata haai, usake liye yah bhla hota, ki chakkee ka patt usake gale men lattkaya jata, aur vah samudra men dal diya jata." 
Luke17:3 sachet raho yaadi tera bhai aparadha kare to use samajha, aur yaadi pachhtaae to use kshama kara." 
Luke17:4 yaadi din bhr men vah sat bar tera aparadha kare aur saton bar tere pas fir akar kahe, ki maain pachhtata hoo, to use kshama kara.." 
Luke17:5 tab praeriton ne prabhu se kaha, hamara vishvas baddha." 
Luke17:6 prabhu ne kaha ki yadi tum ko rai ke dane ke barabar bhee vishvas hota, to tum is toot ke ped se kahate ki jad se ukhdkar samudra men lag ja, to vah tumharee man leta." 
Luke17:7 par tum men se aeesa kaun haai, jis ka das hal jotata, ya bhenden charata ho, aur jab vah khet se aa, to us se kahe turant akar bhojan karane baaitt?" 
Luke17:8 aur yah n kahe, ki mera khana taaiyar kara: aur jab tak maain khaun-peeun tab tak kamar bandhakar meree seva kara is ke bad too bhee kha pee lena." 
Luke17:9 kya vah us das ka nihora manega, ki us ne ve hee kam kiae jis kee agyaa dee gai thee?" 
Luke17:10 isee reeti se tum bhee, jab un sab kamon ko kar chuko jis kee agyaa tumhen dee gai thee, to kaha, ham nikamme das haain ki jo hamen karana chaahiae tha vahee kiya haai.." 
Luke17:11 aur aeesa hua ki vah yarooshalem ko jate huae samariya aur galeel ke beech se hokar jo raha tha. 
Luke17:12 aur kisee ganv men pravesh karate samay use das koddhee mile. 
Luke17:13 aur unhon ne door khde hokar, unche shabd se kaha, he yeeshu, he svamee, ham par daya kara." 
Luke17:14 us ne unhen dekhkar kaha, jao aur apane tai yajakon ko dikhao aur jate hee jate ve shuuddh ho gae." 
Luke17:15 tab un men se aek yah dekhkar ki maain changa ho gaya hoo, unche shabd se parameshvar kee badai karata hua lautta." 
Luke17:16 aur yeeshu ke panvon par munh ke bal girakar, usaka dhanyavad karane laga aur vah samaree tha." 
Luke17:17 is par yeeshu ne kaha, kya dason shuuddh n huae to fir ve nau kahan haain?" 
Luke17:18 kya is paradeshaee ko chhod koi aur n nikala, jo parameshvar kee badai karata?" 
Luke17:19 tab us ne us se kaha uttkar chala ja tere vishvas ne tujhe changa kiya haai.. 
Luke17:20 jab fareesiyon ne us se poochha, ki parameshvar ka rajy kab aaega? to us ne un ko uttr diya, ki pameshvar ka rajy pragatt roop men naheen ata." 
Luke17:21 aur log yah n kahenge, ki dekho, yahan haai, ya vahan haai, kyonaki dekho, parameshvar ka rajy tumhare beech men haai.." 
Luke17:22 aur us ne chelon se kaha ve din aaenge, jin men tum manushy ke putra ke dinon men se aek din ko dekhna chahoge, aur naheen dekhne paoge." 
Luke17:23 log tum se kahenge, dekho, vahan haai, ya dekho yahan haai parantu tum chale n jana aur n un ke peechhe ho lena." 
Luke17:24 kyonaki jaaise bijalee akash kee aek or se kaundhakar akash kee doosaree or chamakatee haai, vaaise hee manushy ka putra bhee apane din men pragatt hoga." 
Luke17:25 parantu pahile avashy haai, ki vah bahut dukh uttaa, aur is yug ke log use tuchchh ttharaaen." 
Luke17:26 jaaisa nooh ke dinon men hua tha, vaaisa hee manushy ke putra ke dinon men bhee hoga." 
Luke17:27 jis din tak nooh jahaj par n chaddha, us din tak log khate-peete the, aur un men byaha-shaadee hotee theee tab jala-pralay ne akar un sab ko nash kiya." 
Luke17:28 aur jaaisa loot ke dinon men hua tha, ki log khate-peete lena-den karate, ped lagate aur ghar banate the." 
Luke17:29 parantu jis din loot sadom se nikala, us din ag aur gandhak akash se barasee aur sab ko nash kar diya." 
Luke17:30 manushy ke putra ke pragatt hone ke din bhee aeesa hee hoga. 
Luke17:31 us din jo kotte par ho aur usaka saman ghar men ho, vah use lene ko n utare, aur vaaise hee jo khet men ho vah peechhe n lautte." 
Luke17:32 loot kee patnee ko smaran rakho. 
Luke17:33 jo koi apana praan bachana chahe vah use khoaega, aur jo koi use khoae vah use jeevit rakhega." 
Luke17:34 maain tum se kahata hoo, us rat ko manushy aek khatt par honge, aek le liya jaaega, aur doosara chhod diya jaaega." 
Luke17:35 do striayan aek sath chakkee peesatee hongee, aek le lee jaaegee, aur doosaree chhod dee jaaegee." 
Luke17:36 do jan khet men honge aek le liya jaaega aur doosara chhoda jaaega. 
Luke17:37 yah sun unhon ne us se poochha, he prabhu yah kahan hoga? us ne un se kaha, jahan loth haai, vahan giddh ikatthe honge.." 
Luke18:1 fir us ne is ke vishay men ki nity praarthna karana aur hiyav n chhodna chaahiae un se yah drashttant kaha. 
Luke18:2 ki kisee nagar men aek nyayee rahata tha jo n parameshvar se drata th aur n kisee manushy kee paravah karata tha. 
Luke18:3 aur usee nagar men aek vidhava bhee rahatee thee: jo usake pas a akar kaha karatee thee, ki mera nyay chukakar mujhe mui se bacha." 
Luke18:4 us ne kitane samay tak to n mana parantu ant men man men vicharakar kaha, yadhyapi maain n parameshvar se drata, aur n manushyon kee kuchh paravah karata hoon." 
Luke18:5 taubhee yah vidhava mujhe satatee rahatee haai, isaaliye maain usaka nyay chukaunga kaheen aeesa n ho ki ghadee ghadee akar ant ko mera nak men dam kare." 
Luke18:6 prabhu ne kaha, suno, ki yah adharmee nyayee kya kahata haai?" 
Luke18:7 so kya parameshr apane chune huon ka nyay n chukaaega, jo rata-adin us kee duhai dete rahate aur kya vah un ke vishay men den karega?" 
Luke18:8 maain tum se kahata hoon vah turant un ka nyay chukaaega taubhee manushy ka putra jab aaega, to kya vah prathvee par vishvas paaega?" 
Luke18:9 aur us ne kitano se jo apane upar bhrosa rakhte the, ki ham dharmee haai, aur auron ko tuchchh janate the, yah drashttant kaha." 
Luke18:10 ki do manushy mandair men praarthna karane ke liye gaae aek fareesee tha aur doosara chungee lenevala. 
Luke18:11 fareesee khda hokar apane man men yon praarthna karane laga, ki he parameshvar, maain tera dhanyavad karata hoo, ki maain aur manushyon kee nai andhor karanevala, anyayee aur vyaabhaicharee nahee, aur n is chungee lenevale ke saman hoon." 
Luke18:12 maain saptah men do bar upavas karata hoon maain apanee sab kamai ka dasavan ansh bhee deta hoon. 
Luke18:13 parantu chungee lenevale ne door khde hokar, svarga kee or ankh uttana bhee n chaha, baran apanee chhatee peett-peettkar kaha he parameshvar mujh papee par daya kara." 
Luke18:14 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki vah doosara naheen parantu yahee manushy dharmee ttharaya jakar apane ghar gaya kyonaki jo koi apane ap ko bada banaaega, vah chhotta kiya jaaega aur jo apane ap ko chhotta banaaega, vah bada kiya jaaega.." 
Luke18:15 fir log apane bachchon ko bhee usake pas lane lage, ki vah un par hath rakhe aur chelon ne dekhkar unhen dantta." 
Luke18:16 yeeshu n bachchon ko pas bulakar kaha, balakon ko mere pas ane do, aur unhen mana n karo: kyonaki parameshvar ka rajy aeeson kee ka haai." 
Luke18:17 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jo koi paramashevar ke rajy ko balak kee nai grahan n karega vah us men kabhee pravesh karane n paaega.." 
Luke18:18 kisee saradar ne us se poochha, he uttm guro, anantajeevan ka adhaikaree hone ke liye maain kya karoon?" 
Luke18:19 yeeshu ne us se kaha too mujhe uttm kyon kahata haai? koi uttm nahee, keval aek, arthata parameshvara." 
Luke18:20 too agyaaon ko to janata haai, ki vyaabhaichar n karana, joottee gavahee n dena, apane pita aur apanee mata ka adar karana." 
Luke18:21 us ne kaha, maain to in sab ko ladkapan hee se manata aya hoon." 
Luke18:22 yah sun, yeeshu ne us se kaha, tujh men ab bhee aek bat kee ghattee haai, apana sab kuchh bechakar kangalon ko bantt de aur tujhe svarga men dhan milega, aur akar mere peechhe ho le." 
Luke18:23 vah yah sunakar bahut udas hua, kyonki vah bada dhanee tha." 
Luke18:24 yeeshu ne use dekhkar kaha dhanavanon ka parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karana kaaisa kattnai haai? 
Luke18:25 parameshvar ke rajy men dhanavan ke pravesh karane se untt ka sooi ke nake men se nikal jana sahaj haai. 
Luke18:26 aur sunanevalon ne kaha, to fir kis ka uddhar ho sakata haai?" 
Luke18:27 us ne kaha jo manushy se naheen ho sakata, vah parameshvar se ho sakata haai." 
Luke18:28 pataras ne kaha dek, ham to ghar bar chhodkar tere peechhe ho liye haain." 
Luke18:29 us ne un se kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki aeesa koi naheen jis ne parameshvar ke rajy ke liye ghar ya patnee ya bhaiyon ya mata pita ya ladke-balon ko chhod diya ho." 
Luke18:30 aur is samay kai guna adhaik n paae aur paralok men anant jeevana.. 
Luke18:31 fir us ne barahon ko sath lekar un se kaha dekho, ham yarooshalem ko jate haai, aur jitanee baten manushy ke putra ke liye bhavishyadvktaon ke dara likhee gai haain ve sab pooree hongee." 
Luke18:32 kyonaki vah anyajaatiyon ke hath men saunpa jaaega, aur ve use tttthon men udaaenge aur usaka apaman karenge, aur us par tookenge." 
Luke18:33 aur use kode marenge, aur ghaat karenge, aur vah teesare din jee uttega." 
Luke18:34 aur unhon ne in baton men se koi bat n samajhee: aur yah bat un men chhpaiee rahee, aur jo kaha gaya tha vah un kee samajh men n aya.." 
Luke18:35 jab vah yareeho ke nikatt pahuncha, to aek andha sadk ke kinare baaitta hua bheekh mang raha tha." 
Luke18:36 aur vah bheed ke chalane kee ahatt sunakar poochhne laga, yah kya ho raha haai?" 
Luke18:37 unhon ne us ko bataya, ki yeeshu nasaree ja raha haai." 
Luke18:38 tab us ne pukar ke kaha, he yeeshu daud kee santan, mujh par daya kara." 
Luke18:39 jo age jate the, ve use danttne lage ki chup rahe: parantu vah aur bhee chillane laga, ki he daud kee santan, mujh par daya kara." 
Luke18:40 tab yeeshu ne khde hokar agyaa dee ki use mere pas lao, aur jab vah nikatt aya, to us ne us se yah poochha." 
Luke18:41 too kya chahata haai, ki maain tere liye karoon? us ne kaha he prabhu yah ki maain dekhne lagoon." 
Luke18:42 yeeshu ne kaha dekhne lag, tere vishvas ne tujhe achchha kar diya haai." 
Luke18:43 aur vah turant dekhne laga aur parameshvar kee badai karata hua usake peechhe ho liya, aur sab logon ne dekhkar parameshvar kee stuati kee.." 
Luke19:1 vah yareeho men pravesh karake ja raha tha. 
Luke19:2 aur dekho, jakkai nam aek manushy tha jo chungee lenevalon ka saradar aur dhanee tha." 
Luke19:3 vah yeeshu ko dekhna chahata tha ki vah kon sa haai? parantu bheed ke karan dekh n sakata tha. kyonaki vah natta tha. 
Luke19:4 tab us ko dekhne ke liye vah age daudkar aek goolar k ped par chaddh gaya, kyonaki vah usee marga se jane vala tha." 
Luke19:5 jab yeeshu us jagah pahuncha, to upar draashtti kar ke us se kaha he jakkai jhtt utar a kyonaki aj mujhe tere ghar men rahana avashy haai." 
Luke19:6 vah turant utarakar anand se use apane ghar ko le gaya. 
Luke19:7 yah dekhkar sab loge kudkudakar kahane lage, vah to aek papee manushy ke yahan ja utara haai." 
Luke19:8 jakkai ne khde hokar prabhu se kaha he prabhu, dekh maain apanee adhaee sampati kangalon ko deta hoo, aur yadi kisee ka kuchh bhee anyay karake le liya haai to use chauguna faer deta hoon." 
Luke19:9 tab yeeshu ne us se kaha aj is ghar men uddhar aya haai, isaaliye ki yah bhee ibraaheem ka aek putra haai." 
Luke19:10 kyonaki manushy ka putra khoae huon ko ddoonddhne aur un ka uddhar karane aya haai.. 
Luke19:11 jab ve ye baten sun rahe the, to us ne aek drashttant kaha, isaliye ki vah yarooshalem ke nikatt tha, aur ve samajhte the, ki parameshvar ka rajy abhee pragatt hua chahata haai." 
Luke19:12 so us ne kaha, aek dhanee manushy door desh ko chala taki rajapad pakar fir aae." 
Luke19:13 aushra us ne apane dason men se das ko bulakar unhen das muharen dee, aur un se kaha, mere lautt ane tak lena-den karana." 
Luke19:14 parantu usake nagar ke rahanevale us se baair rakhte the, aur usake peechhe dooton ke dara kahala bheja, ki ham naheen chahate, ki yah ham par rajy kare." 
Luke19:15 jab vah rajapad pakar lautt aya, to aeesa hua ki us ne apane dason ko jinhen rokad dee thee, apane pas bulavaya taaki maloom kare ki unhon ne lena-den se kya kya kamaya." 
Luke19:16 tab paahile ne akar kaha, he svamee tere mohar se das aur moharen kamai haain." 
Luke19:17 us ne us se kaha dhany he uttm das, tujhe dhany haai, too bahut hee thode men vishvasee nikala ab das nagaron ka adhaikar rakh." 
Luke19:18 doosare ne akar kaha he svamee teree mohar se panch aur moharen kamai haain. 
Luke19:19 us ne kaha, ki too bhee panch nagaron par haakim ho ja." 
Luke19:20 teesare ne akar kaha he svamee dek, teree mohar yah haai, jise maain ne angochhe men bandha rakhee." 
Luke19:21 kyonaki maain tujh se drata tha, isaliye ki too kattor manushy haai: jo too ne naheen rakha use utta leta haai, aur jo too ne naheen boya, use kattta haai." 
Luke19:22 us ne us se kaha he dushtt das, maain tere hee munh se tujhe doshaee ttharata hoon: too mujhe janata tha ki kattor manushy hoo, jo maain ne naheen rakha use utta leta, aur jo maain ne naheen boya, use kattta hoon." 
Luke19:23 to too ne mere roopaye kottee men kyon naheen rakh dia, ki maain akar byaj samet le leta?" 
Luke19:24 aur jo log nikatt khde the, us ne un se kaha, vah mohar us se le lo, aur jis ke pas das moharen haain use de do." 
Luke19:25 unhon ne us se kaha he svamee, usake pas das moharen to haain." 
Luke19:26 maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jis ke pas haai, use diya jaaega aur jis ke pas nahee, us se vah bhee jo usake pas haai le liya jaaega." 
Luke19:27 parantu mere un baairiyon ko jo naheen chahate the ki maain un par rajy karoo, un ko yahan lakar mere samane ghaat karo.." 
Luke19:28 ye baten kahakar vah yarooshalem kee or un ke age age chala.. 
Luke19:29 aur jab vah jaaitoon nam pahad par baaitafage aur baaitaniyah ke pas pahuncha, to us ne apane chelon men se do ko yah kahake bheja." 
Luke19:30 ki samhane ke ganv men jao, aur us men pahunchate hee aek gadahee ka bachcha jis par kabhee koi savar naheen hua, bandha hua tumhen milega, use kholakar lao." 
Luke19:31 aur yaadi koi tum se poochhe, ki kyon kholate ho, to yah kah dena, ki prabhu ko is ka prayojan haai." 
Luke19:32 jo bheje gaae the unhon ne jakar jaaisa us ne un se kaha tha, vaaisa hee paya." 
Luke19:33 jab ve gadahe ke bachche ko khol rahe the, to usake malikon ne un se poochha is bachche ko kyon kholate ho?" 
Luke19:34 unhon ne kaha, prabhu ko is ka prayojan haai." 
Luke19:35 ve us ko yeeshu ke pas le aae aur apane kapade us bachche par dalakar yeeshu ko us par savar kiya. 
Luke19:36 jab vah ja raha tha, to ve apane kapade marga men bichhate jate the." 
Luke19:37 aur nikatt ate huae jab vah jaaitoon pahad kee ddhlan par pahuncha, to chelon kee saree mandlee un sab samarth ke kamon ke karan jo unhon ne dekhe the, anaandait hokar bade shabd se parameshvar kee stuati karane lagee." 
Luke19:38 ki dhany haai vah raja, jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai svarga men shaantai aur akash mandl men mahima ho." 
Luke19:39 tab bheed men se kitane fareesee us se kahane lage, he guroo apane chelon ko dantt." 
Luke19:40 us ne uttr diya, ki tum men se kahata hoo, yadi ye chup rahe, to patthr chilla uttenge.." 
Luke19:41 jab vah nikatt aya to nagar ko dekhkar us par roya. 
Luke19:42 aur kaha, kya hee bhla hota, ki too ha, too hee, isee din men kushal kee baten janata, parantu ab ve teree ankhon se chhpai gai haain." 
Luke19:43 kyonaki ve din tujh par aaenge ki tere baairee morcha bandhakar tujhe ghor lenge, aur charon or se tujhe dabaaenge." 
Luke19:44 aur tujhe aur tere balakon ko jo tujh men haai, mittee men milaaenge, aur tujh men patthr par patthr bhee n chhodenge kyonki too ne vah avasar jab tujh par krapa draashtti kee gai n pahichana.." 
Luke19:45 tab vah maandair men jakar bechanevalon ko bahar nikalane laga. 
Luke19:46 aur un se kaha, likha haai ki mera ghar praarthna ka ghar hoga: parantu tum ne use dakuon kee khoh bana diya haai.." 
Luke19:47 aur vah praati din mandair men upadesh karata tha: aur mahayajak aur shaasree aur loagon ke rais use nash karane ka avasar ddoonddhte the. 
Luke19:48 parantu koi upay n nikal sake ki yah kis prakar karen kyonki sab log badee chah se us kee sunate the. 
Luke20:1 aek din aeesa hua ki jab vah mandair men logon ko upadesh deta aur susamachar suna raha tha, to mahayajak aur shaasre, puraaniyon ke sath pas akar khde hue." 
Luke20:2 aur kahane lage, ki hamen bata, too in kamon ko kis adhaikar se karata haai, aur vah kaun haai, jis ne tujhe yah aadhaikar diya haai?" 
Luke20:3 us ne un ko uttr diya, ki maain bhee tum men se ek bat poochhta hoon mujhe batao." 
Luke20:4 yoohanna ka bapatisma svarga kee or se tha ya manushyon kee or se tha? 
Luke20:5 tab ve apas men kahane lage, ki yadi ham kahen svarga kee or se, to vah kahega fir tum ne us kee prateeati kyon n kee?" 
Luke20:6 aur yaadi ham kahe, manushyon kee or se, to sab log hamen patthravah karenge, kyonaki ve sachamuch janate haai, ki yoohanna bhvishyadvkata tha." 
Luke20:7 so unhon ne uttr diya, ham naheen janate, ki vah kis kee or se tha." 
Luke20:8 yeeshu ne un se kaha, to maain bhee tum ko naheen batata, ki maain ye kam kis adhaikar se karata hoon." 
Luke20:9 tab vah logon se yah drashttant kahane laga, ki kisee manushy ne dakh kee baree lagai, aur kisanon ko usaka tteka de diya aur bahut dinon ke liye paredash chala gaya." 
Luke20:10 samay par us ne kisanon ke pas aek das ko bheja, ki ve dakh kee baree ke kuchh falon ka bhag use de, par kisanon ne use peettkar choochhe hath lautta diya." 
Luke20:11 fir us ne aek aur das ko bheja, or unhon ne use bhee peettkar aur usaka apaman karake choochhe hath lautta diya." 
Luke20:12 fir us ne teesara bheja, aur unhon ne use bhee ghaayal karake nikal diya." 
Luke20:13 tab dakh kee baree ke svamee ne kaha, maain kya karoon? maain apane piry putra ko bhejoonga kya jane ve usaka adar karen." 
Luke20:14 jab kisanon ne use dekha to apas men vichar karane lage, ki yah to varis haai ao, ham use mar dale, ki miras hamaree ho jaae." 
Luke20:15 aur unhon ne use dakh kee baree se bahar nikalakar mar dala: isaaliye dakh kee baree ka svamee un ke sath kya karega? 
Luke20:16 vah akar un kisanon ko nash karega, aur dakh kee baree auron ko saunpega: yah sunakar unhon ne kaha, parameshvar aeesa n kare." 
Luke20:17 us ne un kee or dekhkar kaha fir yah kya, likha haai, ki jis patthr ko rajaamistriayon ne nikamma ttharaya tha, vahee kone ka sira ho gaya." 
Luke20:18 jo koi us patthr par girega vah chakanachoor ho jaaega, aur jis par vah girega, use vah pees dalega.." 
Luke20:19 usee ghadee shaaastriayon aur mahayajakon ne use pakadna chaha, kyonki samajh gaa, ki us ne ham par yah drashttant kaha, parantu ve logon se dre." 
Luke20:20 aur ve us kee tak men lage aur bhediye bheje, ki dharma ka bhesh dharakar us kee koi n koi bat pakade, ki use haakim ke hath aur adhaikar men saunp den." 
Luke20:21 unhon ne us se yah poochha, ki he guro, ham janate haain ki too tteek kahata, aur sikhata bhee haai, aur kisee ka pakshapat naheen karata baran parameshvar ka marga sachchai se batata haai." 
Luke20:22 kya hamen kaaisar ko kar dena uchit haai, ki naheen." 
Luke20:23 us ne un kee chaturai ko tadkar un se kaha ek deenar mujhe dikhao. 
Luke20:24 is par kis kee mootira aur nam haai? unhon ne kaha, kaaisar ka." 
Luke20:25 us ne un se kaha to jo kaaisar ka haai, vah kaaisar ko do aur jo parameshvar ka haai, vah parameshvar ko do." 
Luke20:26 ve logoen ke samhane us bat ko pakad n sake, baran usake uttr se achaambhiat hokar chup rah gaae." 
Luke20:27 fir sadookee jo kahate haai, ki mare huon ka jee uttna haai hee nahee, un men se kitanon ne usake pas akar poochha." 
Luke20:28 ki he guro, moosa ne hamare liye yah likha haai, ki yadi kisee ka bhai apanee patnee ke rahate huae bina santan mar jaa, to usaka bhai us kee patnee ko byah le, aur apane bhai ke liye vansh utpann kare." 
Luke20:29 so sat bhai the, pahila bhai byah karake bina santan mar gaya." 
Luke20:30 fir doosare aur teesare ne bhee us sree ko byah liya. 
Luke20:31 isee reeti se saton bina santan mar gaae. 
Luke20:32 sab ke peechhe vah sree bhee mar gai. 
Luke20:33 so jee uttne par vah un men se kis kee patnee hogee, kyonaki vah saton kee patnee ho chukee thee." 
Luke20:34 yeeshu ne un se kaha ki is yug ke santanon men to byah shaadee hotee haai. 
Luke20:35 par jo log is yogy ttharenge, ki us yug ko aur mare huon men se jee uttna praapt kare, un men byah shaadee n hogee." 
Luke20:36 ve fir marane ke bhee naheen kyonki ve svargadooton ke saman honge, aur jee uttne ke santan hone se parameshvar ke bhee santan honge." 
Luke20:37 parantu is bat ko ki mare huae jee uttte haai, moosa n bhee jhadee kee katha men pragatt kee haai, ki vah prabhu ko ibraaheem ka parameshvar, aur isahak ka parameshvar, aur yakoob ka paramashevar kahata haai." 
Luke20:38 parameshvar to muradon ka naheen parantu jeevaton ka parameshvar haai: kyonki usake nikatt sab jeeavit haain. 
Luke20:39 tab yah sunakar shaastriayon men se kitanon ne kaha, ki he guro, too ne achchha kaha." 
Luke20:40 aur unhen fir us se kuchh aur poochhne ka hiyav n hua.. 
Luke20:41 fir us ne un se poochha, maseeh ko daud ka santan kyonkar kahate haain." 
Luke20:42 daud ap bhjanasanhita kee pustak men kahata haai, ki prabhu ne mere prabhu se kaha." 
Luke20:43 mere dahine baait, jab tak ki maain teere baairiyon ko tere panvon ke tale n kar doon." 
Luke20:44 daud to use prabhu kahata haai to fir vah us kee santan kyonkar tthara? 
Luke20:45 jab sab log sun rahe the, to us ne apane chelon se kaha." 
Luke20:46 shaastriayon se chaukas raho, jin ko lambe lambe vasr paahine huae firana bhla haai, aur jinhen bajaron men namaskar, aur sabhaon men mukhy asan aur jevanaron men mukhy sthan piry lagate haain." 
Luke20:47 ve vidhavaon ke ghar kha jate haai, aur dikhane ke liye badee der tak praarthna karate rahate haain: ye bahut hee dand paaenge.." 
Luke21:1 fir us ne ankh uttakar dhanavanon ko apana apana dan bhndar men dalate dekha. 
Luke21:2 aur us ne aek kangal vidhava ko bhee us men do damaadiyan dalate dekha. 
Luke21:3 tab us ne kaha maain tum se sach kahata hoon ki is kangal vidhava ne sab se baddhkar dala haai. 
Luke21:4 kyonaki un sab ne apanee baddhtee men se dan men kuchh dala haai, parantu is ne apanee ghattee men se apanee saree jeevika dal dee haai.." 
Luke21:5 jab kitane log mandair ke vishay men kah rahe the, ki vah kaaise sundar patthron aur bhentt kee vastuon se sanvara gaya haai to us ne kaha." 
Luke21:6 ve din aaenge, jin men yah sab jo tum dekhte ho, un men se yahan kisee patthr par patthr bhee n choottega, jo ddhaya n jaaega." 
Luke21:7 unhon ne us se poochha, he guro, yah sab kab hoga? aur ye baten jab pooree hone par hongee, to us samay ka kya chinh hoga?" 
Luke21:8 us ne kaha chaukas raho, ki bhramaae n jao, kyonaki bahutere mere nam se akar kahenge, ki maain vahee hoon aur yah bhee ki samay nikatt a pahuncha haai: tum un ke peechhe n chale jana." 
Luke21:9 aur jab tum ladaiyon aur balavon kee charcha suno, to ghabara n jana kyonaki in ka pahile hona avashy haai parantu us samay turant ant n hoga." 
Luke21:10 tab us ne un se kaha, ki jati par jati aur rajy par rajy chaddhai karega." 
Luke21:11 aur baden baden booidol honge, aur jagah jagah akal aur maariyan padengee, aur akash men bhyankar baten aur bade bade chinh pragatt honge." 
Luke21:12 parantu in sab baton se paahile ve mere nam ke karan tumhen pakadenge, aur sataaenge, aur panchayaton men saupenge, aur bandeegrah me dlavaaenge, aur rajaon aur haakimon ke samhane le jaaenge." 
Luke21:13 par yah tumhare liye gavahee dene ka avasar ho jaaega. 
Luke21:14 isaliye apane apane man men ttan rakho ki ham pahile se uttr dene kee chinta n karenge. 
Luke21:15 kyonaki maain tumhen aeesa bol aur buddh idoonga, ki tumhare sab virodhaee samhana ya khndn n kar sakenge." 
Luke21:16 aur tumhare mata pita aur bhai aur kuttumb, aur mitra bhee tumhen pakadvaaenge yahan tak ki tum men se kitanon ko marava dalenge." 
Luke21:17 aur mere nam ke karan sab log tum se baair karenge. 
Luke21:18 parantu tumhare sir ka aek bal bhee banka n hoga. 
Luke21:19 apane dhaeeraj se tum apane praanon ko bachaae rakhoge.. 
Luke21:20 jab tum yarooshalem ko senaon se ghaira hua dekho, to jan lena ki usaka ujad jana nikatt haai." 
Luke21:21 tab jo yahoodiya men hon vah pahadon par bhag jaae, aur jo yarooshalem ke bheetar hon ve bahar nikal jaaen aur jo gavon men ho ve us men n janae." 
Luke21:22 kyonaki yah palatta lene ke aeese din honge, jin men likhee hui sab baten pooree ho jaaengee." 
Luke21:23 un dinon men jo garbhvatee aur doodha pilatee hongee, un ke liye hay, hay, kyonaki desh men bada klesh aur in logon par badee apaati hogee." 
Luke21:24 ve talavar ke kaur ho jaaenge, aur sab deshaen ke logon men bandhauae hokar pahunchaae jaaenge, aur jab tak any jaatiyon ka samay poora n ho, tab tak yarooshalem any jaatiyon se raunda jaaega." 
Luke21:25 aur sooraj aur chand aur taron men chinh dikhai denge, aur prathvee par, desh desh ke logon ko sankatt hoga kyonaki ve samudra ke garajane aur laharon ke kolahal se ghabara jaaenge." 
Luke21:26 aur bhy ke karan aur sansar par anevalee ghattnaon kee bantt dekhte dekhte logon ke jee men jee n rahega kyonaki akash kee shaktaiyon hilai jaaengee. 
Luke21:27 tab ve manushy ke putra ko samarth aur badee mahima ke sath badal par ate dekhenge. 
Luke21:28 jab ye baten hone lage, to seedho hokar apane sir upar uttana kyonaki tumhara chhuttkara nikatt hoga.." 
Luke21:29 us ne un se ek drashttant bhee kaha ki anjeer ke ped aur sab pedon ko dekho. 
Luke21:30 jyonahi un kee konpalen nikalatee haai, to tum dekhkar ap hee jan lete ho, ki graeeshmakal nikatt haai." 
Luke21:31 isee reeti se jab tum ye baten hote dekho, tab jan lo ki parameshvar ka rajy nikatt haai." 
Luke21:32 maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki jab tak ye sab baten n ho le, tab tak is peeddhee ka kadaapi ant n hoga." 
Luke21:33 akash aur prathvee ttl jaaenge, parantu meree baten kabhee n ttlengee.." 
Luke21:34 isaliye savadhaan raho, aeesa n ho ki tumhare man khumar aur matavalepan, aur is jeevan kee chintaon se sust ho jaae, aur vah din tum par fande kee nai achanak a pade." 
Luke21:35 kyonaki vah saree prathvee ke sab rahanevalon par isee prakar a padega. 
Luke21:36 isaliye jagate raho aur har samay praarthna karate raho ki tum in sab anevalee ghattnaon se bachane, aur manushy ke putra ke samhane khde hone ke yogy bano.." 
Luke21:37 aur vah din ko mandair men upadesh karata tha aur rat ko bahar jakar jaaitoon nam pahad par raha karata tha. 
Luke21:38 aur bhor ko tadke sab log us kee sunane ke liye maandair men usake pas aya karate the. 
Luke22:1 akhmeeree rottee ka pavrva jo fasah kahalata haai, nikatt tha." 
Luke22:2 aur mahayajak aur shaasree is bat kee khoj men the ki us ko kyonkar mar dale, par ve logon se drate the.." 
Luke22:3 aur shautan yahooda men samaya, jo iskaariyotee kahalata aur barah chelon men gina jata tha." 
Luke22:4 us ne jakar mahayajakon aur paharooon ke saradaron ke sath batacheet kee, ki us ko kis prakar un ke hath pakadvae." 
Luke22:5 ve anandait hua, aur use roopaye dene ka vachan diya." 
Luke22:6 us ne man liya, aur avasar ddoonddhne laga, ki bina upadrav ke use un ke hath pakadva de.." 
Luke22:7 tab akhmeeree rottee ke pavrva ka din aya, jis men fasah ka memna balee karana avashy tha." 
Luke22:8 aur yeeshu ne pataras aur yoohanna ko yah kahakar bheja, ki jakar hamare khane ke liye fasah taaiyar karo." 
Luke22:9 unhon ne us se poochha, too kahan chahata haai, ki ham taaiyar karen?" 
Luke22:10 us ne un se kaha dekho, nagar men pravesh karate hee ek manushy jal ka ghada uttaae huae tumhen milega, jis ghar men vah jae tum usake peechhe chale jana." 
Luke22:11 aur us ghar ke svamee se kaho, ki guroo tujh se kahata haai ki vah pahunashaala kahan haai jis men maain apane chelon ke sath fasah khaun?" 
Luke22:12 vah tumhen aek sajee sajai badee attaree dikha dega vahan taaiyaree karana. 
Luke22:13 unhon ne jakar, jaaisa us ne un se kaha tha, vaaisa hee paya, aur fasah taaiyar kiya.." 
Luke22:14 jab ghadee pahunchee, to vah praearitoen ke sath bhojan karane baaitta." 
Luke22:15 aur us ne un se kaha mujhe badee lalasa thee, ki dukh-bhogane se paahile yah fasah tumhare sath khaun." 
Luke22:16 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jab tak vah parameshvar ke rajy men poora n ho tab tak maain use kabhee n khaunga." 
Luke22:17 tab us ne kattora lekar dhanyavad kiya, aur kaha, is ko lo aur apas men bantt lo." 
Luke22:18 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki jab tak parameshvar ka rajy n aae tab tak maain dakh ras ab se kabhee n peeunga." 
Luke22:19 fir us ne rottee lee, aur dhanyavad karake todee, aur un ko yah kahate huae dee, ki yah meree deh haai, jo tumhare liye dee jatee haai: mere smaran ke liye yahee kiya karo." 
Luke22:20 isee reeti se us ne biyaree ke bad kattora mere us lohoo men jo tumhare liye bahaya jata haai nai vacha haai. 
Luke22:21 par dekho, mere pakadvanevale ka hath mere sath mej par haai." 
Luke22:22 kyonaki manushy ka putra to jaaisa usake liye ttharaya gaya jata hee haai, par hay us manushy par, jis ke dara vah pakadvaya jata haai!" 
Luke22:23 tab ve apas men poochh pachh karane lage, ki ham men se kaun haai, jo yah kam karega?" 
Luke22:24 un men yah vada-avivad bhee hua ki ham men se kaun bada samajha jata haai? 
Luke22:25 us ne un se kaha, anyajaatiyon ke raja un par prabhuta karate haain aur jo un par adhaikar rakhte haai, ve upakarak kahalate haain." 
Luke22:26 parantu tum aeese n hona varan jo tum men bada haai, vah chhotte kee nai aur jo pradhaan haai, vah sevak kee nai bane." 
Luke22:27 kyonaki bada kaun haai vah jo bhojan par baaitta ya vah jo seva karata haai? kya vah naheen jo bhojan par baaitta haai? par maain tumhare beech men sevak kee nain hoon. 
Luke22:28 parantu tum vah ho, jo meree pareekshaaon men lagatar mere sath rahe." 
Luke22:29 aur jaaise mere pita ne mere liye aek rajy ttharaya haai," 
Luke22:30 vaaise hee maain bhee tumhare liye ttharata hoo, taki tum mere rajy men meree mej par khao-apio baran sinhasanon par baaittkar israael ke barah gotraen ka nyay karo." 
Luke22:31 shamaun, he shamaun, dek, shautan ne tum logon ko mang liya haai ki genhoon kee nai fattke." 
Luke22:32 parantu maain ne tere liye binatee kee, ki tera vishvas jata n rahe: aur jab too fire, to apane bhaiyon ko sthiar karana." 
Luke22:33 us ne us se kaha he prabhu, maain tere sath bandeegrah jane, varan marane ko bhee taaiyar hoon." 
Luke22:34 us ne kaha he pataras maain tujh se kahata hoo, ki aj murga bang dega jab tak too teen bar mera inkar n kar lega ki maain use naheen janata.." 
Luke22:35 aur us ne un se kaha, ki jab maain ne tumhen battua, aur jholee, aur joote bina bheja tha, to kya tum ko kisee vastu kee ghattee hui thee? unhon ne kaha kisee vastu kee naheen." 
Luke22:36 us ne un se kaha, parantu ab jis ke pas battua ho vah use le, aur vaaise hee jholee thee, aur jis ke pas talavar n ho vah apane kapade bechakar ek mol le." 
Luke22:37 kyonaki maain tum se kahata hoo, ki yah jo likha haai, ki vah aparadhaiyon ke sath gina gaya, usaka mujh men poora hona avashy haai kyonki mere vishay kee baten pooree hon par haain." 
Luke22:38 unhon ne kaha he prabhu, dek, yahan do talavaren haain: us ne un se kaha bahut haain.." 
Luke22:39 tab vah bahar nikalakar apanee reeati ke anusar jaaitoon ke pahad par gaya, aur chele usake peechhe ho liae." 
Luke22:40 us jagah pahunchakar us ne un se kaha praarthna karo, ki tum pareeksha men n pado." 
Luke22:41 aur vah ap un se alag aek ddhela faenkane ke ttppe bhr gaya, aur ghauttne ttekakar praarthna karane laga." 
Luke22:42 ki he pita yaadi too chahe to is kattore ko mere pas se hatta le, taubhee meree naheen parantu teree hee ichchha pooree ho." 
Luke22:43 tab svarga se aek doot us ko dikhai diya jo use samarth deta tha. 
Luke22:44 aur vah atyant sankatt men vyakul hokar aur bhee day vedana se praarthna karane laga aur usaka paseena mano lohoo kee badee badee boondon kee nai boomi par gir raha tha. 
Luke22:45 tab vah praarthna se utta aur apane chelon ke pas akar unhen udasee ke mare sota paya aur un se kaha, kyon sote ho?" 
Luke22:46 utto, praarthna karo, ki pareeksha men n pado.." 
Luke22:47 vah yah kah hee raha tha, ki dekho aek bheed ai, aur un barahon men se aek jis ka nam yahooda tha unake age age a raha tha, vah yeeshu ke pas aya, ki usaka chooma le." 
Luke22:48 yeeshu ne us se kaha, he yahooda, kya too chooma lekar manushy ke putra ko pakadvata haai?" 
Luke22:49 usake saathaiyon ne jab dekha ki kya honevala haai, to kha he prabhu, kya ham talavar chalaen?" 
Luke22:50 aur un men se aek ne mahayajak ke das par chalakar usaka dahina kan uda diya. 
Luke22:51 is par yeeshu ne kaha ab bas karo: aur usaka kan chookar use achchha kiya. 
Luke22:52 tab yeeshu ne mahayajakon aur maandair ke paharooon ke saradaron aur puraaniyon se, jo us par chaddh aae the, kaha kya tum mujhe dakoo janakar talavaren aur lattyaian liae huae nikale ho?" 
Luke22:53 jab maain mandair men har din tumhare sath tha, to tum ne mujh par hath n dala par yah tumharee ghadee haai, aur andhakar ka adhaikar haai.." 
Luke22:54 fir ve use pakadkar le chale, aur mahayajak ke ghar men laae aur pataras door hee door usake peechhe peechhe chalata tha." 
Luke22:55 aur jab ve angan men ag sulagakar ikatthe baaitte, to pataras bhee un ke beech men baaitt gaya." 
Luke22:56 aur aek laundee use ag ke ujiyale men baaitte dekhkar aur us kee or takakar kahane lagee, yah bhee to usake sath tha." 
Luke22:57 paranatu us ne yah kahakar inkar kiya, ki he naree, maain use naheen janata." 
Luke22:58 thodee der bad kisee aur ne use dekhkar kaha, too bhee to unheen men se haai: pataras ne kaha he manushy maain naheen hoon." 
Luke22:59 koi ghantte bhr ke bad aek aur manushy draddhta se kahane laga, nishchay yah bhee to usake sath tha kyonki yah galeelee haai." 
Luke22:60 pataras ne kaha, he manushy, maain naheen janata ki too kya kahata haai? vah kah hee raha tha ki turant murga ne bang dee." 
Luke22:61 tab prabhu ne ghoomakar pataras kee or dekha, aur pataras ko prabhu kee vah bat yad ai jo us ne kahee thee, ki aj murga ke bang dene se paahile, too teen bar mera inkar karega." 
Luke22:62 aur vah bahar nikalakar foott foott kar rone laga.. 
Luke22:63 jo manushy yeeshu ko pakade huae the, ve use tttthon men udakar peettne lage." 
Luke22:64 aur us kee ankhe ddhanpakar us se poochha, ki bhvishyadanee karake bata ki tujhe kisane mara." 
Luke22:65 aur unhon ne bahut see aur bhee ninda kee baten usake virodha men kaheen.. 
Luke22:66 jab din hua to logon ke puraaniae aur mahayajak aur shaasree ikatthe hua, aur use apanee mahasatha men lakar poochha," 
Luke22:67 yaadi too maseeh haai, to ham se kah de! us ne un se kaha, yaadi maain tum se kahoon to prateeti n karoge." 
Luke22:68 aur yaadi poonchoo, to uttr n doge." 
Luke22:69 paranatu ab se manushy ka putra sarvashaaktaiman parameshvar kee daahinee aur baaitta rahega. 
Luke22:70 is par sab ne kaha, to kya too parameshvar ka putra haai? us ne un se kaha tum ap hee kahate ho, kyonki maain hoon." 
Luke22:71 tab unhon ne kaha ab hamen gavahee ka kya prayojan haai kyonaki ham ne ap hee usake munh se sun liya haai.. 
Luke23:1 tab saree sabha uttkar use peelatus ke pas le gai. 
Luke23:2 aur ve yah kahakar us par dosh lagane lage, ki ham ne ise logon ko bahakate aur kaaisar ko kar dene se mana karate, aur apane ap ko maseeh raja kahate huae suna haai." 
Luke23:3 peelatus ne us se poochha, kya too yahoodiyon ka raja haai? us ne use uttr diya, ki too ap hee kah raha haai." 
Luke23:4 tab peelatus ne mahayajakon aur logon se kaha, maain is manushy men kuchh dosh naheen pata." 
Luke23:5 par ve aur bhee draddhta se kahane lage, yah galeel se lekar yahan tak sare yahoodiya men upadesh de de kar logon ko usakata haai." 
Luke23:6 yah sunakar peelatus ne poochha, kya yah manushy galeelee haai?" 
Luke23:7 aur yah janakar ki vah herodes kee riyasat ka haai, use herodes ke pas bhej diya, kyonaki un dinon men vah bhee yarooshalem men tha.." 
Luke23:8 herodes yeeshu ko dekhkar bahut hee prasann hua, kyonaki vah bahut dinon se us ko dekhna chahata tha: isaliye ki usake vishay men suna tha, aur usaka kuchh chinh dekhne kee asha rakhta tha." 
Luke23:9 vah us ne bahuteree baten poochhta raha, par us ne us ko kuchh bhee uttr n diya." 
Luke23:10 aur mahayajak aur shaasree khde huae tan man se us par dosh lagate rahe. 
Luke23:11 tab herodes ne apane sipaahiyon ke sath usaka apaman karake tttthon men udaya, aur bhdkeela vasr paahinakar use peelatus ke pas lautta diya." 
Luke23:12 usee din peelatus aur herodes mitra ho gae. isake pahile ve ek doosare ke baairee the.. 
Luke23:13 peelatus ne mahayajakon aur saradaron aur logon ko bulakar un se kaha. 
Luke23:14 tum is manushy ko logon ka bahakanevala ttharakar mere pas laae ho, aur dekho, maain ne tumhare samhane us kee janch kee, par jin baton ka tum us par dosh lagate ho, un baton ke vishay men maain ne us men kuchh bhee dosh naheen paya haai." 
Luke23:15 n herodes ne, kyonki us ne use hamare pas lautta diya haai: aur dekho, us se aeesa kuchh naheen hua ki vah mratyu ke dand ke yogy ttharaya jaae." 
Luke23:16 isaliye maain use pittvakar chhod deta hoon. 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 tab sab milakar chilla utte, ki is ka kam tamam kar, aur hamare liye baraabba ko chhod de." 
Luke23:19 yahee kisee balave ke karan jo nagar men hua tha, aur hatya ke karan bandeegrah men dala gaya tha." 
Luke23:20 par peelatus ne yeeshu ko chhodne kee ichchha se logon ko fir samajhaya. 
Luke23:21 parantu unhon ne chillakar kaha: ki use kroos par chaddha, kroos para." 
Luke23:22 us ne teesaree bar un se kaha kyon us ne kaun see burai kee haai? maain ne us men mratyu dand ke yogy kortt bat naheen pai! isaaliye maain use pittvakar chhod deta hoon. 
Luke23:23 parantu ve chilla-achillakar peechhe pad gaa, ki vah kroos par chaddhaya jaa, aur un ka chillana prabal hua." 
Luke23:24 so peelatus ne agyaa dee, ki un kee binanee ke anusar kiya jaae." 
Luke23:25 aur us ne us manushy ko jo balave aur hatya ke karan bandeegrah men dala gaya tha, aur jise ve mangate the, chhod diya aur yeeshu ko un kee ichchha ke anusar saunp diya.." 
Luke23:26 jab ve use liae jate i, to unhon ne shamaaain nam aek kurenee ko jo ganv se a raha tha, pakadkar us par kroos ko lad diya ki use yeeshu ke peechhe peechhe le chale.." 
Luke23:27 aur logon kee badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee: aur bahut see striayan bhee, jo usake liye chhatee-peetttee aur vilap karatee theen." 
Luke23:28 yeeshu ne un kee or firakar kaha he yarooshalem kee putraiyo, mere liye mat roo parantu apane aur apane balakon ke liye roo." 
Luke23:29 kyonaki dekho, ve din ate haai, jin men kahenge, dhany haain ve jo banjh haai, aur ve garbh jo n jane aur ve stan jinhon ne doodha n pilaya." 
Luke23:30 us samay ve pahadon se kahane lagenge, ki ham par giro, aur tteelon se ki hamen ddhap lo." 
Luke23:31 kyonaki jab ve hare ped ke sath aeesa karate haai, to sookhe ke sath kya kuchh n kiya jaaega?" 
Luke23:32 ve aur do manushyon ko bhgyaee jo kukarmee the usake sath ghaat karane ko le chale.. 
Luke23:33 jab ve us jagah jise khopadee kahate haain pahunche, to unhon ne vahan use aur un kukaarmiyon ko bhee aek ko daahinee aur aur doosare ko bain aur krooson par chaddhaya." 
Luke23:34 tab yeeshu ne kaha he pita, inhen kshama kar, kyonaki ye janate naheen ki kya kar rahen haain? aur unhon ne chitthiyan dalakar usake kapade bantt liae." 
Luke23:35 log khde khde dekh rahe the, aur saradar bhee ttttha kar karake kahate the, ki is ne auron ko bachaya, yaadi yah parameshvar ka maseeh haai, aur usaka chuna hua haai, to apane ap ko bacha le." 
Luke23:36 sipahee bhee pas akar aur siraka dekar usaka ttttha karake kahate the. 
Luke23:37 yaadi too yahoodiyon ka raja haai, to apane ap ko bacha." 
Luke23:38 aur usake upar aek patra bhee laga tha, ki yah yahoodiyon ka raja haai." 
Luke23:39 jo kukarmee lattkaae gaae the, un men se aek ne us kee ninda karake kaha kya too maseeh naheen? to fir apane ap ko aur hamen bacha." 
Luke23:40 is par doosare ne use danttkar kaha, kya too parameshvar se bhee naheen drata? too bhee to vahee dand pa raha haai." 
Luke23:41 aur ham to nyayanusar dand pa rahe haai, kyonki ham apane kamon ka tteek fal pa rahe haain par is ne koi anuchit kam naheen kiya." 
Luke23:42 tab us ne kaha he yeeshu, jab too apane rajy men aa, to meree suadhai lena." 
Luke23:43 us ne us se kaha, maain tujh se sach kahata hoon ki aj hee too mere sath svargalok men hoga.." 
Luke23:44 aur lagabhg do pahar se teesare pahar tak sare desh men aandhiayara chhaya raha. 
Luke23:45 aur soorya ka ujiyala jata raha, aur mandair ka parada beech men fatt gaya." 
Luke23:46 aur yeeshu ne bade shabd se pukar kar kaha he pita, maain apanee atma tere hathon men saunpata hoon: aur yah kahakar praan chhod diae." 
Luke23:47 soobedar ne, jo kuchh hua tha dekhkar, parameshvar kee badai kee, aur kaha nishchay yah manushy dharmee tha." 
Luke23:48 aur bheed jo yah dekhne ko ikatthee hui bhee, is ghattna ko, dekhkar chhatee-peetttee hui lautt gai." 
Luke23:49 aur usake sab jan pahachan, aur jo striayan galeel se usake pas ai thee, door khdee hui yah sab dekh rahee theen.." 
Luke23:50 aur dekho yoosufa nam aek mantraee jo sajjan aur dharmee puroosh tha. 
Luke23:51 aur un ke vichar aur un ke is kam se prasann n tha aur vaa yaihoodiyon ke nagar arimateeya ka rahanevala aur parameshvar ke rajy kee batt johanevala tha. 
Luke23:52 us ne peelatus ke pas jakar yeeshu kee loth mang lee. 
Luke23:53 aur use utarakar chadar men lapetta, aur aek kabra men rakha, jo chattan men khodee hui thee aur us men koi kabhee n rakha gaya tha." 
Luke23:54 vah taaiyaree ka din tha, aur sabt ka din arambh hone par tha." 
Luke23:55 aur un striayon ne jo usake sath galeel se ai thee, peechhe peechhe jakar us kabra ko dekha, aur yah bhee ki us kee loth kis reeti se rakhee gai haai." 
Luke23:56 aur lauttkar sugandhiat vastuaen aur itra taaiyar kiya: aur sabt ke din to unhon ne agyaa ke anusar vishraam kiya.. 
Luke24:1 parantu saptah ke pahile din bade bhor ko ve un sugaandhiat vastuon ko jo unhon ne taaiyar kee thee, le kar kabra par ain." 
Luke24:2 aur unhon ne patthr ko kabra par se luddhka hua paya. 
Luke24:3 aur bheetar jakar prabhu yeeshu kee loth n pai. 
Luke24:4 jab ve is bat se bhauchakkee ho rahee theen to dekho, do puroosh jhlakate vasr pahine huae un ke pas a khde hue." 
Luke24:5 jab ve dr gai, aur dharatee kee or munh jhukaae raheen to unhon ne us ne kaha tum jeevate ko mare huon men kyon ddoonddhtee ho?" 
Luke24:6 vah yahan nahee, parantu jee utta haai smaran karo ki us ne galeel men rahate huae tum se kaha tha." 
Luke24:7 ki avashy haai, ki manushy ka putra paapiyon ke hath men pakadvaya jaa, aur kroos par chaddhaya jaae aur teesare din jee utte." 
Luke24:8 tab us kee baten un ko smaran ain. 
Luke24:9 aur kabra se lauttkar unhon ne un gyarahon ko, aur, aur sab ko, ye baten kah sunai." 
Luke24:10 jinhon ne praeariton se ye baten kahee, ve mariyam magadaleenee aur yoanna aur yakoob kee mata mariyam aur un ke sath kee aur striayan bhee theen." 
Luke24:11 parantu un kee baten unahen kahanee see samajh padee, aur unhon ne un kee prateeati n kee." 
Luke24:12 tab pataras uttkar kabra par daud gaya, aur jhukakar keval kapade pade dekhe, aur jo hua tha, us se achambha karata hua, apane ghar chala gaya.." 
Luke24:13 dekho, usee din un men se do jan immaus nam aek ganv ko ja rahe the, jo yarooshalem se koi sat meel kee dooree par tha." 
Luke24:14 aur ve in sab baton par jo huin thee, apas men batacheet karate ja rahe the." 
Luke24:15 aur jab ve apas men batacheet aur poochhtachh kar rahe the, to yeeshu ap pas akar un ke sath ho liya." 
Luke24:16 paranatu un kee ankhe aeesee band kar dee gain thee, ki use paahichan n sake." 
Luke24:17 us ne un se poochha ye kya baten haai, jo tum chalate chalate apas men karate ho? ve udas se khde rah gae." 
Luke24:18 yah sunakar, unamen se klaiyupas nam aek vyaaktai ne kaha kya too yarooshalem men akela paradeshaee haai jo naheen janata, ki in dinon men us men kya hua haai?" 
Luke24:19 us ne un se poochha kaun see baten? unhon ne us se kaha yeeshu nasaree ke vishay men jo parameshvar aur sab logon ke nikatt kam aur vachan men samarthee bhvishyadvkta tha. 
Luke24:20 aur mahayajakon aur hamare saradaron ne use pakadva diya, ki us par mratyu kee agyaa dee jaae aur use kroos par chaddhvaya." 
Luke24:21 parantu hamen asha thee, ki yahee israel ko chhuttkara dega, aur in sab baton ke sivay is ghattna ko huae teesara din haai." 
Luke24:22 aur ham men se kai striayon ne bhee hamen ashcharya men dal diya haai, jo bhor ko kabra par gai theen." 
Luke24:23 aur jab us kee loth n pai, to yah kahatee hui ai, ki ham ne svargadooton ka darshan paya, jinhon ne kaha ki vah jeevit haai." 
Luke24:24 tab hamare saathaiyon men se kai aek kabra par gaa, aur jaaisa striayon ne kaha tha, vaaisa hee paya parantu us ko n dekha." 
Luke24:25 tab us ne un se kaha he nirbuaddhyaie, aur bhvishyadvktaon kee sab baton par vishvas karane men mandamaatiyon!" 
Luke24:26 kya avashy n tha, ki maseeh ye dukh uttakar apanee maahima men pravesh kare?" 
Luke24:27 tab us ne moosa se aur sab bhavishyadvktaon se arambh karake sare paavitra shaasren men se, apane vishay men kee baton ka arth, unhen samajha diya." 
Luke24:28 itane men ve us ganv ke pas pahunche, jahan ve ja rahe the, aur usake ddhng se aeesa jan pada, ki vah age bada chahata haai." 
Luke24:29 parantu unhon ne yah kahakar use roka, ki hamare sath raha kyonaki sandhya ho chalee haai aur din ab bahut ddhl gaya haai. tab vah un ke sath rahane ke liye bheetar gaya." 
Luke24:30 jab vah un ke sath bhojan karane baaitta, to us ne rottee lekar dhanyavad kiya, aur use todkar un ko dene laga." 
Luke24:31 tab un kee ankhe khul gain aur unhon ne use pahachan liya, aur vah un kee ankhon se chhpai gaya." 
Luke24:32 unhon ne apas men kaha jab vah marga men ham se baten karata tha, aur paavitra shasr ka arth hamen samajhata tha, to kya hamare man men uttejana n utpann hui?" 
Luke24:33 ve usee ghadee uttkar yarooshalem ko lautt gaa, aur un gyarahon aur un ke saathaiyon ko ikatthe paya." 
Luke24:34 ve kahate the, prabhu sachamuch jee utta haai, aur shamaun ko dikhai diya haai." 
Luke24:35 tab unhon ne marga kee baten unhen bata deen aur yah bhee ki unhon ne use rottee todte samay kyonkar pahachana.. 
Luke24:36 ve ye baten kah hee rahe the, ki vah ap hee un ke beech men a khda hua aur un se kaha, tumhen shantai mile." 
Luke24:37 parantu ve ghabara gaa, aur dr gaa, aur samajhe, ki ham kisee boot ko dekhte haain." 
Luke24:38 us ne un se kaha kyon ghabarate ho? aur tumhare man men kyon sandeh uttte haain? 
Luke24:39 mere hath aur mere panv ko dekho, ki maain vaheen hoon mujhe chookar dekho kyonki atma ke haddee mans naheen hota jaaisa mujh men dekhte ho." 
Luke24:40 yah kahakar us ne unahen apane hath panv dikhaae. 
Luke24:41 jab anand ke mare un ko prateeati n hui, aur ashcharya karate the, to us ne un se poochha kya yahan tumhare pas kuchh bhojan haai?" 
Luke24:42 unhon ne use boonee machhlee ka ttukada diya. 
Luke24:43 us ne lekar un ke samhane khaya. 
Luke24:44 fir us ne un se kaha, ye meree ve baten haai, jo maain ne tumhare sath rahate hua, tum se kahee thee, ki avashy haai, ki jitanee baten moosa kee vyavastha aur bhavishyadvktaon aur bhjanon kee pustakon me, mere vishay men likhee haai, sab pooree hon." 
Luke24:45 tab us ne paavitra shaasr boojhne ke liye un kee samajh khol dee. 
Luke24:46 aur un se kaha, yon likha haai ki maseeh du:kh uttaaega, aur teesare din mare huon men se jee uttega." 
Luke24:47 aur yarooshalem se lekar sab jaatiyon men man firav ka aur papon kee kshama ka prachar, usee ke nam se kiya jaaega." 
Luke24:48 tum in sab baten ke gavah ho. 
Luke24:49 aur dekho, jis kee pratigyaa mere pita ne kee haai, maain us ko tum par utaroonga aur jab tak svarga men samarth n pao, tab tak tum isee nagar men tthare raho.." 
Luke24:50 tab vah unhen baaitaaniyyah tak bahar le gaya, aur apane hath uttakar unhen ashaeesh dee." 
Luke24:51 aur unhen ashaeesh dete huae vah un se alag ho gaya aur svarga se utta liya gaya. 
Luke24:52 aur ve us ko dandvata karake bade anand se yarooshalem ko lautt gaae. 
Luke24:53 aur lagatar maandair men upaasthiat hokar parameshvar kee stuati kiya karate the.. 
John1:1 aadi men vachan tha, aur vachan parameshvar ke sath tha, aur vachan parameshvar tha." 
John1:2 yahee adi men parameshvar ke sath tha. 
John1:3 sab kuchh usee ke dara utpann hua aur jo kuchh utpann hua haai, us men se koi bhee vastu usake bina utpann n hui." 
John1:4 us men jeevan tha aur vah jeevan munashyon kee jyoti thee. 
John1:5 aur jyoti andhakar men chamakatee haai aur andhakar ne use grahan n kiya. 
John1:6 aek manushy parameshvar kee or se a upasthiat hua jis ka nam yoohanna tha. 
John1:7 yah gavahee dene aya, ki jyoti kee gavahee de, taki sab usake dara vishvas laaen." 
John1:8 vah ap to vah jyoti n tha, parantu us jyoti kee gavahee dene ke liye aya tha." 
John1:9 sachchee jyoti jo har aek manushy ko prakaashait karatee haai, jagat men anevalee thee." 
John1:10 vah jagat men tha, aur jagat usake dara utpann hua, aur jagat ne use naheen paahichana." 
John1:11 vah apane ghar men aya aur usake apanon ne use grahan naheen kiya. 
John1:12 parantu jitanon ne use grahan kiya, us ne unhen parameshvar ke santan hone ka adhaikar diya, arthata unhen jo usake nam par vishvas rakhte haain." 
John1:13 ve n to lohoo se, n shareer kee ichchha se, n manushy kee ichchha se, parantu parameshvar se utpann huae haain." 
John1:14 aur vachan dehadhaaree hua aur anugrah aur sachchai se paripoorn hokar hamare beech men dera kiya, aur ham ne us kee aeesee mahima dekhee, jaaisee pita ke aekalaute kee mahima." 
John1:15 yoohanna ne usake vishay men gavahee dee, aur pukarakar kaha, ki yah vahee haai, jis ka maain ne varnn kiya, ki jo mere bad a raha haai, vah mujh se baddhkar haai kyonaki vah mujh se pahile tha." 
John1:16 kyonaki us kee paripoornta se ham sab ne praapt kiya arthata anugrah par anugraha. 
John1:17 isaliye ki vyavastha to moosa ke dara dee gai parantu anugrah, aur sachchai yeeshu maseeh ke dara pahunchee." 
John1:18 parameshvar ko kisee ne kabhee naheen dekha, aekalauta putra jo pita kee god men haai, usee ne use pragatt kiya.." 
John1:19 yoohanna kee gavahee yah haai, ki jab yahoodiyon ne yarooshalem se yajakon aur leveeyon ko us se yah poochhne ke liye bheja, ki too kaun haai?" 
John1:20 to us ne yah man liya, aur inkar naheen kiya parantu man liya ki maain maseeh naheen hoon." 
John1:21 tab unhon ne us se poochha, to fir kaun haai? kya too aeliyyah haai? us ne kaha, maain naheen hoon: to kya too vah bhavishyadvkta haai? us ne uttr diya, ki naheen." 
John1:22 tab unhon ne us se poochha, fir too haai kauna? taaki ham apane bhejanevalon ko uttr den too apane vishay men kya kahata haai?" 
John1:23 us ne kaha, maain jaaisa yashaayah bhvishyadvkta ne kaha haai, jangal men ek pukaranevale ka shabd hoon ki tum prabhu ka marga seedha karo." 
John1:24 ye fareesiyon kee or se bheje gaae the. 
John1:25 unhon ne us se yah prashn poochha, ki yadi too n maseeh haai, aur n eliyyah, aur n vah bhvishyadvkta haai, to fir bapaatisma kyon deta haai?" 
John1:26 yoohanna ne un ko uttr diya, ki maain to jal se bapatisma deta hoon parantu tumhare beech men aek vyaktai khda haai, jise tum naheen janate." 
John1:27 arthata mere bad anevala haai, jis kee jootee ka bandha maain kholane ke yogy naheen." 
John1:28 ye baten yaradan ke par baaitaniyyah men hui, jahan yoohanna bapaatisma deta tha." 
John1:29 doosare din us ne yeeshu ko apanee or ate dekhkar kaha, dekho, yah parameshvar ka memna haai, jo jagat ke pap utta le jata haai." 
John1:30 yah vahee haai, jis ke vishay men maain ne kaha tha, ki aek puroosh mere peechhe ata haai, jo mujh se shraeshtt haai, kyonki vah mujh se pahile tha." 
John1:31 aur maain to use paahichanata n tha, parantu isaliye maain jal se bapaatisma deta hua aya, ki vah israael par pragatt ho jaae." 
John1:32 aur yoohanna ne yah gavahee dee, ki maain ne atma ko kabootar kee nain akash se utarate dekha haai, aur vah us par tthar gaya." 
John1:33 aur maain to use paahichanata n tha, parantu jis ne mujhe jal se bapatisma dene ko bheja, usee ne mujh se kaha, ki jis par too atma ko utarate aur ttharate dekhe vahee pavitra atma se bapatisma denevala haai." 
John1:34 aur maain ne dekha, aur gavahee dee haai, ki yahee parameshvar ka putra haai.." 
John1:35 doosare din fir yoohanna aur usake chelon men se do jan khde huae the. 
John1:36 aur us ne yeeshu par jo ja raha tha draashtti karake kaha, dekho, yah parameshvar ka memna haai." 
John1:37 tab ve donon chele us kee sunakar yeeshu ke peechhe ho liae. 
John1:38 yeeshu ne firakar aur un ko peechhe ate dekhkar un se kaha, tum kis kee khoj men ho? unhon ne us se kaha, he rabbee, arthata he guroo too kahan rahata haai? us ne un se kaha, chalo, to dekh loge." 
John1:39 tab unhon ne akar usake rahane ka sthan dekha, aur us din usee ke sath rahe aur yah dasaven ghantte ke lagabhg tha." 
John1:40 un donon men se jo yoohanna kee bat sunakar yeeshu ke peechhe ho liae the, ek to shamaun pataras ka bhai andairyas tha." 
John1:41 us ne paahile apane sage bhain shamaun se milakar us se kaha, ki ham ko khaistas arthata maseeh mil gaya." 
John1:42 vah use yeeshu ke pas laya: yeeshu ne us par draashtti karake kaha, ki too yoohanna ka putra shamaun haai, too kefaa, arthata pataras kahalaaega.." 
John1:43 oodoosare din yeeshu ne galeel ko jana chaha aur filippus se milakar kaha, mere peechhe ho le." 
John1:44 filippus to andairyas aur pataras ke nagar baaitasaaida ka nivasee tha. 
John1:45 filippus ne natanaael se milakar us se kaha, ki jis ka varnn moosa ne vyavastha men aur bhavishyadvktaon ne kiya haai, vah ham ko mil gaya vah yoosufa ka putra, yeeshu nasaree haai." 
John1:46 natanaael ne us se kaha, kya koi achchhee vastu bhee nasarat se nikal sakatee haai? filippus ne us se kaha, chalakar dekh le." 
John1:47 yeeshu ne natanaael ko apanee or ate dekhkar usake vishay men kaha, dekho, yah sachamuch israaelee haai: is men kapatt naheen." 
John1:48 natanaael ne us se kaha, too mujhe kahan se janata haai? yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya us se paahile ki filippus ne tujhe bulaya, jab too anjeer ke ped ke tale tha, tab maain ne tujhe dekha tha." 
John1:49 natanaael ne us se kaha, too mujhe kahan se janata haai? yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya us se paahile ki filippus ne tujhe bulaya, jab too anjeer ke ped ke tale tha, tab maain ne tujhe dekha tha." 
John1:50 natanaael ne us ko uttr diya, ki he rabbee, too parameshvar ka putra haai too israael ka maharaja haai." 
John1:51 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya maain ne jo tujh se kaha, ki men ne tujhe anjeer ke ped ke tale dekha, kya too isee liye vishvas karata haai? too is se bade bade kam dekhega." 
John2:1 fir us se kaha, maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki tum svarga ko khula hua, aur parameshvar ke svargadooton ko upar jate aur manushy ke putra ke upar utarate dekhoge.." 
John2:2 fir teesare din galeel ke kana men kisee ka byah tha, aur yeeshu kee mata bhee vahan thee." 
John2:3 aur yeeshu aur usake chele bhee us byah men nevate gaae the. 
John2:4 jab dakhras ghatt gaya, to yeeshu kee mata ne us se kaha, ki un ke pas dakhras naheen raha." 
John2:5 yeeshu ne us se kaha, he maahila mujhe tujh se kya kama? abhee mera samay naheen aya." 
John2:6 us kee mata ne sevakon se kaha, jo kud vah tum se kahe, vahee karana." 
John2:7 vahan yahoodiyon ke shuuddh karane kee reeti ke anusar patthr ke chh: mattke dhare the, ji men do do, teen teen man samata tha." 
John2:8 yeeshu ne un se kaha, ab nikalakar bhoj ke pradhaan ke pas le jao." 
John2:9 ve le gaa, jab bhoj ke pradhaan ne vah panee chakha, jo dakhras ban gaya tha, aur naheen janata tha, ki vah kahan se aya he, parantu jin sevakon ne panee nikala tha, ve janate the to bhoj ke pradhaan ne doolhe ko bulakar, us se kaha." 
John2:10 har aek manushy paahile achchha dakhras deta haai aur jab log peekar chhk jate haai, tab madhyam deta haai parantu too ne achchha dakhras ab tak rakh chhoda haai." 
John2:11 yeeshu ne galeel ke kana men apana yah pahila chinh dikhakar apanee mahima pragatt kee aur usake chelon ne us par vishvas kiya.. 
John2:12 is ke bad vah aur us kee mata aur usake bhai aur usake chele kafaranahoom ko gaae aur vahan kuchh din rahe.. 
John2:13 yahoodiyon ka fasah ka pabrba nikatt tha aur yeeshu yarooshalem ko gaya. 
John2:14 aur us ne maandair men baail aur bhed aur kabootar ke bechanevalon or sarrafaon ko baaitte huae paya. 
John2:15 aur raassaiyon ka koda banakar, sab bhedon aur baailon ko mandair se nikal diya, aur sarrafaon ke paaise bithra dia, aur peeddhon ko ulatt diya." 
John2:16 aur kabootar bechanevalon se kaha inhen yahan se le jao: mere pita ke bhvan ko vyopar ka ghar mat banao. 
John2:17 tab usake chelon ko smaran aya ki likha haai, 'tere ghar kee dhaun mujhe kha jaaegeen." 
John2:18 is par yahoodiyon ne us se kaha, too jo yah karata haai to hamen kaun sa chinh dikhata he?" 
John2:19 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya ki is mandair ko ddha do, aur maain use teen din men khda kar doonga." 
John2:20 yahoodiyon ne kaha is mandair ke banane men chhyaialees varsha lage he, aur kya too use teen din men khda kar dega?" 
John2:21 parantu us ne apanee deh ke mandair ke vishay men kaha tha. 
John2:22 so jab vah mudorn men se jee utta to usake chelon ko smaran aya, ki us ne yah kaha tha aur unhon ne paavitra shaasr aur us vachan kee jo yeeshu ne kaha tha, prateeati kee.." 
John2:23 jab vah yarooshalem men fasah ke samay pabrba men tha, to bahuton ne un chinhon ko jo vah dikhata tha dekhkar usake nam par vishvas kiya." 
John2:24 parantu yeeshu ne apane ap ko un ke bhrose par naheen chhoda, kyonki vah sab ko janata tha." 
John2:25 aur use prayojan n tha, ki manushy ke vishay men koi gavahee de, kyonki vah ap janata tha, ki manushy ke man men kya haai?" 
John3:1 fareesiyon men se neekudemus nam aek manushy tha, jo yahoodiyon ka saradar tha." 
John3:2 us ne rat ko yeeshu ke pas akar us se kaha, he rabbee, ham janate haai, ki too parameshvar kee are se guroo ho kar aya haai kyonaki koi in chinhon ko jo too dikhata haai, yaadi parameshvar usake sath n ho, to naheen dikha sakata." 
John3:3 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya ki maain tujh se sach sach kahata hoo, yadi koi naye sire se n janmen to parameshvar ka rajy dekh naheen sakata." 
John3:4 neekudemus ne us se kaha, manushy jab booddha ho gaya, to kyonkar janm le sakata haai?" 
John3:5 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki maain tujh se sach sach kahata hoon jab tak koi manushy jal aur atma se n janme to vah parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh naheen kar sakata." 
John3:6 kyonaki jo shareer se janma haai, vah shareer haai aur jo atma se janma haai, vah atma haai." 
John3:7 achambha n kar, ki maain ne tujh se kaha ki tumhen naye sire se janm lena avashy haai." 
John3:8 hava jidhar chahatee haai udhar chalatee haai, aur too usaka shabd sunata haai, parantu naheen janata, ki vah kahan se atee aur kidhar ko jatee haai? jo koi atma se janma haai vah aeesa hee haai." 
John3:9 neekudemus ne us ko uttr diya ki ye baten kyonkar ho sakatee haain? 
John3:10 yah sunakar yeeshu ne us se kaha too israaeliyon ka guroo ho kar bhee kya in baton ko naheen samajhta. 
John3:11 maain tujh se sach sach kahata hoon ki ham jo janate haai, vah kahate haai, aur jise ham ne dekha haai us kee gavahee dete haai, aur tum hamaree gavahee grahan naheen karate." 
John3:12 jab maain ne tum se prathvee kee baten kahee, aur tum prateeati naheen karate, to yaadi maain tum se svarga kee baten kahoo, to fir kyonkar prateeti karoge?" 
John3:13 aur koi svarga par naheen chaddha, keval vaheen jo svarga se utara, arthata manushy ka putra jo svarga men haai." 
John3:14 aur jis reeti se moosa ne jangal men sanp ko unche par chaddhaya, usee reeati se avashy haai ki manushy ka putra bhee unche par chaddhaya jaae." 
John3:15 taaki jo koi vishvas kare us men anant jeevan paae.. 
John3:16 kyonaki parameshvar ne jagat se aeesa praem rakha ki us ne apana aekalauta putra de diya, taaki jo koi us par vishvas kare, vah nash n ho, parantu anant jeevan paae." 
John3:17 parameshvar ne apane putra ko jagat men isaliye naheen bheja, ki jagat par dand kee agyaa de parantu isaaliye ki jagat usake dara uddhar paae." 
John3:18 jo us par vishvas karata haai, us par dand kee agyaa naheen hotee, parantu jo us par vishvas naheen karata, vah doshaee tthara chuka isaliye ki us ne parameshvar ke aekalaute putra ke nam par vishvas naheen kiya." 
John3:19 aur dand kee agyaa ka karan yah haai ki jyoti jagat men ai haai, aur manushyon ne andhakar ko jyoti se adhaik piry jana kyonki un ke kam bure the." 
John3:20 kyonaki jo koi burai karata haai, vah jyoti se baair rakhta haai, aur jyoti ke nikatt naheen ata, aeesa n ho ki usake kamon par dosh lagaya jaae." 
John3:21 parantu jo sachchai par chalata haaikh vah jyoti ke nikatt ata haai, taaki usake kam pragatt ho, ki vah parameshvar kee or se kiae gaae haain." 
John3:22 is ke bad yeeshu aur usake chele yahoodiya desh men aae aur vah vahan un ke sathr rahakar bapaatisma dene laga. 
John3:23 aur yoohanna bhee shaalema ke nikatt aeenon men bapaatisma deta tha. kyonaki vahan bahut jal tha aur log akar bapatisma lete the. 
John3:24 kyonaki yoohanna us samay tak jelakhane men naheen dala gaya tha. 
John3:25 vahan yoohanna ke chelon ka kisee yahoodee ke sath shuuddh ike vishay men vada-avivad hua. 
John3:26 aur unhon ne yoohanna ke pas akar us se kaha, he rabbee, jo vyaktai yaradan ke par tere sath tha, aur jis kee too ne gavahee dee haai dek, vah bapatisma deta haai, aur sab usake pas ate haain." 
John3:27 yoohanna ne uttr diya, jab tak manushy ko svarga se n diya jaae tab tak vah kuchh naheen pa sakata." 
John3:28 tum to ap hee mere gavah ho, ki maain ne kaha, maain maseeh nahee, parantu usake age bheja gaya hoon." 
John3:29 jis kee dulaahin haai, vahee doolha haai: parantu doolhe ka mitra jo khda hua us kee sunata haai, doolhe ke shabd se bahut hashairt hota haai ab mera yah harsha poora hua haai." 
John3:30 avashy haai ki vah baddhe aur maain ghatoon.. 
John3:31 jo upar se ata haai, vah sarvottm haai, jo prathvee se ata haai vah prathvee ka haai aur prathvee kee hee baten kahata haai: jo svarga se ata haai, vah sab ke upar haai." 
John3:32 jo kuchh us ne dekha, aur suna haai, usee kee gavahee deta haai aur koi us kee gavahee grahan naheen karata." 
John3:33 jis ne us kee gavahee grahan kar lee us ne is bat par chhap de dee ki parameshvar sachcha haai. 
John3:34 kyonaki jise parameshvar ne bheja haai, vah parameshvar kee baten kahata haai: kyonaki vah atma nap napakar naheen deta." 
John3:35 pita putra se praem rakhta haai, aur us ne sab vastuen usake hath men de dee haain." 
John3:36 jo putra par vishvas karata haai, anant jeevan usaka haai parantu jo putra kee naheen manata, vah jeevan ko naheen dekhega, parantu parameshvar ka krodha us par rahata haai.." 
John4:1 fir jab prabhu ko maloom hua, ki fareeasiyon ne suna haai, ki yeeshu yoohanna se aadhaik chele banata, aur unhen bapatisma deta haai." 
John4:2 yadhypi yeeshu ap naheen baran usake chele bapaatisma dete the. 
John4:3 tab yahoodiya ko chhodkar fir galeel ko chala gaya. 
John4:4 aur us ko samariya se hokar jana avashy tha. 
John4:5 so vah sookhar nam samariya ke aek nagar tak aya, jo us boomi ke pas haai, jis yakoob ne apane putra yoosufa ko diya tha." 
John4:6 aur yakoob ka kooan bhee vaheen tha so yeeshu marga ka thka hua us kooaen par yonhee baaitt gaya, aur yah bat chhtte ghantte ke lagabhg hui." 
John4:7 itane men aek samaree sree jal bhrane ko ai: yeeshu ne us se kaha, mujhe panee pila." 
John4:8 kyonaki usake chele to nagar men bhojan mol lene ko gaae the. 
John4:9 us samaree sree ne us se kaha, too yahoodee hokar mujh samaree sree se panee kyon mangata haai? kyonaki yahoodee samariyon ke sath kisee prakar ka vyavahar naheen rakhte." 
John4:10 yeeshu ne uttr diya, yaadi too parameshvar ke baradan ko janatee, aur yah bhee janatee ki vah kaun haai jo tujh se kahata haai mujhe panee pila to too us se mangatee, aur vah tujhe jeevan ka jal deta." 
John4:11 sree ne us se kaha, he prabhu, tere pas jal bhrane ko to kuchh haai bhee nahee, aur kooan gahira haai: to fir vah jeevan ka jal tere pas kaha se aya?" 
John4:12 kya too hamare pita yakoob se bada haai, jis ne hamen yah kooan diya aur apahee apane santan, aur apane ddharon samet us men se peeya?" 
John4:13 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya, ki jo koi yah jal peeaega vah fir piyasa hoga." 
John4:14 parantu jo koi us jal men se peeaega jo maain use doonga, vah fir anantakal tak piyasa n hoga: baran jo jal maain use doonga, vah us men aek sota ban jaaega jo anant jeevan ke liye umadta rahega." 
John4:15 saee ne us se kaha, he prabhu, vah jal mujhe de taaki maain pyasee n houn aur n jal bhrane ko itanee door aun." 
John4:16 yeeshu ne us se kaha, ja, apane paati ko yahan bula la." 
John4:17 sree ne uttr diya, ki maain bina paati kee hoon: yeeshu ne us se kaha, too tteek kahatee haai ki maain bina paati kee hoon." 
John4:18 kyonaki too panch paati kar chukee haai, aur jis ke pas too ab haai vah bhee tera paati naheen yah too ne sach kaha haai." 
John4:19 sree ne us se kaha, he prabhu, mujhe gyaat hota haai ki too bhvishyadvkta haai." 
John4:20 hamare bapadadon ne usee pahad par bhjan kiya: aur tum kahate ho ki vah jagah jahan bhjan karana chaahiae yarooshalem men haai. 
John4:21 yeeshu ne us se kaha, he naree, meree bat kee prateeti kar ki vah samay ata haai ki tum n to is pahad par pita ka bhjan karoge n yarooshalem men." 
John4:22 tum jise naheen janate, usaka bhjan karate ho aur ham jise janate haain usaka bhjan karate haain kyonaki uddhar yahoodiyon men se haai." 
John4:23 parantu vah samay ata haai, baran ab bhee haai jis men sachche bhkt pita ka bhjan atma aur sachchai se karenge, kyonki pita apane liye aeese hee bhjan karanevalon ko ddoonddhta haai." 
John4:24 parameshvar atma haai, aur avashy haai ki usake bhjan karanevale atma aur sachchaai se bhjan karen." 
John4:25 sree ne us se kaha, maain janatee hoon ki maseeh jo kheestus kahalata haai, anevala haai jab vah aaega, to hamen sab baten bata dega." 
John4:26 yeeshu ne us se kaha, maain jo tujh se bol raha hoo, vahee hoon.." 
John4:27 itane men usake chele a gaa, aur achambha karane lage, ki vah sree se baten kar raha haai taubhee kisee ne n kaha, ki too kya chahata haai? ya kis liye us se baten karata haai." 
John4:28 tab sree apana ghada chhodkar nagar men chalee gai, aur logon se kahane lagee." 
John4:29 ao, aek manushy ko dekho, jis ne sab kuchh jo maain ne kiya mujhe bata diya: kaheen yah to maseeh naheen haai?" 
John4:30 so ve nagar se nikalakar usake pas ane lage. 
John4:31 itane men usake chele yeeshu se yah binatee karane lage, ki he rabbee, kuchh kha le." 
John4:32 parantu us ne un se kaha, mere pas khane ke liye aeesa bhojan haai jise tum naheen janate." 
John4:33 tab chelon ne apas men kaha, kya koi usake liye kuchh khane ko laya haai?" 
John4:34 yeeshu ne un se kaha, mera bhojan yah haai, ki apane bhejanevale kee ichchha ke anusar chaloon aur usaka kam poora karoon." 
John4:35 kya tum naheen kahate, ki kattnee hone men ab bhee char maheene pade haain? dekho, maain tum se kahata hoo, apanee ankhe uttakar kheton par draashtti dalo, ki ve kattnee ke liye pak chuke haain." 
John4:36 aur kattnevala majadooree pata, aur anant jeevan ke liye fal battorata haai taaki bonevala aur kattnevala donon milakar anand karen." 
John4:37 kyonaki is par yah kahavat tteek baaitttee haai ki banevala aur haai aur kattnevala aura.
