John4:38 maain ne tumhen vah khet kattne ke liye bheja, jis men tum ne parishram naheen kiya: auron ne parishram kiya aur tum un ke paarishram ke fal men bhagee hue.." 
John4:39 aur us nagar ke bahut samariyon ne us sree ke kahane se, jis ne yah gavahee dee thee, ki us ne sab kuchh jo maain ne kiya haai, mujhe bata diya, vishvas kiya." 
John4:40 tab jab ye samaree usake pas aa, to us se binatee karane lage, ki hamare yahan raha: so vah vahan do din tak raha." 
John4:41 aur usake vachan ke karan aur bhee bahuteron ne vishvas kiya. 
John4:42 aur us sree se kaha, ab ham tere kahane kee se vishvas naheen karate kyonaki ham ne ap hee sun liya, aur janate haain ki yahee sachamuch men jagat ka uddharakarta haai.." 
John4:43 fir un do dinon ke bad vah vahan se kooch karake galeel ko gaya. 
John4:44 kyonaki yeeshu ne ap hee sakshaee dee, ki bhvishyadvkta apane desh men adar naheen pata." 
John4:45 jab vah galeel men aya, to galeelee anand ke sath us se mile kyonaki jitane kam us ne yarooshalem men pabrba ke samay kiae the, unhon ne un sab ko dekha tha, kyonaki ve bhee pabrba men gaae the.." 
John4:46 tab vah fir galeel ke kana men aya, jahan us ne panee ko dakh ras banaya tha: aur raja ka karmacharee tha jis ka putra kafaranahoom men beemar tha." 
John4:47 vah yah sunakar ki yeeshu yahoodiya se galeel men a gaya haai, usake pas gaya aur us se binatee karane laga ki chalakar mere putra ko changa kar de: kyonki vah marane par tha." 
John4:48 yeeshu ne us se kaha, jab tak tum chinh aur adabhut kam n dekhoge tab tak kadaapi vishvas n karoge." 
John4:49 raja ke karmacharee ne us se kaha he prabhu, mere balak kee mratyu hone ke pahile chala." 
John4:50 yeeshu ne us se kaha, ja, tera putra jeeavit haai: us manushy ne yeeshu kee kahee hui bat kee prateeati kee, aur chala gaya." 
John4:51 vah marga men ja raha tha, ki usake das us se a mile aur kahane lage ki tera ladka jeeavit haai." 
John4:52 us n un se poochha ki kis ghadee vah achda hone laga? unhon ne us se kaha, kal sataven ghantte men usaka jvar utar gaya." 
John4:53 tab pita jan gaya, ki yah usee ghadee hua jis ghadee yeeshu ne us se kaha, tera putra jeevit haai, aur us ne aur usake sare gharane ne vishvas kiya." 
John4:54 yah doosara ashcharyakarma tha, jo yeeshu ne yahoodiya se galeel men akar dikhaya.." 
John5:1 in baton ke peechhe yahoodiyon ka aek pabrba hua aur yeeshu yarooshalem ko gaya.. 
John5:2 yarooshalem men bhed-faattk ke pas aek kund haai jo ibraanee bhasha men betahasada kahalata haai, aur usake panch osare haainn." 
John5:3 in men bahut se beemar, andho, langade aur sookhe angavale panee ke hilane kee asha men pade rahate the." 
John5:4 kyonaki niyuaktai samay par parameshvar ke svargadoot kund men utarakar panee ko hilaya karate the: panee hilate hee jo koi paahile utarata vah changa ho jata tha chahe usakee koi beemaree kyon n ho. 
John5:5 vahan aek manushy tha, jo adtees varsha se beemaree men pada tha." 
John5:6 yeeshu ne use pada hua dekhkar aur janakar ki vah bahut dinon se is dasha men pada haai, us se poochha, kya too changa hona chahata haai?" 
John5:7 us beemar ne us ko uttr diya, ki he prabhu, mere pas koi manushy nahee, ki jab panee hilaya jaa, to mujhe kund men utare parantu mere pahunchate pahunchate doosara mujh se paahile utar padta haai." 
John5:8 yeeshu ne us se kaha, ut, apanee khatt uttakar chal fira." 
John5:9 vah manushy turant changa ho gaya, aur apanee khatt uttakar chalane firane laga." 
John5:10 vah sabt ka din tha. isaaliye yahoodee us se, jo changa hua tha, kahane lage, ki aj to sabt ka din haai, tujhe khatt uttanee uchitt naheen." 
John5:11 us ne unhen uttr diya, ki jis ne mujhe changa kiya, usee ne mujh se kaha, apanee khatt uttakar chal fira." 
John5:12 unhon ne us se poochha vah kaun manushy haai jis ne tujh se kaha, khatt uttakar chal fira?" 
John5:13 parantu jo changa ho gaya tha, vah naheen janata tha vah kaun haai kyonaki us jagah men bheed hone ke karan yeeshu vahan se hatt gaya tha." 
John5:14 in baton ke bad vah yeeshu ko maandair men mila, tab us n us se kaha, dek, too to changa ho gaya haai fir se pap mat karana, aeesa n ho ki is se koi bharee vipaati tujh par a pade." 
John5:15 us manushy ne jakar yahoodiyon se kah diya, ki jis ne mujhe changa kiya, vah yeeshu haai." 
John5:16 is karan yahoodee yeeshu ko satane lage, kyonaki vah aeese aeese kam sabt ke din karata tha." 
John5:17 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha, ki mera pita ab tak kam karata haai, aur maain bhee kam karata hoon." 
John5:18 is karan yahoodee aur bhee aadhaik usake mar dalane ka prayatn karane lage, ki vah n keval sabt ke din kee vidhai ko todta, parantu parameshvar ko apana pita kah kar, apane ap ko parameshvar ke tuly ttharata tha.." 
John5:19 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha, maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, putra ap se kuchh naheen kar sakata, keval vah jo pita ko karate dekhta haai, kyonki jin jin kamon ko vah karata haai unhen putra bhee usee reeati se karata haai." 
John5:20 kyonaki pita putra se praeeati rakhta haai aur jo jo kam vah ap karata haai, vah sab use dikhata haai aur vah in se bhee bade kam use dikhaaega, taaki tum achambha karo." 
John5:21 kyoki jaaisa pita mare huon ko uttata aur jilata haai, vaaisa hee putra bhee jinhen chahata haai unhen jilata haai." 
John5:22 aur pita kisee ka nyay bhee naheen karata, parantu nyay karane ka sab kam putra ko saunp diya haai." 
John5:23 isaliye ki sab log jaaise pita ka adar karate haain vaaise hee putra ka bhee adar karen: jo putra ka adar naheen karata, vah pita ka jis ne use bheja haai, adar naheen karata." 
John5:24 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, jo mera vachan sunakar mere bhejanevale kee prateeti karata haai, anant jeevan usaka haai, aur us par dand kee agyaa naheen hotee parantu vah mratyu se par hokar jeevan men pravesh kar chuka haai." 
John5:25 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, vah samay ata haai, aur ab haai, jis men mratak parameshvar ke putra ka shabd sunenge, aur jo sunenge ve jeeaenge." 
John5:26 kyonaki jis reeti se pita apane ap men jeevan rakhta haai, usee reeti se us ne putra ko bhee yah aadhaikar diya haai ki apane ap men jeevan rakhe." 
John5:27 baran use nyay karane ka bhee adhaikar diya haai, isaaliye ki vah manushy ka putra haai." 
John5:28 is se achambha mat karo, kyonaki vah samay ata haai, ki jitane kabraen men haai, usaka shabd sunakar nikalenge." 
John5:29 jinhon ne bhlai kee haai ve jeevan ke punarootthan ke liye jee uttenge aur jinhon ne burai kee haai ve dand ke punarootthan ke liye jee uttenge. 
John5:30 maain apane ap se kuchh naheen kar sakata jaaisa sunata hoo, vaaisa nyay karata hoo, aur mera nyay sachcha haai kyonaki maain apanee ichchha nahee, parantu apane bhejanevale kee ichchha chahata hoon." 
John5:31 yaadi maain ap hee apanee gavahee doon to meree gavahee sachchee naheen. 
John5:32 aek aur haai jo meree gavahee deta haai vah sachchee haai. 
John5:33 tum ne yoohanna se puchhvaya aur us ne sachchai kee gavahee dee haai. 
John5:34 parantu maain apane vishay men manushy kee gavahee naheen chahata taubhee maain ye baten isaliye kahata hoo, ki tumhen uddhar mile." 
John5:35 vah jo jalata aur chamakata hua deepak tha aur tumhen kuchh der tak us kee jyoti me, magan hona achchha laga." 
John5:36 parantu mere pas jo gavahee haai vah yoohanna kee gavahee se badee haai: kyonki jo kam pita ne mujhe poora karane ko saunpa haai arthata yahee kam jo maain karata hoo, ve mere gavah haai, ki pita ne mujhe bheja haai." 
John5:37 aur pita jis ne mujhe bheja haai, usee ne meree gavahee dee haai: tum ne n kabhee usaka shabd suna, aur n usaka roop dekha haai." 
John5:38 aur usake vachan ko man men sthiar naheen rakhte kyonki jise us ne bheja us kee prateeati naheen karate. 
John5:39 tum paavitra shaasr men ddoonddhte ho, kyonaki samajhte ho ki us men anant jeevan tumhen milata haai, aur yah vahee haai, jo meree gavahee deta haai." 
John5:40 fir bhee tum jeevan pane ke liye mere pas ana naheen chahate. 
John5:41 maain manushyon se adar naheen chahata. 
John5:42 parantu maain tumhen janata hoo, ki tum men parameshvar ka praem naheen." 
John5:43 maain apane pita ke nam se aya hoo, aur tum mujhe grahan naheen karate yaadi koi aur apane hee nam se aa, to use grahan kar loge." 
John5:44 tum jo aek doosare se adar chahate ho aur vah adar jo advait parameshvar kee or se haai, naheen chahate, kisee prakar vishvas kar sakate ho?" 
John5:45 yah n samajho, ki maain pita ke samhane tum par dosh lagaunga: tum par dosh laganevala to haai, arthata moosa jis par tum ne bhrosa rakha haai." 
John5:46 kyonaki yadi tum moosa kee prateeati karate, to meree bhee prateeti karate, isaaliye ki us ne mere vishay men likha haai." 
John5:47 parantu yadi tum us kee likhee hui baton kee prateeti naheen karate, to meree baton kee kyonkar prateeati karoge.." 
John6:1 in baton ke bad yeeshu galeel kee jheel arthata tibiriyas kee jheel ke pas gaya. 
John6:2 aur aek badee bheed usake peechhe ho lee kayonaki jo ashcharya karma vah beemaron par dikhata tha ve un ko dekhte the. 
John6:3 tab yeeshu pahad par chaddhkar apane chelon ke sath vahan baaitta. 
John6:4 aur yahoodiyon ke fasah ke pabrba nikatt tha. 
John6:5 tab yeeshu ne apanee ankhe uttakar aek badee bheed ko apane pas ate dekha, aur filippus se kaha, ki ham in ke bhojan ke liye kahan se rottee mol laaen?" 
John6:6 parantu us ne yah bat use parakhne ke liye kahee kyonki vah ap janata tha ki maain kya karoonga. 
John6:7 filippus ne us ko uttr diya, ki do sau deenar kee rottee un ke liye pooree bhee n hongee ki un men se har aek ko thodee thodee mil jaae." 
John6:8 usake chelon men se shamaun pataras ke bhai andairyas ne us se kaha. 
John6:9 yahan aek ladka haai jis ke pas jav kee panch rottee aur do machhaliyan haain parantu itane logon ke liye ve kya haain. 
John6:10 yeeshu ne kaha, ki logon ko baaitta do. us jagah bahut ghaas thee: tab ve log jo ginatee men lagabhg panch hajar ke the, baaitt gaae:" 
John6:11 tab yeeshu ne rottyaian lee, aur dhanyavad karake baaittnevalon ko bantt dee: aur vaaise hee machhliyon men se jitanee ve chahate the bantt diya." 
John6:12 jab ve khakar trapt ho gaae to us ne apane chelon se kaha, ki bache huae ttukade battor lo, ki kuchh faenka n jaae." 
John6:13 so unhon ne battora, aur jav kee panch rottyaien ke ttukade jo khanevalon se bach rahe the un kee barah ttokariyan bhreen." 
John6:14 tab jo ashcharya karma us ne kar dikhaya use ve log dekhkar kahane lage ki vah bhvishyadvkta jo jagat men anevala tha nishchay yahee haai. 
John6:15 yeeshu yah janakar ki ve mujhe raja banane ke liye akar pakadna chahate haai, fir pahad par akela chala gaya." 
John6:16 fir jab sandhya hui, to usake chele jheel ke kinare gaae." 
John6:17 aur nav par chaddhkar jheel ke par kafaranahoom ko jane lage: us samay andhora ho gaya tha, aur yeeshu abhee tak un ke pas naheen aya tha." 
John6:18 aur andhaee ke karan jheel men lahare uttne lageen. 
John6:19 so jab ve khete khete teen char meel ke lagabhg nikal gaa, to unhon ne yeeshu ko jheel par chalate, aur nav ke nikatt ate dekha, aur dr gaae." 
John6:20 parantu us ne un se kaha, ki maain hoon dro mata." 
John6:21 so ve use nav par chaddha lene ke liye taaiyar huae aur turant vah nav ke sthan par ja pahunchee jahan vah jate the. 
John6:22 doosare din us bheed ne, jo jheel ke par khdee thee, yah dekha, ki yahan aek ko chhodkar aur koi chhottee nav n thee, aur yeeshu apane chelon ke sath us nav par n chaddha, parantu keval usake chele chale gaae the." 
John6:23 taubhee aur chhottee naven tibiriyas se us jagah ke nikatt ai, jahan unhon ne prabhu ke dhanyavad karane ke bad rottee khai thee." 
John6:24 so jab bheed ne dekha, ki yahan n yeeshu haai, aur n usake chele, to ve bhee chhottee chhottee navon par chaddh ke yeeshu ko ddoonddhte huae kafaranahoom ko pahunche." 
John6:25 aur jheel ke par us se milakar kaha, he rabbee, too yahan kab aya?" 
John6:26 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya, ki maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, tum mujhe isaliye naheen ddoonddhte ho ki tum ne achaambhiat kam dekhe, parantu isaliye ki tum rottyaian khakar trapt huae." 
John6:27 nashaman bhojan ke liye paarishram n karo, parantu us bhojan ke liye jo anant jeevan tak ttharata haai, jise manushy ka putra tumhen dega, kyonaki pita, arthata parameshvar ne usee par chhap kar dee haai." 
John6:28 unhon ne us se kaha, parameshvar ke kayrya karane ke liye ham kya karen?" 
John6:29 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya parameshvar ka kayrya yah haai, ki tum us par, jise us ne bheja haai, vishvas karo." 
John6:30 tab unhon ne us se kaha, fir too kaun ka chinh dikhata haai ki ham use dekhkar teree prateeati kare, too kaun sa kam dikhata haai?" 
John6:31 hamare bapadadon ne jangal men manna khaya jaaisa likha haai ki us ne unhen khane ke liye svarga se rottee dee. 
John6:32 yeeshu ne un se kaha, maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki moosa ne tumhen vah rottee svarga se n dee, parantu mera pita tumhen sachchee rottee svarga se deta haai." 
John6:33 kyoki parameshvar kee rottee vahee haai, jo svarga se utarakar jagat ko jeevan detee haai." 
John6:34 tab unhon ne us se kaha, he prabhu, yah rottee hamen sarvada diya kara." 
John6:35 yeeshu ne un se kaha, jeevan kee rottee maain hoon: jo mere pas aaega vah kabhee bookha n hoga aur jo mujh par vishvas karega, vah kabhee piyasa n hoga." 
John6:36 parantu maain ne tum se kaha, ki tum ne mujhe dekh bhee liya haai, tobhee vishvas naheen karate." 
John6:37 jo kuchh pita mujhe deta haai vah sab mere pas aaega, use maain kabhee n nikaloonga." 
John6:38 kyonaki maain apanee ichchha nahee, baran apane bhejanevale kee ichchha pooree karane ke liye svarga se utara hoon." 
John6:39 aur mere bhejanevale kee ichchha yah haai ki jo kuchh us ne mujhe diya haai, us men se maain kuchh n khoun parantu use antim din fir jila uttaun." 
John6:40 kyonaki mere pita kee ichchha yah haai, ki jo koi putra ko dekhe, aur us par vishvas kare, vah anant jeevan paae aur maain use anatim din fir jila uttaunga." 
John6:41 so yahoodee us par kudkudane lage, isaliye ki us ne kaha tha ki jo rottee svarga se utaree, vah maain hoon." 
John6:42 aur unhon ne kaha kya yah yoosufa ka putra yeeshu nahee, jis ke mata pita ko ham janate haain? to vah kyonkar kahata haai ki maain svarga se utara hoon." 
John6:43 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya, ki apas men mat kudkudao." 
John6:44 koi mere pas naheen a sakata, jab tak pita, jis ne mujhe bheja haai, use kheench n le aur maain us ko antim din fir jila uttaunga." 
John6:45 bhavishyadvktaon ke lekhon men yah likha haai, ki ve sab parameshvar kee or se sikhaae huae honge. jis kisee ne pita se suna aur seekha haai, vah mere pas ata haai." 
John6:46 yah nahee, ki kisee ne pita ko dekha parantu jo parameshvar kee or se haai, keval usee ne pita ko dekha haai." 
John6:47 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki jo koi vishvas karata haai, anant jeevan usee ka haai." 
John6:48 jeevan kee rottee maain hoon. 
John6:49 tumhare bapadadon ne jangal men manna khaya aur mar gaae. 
John6:50 yah vah rottee haai jo svarga se utaratee haai taaki manushy us men se khaae aur n mare. 
John6:51 jeevan kee rottee jo svarga se utaree maain hoon. yadi koi is rottee men se khaa, to sarvada jeeavit rahega aur jo rottee maain jagat ke jeevan ke liye doonga, vah mera mans haai." 
John6:52 is par yahoodee yah kahakar apas men jhgadne lage, ki yah manushy kyonkar hamen apana mans khane ko de sakata haai?" 
John6:53 yeeshu ne un se kaha maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon jab tak manushy ke putra ka mans n khao, aur usaka lohoo n peeo, tum men jeevan naheen." 
John6:54 jo mera mans khata, aur mera lohoo peeta he, anant jeevan usee ka haai, aur maain antim din fir use jila uttaunga." 
John6:55 kyonaki mera mans vastav men khane kee vastu haai aur mera lohoo vastav men peen kee vastu haai. 
John6:56 jo mera mans khata aur mera lohoo peeta haai, vah mujh men sthiar bana rahata haai, aur maain us men." 
John6:57 jaaisa jeevate pita ne mujhe bheja aur maain pita ke karan jeevit hoon vaaisa hee vah bhee jo mujhe khaaega mere karan jeevit rahega. 
John6:58 jo rottee svarga se utaree yahee haai, bapadadon ke saman naheen ki khaya, aur mar gaae: jo koi yah rottee khaaega, vah sarvada jeevit rahega." 
John6:59 ye baten us ne kafaranahoom ke aek aradhanalay men upadesh dete samay kaheen. 
John6:60 isaliye usake chelon men se bahuton ne yah sunakar kaha, ki yah bat nagavar haai ise kaun sun sakata haai?" 
John6:61 yeeshu ne apane man men yah jan kar ki mere chele apas men is bat par kudkudate haai, un se poochha, kya is bat se tumhen ttokar lagatee haai?" 
John6:62 aur yaadi tum manushy ke putra ko jahan vah pahile tha, vahan upar jate dekhoge, to kya hoga?" 
John6:63 atma to jeevanadayak haai, shareer se kuchh labh naheen: jo baten maain ne tum se kaheen haain ve atma haai, aur jeevan bhee haain." 
John6:64 parantu tum men se kitane aeese haain jo vishvas naheen karate: kyonaki yeeshu to paahile hee se janata tha ki jo vishvas naheen karate, ve kaun haain? aur kaun mujhe pakadvaaega." 
John6:65 aur us ne kaha, isee liye maain ne tum se kaha tha ki jab tak kisee ko pita kee or yah baradan n diya jaae tak tak vah mere pas naheen a sakata." 
John6:66 is par usake chelon men se bahutere ultte fir gaae aur usake bad usake sath n chale. 
John6:67 tab yeeshu ne un barahon se kaha, kya tum bhee chale jana chahate ho?" 
John6:68 shamaun pataras ne us ko uttr diya, ki he prabhu ham kis ke pas jaaen? anant jeevan kee baten to tere hee pas haain." 
John6:69 aur ham ne vishvas kiya, aur jan gaae haai, ki parameshvar ka pavitra jan too hee haai." 
John6:70 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya, kya maain ne tum barahon ko naheen chun liya? taubhee tum men se aek vyaaktai shautan haai." 
John6:71 yah us ne shamaun iskariyotee ke putra yahoodah ke vishay men kaha, kyoenaki yahee jo un barahon men se tha, use pakadvane ko tha.." 
John7:1 in baton ke bad yeeshu galeel men firata raha, kyonaki yahoodee use mar dalane ka yatn kar rahe the, isaaliye vah yahoodiya men firana n chahata tha." 
John7:2 aur yahoodiyon ka mandpon ka pabrba nikatt tha. 
John7:3 isaliye usake bhaiyon ne us se kaha, yahan se kooch karake yahoodiya men chala ja, ki jo kam too karata haai, unhen tere chele bhee dekhen." 
John7:4 kyonankai aeesa koi n hoga jo prasiddh hona chahe, aur chhpaikar kam kare: yadi too yah kam karata haai, to apane tai jagat par pragatt kara." 
John7:5 kyonaki usake bhai bhee us par vishvas naheen karate the. 
John7:6 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha, mera samay abhee naheen aya parantu tumhare liye sab samay haai." 
John7:7 jagat tum se baair naheen kar sakata, parantu vah mujh se baair karata haai, kyonaki maain usake virodha men yah gavahee deta hoo, ki usake kam bure haain." 
John7:8 tum pabrba men jao: maain abhee is pabrba men naheen jata kyonki abhee tak mera samay poora naheen hua. 
John7:9 vah un se ye baten kahakar galeel hee men rah gaya.. 
John7:10 parantu jab usake bhai pabrba men chale gaa, to vah ap hee pragatt men nahee, parantu manon gupt hokar gaya." 
John7:11 to yahoodee pabrba men use yah kahakar ddoonddhne lage ki vah kahan haai? 
John7:12 aur logon men usake vishay chupake chupake bahut see baten huin: kitane kahate the vah bhla manushy haai: aur kitane kahate the nahee, vah logon ko bhramata haai." 
John7:13 taubhee yahoodiyon ke bhy ke mare koi vyaktai usake vishay men khulakar naheen bolata tha. 
John7:14 aur jab pabrba ke adho din beet gaae to yeeshu mandair men jakar upadesh karane laga. 
John7:15 tab yahoodiyon ne achambha karake kaha, ki ise bin paddhe vidha kaaise a gai?" 
John7:16 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya, ki mera upadesh mera nahee, parantu mere bhejanevale ka haai." 
John7:17 yaadi koi us kee ichchha par chalana chahe, to vah is upadesh ke vishay men jan jaaega ki vah parameshvar kee or se haai, ya maain apanee or se kahata hoon." 
John7:18 jo apanee or se kuchh kahata haai, vah apanee hee baddhai chahata haai parantu jo apane bhejanevale kee badai chahata haai vahee sachcha haai, aur us men adharma naheen." 
John7:19 kya moosa ne tumhen vyavastha naheen dee? taubhee tum men se kai vyavastha par naheen chalata. tum kyon mujhe mar dalana chahate ho? 
John7:20 logon ne uttr diya ki tujh men dushttatma haai kaun tujhe mar dalana chahata haai? 
John7:21 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya, ki maain ne aek kam kiya, aur tum sab achambha karate ho." 
John7:22 isee karan moosa ne tumhen khtane kee agyaa dee haai yah naheen ki vah moosa kee or se haai parantu bapa-dadon se chalee ai haai, aur tum sabt ke din ko manushy ka khtana karate ho." 
John7:23 jab sabt ke din manushy ka khtana kiya jata haai taki moosa kee vyavastha kee agyaa ttl n jaa, to tum mujh par kyon isaliye krodha karate ho, ki maain ne sabt ke din aek manushy ko pooree reeti se changa kiya." 
John7:24 munh dekhkar nyay n chukao, parantu tteek tteek nyay chukao.." 
John7:25 tab kitane yarooshalemee kahane lage kya yah vah nahee, jis ke mar dalane ka prayatn kiya ja raha haai." 
John7:26 parantu dekho, vah to khullamakhulla baten karata haai aur koi us se kuchh naheen kahata kya sambhv haai ki saradaron ne sach sach jan liya haai ki yahee maseeh haai." 
John7:27 is ko to ham janate haai, ki yah kahan ka haai parantu maseeh jab aaega, to koi n janega ki vah kahan ka haai." 
John7:28 tab yeeshu ne mandair men upadesh dete huae pukar ke kaha, tum mujhe janate ho aur yah bhee janate ho ki maain kahan ka hoon: maain to ap se naheen aya parantu mera bhejanevala sachcha haai, us ko tum naheen janate." 
John7:29 maain use janata hoon kyonaki maain us kee or se hoon aur usee ne mujhe bheja haai. 
John7:30 is par unhon ne use pakadna chaha taubhee kisee ne us par hath n dala, kyonaki usaka samay ab tak n aya tha." 
John7:31 aur bheed men se bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya, aur kahane lage, ki maseeh jab aaega, to kya is se adhaik ashcharyakarma dikhaaega jo is ne dikhaae?" 
John7:32 fareesiyon ne logon ko usake vishay men ye baten chupake chupake karate suna aur mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne usake pakadne ko sipahee bheje. 
John7:33 is par yeeshu ne kaha, maain thodee der tak aur tumhare sath hoon tab apane bhejanevale ke pas chala jaunga." 
John7:34 tum mujhe ddoonddhoge, parantu naheen paoge aur jahan maain hoo, vahan tum naheen a sakate." 
John7:35 yahoodiyon ne apas men kaha, yah kahan jaaega, ki ham ise n paaenge: kya vah un ke pas jaaega, jo yoonaniyon men tittr bittr hokar rahate haai, aur yoonaniyon ko bhee upadesh dega?" 
John7:36 yah kya bat haai jo us ne kahee, ki tum mujhe ddoonddhoge, parantu n paoge: aur jahan maain hoo, vahan tum naheen a sakate?" 
John7:37 fir pabrba ke anatim din, jo mukhy din haai, yeeshu khda hua aur pukar kar kaha, yaadi koi piyasa ho to mere pas akar peeae." 
John7:38 jo mujh par vishvas karega, jaaisa pavitra shaasr men aya haai usake day men se jeevan ke jal kee nadiyan bah nikalegee." 
John7:39 us ne yah vachan us atma ke vishay men kaha, jise us par vishvas karanevale pane par the kyonaki atma ab tak n utara tha kyonaki yeeshu ab tak apanee maahima ko n pahuncha tha." 
John7:40 tab bheed men se kisee kisee ne ye baten sun kar kaha, sachamuch yahee vah bhvishyadvkta haai." 
John7:41 auron ne kaha yah maseeh haai, parantu kisee ne kaha kyon? kya maseeh galeel se aaega?" 
John7:42 kya pavitra shaasr men naheen aya, ki maseeh daud ke vansh se aur baaitalaham ganv se aaega jahan daud rahata tha?" 
John7:43 so usake karan logon men foott padee. 
John7:44 un men se kitane use pakadna chahate the, parantu kisee ne us par hath n dala.." 
John7:45 tab sipahee mahayajakon aur fareeasiyon ke pas aa, aur unhon ne un se kaha, tum use kyon naheen laae?" 
John7:46 sipaahiyon ne uttr diya, ki kisee manushy ne kabhee aeesee baten n kee." 
John7:47 fareesiyon ne un ko uttr diya, kya tum bhee bhramaae gaae ho?" 
John7:48 kya saradaron ya fareesiyon men se kisee ne bhee us par vishvas kiya haai? 
John7:49 parantu ye log jo vyavastha naheen janate, srapit haain." 
John7:50 neekudemus ne, jo paahile usake pas aya tha aur un men se aek tha, un se kaha." 
John7:51 kya hamaree vyavastha kisee vyaktai ko jab tak pahile us kee sunakar jan n le, ki vah kya karata haai doshaee ttharatee haai?" 
John7:52 unhon ne use uttr diya kya too bhee galeel ka haai ddoonddh aur dek, ki galeel se koi bhvishyadvkta pragatt naheen hone ka." 
John7:53 tab sab koi apane apane ghar ko gaae.. 
John8:1 parantu yeeshu jaaitoon ke pahad par gaya. 
John8:2 aur bhor ko fir mandair men aya, aur sab log usake pas aae aur vah baaittkar unhen upadesh dene laga." 
John8:3 tab shaasree aur fareesee aek sree ko laa, jo vyabhaichar men pakadee gai thee, aur us ko beech men khdee karake yeeshu se kaha." 
John8:4 he guro, yah sree vyaabhaichar karate hee pakadee gai haai." 
John8:5 vyavastha men moosa ne hamen agyaa dee haai ki aeesee striayon kon patthravah karen: so too is sree ke vishay men kya kahata haai? 
John8:6 unhon ne us ko parakhne ke liye yah bat kahee taki us par dosh lagane ke liye koi bat pae, parantu yeeshu jhukakar ungalee se boomi par likhne laga." 
John8:7 jab ve us se poochhte rahe, to us ne seedho hokar un se kaha, ki tooum men jo nishpap ho, vahee paahile usako patthr mare." 
John8:8 aur fir jhukakar boomi par ungalee se likhne laga. 
John8:9 parantu ve yah sunakar badon se lekar chhotton tak aek aek karake nikal gaa, aur yeeshu akela rah gaya, aur sree vaheen beech men khdee rah gai." 
John8:10 yeeshu ne seedho hokar us se kaha, he naree, ve kahan gaae? kya kisee ne tujh par dand kee agyaa n dee." 
John8:11 usa ne kaha, he prabhu, kisee ne naheen: yeeshu ne kaha, maain bhee tujh par dand kee agyaa naheen deta ja, aur fir pap n karana.." 
John8:12 tab yeeshu ne fir logon se kaha, jagat kee jyoti maain hoon jo mere peechhe ho lega, vah andhakar men n chalega, parantu jeevan kee jyoti paaega." 
John8:13 fareesiyon ne us se kaha too apanee gavahee ap deta haai teree gavahee tteek naheen. 
John8:14 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya ki yadi maain apanee gavahee ap deta hoo, taubhee meree gavahee tteek haai, kyonaki maain janata hoo, ki maain kahan se aya hoon aur kahan ko jata hoon? parantu tum naheen janate ki maain kahan se ata hoon ya kahan ko jata hoon." 
John8:15 tum shareer ke anusar nyay karate ho maain kisee ka nyay naheen karata. 
John8:16 aur yaadi maain nyay karoon bhee, to mera nyay sachcha haai kyonki maain akela nahee, parantu maain hoo, aur pita haai jis ne mujhe bheja." 
John8:17 aur tumharee vyavastha men bhee likha haai ki do janon kee gavahee milakar tteek hotee haai. 
John8:18 aek to maain ap apanee gavahee deta hoo, aur doosara pita meree gavahee deta haai jis ne mujhe bheja." 
John8:19 unhon ne us se kaha, tera pita kahan haai? yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki n tum mujhe janate, to mere pita ko bhee janate." 
John8:20 ye baten us ne mandair men upadesh dete huae bhndar ghar men kahee, aur kisee ne use n pakada kyonki usaka samay ab tak naheen aya tha.." 
John8:21 us ne fir un se kaha, maain jata hoon aur tum mujhe ddoonddhoge aur apane ap men maroge: jahan maain jata hoo, vahan tum naheen a sakate." 
John8:22 is par yahoodiyon ne kaha, kya vah apane ap ko mar dalega, jo kahata haai ki jahan maain jata hoon vahan tum naheen a sakate?" 
John8:23 us ne un se kaha, tum neeche ke ho, maain upar ka hoon tum sansar ke ho, maain sansar ka naheen." 
John8:24 isaliye maain ne tum se kaha, ki tum apane papon men maroge kyonaki yadi tum vishvas n karoge ki maain vaheen hoo, to apane papon men maroge." 
John8:25 unhon ne us se kaha, too kaun haai? yeeshu ne un se kaha, vahee hoon jo praarambh se tum se kahata aya hoon." 
John8:26 tumhare vishay men mujhe bahut kuchh kahana aur nirny karana haai parantu mera bhejanevala sachcha haai aur jo maain ne us se suna he, vahee jagat se kahaha hoon." 
John8:27 ve n samajhe ki ham se pita ke vishay men kahata haai. 
John8:28 tab yeeshu ne kaha, ki jab tum manushy ke putra ko unche par chaddhaoge, to janoge ki maain vahee hoo, aur apane ap se kuchh naheen karata, parantu jaaise pita ne mujhe sikhaya, vaaise hee ye baten kahata hoon." 
John8:29 aur mera bhejanevala mere sath haai us ne mujhe akela naheen chhoda kyonki maain sarvada vahee kam karata hoo, jis se vah prasann hota haai." 
John8:30 vah ye baten kah hee raha tha, ki bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya.." 
John8:31 tab yeeshu ne un yahoodiyon se jinhon ne un kee prateeati kee thee, kaha, yaadi tum mere vachan men bane rahoge, to sachamuch mere chele ttharoge." 
John8:32 aur saty ko janoge, aur saty tumhen svatantra karega." 
John8:33 unhon ne us ko uttr diya ki ham to ibraaheem ke vansh se haain aur kabhee kisee ke das naheen hue fir too kyonkar kahata haai, ki tum svatantra ho jaoge?" 
John8:34 yeeshu ne un ko uttr diya maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki jo koi pap karata haai, vah pap ka das haai." 
John8:35 aur das sada ghar men naheen rahata putra sada rahata haai. 
John8:36 so yaadi putra tumhen svatantra karega, to sachamuch tum svatantra ho jaoge." 
John8:37 maain janata hoon ki tum ibraaheem ke vansh se ho taubhee mera vachan tumhare day men jagah naheen pata, isaaliye tum mujhe mar dalana chahate ho." 
John8:38 maain vahee kahata hoo, jo apane pita ke yahan dekha haai aur tum vahee karate rahate ho jo tumane apane pita se suna haai." 
John8:39 unhon ne un ko uttr diya, ki hamara pita to ibraaheem haai: yeeshu ne un se kaha yaadi tum ibraaheem ke santan hote, to ibraaheem ke saman kam karate." 
John8:40 parantu ab tum mujh aeese manushy ko mar dalana chahate ho, jis ne tumhen vah saty vachan bataya jo parameshvar se suna, yah to ibraaheem ne naheen kiya tha." 
John8:41 tum apane pita ke saman kam karate ho: unhon ne us se kaha, ham vyabhaichar se naheen janme hamara aek pita haai arthata parameshvara." 
John8:42 yeeshu ne un se kaha yaadi parameshvar tumhara pita hota, to tum mujh se praem rakhte kyonaki maain parameshvar men se nikal kar aya hoon maain ap se naheen aya, parantu usee ne mujhe bheja." 
John8:43 tum meree bat kyon naheen samajhte? isaliye ki mera vachan sun naheen sakate. 
John8:44 tum apane pita shautan se ho, aur apane pita kee lalasaon ko poora karana chahate ho. vah to arambh se hatyara haai, aur saty par sthiar n raha, kyonaki saty us men haai hee naheen: jab vah joott bolata, to apane svabhav hee se bolata haai kyonaki vah jootta haai, baran joott ka pita haai." 
John8:45 parantu maain jo sach bolata hoo, iseealiye tum meree prateeati naheen karate." 
John8:46 tum men se kaun mujhe papee ttharata haai? aur yaadi maain sach bolata hoo, to tum meree prateeti kyon naheen karate?" 
John8:47 jo parameshvar se hota he, vah parameshvar kee baten sunata haai aur tum isaaliye naheen sunate ki parameshvar kee or se naheen ho." 
John8:48 yah sun yahoodiyon ne us se kaha kya ham tteek naheen kahate, ki too samaree haai, aur tujh men dushttatma haai?" 
John8:49 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki mujh men dushttatma naheen parantu maain apane pita ka adar karata hoo, aur tum mera niradar karate ho." 
John8:50 parantu maain apanee praatishtta naheen chahata, ha, aek to haai jo chahata haai, aur nyay karata haai." 
John8:51 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki yadi koi vyaktai mere vachan par chalega, to vah anant kal tak mratyu ko n dekhega." 
John8:52 yahoodiyon ne us se kaha, ki ab ham ne jan liya ki tujh men dushttatma haai: ibraaheem mar gaya, aur bhavishyadvkta bhee mar gaae haain aur too kahata haai, ki yadi koi mere vachan par chalega to vah anant kal tak mratyu ka svad n chakhega." 
John8:53 hamara pita ibraaheem to mar gaya, kya too us se bada haai? aur bhavishyadvkta bhee mar gaa, too apane ap ko kya ttharata haai." 
John8:54 yeeshu ne uttr diya yaadi maain ap apanee maahima karoo, to meree maahima kuchh nahee, parantu meree mahima karanevala mera pita haai, jise tum kahate ho, ki vah hamara parameshvar haai." 
John8:55 aur tum ne to use naheen jana: parantu maain use janata hoon aur yaadi kahoon ki maain use naheen janata, to maain tumharee nain jootta ttharoonga: parantu maain use janata, aur usake vachan par chalata hoon." 
John8:56 tumhara pita ibraaheem mera din dekhne kee asha se bahut magan tha aur us ne dekha, aur anand kiya." 
John8:57 yahoodiyon ne us se kaha, ab tak too pachas varsha ka naheen fir bhee too ne ibraaheem ko dekha haai?" 
John8:58 yeeshu ne un se kaha maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki pahile isake ki ibraaheem utpann hua maain hoon. 
John8:59 tab unhon ne use marane ke liye patthr uttaa, parantu yeeshu chhpaikar maandair se nikal gaya.." 
John9:1 fir jate huae us ne aek manushy ko dekha, jo janm ka andha tha." 
John9:2 aur usake chelon ne us se poochha, he rabbee, kis ne pap kiya tha ki yah andha janma, is manushy ne, ya usake mata pita ne?" 
John9:3 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki n to is ne pap kiya tha, n is ke mata pita ne: parantu yah isaaliye hua, ki parameshvar ke kam us men pragatt hon." 
John9:4 jis ne mujhe bheja haai hamen usake kam din hee din men karana avashy haai: vah rat anevalee haai jis men koi kam naheen kar sakata. 
John9:5 jab tak maain jangal men hoo, tab tak jagat kee jyoti hoon." 
John9:6 yah kahakar us ne boomi par tooka aur us took se mittee sanee, aur vah mittee us andho kee ankhon par lagakara." 
John9:7 us se kaha ja shaeeloh ke kund men dhae le, jis ka arth bheja hua haai so us ne jakar dhaeya, aur dekhta hua lautt aya." 
John9:8 tab padosee aur jinhon ne pihale use bheekh mangate dekha tha, kahane lage kya yah vahee nahee, jo baaitta bheekh manga karata tha?" 
John9:9 kitanon ne kaha, yah vahee haai: auron ne kaha, naheen parantu usake saman haai: us ne kaha, maain vahee hoon." 
John9:10 tab ve us se poochhne lage, teree ankhen kyonkar khul gai?" 
John9:11 us ne uttr diya, ki yeeshu nam ek vyaktai ne mittee sanee, aur meree ankhon par lagakar mujh se kaha, ki shaeeloh men jakar dhae le so maain gaya, aur dhaekar dekhne laga." 
John9:12 unhon ne us se poochha vah kahan haai? us ne kaha maain naheen janata.. 
John9:13 log use jo pahile andha tha fareesiyon ke pas le gaae. 
John9:14 jis din yeeshu ne mittee sanakar us kee ankhe kholee thee vah sabt ka din tha. 
John9:15 fir fareeasiyon ne bhee us se poochha teree ankhen kis reeti se khul gai? us n eun se kaha us ne meree ankho par mittee lagai, fir maain ne dhae liya, aur ab dekhta hoon." 
John9:16 is par kai fareesee kahane lage yah manushy parameshvar kee or se nahee, kyonki vah sabt ka din naheen manata. auron ne kaha, papee manushy kyonkar aeese chinh dikha sakata haai? so un men foott padee." 
John9:17 unhon ne us andho se fir kaha, us ne jo teree ankhe kholee, too usake vishay men kya kahata haai? us ne kaha, yah bhvishyadvkta haai." 
John9:18 parantu yahoodiyon ko vishvas n hua ki yah andha tha aur ab dekhta haai jab tak unhon ne usake mata-pita ko jis kee ankhe khul gai thee, bulakara." 
John9:19 un se n poochha, ki kya yah tumhara putra haai, jise tum kahate ho ki andha janma tha? fir ab kyonkar dekhta haai?" 
John9:20 usake mata-apita ne uttr diya ham to janate haain ki yah hamara putra haai, aur andha janma tha." 
John9:21 parantu ham yah naheen janate haain ki ab kyonkar dekhta haai aur n yah janate haai, ki kis ne us kee ankhe kholeen vah sayana haai usee se poochh lo vah apane vishay men ap kah dega." 
John9:22 ye baten usake mata-pita ne isaliye kaheen kyonki ve yahoodiyon se drate the kyoki yahoodee aeka kar chuke the, ki yadi koi kahe ki vah maseeh haai, to aradhanalay se nikala jaae." 
John9:23 isee karan usake mata-apita ne kaha, ki vah sayana haai usee se poochh lo." 
John9:24 tab unhon ne us manushy ko jo andha tha doosaree bar bulakar us se kaha, parameshvar kee stuti kara ham to janate haain ki vah manushy papee haai." 
John9:25 us ne uttr diya: maain naheen janata ki vah papee haai ya naheen: maain ek bat janata hoon ki maain andha tha aur ab dekhta hoon. 
John9:26 unhon ne us se fir kaha, ki us ne tere sath kya kiya? aur kis terah teree ankhen kholee?" 
John9:27 us ne un se kaha maain to tum se kah chuka, aur tum ne ne suna ab doosaree bar kyon sunana chahate ho? kya tum bhee usake chele hona chahate ho?" 
John9:28 tab ve use bura-bhla kahakar bole, too hee usaka chela haai ham to moosa ke chele haain." 
John9:29 ham janate haain ki parameshvar ne moosa se baten keen parantu is manushy ko naheen janate kee kahan ka haai. 
John9:30 us ne un ko uttr diya yah to achambhe kee bat haai ki tum naheen janate kee kahan ka haai taubhee us ne meree ankhen khol deen. 
John9:31 ham janate haain ki parameshvar papiyon kee naheen sunata parantu yaadi koi parameshvar ka bhkt ho, aur us kee ichchha par chalata haai, to vah us kee sunata haai." 
John9:32 jagat ke arambh se yah kabhee sunane men naheen aya, ki kisee ne bhee janm ke andho kee ankhe kholee hon." 
John9:33 yaadi yah vyaaktai parameshvar kee or se n hota, to kuchh bhee naheen kar sakata." 
John9:34 unhon ne us ko uttr diya, ki too to bilakul papon men janma haai, too hamen kya sikhata haai? aur unhon ne use bahar nikal diya.." 
John9:35 yeeshu ne suna, ki unhon ne use bahar nikal diya haai aur jab use bhentt hui to kaha, ki kya too parameshvar ke putra par vishvas karata haai?" 
John9:36 us ne uttr diya, ki he prabhu vah kaun haai ki maain us par vishvas karoon?" 
John9:37 yeeshu ne us se kaha, too ne use dekha bhee haai aur jo tere sath baten kar raha haai vahee haai." 
John9:38 us ne kaha, he prabhu, maain vishvas karata hoon: aur use dandvat kiya." 
John9:39 tab yeeshu ne kaha, maain is jagat men nyay ke liye aya hoo, taki jo naheen dekhte ve dekhe, aur jo dekhte haain ve andho ho jaaen." 
John9:40 jo fareesee usake sath the, unhon ne ye baten sun kar us se kaha, kya ham bhee andho haain?" 
John9:41 yeeshu ne un se kaha, yaadi tum andho hote to papee n ttharate parantu ab kahate ho, ki ham dekhte haai, isaaliye tumhara pap bana rahata haai.." 
John10:1 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki jo koi dar se bhedshaala men pravesh naheen karata, parantu aur kisee or se chaddh jata haai, vah chor aur dakoo haai." 
John10:2 parantu jo dar se bheetar pravesh karata haai vah bhedon ka charavaha haai. 
John10:3 usake liye darapal dar khol deta haai, aur bhenden usaka shabd sunatee haai, aur vah apanee bhedon ko nam le lekar bulata haai aur bahar le jata haai." 
John10:4 aur jab vah apanee sab bhedon ko bahar nikal chukata haai, to un ke age age chalata haai, aur bheden usake peechhe peechhe ho letee haain kyonki ve usak shabd pahachanatee haain." 
John10:5 parantu ve paraye ke peechhe naheen jaaengee, parantu us se bhagengee, kyonki ve parayon ka shabd naheen pahachanatee." 
John10:6 yeeshu ne un se yah drashttant kaha, parantu ve n samajhe ki ye kya baten haain jo vah ham se kahata haai.." 
John10:7 tab yeeshu ne un se fir kaha, maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki bhedon ka dar maain hoon." 
John10:8 jitane mujh se pahile aae ve sab chor aur dakoo haain parantu bhedon ne un kee n sunee. 
John10:9 dar maain hoon: yadi koi mere dara bheetar pravesh kare to uddhar paaega aushra bheetar bahar aya jaya karega aur chara paaega. 
John10:10 chor kisee aur kam ke liye naheen parantu keval choree karane aur ghaat karane aur nashtt karane ko ata haai. maain isaaliye aya ki ve jeevan paae, aur bahutayat se paaen." 
John10:11 achchha charavaha maain hoon achchha charavaha bhedon ke liye apana praan deta haai. 
John10:12 majadoor jo n charavaha haai, aur n bhedon ka malik haai, bheadiae ko ate huae dek, bhedon ko chhodkar bhag jata haai, aur bheadiya unhen pakadta aur tittr bittr kar deta haai." 
John10:13 vah isaliye bhag jata haai ki vah majadoor haai, aur us ko bhedon kee chinta naheen." 
John10:14 achchha charavaha maain hoon jis tarah pita mujhe janata haai, aur maain pita ko janata hoon." 
John10:15 isee tarah maain apee bhedon ko janata hoo, aur meree bheden mujhe janatee haai, aur maain bhedon ke liye apana praan deta hoon." 
John10:16 aur meree aur bhee bheden haai, jo is bhedshaala kee naheen mujhe un ka bhee lana avashy haai, ve mera shabd sunengee tab aek hee jhund aur aek hee charavaha hoga." 
John10:17 pita isaliye mujh se praem rakhta haai, ki maain apana praan deta hoo, ki use fir le loon." 
John10:18 koi use mujh se chheenata nahee, baran maain use ap hee deta hoon: mujhe usake dene ka adhaikar haai, aur use fir lene ka bhee aadhaikar haai: yah agyaa mere pita se mujhe milee haai.." 
John10:19 in baton ke karan yahoodiyon men fir foott padee. 
John10:20 un men se bahutere kahane lage, ki us men dushttatma haai, aur vah pagal haai us kee kyon sunate ho?" 
John10:21 auron ne kaha, ye bat aeese manushy kee naheen jis men dushttatma ho: kya dushttatma andhaen kee ankhe khol sakatee haai?" 
John10:22 yarooshalem men sthapan pabrba hua, aur jade kee retu thee." 
John10:23 aur yeeshu mandair men sulaaiman ke osare men tthal raha tha. 
John10:24 tab yahoodiyon ne use a ghora aur poochha, too hamare man ko kab tak duavidha men rakhega? yaadi too maseeh haai, to ham se safa kah de." 
John10:25 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya, ki maain ne tum se kah diya, aur tum prateeti karate hee nahee, jo kam maain apane pita ke nam se karata hoon ve hee mere gavah haain." 
John10:26 parantu tum isaaliye prateeti naheen karate, ki meree bhedon men se naheen ho." 
John10:27 meree bheden mera shabd sunatee haai, aur maain unhen janata hoo, aur ve mere peechhe peechhe chalatee haain." 
John10:28 aur maain unhen anant jeevan deta hoo, aur ve kabhee nash naheen hongee, aur koi unhen mere hath se chheen n lega." 
John10:29 mera pita, jis ne unhen mujh ko diya haai, sab se bada haai, aur koi unhen pita ke hath se chheen naheen sakata." 
John10:30 maain aur pita aek haain. 
John10:31 yahoodiyon ne use patthravah karate ko fir patthr uttaae. 
John10:32 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha, ki maain ne tumhen apane pita kee or se bahut se bhle kam dikhaae haai, un men se kis kam ke liye tum mujhe patthravah karate ho?" 
John10:33 yahoodiyon ne us ko uttr diya, ki bhle kam ke liye ham tujhe patthravah naheen karate, parantu parameshvar kee ninda ke karan aur isaliye ki too manushy hokar apane ap ko parameshvar banata haai." 
John10:34 yeeshu ne unhen uttr diya, kya tumharee vyavastha men naheen likha haai ki maain ne kaha, tum ishvar ho?" 
John10:35 yaadi us ne unhen ishvar kaha jin ke pas parameshvar ka vachan pahuncha aur paavitra shaasr kee bat lop naheen ho sakatee. 
John10:36 to jise pita ne paavitra ttharakar jagat men bheja haai, tum us se kahate ho ki too ninda karata haai, isaliye ki maain ne kaha, maain parameshvar ka putra hoon." 
John10:37 yaadi maain apane pita ke kam naheen karata, to meree prateeti n karo." 
John10:38 parantu yadi maain karata hoo, to chahe meree prateeati n bhee karo, parantu un kamon kee to prateeati karo, taaki tum jano, aur samajho, ki pita mujh men haai, aur maain pita men hoon." 
John10:39 tab unhon ne fir use pakadne ka prayatn kiya parantu vah un ke hath se nikal gaya.. 
John10:40 fir vah yaradan ke par us sthan par chala gaya, jahan yoohanna pahile bapatisma diya karata tha, aur vaheen raha." 
John10:41 aur bahutere usake pas akar kahate the, ki yuhanna ne to koi chinh naheen dikhaya, parantu jo kuchh yoohanna ne is ke vishay men kaha tha vah sab sach tha." 
John10:42 aur vahan bahuteron ne us par vishvas kiya.. 
John11:1 maariyam aur us kee baahin maratha ke ganv baaitaaniyyah ka lajar nam aek manushy beemar tha. 
John11:2 yah vahee mariyam thee jis ne prabhu par itra dalakar usake panvon ko apane balon se ponchha tha, isee ka bhai lajar beemar tha." 
John11:3 so us kee baahinon ne use kahala bheja, ki he prabhu, dek, jis se too praeeati rakhta haai, vah beemar haai." 
John11:4 yah sunakar yeeshu ne kaha, yah beemaree mratyu kee nahee, parantu parameshvar kee maahima ke liye haai, ki usake dara parameshvar ke putra kee mahima ho." 
John11:5 aur yeeshu maratha aur us kee bahan aur lajar se praem rakhta tha. 
John11:6 so jab us ne suna, ki vah beemar haai, to jis sthan par vah tha, vahan do din aur tthar gaya." 
John11:7 fir is ke bad us ne chelon se kaha, ki ao, ham fir yahoodiya ko chalen." 
John11:8 chelon ne us se kaha, he rabbee, abhee to yahoodee tujhe patthravah karana chahate the, aur kya too fir bhee vaheen jata haai?" 
John11:9 yeeshu ne uttr diya, kya din ke barah ghantte naheen hote? yaadi koi din ko chale, to ttokar naheen khata haai, kyonaki is jagat ka ujala dekhta haai." 
John11:10 parantu yadi koi rat ko chale, to ttokar khata haai, kyonaki us men prakash naheen." 
John11:11 us ne ye baten kahee, aur is ke bad un se kahane laga, ki hamara mitra lajar so gaya haai, parantu maain use jagane jata hoon." 
John11:12 tab chelon ne us se kaha, he prabhu, yadi vah so gaya haai, to bach jaaega." 
John11:13 yeeshu ne to us kee mratyu ke vishay men kaha tha: parantu ve samajhe ki us ne neend se so jane ke vishay men kaha. 
John11:14 tab yeeshu ne un se safa kah diya, ki lajar mar gaya haai." 
John11:15 aur maain tumhare karan anaandait hoon ki maain vahan n tha jis se tum vishvas karo, parantu ab ao, ham usake pas chalen." 
John11:16 tab thoma ne jo didumus kahalata haai, apane sath ke chelon se kaha, ao, ham bhee usake sath marane ko chalen." 
John11:17 so yeeshu ko akar yah maloom hua ki use kabra men rakhe char din ho chuke haain. 
John11:18 baaitaaniyyah yarooshalem ke sameep koi do meel kee dooree par tha. 
John11:19 aur bahut se yahoodee maratha aur maariyam ke pas un ke bhai ke vishay men shaantai dene ke liye aae the. 
John11:20 so maratha yeeshu ke ane ka samachar sunakar us se bhentt karane ko gai, parantu mariyam ghar men baaittee rahee." 
John11:21 maratha ne yeeshu se kaha, he prabhu, yadi too yahan hota, to mera bhai kadaapi n marata." 
John11:22 aur ab bhee maain janatee hoo, ki jo kuchh too parameshvar se mangega, parameshvar tujhe dega." 
John11:23 yeeshu ne us se kaha, tera bhai jee uttega." 
John11:24 maratha ne us se kaha, maain janatee hoo, ki antaim din men punarootthan ke samay vah jee uttega." 
John11:25 yeeshu ne us se kaha, punarootthan aur jeevan maain hee hoo, ja koi mujh par vishvas karata haai vah yadi mar bhee jaa, taubhee jeeaega." 
John11:26 aur jo koi jeevata haai, aur mujh par vishvas karata haai, vah anantakal tak n marega, kya too is bat par vishvas karatee haai?" 
John11:27 us ne us se kaha, han he prabhu, maain vishvas kar chukee hoo, ki parameshvar ka putra maseeh jo jagat men anevala tha, vah too hee haai." 
John11:28 yah kahakar vah chalee gai, aur apanee baahin mariyam ko chupake se bulakar kaha, guroo yaheen haai, aur tujhe bulata haai." 
John11:29 vah sunate hee turant uttkar usake pas ai. 
John11:30 yeeshu abhee ganv men naheen pahuncha tha, parantu usee sthan men tha jahan maratha ne us se bhentt kee thee." 
John11:31 tab jo yahoodee usake sath ghar men the, aur use shaantai de rahe the, yah dekhkar ki mariyam turant uttke bahar gai haai aur yah samajhkar ki vah kabra par rone ko jatee haai, usake peechhe ho liye." 
John11:32 jab maariyam vahan pahunchee jahan yeeshu tha, to use dekhte hee usake panvon par gir ke kaha, he prabhu, yadi too yahan hota to mera bhai n marata." 
John11:33 jab yeeshu n us ko aur un yahoodiyon ko jo usake sath aae the rote huae dekha, to atma men bahut hee udas hua, aur ghabara kar kaha, tum ne use kahan rakha haai?" 
John11:34 unhon ne us se kaha, he prabhu, chalakar dekh le." 
John11:35 yeeshu ke ansoo bahane lage. 
John11:36 tab yahoodee kahane lage, dekho, vah us se kaaisee praeeati rakhta tha." 
John11:37 parantu un men se kitanon ne kaha, kya yah jis ne andho kee ankhen kholee, yah bhee n kar saka ki yah manushy n marata?" 
John11:38 yeeshu man men fir bahut hee udas hokar kabra par aya, vah aek gufaa thee, aur aek patthr us par dhara tha." 
John11:39 yeeshu ne kaha patthr ko uttao: us mare huae kee baahin maratha us se kahane lagee, he prabhu, us men se ab to durgandha atee haai kyonki use mare char din ho gaae." 
John11:40 yeeshu ne us se kaha, kya maain ne tujh se n kaha i ki yadi too vishvas karegee, to parameshvar kee mahima ko dekhegee." 
John11:41 tab unhon ne us patthr ko hattaya, fir yeeshu ne ankhen uttakar kaha, he pita, maain tera dhanyavad karata hoon ki too ne meree sun lee haai." 
John11:42 aur maai janata tha, ki too sada meree sunata haai, parantu jo bheed as pas khdee haai, un ke karan maain ne yah kaha, jis se ki ve vishvas kare, ki too ne mujhe bheja haai." 
John11:43 yah kahakar us ne bade shabd se pukara, ki he lajar, nikal a." 
John11:44 jo mar gaya tha, vah kafan se hath panv bandho huae nikal aya aur usaka munh angochhe se lipatta hua tharoo yeeshu ne un se kaha, use kholakar jane do.." 
John11:45 tab jo yahoodee mariyam ke pas aae the, aur usaka yah kam dekha tha, un men se bahuton ne us par vishvas kiya." 
John11:46 parantu un men se kitanon ne fareeasiyon ke pas jakar yeeshu ke kamon ka samachar diya.. 
John11:47 is par mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne mukhy sabha ke logon ko ikattha karake kaha, ham karate kya haain? yah manushy to bahut chinh dikhata haai." 
John11:48 yaadi ham use yonhee chhod de, to sab us par vishvas le aaenge aur romee akar hamaree jagah aur jaati donon par aadhaikar kar lenge." 
John11:49 tab un men se kaifaa nam aek vyaktai ne jo us varsha ka mahayajak tha, un se kaha, tum kuchh naheen janate." 
John11:50 aur n yah sochate ho, ki tumhare liye yah bhla haai, ki hamare logon ke liye aek manushy mare, aur n yah, ki saree jaati nash ho." 
John11:51 yah bat us ne apanee or se n kahee, parantu us varsha ka mahayajak hokar bhavishyadvnee kee, ki yeeshu us jaati ke liye marega." 
John11:52 aur n keval us jaati ke liye, baran isaaliye bhee, ki parameshvar kee tittr bittr santanon ko aek kar de." 
John11:53 so usee din se ve usake mar dalane kee sammati karane lage.. 
John11:54 isaliye yeeshu us samay se yahoodiyon men pragatt hokar n fira parantu vahan se jangal ke nikatt ke dekh men iaim nam, aek nagar ko chala gaya aur apane chelon ke sath vaheen rahane laga." 
John11:55 aur yahoodiyon ka fasah nikatt tha, aur bahutere log fasah se paahile dihat se yarooshalem ko gaae ki apane ap ko shuuddh karen." 
John11:56 so ve yeeshu ko ddoonddhne aur maandair men khde hokar apas men kahane lage, tum kya samajhte ho?" 
John11:57 kya vah pabrba men naheen aaega? aur mahayajakon aur fareesiyon ne bhee agyaa de rakhee thee, ki yadi koi yah jane ki yeeshu kahan haai to bataa, ki use pakad len.." 
John12:1 fir yeeshu fatah se chh: din pahile baaitaaniyyah men aya, janha lajar tha: jise yeeshu ne mare huon men se jilaya tha." 
John12:2 vahan unhon ne usake liye bhojan taaiyar kiya, aur maratha seva kar rahee thee, aur lajar un men se aek tha, jo usake sath bhojan karane ke liye baaitte the." 
John12:3 tab maariyam ne jattamasee ka adha ser bahumol itra lekar yeeshu ke pavon par dala, aur apane balon se usake panv ponchhe, aur itra kee sugandha se ghar sugaandhiat ho gaya." 
John12:4 parantu usake chelon men se yahooda iskariyotee nam aek chela jo use pakadvane par tha, kahane laga." 
John12:5 yah itra teen sau deenar men bechakar kangalon ko kayon n diya gaya? 
John12:6 us ne yah bat isaliye n kahee, ki use kangalon kee chinta thee, parantu isaliye ki vah chor tha aur usake pas un kee thailee rahatee thee, aur us men jo kuchh dala jata tha, vah nikal leta tha." 
John12:7 yeeshu ne kaha, use mere gade jane ke din ke liye rahane de." 
John12:8 kyonaki kangal to tumhare sath sada rahate haai, parantu maain tumhare sath sada n rahoonga.." 
John12:9 yahoodiyon men se sadhaaran log jan gaa, ki vah vahan haai, aur ve n keval yeeshu ke karan aae parantu isaaliye bhee ki lajar ko denkhe, jise us ne mare huon men se jilaya tha." 
John12:10 tab mahayajakon ne lajar ko bhee mar dalane kee sammati kee. 
John12:11 kyonaki usake karan bahut se yahoodee chale gaa, aur yeeshu par vishvas kiya.." 
John12:12 doosare din bahut se logon ne jo pabrba men aae the, yah sunakar, ki yeeshu yarooshalem men ata haai." 
John12:13 khjoor kee, daaliyan leee, aur us se bhentt karane ko nikale, aur pukarane lage, ki hoshaana, dhany israael ka raja, jo prabhu ke nam se ata haai." 
John12:14 jab yeeshu ko aek gadahe ka bachcha mila, to us par baaitta." 
John12:15 jaaisa likha haai, ki he siyyon kee bettee, mat dr, dek, tera raja gadahe ke bachche par chaddha hua chala ata haai." 
John12:16 usake chele, ye baten paahile n samajhe the parantu jab yeeshu kee mahima pragatt hui, to un ko smaran aya, ki ye baten usake vishay men likhee hui theen aur logon ne us se is prakar ka vyavahar kiya tha." 
John12:17 tab bheed ke logon ne jo us samay usake sath the yah gavahee dee ki us ne lajar ko kabra men se bulakar, mare huon men se jilaya tha." 
John12:18 isee karan log us se bhentt karane ko aae the kyonaki unhon ne suna tha, ki us ne yah ashcharyakarma dikhaya haai." 
John12:19 tab fareesiyon ne apas men kaha, socho to sahee ki tum se kuchh naheen ban padta: dekho, sansar usake peechhe ho chala haai.." 
John12:20 jo log us pabrba men bhjan karane aae the un men se kai yoonanee the. 
John12:21 unhon ne galeel ke baaitasaaida ke rahanevale filippus ke pas akar us se binatee kee, ki shraeemana ham yeeshu se bhentt karana chahate haain." 
John12:22 filippus ne akar aadiryas se kaha tab aandairyas aur filippus ne yeeshu se kaha. 
John12:23 is par yeeshu ne un se kaha, vah samay a gaya haai, ki manushy ke putra ki mahima ho." 
John12:24 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki jab tak gehoon ka dana boomi men padkar mar naheen jata, vah akela rahata haai parantu jab mar jata haai, to bahut fal lata haai." 
John12:25 jo apane praan ko piry janata haai, vah use kho deta haai aur jo is jagat men apane praan ko aapiry janata he, vah use kho deta haai aur jo is jagat men apane praan ko apiry janata haai vah anant jeevan ke liye us kee raksha karata karega." 
John12:26 yaadi koi meree seva kare, to mere peechhe ho le aur jahan maain hoon vahan mera sevak bhee hoga yaadi koi meree seva kare, to pita usaka adar karega." 
John12:27 jab mera jee vyakul ho raha haai. isaaliye ab maain kya kahoon? he pita, mujhe is ghadee se bacha? parantu maain isee karan is ghadee ko pahuncha hoon." 
John12:28 he pita apane nam kee maahima kara: tab yah akashavanee hui, ki maain ne us kee maahima kee haai, aur fir bhee karoonga." 
John12:29 tab jo log khde huae sun rahe the, unhon ne kaha ki badal garaja, auron ne kaha, koi svargadoot us se bola." 
John12:30 is par yeeshu ne kaha, yah shabd mere liye naheen parantu tumhare liye aya haai." 
John12:31 ab is jagat ka nyay hota haai, ab is jagat ka saradar nikal diya jaaega." 
John12:32 aur maain yadi prathvee par se unche par chaddhaya jaunga, to sab ko apane pas kheechaooga." 
John12:33 aeesa kahakar us ne yah pragatt kar diya, ki vah kaaisee mratyu se marega." 
John12:34 is par logon ne us se kaha, ki ham ne vyavastha kee yah bat sunee haai, ki maseeh sarvada rahega, fir too kyon kahata haai, ki manushy ke putra ko unche par chaddhaya jana avashy haai?" 
John12:35 yah manushy ka putra kaun haai? yeeshu ne un se kaha, jyoti ab thodee den tak tumhare beech men haai, jab tak jyoti tumhare sath haai tab tak chale chalo aeesa n ho ki andhakar tumhen a ghore jo andhakar men chalata haai vah naheen janata ki kidhar jata haai." 
John12:36 jab tak jyoti tumhare sath haai, jyoti par vishvas karo ki tum jyoti ke santan hoo.. ye baten kahakar yeeshu chala gaya aur un se chhpai raha." 
John12:37 aur us ne un ke samhane itane chinh dikhaa, taubhee unhon ne us par vishvas n kiya." 
John12:38 taaki yashaayah bhavishyadvkta ka vachan poora ho jo us ne kaha ki he prabhu hamare samachar kee kis ne prateeati kee haai? aur prabhu ka bhujabal kis par pragatt hua? 
John12:39 is karan ve vishvas n kar sake, kyonki yashaayah ne fir bhee kaha." 
John12:40 ki us ne un kee ankhen andhae, aur un ka man kattor kiya haai kaheen aeesa n ho, ki ankhon se dekhe, aur man se samajhe, aur fire, aur maain unhen changa karoon." 
John12:41 yashaayah ne ye baten isaliye kahee, ki us ne us kee mahima dekhee aur us ne usake vishay men baten kee." 
John12:42 taubhee saradaron men se bhee bahuton ne us par vishvas kiya, parantu fareeasiyon ke karan pragatt men naheen manate the, aeesa n ho ki aradhanalay men se nikale jaaen." 
John12:43 kyonaki manushyon kee prashansa un ko parameshvar kee prashansa se aadhaik piry lagatee thee.. 
John12:44 yeeshu ne pukarakar kaha, jo mujh par vishvas karata haai, vah mujh par nahee, baran mere bhejanevale par vishvas karata haai." 
John12:45 aur jo mujhe dekhta haai, vah mere bhejanevale ko dekhta haai." 
John12:46 maain jagat men jyoti hokar aya hoon taaki jo koi mujh par vishvas kare, vah andhakar men ne rahe." 
John12:47 yaadi koi meree baten sunakar n mane, to maain use doshaee naheen ttharata, kyonki maain jagat ko doshaee ttharane ke liye nahee, parantu jagat ka uddhar karane ke liye aya hoon." 
John12:48 jo mujhe tuchchh janata haai aur meree baten grahan naheen karata haai us ko doshaee ttharanevala to aek haai: arthata jo vachan maain ne kaha haai, vah pichhle din men use doshaee ttharaaega." 
John12:49 kyonaki maain ne apanee or se baten naheen kee, parantu pita jis ne mujhe bheja haai usee ne mujhe agyaa dee haai, ki kya kya kahoon? aur kya kya boloon?" 
John12:50 aur maain janata hoo, ki us kee agyaa anant jeevan haai isaaliye maain jo bolata hoo, vah jaaisa pita ne mujh se kaha haai vaaisa hee bolata hoon.." 
John13:1 fasah ke pabrba se pahile jab yeeshu ne jan liya, ki meree vah ghadee a pahunchee haai ki jagat chhodkar pita ke pas jau, to apane logon se, jo jagat men the, jaaisa praem vah rakhta tha, ant tak vaaisa hee praem rakhta raha." 
John13:2 aur jab shautan shamaun ke putra yahooda iskaariyotee ke man men yah dal chuka tha, ki use pakadvaa, to bhojan ke samaya." 
John13:3 yeeshu ne yah janakar ki pita ne sab kuchh mere hath men kar diya haai aur maain parameshvar ke pas se aya hoo, aur parameshvar ke pas jata hoon." 
John13:4 bhojan par se uttkar apane kapade utar dia, aur angochha lekar apanee kamar bandhaee." 
John13:5 tab baratan men panee bhrakar chelon ke panv dhaene aur jis angochhe se us kee kamar bandhaee thee usee se ponchhne laga. 
John13:6 jab vah shamaun pataras ke pas aya: tab us ne us se kaha, he prabhu," 
John13:7 kya too mere panv dhaeta haai? yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya, ki jo maain karata hoo, too ab naheen janata, parantu is ke bad samajhega." 
John13:8 pataras ne us se kaha, too mere panv kabhee n dhaene paaega: yah sunakar yeeshu ne us se kaha, yaadi maain tujhe n dhaeu, to mere sath tera kuchh bhee sajha naheen." 
John13:9 shamaun pataras ne us se kaha, he prabhu, to mere panv hee nahee, baran hath aur sir bhee dhae de." 
John13:10 yeeshu ne us se kaha, jo naha chuka haai, use panv ke siva aur kuchh dhaene ka prayojan naheen parantu vah bilakul shuuddh haai: aur tum shuuddh ho parantu sab ke sab naheen." 
John13:11 vah to apane pakadvanevale ko janata tha isee liye us ne kaha, tum sab ke sab shuuddh naheen.." 
John13:12 jab vah un ke panv dhae chuka aur apane kapade paahinakar fir baaitt gaya to un se kahane laga, kya tum samajhe ki maain ne tumhare sath kya kiya?" 
John13:13 tum mujhe guro, aur prabhu, kahate ho, aur bhla kahate ho, kyonaki maain vaheen hoon." 
John13:14 yaadi maain ne prabhu aur guroo hokar tumhare panv dhaeae to tumhen bhee aek dusare ke panv dhaena chaahiae. 
John13:15 kyonaki maain ne tumhen namoona dikha diya haai, ki jaaisa maain ne tumhare sath kiya haai, tum bhee vaaisa hee kiya karo." 
John13:16 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, das apane svamee se bada naheen aur n bheja hua apane bhejanevale se." 
John13:17 tum to ye baten janate ho, aur yadi un par chalo, to dhany ho." 
John13:18 maain tum sab ke vishay men naheen kahata: jinhen maain ne chun liya haai, unhen maain janata hoon: parantu yah isaaliye haai, ki pavitra shaasr ka yah vachan poora ho, ki jo meree rottee khata haai, us ne mujh par lat uttai." 
John13:19 ab maain usake hone se paahile tumhen jataae deta hoon ki jab ho jaae to tum vishvas karo ki maain vaheen hoon. 
John13:20 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki jo mere bheje huae ko grahan karata haai, vah mujhe grahan karata haai, aur jo mujhe grahan karata haai, vah mere bhejanevale ko grahan karata haai.." 
John13:21 ye baten kahakar yeeshu atma men vyakul hua aur yah gavahee dee, ki maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki tum men se aek mujhe pakadvaaega." 
John13:22 chele yah sandeh karate hua, ki vah kis ke vishay men kahata haai, aek doosare kee or dekhne lage." 
John13:23 usake chelon men se ek jis se yeeshu praem rakhta tha, yeeshu kee chhatee kee or jhuka hua baaitta tha." 
John13:24 tab shamaun pataras ne us kee or saain karake poochha, ki bata to, vah kis ke vishay men kahata haai?" 
John13:25 tab us ne usee tarah yeeshu kee chhatee kee or jhuk kar poochha, he prabhu, vah kaun haai? yeeshu ne uttr diya, jise maain yah rottee ka ttukada dubokar doonga, vahee haai." 
John13:26 aur us ne ttukada dubokar shamaun ke putra yahooda iskaariyotee ko diya. 
John13:27 aur ttukada lete hee shautan us men sama gaya: tab yeeshu ne us se kaha, jo too karata haai, turant kara." 
John13:28 parantu baaittnevalon men se kisee ne n jana ki us ne yah bat us se kis liye kahee. 
John13:29 yahooda ke pas thailee rahatee thee, isaaliye kisee kisee ne samajha, ki yeeshu us se kahata haai, ki jo kuchh hamen pabrba ke liye chaahiae vah mol le, ya yah ki kangalon ko kuchh de." 
John13:30 tab vah ttukada lekar turant bahar chala gaya, aur ratrai ka samay tha.." 
John13:31 jab vah bahar chala gaya to yeeshu ne kaha ab manushy putra kee maahima hui, aur parameshvar kee mahima us men hui." 
John13:32 aur parameshvar bhee apane men us kee maahima karega, baran turant karega." 
John13:33 he balako, maain aur thodee den tumhare pas hoon: fir tum mujhe ddoonddhoge, aur jaaisa maain ne yahoodiyon se kaha, ki jahan maain jata hoo, vahan tum naheen a sakate vaaisa hee maain ab tum se bhee kahata hoon." 
John13:34 maain tumhen aek nai agyaa deta hoo, ki aek doosare se praem rakho: jaaisa maain ne tum se praem rakha haai, vaaisa hee tum bhee aek dusare se praem rakho." 
John13:35 yaadi apas men praem rakhoge to isee se sab janenge, ki tum mere chele ho.." 
John13:36 shamaun pataras ne us se kaha, he prabhu, too kahan jata haai? yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki jahan maain jata hoo, vahan too ab mere peechhe a naheen sakata! parantu is ke bad mere peechhe aaega." 
John13:37 pataras ne us se kaha, he prabhu, abhee maain tere peechhe kyon naheen a sakata? maain to tere liye apana praan doonga." 
John13:38 yeeshu ne uttr diya, kya too mere liye apana praan dega? maain tujh se sach sach kahata hoon ki murga bang n dega jab tak too teen bar mera inkar n kar lega." 
John14:1 tumhara man vyakul n ho, tum parameshvar par vishvas rakhte ho mujh par bhee vishvas rakho." 
John14:2 mere pita ke ghar men bahut se rahane ke sthan haai, yadi n hote, to maain tum se kah deta kyonki maain tumhare liye jagah taaiyar karane jata hoon." 
John14:3 aur yaadi maain jakar tumhare liye jagah taaiyar karoo, to fir akar tumhen apane yahana le jaunga, ki jahan maain rahoon vahan tum bhee raho." 
John14:4 aur jahan maain jata hoon tum vahan ka marga janate ho. 
John14:5 thoma ne us se kaha, he prabhu, ham naheen janate ki too han jata haai? to marga kaaise janen?" 
John14:6 yeeshu ne us se kaha, marga aur sachchai aur jeevan maain hee hoon bina mere dara koi pita ke pas naheen pahunch sakata." 
John14:7 yaadi tum ne mujhe jana hota, to mere pita ko bhee janate, aur ab use janate ho, aur use dekha bhee haai." 
John14:8 filippus ne us se kaha, he prabhu, pita ko hamen dikha de: yahee hamare liye bahut haai." 
John14:9 yeeshu ne us se kaha he filippus, maain itane din se tumhare sath hoo, aur kya too mujhe naheen janata? jis ne mujhe dekha haai us ne pita ko dekha haai: too kyon kahata haai ki pita ko hamen dikha." 
John14:10 kya too prateeati naheen karata, ki maain pita men hoo, aur pita mujh men haain? ye baten jo maain tum se kahata hoo, apanee or se naheen kahata, parantu pita mujh men rahakar apane kam karata haai." 
John14:11 meree hee prateeati karo, ki maain pita men hoon aur pita mujh men haai naheen to kamon hee ke karan meree prateeati karo." 
John14:12 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, ki jo mujh par vishvas rakhta haai, ye kam jo maain karata hoon vahee bhee karega, baran in se bhee bade kam karega, kyonaki maain pita ke pas jata hoon." 
John14:13 aur jo kuchh tum mere nam se mangoge, vahee maain karoonga ki putra ke dara pita kee maahima ho." 
John14:14 yaadi tum mujh se mere nam se kuchh mangoge, to maain use karoonga." 
John14:15 yaadi tum mujh se praem rakhte ho, to meree agyaaon ko manoge." 
John14:16 aur maain pita se binatee karoonga, aur vah tumhen aek aur sahayak dega, ki vah sarvada tumhare sath rahe." 
John14:17 arthata saty ka atma, jise sansar grahan naheen kar sakata, kyonaki vah n use dekhta haai aur n use janata haai: tum use janate ho, kyonki vah tumhare sath rahata haai, aur vah tum men hoga." 
John14:18 maain tumhen anath n chhooonga, maain tumhare pas ata hoon." 
John14:19 aur thodee der rah gai haai ki sansar mujhe n dekhega, parantu tum mujhe dekhoge, isaaliye ki maain jeeavit hoo, tum bhee jeevit rahoge." 
John14:20 us din tum janoge, ki maain apane pita men hoo, aur tum mujh me, aur maain tum men." 
John14:21 jis ke pas meree agyaa haai, aur vah unhen manata haai, vahee mujh se praem rakhta haai, aur jo mujh se praem rakhta haai, us se mera pita praem rakhega, aur maain us se praem rakoonga, aur apane ap ko us par pragatt karoonga." 
John14:22 us yahooda ne jo iskariyotee n tha, us se kaha, he prabhu, kya hua kee too apane ap ko ham par pragatt kiya chahata haai, aur sansar par naheen." 
John14:23 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya, yaadi koi mujh se praem rakhe, to vah mere vachan ko manega, aur mera pita us se praem rakhega, aur ham usake pas aaenge, aur usake sath vas karenge." 
John14:24 jo mujh se praem naheen rakhta, vah mere vachan naheen manata, aur jo vachan tum sunate ho, vah mera naheen varan pita ka haai, jis ne mujhe bheja.." 
John14:25 ye baten maain ne tumhare sath rahate huae tum se kahee. 
John14:26 parantu sahayak arthata pavitra atma jise pita mere nam se bhejega, vah tumhen sab baten sikhaaega, aur jo kuchh maain ne tum se kaha haai, vah sab tumhen smaran karaaega." 
John14:27 maain tumhen shaaantai diae jata hoo, apanee shaaantai tumhen deta hoon jaaise sansar deta haai, maain tumhen naheen deta: tumhara man n ghabaraae aur n dre." 
John14:28 tum ne suna, ki maain ne tum se kaha, ki maain jata hoo, aur tumhare pas fir ata hoon: yaadi tum mujh se praem rakhte, to is bat se anandait hote, ki maain pita ke pas jata hoon kyonaki pita mujh se bada haai." 
John14:29 aur maain ne ab is ke hone ke paahile tum se kah diya haai, ki jab vah ho jaa, to tum prateeati karo." 
John14:30 maain ab se tumhare sath aur bahut baten n karoonga, kyonaki is sansar ka saradar ata haai, aur mujh men usaka kuchh naheen." 
John14:31 parantu yah isaaliye hota haai ki sansar jane ki maain pita se praem rakhta hoo, aur jis tarah pita ne mujhe agyaa dee, maain vaaise hee karata hoon: utto, yahan se chalen.." 
John15:1 sachchee dakhlata maain hoon aur mera pita kisan haai. 
John15:2 jo dalee mujh men haai, aur naheen falatee, use vah katt dalata haai, aur jo falatee haai, use vah chhanttta haai taaki aur fale." 
John15:3 tum to us vachan ke karan jo maain ne tum se kaha haai, shuuddh ho." 
John15:4 tum mujh men bane raho, aur maain tum men: jaaise dalee yadi dakhlata men banee n rahe, to apane ap se naheen fal sakatee, vaaise hee tum bhee yaadi mujh men bane n raho to naheen fal sakate." 
John15:5 men dakhlata hoon: tum daliyan ho jo mujh men bana rahata haai, aur maain us me, vah bahut fal falata haai, kyonki mujh se alag hokar tum kuchh bhee naheen kar sakate." 
John15:6 yaadi koi mujh men bana n rahe, to vah dalee kee nai faenk diya jata, aur sookh jata haai aur log unhen battorakar ag men jhonk dete haai, aur ve jal jatee haain." 
John15:7 yaadi tum mujh men bane raho, aur meree baten tum men banee rahen to jo chaho mango aur vah tumhare liye ho jaaega." 
John15:8 mere pita kee maahima isee se hotee haai, ki tum bahut sa fal lao, tab hee tum mere chele ttharoge." 
John15:9 jaaisa pita ne mujh se praem rakha, mere praem men bane raho." 
John15:10 yaadi tum meree agyaaon ko manoge, to mere praem men bane rahoge: jaaisa ki maain ne apane pita kee agyaaon ko mana haai, aur usake praem men bana rahata hoon." 
John15:11 maain ne ye baten tum se isaliye kahee haai, ki mera anand tum men bana rahe, aur tumhara anand poora ho jaae." 
John15:12 meree agyaa yah haai, ki jaaisa maain ne tum se praem rakha, vaaisa hee tum bhee aek doosare se praem rakho." 
John15:13 is se bada praem kisee ka nahee, ki koi apane mitraen ke liye apana praan de." 
John15:14 jo kuchh maain tumhen agyaa deta hoo, yadi use karo, to tum mere mitra ho." 
John15:15 ab se maain tumhen das n kahoonga, kyonaki das naheen janata, ki usaka svamee kya karata haai: parantu maain ne tumhen mitra kaha haai, kyonaki maain ne jo baten apane pita se sunee, ve sab tumhen bata deen." 
John15:16 tum ne mujhe naheen chuna parantu maain ne tumhen chuna haai aur tumhen ttharaya taki tum jakar fal lao aur tumhara fal bana rahe, ki tum mere nam se jo kuchh pita se mango, vah tumhen de." 
John15:17 in baten kee agyaa maain tumhen isaaliye deta hoo, ki tum aek doosare se praem rakho." 
John15:18 yaadi sansar tum se baair rakhta haai, to tum janate ho, ki us ne tum se pahile mujh se bhee baair rakha." 
John15:19 yaadi tum sansar ke hote, to sansar apanon se praeeti rakhta, parantu is karan ki tum sansar men se chun liya haai isee liye sansar tum se baair rakhta haai." 
John15:20 jo bat maai. ne tum se kahee thee, ki das apane svamee se bada naheen hota, usako yad rakho: yaadi unhon ne mujhe sataya, to tumhen bhee sataaenge yadi unhon ne meree bat manee, to tumharee bhee manenge." 
John15:21 parantu yah sab kuchh ve mere nam ke karan tumhare sath karenge kyonki ve mere bhejanevale ko naheen janate. 
John15:22 yaadi maain n ata aur un se baten n karata, to ve papee n ttharate parantu ab unhen un ke pap ke liye koi bahana naheen." 
John15:23 jo mujh se baair rakhta haai, vah mere pita se bhee baair rakhta haai." 
John15:24 yaadi maain un men ve kam n karata, jo aur kisee ne naheen kiae to ve papee naheen ttharate, parantu ab to unhon ne mujhe aur mere pita donon ko dekha, aur donon se baair kiya." 
John15:25 aur yah isaliye hua, ki vahi vachan poora ho, jo un kee vyavastha men likha haai, ki unhon ne mujh se vyarth baair kiya." 
John15:26 parantu jab vah sahayak aaega, jise maain tumhare pas bhejoonga, arthata saty ka atma jo pita kee or se nikalata haai, to vah meree gavahee dega." 
John15:27 aur tum bhee gavah ho kyonki tum arambh se mere sath rahe ho.. 
John16:1 ye baten maain ne tum se isaliye kaheen ki tum ttokar n khao. 
John16:2 ve tumhen aradhanalayon men se nikal denge, varan vah samay ata haai, ki jo koi tumhen mar dalega yah samajhega ki maain parameshvar kee seva karata hoon." 
John16:3 aur yah ve isaliye karenge ki unhon ne n pita ko jana haai aur n mujhe janate haain. 
John16:4 parantu ye baten maain ne isaaliye tum se kahee, ki jab un ka samay aae to tumhen smaran a jaa, ki maain ne tum se paahile hee kah diya tha: aur maain ne arambh men tum se ye baten isaliye naheen kaheen kyonaki maain tumhare sath tha." 
John16:5 ab maain apane bhejanevale ke pas jata hoon aur tum men se koi mujh se naheen poochhta, ki too kahan jata haain?" 
John16:6 parantu maain ne jo ye baten tum se kahee haai, isaaliye tumhara man shaek se bhr gaya." 
John16:7 taubhee maain tum se sach kahata hoo, ki mera jana tumhare liye achchha haai, kyonki yadi maain n jau, to vah sahayak tumhare pas n aaega, parantu yadi maain jaunga, to use tumhare pas bhej doonga." 
John16:8 aur vah akar sansar ko pap aur dhaaarmikata aur nyay ke vishay men niroottr karega. 
John16:9 pap ke vishay men isaliye ki ve mujh par vishvas naheen karate. 
John16:10 aur dhaarmikata ke vishay men isaliye ki maain pita ke pas jata hoo," 
John16:11 aur tum mujhe fir n dekhoge: nyay ke vishay men isaliye ki sansar ka saradar doshaee ttharaya gaya haai. 
John16:12 mujhe tum se aur bhee bahut see baten kahanee haai, parantu abhee tum unhen sah naheen sakate." 
John16:13 parantu jab vah arthata saty ka atma aaega, to tumhen sab saty ka marga bataaega, kyonaki vah apanee or se n kahega, parantu jo kuchh sunega, vahee kahega, aur anevalee baten tumhen bataaega." 
John16:14 vah meree mahima karega, kyonaki vah meree baton men se lekar tumhen bataaega." 
John16:15 jo kuchh pita ka haai, vah sab mera haai isaaliye maain ne kaha, ki vah meree baton men se lekar tumhen bataaega." 
John16:16 thodee der tum mujhe n dekhoge, aur fir thodee der men mujhe dekhoge." 
John16:17 tab usake kitane chelon ne apas men kaha, yah kya haai, jo vah ham se kahata haai, ki thodee der men tum mujhe n dekhoge, aur fir thodee der men mujhe dekhoge? aur yah isaliye ki maain ki maain pita ke mas jata hoon?" 
John16:18 tab unhon ne kaha, yah thodee der jo vah kahata haai, kya bat haai? ham naheen janate, ki kya kahata haai." 
John16:19 yeeshu ne yah janakar, ki ve mujh se poochhna chahate haai, un se kaha, kya tum apas men meree is bate ke vishay men poochh pachh karate ho, ki thodee der men tum mujhe n dekhoge, aur fir thodee der men mujhe dekhoge." 
John16:20 maain tum se sach sach kahata hoon ki tum rooge aur vilap karoge, parantu sansar anand karega: tumhen shaek hoga, parantu tumhara shaek anand ban jaaega." 
John16:21 jab sree janane lagatee haai to us ko shaek hota haai, kyonki us kee du:kh kee ghadee a pahunchee, parantu jab vah balak janm chukee to is anand se ki jagat men aek manushy utpann hua, us sankatt ko fir smaran naheen karatee." 
John16:22 aur tumhen bhee ab to shaek haai, parantu maain tum se fir miloonga aur tumhare man men anand hoga aur tumhara anand koi tum se chheen n lega." 
John16:23 us din tum mujh se kuchh n poochhoge: maain tum se sach sach kahata hoo, yadi pita se kuchh mangoge, to vah mere nam se tumhen dega." 
John16:24 ab tak tum ne mere nam se kuchh naheen manga mango to paoge taaki tumhara anand poora ho jaae.. 
John16:25 maain ne ye baten tum se drashttanton men kahee haai, parantu vah samay ata haai, ki maain tum se drashttanton men aur fir naheen kahoonga parantu kholakar tumhen pita ke vishay men bataunga." 
John16:26 us din tum mere nam se mangoge, aur maain tum se yah naheen kahata, ki maain tumhare liye pita se binatee karoonga." 
John16:27 kyonaki pita to ap hee tum se praeeti rakhta haai, isaliye ki tum ne mujh se praeeati rakhee haai, aur yah bhee prateeati kee haai, ki maain pita ki or se nikal aya." 
John16:28 maain pita se nikalakar jagat men aya hoo, fir jagat ko chhodkar pita ke pas jata hoon." 
John16:29 usake chelon ne kaha, dek, ab to too kholakar kahata haai, aur koi drashttant naheen kahata." 
John16:30 ab ham jan gaa, ki too sab kuchh janata haai, aur tujhe prayojan nahee, ki koi tujh se poochhe, is se ham prateeti karate haai, ki too parameshvar se nikala haai." 
John16:31 yah sun yeeshu ne un se kaha, kya tum ab prateeati karate ho?" 
John16:32 dekho, vah ghadee atee haai varan a pahunchee ki tum sab tittr bittr hokar apana apana marga loge, aur mujhe akela chhod doge, taubhee maain akela naheen kyonki pita mere sath haai." 
John16:33 maain ne ye baten tum se isaliye kahee haai, ki tumhen mujh men shaaantai mile sansar men tumhen klesh hota haai, parantu ddhaddhs bandhae, maain ne sansar ko jeen liya haai.." 
John17:1 yeeshu ne ye baten kaheen aur apanee ankhe akash kee or uttakar kaha, he pita, vah ghadee a pahunchee, apane putra kee maahima kar, ki putra bhee teree mahima kare." 
John17:2 kyonaki too ne us ka sab praaanaiyon par aadhaikar diya, ki jinhen too ne us ko diya haai, un sab ko vah anant jeevan de." 
John17:3 aur anant jeevan yah haai, ki ve tujh advait sachche parameshvar ko aur yeeshu maseeh ko, jise too ne bheja haai, jane." 
John17:4 jo kam too ne mujhe karane ko diya tha, use poora karake maain ne prathvee par teree mahima kee haai." 
John17:5 aur ab, he pita, too apane sath meree mahima us maahima se kar jo jagat ke hone se paahile, meree tere sath thee." 
John17:6 maain ne tera nam un manushyon par pragatt kiya jinhen too ne jagat men se mujhe diya: ve tere the aur too ne unhen mujhe diya aur unhon ne tere vachan ko man liya haai. 
John17:7 ab ve jan gaae haai, ki jo kuchh too ne mujhe diya haai, sab teree or se haai." 
John17:8 kyonaki jo baten too ne mujhe pahuncha dee, maain ne unhen unako pahuncha diya aur unhon ne un ko grahan kiya: aur sach sach jan liya haai, ki maain teree or se nikala hoo, aur prateeati kar lee haai ki too hee ne mujhe bheja." 
John17:9 maain un ke liye binatee karata hoo, sansar ke liye binatee naheen karata hoon parantu unheen ke liye jinhen too ne mujhe diya haai, kyonki ve tere haain." 
John17:10 aur jo kuchh mera haai vah sab tera haai aur jo tera haai vah mera haai vah sab tera haai aur jo tera haai, vah mera haai aur in se meree maahima pragatt hui haai." 
John17:11 maain age ko jagat men n rahoonga, parantu ye jagat men rahenge, aur maain tere pas ata hoon he paavitra pita, apane us nam se jo too ne mujhe diya haai, un kee raksha kar, ki ve hamaree nai aek hon." 
John17:12 jab maai. un ke sath tha, to maain ne tere us nam se, jo too ne mujhe diya haai, un kee raksha kee, maain ne un kee chaukasee kee aur vinash ke putra ko chhod un men se kai nash n hua, isaaliye ki pavitra shaasr kee bat pooree ho." 
John17:13 parantu ab maain tere pas ata hoo, aur ye baten jagat men kahata hoo, ki ve mera anand apane men poora paaen." 
John17:14 maain ne tera vachan unhen pahuncha diya haai, aur sansar ne un se baair kiya, kyonaki jaaisa maain sansar ka nahee, vaaise hee ve bhee sansar ke naheen." 
John17:15 maain yah binatee naheen karata, ki too unhen jagat se utta le, parantu yah ki too unhen us dushtt se bachaae rakh." 
John17:16 jaaise maain sansar ka nahee, vaaise hee ve bhee sansar ke naheen." 
John17:17 saty ke dara unhen paavitra kara: tera vachan saty haai. 
John17:18 jaaise too ne jagat men mujhe bheja, vaaise hee maain ne bhee unhen jagat men bheja." 
John17:19 aur un ke liye maain apane ap ko pavitra karata hoon taki ve bhee saty ke dara pavitra kiae jaaen. 
John17:20 maain keval inheen ke liye binatee naheen karata, parantu un ke liye bhee jo in ke vachan ke dara mujh par vishvas karenge, ki ve sab aek hon." 
John17:21 jaaisa too he pita mujh men haai, aur maain tujh men hoo, vaaise hee ve bhee ham men ho, isaaliye ki jagat prateeti kare, ki too hee ne mujhe bheja." 
John17:22 aur vah maahima jo too ne mujhe dee, maain ne unhen dee haai ki ve vaaise hee aek hon jaaise kee ham aek haain." 
John17:23 maain un men aur too mujh men ki ve siddh hokar aek ho jaae, aur jagat jane ki too hee ne mujhe bheja, aur jaaisa too ne mujh se praem rakha, vaaisa hee un se praem rakha." 
John17:24 he pita, maai. chahata hoon ki jinhen too ne mujhe diya haai, jahan maain hoo, vahan ve bhee mere sath hon ki ve meree us maahima ko dekhen jo too ne mujhe dee haai, kyonki too ne jagat kee utpaati se pahile mujh se praem rakha." 
John17:25 he dhaarmik pita, sansar ne mujhe naheen jana, parantu maain ne tujhe jana aur inhon ne bhee jana ki too hee ne mujhe bheja." 
John17:26 aur maain ne tera nam un ko bataya aur batata rahoonga ki jo praem tujh ko mujh se tha, vah un men rahe aur maain un men rahoon.." 
John18:1 yeeshu ye baten kahakar apane chelon ke sath kidraen ke nale ke par gaya, vahan aek baree thee, jis men vah aur usake chele gaae." 
John18:2 aur usaka pakadvanevala yahooda bhee vah jagah janata tha, kyonki yeeshu apane chelon ke sath vahan jaya karata tha." 
John18:3 tab yahooda palattn ko aur mahayajakon aur fareeasiyon kee or se pyadon ko lekar deepakon aur mashaalon aur haathaiyaron ko liae huae vahan aya. 
John18:4 tab yeeshu un sab baton ko jo us par anevalee thee, janakar nikala, aur un se kahane laga, kise ddoonddhte ho?" 
John18:5 unhon ne usako uttr diya, yeeshu nasaree ko: yeeshu ne un se kaha, maain hee hoon: aur usaka pakadvanevala yahooda bhee un ke sath khda tha." 
John18:6 usake yah kahate hee, ki maain hoo, ve peechhe hattkar boomi par gir pade." 
John18:7 tab us ne fir un se poochha, tum kis ko ddoonddhte ho." 
John18:8 ve bole, yeeshu nasaree ko. yeeshu ne uttr diya, maain to tum se kah chuka hoon ki maain hee hoo, yadi mujhe ddoonddhte ho to inhen jane do." 
John18:9 yai isaliye hua, ki vah vachan poora ho, jo us ne kaha tha ki jinhen too ne mujhe diya, un men se maain ne aek ko bhee n khoya."
