John18:10 shamaun pataras ne talavar, jo usake pas thee, kheenchee aur mahayajak ke das par chalakar, usaka daahina kan uda diya, us das ka nam malakhus tha." 
John18:11 tab yeeshu ne pataras se kaha, apanee talavar kattee men rakh: jo kattora pita ne mujhe diya haai kya maain use n peeun?" 
John18:12 tab sipaahiyon aur un ke soobedar aur yahoodiyon ke pyadon ne yeeshu ko pakadkar bandha liya. 
John18:13 aur paahile use hanna ke pas le gaae kyonki vah us varsha ke mahayajak kaifaa ka sasur tha. 
John18:14 yah vahee kaifaa tha, jis ne yahoodiyon ko salah dee thee ki hamare logon ke liye aek puroosh ka marana achchha haai." 
John18:15 shamaun pataras aur aek aur chela bhee yeeshu ke peechhe ho liae: yah chela mahayajak ka jana pahachana tha aur yeeshu ke sath mahayajak ke angat men gaya. 
John18:16 parantu pataras dar par khda raha, tab vah doosara chela jo mahayajak ka jana pahachana tha, bahar nikala, aur darapalin se kahakar, pataras ko bheetar le aya." 
John18:17 us dasee ne jo darapalin thee, pataras se kaha, kya too bhee is manushy ke chelon men se haai? us ne kaha, maain naheen hoon." 
John18:18 das aur pyade jade ke karan koaele dhadhakakar khde tap rahe the aur pataras bhee un ke sath khda tap raha tha.. 
John18:19 tak mahayajak ne yeeshu se usake chelon ke vishay men aur usake upadesh ke vishay men poochha. 
John18:20 yeeshu ne us ko uttr diya, ki maain ne jagat se kholakar baten kee maain ne sabhaon aur aradhanalay men jahan sab yahoodee ikatthe hua karate haain sada upadesh kiya aur gupt men kuchh bhee naheen kaha." 
John18:21 too mujh se kyon poochhta haai? sunanevalon se poochh: ki maain ne un se kya kaha? dekh ve janate haain ki maain ne kya kya kaha? 
John18:22 tab us ne yah kaha, to pyadon men se aek ne jo pas khda tha, yeeshu ko thppad marakar kaha, kya too mahayajak ko is prakar uttr deta haai." 
John18:23 yeeshu ne use uttr diya, yaadi maain ne bura kaha, to us burai par gavahee de parantu yadi bhla kaha, to mujhe kyon marata haai?" 
John18:24 hanna ne use bandho huae kaifaa mahayajak ke pas bhej diya.. 
John18:25 shamaun pataras khda hua tap raha tha. tab unhon ne us se kaha kya too bhee usake chelon men se haai? us n inkar karake kaha, maain naheen hoon." 
John18:26 mahayajak ke dason men se aek jo usake kuttumb men se tha, jisaka kan pataras ne katt dala tha, bola, kya maain ne tujhe usake sath baree men n dekha tha?" 
John18:27 pataras fir inkar kar gaya aur turant murga ne bang dee.. 
John18:28 aur ve yeeshu ko kaifaa ke pas se kile ko le gaae aur bhor ka samay tha, parantu ve ap kile ke bheetar n gaae taaki ashuuddh n hon parantu fasah kha saken." 
John18:29 tab peelatus un ke pas bahar nikal aya aur kaha, tum is manushy par kis bat kee naliya karate ho?" 
John18:30 unhon ne us ko uttr diya, ki yadi vah kukarmee n hota to ham use tere hath n saunpate." 
John18:31 peelatus ne un se kaha, tum hee ise le jakar apanee vyavastha ke anusar usaka nyay karo: yahoodayon ne us se kaha, hamen adhaikar naheen ki kisee ka praan len." 
John18:32 yah isaliye hua, ki yeeshu kee vah bat pooree ho jo us ne yah pata dete huae kahee thee, ki usaka marana kaaisa hoga.." 
John18:33 tab peelatus fir kile ke bheetar gaya aur yeeshu ko bulakar, us se poochha, kya too yahoodiyon ka raja haai?" 
John18:34 yeeshu ne uttr diya, kya too yah bat apanee or se kahata haai ya auron ne mere vishay men tujh se kahee?" 
John18:35 peelatus ne uttr diya, kya maain yahoodee hoon? teree hee jaati aur mahayajakon ne tujhe mere hath saunpa, too ne kya kiya haai?" 
John18:36 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki mera rajy is jagat ka nahee, yadi mera rajy is jagat ka hota, to mere sevak ladte, ki maain yahoodiyon ke hath saunpa n jata: parantu ab mera rajy yahan ka naheen." 
John18:37 peelatus ne us se kaha, ki too kahata haai, kyonaki maain raja hoon maain ne isaliye janm liya, aur isaliye jagat men aya hoon ki saty par gavahee doon jo koi saty ka haai, vah mera shabd sunata haai." 
John18:38 peelatus ne us se kaha, saty kya haai? aur yah kahakar vah fir yahoodiyon ke pas nikal gaya aur un se kaha, maain to us men kuchh dosh naheen pata." 
John18:39 par tumharee yah reeti haai ki maain fasah men tumhare liye aek vyaktai ko chhod doon so kya tum chahate ho, ki maain tumhare liye yahoodiyon ke raja ko chhod doon?" 
John18:40 tab unhon ne fir chillakar kaha, ise naheen parantu hamare liye baraabba ko chhod de aur baraabba dakoo tha.." 
John19:1 is par peelatus ne yeeshu ko lekar kode lagavaae. 
John19:2 aur sipaahiyon ne kantton ka mukutt goonthkar usake sir par rakha, aur use baainjanee vasr paahinaya." 
John19:3 aur usake pas a akar kahane lage, he yahoodiyon ke raja, pranama! aur use thppad mare." 
John19:4 tak peelatus ne fir bahar nikalakar logon se kaha, dekho, maain use tumhare pas fir bahar lata hoon taki tum jano ki maain kuchh bhee dosh naheen pata." 
John19:5 tak yeeshu kantton ka mukutt aur baainjanee vasr pahine huae bahar nikala aur peelatus ne un se kaha, dekho, yah puroosha." 
John19:6 jab mahayajakon aur pyadon ne use dekha, to chillakar kaha, ki use kroos par chaddha, kroos par: peelatus ne un se kaha, tum hee use lekar kroos par chaddhao kyonaki maain us men dosh naheen pata." 
John19:7 yahoodiyon ne us ko uttr diya, ki hamaree bhee vyavastha haai aur us vyavastha ke anusar vah mare jane ke yogy haai kyonaki us ne apane ap ko parameshvar ka putra banaya." 
John19:8 jab peelatus ne yah bat sunee to aur bhee dr gaya. 
John19:9 aur fir kile ke bheetar gaya aur yeeshu se kaha, too kahan ka haai? parantu yeeshu ne use kuchh bhee uttr n diya." 
John19:10 peelatus ne us se kaha, mujh se kyon naheen bolata? kya too naheen janata ki tujhe chhod dene ka aadhaikar mujhe haai aur tujhe kroos par chaddhane ka bhee mujhe adhaikar haai." 
John19:11 yeeshu ne uttr diya, ki yadi tujhe upar se n diya jata, to tera mujh par kuchh aadhaikar n hota isaliye jis ne mujhe tere hadha pakadvaya haai, usaka pap aadhaik haai." 
John19:12 is se peelatus ne use chhod dena chaha, parantu yahoodayon ne chilla chillakar kaha, yadi too is ko chhod dega to teree bhaktai kaaisar kee or naheen jo koi apane ap ko raja banata haai vah kaaisar ka samhana karata haai." 
John19:13 ye baten sunakar peelatus yeeshu ko bahar laya aur us jagah aek chabootara tha jo ibraanee men gabbata kahalata haai, aur nyay asan par baaitta." 
John19:14 yah fasah kee taaiyaree ka din tha aur chhtte ghantte ke lagabhg tha: tab us ne yahoodiyon se kaha, dekho, yahee haai, tumhara raja!" 
John19:15 parantu ve chillaae ki le ja! le ja! use kroos par chaddha: peelatus ne un se kaha, kya maain tumhare raja ko kroos par chaddhaun? mahayajakon ne uttr diya, ki kaaisar ko chhod hamara aur koi raja naheen." 
John19:16 tab us ne use un ke hath saunp diya taaki vah kroos par chaddhaya jaae.. 
John19:17 tab ve yeeshu ko le gaae. aur vah apana kroos uttaae huae us sthan tak bahar gaya, jo khopadee ka sthan kahalata haai aur ibraanee men gulaguta." 
John19:18 vahan unhon ne use aur usake sath aur do manushyon ko kroos par chaddhaya, aek ko idhar aur aek ko udhar, aur beech men yeeshu ko." 
John19:19 aur peelatus ne aek dosha-patra likhkar kroos par laga diya aur us men yah likha hua tha, yeeshu nasaree yahoodiyon ka raja." 
John19:20 yah dosha-patra bahut yahoodiyon ne paddha kyonaki vah sthan jahan yeeshu kroos par chaddhaya gaya tha nagar ke pas tha aur patra ibraanee aur lateenee aur yoonanee men likha hua tha. 
John19:21 tab yahoodiyon ke mahayajakon ne peelatus se kaha, yahoodiyon ka raja mat likh parantu yah ki us ne kaha, maain yahoodiyon ka raja hoon." 
John19:22 peelatus ne uttr diya, ki maain ne jo likh diya, vah likh diya.." 
John19:23 jab sipahee yeeshu ko kroos par chaddha chuke, to usake kapade lekar char bhag kia, har sipahee ke liye aek bhag aur kurata bhee liya, parantu kurata bin seean upar se neeche tak buna hua tha: isaliye unhon ne apas men kaha, ham is ko n faade, parantu is par chitthee dalen ki vah kis ka hoga." 
John19:24 yah isaliye hua, ki pavitra shaasr kee bat pooree ho ki unhon ne mere kapade apas men bantt liye aur mere vasr par chitthee dalee: so sipaahiyon ne aeesa hee kiya." 
John19:25 parantu yeeshu ke kroos ke pas us kee mata aur us kee mata kee bahin mariyam, klopas kee patnee aur mariyam magadaleenee khdee thee." 
John19:26 yeeshu ne apanee mata se kaha he naree, dek, yah tera putra haai." 
John19:27 tab us chele se kaha, yah teree mata haai, aur usee samay se vah chela, use apane ghar le gaya.." 
John19:28 is ke bad yeeshu ne yah janakar ki ab sab kuchh ho chuka isaliye ki pavitra shaasr kee bat pooree ho kaha, maain pyasa hoon." 
John19:29 vahan aek sirake se bhra hua bartan dhara tha, so unhon ne sirake ke bhaigoae huae ispanj ko joofae par rakhkar usake munh se lagaya." 
John19:30 jab yeeshu ne vah siraka liya, to kaha poora hua aur sir jhukakar praan tyag diae.." 
John19:31 aur isaliye ki vah taaiyaree ka din tha, yahoodiyon ne peelatus se binatee kee ki un kee ttange tod dee jaaen aur ve utare jaaen taaki sabt ke din ve krooson par n rahe, kyonki vah sabt ka din bada din tha." 
John19:32 so sipaahiyon ne akar pahile kee ttangen todeen tab doosare kee bhee, jo usake sath krooson par chaddhaae gaae the." 
John19:33 parantu jab yeeshu ke pas akar dekha ki vah mar chuka haai, to us kee ttangen n todeen." 
John19:34 parantu sipaahiyon men se aek ne barachhe se usaka panjar bedha aur us men se turant lohoo aur panee nikala. 
John19:35 jis ne yah dekha, usee ne gavahee dee haai, aur us kee gavahee sachchee haai aur vah janata haai, ki sach kahata haai ki tum bhee vishvas karo." 
John19:36 ye baten isaaliye huin ki pavitra shaasr kee yah bat pooree ho ki us kee koi haddee todee n jaaegee. 
John19:37 fir aek aur sthan par yah likha haai, ki jise unhon ne bedha haai, us par draashtti karenge.." 
John19:38 in baton ke bad aramatiyah ke yoosufa ne, jo yeeshu ka chela tha, parantu yahoodiyon ke dr se is bat ko chhpaiaae rakhta tha, peelatus se binatee kee, ki maain yeeshu kee loth ko le jau, aur peelatus ne us kee binatee sunee, aur vah akar us kee loth le gaya." 
John19:39 nikudemus bhee jo paahile yeeshu ke pas rat ko gaya tha pachas ser ke lagabhg mila hua gandharas aur aelava le aya. 
John19:40 tab unhon ne yeeshu kee loth ko liya aur yahoodiyon ke gadne kee reeati ke anusar use sugandha dravy ke sath kafan men lapetta. 
John19:41 us sthan par jahan yeeshu kroos par chaddhaya gaya tha, ek baree thee aur us baree men ek nai kabra thee jis men kabhee koi n rakha gaya tha." 
John19:42 so yahoodiyon kee taaiyaree ke din ke kara, unhon ne yeeshu ko usee men rakha, kyonaki vah kabra nikatt thee.." 
John20:1 saptah ke paahile din mariyam magadaleenee bhor ko andhora rahate hee kabra par ai, aur patthr ko kabra se hatta hua dekha." 
John20:2 tab vah daudee aur shamaun pataras aur us doosare chele ke pas jis se yeeshu praem rakhta tha akar kaha, ve prabhu ko kabra men se nikal le gaae haain aur ham naheen janatee, ki use kahan rakh diya haai." 
John20:3 tab pataras aur vah doosara chela nikalakar kabra kee or chale. 
John20:4 aur donon sath sath daud rahe the, parantu doosara chela pataras se age baddhkar kabra par pahile pahuncha." 
John20:5 aur jhukakar kapade pade dekhe: taubhee vah bheetar n gaya. 
John20:6 tab shamaun pataras usake peechhe peechhe pahuncha aur kabra ke bheetar gaya aur kapade pade dekhe. 
John20:7 aur vah angochha jo usake sir se bandha hua tha, kapadon ke sath pada hua naheen parantu alag aek jagah lapetta hua dekha." 
John20:8 tab doosara chela bhee jo kabra par pahile pahuncha tha, bheetar gaya aur dekhkar vishvas kiya." 
John20:9 ve to ab tak paavitra shaasr kee vah bat n samajhte the, ki use mare huon men se jee uttna hoga." 
John20:10 tab ye chele apane ghar lautt gaae. 
John20:11 parantu mariyam rotee hui kabra ke pas hee bahar khdee rahee aur rote rote kabra kee or jhukakar," 
John20:12 do svargadooton ko ujjavat kapade pahine huae aek ko sirahane aur doosare ko paaitane baaitte dekha, jahan yeeshu kee loth padee thee." 
John20:13 unhon ne us se kaha, he naree, too kyon rotee haai? us ne un se kaha, ve mare prabhu ko utta le gaae aur maain naheen janatee ki use kahan rakha haai." 
John20:14 yah kahakar vah peechhe firee aur yeeshu ko khde dekha aur n pahachana ki yah yeeshu haai. 
John20:15 yeeshu ne us se kaha, he naree too kyon rotee haai? jis ko ddoonddhtee haai? us ne malee samajhkar us se kaha, he maharaj, yadi too ne use utta liya haai to mujh se kah ki use kahan rakha haai aur maain use le jaungee." 
John20:16 yeeshu ne us se kaha, maariyama! us ne peechhe firakar us se ibraanee men kaha, rabboonee arthata he guroo." 
John20:17 yeeshu ne us se kaha, mujhe mat choo kyonki maain ab tak pita ke pas upar naheen gaya, parantu mere bhaiyon ke pas jakar un se kah de, ki maain apane pita, aur tumhare parameshvar ke pas upar jata hoon." 
John20:18 maariyam magadaleenee ne jakar chelon ko bataya, ki maain ne prabhu ko dekha aur us ne mujh se baten kaheen.." 
John20:19 usee din jo saptah ka pahila din tha, sandhya ke samay jab vahan ke dar jahan chele the, yahoodiyon ke dr ke mare band the, tab yeeshu aya aur beech men khda hokar un se kaha, tumhen shaantai mile." 
John20:20 aur yah kahakar us ne apana hath aur apana panjar un ko dikhaae: tab chele prabhu ko dekhkar anaandait hue. 
John20:21 yeeshu ne fir un se kaha, tumhen shaantai mile jaaise pita ne mujhe bheja haai, vaaise hee maain bhee tumhen bhejata hoon." 
John20:22 yah kahakar us ne un par foonka aur un se kaha, paavitra atma lo." 
John20:23 jin ke pap tum kshama karo ve un ke liye kshama kiae gaae haain jin ke tum rakho, ve rakhe gaae haain.." 
John20:24 parantu barahon men se aek vyaaktai arthata thoma jo didumus kahalata haai, jab yeeshu aya to un ke sath n tha." 
John20:25 jab aur chele us se kahane lage ki ham ne prabhu ko dekha haai: tab us ne un se kaha, jab tak maain us ke hathon men keelon ke chhed n dekh loo, aur keelon ke chhedon men apanee ungalee n dal loo, tab tak maain prateeti naheen karoonga.." 
John20:26 att din ke bad us ke chele fir ghar ke bheetar the, aur thoma un ke sath tha, aur dar band the, tab yeeshu ne akar aur beech men khda hokar kaha, tumhen shaantai mile." 
John20:27 tab us ne thoma se kaha, apanee ungalee yahan lakar mere panjar men dal aur aavishvasee naheen parantu vishvasee ho." 
John20:28 yah sun thoma ne uttr diya, he mere prabhu, he mere parameshvara!" 
John20:29 yeeshu ne us se kaha, too ne to mujhe dekhkar vishvas kiya haai, dhany haain ve jinhon ne bina dekhe vishvas kiya.." 
John20:30 yeeshu ne aur bhee bahut chinh chelon ke samhane dikhaa, jo is pustak men likhe naheen gaae." 
John20:31 parantu ye isaaliye likhe gaae haai, ki tum vishvas karo, ki yeeshu hee parameshvar ka putra maseeh haai: aur vishvas karake usake nam se jeevan pao.." 
John21:1 in baton ke bad yeeshu ne apane ap ko tibiriyas jheel ke kinare chelon par pragatt kiya aur is reeati se pragatt kiya. 
John21:2 shamaun pataras aur thoma jo didumus kahalata haai, aur galeel ke kana nagar ka natanaael aur jabadee ke putra, aur usake chelon men se do aur jan ikatthe the." 
John21:3 shamaun pataras ne un se kaha, maain machhlee pakadne jata hoon: unhon ne us se kaha, ham bhee tere sath chalate haain: so ve nikalakar nav par chaddhe, parantu us rat kuchh n pakada." 
John21:4 bhor hote hee yeeshu kinare par khda hua taubhee chelon ne n pahachana ki yah yeeshu haai. 
John21:5 tab yeeshu ne un se kaha, he balako, kya tumhare pas kuchh khane ko haai? unhon ne uttr diya ki naheen." 
John21:6 us ne un se kaha, nav kee dahinee or jal dalo, to paoge, tab unhon ne jal dala, aur ab machhliyon kee bahutayat ke karan use kheench n sake." 
John21:7 isaliye us chele ne jis se yeeshu praem rakhta tha pataras se kaha, yah to prabhu haai: shamaun pataras ne yah sunakar ki prabhu haai, kamar men angarakha kas liya, kyonaki vah nanga tha, aur jheel men kood pada." 
John21:8 parantu aur chele dongee par machhliyon se bhra hua jal kheenchate huae aa, kyonki ve kinare se adhaik door nahee, koi do sau hath par the." 
John21:9 jab kinare par utare, to unhon ne koaele kee ag, aur us r machhlee rakhee hui, aur rottee dekhee." 
John21:10 yeeshu ne un se kaha, jo machhliyan tum ne abhee pakadee haai, un men se kuchh lao." 
John21:11 shamaun pataras ne dongee par chaddhkar aek sau tirman badee machhliyon se bhra hua jal kinare par kheencha, aur itanee machhaliyan hone par bhee jan n fatta." 
John21:12 yeeshu ne un se kaha, ki ao, bhojan karo aur chelon men se kisee ko hiyav n hua, ki us se poochhe, ki too kaun haai?" 
John21:13 yeeshu aya, aur rottee lekar unhen dee, aur vaaise hee machhlee bhee." 
John21:14 yah teesaree bar haai, ki yeeshu ne mare huon men se jee uttne ke bad chelon ko darshan diae.." 
John21:15 bhojan karane ke bad yeeshu ne shamaun pataras se kaha, he shamaun, yoohanna ke putra, kya too in se baddhkar mujh se praem rakhta haai? us ne us se kaha, han prabhu too to janata haai, ki maain tujh se praeeti rakhta hoon: us ne us se kaha, mere memanon ko chara." 
John21:16 us ne fir doosaree bar us se kaha, he shamaun yoohanna ke putra, kya too mujh se praem rakhta haai? us ne un se kaha, ha, prabhu too janata haai, ki maain tujh se praeeti rakhta hoon: us ne us se kaha, meree bhedon kee rakhvalee kara." 
John21:17 us ne teesaree bar us se kaha, he shamaun, yoohanna ke putra, kya too mujh se praeeati rakhta haai? pataras udas hua, ki us ne use teesaree bar aeesa kaha ki kya too mujh se praeeti rakhta haai? aur us se kaha, he prabhu, too to sab kuchh janata haai: too yah janata haai ki maain tujh se praeeti rakhta hoon: yeeshu ne us se kaha, meree bhedon ko chara." 
John21:18 maain tujh se sach sach kahata hoo, jab too javan tha, to apanee kamar bandhakar jahan chahata tha, vahan firata tha parantu jab too booddha hoga, to apane hath lambe karega, aur doosara teree kamar bandhakar jahan too n chahega vahan tujhe le jaaega." 
John21:19 us ne in baton se pata diya ki pataras kaaisee mratyu se parameshvar kee mahima karega aur yah kahakar, us se kaha, mere peechhe ho le." 
John21:20 pataras ne firakar us chele ko peechhe ate dekha, jis se yeeshu praem rakhta tha, aur jis ne bhojan ke samay us kee chhatee kee aur jhukakar poochha he prabhu, tera pakadvanevala kaun haai?" 
John21:21 use dekhkar pataras ne yeeshu se kaha, he prabhu, is ka kya hal hoga?" 
John21:22 yeeshu ne us se kaha, yaadi maain chahoon ki vah mere ane tak tthara rahe, to tujhe kya? too mere peechhe ho le." 
John21:23 isaliye bhaiyon men yah bat faail gai, ki vah chela n marega taubhee yeeshu ne us se yah naheen kaha, ki yah n marega, parantu yah ki yadi maain chahoon ki yah mere ane tak tthara rahe, to tujhe is se kya?" 
John21:24 yah vahee chela haai, jo in baton kee gavahee deta haai aur jis ne in baton ko likha haai aur ham janate haai, ki us kee gavahee sachchee haai." 
John21:25 aur bhee bahut se kam haai, jo yeeshu ne kiae yaadi ve aek aek karake likhe jate, to maain samajhta hoo, ki pustaken jo likhee jateen ve jagat men bhee n samateen.." 
Acts1:1 he thaiyuafilus, maain ne paahilee puastaika un sab baton ke vishay men likhee, jo yeeshu ne arambh men kiya aur karata aur sikhata raha." 
Acts1:2 us din tak jab vah un prariton ko jinhen us ne chuna tha, paavitra atma ke dara agyaa dekar upar uttaya n gaya." 
Acts1:3 aur us ne du:kh uttane ke bad bahut se pakke pramanon se apane ap ko unhen jeeavit dikhaya, aur chalees din tak vah unhen dikhai deta raha: aur parameshvar ke rajy kee baten karata raha." 
Acts1:4 or un se milakar unhen agyaa dee, ki yarooshalem ko n chhodo, parantu pita kee us praatigyaa ke poore hone kee batt jahate raho, jis kee charcha tum mujh se sun chuke ho." 
Acts1:5 kyonaki yoohanna ne to panee men bapatisma diya haai parantu thode dinon ke bad tum paavitraatma se bapaatisma paoge. 
Acts1:6 so unheen ne ikatthe hokar us se poochha, ki he prabhu, kya too isee samay israael ko rajy faer dega?" 
Acts1:7 us ne un se kaha un samayon ya kalon ko janana, jin ko pita ne apane hee aadhaikar men rakha haai, tumhara kam naheen." 
Acts1:8 parantu jab pavitra atma tum par aaega tab tum samarth paoge aur yarooshalem aur sare yahoodiya aur samariya me, aur prathvee kee chhor tak mere gavah hoge." 
Acts1:9 yah kahakar vah un ke dekhte dekhte upar utta liya gaya aur badal ne use un kee ankhon se chhpai liya. 
Acts1:10 aur usake jate samay jab ve akash kee or tak rahe the, to dekho, do puroosh shvet vasr paahine huae un ke pas a khde hue." 
Acts1:11 aur kahane lage he galeelee purooshae, tum kyon khde svarga kee or dekh rahe ho? yahee yeeshu, jo tumhare pas se svarga par utta liya gaya haai, jis reeti se tum ne use svarga ko jate dekha haai usee reeti se vah fir aaega.." 
Acts1:12 tab ve jaaitoon nam ke pahad se jo yarooshalem ke nikatt aek sabt ke din kee dooree par haai, yarooshalem ko lautte." 
Acts1:13 aur jab vahan pahunche to ve us attaree par gaa, jahan pataras aur yoohanna aur yakoob aur aandairyas aur filippus aur thoma aur baratulamai aur mattee aur halafai ka putra yakoob aur shamaun jelotes aur yakoob ka putra yahooda rahate the." 
Acts1:14 ye sab kai striayon aur yeeshu kee mata mariyam aur usake bhaiyon ke sath aek chitt hokar praarthna men lage rahe.. 
Acts1:15 aur unheen dinon men pataras bhaiyon ke beech men jo aek sau bees vyaktai ke lagabhg ikatthe the, khda hokar kahane laga." 
Acts1:16 he bhaiyo, avashy tha ki pavitra shaasr ka vah lekh poora ho, jo paavitra atma ne daud ke mukh se yahooda ke vishay men jo yeeshu ke pakadnevalon ka aguva tha, paahile se kahee thee." 
Acts1:17 kyonaki vah to ham men gina gaya, aur is sevakai men sahabhagee hua." 
Acts1:18 us ne adharma kee kamai se ek khet mol liya aur sir ke bal gira, aur usaka pett fatt gaya, aur us kee sab antadiyan nikal padee." 
Acts1:19 aur is bat ko yarooshalem ke sab rahanevale jan gaa, yahan tak ki us khet ka nam un kee bhasha men hakaladama arthata lohoo ka khet pad gaya." 
Acts1:20 kyonaki bhjan saahinta men likha haai, ki usaka ghar ujad jaa, aur us men koi n base aur usaka pad koi doosara le le." 
Acts1:21 isaliye jitane din tak prabhu yeeshu hamare sath ata jata raha, arthata yoohanna ke bapatisma se lekar usake hamare pas se uttaae jane tak, jo log barabar hamare sath rahe." 
Acts1:22 uchit haai ki un men se ek vyaaktai hamare sath usake jee uttne ka gavah ho jae. 
Acts1:23 tak unhon ne do ko khda kiya, aek yusufa ko, jo bara-saba kahalata haai, jis ka upanam yoosatus haai, doosara maatiayyah ko." 
Acts1:24 aur yah kahakar praarthna kee ki he prabhu, too jo sab ke man janata haai, yah pragatt kar ki in danon men se too ne kis ko chuna haai." 
Acts1:25 ki vah is sevakai aur praaritai ka pad le jise yahooda chhod kar apane sthan ko gaya. 
Acts1:26 tab unhon ne un ke bare men chitthiyan dalee, aur chitthee maatiayyah ke nam par nikalee, so vah un gyarah praeariton ke sath gina gaya.." 
Acts2:1 jab pintekus ka din aya, to ve sab aek jagah ikatthe the." 
Acts2:2 aur aekaaek akash se badee andhaee kee see sanasanahatt ka shabd hua, aur us se sara ghar jahan ve baaitte the, goonj gaya." 
Acts2:3 aur unhen ag kee see jeebhen fatttee hui dikhai deen aur un men se har aek par a tthareen. 
Acts2:4 aur ve sab paavitra atma se bhr gaa, aur jis prakar atma ne unhen bolane kee samarth dee, ve any any bhasha bolane lage.." 
Acts2:5 aur akash ke neeche kee har aek jati men se bhkt yahoodee yarooshalem men rahate the. 
Acts2:6 jab vah shabd hua to bheed lag gai aur log ghabara gaa, kyonki har aek ko yahee sunai deta tha, ki ye meree hee bhasha men bol rahe haain." 
Acts2:7 aur ve sab chaakit aur achaambhiat hokar kahane lage dekho, ye jo bol rahe haain kya sab galeelee naheen?" 
Acts2:8 to fir kyon ham men se har aek apanee apanee janm boomi kee bhasha sunata haai? 
Acts2:9 ham jo parathee aur medee aur aelamee log aur misuputaamiya aur yahoodiya aur kappadookiya aur puntus aur aasiya. 
Acts2:10 aur oogiya aur pamafooliya aur misar aur libooa desh jo kurene ke as pas haai, in sab deshaen ke rahanevale aur romee pravasee, kya yahoodee kya yahoodee mat dhaaran karanevale, kretee aur arabee bhee haain." 
Acts2:11 parantu apanee apanee bhasha men un se parameshvar ke bade bade kamon kee charcha sunate haain. 
Acts2:12 aur ve sab chaakit hua, aur ghabarakar aek doosare se kahane lage ki yah kya hua chahata haai?" 
Acts2:13 parantu auron ne ttttha karake kaha, ki ve to nai maadira ke nasho men haain.." 
Acts2:14 pataras un gyarah ke sath khda hua aur unche shabd se kahane laga, ki he yahoodiyo, aur he yarooshalem ke sab rahanevalo, yah jan lo aur kan lagakar meree baten suno." 
Acts2:15 jaaisa tum samajh rahe ho, ye nashon men nahee, kyonki abhee to pahar hee din chaddha haai." 
Acts2:16 parantu yah vah bat haai, jo yoael bhvishyadvkta ke dara kahee gai haai." 
Acts2:17 ki parameshvar kahata haai, ki ant ki dinon men aeesa hoga, ki maain apana atma sab manushyon par undeloonga aur tumhare bette aur tumharee beattyaian bhavishyadanee karengee aur tumhare javan darshan dekhenge, aur tumhare puraaniae svapt dekhenge." 
Acts2:18 baran maain apane dason aur apanee dasiyon par bhee un dinon men apane atma men se undeloonga, aur ve bhavishyadanee karenge." 
Acts2:19 aur maain upar akash men adabhut kam, aur neeche dharatee par chinh, arthata loho, aur ag aur dhooaen ka badal dikhaunga." 
Acts2:20 prabhu ke mahan aur praasiddh din ke ane se paahile soorya andhora aur chand lohoo ho jaaega. 
Acts2:21 aur jo koi prabhu ka nam lega, vahee uddhar paaega." 
Acts2:22 he israaeliyo, ye baten suno: ki yeeshu nasaree aek manushy tha jis ka parameshvar kee or se hone ka praman un samarth ke kamon aur ashcharya ke kamon aur chinhon se pragatt haai, jo parameshvar ne tumhare beech usake dara kar dikhlaae jise tum ap hee janate ho." 
Acts2:23 usee ko, jab vah parameshvar kee ttharai hui manasa aur honahar ke gyaan ke anusar pakadvaya gaya, to tum ne adharmiyon ke hath se use kroos par chaddhvakar mar dala." 
Acts2:24 parantu usee ko parameshvar ne mratyu ke bandhanon se chhudakar jilaya: kyonki yah anahona tha ki vah usake vash men rahata. 
Acts2:25 kyonaki daud usake vishay men kahata haai, ki maain prabhu ko sarvada apane samhane dekhta raha kyonki vah meree daahinee or haai, taki maain dgai n jaun." 
Acts2:26 isee karan mera man anand hua, aur meree jeebh magan hui baran mera shreer bhee asha men basa rahega." 
Acts2:27 kyonaki too mere praanon ko adhaelok men n chhodega aur n apane paavitra jan ko sadne hee dega! 
Acts2:28 too ne mujhe jeevan ka marga bataya he too mujhe apane darshan ke dara anand se bhr dega. 
Acts2:29 he bhaiyo, maain us kulapati daud ke vishay men tum se sahas ke sath kah sakata hoon ki vah to mar gaya aur gada bhee gaya aur us kee kabra aj tak hamare yahan vartaman haai." 
Acts2:30 so bhavishyadvkta hokar aur yah janakar ki parameshvar ne mujh se shapath khai haai, ki parameshvar ne mujh se shapath khai haai, ki maain tere vansh men se aek vyaaktai ko tere sinhasan par baaittaunga." 
Acts2:31 us ne honahar ko paahile hee se dekhkar maseeh ke jee uttne ke vishay men bhavishyadanee kee ki n to usaka praan adhaelok men chhoda gaya, aur n us kee deh sadne pai." 
Acts2:32 isee yeeshu ko parameshvar ne jilaya, jis ke ham sab gavah haain." 
Acts2:33 is prakar parameshvar ke dahine hath se savorchch pad pakar, aur pita se vah paavitra atma praapt karake jis kee pratigyaa kee gai thee, us ne yah undel diya haai jo tum dekhte aur sanate ho." 
Acts2:34 kyonaki daud to svarga par naheen chaddha parantu vah ap kahata haai, ki prabhu ne mere prabhu se kaha" 
Acts2:35 mere dahine baait, jab tak ki maain tere baaiariyon ko tere panvon tale kee chaukee n kar doon." 
Acts2:36 so ab israael ka sara gharana nishchay jan le ki parameshvar ne usee yeeshu ko jise tum ne kroos par chaddhaya, prabhu bhee ttharaya aur maseeh bhee.." 
Acts2:37 tab sunanevalon ke day chhdai gaa, aur ve pataras aur shosh praeariton se poochhne lage, ki he bhaiyo, ham kya karen?" 
Acts2:38 pataras ne un se kaha, man firao, aur tum men se har aek apane apane papon kee kshama ke liye yeeshu maseeh ke nam se bapatisma le to tum pavitra atma ka dan paoge." 
Acts2:39 kyonaki yah pratigyaa tum, aur tumharee santano, aur un sab door door ke logon ke liye bhee haai jinako prabhu hamara parameshvar apane pas bulaaega." 
Acts2:40 us ne bahut or baton men bhee gavahee de dekar samajhaya ki apane ap ko is tteddhee jati se bachao. 
Acts2:41 so jinhon ne usaka vachan grahan kiya unhon ne bapatisma liya aur usee din teen hajar manushyon ke lagabhg un men mil gaae. 
Acts2:42 aur ve praariton se shaiksha pane, aur sangati rakhne men aur rottee todne men aur praarthna karane men lauleen rahe.." 
Acts2:43 aur sab logon par bhy chha gaya, aur bahut se adabhut kam aur chinh praeriton ke dara pragatt hote the." 
Acts2:44 aur ve sab vishvas karanevale ikatthe rahate the, aur un kee sab vastuen sajhe kee thee." 
Acts2:45 aur ve apanee apanee sampaati aur saman bech bechakar jaaisee jis kee avashyakata hotee thee bantt diya karate the. 
Acts2:46 aur ve praati din aek man hokar maandair men ikatthe hote the, aur ghar ghar rottee todte huae anand aur man kee seedhaai se bhojan kiya karate the." 
Acts2:47 aur parameshvar kee stuti karate the, aur sab log un se prasann the: aur jo uddhar pate the, unako prabhu praati din un men mila deta tha.." 
Acts3:1 pataras aur yoohanna teesare pahar praarthna ke samay mandair men ja rahe the. 
Acts3:2 aur log aek janm ke langade ko la rahe the, jis ko ve prati din mandair ke us dar par jo sundar kahalata haai, baaitta dete the, ki vah mandair men janevalon se bheekh mange." 
Acts3:3 jab us ne pataras aur yoohanna ko maandair men jate dekha, to un se bheekh mangee." 
Acts3:4 pataras ne yoohanna ke sath us kee or dhyan se dekhkar kaha, hamaree or dekh." 
Acts3:5 so vah un se kuchh pane kee asha rakhte huae un kee or takane laga. 
Acts3:6 tab pataras ne kaha, chandee aur sona to mere pas haai naheen parantu jo mere pas haai, vah tujhe deta hoon: yeeshu maseeh nasaree ke nam se chal fira." 
Acts3:7 aur us ne usaka daahina hath pakad ke use uttaya: aur turant usake pavon aur ttkhnon men bal a gaya. 
Acts3:8 aur vah uchhlakar khda ho gaya, aur chalane firane laga aur chalata aur koodata, aur parameshvar kee stuati karata hua un ke sath maandair men gaya." 
Acts3:9 sab logon ne use chalate firate aur parameshvar kee stuati karate dekhkara. 
Acts3:10 us ko pahachan liya ki yah vahee haai, jo mandair ke sundar faattk par baaitt kar bheekh manga karata tha aur us ghattna se jo usake sath hui thee ve bahut achaambhiat aur chaakit hue.." 
Acts3:11 jab vah pataras aur yoohanna ko pakade huae tha, to sab log bahut achambha karate huae us osare men jo sulaaiman ka kahalata haai, un ke pas daude aae." 
Acts3:12 yah dekhkar pataras ne logon se kaha he israaeliyo, tum is manushy par kyon achambha karate ho, aur hamaree or kyon is prakar dekh rahe ho, ki mano ham hee ne apanee samarth ya bhaktai se ise chalana-firata kar diya." 
Acts3:13 ibraaheem aur isahak aur yakoob ke parameshvar, hamare bapadadon ke parameshvar ne apane sevak yeeshu kee mahima kee, jise tum ne pakadva diya, aur jab peelatus ne use chhod dene ka vichar kiya, tab tum ne usake samhane usaka inkar kiya." 
Acts3:14 tum ne us paavitra aur dharmee ka inkar kiya, aur binatee kee, ki aek hatyare ko tumhare liye chhod diya jaae." 
Acts3:15 aur tum ne jeevan ke kartta ko mar dala, jise parameshvar ne mare huon men se jilaya aur is bat ke ham gavah haain." 
Acts3:16 aur usee ke nam ne, us vishvas ke dara jo usake nam par haai, is manushy ko jise tum dekhte ho aur janate bhee ho samarth dee haai aur nishchay usee vishvas ne jo usake dara haai, is ko tum sab ke samhane bilakul bhla changa kar diya haai." 
Acts3:17 aur ab he bhaiyo, maain janata hoon ki yah kam tum ne agyaanata se kiya, aur vaaisa hee tumhare saradaron ne bhee kiya." 
Acts3:18 parantu jin baton ko parameshvar ne sab bhavishyadvktaon ke mukh se pahile hee bataya tha, ki usaka maseeh du:kh uttaaega unhen us ne is reeati se pooree kiya." 
Acts3:19 isaliye, man firao aur lautt ao ki tumhare pap mittaae jaae, jis se prabhu ke sammukh se vishraaantai ke din aaen." 
Acts3:20 aur vah us maseeh yeeshu ko bheje jo tumhare liye paahile hee se ttharaya gaya haai. 
Acts3:21 avashy haai ki vah svarga men us samay tak rahe jab tak ki vah sab baton ka sudhaar n kar le jis kee charcha parameshvar ne apane paavitra bhavishyadvktaon ke mukh se kee haai, jo jagat kee utpati se hote aae haain." 
Acts3:22 jaaisa ki moosa ne kaha, prabhu parameshvar tumhare bhaiyon men se tumhare liye mujh sa aek bhavishyadvkta uttaaega, jo kuchh vah tum se kahe, us kee sunana." 
Acts3:23 parantu pratyek manushy jo us bhvishyadvkta kee n sune, logon men se nash kiya jaaega." 
Acts3:24 aur samuel se lekar ukase bad balon tak jitane bhvishyadvktaon ne bat keehan un sab ne in dinon ka sandesh diya haai. 
Acts3:25 tum bhavishyadvktaon kee santan aur us vacha ke bhagee ho, jo parameshvar ne tumhare bapadadon se bandhae, jab us ne ibraaheem se kaha, ki tere vansh ke dara prathvee ke sare gharane ashaeesh paaenge." 
Acts3:26 parameshvar ne apane sevak ko uttakar pahil tumhare pas bheja, ki tum men se har aek kee us kee buraiyon se faerakar ashaeesh de.." 
Acts4:1 jab ve logon se yah kah rahe the, to yajak aur mandair ke saradar aur sadookee un par chaddh aaen." 
Acts4:2 kyonaki ve bahut krodhait huae ki ve logon ko sikhate the aur yeeshu ka udaharan de dekar mare huon ke jee uttne ka prachar karate the. 
Acts4:3 aur unhon ne unhen pakadkar doosare din tak havalat men rakha kyonaki sandhaya ho gai thee. 
Acts4:4 parantu vachan ke sunanevalon men se bahuton ne vishvas kiya, aur un kee ginatee panch hajar purooshaen ke lagabhg ho gai.." 
Acts4:5 doosare din aeesa hua ki un ke saradar aur puraaniye aur shaasree. 
Acts4:6 aur mahayajak hanna aur kaaifaa aur yoohanna aur sikandar aur jitane mahayajak ke gharane ke the, sab yarooshalem men ikatthe hue." 
Acts4:7 aur unhen beech men khda karake poochhne lage, ki tum ne yah kam kis samarth se aur kis nam se kiya haai?" 
Acts4:8 tab pataras ne paavitra atma se paaripoorn hokar un se kaha. 
Acts4:9 he logon ke saradaron aur puraniyo, is durbal manushy ke sath jo bhlai kee gai haai, yaadi aj ham se usake vishay men poochh pachh kee jatee haai, ki vah kyonkar achchha hua." 
Acts4:10 to tum sab aur sare israaelee log jan len ki yeeshu maseeh nasaree ke nam se jise tum ne kroos par chaddhaya, aur parameshvar ne mare huon men se jilaya, yah manushy tumhare samhane bhla changa khda haai." 
Acts4:11 yah vahee patthr haai jise tum rajamisriyon ne tuchchh jata aur vah kone ke sire ka patthr ho gaya. 
Acts4:12 aur kisee doosare ke dara uddhar naheen kyonki svarga ke neeche manushyon men aur koi doosara nam naheen diya gaya, jis ke dara ham uddhar pa saken.." 
Acts4:13 jab unhon ne pataras aur yoohanna ka hiyav dekha, or yah jana ki ye anapaddh aur sadhaaran manushy haai, to achambha kiya fir un ko pahachana, ki ye yeeshu ke sath rahe haain." 
Acts4:14 aur us manushy ko jo achchha hua tha, un ke sath khde dekhkar, ve virodha men kuchh n kah sake." 
Acts4:15 parantu unhen sabha ke bahar jane kee agyaa dekar, ve apas men vichar karane lage," 
Acts4:16 ki ham in manushyon ke sath kya karen? kyonki yarooshalem ke sab rahanevalon par pragatt haai, ki in ke dara aek praasiddh chinh dikhaya gaya haai aur ham usaka inkar nahanee kar sakate." 
Acts4:17 parantu isaaliye ki yah bat logon men aur aadhaik faail n jaa, ham unhen dhamakaae, ki ve is nam se fir kisee manushy se baten n karen." 
Acts4:18 tab unhen bulaya aur chitaunee dekar yah kaha, ki yeeshu ke nam se kuchh bhee n bolana aur n sikhlana." 
Acts4:19 parantu pataras aur yoohanna ne un ko uttr diya, ki tum hee nyay karo, ki kya yah parameshvar ke nikatt bhla haai, ki ham parameshvar kee bat se baddhkar tumharee bat manen." 
Acts4:20 kyonaki yah to ham men ho naheen sakata, ki jo ham ne dekha aur suna haai, vah n kahen." 
Acts4:21 tab unhon ne un ko aur dhamakakar chhod diya, kyonaki logon ke karan unhen dand dene ka koi danv naheen mila, isaliye ki jo ghattna hui thee usake karan sab log parameshvar kee badai karate the." 
Acts4:22 kyonaki vah manushy, jis par yah changa karane ka chinh dikhaya gaya tha, chalees varsha se aadhaik ayu ka tha." 
Acts4:23 ve choottkar apane sathaiyon ke pas aa, aur jo kuchh mahayajakon aur puraaniyon ne un se kaha tha, unako suna diya." 
Acts4:24 yah sunakar, unhon ne aek chitt hokar unche shabd se parameshvar se kaha, he svamee, too vahee haai jis ne savarga aur prathvee aur samudra aur jo kuchh un men haai banaya." 
Acts4:25 too ne paavitra atma ke dara apane sevak hamare pita daud ke mukh se kaha, ki any jaatiyon ne hullad kyon machaya? aur desh ke logon ne kyon vyarth baten sochee?" 
Acts4:26 prabhu aur usake maseeh ke virodha men prathvee ke raja khde hua, aur haakim aek sath ikatthe ho gaae." 
Acts4:27 kyonaki sachamuch tere sevak yeeshu ke virodha me, jis too ne abhaishok kiya, herodes aur puantaiyus peelatus bhee any jatiyon aur israaeliyon ke sath is nagar men ikatthe hue." 
Acts4:28 ki jo kuchh pahile se teree samarth aur mati se tthara tha vahee karen. 
Acts4:29 ab, he prabhu, un kee dhamakiyon ko dekh aur apane dason ko yah baradan de, ki tera vachan bade hiyav se sunaaen." 
Acts4:30 aur changa karane ke liye too apana hath baddha ki chinh aur adabhut kam tere pavitra sevak yeeshu ke nam se kiae jaaen. 
Acts4:31 jab ve praarthna kar chuke, to vah sthan jahan ve ikatthe the hil gaya, aur ve sab paavitra atma se paaripoorn ho gaa, aur parameshvar ka vachan hiyav se sunate rahe.." 
Acts4:32 aur vishvas karanevalon kee mandlee aek chitt aur aek man ke the yahan tak ki koi bhee apanee sampaati apanee naheen kahata tha, parantu sab kuchh sajhe ka tha." 
Acts4:33 aur praarit badee samarth se prabhu yeeshu ke jee uttne kee gavahee dete rahe aur un sab par bada anugrah tha. 
Acts4:34 aur un men koi bhee daridra n tha, kyonki jin ke pas boomi ya ghar the, ve un ko bech bechakar, bikee hui vastuon ka dam late, aur use praariton ke panvon par rakhte the." 
Acts4:35 aur jaaisee jise avashyakata hotee thee, usake anusar har aek ko bantt diya karate the." 
Acts4:36 aur yoosufa nam, krupraus ka aek levee tha jisaka nam praeariton ne bara-naba arthata shaantai ka putra rakha tha." 
Acts4:37 us kee kuchh boomi thee, jise us ne becha, aur dam ke roopaye lakar praeriton ke panvon par rakh die.." 
Acts5:1 aur hananyah nam aek manushy, aur us kee patnee safaeera ne kuchh boomi bechee." 
Acts5:2 aur usake dam men se kuchh rakh chhoda aur yah bat us kee patnee bhee janatee thee, aur usaka aek bhag lakar prariton ke pavon ke age rakh diya." 
Acts5:3 uparantu pataras ne kaha he hananyaha! shautan ne tere man men yah bat kyon dalee haai ki too pavitra atma se joott bole, aur boomi ke dam men se kuchh rakh chhode?" 
Acts5:4 jab tak vah tere pas rahee, kya teree n thee? aur jab bik gai to kya tere vash men n thee? too ne yah bat apane man men kyon vicharee? too manushyon se nahee, parantu parameshvar se joott bola." 
Acts5:5 ye baten sunate hee hananyah gir pada, aur praan chhod diae aur sab sunanevalon par bada bhy chha gaya." 
Acts5:6 fir javanon ne uttkar usakee arthee banai aur bahar le jakar gaddh diya.. 
Acts5:7 lagabhg teen ghantte ke bad us kee patnee, jo kuchh hua tha n janakar, bheetar ai." 
Acts5:8 tab pataras ne us se kaha mujhe bata kya tum ne vah boomi itane hee men bechee thee? us ne kaha ha, itane hee men." 
Acts5:9 pataras ne us se kaha yah kya bat haai, ki tum donon ne prabhu kee atma kee pareeksha ke liye aeka kiya haai? dek, tere pati ke gadnevale dar hee par khde haai, aur tujhe bhee bahar le jaaenge." 
Acts5:10 tab vah turant usake panvon par gir padee, aur praan chhod diae: aur javanon ne bheetar akar use mara paya, aur bahar le jakar usake pati ke pas gad diya." 
Acts5:11 aur saree kaleeasiya par aur in baton ke sab sunanevalon par, bada bhy chha gaya.." 
Acts5:12 aur praeriton ke hathon se bahut chinh aur adabhut kam logon ke beech men dikhaae jate the, aur ve sab aek chitt hokar sulaaiman ke osare men ikatthe hua karate the." 
Acts5:13 parantu auron men se kisee ko yah hiyav n hota tha, un men ja milen taubhee log un kee badai. karate the." 
Acts5:14 aur vishvas karanevale bahutere puroosh aur striayan prabhu kee kaleesiya men aur bhee aadhaik akar milate rahe. 
Acts5:15 yahan tak ki log beemaron ko sadkon par la lakar, khatton aur khttolon par litta dete the, ki jab pataras aa, to us kee chhaya hee un men se kisee par pad jaae." 
Acts5:16 aur yarooshalem ke as pas ke nagaron se bhee bahut log beemaron aur ashuuddh atmaon ke sataae huon ka la lakar, ikatthe hote the, aur sab achchhe kar diae jate the.." 
Acts5:17 tab mahayajak aur usake sab sathee jo sadookiyon ke panth ke the, dah se bhr kar utte." 
Acts5:18 aur praariton ko pakadkar bandeegrah men band kar diya. 
Acts5:19 parantu rat ko prabhu ke aek svargadoot ne bandeegrah ke dar kholakar unhen bahar lakar kaha. 
Acts5:20 ki jao, maandair men khde hokar, is jeevan kee sab baten logon ko sunao." 
Acts5:21 ve yah sunakar bhor hote hee mandair men jakar upadesh dene lage: parantu mahayajak aur usake sathaiyon ne akar mahasabha ko aur israaeliyon ke sab puraniyon ko ikatthe kiya, aur bandeegrah men kahala bheja ki unhen laaen." 
Acts5:22 parantu pyadon ne vahan pahunchakar unhen bandeegrah men n paya, aur lauttkar sandesh diya." 
Acts5:23 ki ham ne bandeegrah ko badee chaukasee se band kiya hua, aur paharevalon ko bahar daron par khde huae paya paranatu jab khola, to bheetar koi n mila." 
Acts5:24 jab maandair ke saradar aur mahayajakon ne ye baten sanee, to un ke vishay men bharee chinta men pad gaae ki yah kya hua chahata haai?" 
Acts5:25 itane men kisee ne akar unhen bataya, ki dekho, jinhen tum ne bandeegrah men band rakha tha, ve manushy maandair men khde huae logon ko upadesh de rahe haain." 
Acts5:26 tak saradar, pyadon ke sath jakar, unhen le aya, parantu barabas nahee, kyonki ve logon se drate the, ki hamen patthravah n karen." 
Acts5:27 unhon ne unhen fir lakar mahasabha ke samhane khda kar disha: aur mahayajak ne un se poochha. 
Acts5:28 kya ham ne tumhen chitakar agyaa n dee thee, ki tum is nam se upadesh n karana? taubhee dekho, tum ne sare yarooshalem ko apane upadesh se bhr diya haai aur us vyaktai ka lohoo hamaree gardan par lana chahate ho." 
Acts5:29 tak pataras aur, aur praeariton ne uttr diya, ki manushyon kee agyaa se baddhkar parameshvar kee agyaa ka palan karana hee kartavy karma haai." 
Acts5:30 hamare bapadadon ke parameshvar ne yeeshu ko jilaya, jise tum ne kroos par lattkakar mar dala tha." 
Acts5:31 usee ko parameshvar ne prabhu aur uddharak ttharakar, apane daahine hath se savorchch kar diya, ki vah israealiyon ko man firav kee shaaktai aur papon kee kshama pradan kare." 
Acts5:32 aur ham in baton ke gavah haai, aur pavitra atma bhee, jise parameshvar ne unhen diya haai, jo us kee agyaa manate haain.." 
Acts5:33 yah sunakar ve jal gaa, aur unhen mar dalana chaha." 
Acts5:34 parantu gamaleeael nam aek fareesee ne jo vyavasthapak aur sab logon men mananeey tha, nyayalay men khde hokar praeariton ko thodee der ke liye bahar kar dene kee agyaa dee." 
Acts5:35 tak us ne kaha, he israaeliyo, jo kuchh in manushyon se kiya chahate ho, soch samajh ke karana." 
Acts5:36 kyonaki in dinon se pahale thaiyoodas yah kahata hua utta, ki maain bhee kuchh hoon aur koi char sau manushy usake sath ho liye, parantu vah mara gaya aur jitane log use manate the, sab tittr bittr huae aur mitt gaae." 
Acts5:37 usake bad nam likhai ke dinon men yahooda galeelee utta, aur kuchh log apanee or kar liye: vah bhee nash ho gaya, aur jitane lage use manate the, sab tittr bittr ho gae." 
Acts5:38 isaliye ab maain tum se kahata hoo, in manushyon se door hee raho aur un se kuchh kam n rakho kyonaki yadi yah dharma ya kam manushyon kee or se ho tab to mitt jaaega." 
Acts5:39 parantu yadi parameshvar kee or se haai, to tum unhen kadapi mitta n sakoge kaheen aeesa n ho, ki tum parameshvar se bhee ladnevale ttharo." 
Acts5:40 tab unhon ne us kee bat man lee aur praeriton ko bulakar pittvaya aur yah agyaa dekar chhod diya, ki yeeshu ke nam se fir baten n karana." 
Acts5:41 ve is bat se anandait hokar mahasabha ke samhane se chale gaa, ki ham usake nam ke liye niradar hone ke yogy ho tthare." 
Acts5:42 aur praati din mandair men aur ghar ghar men upadesh karane, aur is bat ka susamachar sunane se, ki yeeshu hee maseeh haai n rooke.." 
Acts6:1 un dinon men jab chele bahut hone jate the, to yoonanee bhasha bolanevale ibraaaniyon par kudkudane lage, ki prati din kee sevakai men hamaree vidhavaon kee suadhai naheen lee jatee." 
Acts6:2 tab un barahon ne chelon kee mandlee ko apane pas bulakar kaha, yah tteek naheen ki ham parameshvar ka vachan chhodkar khailanepilane kee seva men rahen." 
Acts6:3 isaliye he bhaiyo, apane men se sat sunam purooshaen ko jo paavitra atma aur buaddh ise paaripoorn ho, chun lo, ki ham unhen is kam par tthara den." 
Acts6:4 parantu ham to praarthna men aur vachan kee seva men lage rahenge. 
Acts6:5 yah bat saree mandlee ko achchhee lagee, aur unhon ne staiufanus nam aek puroosh ko jo vishvas aur pavitra atma se paaripoorn tha, aur filippus aur prakhuroos aur neekanor aur teemon aur paraminas aur antakeevala neekulaus ko jo yahoodee mat men a gaya tha, chun liya." 
Acts6:6 aur inhen praeriton ke samhane khda kiya aur unhon ne praarthna karake un par hath rakhe. 
Acts6:7 aur parameshvar ka vachan faailata gaya aur yarooshalem men chelon kee ginatee bahut baddhtee gai aur yajakon ka aek bada samaj is mat ke adhaeen ho gaya. 
Acts6:8 staifaunus anugrah aur samarth men paripoorn hokar logon men bade bade adabhut kam aur chinh dikhaya karata tha. 
Acts6:9 tab us aradhanalay men se jo libarateenon kee kahalatee thee, aur kurenee aur sikandaariya aur kilaakiya aur aeshaeeya ke logon men se kai aek uttkar staifanus se vada-vivad karane lage." 
Acts6:10 parantu us gyaan aur un atma ka jis se vah baten karata tha, ve samhana n kar sake." 
Acts6:11 is par unho ne kai logon ko ubhara jo kahane lage, ki ham ne is moosa aur parameshvar ke virodha men ninda kee baten kahate suna haai." 
Acts6:12 aur logon aur praacheenon aur shaastriayon ko bhdkakar chaddh aae aur use pakadkar mahasabha men le aae. 
Acts6:13 aur jootte gavah khde kia, jinhon ne kaha ki yah manushy is pavitra sthan aur vyavastha ke virodha men bolana naheen chhodta." 
Acts6:14 kyonaki ham ne use yah kahate suna haai, ki yahee yeeshu nasaree is jagah ko ddha dega, aur un reeton ko badal dalega jo moosa ne hamen saunpee haain." 
Acts6:15 tab sab logon ne jo sabha men baaitte the, us kee or takakar usaka mukhda svargadoot ka sa dekha.." 
Acts7:1 tab mahayajak ne kaha, kya ye baten yon hee haai?" 
Acts7:2 us ne kaha he bhaiyo, aur pitaro suno, hamara pita ibraaheem haran men basane se paahile jab misuputaamiya men tha to tejomay parameshvar ne use darshan diya." 
Acts7:3 aur us se kaha ki too apane desh aur apane kuttumb se nikalakar us desh me chala ja, jise maain tujhe dikhaunga." 
Acts7:4 tab vah kasadiyon ke desh se nikalakar haran men ja basa aur usake pita kee mratyu ke bad parameshvar ne usako vahan se is desh men lakar basaya jis men ab tum basate ho. 
Acts7:5 aur usako kuchh meeras baran paair rakhne bhr kee bhee us men jagah n dee, parantu praatigyaa kee ki maain yah desha, tere aur tere bad tere vansh ke hath kar doonga yadhyapi us samay usake koi putra bhee n tha." 
Acts7:6 aur parameshvar ne yon kaha ki teree santan ke log paraye desh men paradeshaee honge, aur ve unhen das banaaenge, aur char sau varsha tak dukh denge." 
Acts7:7 fir parameshvar ne kaha jis jati ke ve das honge, us ko maain dand doonga aur is ke bad ve nikalakar isee jagah meree seva karenge." 
Acts7:8 aur us ne us se khtane kee vacha bandhaee aur isee dasha men isahak us se utpann hua aur attven din usaka khtana kiya gaya aur isahak se yakoob aur yakoob se barah kulapaati utpann huae. 
Acts7:9 aur kulapaatiyon ne yoosufa se dah karake use misar desh janevalon ke hath becha parantu parameshvar usake sath tha. 
Acts7:10 aur use usake sab kleshaen se chhudakar misar ke raja firaun ke age anugrah aur buddh idee, aur us ne use misar par aur apane sare ghar par hakim ttharaya." 
Acts7:11 tab misar aur kanan ke sare desh men akal pada jis se bharee klesh hua, aur hamare bapadadon ko ann naheen milata tha." 
Acts7:12 parantu yakoob ne yah sunakar, ki misar men anaj haai, hamare bapadadon ko pahilee bar bheja." 
Acts7:13 aur doosaree bar yoosufa apane bhaiyon par pragatt ko gaya, aur yoosuufa kee jaati firaun ko maloom ho gai." 
Acts7:14 tab yoosufa ne apane pita yakoob aur apane sare kuttumb ko, jo pachhttr vyaaktai the, bula bheja." 
Acts7:15 tab yakoob misar men gaya aur vahan vah aur hamare bapadade mar gaae. 
Acts7:16 aur ve shaikim men pahunchaae jakar us kabra men rakhe gaa, jise ibraaheem n chandee dekar shaikim men hamor kee santan se mol liya tha." 
Acts7:17 parantu jab us pratigyaa ke poore hone ka samay nikatt aya, to parameshvar ne ibraaheem se kee thee, to misar men ve log baddh gaae aur bahut ho gaae." 
Acts7:18 jab tak ki misar men doosara raja n hua jo yoosufa ko naheen janata tha. 
Acts7:19 us ne hamaree jaati se chaturai karake hamare bapadadon ke sath yahan tak kuvyohar kiya, ki unhen apane balakon ko faenk dena pada ki ve jeevit n rahen." 
Acts7:20 us samay moosa utpann hua jo bahut hee sundar tha aur vah teen maheene tak apane pita ke ghar men pala gaya. 
Acts7:21 parantu jab faenk diya gaya to firaun kee bettee ne use utta liya, aur apana putra karake pala." 
Acts7:22 aur moosa ko misaariyon kee saree vidha paddhai gai, aur vah baton aur kamon men samarthee tha." 
Acts7:23 jab vah chalees varsha ka hua, to usake man men aya ki maain apane israaelee bhaiyon se bhentt karoon." 
Acts7:24 aur us ne aek vyaktai par anyay hone dekhkar, use bachaya, aur misaree ko marakar sataae huae ka palatta liya." 
Acts7:25 us ne socha, ki mere bhai samajhenge ki parameshvar mere hathon se un ka uddhar karega, parantu unhon ne n samajha." 
Acts7:26 doosare din jab ve apas men lad rahe the, to vah vahan a nikala aur yah kahake unhen mel karane ke liye samajhaya, ki he purooshae, tum to bhai bhai ho, aek doosare par kyon anyay karate ho?" 
Acts7:27 parantu jo apane padosee par anyay kar raha tha, us ne use yah kahakar hatta diya, ki tujhe kis ne ham par hakim aur nyayee ttharaya haai?" 
Acts7:28 kya jis reeti se too ne kal misaree ko mar dala mujhe bhee mar dalana chahata haai? 
Acts7:29 yah bat sunakar, moosa bhaga aur midhan desh men paradeshaee hokar rahane laga: aur vahan usake do putra utpann hue." 
Acts7:30 jab poore chalees varsha beet gaa, to aek svarga doot ne seenaai pahad ke jangal men use jalatee hui jhadee kee jvala men darshan diya." 
Acts7:31 moosa ne us darshan ko dekhkar achambha kiya, aur jab dekhne ke liye pas gaya, to prabhu ka yah shabd hua." 
Acts7:32 ki maain tere bapadado, ibraaheem, isahak aur yakoob ka parameshvar hoon: tab to moosa kanp utta, yahan tak ki use dekhne ka hiyav n raha." 
Acts7:33 tab prabhu ne us se kaha apane pavon se jootee utar le, kyonaki jis jagah too khda haai, vah pavitra boomi haai." 
Acts7:34 maain ne sachamuch apane logon kee durdasha ko jo misar men haai, dekhee haai aur un kee ah aur un ka rona sun liya haai isaaliye unhen chhudane ke liye utara hoon. ab a, maain tujhe misar men bhenjoonga." 
Acts7:35 jis moosa ko unhon ne yah kahakar nakara tha ki tujhe kis ne ham par hakim aur nyayee ttharaya haai usee ko parameshvar ne haakim aur chhudanevala ttharakar, us svarga doot ke dara jis ne use jhadee men darshan diya tha, bheja." 
Acts7:36 yahee vyaaktai misar aur lal samudra aur jangal men chalees varsha tak adabhut kam aur chinh dikha dikhakar unhen nikal laya. 
Acts7:37 yah vahee moosa haai, jis ne israaeliyon se kaha ki parameshvar tumhare bhaiyon men se tumhare liye mujh sa aek bhavishyadvkta uttaaega." 
Acts7:38 yah vahee haai, jis ne jangal men kaleeasiya ke beech us svargadoot ke sath seenaai pahad par us se baten kee, aur hamare bapadadon ke sath tha: usee ko jeeavit vachan mile, ki ham tak pahunchaae." 
Acts7:39 parantu hamare bapadadon ne us kee manana n chaha baran use hattakar apane man misar kee or faere. 
Acts7:40 aur haroon se kaha hamare liye aeesa devata bana, jo hamare age age chalen kyonaki yah moosa ja hamen misar desh se nikal laya, ham naheen janate use kya hua?" 
Acts7:41 un dinon men unhon ne ek bachhda banakar, us kee moorat ke age bali chaddhaya aur apane hathon ke kamon men magan hone lage." 
Acts7:42 so parameshvar ne munh modkar unhen chhod diya, ki akashagan poojen jaaisa bhvishyadvktaon kee pustak men likha haai ki he israael ke gharane, kya tum jangal men chalees varsha tak pashuubaali aur annabaali mujh hee ko chaddhate rahe?" 
Acts7:43 aur tum molek ke tamboo aur rifaan devata ke tare ko liae firate the arthata un akaron ko jinhen tum ne dandvat karane ke liye banaya tha: so maain tumhen babur ke pare le jakar basaunga. 
Acts7:44 sakshaee ka tamboo jangal men hamare bapadadon ke beech men tha jaaisa us ne ttharaya, jis ne moosa se kaha ki jo akar too ne dekha haai, usake anusar ise bana." 
Acts7:45 usee tamboo ko hamare bapadade poorvakal se pakar yahoshoo ke sath yahan le ae jis samay ki unhon ne un anyajaatiyon ka aadhaikar paya, jinhen parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon ke samhane se nikal diya aur vah daud ke samay tak raha." 
Acts7:46 us par parameshvar ne anugrah kiya, so us ne binatee kee, ki maain yakoob ke parameshvar ke liye nivas stha ttharaun." 
Acts7:47 parantu sulaaiman ne usake liye ghar banaya. 
Acts7:48 parantu param pradhaan hath ke banaae gharon men naheen rahata, jaaisa ki bhvishyadvkta ne kaha." 
Acts7:49 ki prabhu kahata haai, svarga mera sihansan aur prathvee mere panvon tale kee peeddhee haai, mere liye tum kis prakar ka ghar banaoge? aur mere vishraam ka kaun sa sthan hoga?" 
Acts7:50 kya ye sab vastuen mere hath kee banai naheen? he hatteele, aur man aur kan ke khtanaraahit logo, tum sada pavitra atma ka samhana karate ho." 
Acts7:51 jaaisa tumhare bapadade karate the, vaaise hee tum bhee karate ho." 
Acts7:52 bhavishyadvktaon men se kis ko tumhare bapadadon ne naheen sataya, aur unhon ne us dharmee ke agaman ka poorvakal se sandesh denevalon ko mar dala, aur ab tum bhee usake pakadvanevale aur mar dalanevale hue." 
Acts7:53 tum ne svargadooton ke dara ttharai hui vyavastha to pai, parantu usaka palan naheen kiya.." 
Acts7:54 ye baten sunakar ve jal gaae aur us par dant peesane lage. 
Acts7:55 parantu us ne pavitra atma se paaripoorn hokar svarga kee or dekha aur parameshvar kee maahima ko aur yeeshu ko parameshvar kee dahinee or khda dekhkara. 
Acts7:56 kaha dekho, maain svarga ko khula hua, aur manushy ke putra ko parameshvar ke dahinee or khda hua dekhta hoon." 
Acts7:57 tab unhon ne bade shabd se chillakar kan band kar lia, aur aek chitt hokar us par jhpatte." 
Acts7:58 aur use nagar ke bahar nikalakar patthravah karane lage, aur gavahon ne apane kapade utar rakhe." 
Acts7:59 aur ve staiufanus ko patthravah karate rahe, aur vah yah kahakar praarthna karata raha ki he prabhu yeeshu, meree atma ko grahan kara." 
Acts7:60 fir ghauttne ttekakar unche shabd se pukara, he prabhu, yah pap un par mat laga, aur yah kahakar so gaya: aur shaaul usake badha meen sahamat tha.." 
Acts8:1 usee din yarooshalem kee kaleesiya par bada upadrav hone laga aur praeriton ko chhod sab ke sab yahoodiya aur samariya deshaen men tittr bittr ho gae. 
Acts8:2 aur bhkton ne staifanus ko kabra men rakha aur usake liye bada vilap kiya. 
Acts8:3 shaaul kaleesiya ko ujad raha tha aur ghar ghar ghausakar purooshaen aur striayon ko ghaseett ghaseettkar bandeegrah men dalata tha.. 
Acts8:4 jo tittr bittr huae the, ve susamachar sunate huae fire." 
Acts8:5 aur filippus samaariya nagar men jakar logon men maseeh ka prachar karane laga. 
Acts8:6 aur jo baten filippus ne kaheen unhen logon ne sunakar aur jo chinh vah dikhata tha unhen dekh dekhkar, aek chitt hokar man lagaya." 
Acts8:7 kyonaki bahuton men se ashuuddh atmaaen bade shabd se chillatee hui nikal gai, aur bahut se jhole ke mare huae aur langade bhee achchhe kiae gaae." 
Acts8:8 aur us nagar men bada anand hua.. 
Acts8:9 is se paahile us nagar men shamaun nam aek manushy tha, jo ttona karake samaariya ke logon ko chakit karata aur apane ap ko koi bada puroosh banata than" 
Acts8:10 aur sab chhotte se bade tak use man kar kahate the, ki yah manushy paramashevar kee vah shaktai haai, jo mahan kahalatee haai." 
Acts8:11 us ne bahut dinon se unhen apane ttone ke kamon se chaakit kar rakha tha, isee liye ve us ko bahut manate the." 
Acts8:12 parantu jab unhon ne filippus kee prateeati kee jo parameshvar ke rajy aur yeeshu ke nam ka susamachar sunata tha to log, kya puroosha, kya sree bapaatisma lene lage." 
Acts8:13 tab shamaun ne ap bhee prateeati kee aur bapaatisma lekar filippus ke sath rahane laga aur chinh aur bade bade samarth ke kam hote dekhkar chakit hota tha. 
Acts8:14 jab praariton ne jo yarooshalem men the suna ki samaariyon ne parameshvar ka vachan man liya haai to pataras aur yoohanna ko un ke pas bheja. 
Acts8:15 aur unhon ne jakar un ke liye praarthna kee ki pavitra atma paaen. 
Acts8:16 kyonaki vah ab tak un men se kisee par n utara tha, unhon ne to keval prabhu yeeshu men nam men bapatisma liya tha." 
Acts8:17 tab unhon ne un par hath rakhe aur unhon ne pavitra atma paya. 
Acts8:18 jab shamaun ne dekha ki prariton ke hath rakhne se paavitra atma diya jata haai, to un ke pas roopaye lakar kaha." 
Acts8:19 ki yah adhaikar mujhe bhee do, ki jis kisee par hath rakoo, vah pavitra atma paae." 
Acts8:20 pataras ne us se kaha tere roopaye tere sath nash ho, kyonki too ne parameshvar ka dan roopayon se mol lene ka vichar kiya." 
Acts8:21 is bat men n tera hissa haai, n bantta kyonki tera man parameshvar ke age seedha naheen." 
Acts8:22 isaliye apanee is burai se man firakar prabhu se praarthna kar, sambhv haai tere man ka vichar kshama kiya jaae." 
Acts8:23 kyonaki maain dekhta hoo, ki too pitt kee see kadvahatt aur adharma ke bandhan men pada haai." 
Acts8:24 shamaun ne uttr diya, ki tum mere liye prabhu se praarthna karo ki jo baten tum ne kahee, un men se koi mujh par n a pade.." 
Acts8:25 so ve gavahee dekar aur prabhu ka vachan sunakar, yarooshalem ko lautt gaa, aur samariyon ke bahut gavon men susamachar sunate gaae.." 
Acts8:26 fir prabhu ke aek svargadoot ne filippus se kaha uttkar daakkhian kee or us marga par ja, jo yarooshalem se ajjah ko jata haai, aur jangal men haai." 
Acts8:27 vah uttkar chal diya, aur dekho, koosh desh ka aek manushy a raha tha jo khoja aur kooshaiyon kee ranee kandake ka mantraee aur khjanchee tha, aur bhjan karane ko yarooshalem aya tha." 
Acts8:28 aur vah apane rath par baaitta hua tha, aur yashaayah bhavishyadvkta kee pustak paddhta hua lautta ja raha tha." 
Acts8:29 tab atma ne filippus se kaha, nikatt jakar is rath ke sath ho le." 
Acts8:30 filippus ne us or daudkar use yashaayah bhavishyadvkta kee pustak paddhte huae suna, aur poochha, ki too jo paddh raha haai kya use samajhta bhee haai?" 
Acts8:31 us ne kaha, jab tak koi mujhe n samajhaae to maain kyanekar samajoon? aur us ne filippus se binatee kee, ki chaddhkar mere pas baaitt." 
Acts8:32 paavitra shaasr ka jo adhyay vah paddh raha tha, vah yah tha ki vah bhed kee nain vadha hone ko pahunchaya gaya, aur jaaisa memna apane un kataranevalon ke samhane chupachap rahata haai, vaaise hee us ne bhee apana munh n khola." 
Acts8:33 us kee deenata men usaka nyay hone naheen paya, aur usake samay ke logon ka varnn kaun karega, kyonki prathvee se usaka praan uttaya jata haai." 
Acts8:34 is par khoje ne filippus se poochha maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, yah bata ki bhvishyadvkta yah kis vishay men kahata haai, apane ya kisee doosare ke vishay men." 
Acts8:35 tab filippus ne apana munh khola, aur isee shaasr se arambh karake use yeeshu ka susamachar sunaya." 
Acts8:36 marga men chalate chalate ve kisee jal kee jagah pahunche, tab khoje ne kaha, dekh yahan jal haai, ab mujhe bapaatisma lene men kya rok haai." 
Acts8:37 filippus ne kaha, yaadi too sare man se vishvas karata haai to ho sakata haai: us ne uttr diya maain vishvas karata hoon ki yeeshu maseeh parameshvar ka putra haai." 
Acts8:38 tab us ne rath khda karane kee agyaa dee, aur filippus aur khoja donon jal men utar pade, aur us ne use bapaatisma diya." 
Acts8:39 jab ve jal men se nikalakar upar aa, to prabhu ka atma filippus ko utta le gaya, so khoje ne use fir n dekha, aur vah anand karata hua apane marga chala gaya." 
Acts8:40 aur filippus ashadod men a nikala, aur jab tak kaaisariya men n pahuncha, tab tak nagar nagar susamachar sunata gaya.." 
Acts9:1 aur shaaul jo ab tak prabhu ke chelon ko dhamakane aur ghaat karane kee dhaun men tha, mahayajak ke pas gaya." 
Acts9:2 aur us se daamishk kee aradhanalayon ke nam par is abhaipraay kee chitthiyan mangee, ki kya puroosha, kya sre, jinhen vah is panth par paae unhen bandhakar yarooshalem men le aae." 
Acts9:3 parantu chalate chalate jab vah damishk ke nikatt pahuncha, to aekaaek akash se usake charon or jyoti chamakee." 
Acts9:4 aur vah boomi par gir pada, aur yah shabd suna, ki he shaaul, he shaaul, too mujhe kyon satata haai?" 
Acts9:5 us ne poochha he prabhu, too kaun haai? us ne kaha maain yeeshu hoon jise too satata haai." 
Acts9:6 parantu ab uttkar nagar men ja, aur jo kuchh karana haai, vah tujh se kaha jaaega." 
Acts9:7 jo manushy usake sath the, ve chupachap rah gaae kyonki shabd to sunate the, parantu kisee ko dakhte n the." 
Acts9:8 tab shaaul boomi par se utta, parantu jab ankhe kholeen to use kuchh dikhai n diya aur ve usaka hath pakadke daamishk men le gaae." 
Acts9:9 aur vah teen din tak n dekh saka, aur n khaya aur n peeya." 
Acts9:10 daamishk men hananyah nam aek chela tha, us se prabhu ne darshan men kaha, he hananyaha! us ne kaha han prabhu." 
Acts9:11 tab prabhu ne us se kaha, uttkar us galee men ja jo seedhaee kahalatee haai, aur yahooda ke ghar men shaaul nam aek tarasee ko poochh le kyonaki dek, vah praarthna kar raha haai." 
Acts9:12 aur us ne hananyah nam aek puroosh ko bheetar ate, aur apane upar ate dekha haai taki fir se drashtti paae." 
Acts9:13 hananyah ne uttr diya, ki he prabhu, maain ne is manushy ke vishay men bahuton se suna haai, ki is ne yarooshalem men tere pavitra logon ke sath badee badee buraiyan kee haain." 
Acts9:14 aur yahan bhee is ko mahayajakon kee or se adhaikar mila haai, ki jo log tera nam lete haai, un sab ko bandha le." 
Acts9:15 parantu prabhu ne us se kaha, ki too chala ja kyonaki yah, to anyajatiyon aur rajao, aur israaeliyon ke samhane mera nam pragatt karane ke liye mera chuna hua patra haai." 
Acts9:16 aur maain use bataunga, ki mere nam ke liye use kaaisa kaaisa dukh uttana padega." 
Acts9:17 tab hananyah uttkar us ghar men gaya, aur us par apana hath rakhkar kaha, he bhai shaaul, prabhu, arthata yeeshu, jo us raste me, jis se too aya tujhe dikhai diya tha, usee ne mujhe bheja haai, ki too fir drashtti paae aur paavitra atma se paaripoorn ho jaae." 
Acts9:18 aur turant us kee ankhon se chhlaike se gire, aur vah dekhne laga aur uttkar bapaatisma liya fir bhojan karake bal paya.." 
Acts9:19 aur vah kai din un chelon ke sath raha jo damishk men the. 
Acts9:20 aur vah turant aradhanalayon men yeeshu ka prachar karane laga, ki vah parameshvar ka putra haai." 
Acts9:21 aur sab sunanevale chaakit hokar kahane lage kya yah vahee vyaaktai naheen haai jo yarooshalem men unhen jo is nam ko lete the nash karata tha, aur yahan bhee isee liye aya tha, ki unhon bandhakar mahayajakon ke pas le aae?" 
Acts9:22 parantu shaaul aur bhee samarthee hota gaya, aur is bat ka praman de dekar ki maseeh yahee haai, daamishk ke rahanevale yahoodiyon ka munh band karata raha.." 
Acts9:23 jab bahut din beet gaa, to yahoodiyon ne milakar usake mar dalane kee yuktai nikalee." 
Acts9:24 parantu un kee yuktai shaaul ko maloom ko gai: ve to usake mar dalane ke liye rat din faattkon par lage rahe the. 
Acts9:25 parantu rat ko usake chelon ne use lekar ttokare men baaittaya, aur shaharapanah par aee lattkakar utar diya.." 
Acts9:26 yarooshalem men pahunchakar us ne chelon ke sath mil jane ka upay kiya: parantu sab us se drate the, kyonki un ko prateeati n hota tha, ki vah bhee chela haai." 
Acts9:27 parantu baranaba use apane sath praeariton ke pas le jakar un se kaha, ki is ne kis reeti se marga men prabhu ko dekha, aur is ne is se baten keen fir damishk men is ne kaaise hiyav se yeeshu ke nam ka prachar kiya." 
Acts9:28 vah un ke sath yarooshalem men ata jata raha. 
Acts9:29 aur nidhadk hokar prabhu ke nam se prachar karata tha: aur yoonanee bhasha bolanevale yahoodiyon ke sath batacheet aur vada-avivad karata tha parant uve usake mar dalane ka yatn karane lage. 
Acts9:30 yah janakar bhai use kaaisaariya men le aa, aur tarasus ko bhej diya.." 
Acts9:31 so sare yahoodiya, aur galeel, aur samariya men kaleesiya ko chaain mila, aur usakee unnaati hotee gai aur vah prabhu ke bhy aur paavitra atma kee shaantai men chalatee aur baddhtee jatee thee.." 
Acts9:32 aur aeesa hua ki pataras har jagah firata hua, un paavitra logon ke pas bhee pahuncha, jo lua men rahate the." 
Acts9:33 vahan use aeeaniyas nam jhole ka mara hua aek manushy mila, jo att varsha se khatt par pada tha." 
Acts9:34 pataras ne us se kaha he aeeniyasa! yeeshu maseeh tujhe changa karata haai ut, apana bichhauna bichha tab vah turant utt khd hua." 
Acts9:35 aur lua aur shaaron ke sab rahanevale use dekhkar prabhu kee or fire.. 
Acts9:36 yafaa men tabeeta arthata dorakas nam aek vishvasinee rahatee thee, vah bahutere bhle bhle kam aur dan kiya karatee thee." 
Acts9:37 unheen dinon men vah beemar hokar mar gai aur unhon ne use nahalakar attaree par rakh diya. 
Acts9:38 aur isaliye ki lua yafaa ke nikatt tha, chelon ne yah sunakar ki pataras vahan haai do manushy bhejakar us ne binatee kee ki hamare pas ane men der n kara." 
Acts9:39 tab pataras uttkar un ke sath ho liya, aur jab pahunch gaya, to ve use us attaree par le gaae aur sab vidhavaaen rotee hui usake pas a khdee hui: aur jo kurate aur kapade dorakas ne un ke sath rahate huae banaae the, dikhane lageen." 
Acts9:40 tab pataras ne sab ko bahar kar diya, aur ghauttne ttekakar praarthna kee aur loth kee or dekhkar kaha he tabeeta utt: tab us ne apanee ankhe khol dee aur pataras ko dekhkar utt baaittee." 
Acts9:41 us ne hath dekar use uttaya aur paavitra logon aur vidhavaon ko bulakar use jeevit aur jagrat dikha diya. 
Acts9:42 yah bat sare yafaa me faail gai: aur bahuteron ne prabhu par vishvas kiya. 
Acts9:43 aur pataras yafaa men shamaun nam kisee chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke yahan bahut din tak raha.. 
Acts10:1 kaaisaariya men kuranealiyus nam aeek manushy tha, jo italiyanee nam palattn ka soobedar tha." 
Acts10:2 vah bhkt tha, aur apane sare gharane samet parameshvar se drata tha, aur yahoodee lagon ko bahut dan deta, aur barabar parameshvar se praarthna karata tha." 
Acts10:3 us ne din ke teesare pahar ke nikatt darshan men spashtt roop se dekha, ki parameshvar ka ek svargadoot mere pas bheetar akar kahata haai ki he kuraneliyusa." 
Acts10:4 us ne use dhyan se dekha aur drakar kaha he prabhu kya haai? us ne us se kaha, teree praarthnaen aur tere dan smaran ke liye parameshvar ke samhane pahunche haain." 
Acts10:5 aur ab yafaa men manushy bhejakar shamaun ko, jo pataras kahalata haai, bulava le." 
Acts10:6 vah shamaun chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke yahan pahun haai, jis ka ghar samudra ke kinare haain." 
Acts10:7 jab vah svargadoot jis ne us se baten kee theen chala gaya, to us ne do sevak, aur jo usake pas upasthiat raha karate the un men se aek bhkt sipahee ko bulaya." 
Acts10:8 aur unhen sab baten batakar yafaa ko bheja.. 
Acts10:9 doosare din, jab ve chalate chalate nagar ke pas pahunche, to do pahar ke nikatt pataras kotte par praarthna karane chaddha." 
Acts10:10 aur use bookh lagee, aur kuchh khana chahata tha parantu jab ve taaiyar kar rahe the, to vah besudha ho gaya." 
Acts10:11 aur us ne dekha, ki akash khul gaya aur aek patra badee chadar ke saman charon konon se lattkata hua, pathvee kee or utar raha haai." 
Acts10:12 jis men prathvee ke sab prakar ke chaupaae aur renganevale jantu aur akash ke pakshaee the. 
Acts10:13 aur use aek aeesa shabd sunai diya, ki he pataras ut, mar ke kha." 
Acts10:14 parantu pataras ne kaha, naheen prabhu, kadapi naheen kyonki maain ne kabhee koi apavitra ya ashuuddh vastu naheen khai haai." 
Acts10:15 fir doosaree bar use shabd sunai diya, ki jo kuchh parameshvar ne shuuddh ttharaya haai, use too ashuuddh mat kaha." 
Acts10:16 teen bar aeesa hee hua tab turant vah patra akash par utta liya gaya.. 
Acts10:17 jab pataras apane man men dubadha kar raha tha, ki yah darshan jo maain ne dekha kya haai, to dekho, ve manushy jinhen kuraneliyus ne bheja tha, shamaun ke ghar ka pata lagakar devaddhee par a khde huae." 
Acts10:18 aur pukarakar poochhne lage, kya shamaun jo pataras kahalata haai, yaheen pahun haai?" 
Acts10:19 pataras jo us darshan par soch hee raha tha, ki atma ne us se kaha, dek, teen manushy teree khoj men haain." 
Acts10:20 so uttkar neeche ja, aur bekhttke un ke sath ho le kyonaki maain hee ne unhen bheja haai." 
Acts10:21 tab pataras ne utarakar un manushyon se kaha dekho, jisakee khoj tum kar rahe ho, vah maain hee hoon tumhare ane ka kya karan haai?" 
Acts10:22 unhon ne kaha kuraneliyus soobedar jo dharmee aur parameshvar se dranevala aur saree yahoodee jaati men sunamee manushy haai, us ne ek paavitra svargadoot se yah chitavanee pai haai, ki tujhe apane ghar bulakar tujh se vachan sune." 
Acts10:23 tab us ne unhen bheetar bulakar un kee pahunai kee.. aur doosare din, vah unake sath gaya aur yafaa ke bhaiyon men se kai usake sath ho liae." 
Acts10:24 doosare din ve kaaisariya men pahunche, aur kuraneliyus apane kuttumbaiyon aur piry mitraen ko ikatthe karake un kee batt joh raha tha." 
Acts10:25 jab pataras bheetar a raha tha, to kuranealiyus ne us se bhentt kee, aur panvon padke pranam kiya." 
Acts10:26 parantu pataras ne use uttakar kaha, khda ho, maain bhee to manushy hoon." 
Acts10:27 aur usake sath batacheet karata hua bheetar gaya, aur bahut se logon ko ikatthe dekhkara." 
Acts10:28 un se kaha, tum janate ho, ki anyajaati kee sangati karata ya usake yahan jana yahoodee ke liye adharma haai, parantu parameshvar ne mujhe bataya haai, ki kisee manushy ko apavitra ya ashuuddh n kahoon." 
Acts10:29 isee liye maain jab bulaya gaya to bina kuchh kahe chala aya: ab maain poochhta hoon ki mujhe kis kam ke liye bulaya gaya haai? 
Acts10:30 kuranealiyus ne kaha ki is ghadee poore char din hua, ki maain apane ghar men teesare pahar ko praarthna kar raha tha ki dekho, aek puroosh chamakeela vasr paahine hua, mere samhane a khda hua." 
Acts10:31 aur kahane laga, he kuraneliyus, teree praarthna sun lee gai, aur tere dan parameshvar ke samhane smaran kiae gaae haain." 
Acts10:32 is liye kisee ko yafaa bhejakar shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai, bula vah samudra ke kinare shamaun chamade ke dhandha karanevale ke ghar men pahun haai." 
Acts10:33 tab maain ne turant tere pas log bheje, aur too ne bhla kiya, jo a gaya: ab ham sab yahan parameshvar ke samhane haai, taki jo kuchh parameshvar ne tujh se kaha haai use sunen." 
Acts10:34 tab pataras ne munh kholakar kaha 
Acts10:35 ab mujhe nishchay hua, ki parameshvar kisee ka paksha naheen karata, baran har jati men jo us se drata aur dharma ke kam karata haai, vah use bhata haai." 
Acts10:36 jo vachan us ne israaeliyon ke pas bheja, jab ki us ne yeeshu maseeh ke dara jo sab ka prabhu haai shaantai ka susamachar sunaya." 
Acts10:37 vah bat tum janate ho jo yoohanna ke bapatisma ke prachar ke bad galeel se arambh karake sare yahoodiya men faail gai. 
Acts10:38 ki parameshvar ne kis reeti se yeeshu nasaree ko paavitra atma aur samarth se aabhaishok kiya: vah bhlai karata, aur sab ko jo shautan ke sataae huae the, achchha karata fira kyonaki parameshvar usake sath tha." 
Acts10:39 aur ham un sab kamon ke gavah haain jo us ne yahoodiya ke desh aur yarooshalem men bhee kia, aur unhon ne use katt par lattkakar mar dala." 
Acts10:40 us ko parameshvar ne teesare din jilaya, aur pragatt bhee kar diya haai." 
Acts10:41 sab logon ko naheen baran un gavahon ko jinhen parameshvar ne pahile se chun liya tha, arthata hamako jinhon ne usake mare huon men se jee uttne ke bad usake sath khaya peeya." 
Acts10:42 aur us ne hamen agyaa dee, ki logon men prachar karo aur gavahee do, ki yah vahee haai jise parameshvar ne jeevaton aur mare huon ka nyayee ttharaya haai." 
Acts10:43 us kee sab bhavishyadvkta gavahee dete he, ki jo koi us par vishvas karega, us ko usake nam ke dara papon kee kshama milegee.." 
Acts10:44 pataras ye baten kah hee raha tha, ki pavitra atma vachan ke sab sunanevalon par utar aya." 
Acts10:45 aur jitane khtana kiae huae vishvasee pataras ke sath aae the, ve sab chaakit huae ki anyajaatiyon par bhee paavitra atma ka dan undela gaya haai." 
Acts10:46 kyonaki unhon ne unhen bhanati bhanati kee bhasha bolate aur parameshvar kee badai karate suna. 
Acts10:47 is par pataras ne kaha kya koi jal kee rok kar sakata haai, ki ye bapaatisma n paae, jinhon ne hamaree nai paavitra atma paya haai?" 
Acts10:48 aur us ne agyaa dee ki unhen yeeshu maseeh ne nam men bapaatisma diya jaae: tab unhon ne us se binatee kee ki kuchh din hamare sath raha.. 
Acts11:1 aur praeriton aur bhaiyon ne jo yahoodiya men the suna, ki anyajaatiyon ne bhee parameshvar ka vachan man liya haai." 
Acts11:2 aur jab pataras yarooshalem men aya, to khtana kiae huae log us se vada-avivad karane lage." 
Acts11:3 ki too ne khtanaraahit logon ke yahan jakar un se sath khaya. 
Acts11:4 tab pataras ne unhen arambh se kramanusar kah sunaya 
Acts11:5 ki maain yafaa nagar men praarthna kar raha tha, aur besudha hokar aek darshan dekha, ki aek patra, badee chadar ke saman charon konon se lattkaya hua, akash se utarakar mere pas aya." 
Acts11:6 jab maain ne us par dhyan kiya, to prathvee ke chaupaae aur banapashu aur renganevale jantu aur akash ke pakshaee dekhe." 
Acts11:7 aur yah shabd bhee suna ki he pataras utt mar aur kha. 
Acts11:8 maain ne kaha, naheen prabhu, nahee, kyonki koi apavitra ya ashuuddh vastu mere munh men kabhee naheen gai." 
Acts11:9 is ke uttr men akash se doosaree bar shabd hua, ki jo kuchh parameshvar ne shuuddh ttharaya haai, use ashuuddh mat kaha." 
Acts11:10 teen bar aeesa hee hua tab sab kuchh fir akash par kheench liya gaya. 
Acts11:11 aur dekho, turant teen manushy jo kaaisariya se mere pas bheje gaae the, us ghar par jis men ham the, a khde hue." 
Acts11:12 tab atma ne mujh se un ke sath bekhttke ho lene ko kaha, aur ye chh: bhai bhee mere sath ho liae aur ham us manushy ke ghar men gaae." 
Acts11:13 aur us ne bataya, ki maain ne aek svargadoot ko apane ghar men khda dekha, jis ne mujh se kaha, ki yafaa men manushy bhejakar shamaun ko jo pataras kahalata haai, bulava le." 
Acts11:14 vah tum se aeesee baten kahega, jin ke dara too aur tera sara gharana udar paaega." 
Acts11:15 jab maain baten karane laga, to pavitra atma un par usee reeti se utara, jis reeti se arambh men ham par utara tha." 
Acts11:16 tab mujhe prabhu ka vah vachan smaran aya jo us ne kaha ki yoohanna ne to panee se bapatisma diya, parantu tum pavitra atma se bapatisma paoge." 
Acts11:17 so jab ki parameshvar ne unhen bhee vahee dan diya, jo hamen prabhu yeeshu maseeh par vishvas karane se mila tha to maain kaun tha jo parameshvar ko rok sakata?" 
Acts11:18 yah sunakar, ve chup rahe, aur parameshvar kee badai karake kahane lage, tak to parameshvar ne anyajatiyon ko bhee jeevan ke liye man firav ka dan diya haai.." 
Acts11:19 so jo log us klesh ke mare jo staifanus ke karan pada tha, tittr bittr ho gaae the, ve firate firate faeeneeke aur kupraus aur antakiya men pahunche parantu yahoodiyon ko chhod kisee aur ko vachan n sunate the." 
Acts11:20 parantu un men se kitane kuprausee aur kurenee the, jo antaakiya men akar yunaaniyon ko bhee prabhu yeeshu ka susamachar kee baten sunane lage." 
Acts11:21 aur prabhu ka hath un par tha, aur bahut log vishvas karake prabhu kee or fire." 
Acts11:22 tab un kee charcha yarooshalem kee kaleesiya ke sunane men ai, aur unhon ne baranabas ko antaakiya bheja." 
Acts11:23 vah vahan pahunchakar, aur parameshvar ke anugrah ko dekhkar anandait hua aur sab ko upadesh diya ki tan man lagakar prabhu se lipatte raho." 
Acts11:24 kyonaki vah aek bhla manushy tha aur paavitra atma se paaripoorn tha: aur aur bahut se log prabhu men a mile. 
Acts11:25 tab vah shaaul ko ddoonddhne ke liye tarasus ko chala gaya. 
Acts11:26 aur jab un se mila to use antakiya men laya, aur aeesa hua ki ve aek varsha tak kaleesiya ke sath milate aur bahut logon ko upadesh dete rahe, aur chele sab se pahile antaakiya hee men maseehee kahalaae.." 
Acts11:27 unheen dinon men kai bhvishyadvkta yarooshalem se antakiya men ae. 
Acts11:28 un men se agabus nam ek ne khde hokar atma kee praerana se yah bataya, ki sare jagat men bada akal padega, aur vah akal klaudiyus ke samay men pada." 
Acts11:29 tab chelon ne ttharaya, ki har aek apanee apanee poonjee ke anusar yahoodiya men rahanevale bhaiyon kee seva ke liye kuchh bheje." 
Acts11:30 aur unhon ne aeesa hee kiya aur baranabas aur shaaul ke hath praacheenon ke pas kuchh bhej diya.. 
Acts12:1 us samay herodes raja ne kaleesiya ke kai ek vyaaktaiyon ko dukh dene ke liye un par hath dale. 
Acts12:2 us ne yoohanna ke bhai yakoob ko talavar se marava dala. 
Acts12:3 aur jab us ne dekha, ki yahoodee log is se anandait hote haai, to us ne pataras ko bhee pakad liya: ve din akhmeeree rottee ke din the." 
Acts12:4 aur us ne use pakad ke bandeegrah men dala, aur rakhvalee ke liye, char char sipaahiyon ke char paharon men rakha: is manasa se ki fasah ke bad use logon ke samhane laae." 
Acts12:5 so bandeegrah men pataras kee rakhvalee ho rahee thee parantu kaleesiya usake liye lau lagakar parameshvar se praarthna kar rahee thee. 
Acts12:6 aur jab herodes use un ke samhane lane ko tha, to usee rat pataras do janjeeron se bandha hua, do sipaahiyon ke beech men so raha tha: aur paharooae dar par bandeegrah kee rakhvalee kar rahe the." 
Acts12:7 to dekho, prabhu ka aek svargadoot a khda hua: aur us kottree men jyoti chamakee: aur us ne pataras kee pasalee par hath mar ke use jagaya, aur kaha ut, fauratee kar, aur usake hath se janjeeren khulakar gir padeen." 
Acts12:8 tab svargadoot ne us se kaha kamar bandha, aur apane joote paahin le: us ne vaaisa hee kiya, fir us ne us se kaha apana vasr pahinakar mere peechhe ho le." 
Acts12:9 vah nikalakar usake peechhe ho liya parantu yah n janata tha, ki jo kuchh svargadoot kar raha haai, vah sachamuch haai, baran yah samajha, ki maain darshan dekh raha hoon." 
Acts12:10 tab ve paahil aur doosare pahare se nikalakar us lohe ke faattk par pahunche, jo nagar kee or haai vah un ke liye ap se ap khul gaya: aur ve nikalakar aek hee galee hokar gaa, itane men srvagadoot use chhodkar chala gaya." 
Acts12:11 tab pataras ne sachet hokar kaha ab maain ne sach jan liya ki prabhu ne apana svargadoot bhejakar mujhe herodes ke hath se chhuda liya, aur yahoodiyon kee saree asha tod dee." 
Acts12:12 aur yah sochakar, vah us yoohanna kee mata maariyam ke ghar aya, jo marakus kahalata haai vahan bahut log ikatthe hokar praarthna kar rahe the." 
Acts12:13 jab us ne faattk kee khaidkee khttkhttai to roode nam aek dasee sunane ko ai. 
Acts12:14 aur pataras ka shabd pahachanakar, us ne anand ke mare faattk n khola parantu daudkar bheetar gai, aur bataya ki pataras dar par khda haai." 
Acts12:15 unhon ne us se kaha too pagal haai, parantu vah draddhta se bolee, ki aeesa hee haai: tab unhon ne kaha, usaka svargadoot hoga." 
Acts12:16 parantu pataras khttkhttata hee raha: so unhon ne khaidkee kholee, aur use dekhkar chaakit ho gaae." 
Acts12:17 tab us ne unhen hath se saain kiya, ki chup rahen aur un ko bataya, ki prabhu kis reeti se mujhe bandeegrah se nikal laya haai: fir kaha, ki yakoob aur bhaiyon ko yah bat kah dena tab nikalakar doosaree jagah chala gaya." 
Acts12:18 bhor ko sipaahiyon men badee halachal hone lagee, ki pataras kya hua." 
Acts12:19 jab herodes ne us kee khoj kee, aur n paya to paharooon kee janch karake agyaa dee ki ve mar dale jaaen aur vah yahoodiya ko chhodkar kaaisaariya men ja raha."
