Acts12:20 aur vah soor aur saaida ke logon se bahut aprasann tha so ve aek chitt hokar usake pas aae aur balastus ko, jo raja ka aek karmacharee tha, manakar mel karata chaha kyonaki raja ke desh se un ke desh ka palan poshan hota tha." 
Acts12:21 aur ttharaae huae din herodes rajavasr paahinakar sinhasan par baaitta aur un ko vyakhyan dene laga. 
Acts12:22 aur log pukar utte, ki yah to manushy ka naheen parameshvar ka shabd haai." 
Acts12:23 usee kshan prabhu ke ek svargadoot ne turant use mara, kyonaki us ne paramashevar kee mahima nahee kee aur vah keede padke mar gaya.." 
Acts12:24 parantu parameshvar ka vachan baddhta aur faailata gaya.. 
Acts12:25 jab baranabas aur shaaul apanee seva pooree kar chuke, to yoohanna ko jo marakus kahalata haai sath lekar yarooshalem se lautte.." 
Acts13:1 antaakiya kee kaleesiya men kitane bhvishyadvkta aur upadeshak the arthata baranabas aur shamaun jo neegar kahalata haai aur lookiyus kurenee, aur desh kee chauthai ke raja herodes ka doodhabhai manahem aur shaaula." 
Acts13:2 jab ve upavas saahit prabhu kee upasana kar rahe tha, to paavitra atma ne kaha mere nimitt baranabas aur shaaul ko us kam ke liye alag karo jis ke liye maain ne unhen bulaya haai." 
Acts13:3 tab unhon ne upavas aur praarthna karake aur un par hath rakhkar unhen vida kiya.. 
Acts13:4 so ve paavitra atma ke bheje huae silookiya ko gaae aur vahan se jahaj par chaddhkar kupraus ko chale. 
Acts13:5 aur salamees men pahunchakar, parameshvar ka vachan yahoodiyon kee aradhanalayon men sunaya aur yoohanna un ka sevak tha." 
Acts13:6 aur us sare ttapoo men hote hua, pafaus tak pahunche: vahan unhen bara-yeeshu nam aek yahoodee ttonha aur jootta bhvishyadvkta mila." 
Acts13:7 vah siraagiyus paulus soobe ke sath tha, jo buddhmaian puroosh tha: us ne baranabas aur shaaul ko apane pas bulakar parameshvar ka vachan sunana chaha." 
Acts13:8 parantu ileemas ttonhe ne, kyonki yahee usake nam ka arth haai un ka samhana karake, soobe ko vishvas karane se rokata chaha." 
Acts13:9 tab shaaul ne jis ka nam paulus bhee haai, pavitra atma se paaripoorn ho us kee or ttkattkee lagakar kaha." 
Acts13:10 he sare kapatt aur sab chaturai se bhre huae shautan kee santan, sakal dharma ke baairee, kya too prabhu ke seedho magorn ko tteddha karana n chhodega?" 
Acts13:11 ab dek, prabhu ka hath tujh par laga haai aur too kuchh samay tak andha rahega aur soorya ko n dekhega: tab turant dhaundhalai aur andhora us par chha gaya, aur vah idhar udhar ttttolane laga, taki koi usaka hath pakadke le chale." 
Acts13:12 tab soobe ne jo kuchh hua tha, dekhkar aur prabhu ke upadesh se chakit hokar vishvas kiya.." 
Acts13:13 paulus aur usake sathee pafaus se jahaj kholakar panfooliya ke piraga men aae: aur yoohanna unhen chhodkar yarooshalem ko lautt gaya. 
Acts13:14 aur piraga se age baddhkar ke pisidiya ke antaakiya men pahunche aur sabt ke din aradhanalay men jakar baaitt gaae. 
Acts13:15 aur vyavastha aur bhavishyadvktaon kee pustak ke paddhne ke bad sabha ke saradaron ne un ke pas kahala bheja, ki he bhaiyo, yadi logon ke upadesh ke liye tumhare man men koi bat ho to kaho." 
Acts13:16 tab paulus ne khde hokar aur hath se saain karake kaha he israaeliyo, aur parameshvar se dranevalo, suno." 
Acts13:17 in israaelee logon ke parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon ko chun liya, aur jab ye misar desh men paradeshaee hokar rahate the, to un kee unnati kee aur balavant bhuja se nikal laya." 
Acts13:18 aur vah koi chalees varsha tak jangal men un kee sahata raha. 
Acts13:19 aur kanan desh men sat jaatiyon ka nash karake un ka desh koi saddhe char sau varsha men in kee meeras men kar diya. 
Acts13:20 is ke bad us ne samuel bhvishyadvkta tak un men nyayee ttharaae. 
Acts13:21 usake bad unhon ne ek raja manga: tab parameshvar ne chalees vashau ke liye binyameen ke gotra men se ek manushy arthata keesh ke putra shaaul ko un par raja ttharaya. 
Acts13:22 fir use alag karake daud ko un ka raja banaya jis ke vishay men us ne gavahee dee, ki mujhe aek manushy yishau ka putra daud, mere man ke anusar mil gaya haai. vahee mere saree ichchha pooree karega." 
Acts13:23 isee ke vansh men se parameshvar ne apanee pratigyaa ke anusar israael ke pas aek uddharakarta, arthata yeeshu ko bheja." 
Acts13:24 jis ke ane se paahile yoohanna ne sab israaeliyon ko man firav ke bapatisma ka prachar kiya. 
Acts13:25 aur jab yoohanna apana daur poora karane par tha, to us ne kaha, tum mujhe kya samajhte ho? maain vah naheen! baran dekho, mere bad aek anevala haai, jis ke panvon kee jootee maain kholane ke yogy naheen." 
Acts13:26 he bhaiyo, tum jo ibraaheem kee santan ho aur tum jo parameshvar se drate ho, tumhare pas is uddhar ka vachan bheja gaya haai." 
Acts13:27 kyonaki yarooshalem ke rahanevalon aur unake saradaron ne, n use pahachana, aur n bhvishyadvktaon kee baten samajhee jo har sabt ke din paddhee jatee haai, isaaliye use doshaee ttharakar un ko poora kiya." 
Acts13:28 unhon ne mar dalane ke yogy koi dosh us men ne paya, taubhee peelatus se binatee kee, ki vah mar dala jae." 
Acts13:29 aur jab unhon ne usake vishay men likhee hui sab baten pooree kee, to use kroos par se utar kar kabra men rakha." 
Acts13:30 parantu parameshvar ne use mare huon men se jilaya. 
Acts13:31 aur vah unhen jo usake sath galeel se yarooshalem aae the, bahut dinon tak dikhai deta raha logon ke samhane ab ve bhee usake gavah haain." 
Acts13:32 aur ham tumhen us praatigyaa ke vishay me, jo bapadadon se kee gai thee, yah susamachar sunate haain." 
Acts13:33 ki parameshvar ne yeeshu ko jilakar, vahee pratigyaa hamaree santan ke liye pooree kee, jaaisa doosare bhjan men bhee likha haai, ki too mera putra haai aj maain hee ne tujhe janmaya haai." 
Acts13:34 aur usake is reeati se mare huon men se jilane ke vishay men bhee, ki vah kabhee n sade, us ne yon kaha haai ki maain daud par kee pavitra aur achal krapa tum par karoonga." 
Acts13:35 isaliye us ne aek aur bhjan men bhee kaha haai ki too apane pavitra jan ko sadne n dega. 
Acts13:36 kyonaki daud to parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar apane samay men seva karake so gaya aur apane bapadadon men ja mila aur sad bhee gaya. 
Acts13:37 parantu jis ko parameshvar ne jilaya, vah sadne naheen paya." 
Acts13:38 isaliye, he bhaiyo tum jan lo ki isee ke dara papon kee kshama ka samachar tumhen diya jata haai." 
Acts13:39 aur jin baton se tum moosa kee vyavastha ke dara nirdosh naheen tthar sakate the, unheen sab se har aek vishvas karanevala usake dara nirdosh ttharata haai." 
Acts13:40 isaliye chaukas raho, aeesa n ho, ki jo bhvishyadvktaon kee pustak men aya haai," 
Acts13:41 tum pr bhee a pade ki he ninda karanevalo, dekho, aur chaakit ho, aur mitt jao kyonaki maain tumhare dinon men aek kam karata hoon aeesa kam, ki yadi koi tum se usakee charcha kare, to tum kabhee prateeati n karoge.." 
Acts13:42 un ke bahar nikalate samay log un se binatee karane lage, ki agale sabt ke din hamen ye baten fir sunai jaen." 
Acts13:43 aur jab sabha utt gai to yahoodiyon aur yahoodee mat men aae huae bhkton men se bahutere paulus aur baranabas ke peechhe ho liae aur unhon ne un se baten karake samajhaya, ki parameshvar ke anugrah men bane raho.." 
Acts13:44 agale sabt ke din nagar ke praaya: sab log parameshvar ka vachan sunane ko ikatthe ho gaae. 
Acts13:45 parantu yahoodee bheed ko dekhkar dah se bhr gaa, aur ninda karate huae paulus kee baton ke virodha men bolane lage." 
Acts13:46 tab polus aur baranabas ne nidr hokar kaha, avashy tha, ki parameshvar ka vachan paahile tumhen sunaya jata: parantu jab ki tum use door karate ho, aur apane ko anant jeevan ke yogy naheen ttharate, to dekho, ham anyajatiyon kee or firate haain." 
Acts13:47 kyonkai prabhu ne hamen yah agyaa dee haai ki maai. ne tujhe anyajaatiyon ke liye jyoti ttharaya haai taki too prathvee kee chhor tak uddhar ka dar ho. 
Acts13:48 yah sunakar anyajati anaandait hua, aur parameshvar ke vachan kee badai karane lage: aur jitane anant jeevan ke liye ttharaae gaae the, unhon ne vishvas kiya." 
Acts13:49 tab prabhu ka vachan us sare desh men faailane laga. 
Acts13:50 parantu yahoodiyon ne bhkt aur kuleen striayon ko aur nagar ke bade logon ko usakaya, aur paulus aur baranabas par upadrav karavakar unhen apane sivanon se nikal diya." 
Acts13:51 tab ve un ke samhane apane panvon kee dhool jhadkar ikuniyum ko gaae. 
Acts13:52 aur chele anand se aur pavitra atma se paaripoorn hote rahe.. 
Acts14:1 ikuniyum men aeesa hua ki ve yahoodiyon kee aradhanalay men sath sath gaa, aur aeesee baten kee, ki yahoodiyon aur yoonaaniyon donon men se bahaton ne vishvas kiya." 
Acts14:2 parantu n mananevale yahoodiyon ne anyajatiyon ke man bhaiyon ke virodha men usakaa, aur bigad kar diae." 
Acts14:3 aur ve bahut din tak vahan rahe, aur prabhu ke bhrose par hiyav se baten karate the: aur vah un ke hathon se chinh aur adabhut kam karavakar apane anugrah ke vachan par gavahee deta tha." 
Acts14:4 parantu nagar ke logon men foott pad gai thee is se kitane to yahoodiyon kee or, aur kitane praeariton kee or ho gaae." 
Acts14:5 parantu jab anyajaati aur yahoodee un ka apaman aur unhen patthravah karane ke liye apane saradaron samat un par dode. 
Acts14:6 to ve is bat ko jan ga, aur lukauniya ke lusr aur dirabe nagaron me, aur asapas ke desh men bhag gaae." 
Acts14:7 aur vahan susamachar sunane lage.. 
Acts14:8 lusr men aek manushy baaitta tha, jo panvon ka nirbal tha: vah janm hee se langada tha, aur kabhee n chala tha." 
Acts14:9 vah paulus ko baten karate sun raha tha aur is ne us kee or ttkattkee lagakar dekha ki is ko changa ho jane ka vishvas haai. 
Acts14:10 aur unche shabd se kaha, apane panvon ke bal seedha khda ho: tab vah uchhlakar chalane firane laga." 
Acts14:11 logon ne paulus ka yah kam dekhkar lukauniya bhasha men unche shabd se kaha devata hamare pas utar aae haain. 
Acts14:12 aur unhon ne baranabas ko jyoos, aur paulus ko hirames kaha, kyonaki yah baten karane men mukhy tha." 
Acts14:13 aur jyoos ke us maandair ka pujaree jo us ke nagar ke samhane tha, baail aur foolon ke har faattkon par lakar logon ke sath baalidan karana chahata tha." 
Acts14:14 parantu baranabas aur paulus praeariton ne jab suna, to apane kapade faade, aur bheed men lapak gaa, aur pukarakar kahane lage he logo tum kya karate ho?" 
Acts14:15 ham bhee to tumhare saman du:kh-sukh bhogee manushy haai, aur tumhen susamachar sunate haai, ki tum in vyarth vastuon se alag hokar jeevate parameshvar kee or firo, jis ne svarga aur prathvee aur samudra aur jo kuchh un men haai banaya." 
Acts14:16 us ne beete samayon men sab jatiyon ko apane apane magorn men chalane diya. 
Acts14:17 taubhee us ne apane ap ko be-gavah n chhoda kintu vah bhlai karata raha, aur akash se vashara aur falavant retu dekar, tumhare man ko bhojan aur anand se bhrata raha." 
Acts14:18 yah kahakar bhee unhon ne logon ko kattnaita se roka ki un ke liye baalidan n karen.. 
Acts14:19 parantu kitane yahoodiyon ne antaakiya aur ikuniyam se akar logon ko apanee or kar liya, aur paulus ko patthravah kiya, aur mara samajhkar use nagar ke bahar ghaseett le gaae." 
Acts14:20 par jab chele us kee charon or a khde hua, to vah uttkar nagar men gaya aur doosare din baranabas ke sath dirabe ko chala gaya." 
Acts14:21 aur ve us nagar ke logon ko susamachar sunakar, aur bahut se chele banakar, lusr aur ikuniyam aur antaakiya ko lautt aae." 
Acts14:22 aur chelon ke man ko sthiar karate rahe aur yah upadesh dete the, ki hamen bade klesh uttakar parameshvar ke rajy men pravesh karana hoga." 
Acts14:23 aur unhon ne har aek kaleesiya men un ke liye praacheen ttharaa, aur upavas saahit praarthna karake, unhen prabhu ke hath saunpa jis par unhon ne vishvas kiya tha." 
Acts14:24 aur pisidiya se hote huae ve panfooliya men pahunche 
Acts14:25 aur piraga men vachan sunakar attliya men aae. 
Acts14:26 aur vahan se jahaj se antaakiya men aa, jahan se ve us kam ke liye jo unhon ne poora kiya tha parameshvar ke anugrah par saunpe gaae the." 
Acts14:27 vahan pahunchakar, unhon ne kaleesiya ikatthee kee aur bataya, ki parameshvar ne hamare sath hokar kaaise bade bade kam kiae! aur anyajatiyon ke liye vishvas ka dar khol diya." 
Acts14:28 aur ve chelon ke sath bahut din tak rahe.. 
Acts15:1 fir kitane log yahoodiya se akar bhaiyon ko sikhane lage ki yadi moosa kee reeti par tumhara khtana n ho to tum uddhar naheen pa sakate. 
Acts15:2 jab paulus aur baranabas ka un se bahut jhgada aur vada-avivad hua to yah ttharaya gaya, ki paulus aur baranabas, aur ham men se kitane aur vyaaktai is bat ke vishay men yarooshalem ko praeariton aur praacheenon ke pas janae." 
Acts15:3 so mandlee ne unhen kuchh door tak pahunchaya aur ve faeeneeke or samariya se hote huae anyajatiyon ke man faerane ka samachar sunate gaa, aur sab bhaiyon ko bahut anandait kiya." 
Acts15:4 jab yarooshalem men pahunche, to kaleesiya aur praerit aur praacheen un se anand k esath mile, aur unhon ne bataya ki parameshvar ne un ke sath hokar kaaise kaaise kam kiae the." 
Acts15:5 parantu fareeasiyon ke panth men se jinhon ne vishvas kiya tha, un men se kitanon ne uttkar kaha, ki unhen khtana karana aur moosa kee vyavastha ko manane kee agyaa dena chahiae." 
Acts15:6 tab praerit aur praacheen is bat ke vishay men vichar karane ke liye ikatthe huae. 
Acts15:7 tab pataras ne bahut vada-vivad ke bad khde hokar un se kaha.. he bhaiyo, tum janate ho, ki bahut din hua, ki parameshvar ne tum men se mujhe chun liya, ki mere munh se anyajaati susamachar ka vachan sunakar vishvas karen." 
Acts15:8 aur man ke janchanevale parameshvar ne un ko bhee hamaree nai paavitra atma dekar un kee gavahee dee. 
Acts15:9 aur vishvas ke dara un ke man shuuddh karake ham men aur un men kuchh bhed n rakha. 
Acts15:10 to ab tum kyon parameshvar kee pareeksha karate ho? ki chelon kee garadan par aeesa jooa rakho, jise n hamare bapadade utta sake the aur n ham utta sakate." 
Acts15:11 ha, hamara yah to nishchay haai, ki jis reeti se ve prabhu yeeshu ke anugrah se uddhar paaenge usee reeti se ham bhee paaenge.." 
Acts15:12 tab saree sabha chupachap hokar baranabas aur paulus kee sunane lagee, ki parameshvar ne un ke dara anyajatiyon men kaaise kaaise chinh, aur adabhut kam dikhaae." 
Acts15:13 jab ve chup hua, to yakoob kahane laga, ki.." 
Acts15:14 he bhaiyo, meree suno: shamaun ne bataya, ki parameshvar ne pahile paahil anyajaatiyon par kaaisee krapadraashtti kee, ki un men se apane nam ke liye aek log bana le." 
Acts15:15 aur is se bhavishyadvktaon kee baten milatee haai, jaaisa likha haai, ki." 
Acts15:16 is ke bad maain fir akar daud ka gira hua dera uttaunga, aur usake khndharon ko fir banaunga, aur use khda karoonga." 
Acts15:17 isaliye ki shosh manushy, arthata sab anyajaati jo mere nam ke kahalate haai, prabhu ko ddoonddhen." 
Acts15:18 yah vahee prabhu kahata haai jo jagat kee utpati se in baton ka samachar deta aya haai. 
Acts15:19 isaliye mera vichar yah haai, ki anyajaatiyon men se jo log parameshvar kee or firate haai, ham unhen du:kh n den." 
Acts15:20 parantu unhen likh bhenje, ki ve mooraton kee ashuuddhtaon aur vyaabhaichar aur gala ghaentte huon ke mans se aur lohoo se pare rahen." 
Acts15:21 kyonaki purane samay se nagar nagar moosa kee vyavastha ke prachar karanevale hote chale aae haai, aur vah har sabt ke din aradhanalay men paddhee jatee haai." 
Acts15:22 tab saree kaleeasiya saahit praeariton aur praacheenon ko achchha laga, ki apane men se kai manushyon ko chune, arthata yahooda, jo barasabba kahalata haai, aur seelas ko jo bhaiyon men mukhaiya the aur unhen paulus aur baranabas ke sath antaakiya ko bhejen." 
Acts15:23 aur un ke hath yah likh bheja, ki antakiya aur sooriya aur kilikiya ke rahanevale bhaiyon ko jo anyajatiyon men se haai, praeariton aur praacheen bhaiyon ka namaskara!" 
Acts15:24 ham ne suna haai, ki ham men se kitanon ne vahan jakar, tumhen apanee baton se ghabara diya aur tumhare man ulatt diae haain parantu ham ne un ko agyaa naheen dee thee." 
Acts15:25 isaliye ham ne aek chitt hokar tteek samajha, ki chune huaee manushyon ko apane pyare baranabas aur paulus ke sath tumhare pas bhejen." 
Acts15:26 ye to aeese manushy haai, jinhon ne apane praan hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke nam ke liye jokhaim men dale haain." 
Acts15:27 aur ham ne yahooda aur seelas ko bheja haai, jo apane munh se bhee ye baten kah denge." 
Acts15:28 paavitra atma ko, aur ham ko tteek jan pada, ki in avashyak baton ko chhod tum par aur bojh n dalen" 
Acts15:29 ki tum mooraton ke baali kiae huon se, aur lohoo se, aur gala ghaentte huon ke mans se, aur vyaabhaichar se, pare raho. in se pare raho to tumhara bhla hoga age shuubh.." 
Acts15:30 fir ve vida hokar antakiya men pahunche, aur sabha ko ikatthee karake vah unhen patraee de dee." 
Acts15:31 aur ve paddhkar us upadesh kee bat se ati anaandait hue. 
Acts15:32 aur yahooda aur seelas ne jo ap bhee bhavishyadvkta the, bahut baton se bhaiyon ko upadesh dekar sthiar kiya." 
Acts15:33 ve kuchh din rahakar bhaiyon se shaaantai ke sath vida hua, ki apane bhejanevalon ke pas jaaen." 
Acts15:34 parantu seelas ko vahan rahana achchha laga. 
Acts15:35 aur paulus aur baranabas antaakiya men rah gaae: aur bahut aur logon ke sath prabhu ke vachan ka upadesh karate aur susamachar sunate rahe.. 
Acts15:36 kuchh din bad paulus ne baranabas se kaha ki jin jin nagaron men ham ne prabhu ka vachan sunaya tha, ao, fir un men chalakar apane bhaiyon ko dekhen ki kaaise haain." 
Acts15:37 tab baranabas ne yoohanna ko jo marakus kahalata haai, sath lene ka vichar kiya." 
Acts15:38 parantu paulus ne use jo panfooliya men un se alag ho gaya tha, aur kam par un ke sath n gaya, sath le jana achchha n samajha." 
Acts15:39 so aeesa ttntta hua, ki ve aek doosare se alag ho gaae: aur baranabas, marakus ko lekar jahaj par kupraus ko chala gaya." 
Acts15:40 parantu paulus ne seelas ko chun liya, aur bhaiyon se parameshvar ke anugrah par saunpa jakar vahan se chala gaya." 
Acts15:41 aur kaleesiyaon ko sthiar karata hua, sooriya aur kilikiya se hote hua nikala.." 
Acts16:1 fir vah dirabe aur lusr men bhee gaya, aur dekho, vahan teemuathaiyus nam aek chela tha, jo kisee vishvasee yahoodinee ka putra tha, parantu usaka pita yoonanee tha." 
Acts16:2 vah lusr aur ikuaniyum ke bhaiyon men sunam tha. 
Acts16:3 paulus ne chaha, ki yah mere sath chale aur jo yahoodee log un jagahon men the un ke karan use lekar usaka khtana kiya kyonaki ve sab janate tha, ki usaka pita yoonanee tha." 
Acts16:4 aur nagar nagar jate huae ve un vidhaiyon ko jo yarooshalem ke praeariton aur praacheenon ne ttharai thee, manane ke liye unhen pahunchate jate the." 
Acts16:5 is prakar kaleeasiya vishvas men sthiar hotee gai aur ginatee men prati din baddhtee gai. 
Acts16:6 aur ve oogiya aur galatiya deshaen men se hokar gaa, aur paavitra atma ne unhen aeeashaiya men vachan sunane se mana kiya." 
Acts16:7 aur unhon ne moosiya ke nikatt pahunchakar, bitooniya men jana chaha parantu yeeshu ke atma ne unhen jane n diya." 
Acts16:8 so moosiya se hokar ve traeas men aae. 
Acts16:9 aur paulus ne rat ko aek darshan dekha ki aek makidunee puroosh khda hua, us se binatee karake kahata haai, ki par utarakar maakiduaniya men a aur hamaree sahayata kara." 
Acts16:10 usake yah darshan dekhte hee ham ne turant makiduaniya jana chaha, yah samajhkar, ki parameshvar ne hamen unhen susamachar sunane ke liye bulaya haai.." 
Acts16:11 so traeas se jahaj kholakar ham seedho sumatraake aur doosare din niyapulis men aae. 
Acts16:12 vahan se ham filippee men pahunche, jo maakiduaniya praant ka mukhy nagar, aur romiyon kee bastee haai aur ham us nagar men kuchh din tak rahe." 
Acts16:13 sabt ke din ham nagar ke faattk ke bahar nadee ke kinare yah samajhkar gaa, ki vahan praarthna karane ka sthan hoga aur baaittkar un striayon se jo ikatthee hui thee, baten karane lage." 
Acts16:14 aur luadiya nam thuatheera nagar kee baainjanee kapade bechanevalee aek bhkt sree sunatee thee, aur prabhu ne usaka man khola, taaki paulus kee baton par chitt lagaae." 
Acts16:15 aur jab us ne apane gharane samet bapaatisma liya, to us ne binatee kee, ki yadi tum mujhe prabhu kee vishvasinee samajhte ho, to chalakar mere ghar men raho aur vah hamen manakar le gai.." 
Acts16:16 jab ham praarthna karane kee jagah ja rahe the, to hamen aek dasee milee jis men bhavee kahanevalee atma thee aur bhavee kahane se apane svaamiyon ke liye bahut kuchh kama latee thee." 
Acts16:17 vah paulus ke aur hamare peechhe akar chillane lagee ki ye manushy param pradhaan parameshvar ke das haai, jo hamen uddhar ke marga kee katha sunate haain." 
Acts16:18 vah bahut din tak aeesa hee karatee rahee, parantu paulus du:akhait hua, aur munh faerakar us atma se kaha, maain tujhe yeeshu maseeh ke nam se agyaa deta hoo, ki us men se nikal ja aur vah usee ghadee nikal gai.." 
Acts16:19 jab usake svamiyon ne dekha, ki hamaree kamai kee asha jatee rahee, to paulus aur seelas ko pakad kar chauk men praadhaanon ke pas kheench le gaae." 
Acts16:20 aur unhen faaujadaree ke hakimon ke pas le jakar kaha ye log jo yahoodee haai, hamare nagar men badee halachal macha rahe haain." 
Acts16:21 aur aeese vyavahar bata rahe haai, jinhen grahan karana ya manana ham romiyon ke liye tteek naheen." 
Acts16:22 tab bheed ke lage un ke virodha men ikatthe hokar chaddh aa, aur hakimon ne un ke kapade faadkar utar dale, aur unhen bet marane kee agyaa dee." 
Acts16:23 aur bahut bet lagavakar unhen bandeegrah men dala aur daroga ko agyaa dee, ki unhen chaukasee se rakhe." 
Acts16:24 us ne aeesee agyaa pakar unhen bheetar kee kottree men rakha aur un ke panv katt men ttonk die. 
Acts16:25 adhaee rat ke lagabhg paulus aur seelas praarthna karate huae parameshvar ke bhjan ga rahe the, aur bandhauae un kee sun rahe the." 
Acts16:26 ki itane men aekaaek bada bhuidol hua, yahan tak ki bandeegrah kee nev hil gai, aur turant sab dar khul gaae aur sab ke bandhan khul pade." 
Acts16:27 aur daroga jag utta, aur bandeegrah ke dar khule dekhkar samajha ki bandhauae bhag gaa, so us ne talavar kheenchakar apane ap ko mar dalana chaha." 
Acts16:28 parantu paulus ne unche shabd se pukarakar kaha apane ap ko kuchh hani n pahuncha, kyonki ham sab yahan haain." 
Acts16:29 tab vah deeya mangavakar bheetar lapak gaya, aur kanpata hua paulus aur seelas ke age gira." 
Acts16:30 aur unhen bahar lakar kaha, he sahibo, uddhar pane ke liye maain kya karoon?" 
Acts16:31 unhon ne kaha, prabhu yeeshu maseeh par vishvas kar, to too aur tera gharana uddhar paega." 
Acts16:32 aur unhon ne us ko, aur usake sare ghar ke logon ko prabhu ka vachan sunaya." 
Acts16:33 aur rat ko usee ghadee us ne unhen le jakar un ke ghaav dhaea, aur us ne apane sab logon samet turant bapaatisma liya." 
Acts16:34 aur us ne unhen apane ghar men le jakar, un ke age bhojan rakha aur sare gharane samet parameshvar par vishvas karake anand kiya.." 
Acts16:35 jab din hua tak haakimon ne pyadon ke hath kahala bheja ki un manushyon ko chhod do. 
Acts16:36 daroga ne ye baten paulus se kah sunai, ki hakimon ne tumhare chhod dene kee agyaa bhej dee haai, so ab nikalakar kushal se chale jao." 
Acts16:37 parantu paulus ne us se kaha, unhon ne hamen jo romee manushy haai, doshaee ttharaae bina, logon ke samhane mara, aur bandeegrah men dala, aur ab kya chupake se nikal dete haain? aeesa nahee, parantu ve ap akar hamen bahar le jaaen." 
Acts16:38 pyadon ne ye baten hakimon se kah dee, aur ve yah sunakar ki romee haai, dr gaae." 
Acts16:39 aur akar unhen manaya, aur bahar le jakar binatee kee ki nagar se chale jaaen." 
Acts16:40 ve bandeegrah se nikal kar luadiya ke yahan gaa, aur bhaiyon se bhentt karake unhen shaaantai dee, aur chale gaae.." 
Acts17:1 fir ve amfaipualis aur apulloniya hokar thaissaluneeke men aa, jahan yahoodiyon ka aek aradhanalay tha." 
Acts17:2 aur paulus apanee reeti ke anusar un ke pas gaya, aur teen sabt ke din pavitra shaasren se un ke sath vivad kiya." 
Acts17:3 aur un ka arth khol kholakar samajhata tha, ki maseeh ka dukh uttana, aur mare huon men se jee uttna, avashy tha aur yahee yeeshu jis kee maain tumhen katha sunata hoo, maseeh haai." 
Acts17:4 un men se kitanon ne, aur bhkt yoonaaniyon men se bahuteron ne aur bahut see kuleen sitrayon ne man liya, aur paulus aur seelas ke sath mil gae." 
Acts17:5 parantu yahoodiyon ne dah se bhrakar bajaroo logon men se kai dushtt manushyon ko apane sath men liya, aur bheed lagakar nagar men hullad machane lage, aur yason ke ghar par chaddhai karake unhen logon ke samhane lana chaha." 
Acts17:6 aur unhen n pakar, ve yah chillate huae yason aur kitane aur bhaiyon ko nagar ke haakimon ke samhane kheench laa, ki ye log jinhon ne jagal ko ulatta pulatta kar diya haai, yahan bhee aae haain." 
Acts17:7 aur yamon ne unhen apane yahan utara haai, aur ye sab ke sab yah kahate haain ki yeeshu raja haai, aur kaaisar kee agyaaon ka virodha karate haain." 
Acts17:8 unhon ne logon ko aur nagar ke haakimon ko yah sunakar ghabara diya. 
Acts17:9 aur unhon ne yason aur bakee logon se muchalaka lekar unhen chhod diya.. 
Acts17:10 bhaiyon ne turant rat hee rat paulus aur seelas ko bireeya men bhej diya: aur ve vahan pahunchakar yahoodiyon ke aradhanalay men gaae. 
Acts17:11 ye log to thaissaluneeke ke yahoodiyon se bhle the aur unhon ne badee lalasa se vachan grahan kiya, aur praati din pavitra shaasren men ddoonddhte rahe ki ye baten yoheen haai, ki naheen." 
Acts17:12 so un men se bahuton ne, aur yoonanee kuleen striayon men se, aur purooshaen men se bahuteron ne vishvas kiya." 
Acts17:13 kintu jab thaissaluneeke ke yahoodee jan gaa, ki paulus bireeya men bhee parameshvar ka vachan sunata haai, to vahan bhee akar logon ko usakane aur halachal machane lage." 
Acts17:14 tab bhaiyon ne turant paulus ko vida kiya, ki samudra ke kinare chala jaae parantu seelas aur teemuthaiyus vaheen rah gaae." 
Acts17:15 paulus ke pahunchanevale use athene tak le gaa, aur seelas aur teemuthaiyus ke liye yah agyaa lekar vida hua, ki mere pas bahut shaeegha ao.." 
Acts17:16 jab paulus athene men un kee batt joh raha tha, to nagar ko mooraton se bhra hua dekhkar usaka jee jal gaya." 
Acts17:17 so vah aradhanalay men yahoodiyon aur bhkton se aur chauk men jo log milate the, un se har din vada-vivad kiya karata tha." 
Acts17:18 tab iapikooree aur stoikee panditon men se kitane us se tarka karane lage, aur kitanon ne kaha, yah bakavadee kya kahana chahata haai? parantu auron ne kaha vah any devataon ka pracharak maloom padta haai, kyonki vah yeeshu ka, aur punarootthan ka susamachar sunata tha." 
Acts17:19 tab ve use apane sath ariyupagus par le gaae aur poochha, kya ham jan sakate haai, ki yah naya mat jo too sunata haai, kya haai?" 
Acts17:20 kyonaki too anokhee baten hamen sunata haai, isaliye ham janana chahate haain ki in ka arth kya haai?" 
Acts17:21 isaliye ki sab athenavee aur paradeshaee jo vahan rahate the nai nai baten kahane aur sunane ke sivay aur kisee kam men samay naheen bitate the. 
Acts17:22 tab paulus ne ariyupagus ke beech men khda hokar kaha he athene ke logon maain dekhta hoo, ki tum har bat men devataon ke bade mananevale ho." 
Acts17:23 kyonaki maain firate huae tumharee poojane kee vastuon ko dekh raha tha, to aek aeesee vedee bhee pai, jis par likha tha, ki anajane ishvar ke liye. so jise tum bina jane poojate ho, maain tumhen usaka samachar sunata hoon." 
Acts17:24 jis parameshvar ne prathvee aur us kee sab vastuon ko banaya, vah svarga aur prathvee ka svamee hokar hath ke banaae huae maandairon men naheen rahata." 
Acts17:25 n kisee vastu ka prayojan rakhkar manushyon ke hathon kee seva leta haai, kyonki vah to ap hee sab ko jeevan aur svas aur sab kuchh deta haai." 
Acts17:26 us ne ek hee mool se manushyon kee sab jaatiyan saree prathvee par rahane ke liye banai haain aur un ke ttharaae huae samay, aur nivas ke sivanon ko isaaliye bandha haai." 
Acts17:27 ki ve parameshvar ko ddoonddhe, kadaachit use ttttolakar pa jaaen taubhee vah ham men se kisee se door naheen!" 
Acts17:28 kyonaki ham usee men jeeavit rahate, aur chalate-afirate, aur sthiar rahate haain jaaise tumhare kitane kaviyon ne bhee kaha haai, ki ham to usee ke vansh bhee haain." 
Acts17:29 so parameshvar ka vansh hokar hamen yah samajhta uchit nahee, ki ishvaratv, sone ya roope ya patthr ke saman haai, jo manushy kee kareegaree aur kalpata se gaddhe gaae hon." 
Acts17:30 isaliye parameshvar agyaanata ke samayon men anakanee karake, ab har jagah sab manushyon ko man firane kee agyaa deta haai." 
Acts17:31 kyonaki us ne aek din ttharaya haai, jis men vah us manushy ke dara dharma se jagat ka nyay karega, jise us ne ttharaya haai aur use mare huon men se jilakar, yah bat sab par praamaanait kar dee haai.." 
Acts17:32 mare huon ke punarootthan kee bat sunakar kitane to ttttha karane lage, aur kitanon ne kaha, yah bat ham tujh se fir kabhee sunenge." 
Acts17:33 is par paulus un ke beech men se nikal gaya. 
Acts17:34 parantu kai aek manushy usake sath mil gaa, aur vishvas kiya, jin men diyunusiyus aariyupagee tha, aur damaris nam aek sree thee, aur un ke sath aur bhee kitane log the.." 
Acts18:1 is ke bad paulus athene ko chhodkar kuarinthus men aya. 
Acts18:2 aur vahan akvaila nam aek yahoodee mila, jis ka janm puntus ka tha aur apanee patnee pirsakilla samet italiya se naya aya tha, kyonaki klauadiyus ne sab yahoodiyon ko rom se nikal jane kee agyaa dee thee, so vah un ke yahan gaya." 
Acts18:3 aur usaka aur un ka aek hee udhym tha isaaliye vah un ke sath raha, aur ve kam karane lage, aur un ka udhym tamboo banane ka tha." 
Acts18:4 aur vah har aek sabt ke din aradhanalay men vada-vivad karake yahoodiyon aur yoonaaniyon ko bhee samajhata tha.. 
Acts18:5 jab seelas aur teemuathaiyus maakiduaniya se aa, to paulus vachan sunane kee dhaun men lagakar yahoodiyon ko gavahee deta tha ki yeeshu hee maseeh haai." 
Acts18:6 parantu jab ve virodha aur ninda karane lage, to us ne apane kapade jhadkar un se kaha tumhara lohoo tumharee gardan par rahe: maain nidaush hoon: ab aee maain anyajatiyon ke pas jaunga." 
Acts18:7 aur vahan se chalakar vah titus yustus nam parameshvar ke aek bhkt ke ghar men aya, jis ka ghar aradhanalay se laga hua tha." 
Acts18:8 tab aradhanalay ke saradar krispus ne apane sare gharane samet prabhu par vishvas kiya aur bahut se kurinthee sunakar vishvas laae aur bapatisma liya. 
Acts18:9 aur prabhu ne rat ko darshan ke dara paulus se kaha, mat dr, baran kahe ja, aur chup mat raha." 
Acts18:10 kyonaki maain tere sath hoon: aur koi tujh par chaddhai karake teree haati n karega kyonaki is nagar men mere bahut se log haain. 
Acts18:11 so vah un men parameshvar ka vachan sikhate huae deddh varsha tak raha.. 
Acts18:12 jab gaallaiyo akhaya desh ka hakim tha to yahoodee log aeka karake paulus par chaddh aa, aur use nyay asan ke samhane lakar, kahane lage." 
Acts18:13 ki yah logon ko samajhata haai, ki parameshvar kee upasana aeesee reeti se kare, jo vyavastha ke vipareet haai." 
Acts18:14 jab paulus bolane par tha, to gallaiyo ne yahoodiyon se kaha he yahoodiyo, yaadi yah kuchh anyay ya dushttta kee bat hotee to uchit tha ki maain tumharee sunata." 
Acts18:15 parantu yadi yah vada-vivad shabdo, aur namo, aur tumhare yahan kee vyavastha ke vishay men haai, to tum hee jano kyonaki maain in baton ka nyayee banana naheen chahata." 
Acts18:16 aur us ne unhen nyay asan ke samhane se nikalava diya. 
Acts18:17 tab sab loagen ne aradhanalay ke saradar sosthianes ko pakad ke nyay asan ke samhane mara: parantu gaallaiyo ne in baton kee kuchh bhee chinta n kee.. 
Acts18:18 so paulus bahut din tak vahan raha, fir bhaiyon se vida hokar kinakhaiya men isaliye sir mundaya kyonaki us ne mannat manee thee aur jahaj par sooriya ko chal diya aur usake sath pirsakilla aur akvaila the." 
Acts18:19 aur us ne iafisus men pahunchakar un ko vahan chhoda, aur ap hee aradhanalay men jakar yahoodiyon se vivad karane laga." 
Acts18:20 jab unhon ne us se binatee kee, ki hamare sath aur kuchh din rah, to us ne sveekar n kiya." 
Acts18:21 parantu yah kahakar un se vida hua, ki yadi parameshvar chahe to maain tumhare pas fir aunga." 
Acts18:22 tab iafisus se jahaj kholakar chal diya, aur kaaisaariya men utar kar yarooshalem ko gaya aur kaleesiya ko namaskar karake antakiya men aya." 
Acts18:23 fir kuchh din rahakar vahan se chala gaya, aur aek or se galatiya aur oogiya men sab chelon ko sthiar karata fira.." 
Acts18:24 apullos nam aek yahoodee jis ka janm sikandaariya men hua tha, jo vidan puroosh tha aur paavitra shaasr ko achchhee tarah se janata tha ifisus men aya." 
Acts18:25 us ne prabhu ke marga kee shaiksha pai thee, aur man lagakar yeeshu ke vishay men tteek tteek sunata, aur sikhata tha, parantu vah keval yoohanna ke bapaatisma kee bat janata tha." 
Acts18:26 vah aradhanalay men nidr hokar bolane laga, par piraskailla aur akvaila us kee baten sunakar, use apane yahan le gaae aur parameshvar ka marga us ko aur bhee tteek tteek bataya." 
Acts18:27 aur jab us ne nishchay kiya ki par utarakar akhaya ko jaae to bhaiyon ne use ddhaddhs dekar chelon ko likha ki ve us se achchhee tarah mile, aur us ne pahunchakar vahan un logon kee badee sahayata kee jinhon ne anugrah ke karan vishvas kiya tha." 
Acts18:28 kyonaki vah pavitra shaasr se praman de dekar, ki yeeshu hee maseeh haai badee prabalata se yahoodiyon ko sab ke samhane niroottr karata raha.." 
Acts19:1 aur jab apullos kurinthus men tha, to paulus upar se sare desh se hokar iafisus men aya, aur kai chelon ko dekhkara." 
Acts19:2 un se kaha kya tum ne vishvas karate samay paavitra atma paya? unhon ne us se kaha, ham ne to paavitra atma kee charcha bhee naheen sunee." 
Acts19:3 us ne un se kaha to fir tum ne kis ka bapaatisma liya? unhon ne kaha yoohanna ka bapaatisma. 
Acts19:4 paulus ne kaha yoohanna ne yah kahakar man firav ka bapatisma diya, ki jo mere bad anevala haai, us par arthata yeeshu par vishvas karana." 
Acts19:5 yah sunakar unhon ne prabhu yeeshu ke nam ka bapatisma liya. 
Acts19:6 aur jab paulus ne un par hath rakhe, to un par paavitra atma utara, aur ve bhainn bhasha bolane aur bhvishyadvvanee karane lage." 
Acts19:7 ye sab lagabhg barah puroosh the.. 
Acts19:8 aur vah aradhanalay men jakar teen maheene tak nidr hokar bolata raha, aur parameshvar ke rajy ke vishay men vivad karata aur samajhata raha." 
Acts19:9 parantu jab kitanon ne kattor hokar us kee naheen manee baran logon ke samhane is marga ko bura kahane lage, to us ne un ko chhodkar chelon ko alag kar liya, aur praati din turannus kee pattshaala men vivad kiya karata tha." 
Acts19:10 do varsha tak yahee hota raha, yahan tak ki asiya ke rahanevale kya yahoodee, kya yoonanee sab ne prabhu ka vachan sun liya." 
Acts19:11 aur parameshvar paulus ke hathon se samarth ke anokhe kam dikhata tha. 
Acts19:12 yahan tak ki roomal aur angochhe us kee deh se chhulavakar beemaron par dalate the, aur un kee beemariyan jatee rahatee thee aur dushttatmaaen un men se nikal jaya karatee theen." 
Acts19:13 parantu kitane yahoodee jo jhada foonkee karate firate the, yah karane lage, ki jin men dushttatma hon un par prabhu yeeshu ka nam yah kahakar foonke ki jis yeeshu ka prachar paulus karata haai, maain tumhen usee kee shapath deta hoon." 
Acts19:14 aur skikava nam ke aek yahoodee mahayajak ke sat putra the, jo aeesa hee karate the." 
Acts19:15 par dushttatma ne uttr diya, ki yeeshu ko maain janatee hoo, aur paulus ko bhee pahachanatee hoon parantu tum kaun ho?" 
Acts19:16 aur us manushy ne jis men dushtt atma thee un par lapakakar, aur unhen vash men lakar, un par aeesa upadrav kiya, ki ve nange aur ghaayal hokar us ghar se nikal bhage." 
Acts19:17 aur yah bat iafisus ke rahanevale yahoodee aur yoonanee bhee sab jan gaa, aur un sab par bhy chha gaya aur prabhu yeeshu ke nam kee badai hui." 
Acts19:18 aur jinhon ne vishvas kiya tha, un men se bahuteron ne akar apane apane kamon ko man liya aur pragatt kiya." 
Acts19:19 aur jadoo karanevalon men se bahuton ne apanee apanee pothaiyan ikatthee karake sab ke samhane jala deen aur jab un ka dam joda gaya, jo pachas hajar roopaye kee nikaleen." 
Acts19:20 yon prabhu ka vachan bal poorvak faailata gaya aur prabal hota gaya.. 
Acts19:21 jab ye baten ho chukee, to paulus ne atma men ttana ki makiduaniya aur akhaya se hokar yarooshalem ko jau, aur kaha, ki vahan jane ke bad mujhe roma ko bhee dekhna avashy haai." 
Acts19:22 so apanee seva karanevalon men se teemuathaiyus aur irastus ko makiduaniya men bhejakar ap kuchh din asiya men rah gaya. 
Acts19:23 us samay men panth ke vishay men bada hullad hua. 
Acts19:24 kyonaki demeatraiyus nam ka aee sunar araatimis ke chandee ke mandair banavakar kareegaron ko bahut kam dilaya karata tha. 
Acts19:25 us ne un ko, aur, aur aeesee vastuon ke kareegaron ko ikatthe karake kaha he manushyo, tum janate ho, ki is kam men hamen kitana dhan milata haai." 
Acts19:26 aur tum dekhte aur sunate ho, ki keval iafisus hee men nahee, baran praaya: sare asiya men yah kah kahakar is paulus ne bahut logon ko samajhaya aur bhramaya bhee haai, ki jo hath kee kareegaree haai, ve ishvar naheen." 
Acts19:27 aur ab keval isee aek bat ka hee dr nahee, ki hamare is dhandho kee pratishtta jatee rahegee baran yah ki mahan devee araatimis ka mandair tuchchh samajha jaaega aur jis sara aasiya aur jagat poojata haai usaka mahatv bhee jata rahega." 
Acts19:28 ve yah sunakar krodha se bhr gaa, aur chilla chillakar kahane lage, iafisiyon kee aratimis mahan haai!" 
Acts19:29 aur sare nagar men bada kolahal mach gaya aur logon ne gayus aur aristarakhus makiduaniyon ko jo paulus ke sangee yatraee the, pakad liya, aur aekachitt hokar rangashaala men daud gaae." 
Acts19:30 jab paulus ne logon ke pas bheetar jana chaha to chelon ne use jane n diya. 
Acts19:31 aasiya ke haakimon men se bhee usake kai mitraen ne usake pas kahala bheja, aur binatee kee, ki rangashaala men jakar jokhaim n uttana." 
Acts19:32 so koi kuchh chillaya, aur koi kuchh kyonaki sabha men badee gadbadee ho rahee thee, aur bahut se log to yah janate bhee naheen the ki ham kis liye ikatthe huae haain." 
Acts19:33 tab unhon ne sikandar ko, jis yahoodiyon ne khda kiya tha, bheed men se age baddhaya, aur sikandar hath se saain karake logon ke samhane uttr diya chahata tha." 
Acts19:34 parantu jab unhon ne jan liya ki vah yahoodee haai, to sab ke sab aek shabd se koi do ghantte tak chillate rahe, ki ifaasiyon kee aratimis mahan haai." 
Acts19:35 tab nagar ke mantraee ne logon ko shaant karake kaha he ifisiyo, kaun naheen janata, ki ifisiyon ka nagar badee devee aratimis ke mandair, aur jyoos kee or se giree hui moorat ka tthalua haai." 
Acts19:36 so jab ki in baton ka khndn hee naheen ho sakata, to uchitt haai, ki tum chupake raho aur bina soche vichare kuchh n karo." 
Acts19:37 kyonaki tum in manushyon ko laae ho, jo n maandair ke loottnevale haai, aur n hamaree devee ke nindak haain." 
Acts19:38 yaadi demeatraiyus aur usake sathee kareegaron ko kisee se vivad ho to kachaharee khulee haai, aur hakim bhee haain ve aek doosare par naalish karen." 
Acts19:39 parantu yadi tum kisee aur bat ke vishay men kuchh poochhna chahate ho, to niyat sabha men faaisala kiya jaaega." 
Acts19:40 kyonaki aj ke balave ke karan ham par dosh lagaae jane ka dr haai, isaaliye ki is ka koi karan nahee, so ham is bheed ke ikattha hone ka koi uttr n de sakenge." 
Acts19:41 aur yah kah ke us ne sabha ko vida kiya.. 
Acts20:1 jab hullad thm gaya, to paulus ne chelon ko bulavakar samajhaya, aur un se vida hokar makiduaniya kee aur chal diya." 
Acts20:2 aur us sare desh men se hokar aur unhen bahut samajhakar, vah yoonan men aya." 
Acts20:3 jab teen maheene rahakar jahaj par sooriya kee or jane par tha, to yahoodee us kee ghaat men lage, isaliye us ne yah salah kee ki makiduaniya hokar lott aae." 
Acts20:4 bireeya ke purroos ka putra sopatraus aur thaissalooneeakiyon men se aaristarkhus aur sikundus aur aasiya ka tuakhaikus aur traufimus aasiya tak usake sath ho liae. 
Acts20:5 ve age jakar traeas men hamaree batt johate rahe. 
Acts20:6 aur ham akhmeeree rottee ke dinon ke ba filippee se jahaj par chaddhkar panch din men traeas men un ke pas pahunche, aur sat din tak vaheen rahe.." 
Acts20:7 saptah ke paahile din jab ham rottee todne ke liye ikatthe hua, to paulus ne jo doosare din chale jane par tha, un se baten kee, aur adhaee rat tak baten karata raha." 
Acts20:8 jis attaree par ham ikatthe the, us men bahut deeye jal rahe the." 
Acts20:9 aur yootukhus nam ka aek javan khaidkee par baaitta hua gaharee neend se jhuk raha tha, aur jab paulus der tak baten karata raha to vah neend ke jhoke men teesaree attaree par se gir pada, aur mara hua uttaya gaya." 
Acts20:10 parantu paulus utarakar us se lipatt gaya, aur gale lagakar kaha ghabarao naheen kyonaki usaka praan usee men haai." 
Acts20:11 aur upar jakar rottee todee aur khakar itanee der tak un se baten karata raha, ki pau fatt gai fir vah chala gaya." 
Acts20:12 aur ve us ladke ko jeeavit le aa, aur bahut shaantai pai.." 
Acts20:13 ham paahile se jahaj par chaddhkar assus ko is vichar se age gaa, ki vahan se ham paulus ko chaddha len kyonki us ne yah isaaliye ttharaya tha, ki ap hee paaidal janevala tha." 
Acts20:14 jab vah assus men hamen mila to ham use chaddhakar mitulene men aae. 
Acts20:15 aur vahan se jahaj kholakar ham doosare din khaiyus ke samhane pahunche, aur agale din samus men lagan kiya, fir doosare din meeletus men aae." 
Acts20:16 kyonaki paulus ne iafisus ke pas se hokar jane kee ttanee thee, ki kaheen aeesa n ho, ki use aasiya men der lage kyonki vah jaldee karata tha, ki yadi ho sake, to use pintekus ka din yarooshalem men katte.." 
Acts20:17 aur us ne meeletus se iafisus men kahala bheja, aur kaleeasiya ke praacheenon ko bulavaya." 
Acts20:18 jab ve us ke pas aa, to un se kaha, tum janate ho, ki pahile hee din se jab maain aasiya men pahuncha, maain har samay tumhare sath kis prakar raha." 
Acts20:19 arthata badee deenata se, aur ansoo baha bahakar, aur un pareekshaaon men jo yahoodiyon ke shadyantra ke karan mujh par a padee maain prabhu kee seva karata hee raha." 
Acts20:20 aur jo jo baten tumhare labh kee thee, un ko batane aur logon ke samhane aur ghar ghar sikhane se kabhee n jhjhika." 
Acts20:21 baran yahoodiyon aur yoonaaniyon ke samhane gavahee deta raha, ki parameshvar kee or man firana, aur hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh par vishvas karana chahiae." 
Acts20:22 aur ab dekho, maain atma men bandha hua yarooshalem ko jata hoo, aur naheen janata, ki vahan mujh par kya kya beetega?" 
Acts20:23 keval yah ki pavitra atma har nagar men gavahee de dekar mujh se kahata haai, ki bandhan aur klesh tere liye taaiyar haai." 
Acts20:24 parantu maain apane praan ko kuchh naheen samajhta: ki use piry janoo, baran yah ki maain apanee daud ko, aur us sevakai ko pooree karoo, jo maain ne parameshvar ke anugrah ke susamachar par gavahee dene ke liye prabhu yeeshu se pai haai." 
Acts20:25 aur ab dekho, maain janata hoo, ki tum sab jin se maain parameshvar ke rajy ka prachar karata fira, mera munh fir n dekhoge." 
Acts20:26 isaliye maain aj ke din tum se gavahee dekar kahata hoo, ki maain sab ke lohoo se nirdosh hoon." 
Acts20:27 kyonaki maain parameshvar kee saree manasa ko tumhen pooree reeti se banane se n jhjhika. 
Acts20:28 isaliye apanee aur poore jhund kee chaukasee karo jis se pavitra atma ne tumhen adhyaksha ttharaya haai ki tum parameshvar kee kaleeasiya kee rakhvalee karo, jise us ne apane lohoo se mol liya haai." 
Acts20:29 maain janata hoo, ki mere jane ke bad faadnevale bheadiae tum men aaenge, jo jhund ko n chhodenge." 
Acts20:30 tumhare hee beech men se bhee aeese aeese manushy uttenge, jo chelon ko apane peechhe kheench lene ko tteddhee meddhee baten kahenge." 
Acts20:31 isaliye jagate raho aur smaran karo ki maain ne teen varsha tak rat din ansoo baha bahakar, har aek ko chitaunee dena n chhoda." 
Acts20:32 aur ab maain tumhen parameshvar ko, aur usake anugrah ke vachan ko saunp deta hoon jo tumharee unnati kar sakata haai, oshra sab paavitraen men sajhee karake meeras de sakata haai." 
Acts20:33 maain ne kisee kee chandee sone ya kapade ka lalach naheen kiya. 
Acts20:34 tum ap hee janate ho ki inheen hathon ne meree aur mere saathaiyon kee avashyakataaen pooree keen. 
Acts20:35 maain ne tumhen sab kuchh karake dikhaya, ki is reeti se parishram karate huae nirbalon ko sambhalana, aur prabhu yeeshu kee baten smaran rakhna avashy haai, ki us ne ap hee kaha haai ki lene se dena dhany haai.." 
Acts20:36 yah kahakar us ne ghauttne tteke aur un sab ke sath praarthna kee. 
Acts20:37 tab ve sab bahut roae aur paulus ke gale men lipatt kar use choomane lage. 
Acts20:38 ve vishosh karake is bat ka shaek karate the, jo us ne kahee thee, ki tum mera munh fir n dekhoge aur unhon ne use jahaj tak pahunchaya.." 
Acts21:1 jab ham ne un se alag hokar jahaj khola, to seedho marga se kos men aa, aur doosare din roodus me, or vahan se patara men." 
Acts21:2 aur aek jahaj faeeneeke ko jata hua mila, aur us par chaddhkar, use khol diya." 
Acts21:3 jab kupraus dikhai diya, jo ham ne use baaeen hath chhoda, aur sooriya ko chalakar soon men utare kyonki vahan jahaj ka bojh utarana tha." 
Acts21:4 aur chelon ko pakar ham vahan sat din tak rahe: unhon ne atma ke sikhaae paulus se kaha, ki yarooshalem men panv n rakhna." 
Acts21:5 jab ve din poore ho gaa, to ham vahan se chal diae or sab striayon aur balakon samet hamen nagar ke bahar tak pahunchaya aur ham ne kinare par ghauttne ttekakar praarthna kee." 
Acts21:6 tab aek doosare se vida hokar, ham to jahaj par chaddhe, aur ve apane apane ghar lautt gaae.." 
Acts21:7 jab ham soor se jalayatra pooree karake patulimaayis men pahunche, aur bhaiyon ko namaskar karake un ke sath aek din rahe." 
Acts21:8 doosare din ham vahan se chalakar kaaisaariya men aa, aur filippus susamachar pracharak ke ghar men jo saton men se aek tha, jakar usake yahan rahe." 
Acts21:9 us kee char kunvaree putraiyan theen jo bhvishyadanee karatee theen. 
Acts21:10 jab ham vahan bahut din rah chuke, to agabus nam aek bhavishyadvkta yahoodiya se aya." 
Acts21:11 us ne hamare pas akar paulus ka pattka liya, aur apane hath panv bandhakar kaha pavitra atma yah kahata haai, ki jis manushy ka yah pattka haai, us ko yarooshalem men yahoodee isee reeti se bandhonge, aur anyajaatiyon ke hath men saunpenge." 
Acts21:12 jab ye baten sunee, to ham aur vahan ke logon ne us se binatee kee, ki yarooshalem ko n jaae." 
Acts21:13 parantu paulus ne uttr diya, ki tum kya karate ho, ki ro rokar mera man todte ho, maain to prabhu yeeshu ke nam ke liye yarooshalem men n keval bandho jane hee ke liye baran marane ke liye bhee taaiyar hoon." 
Acts21:14 jab un se n mana to ham yah kahakar chup ho gaae ki prabhu kee ichchha pooree ho.. 
Acts21:15 un dinon ke bad ham bandha chhandha kar yarooshalem ko chal die. 
Acts21:16 kaaisaariya ke bhee kitane chele hamare sath ho lia, aur manason nam kupraus ke aek purane chele ko sath le aa, ki ham usake yahan ttkaien.." 
Acts21:17 jab ham yarooshalem men pahunche, to bhai bade anand ke sath ham se mile." 
Acts21:18 doosare din paulus hamen lekar yakoob ke pas gaya, jahan sab praacheen ikatthe the." 
Acts21:19 tab us ne unhen namaskar karake, jo jo kam parameshvar ne us kee sevakai ke dara anyajaatiyon men kiae the, aek aek karake sab bataya." 
Acts21:20 unhon ne yah sunakar parameshvar kee maahima kee, fir us se kaha he bhai, too dekhta haai, ki yahoodiyon men se kai hajar ne vishvas kiya haai aur sab vyavastha ke liye dhaun lagaae haain." 
Acts21:21 aushra un ko tere vishay men sikhaya gaya haai, ki too anyajaatiyon men rahanevale yahoodiyon ko moosa se fir jane ko sikhaya haai, aur kahata haai, ki n apane bachchon ka khtana karao or n reetiyon par chalo: so kya kiya jaae?" 
Acts21:22 log avashy sunenge, ki too aya haai." 
Acts21:23 isaliye jo ham tujh se kahate haai, vah kara: hamare yahan char manushy haai, jinhon ne mannat manee haai." 
Acts21:24 unhen lekar us ke sath apane ap ko shuuddh kara aur un ke liye khrcha de, ki ve sir mudaen: tab sab jan lege, ki jo baten unhen tere vishay men sikhai gai, un kee kuchh jad naheen haai parantu too ap bhee vyavastha ko manakar usake anusar chalata haai." 
Acts21:25 parantu un anyajaatiyon ke vishay men jinhon ne vishvas kiya haai, ham ne yah nirny karake likh bheja haai ki ve maraton ke samhane baali kiae huae mans se, aur lohoo se, aur gala ghaentte huon ke mans se, aur vyabhaichar se, bache rahen." 
Acts21:26 tab paulus un manushyon ko lekar, aur doosare din un ke sath shuuddh hokar mandair men gaya, aur bata diya, ki shuuddh hone ke din, arthata un men se har aek ke liye chaddhava chaddhaae jane tak ke din kab poore honge.." 
Acts21:27 jab ve sat din poore hone par the, to aasiya ke yahoodiyon ne paulus ko mandair men dekhkar sab logon ko usakaya, aur yon chillaakar us ko pakad liya." 
Acts21:28 ki he israaeliyo, sahayata karo yah vahee manushy haai, jo logon ke, aur vyavastha ke, aur is sthan ke virodha men har jagah sab logon ko sikhata haai, yahan tak ki yunaaniyon ko bhee maandair men lakar us ne is paavitra sthan ko apaavitra kiya haai." 
Acts21:29 unhon ne to is se paahile traufimus iafisee ko usake sath nagar men dekha tha, aur samajhte the, ki paulus use mandair men le aya haai." 
Acts21:30 tab sare nagar men kolahal mach gaya, aur log daudkar ikatthe hua, aur paulus ko pakadkar maandair ke bahar ghaseett laa, aur turant dar band kiae gaae." 
Acts21:31 jab ve usake mar dalata chahate the, to palattn ke saradar ko sandesh pahuncha ki sare yarooshalem men kolahal mach raha haai." 
Acts21:32 tab vah turant sipaahiyon aur soobedaron ko lekar un ke pas neeche daud aya aur unhon ne palattn ke saradar ko aur sipaahiyon ko dekh kar paaailus ko marane peettne se hath uttaya. 
Acts21:33 tab palattn ke saradar ne pas akar use pakad liya aur do janjeeron se bandhane kee agyaa dekar poochhne laga, yah kaun haai, aur is ne kya kiya haai?" 
Acts21:34 parantu bheed men se koi kuchh aur koi kuchh chillate rahe aur jab hullad ke mare tteek sachchai n jan saka, to use gaddh men le jane kee agyaa dee." 
Acts21:35 jab vah seeddhee par pahuncha, to aeesa hua, ki bheed ke dabav ke mare sipaahiyen ko use uttakar le jana pada." 
Acts21:36 kyonaki logon kee bheed yah chillatee hui usake peechhe padee, ki usaka ant kar do.." 
Acts21:37 jab ve paulus ko gaddh men le jane par the, to us ne palattn ke saradar se kaha kya mujhe agyaa haai ki maain tujh se kuchh kahoon? us ne kaha kya too yoonanee janata haai?" 
Acts21:38 kya too vah misaree nahee, jo in dinon se paahile balavai banakar char hajar kattaraband logon ko jangal men le gaya?" 
Acts21:39 paulus ne kaha, maain to tarasus ka yahoodee manushy hoon! kilikiya ke praasiddh nagar ka nivasee hoon: aur maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, ki mujhe logon se baten karane de." 
Acts21:40 jab us ne agyaa dee, to paulus ne seeddhee par khde hokar logon ko hath se saain kiya: jab ve chup ho gaa, to vah ibraanee bhasha men bolane laga, ki," 
Acts22:1 he bhaiyo, aur pitaro, mera pratyuttr suno, jo maain ab tumhare samhane kahata hoon.." 
Acts22:2 ve yah sunakar ki vah ham se ibraanee bhasha men bolata haai, aur bhee chup rahe. tab us ne kaha" 
Acts22:3 maain to yahoodee manushy hoo, jo kilikiya ke tarasus men janma parantu is nagar men gamaleeael ke panvon ke pas baaittkar paddhaya gaya, aur bapadadon kee vyavastha kee tteek reeati par sikhaya gaya aur parameshvar ke liye aeesee dhaun lagaae tha, jaaise tum sab aj lagaae ho." 
Acts22:4 aur maain ne puroosh aur sree donon ko bandha bandhakar, aur bandeegrah men dal dalakar, is panth ko yahan tak sataya, ki unhen marava bhee dala." 
Acts22:5 is bat ke liye mahayajak aur sab puraaniye gavah haain ki un men se maain bhaiyon ke nam par chitthiyan lekar damishk ko chala ja raha tha, ki jo vahan hon unhen bhee dand dilane ke liye bandhakar yarooshalem men laun." 
Acts22:6 jab maain chalate chalate damishk ke nikatt pahuncha, to aeesa hua ki do pahar ke lagabhg aekaaek aek badee jyoti akash se mere charon or chamakee." 
Acts22:7 aur maain boomi par gir pada: aur yah shabd suna, ki he shaaul, he shaaul, too mujhe kyon satata haai? maain ne uttr diya, ki he prabhu, too kaun haai?" 
Acts22:8 us ne mujh se kaha maain yeeshu nasaree hoo, jis too satata haai?" 
Acts22:9 aur mere sathaiyon ne jyoti to dekhee, parantu jo mujh se bolata tha usaka shabd n suna." 
Acts22:10 tab maai. ne kaha he prabhu maain kya karoon? prabhu ne mujh se kaha uttkar damishk men ja, aur jo kud tere karane ke liye ttharaya gaya haai vahan tujh se sab kah diya jaaega." 
Acts22:11 jab us jyoti ke tej ke mare mujhe kuchh dikhai n diya, to maain apane sathaiyon ke hath pakade huae daamishk men aya." 
Acts22:12 aur hananyah nam ka vyavastha ke anusar aek bhkt manushy, jo vahan ke rahanevale sab yahoodiyon men sunam tha, mere pas aya." 
Acts22:13 aur khda hokar mujh se kaha he bhai shaaul fir dekhne laga: usee ghadee mere netra khul gaae aur maain ne use dekha. 
Acts22:14 tab us ne kaha hamare bapadadon ke parameshvar ne tujhe isaaliye ttharaya haai, ki too us kee ichchha ko jane, aur us dharmee ko dekhe, aur usake munh se baten sune." 
Acts22:15 kyonaki too us kee or se sab manushyon ke samhane un baton ka gavah hoga, jo too ne dekhee aur sunee haain." 
Acts22:16 ab kyon der karata haai? ut, bapaatisma le, aur usaka nam lekar apane papon ko dhae dala." 
Acts22:17 jab maain fir yarooshalem men akar mandair men praarthna kar raha tha, to besudha ho gaya." 
Acts22:18 aur us ne dekha ki mujh se kahata haai jaldee karake yarooshalem se jhtt nikal ja: kyonaki ve mere vishay men teree gavahee n manenge. 
Acts22:19 maain ne kaha he prabhu ve to ap janate haai, ki maain tujh par vishvas karanevalon ko bandeegrah men dalata aur jagah jagah aradhanalay men pittvata tha." 
Acts22:20 aur jab tere gavah staifanus ka lohoo bahaya ja raha tha tab maain bhee vahan khda tha, aur is bat men sahamat tha, aur usake ghaatakon ke kapadon kee rakhvalee karata tha." 
Acts22:21 aur us ne mujh se kaha, chala ja: kyonaki maain tujhe anyajaatiyon ke pas door door bhejoonga.." 
Acts22:22 ve is bat tak us kee sunate rahe tab unche shabd se chillaa, ki aeese manushy ka ant karo usaka jeeavit rahata uchit naheen." 
Acts22:23 jab ve chillate aur kapade faenkate aur akash men dhool udate the 
Acts22:24 to palattn ke soobedar ne kaha ki ise gaddh men le jao aur kode marakar jancho, ki maain janoon ki log kis karan usake virodha men aeesa chilla rahe haain." 
Acts22:25 jab unhon ne use tasamon se bandha to paulus ne us soobedar se jo pas khda tha kaha, kya yah uchit haai, ki tum aek romee manushy ko, aur vah bhee bina doshaee ttharaae huae kode maro?" 
Acts22:26 soobedar ne yah sunakar palattn ke saradar ke pas jakar kaha too yah kya karata haai? yah to ramee haai. 
Acts22:27 tab palattn ke saradar ne usake pas akar kaha mujhe bata, kya too romee haai? us ne kaha, han." 
Acts22:28 yah sunakar palattn ke saradar ne kaha ki maain ne romee hone ka pad bahut roopaye dekar paya haai: paulus ne kaha, maain to janm se romee hoon." 
Acts22:29 tab jo log use janchane par the, ve turant usake pas se hatt gaae aur palattn ka saradar bhee yah janakar ki yah romee haai, aur maain ne use bandha haai, dr gaya.." 
Acts22:30 doosare din vah tteek tteek janane kee ichchha se ki yahoodee us par kyon dosh lagate haai, usake bandhan khol diae aur mahayajakon aur saree mahasabha ko ikatthe hone kee agyaa dee, aur paulus ko neeche le jakar un ke samhane khda kar diya.." 
Acts23:1 paulus ne mahasabha kee or ttkattkee lagakar dekha, aur kaha, he bhaiyo, maain ne aj tak parameshvar ke liye bilakul sachche vivek se jeevan bitaya." 
Acts23:2 hananyah mahayajak ne, un kee jo usake pas khde the, usake moonh par thppad marane kee agyaa dee." 
Acts23:3 tab paulus ne us se kaha he choona firee hui bheet, parameshvar tujhe marega: too vyavastha ke anusar mera nyay karane ko baaitta haai, aur fir kya vyavastha ke virooddh mujhe marane kee agyaa deta haai?" 
Acts23:4 jo pas khde the, unhon ne kaha, kya too parameshvar ke mahayajak ko bura kahata haai?" 
Acts23:5 paulus ne kaha he bhaiyo, maain naheen janata tha, ki yah mahayajak haai kyonki likha haai, ki apane logon ke pradhaan ko bura n kaha." 
Acts23:6 tab paulus ne yah janakar, ki kitane sadookee aur kitane fareesee haai, sabha men pukarakar kaha, he bhaiyo, maain fareesee aur fareesiyon ke vansh ka hoo, mare huon hee asha aur punarootthan ke vishay men mera mukama ho raha haai." 
Acts23:7 jab us ne yah bat kahee to fareeasiyon aur sadookiyon men jhgada hone laga aur sabha men foott pad gai. 
Acts23:8 kyonaki sadookee to yah kahate haai, ki n punarootthan haai, n svargadoot aur n atma haai parantu fareesee donon ko manate haain." 
Acts23:9 tab bada halla macha aur kitane shaasree jo fareeasiyon ke dal ke the, uttkar yon kahakar jhgadne lage, ki ham is manushy men kuchh burai naheen pate aur yadi koi atma ya svargadoot us se bola haai to fir kya?" 
Acts23:10 jab bahut jhgada hua, to palattn ke saradar ne is dr se ki ve paulus ke ttukade ttukade n kar dalen palattn ko agyaa dee, ki utarakar us ko un ke beech men se barabas nikalo, aur gaddh men le ao." 
Acts23:11 usee rat prabhu ne usake pas a khde hokar kaha he paulus, ddhaddhs bandha kyonki jaaisee too ne yarooshalem men meree gavahee dee, vaaisee hee tujhe rom men bhee gavahee denee hogee.." 
Acts23:12 jab din hua, to yahoodiyon ne aeka kiya, aur shapath khai ki jab tak ham paulus ko man n dale, tab tak khanae ya peeaen to ham par dhaikkara." 
Acts23:13 jinhon ne apas men yah shapath khai thee, ve chalees janon ke upar the." 
Acts23:14 unhon ne mahayajakon aur puraniyon ke pas akar kaha, ham ne yah ttana haai ki jab tak ham paulus ko mar n dale, tab tak yadi kuchh chakhen bhee, to ham par dhaikkar par dhaikkar haai." 
Acts23:15 isaliye ab mahasabha samet palattn ke saradar ko samajhao, ki use tumhare pas le aa, mano ki tum usake vishay men aur bhee tteek janch karana chahate ho, aur ham usake pahunchane se pahile hee use mar dalane ke liye taaiyar rahenge." 
Acts23:16 aur paulus ke bhanje n suna, ki ve us kee ghaat men haai, to gaddh men jakar paulus ko sandesh diya." 
Acts23:17 paulus ne soobedaron men se aek ko apane pas bulakar kaha is javan ko palattn ke saradar ke pas le jao, yah us se kuchh kahana chahata haai." 
Acts23:18 so us ne usako palattn ke saradar ke pas le jakar kaha paulus bandhauae ne mujhe bulakar binatee kee, ki yah javan palattn ke saradar se kuchh kahana chahata haai use usake pas le ja." 
Acts23:19 palattn ke saradar ne usaka hath pakadkar, aur alag le jakar poochha mujh se kya kahana chahata haai?" 
Acts23:20 us ne kaha yahoodiyon ne ekasa kiya haai, ki tujh se binatee kare, ki kal paulus ko mahasabha men laa, mano too aur tteek se us kee janch karana chahata haai." 
Acts23:21 parantu un kee mat manana, kyonki un men se chalees ke upar manushy us kee ghaat men haai, jinhon ne yah ttan liya haai, ki jab tak ham paulus ko man n dale, tab tak khaae, peeae, to ham par dhaikkara aur abhee ve taaiyar haain aur tere vachan kee as dekh rahe haain." 
Acts23:22 tab palattn ke saradar ne javan ko yah agyaa dekar vida kiya, ki kisee se n kahana ki too ne mujh ko ye baten batai haain." 
Acts23:23 aur do soobedaron ko bulakar kaha do sau sipahee, sattr savar, aur do sau bhalaait, pahar rat beete kaaisariya ko jane ke liye taaiyar kar rakho." 
Acts23:24 aur paulus kee savaree ke liye ghaede taaiyar rakho ki use faeliks haakim ke pas kushal se pahuncha den. 
Acts23:25 us ne is prakar kee chitthee bhee likhee 
Acts23:26 mahapratapee faeliks haakim ko klauadiyus loosiyas ko namaskara 
Acts23:27 is manushy ke yahoodiyon ne pakadkar mar dalata chaha, parantu jab maain ne jana ki romee haai, to palattn lekar chhuda laya." 
Acts23:28 aur maain janana chahata tha, ki ve us par kis karan dosh lagate haai, isaaliye use un kee mahasabha men le gaya." 
Acts23:29 tab maain ne jan liya, ki ve apanee vyavastha ke vivadon ke vishay men us par dosh lagate haai, parantu mar dale jane ya bandho jane ke yogy us men koi dosh naheen." 
Acts23:30 aur jab mujhe bataya gaya, ki ve is manushy kee ghaat men lage haain to maain ne turant us ko tere pas bhej diya aur muiyon ko bhee agyaa dee, ki tere samhane us par nalish karen.." 
Acts23:31 so jaaise sipaahiyon ko agyaa dee gai thee vaaise hee paulus ko lekar raton-rat aantaipaatrais men laae. 
Acts23:32 doosare din ve savaron ko usake sath jane ke liye chhodkar ap gaddh ko lautte. 
Acts23:33 unhon ne kaaisaariya men pahunchakar haakim ko chitthee dee: aur paulus ko bhee usake samhane khda kiya. 
Acts23:34 us ne paddhkar poochha yah kis desh ka haai? 
Acts23:35 aur jab jan liya ki kilaakiya ka haai to us se kaha jab tere mui bhee aaege, to maain tera mukama karoonga: aur us ne use herodes ke kile me, pahare men rakhne kee agyaa dee.." 
Acts24:1 panch din ke bad hananyah mahayajak kai puraniyon aur tiratullus nam kisee vakeel ko sath lekar aya unhon ne hakim ke samhane paulus par nalish kee. 
Acts24:2 jab vah bulaya gaya to tiratullus un par dosh lagakar kahane laga, ki, he mahapratapee faeliks, tere dara hamen jo bada kushal hota haai aur tere prabandha se is jati ke liye kitanee buraiyan sudharatee jatee haain." 
Acts24:3 is ko ham har jagah aur har prakar se dhanyavad ke sath manate haain. 
Acts24:4 parantu isaaliye ki tujhe aur dukh naheen dena chahata, maain tujh se binatee karata hoo, ki krapa karake hamaree do aek baten sun le." 
Acts24:5 kyonaki ham ne is manushy ko upadravee aur jagat ke sare yahoodiyon men balava karanevala, aur nasariyon ke kupanth ka muakhaiya paya haai." 
Acts24:6 us ne maandair ko ashuuddh karana chaha, aur ham ne use pakada." 
Acts24:7 in sab baton ko jin ke vishay men ham us par dosh lagate haai, too apahee us ko janch karake jan lega." 
Acts24:8 yahoodiyon ne bhee usaka sath dekar kaha, ye baten isee prakar kee haain.." 
Acts24:9 jab haakim ne paulus ko bolane ke liye saain kiya to us ne uttr diya, maain yah janakar ki too bahut vasharen se is jaati ka nyay karata haai, anand se apana pratyuttr deta hoon." 
Acts24:10 too ap jan sakata haai, ki jab se maain yarooshalem men bhjan karane ko aya, mujhe barah din se upar naheen hue." 
Acts24:11 aur unhon ne mujhe n maandair men n sabha ke gharon me, n nagar men kisee se vivad karate ya bheed lagate paya." 
Acts24:12 aur n to ve un baton ko, jin ka ve ab mujh par dosh lagate haai, tere samhane sach tthara sakate haain." 
Acts24:13 parantu yah maain tere samhane sach tthara sakate haain. 
Acts24:14 parantu yah maain tere samhane man leta hoo, ki jis panth ko ve kupanth kahate haai, usee kee reeati par maain apane bapadadon ke parameshvar kee seva karata hoon: aur jo baten vyavastha aur bhvishyadvktaon kee pustakon men likhee haai, un sab kee prateeati karata hoon." 
Acts24:15 aur parameshvar se asha rakhta hoon jo ve ap bhee rakhte haai, ki dharmee aur adharmee donon ka jee uttna hoga." 
Acts24:16 is se maain ap bhee yatan karata hoo, ki parameshvar kee, aur manushyon kee or mera vivek sada nirdosh rahe." 
Acts24:17 bahut vasharen ke bad maain apane logon ko dan pahunchane, aur bhentt chaddhane aya tha." 
Acts24:18 unhon ne mujhe mandair me, shuuddh dasha men bina bheed ke sat, aur bina danga karate huae is kam men paya - han asiya ke kai yahoodee the - un ko uchit tha," 
Acts24:19 ki yadi mere virodha men un kee koi bat ho to yahan tere samhane akar mujh par dosh lagate. 
Acts24:20 ya ye ap hee kahe, ki jab maain mahasabha ke samhane khda tha, to unhon ne mujh se kaun sa aparadha paya?" 
Acts24:21 is aek bat ko chhod jo maain ne un ke beech men khde hokar pukarakar kaha tha, ki mare huon ke jee uttne ke vishay men aj mera tumhare samhane mukama ho raha haai.." 
Acts24:22 faeliks ne jo is panth kee baten tteek tteek janata tha, unhen yah kahakar ttal diya, ki jab palattn ka saradar loosiyas aaega, to tumharee bat ka nirny karoonga." 
Acts24:23 aur soobedar ko agyaa dee, ki paulus ko sukh se rakhkar rakhvalee karana, aur usake mitraen men se kisee ko bhee us kee seva karane se n rokana.." 
Acts24:24 kitane dinon ke bad faeliks apanee patnee drausilla ko, jo yahoodinee thee, sath lekar aya aur paulus ko bulavakar us vishvas ke vishay men je maseeh yeeshu par haai, us se suna." 
Acts24:25 aur jab vah dharma aur sanyam aur anevale nyay kee charcha karata tha, to faeliks ne bhyaman hokar uttr diya, ki abhee to ja: avasar pakar maain tujhe fir bulaunga." 
Acts24:26 use paulus se kuchh roopaye milane kee bhee as thee isaaliye aur bhee bula bulakar us se baten kiya karata tha. 
Acts24:27 parantu jab do varsha beet gaa, to puraakiyus faestus faeliks kee jagah par aya, aur faeliks yahoodiyon ko khush karane kee ichchha se paulus ko bandhaua chhod gaya.." 
Acts25:1 faestus un praant men pahunchakar teen din ke bar kaaisariya se yarooshalem ko gaya. 
Acts25:2 tab mahayajakon ne, aur yahoodiyon ke bade logon ne, usake samhane paulus kee nalish kee." 
Acts25:3 aur use se binatee karake usake virodha men yah bar chaha, ki vah use yarooshalem men bulavaa, kyonki ve use raste hee men mar dalane kee ghaat lagaae huae the." 
Acts25:4 faestus ne uttr diya, ki paulus kaaisaariya men pahare men haai, aur maain ap jald vahan aunga." 
Acts25:5 fir kaha, tum se jo aadhaikar rakhte haai, ve sath chale, aur yadi is manushy ne kuchh anuachit kam kiya haai, to us par dosh lagaaen.." 
Acts25:6 aur un ke beech koi att das din rahakar vah kaaisariya gaya: aur doosare din nyay asan par baaittkar paulus ke lane kee agyaa dee. 
Acts25:7 jab vah aya, to jo yahoodee yarooshalem se aae the, unhon ne as pas khde hokar us par bahutere bharee dosh lagaa, jin ka praman ve naheen de sakate the." 
Acts25:8 parantu paulus ne uttr diya, ki maain ne n to yahoodiyon kee vyavastha ka aur n mandair ka, aur n kaaisar ka kuchh aparadha kiya haai." 
Acts25:9 tab faestus ne yahoodiyon ko khush karane kee ichchha se paulus ko uttr diya, kya too chahata haai ki yarooshalem ko jaae aur vahan mere samhane tera yah mukama tay kiya jaae?" 
Acts25:10 paulus ne kaha maain kaaisar ke nyay asan ke samhane khda hoon: mere mukamen ka yaheen faaisala hona chahiae: jaaisa too achchhee tarah janata haai, yahoodiyon ka maain ne kuchh aparadha naheen kiya." 
Acts25:11 yaadi aparadhaee hoon aur mar dale jane yogy koi kam kiya haai to marane se naheen mukarata parantu jin baton ka ye mujh par dosh lagate haai, yadi un men se koi bat sach n tthare, to koi mujhe un ke hath naheen saunp sakata: maain kaaisar kee dohai deta hoon." 
Acts25:12 tab faestus ne maantriayon kee sabha ke sath baten karake uttr diya, too ne kaaisar kee dohai dee haai, too kaaisar ke pas jaaega.." 
Acts25:13 aur kuchh din beetane ke bad agirppa raja aur biraneeke ne kaaisaariya men akar faestus se bhentt kee. 
Acts25:14 aur un ke bahut din vahan rahane ke bad faestus ne paulus kee katha raja ko batai ki aek manushy haai, jise faeliks bandhaua chhod gaya haai." 
Acts25:15 jab maain yarooshalem men tha, to mahayajak aur yahoodiyon ke puraniyon ne us kee naalish kee aur chaha, ki us par dand kee agyaa dee jaae." 
Acts25:16 parantu maain ne un ko uttr diya, ki romiyon kee yah reeati nahee, ki kisee manushy ko dand ke liye saunp de, jab tak muaalaaih ko apane muiyon ke amane samane khde hokar dosh ke uttr dene ka avasar n mile." 
Acts25:17 so jab ve yahan ikatthe hua, to maain ne kuchh der n kee, parantu doosare hee din nyay asan par baaittkar, us manushy ko lane kee agyaa dee." 
Acts25:18 jab usake mui khde hua, to unhon ne aeesee buree baton ka dosh naheen lagaya, jaaisa maain samajhta tha." 
Acts25:19 parantu apane mat ke, aur yeeshu nam kisee manushy ke vishay men jo mar gaya tha, aur paulus us ko jeeavit batata tha, vivad karate the." 
Acts25:20 aur maain ulajhn men tha, ki in baton ka pata kaaise lagaun? isaliye maain ne us se poochha, kya too yarooshalem jaaega, ki vahan in baton ka faaisala ho?" 
Acts25:21 parantu jab paulus ne dohai dee, ki mere mukamen ka faaisala maharajaadhairaj ke yahan ho to maain ne agyaa dee, ki jab tak use kaaisar ke pas n bhejoo, us kee rakhvalee kee jaae." 
Acts25:22 tab aagirppa ne faestus se kaha, maain bhee us manushy kee sunana chahata hoon: us ne kaha, too kal sun lega.." 
Acts25:23 so doosare din, jab aagirppa aur biraneeke badee dhoomadhaam se akar palattn ke saradaron aur nagar ke bade logon ke sath darabar men pahunche, to faestus ne agyaa dee, ki ve paulus ko le aaen." 
Acts25:24 faestus ne kaha he maharaja aagirppa, aur he sab manushyon jo yahan hamare sath ho, tum is manushy ko dekhte ho, jis ke vishay men sare yahoodiyon ne yarooshalem men aur yahan bhee chilla chillakar mujh se binatee kee, ki is ka jeevit rahana uchit naheen." 
Acts25:25 parantu maain ne jan liya, ki us ne aeesa kuchh naheen kiya ki mar dala jaae aur jab ki us ne ap hee maharajaadhairaj kee dohai dee, to maain ne use bhejane ka upay nikala." 
Acts25:26 parantu maain ne usake vishay men koi tteek bat naheen pai ki apane svamee ke pas likoo, isaaliye maain use tumhare samhane aur vishosh karake he maharaja aagirppa tere samhane laya hoo, ki janchane ke bad mujhe kuchh likhne ko mile." 
Acts25:27 kyonaki bandhauae ko bhejana aur jo dosh us par lagaae gaa, unhen n batana, mujhe vyarth samajh padta haai.." 
Acts26:1 aagirppa ne paulus se kaha tujhe apane vishay men bolane kee agyaa haai: tab paulus hath baddhakar uttr dene laga, ki," 
Acts26:2 he raja agirppa, jitanee baton ka yahoodee mujh par dosh lagate haai, aj tere samhane un ka uttr dene men maain apane ko dhany samajhta hoon." 
Acts26:3 vishosh karake isaaliye ki too yahoodiyon ke sab vyavaharon aur vivadon ko janata haai, so maain binatee karata hoo, dhaeeraj se meree sun le." 
Acts26:4 jaaisa mera chal chalan arambh se apanee jaati ke beech aur yarooshalem men tha, yah sab yahoodee janate haain." 
Acts26:5 ve yaadi gavahee dena chahate haai, to arambh se mujhe paahichanate haai, ki maain fareesee hokar apane dharma ke sab se khre panth ke anusar chala." 
Acts26:6 aur ab us praatigyaa kee asha ke karan jo parameshvar ne hamare bapadadon se kee thee, mujh par mukama chal raha haai." 
Acts26:7 usee pratigyaa ke poore hone kee asha lagaae hua, hamare barahon gotra apane sare man se rat din parameshvar kee seva karate aae haain: he raja, isee asha ke vishay men yahoodee mujh par dosh lagate haain." 
Acts26:8 jab ki parameshvar mare huon ko jilata haai, to tumhare yahan yah bat kyon vishvas ke yogy naheen samajhee jatee?" 
Acts26:9 maain ne bhee samajha tha ki yeeshu nasaree ke nam ke virodha men mujhe bahut kuchh karana chahiae. 
Acts26:10 aur maain ne yarooshalem men aeesa hee kiya aur mahayajakon se aadhaikar pakar bahut se paavitra logon ko bandeegrah men dal, aur jab ve mar dale jate the, to maain bhee un ke virodha men apanee sampati deta tha." 
Acts26:11 aur har aradhanalay men maain unhen tadna dila dilakar yeeshu kee ninda karavata tha, yahan tak ki krodha ke mare aeesa pagal ho gaya, ki bahar ke nagaron men bhee jakar unhen satata tha." 
Acts26:12 isee dhaun men jab maain mahayajakon se adhaikar aur paravana lekar daamishk ko ja raha tha. 
Acts26:13 to he raja, marga men dopahar ke samay maain ne akash se soorya ke tej se bhee baddhkar aek jyoti apane aur apane sath chalanevalon ke charon or chamakatee hui dekhee." 
Acts26:14 aur jab ham sab boomi par gir pade, to maain ne ibraanee bhasha me, mujh se yah kahate huae yah shabd suna, ki he shaaul, he shaaul, too mujhe kyon satata haai? paaine par lat marana tere liye kaattnai haai." 
Acts26:15 maain ne kaha, he prabhu too kaun haai? prabhu ne kaha, maain yeeshu hoon: jise too satata haai." 
Acts26:16 parantu too ut, apane panvon par khda ho kyonaki maain ne tujhe isaaliye darshan diya haai, ki tujhe un baton par bhee sevak aur gavah ttharau, jo too ne dekhee haai, aur un ka bhee jin ke liye maain tujhe darshan doonga." 
Acts26:17 aur maain tujhe tere logon se aur anyajatiyon se bachata rahoonga, jin ke pas maain ab tujhe isaaliye bhejata hoon." 
Acts26:18 ki too un kee ankhe khole, ki ve andhakar se jyoti kee or, aur shautan ke adhaikar se parameshvar kee or firen ki papon kee kshama, aur un logon ke sath jo mujh par vishvas karane se pavitra kiae gaae haai, meeras paaen." 
Acts26:19 so he raja agirppa, maain ne us svargeey darshan kee bat n ttalee." 
Acts26:20 parantu pahile daamishk ke, fir yarooshalem ke rahanevalon ko, tab yahoodiya ke sare desh men aur anyajatiyon ko samajhata raha, ki man firao aur parameshvar kee or fir kar man firav ke yogy kam karo." 
Acts26:21 in baton ke karan yahoodee mujhe maandair men pakadke mar dalane ka yatan karate the. 
Acts26:22 so parameshvar kee sahayata se maain aj tak bana hoon aur chhotte bade sabhee ke samhane gavahee deta hoon aur un baton ko chhod kuchh naheen kahata, jo bhavishyadvktaon aur moosa ne bhee kaha ki honevalee haain." 
Acts26:23 ki maseeh ko dukh uttana hoga, aur vahee sab se paahile mare huon men se jee uttkar, hamare logon men aur anyajatiyon men jyoti ka prachar karega.." 
Acts26:24 jab vah is reeati se uttr de raha tha, to faestus ne unche shabd se kaha he paulus, too pagal haai: bahut vidha ne tujhe pagal kar diya haai." 
Acts26:25 parantu us ne kaha he mahapratapee faestus, maain pagal nahee, parantu sachchai aur buddh ikee baten kahata hoon." 
Acts26:26 raja bhee jis ke samhane maain nidr hokar bol raha hoo, ye baten janata haai, aur mujhe prateeti haai, ki in baton men se koi us se chhpaiee nahee, kyonki us ghattna to kone men naheen hui." 
Acts26:27 he raja agirppa, kya too bhvishyadvktaon kee prateeati karata haai? ha, maain janata hoo, ki too prateeati karata haai." 
Acts26:28 ab aagirppa ne paulus se kaha too thode hee samajhane se mujhe maseehee banana chahata haai? 
Acts26:29 paulus ne kaha, parameshvar se meree praarthna yah haai ki kya thode me, kya bahut me, keval too hee nahee, parantu jitane log aj meree sunate haai, in bandhanon ko chhod ve mere saman ho jaaen.." 
Acts26:30 tab raja aur hakim aur biraneeke aur un ke sath baaittnevale utt khde hue. 
Acts26:31 aur alag jakar apas men kahane lage, yah manushy aeesa to kuchh naheen karata, jo mratyu ya bandhan ke yogy ho." 
Acts26:32 aagirppa ne faestus se kaha yadi yah manushy kaaisar kee dohai n deta, to doott sakata tha.." 
Acts27:1 jab yah ttharaya gaya, ki ham jahaj par italiya ko jaae, to unhon ne paulus aur kitane aur bandhauon ko bhee yooliyus nam augustus kee palattn ke aek soobedar ke hath saunp diya." 
Acts27:2 aur adramuatiayum ke aek jahaj par jo aasiya ke kinare kee jagahon men jane par tha, chaddhkar ham ne use khol diya, aur aaristarkhus nam thaissaluneeke ka aek maakidoonee hamare sath tha." 
Acts27:3 doosare din ham ne saaida men langar dala aur yooliyus ne paulus par krapa karake use mitraen ke yahan jane diya ki usaka satkar kiya jaae. 
Acts27:4 vahan se jahaj kholakar hava virooddh hone ke karan ham kupraus kee ad men hokar chale. 
Acts27:5 aur kilikiya aur panfooliya ke nikatt ke samudra men hokar loosiya ke moora men utare. 
Acts27:6 vahan soobedar ko sikandaariya ka aek jahaj itaaliya jata hua mila, aur us ne hamen us par chaddha diya." 
Acts27:7 aur jab ham bahut dinon tak dhaeere dhaeere chalakar kaattnaita se kaanidus ke samhane pahunche, to isaliye ki hava hamen age baddhne n detee thee, salamone ke samhane se hokar krete kee ad men chale." 
Acts27:8 aur usake kinare kinare kattnaita se chalakar shuubh langarabaree nam aek jagah pahunche, jahan se lasaya nagar nikatt tha.." 
Acts27:9 jab bahut din beet gaa, aur jal yatra men jakhaim isaaliye hotee thee ki upavas ke din ab beet chuke the, to paulus ne unhen yah kahakar samajhaya." 
Acts27:10 ki he sajjano mujhe aeesa jan padta haai, ki is yatra men bipaati aur bahut haani n keval mal aur jahaj kee baran hamare praanon kee bhee honevalee haai." 
Acts27:11 parantu soobedar ne paulus kee baton se manjhee aur jahaj ke svamee kee baddhkar manee. 
Acts27:12 aur vah bandar sthan jada kattne ke liye achchha n tha isaaliye bahuton ka vichar hua, ki vahan se jahaj kholakar yadi kisee reeati se ho sake, to faeeaniks men pahunchakar jada katten: yah to krete ka aek bandar sthan haai jo daakkhiana-pachchhim aur uttra-pachchhim kee or khulata haai." 
Acts27:13 jab kuchh kuchh daakkhianee hava bahane lagee, to yah samajhkar ki hamara matalab poora ho gaya, langar uttaya aur kinara dhare huae krete ke pas se jane lage." 
Acts27:14 parantu thodee der men vahan se aek badee andhaee uttee, jo yoorakuleen kahalatee haai." 
Acts27:15 jab yah jahaj par lagee, tab vah hava ke samhane tthar n saka, so ham ne use bahane diya, aur isee tarah bahate huae chale gaae." 
Acts27:16 tab kauda nam aek chhotte se ttapoo kee ad men bahate bahate ham kaattnaita se dongee ko vash me kar sake. 
Acts27:17 mallahon ne use uttakar, anek upay karake jahaj ko neeche se bandha, aur suraatis ke chorabaloo par ttkai jane ke bhy se pal aur saman utar kar, bahate huae chale gaae." 
Acts27:18 aur jab ham ne andhaee se bahut hichakole aur dhakke khaa, to doosare din ve jahaj ka mal faenkane lage. aur teesare din unhon ne apane hathon se jahaj ka saman faenk diya." 
Acts27:19 aur teesare din unhon ne apane hathon se jahaj ka saman faenk diya. 
Acts27:20 aur jab bahut dien tak n soorya n tare dikhai dia, aur badee andhaee chal rahee thee, to ant men hamare bachane kee saree asha jatee rahee." 
Acts27:21 jab ve bahut upavas kar chuke, to paulus ne un ke beech men khda hokar kaha he logo, chaahiae tha ki tum meree bat manakar, krete se n jahaj kholate aur n yah bipat aur haati uttate." 
Acts27:22 parantu ab maain tumhen samajhata hoo, ki ddhaddhs bandhae kyonaki tum men se kisee ke praan kee hani n hogee, keval jahaj kee." 
Acts27:23 kyonaki parameshvar jis ka maain hoo, aur jis kee seva karata hoo, usake svargadoot ne aj rat mere pas akar kaha." 
Acts27:24 he paulus, mat dra tujhe kaaisar ke samhane khda hona avashy haai: aur dek, parameshvar ne sab ko jo tere sath yatra karate haai, tujhe diya haai." 
Acts27:25 isaliye, he sajjanon ddhaddhs bandhaen kyonki maain parameshvar kee prateeti karata hoo, ki jaaisa mujh se kaha gaya haai, vaaisa hee hoga." 
Acts27:26 parantu hamen kisee ttapoo par ja ttkaina hoga.. 
Acts27:27 jab chaudahaveen rat hui, aur ham aadirya samudra men ttkarate firate the, to adhaee rat ke nikatt mallahon ne attkal se jana, ki ham kisee desh ke nikatt pahunch rahe haain." 
Acts27:28 aur thah lekar unhon ne bees purasa gahara paya aur thoda age baddhkar fir thah lee, to pandrah purasa paya." 
Acts27:29 tab patthreelee jagahon par padne ke dr se unhon ne jahaj kee pichhadee char langar dale, aur bhor ka hona manate rahe." 
Acts27:30 parantu jab mallah jahaj par se bhagana chahate the, aur galahee se langar dalane ke bahane dongee samudra men utar dee." 
Acts27:31 to paulus ne soobedar aur sipaahiyon se kaha yadi ye jahaj par n rahe, to tum naheen bach sakate." 
Acts27:32 tab sipaahiyon ne rasse kattkar dongee gira do. 
Acts27:33 jab bhor hone par tha, to paulus ne yah kahake, sab ko bhojan karane ko samajhaya, ki aj chaudah din huae ki tum as dekhte dekhte bookhe rahe, aur kuchh bhojan n kiya." 
Acts27:34 isaliye tumhen samajhata hoon ki kuchh kha lo, jis se tumhara bachav ho kyonki tum men se kisee ke sir par aek bal bhee n girega." 
Acts27:35 aur yah kahakar us ne rottee lekar sab ke samhane parameshvar ka dhanyavad kiya aur todkar khane laga. 
Acts27:36 tab ve sab bhee ddhaddhs bandhakar bhojan karane lage. 
Acts27:37 ham sab milakar jahaj par do sau chhhaittr jan the. 
Acts27:38 jab ve bhojan karake trapt hua, to genhoo ko samudra men faenk kar jahaj halka karane lage." 
Acts27:39 jab bihan hua, to unhon ne us desh ko naheen pahichana, parantu aek khadee dekhee jis ka chauras kinara tha, aur vichar kiya, ki yadi ho sake, to isee par jahaj ko ttkaiaaen." 
Acts27:40 tab unhon ne langaron ko kholakar samudra men chhod diya aur usee samay patavaron ke bandhan khol dia, aur hava ke samhane agala pal chaddhakar kinare kee or chale." 
Acts27:41 parantu do samudra ke sangam kee jagah padkar unhon ne jahaj ko ttkaiaya, aur galahee to dhakka khakar gad gai, aur ttl n sakee parantu pichhadee laharon ke bal se toottne lagee." 
Acts27:42 tab sipaahiyon ko vichar hua, ki bandhauon ko mar dalen aeesa n ho, ki koi taairake nikal bhage." 
Acts27:43 parantu soobedar ne paulus ko bachane ko ichchha se unhen is vichar se roka, aur yah kaha, ki jo taair sakate haai, pahile koodakar kinare par nikal jaaen." 
Acts27:44 aur bakee koi pattron par, aur koi jahaj kee aur vastuon ke sahare nikal jaa, aur is reeati se sab koi boomi par bach nikale.." 
Acts28:1 jab ham bach nikale, to jana ki yah ttapoo milite kahalata haai." 
Acts28:2 aur un jangalee logon ne ham par anokhee krapa kee kyonki menh ke karan jo baras raha tha aur jade ke karan unhon ne ag sulagakar ham sab ko ttharaya.
