1Corinthians4:13 ve badana karate haai, ham binatee karate haain: ham aj tak jagat ke koode aur sab vastuon kee khurachan kee nai tthare haain.." 
1Corinthians4:14 maain tumhen lajjait karate ke liye ye baten naheen likhta, parantu apane piry balak janakar unhen chitat hoon." 
1Corinthians4:15 kyeanki yadi maseeh men tumhare sikhanevale das hajar bhee hote, taubhee tumhare pita bahut se nahee, isaaliye ki maseeh yeeshu men susamachar ke dara maain tumhara pita hua." 
1Corinthians4:16 so maain tum se binatee karata hoo, ki meree see chal chalo." 
1Corinthians4:17 isaliye maain ne teemuathaiyus ko jo prabhu men mera piry aur vishvasayogy putra haai, tumhare pas bheja haai, aur vah tumhen maseeh men mera charitra smaran karaaega, jaaise ki maain har jagah har aek kaleeasiya men upadesh karata hoon." 
1Corinthians4:18 kitane to use fool gaae haai, manon maain tumhare pas ane hee ka naheen." 
1Corinthians4:19 uparantu prabhu chahe to maain tumhare pas shaeegha hee aunga, aur un foole huon kee baton ko nahee, parantu un kee samarth ko jan loonga." 
1Corinthians4:20 kyonaki paramashevar ka rajy baton men nahee, parantu samarth men haai." 
1Corinthians4:21 tum kya chahate ho? kya maain chhdee lekar tumhare pas aun ya praem aur namrata kee atma ke sath? 
1Corinthians5:1 yahan tak sunane men ata haai, ki tum men vyaabhaichar hota haai, baran aeesa vyabhaichar jo anyajatiyon men bhee naheen hota, ki aek manushy apane pita kee patnee ko rakhta haai." 
1Corinthians5:2 aur tum shaek to naheen karate, jis se aeesa kam karanevala tumhare beech men se nikala jata, parantu ghamand karate ho." 
1Corinthians5:3 maain to shareer ke bhav se door tha, parantu atma ke bhav se tumhare sath hokar, mano upasthiaati hee dasha men aeese kam karanevale ke vishay men yah agyaa de chuka hoon." 
1Corinthians5:4 ki jab tum, aur meree atma, hamare prabhu yeeshu kee samarth ke sath ikatthe ho, to aeesa manushy, hamare prabhu yeeshu ke nam se." 
1Corinthians5:5 shareer ke vinash ke liye shautan ko saunpa jaa, taki us kee atma prabhu yeeshu ke din men uddhar paae." 
1Corinthians5:6 tumhara ghamand karana achchha naheen kya tum naheen janate, ki thoda sa khmeer poore goondho huae atte ko khmeer kar deta haai." 
1Corinthians5:7 purana khmeer nikal kar, apane ap ko shuuddh karo: ki naya goondha hua atta ban jao taaki tum akhmeeree ho, kyonaki hamara bhee fasah jo maseeh haai, baalidan hua haai." 
1Corinthians5:8 so ao ham utsav men anand manave, n to purane khmeer se aur n burai aur dushttta ke khmeer se, parantu seedhaai aur sachchai kee akhmeeree rottee se.." 
1Corinthians5:9 maain ne apanee patraee men tumhen likha haai, ki vyaabhaichaariyon kee sangaati n karana." 
1Corinthians5:10 yah nahee, ki tum bilakul is jagat ke vyabhaichaariyo, ya lobhaiyo, ya andhor karanevalo, ya mootiapoojakon kee sangaati n karo kyonki is dasha men to tumhen jagat men se nikal jana hee padta." 
1Corinthians5:11 mera kahana yah haai ki yadi koi bhai kahalakar, vyaabhaicharee, ya lobhee, ya mootiapoojak, ya galee denevala, ya piyakkad, ya andhor karanevala ho, to us kee sangati mat karana baran aeese manushy ke sath khana bhee n khana." 
1Corinthians5:12 kyonaki mujhe baharavalon ka nyay karane se kya kama? kya tum bheetaravalon ka nyay naheen karate? 
1Corinthians5:13 parantu baharavalon ka nyay parameshvar karata haai: isaaliye us kukarmee ko apane beech men se nikal do.. 
1Corinthians6:1 kya tum men se kisee ko yah hiyav haai, ki jab doosare ke sath jhgada ho, to faaisale ke liye aadhairmiyon ke pas jaae aur paavitra lagon ke pas n jaae?" 
1Corinthians6:2 kya tum naheen janate, ki pavitra log jagat ka nyay karenge? so jab tumhen jagat ka nyay karana he, to kya tum chhotte se chhotte jhgadon ka bhee nirny karane ke yogy naheen?" 
1Corinthians6:3 kya tum naheen janate, ki ham svargadooton ka nyay karenge? to kya sansarik baton ka nirny karana ho, to kya unheen ko baaittaoge jo kaleeasiya men kuchh naheen samajhe jate haain?" 
1Corinthians6:4 so yaadi tumhen sansarik baton ka nirny karana ho, to kya unheen ko baaittaoge jo kaleeasiya men kuchh naheen samajhe jate haain?" 
1Corinthians6:5 maain tumhen lajjait karane ke liye yah kahata hoon: kya sachamuch tum men se aek bhee buddhmaian naheen milata, jo apane bhaiyon ka nirny kar sake?" 
1Corinthians6:6 baran bhai bhai men mukama hota haai, aur vah bhee aavishvasiyon ke samhane." 
1Corinthians6:7 parantu sachamuch tum men bada dosh to yah haai, ki apas men mukama karate ho: baran anyay kyon naheen sahate? apanee hani kyon naheen sahate?" 
1Corinthians6:8 baran anyay karate aur hani pahunchate ho, aur vah bhee bhaiyon ko." 
1Corinthians6:9 kya tum naheen janate, ki anyayee log parameshvar ke rajy ke varis n honge? dhaekha n khao, n veshyagamee, n mootiapoojak, n parasreegamee, n luchche, n purooshagamee." 
1Corinthians6:10 n chor, n lobhee, n piyakkad, n galee denevale, n andhor karanevale parameshvar ke rajy ke vaaris honge." 
1Corinthians6:11 aur tum men se kitane aeese hee the, parantu tum prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke nam se aur hamare parameshvar ke atma se dhaeae gaa, aur pavitra huae aur dharmee tthare.." 
1Corinthians6:12 sab vastuaen mere liye uchit to haai, parantu sab vastuaen labh kee nahee, sab vastuen mere liye uchit haai, parantu maain kisee bat ke adhaeen n hoonga." 
1Corinthians6:13 bhojan pett ke liye, aur pett bhojan ke liye haai, parantu parameshvar is ko aur us ko donon ko nash karega, parantu deh vyaabhaichar ke liye nahee, baran prabhu ke liye aur prabhu deh ke liye haai." 
1Corinthians6:14 aur parameshvar ne apanee samarth se prabhu ko jilaya, aur hamen bhee jilaaega." 
1Corinthians6:15 kya tum naheen janate, ki tumharee deh maseeh ke ang haain? so kya maain maseeh ke ang lekar unhen veshya ke ang banaun? kadaapi naheen." 
1Corinthians6:16 kya tum naheen janate, ki jo koi veshya se sangaati karata haai, vah usake sath aek tan ho jata haai kyonki vah kahata haai, ki ve donon aek tan honge." 
1Corinthians6:17 aur jo prabhu kee sangati men rahata haai, vah usake sath aek atma ho jata haai." 
1Corinthians6:18 vyabhaichar se bache raho: jitane aur pap manushy karata haai, ve deh ke bahar haai, parantu vyabhaichar karanevala apanee hee deh ke virooddh pap karata haai." 
1Corinthians6:19 kya tum naheen janate, ki tumharee deh paavitraatma ka mandair haai jo tum men basa hua haai aur tumhen parameshvar kee or se mila haai, aur tum apane naheen ho?" 
1Corinthians6:20 kayonaki dam dekar mol liye gaae ho, isaliye apanee deh ke dara parameshvar kee mahima karo.." 
1Corinthians7:1 un baton ke vishay men jo tum ne likhee, yah achchha haai, ki puroosh sree ko n chhue." 
1Corinthians7:2 parantu vyaabhaichar ke dr se har aek puroosh kee patnee, aur har aek satraee ka pati ho." 
1Corinthians7:3 paati apanee patnee ka hakk poora kare aur vaaise hee patnee bhee apane pati ka. 
1Corinthians7:4 patnee ko apanee deh par aadhaikar naheen par usake pati ka adhaikar haai vaaise hee pati ko bhee apanee deh par adhaikar nahee, parantu patnee ko." 
1Corinthians7:5 tum aek doosare se alag n raho parantu keval kuchh samay tak apas kee sammaati se ki praarthna ke liye avakash mile, aur fir aek sath raho, aeesa n ho, ki tumhare asanyam ke karan shautan tumhen parakhe." 
1Corinthians7:6 parantu maain jo yah kahata hoon vah anumati haai n ki agyaa. 
1Corinthians7:7 maain yah chahata hoo, ki jaaisa maain hoo, vaaisa hee sab manushy hon parantu har aek ko parameshvar kee or se vishosh vishosh baradan mile haain kisee ko kisee prakar ka, aur kisee ko kisee aur prakar ka.." 
1Corinthians7:8 parantu maain aavivaahiton aur vidhavaon ke vishay men kahata hoo, ki un ke liye aeesa hee rahana achchha haai, jaaisa maain hoon." 
1Corinthians7:9 parantu yadi ve sanyam n kar sake, to vivah karen kyonaki vivah karana kamatur rahane se bhla haai." 
1Corinthians7:10 jin ka byah ho gaya haai, un ko maain nahee, baran prabhu agyaa deta haai, ki patnee apane pati se alag n ho." 
1Corinthians7:11 aur yaadi alag bhee ho jaa, to bin doosara byah kiae rahe ya apane paati se fir mel kar le aur n paati apanee patnee ko chhode." 
1Corinthians7:12 doosaren se prabhu nahee, parantu maain hee kahata hoo, yadi kisee bhai kee patnee vishvas n rakhtee ho, aur usake sath rahate se prasann ho, to vah use n chhode." 
1Corinthians7:13 aur jis sree ka pati vishvas n rakhta ho, aur usake sath rahane se prasann ho vah paati ko n chhode." 
1Corinthians7:14 kyonaki aeesa paati jo vishvas n rakhta ho, vah patnee ke karan pavitra ttharata haai, aur aeesee patnee jo vishvas naheen rakhtee, paati ke karan paavitra ttharatee haai naheen to tumhare ladkebalen ashuuddh hote, parantu ab to paavitra haain." 
1Corinthians7:15 parantu jo puroosh vishvas naheen rakhta, yaadi vah alag ho, to alag hone do, aeesee dasha men koi bhai ya baahin bandhan men naheen parantu parameshvar ne to hamen mel milap ke liye bulaya haai." 
1Corinthians7:16 kyonaki he sre, too kya janatee haai, ki tum apane pati ka uddhar kara le? aur he puroosha, too kya janata haai ki too apanee patnee ka uddhar kara le?" 
1Corinthians7:17 par jausa prabhu ne har aek ko bantta haai, aur parameshvar ne har aek ko bulaya haai vaaisa hee vah chale: aur maain sab kaleesiyaon men aeesa hee ttharatah hoon." 
1Corinthians7:18 jo khtana kiya hu bulaya gaya ho, vah khtanaraahit n bane: jo khtanaraahit bulaya gaya ho, vah khtana n karaae." 
1Corinthians7:19 n khtana kuchh haai, aur n khtanaraahit parantu parameshvar kee agyaaon ko manana hee sab kuchh haai." 
1Corinthians7:20 har aek jan jis dasha men bulaya gaya ho, usee men rahe." 
1Corinthians7:21 yaadi too das kee dasha men bulaya gaya ho to chinta n kara parantu yaadi too svatantra ho sake, to aeesa hee kam kara." 
1Corinthians7:22 kyonaki jo das kee dasha men prabhu men bulaya gaya haai, vah prabhu ka svatantra kiya hua haai: aur vaaise hee jo svatantrata kee dasha men bulaya gaya haai, vah maseeh ka das haai." 
1Corinthians7:23 tum dam dekar mol liye gaae ho, manushyon ke das n bano." 
1Corinthians7:24 he bhaiyo, jo koi jis dasha men bulaya gaya ho, vah usee men parameshvar ke sath rahe.." 
1Corinthians7:25 kunvaariyon ke vishay men prabhu kee koi agyaa mujhe naheen milee, parantu vishvasayogy hone ke liye jaaisee daya prabhu ne mujh par kee haai, usee ke anusar sammaati deta hoon." 
1Corinthians7:26 so meree samajh men yah achchha haai, ki ajakal klesh ke karan manushy jaaisa haai, vaaisa hee rahe." 
1Corinthians7:27 yaadi tere patnee haai, to us se alag hone ka yatn n kara: aur yaadi tere patnee nahee, to patnee kee khoj n kara:" 
1Corinthians7:28 parantu yadi too byah bhee kare, to pap naheen aur yadi kunvaree byahee jaae to koi pap naheen parantu aeeson ko shaareearik dukh hoga, aur maain bachana chahata hoon." 
1Corinthians7:29 he bhaiyo, maain yah kahata hoo, ki samay kam kiya gaya haai, isaliye chaahiae ki jin ke patnee ho, ve aeese hon mano un ke patnee naheen." 
1Corinthians7:30 aur ronevale aeese ho, mano rote naheen aur anand karanevale aeese ho, mano anand naheen karate aur mol lenevale aese ho, ki mano un ke pas kuchh haai naheen." 
1Corinthians7:31 aur is sansar ke baratanevale aeese ho, ki sansar hee ke n ho len kyonki is sansar kee reeti aur vyavahar badalate jate haain." 
1Corinthians7:32 so maain yah chahata hoo, ki tumhen chinta n ho: aavivaahit puroosh prabhu kee baton kee chinta men rahata haai, ki prabhu ko kyonkar prasann rakhe." 
1Corinthians7:33 parantu vivaahit manushy sansar kee baton kee chinta men rahata haai, ki apanee patnee ko kis reeti se prasann rakhe." 
1Corinthians7:34 vivaahita aur aavivaahita men bhee bhed haai: avivaahita prabhu kee chinta men rahatee haai, ki vah deh aur atma donon men paavitra ho, parantu vivaahita sansar kee chinta men rahatee haai, ki apane pati ko prasann rakhe." 
1Corinthians7:35 yah bat tumhare hee labh ke liye kahata hoo, n ki tumhen fansane ke liye, baran isaaliye ki jaaisa sohata haai, vaaisa hee kiya jaae ki tum aek chitt hokar prabhu kee seva men lage raho." 
1Corinthians7:36 aur yaadi koi yah samajhe, ki maain apanee us kunvaree ka hakk man raha hoo, jis kee javanee ddhl chalee haai, aur prayojan bhee hoa, to jaaisa chahe, vaaisa kare, is men pap nahee, vah usaka byah hone de." 
1Corinthians7:37 parantu jo man men draddh rahata haai, aur us ko prayojan n ho, baran apanee ichchha pooree karane men adhaikar rakhta ho, aur apane man men yah bat ttan lee ho, ki maain apanee kunvaree ladkee ko bin byahee rakoonga, vah achchha karata haai." 
1Corinthians7:38 so jo apanee kunvaree ka byah kar deta haai, vah achchha karata haai aur jo byah naheen kar deta, vah aur bhee achchha karata haai." 
1Corinthians7:39 jab tak kisee sree ka paati jeevit rahata haai, tab tak vah us se bandhaee hui haai, parantu jab usaka pati mar jaa, to jis se chahe vivah kar sakatee haai, parantu keval prabhu men." 
1Corinthians7:40 paranatu jesee haai yaadi vaaisee hee rahe, to mere vichar men aur bhee dhany haai, aur maain samajhta hoo, ki parameshvar ka atma mujh men bhee haai.." 
1Corinthians8:1 ab mooraton ke samhane baali kee hui vastuon ke vishay men ham janate haai, ki ham sab ko gyaan haai: gyaan ghamand utpann karata haai, parantu praem se unnaati hotee haai." 
1Corinthians8:2 yaadi koi samajhe, ki maain kuchh janata hoo, to jaaisa janana chahiae vaaisa ab tak naheen janata." 
1Corinthians8:3 parantu yadi koi parameshvar se praem rakhta haai, to use parameshvar pahichanata haai." 
1Corinthians8:4 so mooraton ke samhane baali kee hui vastuon ke khane ke vishay men ham janate haai, ki moorat jagat men koi vastu nahee, aur aek ko chhod aur koi parameshvar naheen." 
1Corinthians8:5 yadhypi akash men aur prathvee par bahut se ishvar kahalate haai, jaaisa ki bahut se ishvar or bahut se prabhu haain." 
1Corinthians8:6 taubhee hamare nikatt to aek hee parameshvar haai: arthata pita jis kee or se sab vastuen haai, aur ham usee ke liye haai, aur aek hee prabhu haai, arthata yeeshu maseeh jis ke dara sab vastuaen hui, aur ham bhee usee ke dara haain." 
1Corinthians8:7 parantu sab ko yah gyaan nahee parantu kitane to ab tak moorat ko kuchh samajhne ke karan mooraton ke samhane bali kee hui ko kuchh vastu samajhkar khate haai, aur un ka vivek nirbal hokar ashuuddh hota haai." 
1Corinthians8:8 bhejan hamen parameshvar ke nikatt naheen pahunchata, yadi ham n khana, to hamaree kuchh haani nahee, aur yadi khaae, to kuchh labh naheen." 
1Corinthians8:9 parantu chaukas raho, aeesa n ho, ki tumharee yah svatantrata kaheen nirbalon ke liye ttokar ka karan ho jaae." 
1Corinthians8:10 kyeanki yadi koi tujh gyaanee ko moorat ke mandair men bhojan karate dekhe, aur vah nirbal jan ho, to kya usake vivek men moorat ke samhane bali kee hui vastu ke khane ka hiyav n ho jaaega." 
1Corinthians8:11 is reeati se tere gyaan ke karan vah nirbal bhai jis ke liye maseeh mara nash ho jaaega. 
1Corinthians8:12 so bhaiyon ka aparadha karane se or un ke nirbal vivek ko chott dene se tum maseeh ka aparadha karate ho. 
1Corinthians8:13 is karan yadi bhojan mere bhai ko ttokar khailaa, to maain kabhee kisee reeati se mans n khaunga, n ho ki maain apane bhai ke ttokar ka karan banoon." 
1Corinthians9:1 kya maain svatantra naheen? kya maain praarit naheen? kya maain ne yeeshu ko jo hamara prabhu haai, naheen dekha, kya tum prabhu men mere banaae huae naheen?" 
1Corinthians9:2 yaadi maain auron ke liye praerit nahee, taubhee tumhare liye to hoon kyonaki tum prabhu men meree praearitai par chhap ho." 
1Corinthians9:3 jo mujhe janchate haai, un ke liye yeeh mera uttr haai." 
1Corinthians9:4 kya hamen khane-peene ka aadhaikar naheen? 
1Corinthians9:5 kya hamen yah aadhaikar nahee, ki kisee maseehee baahin ko byah kar ke liae fire, jaaisa aur praearit aur prabhu ke bhai aur kaaifaa karate haain?" 
1Corinthians9:6 ya keval mujhe aur baranabas ko adhaikar naheen ki kamai karana chhoden. 
1Corinthians9:7 kaun kabhee apanee girah se khakar sipahee ka kam karata haai: kaun dakh kee baree lagakar usaka fal naheen khata? kaun bhedon kee rakhvalee karake un ka doodha naheen peeta? 
1Corinthians9:8 kya maain ye baten manushy hee kee reeti par bolata hoon? 
1Corinthians9:9 kya vyavastha bhee yahee naheen kahatee? kyonki moosa kee vyavastha men likha haai ki danae men chalate huae baail ka munh n bandhana: kya parameshvar baailon hee kee chinta karata haai? ya vishosh karake hamare liye kahata haai. 
1Corinthians9:10 ha, hamare liye hee likha gaya, kyonki uchit haai, ki jatanevala asha se jote, aur davanevala bhagee hone kee asha se davanee kare." 
1Corinthians9:11 so jab ki ham ne tumhare liye aatmaik vastuen boi, to kya yah koi badee bat haai, ki tumharee shaareearik vastuon kee fasal katten." 
1Corinthians9:12 jab auron ka tum par yah adhaikar haai, to kya hamara is se aadhaik n hoga? parantu ham yah aadhaikar kam men naheen laae parantu sab kuchh sahate haai, ki hamare dara maseeh ke susamachar kee kuchh rok n ho." 
1Corinthians9:13 kya tum naheen janate ki jo pavitra vastuon kee seva karate haai, ve mandair men se khate haain aur jo vedee kee seva karate haain ve vedee ke sath bhagee hote haain?" 
1Corinthians9:14 isee reeti se prabhu ne bhee ttharaya, ki jo log susamachar sunate haai, un kee jeevika susamachar se ho." 
1Corinthians9:15 parantu maain in men se koi bhee bat kam men n laya, aur maain ne to ye baten isaaliye naheen likhee, ki mere liye aeesa kiya jaa, kyonaki is se to mera marana hee bhla haai ki koi mera ghamand vyarth ttharaae." 
1Corinthians9:16 aur yaadi maain susamachar sunau, to mera kuchh ghamand naheen kyonaki yah to mere liye avashy haai aur yadi maain susamachar n sunau, to mujh par haya." 
1Corinthians9:17 kyonaki yadi apanee ichchha se yah karata hoo, to majadooree mujhe milatee haai, aur yaadi apanee ichchha se naheen karata, taubhee bhndareepan mujhe saunpa gaya haai." 
1Corinthians9:18 so meree kaun see majadooree haai? yah ki susamachar sunane men maain maseeh ka susamachar sent ment kar doon yahan tak ki susamachar men jo mera adhaikar haai, us ko maain pooree reeati se kam men laun." 
1Corinthians9:19 kyonaki sab se svatantra hone par bhee maain ne apane ap ko sab ka das bana diya haai ki adhaik logon ko kheench laun. 
1Corinthians9:20 maain yahoodiyon ke liye yahoodee bana ki yahoodiyon ko kheench lau, jo log vyavastha ke adhaeen haain un ke liye maain vyavastha ke adhaeen n hone par bhee vyavastha ke adhaeen bana, ki unhen jo vyavastha ke adhaeen haai, kheench laun." 
1Corinthians9:21 vyavasthaheenon ke liye maain jo parameshvar kee vyavastha se heen nahee, parantu maseeh kee vyavastha ke adhaeen hoon vyavasthaheen sa bana, ki vyavasthaheenon ko kheench laun." 
1Corinthians9:22 maain nirbalon ke liye nirbal sa bana, ki nirbalon ko kheench lau, maain sab manushyon ke liye sab kuchh bana hoo, ki kisee n kisee reeati se kai aek ka uddhar karaun." 
1Corinthians9:23 aur maain sab kuchh susamachar ke liye karata hoo, ki auron ke sath usaka bhagee ho jaun." 
1Corinthians9:24 kya tum naheen janate, ki daud men to chhaudte sab hee haai, parantu inam aek hee le jata haai? tum vaaise hee daudo, ki jeeto." 
1Corinthians9:25 aur har aek pahalavan sab prakar ka sanyam karata haai, ve to aek murajhanevale mukutt ko pane ke liye yah sab karate haai, parantu ham to us mukutt ke liye karate haai, jo murajhane ka naheen." 
1Corinthians9:26 isaliye maain to isee reeati se daudta hoo, parantu beattkaiane nahee, maain bhee isee reeti se mukkon se ladta hoo, parantu us kee nain naheen jo hava peettta hua ladta haai." 
1Corinthians9:27 paranatu maain apanee deh ko marata koottta, aur vash men lata hoon aeesa n ho ki auron ko prachar karake, maain ap hee kisee reeati se nikamma ttharoon.." 
1Corinthians10:1 he bhaiyo, maain naheen chahata, ki tum is bat se agyaat raho, ki hamare sab bapadade badal ke neeche the, aur sab ke sab samudra ke beech se par ho gaae." 
1Corinthians10:2 aur sab ne badal me, aur samudra me, moosa ka bapitisma liya." 
1Corinthians10:3 aur sab ne aek hee aatmaik bhojan kiya. 
1Corinthians10:4 aur sab ne aek hee aatmaik jal peeya, kyonaki ve us atmaik chattan se peete the, jo un ke sath-sath chalatee thee aur vah chattan maseeh tha." 
1Corinthians10:5 parantu parameshvar un men ke bahuteron se prasann n hua, isaliye ve jangal men ddher ho gaae." 
1Corinthians10:6 ye baten hamare liye drashttant ttharee, ki jaaise unhon ne lalach kiya, vaaise ham buree vastuon ka lalach n karen." 
1Corinthians10:7 aur n tum moorat poojanevale banon jaaise ki un men se kitane ban gaae the, jaaisa likha haai, ki log khane-peene baaitte, aur khelane-koodane utte." 
1Corinthians10:8 aur n ham vyaabhaichar karen jaaisa un men se kitanon ne kiya: aek din men teis hajar mar gaye. 
1Corinthians10:9 aur n ham prabhu ko parakhen jaaisa un men se kitanon ne kiya, aur sanpon ke dara nash kiae gaae." 
1Corinthians10:10 aur natum kudkudaa, jis reeti se un men se kitane kudkudaa, aur nash karanevale ke dara nash kiae gaae." 
1Corinthians10:11 parantu ye sab bate, jo un par padee, drashttant kee reeati par bhee: aur ve hamaree chitavanee ke liye jo jagat ke antaim samay men rahate haain likhee gain haain." 
1Corinthians10:12 isaliye jo samajhta haai, ki maain sthiar hoo, vah chaukas rahe ki kaheen gir n paden." 
1Corinthians10:13 tum kisee aeesee pareeksha men naheen pade, jo manushy ke sahane se bahar haai: aur parameshvar sachcha haai: vah tumhen samarth se bahar pareeksha men n padne dega, baran pareeksha ke sath nikas bhee karega ki tum sah sako.." 
1Corinthians10:14 is kara, he mere pyaron mootira pooja se bache raho." 
1Corinthians10:15 maain buddhmaian janakar, tum se kahata hoon: jo maain kahata hoo, use tum parakho." 
1Corinthians10:16 vah dhanyavad ka kattora, jis par ham dhanyavad karate haai, kya maseeh ke lohoo kee sahabhaagita naheen? vah rottee jise ham todte haai, kya maseeh kee deh kee sahabhagita naheen?" 
1Corinthians10:17 isaliye, ki aek hee rottee haai so ham bhee jo bahut haai, aek deh haain: kyonki ham sab usee aek rottee men bhagee hote haain." 
1Corinthians10:18 jo shareer ke bhav se israelee haai, un ko dekho: kya balidanon ke khanevale vedee ke sahabhagee naheen?" 
1Corinthians10:19 fir maain kya kahata hoon? kya yah ki moorat ka balidan kuchh haai, ya moorat kuchh haai?" 
1Corinthians10:20 nahee, baran yah, ki anyajaati jo balidan karate haai, ve parameshvar ke liye nahee, parantu dushttatmaon ke liye baalidan karate haain: aur maain naheen chahata, ki tum dushttatmaon ke sahabhagee ho." 
1Corinthians10:21 tum prabhu ke kattore, aur dushttatmaon ke kattore danon men se naheen pee sakate! tum prabhu kee mej aur dushttatmaon kee mej danon ke sajhee naheen ho sakate." 
1Corinthians10:22 kya ham prabhu ko ris dilate haain? kya ham us se shaaktaiman haain? 
1Corinthians10:23 sab vastuaen mere liye uchit to haai, parantu sab labh kee naheen: sab vastuaen mere liye uchit to haai, parantu sab vastuon se unnait naheen." 
1Corinthians10:24 koi apanee hee bhlai ko n ddoonddhe, baran auron kee." 
1Corinthians10:25 jo kuchh kassaiyon ke yahan bikata haai, vah khao aur vivek ke karan kuchh n poochho." 
1Corinthians10:26 kyoki prathvee aur usakee bhrapooree prabhu kee haai. 
1Corinthians10:27 aur yaadi avishvayien men se koi tumhen nevata de, aur tum jana chaho, to jo kuchh tumhare samhane rakha jaae vahee khao: aur vivek ke karan kuchh n poochho." 
1Corinthians10:28 parantu yadi koi tum se kahe, yah to moorat ko bali kee hui vastu haai, to usee batanevale ke kara, aur vivek ke karan n khao." 
1Corinthians10:29 mera matalab, tera vivek nahee, parantu us doosare ka. bhla, meree svatantrata doosare ke vichar se kyon parakhee jaae:" 
1Corinthians10:30 yaadi maain dhanyavad karake sajhee hota hoo, to jis par maain dhanyavad karata hoo, usake karan meree badanameen kyon hotee haai?" 
1Corinthians10:31 so tum chahe khao, chahe peeo, chahe jo kuchh karo, sab kuchh parameshvar kee maheema ke liye karo." 
1Corinthians10:32 tum n yahoodiyo, n yoonaaniyo, aur n parameshvar kee kaleesiya ke liye ttokar ka karan bano." 
1Corinthians10:33 jaaisa maain bhee sab baton men sab ko prasann rakhta hoo, aur apana nahee, parantu bahuton ka labh ddoonddhta hoo, ki ve uddhar paaen." 
1Corinthians11:1 tum meree see chal chalo jaaisa maain maseeh kee see chal chalata hoon.. 
1Corinthians11:2 he bhaiyo, maain tumhen sarahata hoo, ki sab baton men tum mujhe smaran karate ho: aur jo vyavahar maain ne tumhen saunp diae haai, unhen dhaaran karate ho." 
1Corinthians11:3 so maain chahata hoo, ki tum yah jan lo, ki har aek puroosh ka sir maseeh haai: aur sree ka sir puroosh haai: aur maseeh ka sir parameshvar haai." 
1Corinthians11:4 jo puroosh sir ddhanke huae praarthna ya bhvishyadanee karata haai, vah apane sir ka apaman karata haai." 
1Corinthians11:5 parantu jo sree ughaade sir praarthna ya bhavishyadvvanee karatee haai, vah apane sir ka apaman karatee haai, kyonaki vah mundee hone ke barabar haai." 
1Corinthians11:6 yaadi sree addhnee n oddhe, to bal bhee katta le yaadi sree ke liye bal kattana ya mundana lajja kee bat haai, to oddhnee oddhe." 
1Corinthians11:7 han puroosh ko apana sir ddhankana uchit hanee, kyonki vah parameshvar ka svaroop aur mahima haai parantu sree puroosh kee maahima!" 
1Corinthians11:8 kyonaki puroosh sree se naheen hua, parantu sree se hui haai." 
1Corinthians11:9 aur puroosh sree ke liye naheen siraja gaya, parantu sree puroosh ke liye sirajee gai haai." 
1Corinthians11:10 iseeliye svargadooton ke karan sree ko uchit haai, ki adhaikar apane sir par rakhe." 
1Corinthians11:11 taubhee prabhu men n to sree bina puroosh aur n puroosh bina sree ke haai. 
1Corinthians11:12 kyonaki jaaise sree puroosh se haai, vaaise hee puroosh sree ke dara haai parantu sab vastuen parameshvar ke dara haain." 
1Corinthians11:13 tum ap hee vichar karo, kya sree ko ughaade sir parameshvar se praarthna karana sohana haai?" 
1Corinthians11:14 kya svaabhaivik reeti se bhee tum naheen janate, ki yadi puroosh lambe bal rakhe, to usake liye apaman haai." 
1Corinthians11:15 parantu yadi sree lambe bal rakhe to usake liye shaebha haai kyonaki bal us ko oddhnee ke liye diae gaae haain. 
1Corinthians11:16 paranatu yadi koi vivad karana chahe, to yah jane ki n hamaree aur n parameshvar kee kaleeasiyon kee aeesee reeti haai.." 
1Corinthians11:17 paranatu yah agyaa dete hua, maain tumhen naheen sarahata, isaliye ki tumhare ikatthe hone se bhlai nahee, parantu haani hotee haai." 
1Corinthians11:18 kyonaki pahile to maain yah sunata hoo, ki jab tum kaleeasiya men ikatthe hate ho, to tum men foott hotee haai aur maain kuchh kuchh prateeti bhee karata hoon." 
1Corinthians11:19 kyanaki vidharma bhee tum men avashy honge, isaaliye ki jo lage tum men khre nikale haai, ve pragatt ho janae." 
1Corinthians11:20 so tum jo aek jagah men ikatthe hote ho to yah prabhu bhoj khane ke liye naheen. 
1Corinthians11:21 kyonaki khane ke samay aek doosare se paahile apana bhoj kha leta haai, so koi to bookha rahata haai, aur koi matavala ho jata haai." 
1Corinthians11:22 kya khane peene ke liye tumhare ghar naheen? ya parameshvar kee kaleeasiya ko tuchchh janate ho, aur jin ke pas naheen haai unhen laajjait karate ho? maain tum se kya kahoon? kya is bat men tumharee prashansa karoon? maain prashansa naheen karata." 
1Corinthians11:23 kyonaki yah bat mujhe prabhu se pahunchee, aur maain ne tumhen bhee pahuncha dee ki prabhu yeeshu ne jis rat pakadvaya gaya rottee lee." 
1Corinthians11:24 aur dhanyavad karake use todee, aur kaha ki yah meree deh haai, jo tumhare liye haai: mere smaran ke liye yahee kiya karo." 
1Corinthians11:25 isee reeti se us ne biyaree ke peechhe kattora bhee liya, aur kaha yah kattora mere lohoo men nai vacha haai: jab kabhee peeo, to mere smaran ke liye yahee kiya karo." 
1Corinthians11:26 kyonaki jab kabhee tum yah rottee khate, aur is kattore men se peete ho, to prabhu kee mratyu ko jab tak vah n aa, prachar karate ho." 
1Corinthians11:27 isaliye jo koi anuachit reeti se prabhu kee rottee khaa, ya usake kattore men se peea, vah prabhu kee deh aur lohoo ka aparadhaee ttharega." 
1Corinthians11:28 isaliye manushy apane ap ko janch le aur isee reeati se is rottee men se khaa, aur is kattore men se peeae." 
1Corinthians11:29 kyeanki jo khate-peete samay prabhu kee deh ko n paahichane, vah is khane aur peene se apane upar dand lata haai." 
1Corinthians11:30 isee karan tum men se bahut se nirbal aur rogee haai, aur bahut se so bhee gaae." 
1Corinthians11:31 yaadi ham apane ap men janchate, to dand n pate." 
1Corinthians11:32 parantu prabhu hamen dand dekar hamaree tadna karata haai isaliye ki ham sansar ke sath doshaee n ttharen. 
1Corinthians11:33 isaliye, he mere bhaiyo, jab tum khane ke liye ikatthe hote ho, to aek doosare ke liye tthara karo." 
1Corinthians11:34 yaadi koi bookha ho, to apane ghar men kha le jis se tumhar ikattha hona dand ka karan n ho: aur shosh baton ko maain akar tteek kar doonga.." 
1Corinthians12:1 he bhaiyo, maain naheen chahata ki tum atmaik baradanon ke vishay men agyaat raho." 
1Corinthians12:2 tum janate ho, ki jab tum anyajaati the, to goongee mooraton ke peechhe jese chalaae jate the vaaise chalate the." 
1Corinthians12:3 isaliye maain tumhen chitaunee deta hoon ki jo koi parameshvar kee atma kee aguai se bolata haai, vah naheen kahata ki yeeshu srapit haai aur n koi paavitra atma ke bina kah sakata haai ki yeeshu prabhu haai.." 
1Corinthians12:4 baradan to kai prakar ke haai, parantu atma aek hee haai." 
1Corinthians12:5 aur seva bhee kai prakar kee haai, parantu prabhu aek hee haai." 
1Corinthians12:6 aur prabhavashaalee kayrya kai prakar ke haai, parantu paramashevar aek hee haai, jo sab men har prakar ka prabhav utpann karata haai." 
1Corinthians12:7 kintu sab ke labh pahunchane ke liye har aek ko atma ka prakash diya jata haai. 
1Corinthians12:8 kyonaki aek ko atma ke dara buadi kee baten dee jatee haain aur doosare ko usee atma ke anusar gyaan kee baten. 
1Corinthians12:9 aur kisee ko usee atma se vishvasa aur kisee ko usee aek atma se changa karane ka baradan diya jata haai. 
1Corinthians12:10 fir kisee ko samarth ke kam karane kee shaaktai aur kisee ko bhavishyadanee kee aur kisee ko anek prakar kee bhashaa aur kisee ko bhashaaon ka arth batana. 
1Corinthians12:11 parantu ye sab prabhavashaalee kayrya vahee aek atma karavata haai, aur jise jo chahata haai vah bantt deta haai.." 
1Corinthians12:12 kyonaki jis prakar deh to aek haai aur usake ang bahut se haai, aur us aek deh ke sab ang, bahut hone par bhee sab milakar aek hee deh haai, usee prakar maseeh bhee haai." 
1Corinthians12:13 kyonaki ham sab ne kya yahoodee ho, kya yunanee, kya das, kya svatantra aek hee atma ke dara aek deh hone ke liye bapatisma liya, aur ham aek ko aek hee atma pilaya gaya." 
1Corinthians12:14 isaliye ki deh men aek hee ang nahee, parantu bahut se haain." 
1Corinthians12:15 yaadi panv kahe: ki maain hath nahee, isaaliye deh ka nahee, to kya vah is karan deh ka naheen?" 
1Corinthians12:16 aur yaadi kan kahe ki maain ankh ka nahee, isaaliye deh ka nahee, to kya vah is karan deh ka naheen." 
1Corinthians12:17 yaadi saree deh ankh kee hotee to sunana kahan se hota? yaadi saree deh kan hee hotee to soonghana kahan hota? 
1Corinthians12:18 parantu sachamuch parameshvar ne ango ko apanee ichchha ke anusar aek aek karake deh men rakha haai. 
1Corinthians12:19 yaadi ve sab aek hee ang hote, to deh kahan hotee?" 
1Corinthians12:20 parantu ab ang to bahut se haai, parantu deh aek hee haai." 
1Corinthians12:21 ankh hath se naheen kah sakatee, ki mujhe tera prayojan nahee, aur n sir panvon se kah sakata haai, ki mujhe tumhara prayojan naheen." 
1Corinthians12:22 parantu deh ke ve ang jo auron se nirbal dekh padte haai, bahut hee avashyak haain." 
1Corinthians12:23 aur deh ke jin ango ko ham adar ke yogy naheen samajhte haain unhee ko ham aadhaik adar dete haain aur hamare shaebhaheen ang aur bhee bahut shaebhayaman ho jate haain. 
1Corinthians12:24 fir bhee hamare shaebhayaman ango ke is ka prayojan nahee, parantu parameshvar ne deh ko aeesa bana diya haai, ki jis ang ko ghattee thee usee ko aur bhee bahut adar ho." 
1Corinthians12:25 taaki deh men foott n pade, parantu ang aek doosare kee barabar chinta karen." 
1Corinthians12:26 isaliye yaadi aek ang du:kh pata haai, to sab ang usake sath du:kh pate haain aur yaadi aek ang kee badai hotee haai, to usake sath sab ang anand manate haain." 
1Corinthians12:27 isee prakar tum sab milakar maseeh kee deh ho, aur alag alag usake ang ho." 
1Corinthians12:28 aur paramashevar ne kaleesiya men alag alag vyaktai niyukt kiae haain prathm praerit, doosare bhvishyadvkta, teesare shaikshak, fir samarth ke kam karanevale, fir changa karanevale, aur upakar karanevale, aur pradhaan, aur nana prakar kee bhasha balanevale." 
1Corinthians12:29 kya sab praearit haain? kya sab bhavishyadvkta haain? kya sab upadeshak haain? kya sab samarth ke kam karanevale haain? 
1Corinthians12:30 kya sab ko changa karane ka baradan mila haai? kya sab nana prakar kee bhasha bolate haain? 
1Corinthians12:31 kya sab anuvad karate haain? tum badee se badee baradanon kee dhaun men raho! parantu maain tumhen aur bhee sab se uttm marga batata hoon.. 
1Corinthians13:1 yaadi maain manushyo, aur savargadooton kee boliyan boloo, aur praem n rakoo, to maain ttnattnata hua peetal, aur jhnjhnatee hui jhanjh hoon." 
1Corinthians13:2 aur yaadi maain bhavishyadanee kar sakoo, aur sab bhedon aur sab prakar ke gyaan ko samajoo, aur mujhe yahan tak poora vishvas ho, ki maain pahadon ko hatta doo, parantu praem n rakoo, to maain kuchh bhee naheen." 
1Corinthians13:3 aur yaadi maain apanee sampoorn sanpaati kangalon ko khaila doo, ya apanee deh jalane ke liye de doo, aur praem n rakoo, to mujhe kuchh bhee labh naheen." 
1Corinthians13:4 praem dhaeerajavant haai, aur krapal haai praem dal naheen karata praem apanee badai naheen karata, aur foolata naheen." 
1Corinthians13:5 vah anareeati naheen chalata, vah apanee bhlai naheen chahata, jhunjhlata nahee, bura naheen manata." 
1Corinthians13:6 kukarma se anandait naheen hota, parantu sany se anaandait hota haai." 
1Corinthians13:7 vah sab baten sah leta haai, sab baton kee prateeti karata haai, sab baton kee asha rakhta haai, sab baton men dhaeeraj dharata haai." 
1Corinthians13:8 praem kabhee ttlata naheen bhavishyadaanaiyan ho, to samapt ho jaaengee, bhashaaaen ho to jatee rahengee gyaan ho, to mitt jaaega." 
1Corinthians13:9 kyonaki hamara gyaan adhoora haai, aur hamaree bhavishyadanee adhooree." 
1Corinthians13:10 parantu jab sarvaasiddh aaega, to adhoora mitt jaaega." 
1Corinthians13:11 jab maain balak tha, to maain balakon kee nain bolata tha, balakon ka sa man tha balakon kee see samajh thee parantu siyana ho gaya, to balakon kee baten chhod dee." 
1Corinthians13:12 ab hamen darpan men dhaundhala sa dikhai deta haai parantu us samay amane samhane dekhenge, is samay mera gyaan adhoora haai parantu us samay aeesee pooree reeti se pahichanoonga, jaaisa maain pahichana gaya hoon." 
1Corinthians13:13 par ab vishvas, asha, praem ye teenon sthai haai, par in men sab se bada praem haai." 
1Corinthians14:1 praem ka anukaran karo, aur atmaik baradanon kee bhee dhaun men raho vishosh karake yah, ki bhvishyadanee karo." 
1Corinthians14:2 kyonaki jo anyabhasha men baten karata haai vah manushyon se nahee, parantu parameshvar se baten karata haai isaliye ki us kee koi naheen samajhta kyonaki vah bhett kee baten atma men hokar bolata haai." 
1Corinthians14:3 parantu jo bhvishyadanee karata haai, vah manushyon se unnati, aur upadesha, aur shaantai kee baten kahata haai." 
1Corinthians14:4 jo any bhasha men baten karata haai, vah apanee hee unnaati karata haai parantu jo bhvishyadanee karata haai, vah kaleesiya kee unnaati karata haai." 
1Corinthians14:5 maain chahata hoo, ki tum sab any bhashaaon men baten karo, parantu aadhaikatar yah chahata hoon ki bhvishyadanee karo: kyonaki yadi anyany bhasha bolanevala kaleeasiya kee unnaati ke liye anuvad n kare to bhavishyadvvanee karanevala us se baddhkar haai." 
1Corinthians14:6 isaliye he bhaiyo, yadi maain tumhare pas akar anyany bhasha men baten karoo, aur prakasha, ya gyaan, ya bhavishyadanee, ya upadesh kee baten tum se n kahoo, to mujh se tumhen kya labh hoga?" 
1Corinthians14:7 isee prakar yaadi nirjeev vastuaen bhee, jin se dhvaani nikalatee haai jese bansuree, ya been, yadi un ke svaron men bhed n ho to jo foonka ya bajaya jata haai, vah kyonkar paahichana jaaega?" 
1Corinthians14:8 aur yaadi turahee ka shabd safa n ho to kaun ladai ke liye taaiyaree karega? 
1Corinthians14:9 aeese hee tum bhee yadi jeebh se safa baten n kaho, to jo kuchh kaha jata haai? vah kyonkar samajha jaaega? tum to hava se baten karanevale ttharoge." 
1Corinthians14:10 jagat men kitane kee prakar kee bhashaaaen kyon n ho, parantu un men se koi bhee bina arth kee n hogee." 
1Corinthians14:11 isaliye yaadi maain kisee bhasha ka arth n samajoo, to bolanevale kee drashtti men paradeshaee ttharoonga aur bolanevala mere drashtti men paradeshaee ttharega." 
1Corinthians14:12 isaliye tum bhee jab aatmaik baradanon kee dhaun men ho, to aeesa prayatn karo, ki tumhare baradanon kee unnati se kaleeasiya kee unnaati ho." 
1Corinthians14:13 is karan jo any bhasha bole, to vah praarthna kare, ki usaka anuvad bhee kar sake." 
1Corinthians14:14 isaliye yaadi maain any bhasha men praarthna karoo, to meree atma praarthna karatee haai, parantu meree buaddh ikam naheen detee." 
1Corinthians14:15 so kya karana chahiae? maain atma se bhee praarthna karoonga, aur buddh ise bhee praarthna karoonga maain atma se gaunga, aur buaddh ise bhee gaunga." 
1Corinthians14:16 naheen to yadi too atma hee se dhanyavad karega, to fir agyaanee tere dhanyavad par ameen kyonaki kahega? isaaliye ki vah to naheen janata, ki too kya kahata haai?" 
1Corinthians14:17 too to bhlee bhanati se dhanyavad karata haai, parantu doosare kee unnati naheen hotee." 
1Corinthians14:18 maain apane parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoo, ki maain tum sab se aadhaik anyany bhasha men bolata hoon." 
1Corinthians14:19 parantu kaleeasiya men any bhasha men das hajar baten kahane se yah mujhe aur bhee achchha jan padta haai, ki auron ke sikhane ke liye buaddh ise panch hee baten kahoon.." 
1Corinthians14:20 he bhaiyo, tum samajh men balak n bano: taubhee burai men to balak raho, parantu samajh men siyane bano." 
1Corinthians14:21 vyavastha men likha haai, ki prabhu kahata haai maain any bhasha bolanevalon ke dara, aur paraae mukh ke dara in logon se bat karoonga taubhee ve meree n sunenge." 
1Corinthians14:22 isaliye anyany bhashaaaen vishvasiyon ke liye nahee, parantu aavishvasiyon ke liye chinh haai, aur bhvishyadanee avishvaseeyon ke liye naheen parantu vishvasiyon ke liye chinh haain." 
1Corinthians14:23 so yaadi kaleeasiya aek jagah ikatthee ho, aur sab ke sab anyany bhasha bole, aur anapaddhe ya avishvasee log bheetar a jaaen to kya ve tumhen pagal n kahenge?" 
1Corinthians14:24 parantu yadi sab bhvishyadanee karane lage, aur koi aavishvasee ya anapaddha manushy bheetar a jaa, to sab use doshaee tthara denge aur parakh lenge." 
1Corinthians14:25 aur usake man ke bhe pragatt ho jaaenge, aur tab vah munh ke bal girakar parameshvar ko dandvat karega, aur man lega, ki sachamuch parameshvar tumhare beech men haai." 
1Corinthians14:26 isaliye he bhaiyo kya karana chahiae? jab tum ikatthe hote ho, to har aek ke day men bhjan, ya upadesha, ya anyabhasha, ya prakasha, ya anyabhasha ka arth batana rahata haai: sab kuchh atmaik unnati ke liye hona chahiae." 
1Corinthians14:27 yaadi any bhasha men baten karaneen ho, to do do, ya bahut ho to teen teen jan baree baree bole, aur aek vyaaktai anuvad kare." 
1Corinthians14:28 parantu yadi anuvad karanevala n ho, to anyabhasha balanevala kaleesiya men shaant rahe, aur apane man se, aur parameshvar se baten kare." 
1Corinthians14:29 bhavishyadvktaon men se do ya teen bole, aur shosh log un ke vachan ko parakhen." 
1Corinthians14:30 parantu yadi doosare par jo baaitta haai, kuchh ishvareey prakash ho, to paahila chup ho jaae." 
1Corinthians14:31 kyonaki tum sab aek aek karake bhvishyadanee kar sakate ho taki sab seekhe, aur sab shaaantai paaen." 
1Corinthians14:32 aur bhavishyadvktaon kee atma bhvishyadvktaon ke vash men haai. 
1Corinthians14:33 kyenaki parameshvar gadbadee ka nahee, parantu shaantai ka kartta haai jaaisa pavitra logon kee sab kaleeasiyaon men haai.." 
1Corinthians14:34 striayan kaleeasiya kee sabha men chup rahe, kyonki unhen baten karane kee agyaa nahee, parantu adhaeen rahane kee agyaa haai: jaaisa vyavastha men likha bhee haai." 
1Corinthians14:35 aur yaadi ve kuchh seekhna chahe, to ghar men apane apane pati se poochhe, kyonki sree ka kaleeasiya men baten karana lajja kee bat haai." 
1Corinthians14:36 kyon paramashevar ka vachan tum men se nikala? ya keval tum hee tak pahuncha haai? 
1Corinthians14:37 yaadi koi manushy apane ap ko bhavishyadvkta ya aatmaik jan samajhe, to yah jan le, ki jo baten maain tumhen likhta hoo, ve prabhu kee agyaaaen haain." 
1Corinthians14:38 parantu yadi koi n jane, to n jane.." 
1Corinthians14:39 so he bhaiyo, bhvishyadanee karane kee dhaun men raho aur anyabhasha bolane se mana n karo." 
1Corinthians14:40 par saree baten sabhyata aur kramanusar kee jaaen. 
1Corinthians15:1 he bhaiyo, maain tumhen vahee susamachar batata hoon jo pahile suna chuka hoo, jise tum ne angeekar bhee kiya tha aur jis men tum sthiar bhee ho." 
1Corinthians15:2 usee ke dara tumhara uddhar bhee hota haai, yaadi us susamachar ko jo maain ne tumhen sunaya tha smaran rakhte ho naheen to tumhara vishvas karana vyarth hua." 
1Corinthians15:3 isee karan maain ne sab se pahile tumhen vahee bat pahuncha dee, jo mujhe pahunchee thee, ki pavitra shaasr ke vachan ke anusar yeeshu maseeh hamare papon ke liye mar gaya." 
1Corinthians15:4 or gada gaya aur pavitra shaasr ke anusar teesare din jee bhee utta. 
1Corinthians15:5 aur kaaifaa ko tab barahon ko dilai diya. 
1Corinthians15:6 fir panch sau se aadhaik bhaiyon ko aek sath dikhai diya, jin men se bahutere ab tak vartaman haain par kitane so gaae." 
1Corinthians15:7 fir yakoob ko dikhai diya tak sab praeriton ko dikhai diya. 
1Corinthians15:8 aur sab ke bad mujh ko bhee dikhai diya, jo mano adhoore dinon ka janma hoon." 
1Corinthians15:9 kyonaki maain praariton men sab se chhotta hoo, baran praarit kahalane ke yogy bhee nahee, kyonki maain ne parameshvar kee kaleesiya ko sataya tha." 
1Corinthians15:10 parantu maain jo kuchh bhee hoo, parameshvar ke anugrah se hoon: aur usaka anugrah jo mujh par hua, vah vyarth naheen huaddh paranatu maain ne un sab se baddhkar paarishram bhee kiya: taubhee yah meree or se naheen hua parantu parameshvar ke anugrah se jo mujh par tha." 
1Corinthians15:11 so chahe maain hoo, chahe ve ho, ham yahee prachar karate haai, aur isee par tum ne vishvas bhee kiya.." 
1Corinthians15:12 so jab ki maseeh ka yah prachar kiya jata haai, ki vah mare huon men se jee utta, to tum men se kitane kyonkar kahate haai, ki mare huon ka punarootthan haai hee naheen?" 
1Corinthians15:13 yaadi mare huon ka punarootthan hee nahee, to maseeh bhee naheen jee utta." 
1Corinthians15:14 aur yaadi maseeh bhee naheen jee utta, to hamara prachar karana bhee vyarth haai aur tumhara vishvas bhee vyarth haai." 
1Corinthians15:15 baran ham paramashevar ke jootte gavah tthare kyonaki ham ne parameshvar ke vishay men yah gavahee dee ki us ne maseeh ko jila diya yadhypi naheen jilaya, yadi mare huae naheen jee uttte." 
1Corinthians15:16 aur yaadi murde naheen jee uttte, to maseeh bhee naheen jee utta." 
1Corinthians15:17 aur yaadi maseeh naheen jee utta, to tumhara vishvas vyarth haai aur tum ab tak apane papon men fanse ho." 
1Corinthians15:18 baran jo maseeh me so gaae haai, ve bhee nash huae." 
1Corinthians15:19 yaadi ham keval isee jeevan men maseeh se asha rakhte haain to ham sab manushyon se aadhaik abhage haain.. 
1Corinthians15:20 parantu sachamuch maseeh mudorn men se jee utta haai, aur jo so gaae haai, un men pahila fal hua." 
1Corinthians15:21 kyonaki jab manushy ke dara mratyu ai to manushy hee ke dara mare huon ka punarootthan bhee aya. 
1Corinthians15:22 aur jaaise adam men sab marate haai, vaaisa hee maseeh men sab jilaae jaaenge." 
1Corinthians15:23 parantu har aek apanee apanee baree se paahila fal maseeha fir maseeh ke ane par usake loga. 
1Corinthians15:24 is ke bad ant hoga us samay vah saree pradhaanata aur sara adhaikar aur samarth ka ant karake rajy ko parameshvar pita ke hath men saunp dega. 
1Corinthians15:25 kyonaki jab tak ki vah apane baaiariyon ko apane panvon tale n le aa, tab tak usaka rajy karana avashy haai." 
1Corinthians15:26 sab se aantaim baairee jo nash kiya jaaega vah mratyu haai. 
1Corinthians15:27 kyeanki parameshvar ne sab kuchh usake panvon tale kar diya haai, parantu jab vah kahata haai ki sab kuchh usake adhaeen kar diya gaya haai to pratyaksha haai, ki jis ne sab kuchh usake adhaeen kar diya, vah ap alag raha." 
1Corinthians15:28 aur jab sab kuchh usake adhaeen ho jaaega, to putra ap bhee usake adhaeen ho jaaega jis ne sab kuchh usake adhaeen kar diya taaki sab men parameshvar hee sab kuchh ho.." 
1Corinthians15:29 naheen to jo log mare huon ke liye bapatisma lete haai, ve kya karenge? yadi murde jee uttte hee naheen? to fir kyon un ke liye bapatisma lete haain?" 
1Corinthians15:30 aur ham bhee kyon har ghadee jakhaim men pade rahate haain? 
1Corinthians15:31 he bhaiyo, mujhe us ghamand kee sonh jo hamare maseeh yeeshu men maain tumhare vishay men karata hoo, ki maain praati din marata hoon." 
1Corinthians15:32 yaadi maain manushy kee reeati par ifisus men bana-pashuuon se lada, to mujhe kya labh hua? yadi murde jilaae naheen jaaenge, to ao, khaae-peea, kyonaki kal to mar hee jaaenge." 
1Corinthians15:33 dhaekha n khana, buree sangati achchhe charitra ko bigad detee haai." 
1Corinthians15:34 dharma ke liye jag utto aur pap n karo kyonki kitane aeese haain jo parameshvar ko naheen janate, maain tumhen lajjait karate ke liye yah kahata hoon.." 
1Corinthians15:35 ab koi yah kahega, ki murde kis reeti se jee uttte haai, aur kisee deh ke sath ate haain?" 
1Corinthians15:36 he nirbuadi, jo kuchh tu bota haai, jab tak vah n mare jilaya naheen jata." 
1Corinthians15:37 or je too bota haai, yah vah deh naheen jo utpann honevalee haai, parantu nira dana haai, chahe gehoon ka, chahe kisee aur anaj ka." 
1Corinthians15:38 parantu parameshvar apanee ichchha ke anusar us ko deh deta haai aur har aek beej ko us kee vishosh deha. 
1Corinthians15:39 sab shareer aek sareekhe nahee, parantu manushyon ka shareer aur haai, pashuuon ka shareer aur haai paakshiayon ka shareer aur haai machhiilayon ka shareer aur haai." 
1Corinthians15:40 svargeey deh haai, aur pathairv deh bhee haai: parantu svargeeyah dehon ka tej aur haai, aur pathairv ka aura." 
1Corinthians15:41 soorya ka tej aur haai, chand ka tej aur haai, aur taraganon ka tej aur haai, kyonaki aek tare se doosare tare ke tej me antar haai." 
1Corinthians15:42 mudorn ka jee uttna bhee aeesa hee haai. shareer nashaman dasha men boya jata haai, aur avinashaee roop men jee uttta haai." 
1Corinthians15:43 vah anadar ke sath boya jata haai, aur tej ke sath jee uttta haai nirbalata ke sath boya jata haai aur samarth ke sath jee uttta haai." 
1Corinthians15:44 svabhaavik deh boi jatee haai, aur aatmaik deh jee utttee haai: jab ki svabhavik deh haai, to aatmaik deh bhee haai." 
1Corinthians15:45 aeesa hee likha bhee haai, ki prathm manushy, arthata adam, jeevit praanee bana aur aantaim adam, jeevanadayak atma bana." 
1Corinthians15:46 parantu pahile aatmaik n tha, par svabhaavik tha, is ke bad atmaik hua." 
1Corinthians15:47 prathm manushy dharatee se arthata mittee ka tha doosara manushy svargeey haai. 
1Corinthians15:48 jaaisa vah mittee ka tha vaaise hee aur mittee ke haain aur jaaisa vah svargeey haai, vaaise hee aur bhee svargeey haain." 
1Corinthians15:49 aur jaaise ham ne usaka roop jo mittee ka tha dhaaran kiya vaaise hee us svargeey ka roop bhee dhaaran karenge.. 
1Corinthians15:50 he bhaiyo, maain yah kahata hoon ki mans aur lohoo parameshvar ke rajy ke aadhaikaree naheen ho sakate, aur n vinash avinashaee ka adhaikaree ho sakata haai." 
1Corinthians15:51 dekhe, maain tum se bhed kee bat kahata hoon: ki ham sab to naheen soaenge, parantu sab badal jaaenge." 
1Corinthians15:52 aur yah kshan bhr me, palak marate hee pichhlee turahee foonkate hee hoga: kayonaki turahee foonkee jaaegee aur murde aavinashaee dasha men uttaae janaege, aur ham badal jaaenge." 
1Corinthians15:53 kyonaki avashy haai, ki vah nashaman deh avinash ko pahin le, aur yah maranahar deh amarata ko pahin le." 
1Corinthians15:54 aur jab yah nashaman aavinash ko pahin lega, aur yah maranahar amarata ko paahin lega, tak vah vachan jo likha haai, poora ho jaaega, ki jay ne mratyu ko nigal liya." 
1Corinthians15:55 he mratyu teree jay kahan raheen? 
1Corinthians15:56 he mratyu tera dnk kahan raha? mratyu ka dnk pap haai aur pap ka bal byavastha haai. 
1Corinthians15:57 parantu parameshvar ka dhanyavad ho, jo hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke dara hamen jayavant karata haai." 
1Corinthians15:58 so he mere piry bhaiyo, draddh aur attl raho, aur prabhu ke kam men sarvada baddhte jao, kyonki yah janate ho, ki tumhara paarishram prabhu men vyarth naheen haai.." 
1Corinthians16:1 ab us chande ke vishay men jo paavitra logon ke liye kiya jata haai, jaaisee agyaa maain ne galatiya kee kaleesiyaon ko dee, vaaisa hee tum bhee karo." 
1Corinthians16:2 saptah ke paahile din tum men se har aek apanee amadanee ke anusar kuchh apane pas rakh chhoda kare, ki mere ane par chanda n karana pade." 
1Corinthians16:3 aur jab maain aunga, to jinhen tum chahoge unhen maain chitthiyan dekar bhej doonga, ki tumhara dan yarooshalem pahuncha den." 
1Corinthians16:4 aur yaadi mera bhee jana uchit hua, to ve mere sath jaaenge." 
1Corinthians16:5 aur maain makiduaniya hokar to jana hee haai. 
1Corinthians16:6 parantu sambhv haai ki tumhare yahan hee tthar jaun aur sharad retu tumhare yanha katoo, tab jis or mera jana ho, us or tum mujhe pahuncha do." 
1Corinthians16:7 kyonaki maain ab marga men tum se bhentt karana naheen chahata parantu mujhe asha haai, ki yadi prabhu chahe to kuchh samay tak tumhare sath rahoonga." 
1Corinthians16:8 paranatu maain peantaikust tak ifisus men rahoonga. 
1Corinthians16:9 kyonaki mere liye aek bada aur upayogee dar khula haai, aur virodhaee bahut se haain.." 
1Corinthians16:10 yaadi teemuathaiyus a jaa, to dekhna, ki vah tumhare yahan nidr rahe kyonki vah meree nai prabhu ka kam karata haai." 
1Corinthians16:11 isaliye koi use tuchchh n jane, parantu use kushal se is or pahuncha dena, ki mere pas a jaae kyonaki maain us kee batt joh raha hoo, ki vah bhaiyon ke sath aae." 
1Corinthians16:12 aur bhai apullos se maain ne bahut binatee kee haai ki tumhare pas bhaiyon ke sath jaae parantu us ne us samay jane kee kuchh bhee ichchha n kee, parantu jab avasar paaega, tab a jaaega." 
1Corinthians16:13 jagate raho, vishvas men sthiar raho, purooshaarth karo, balavant hoo." 
1Corinthians16:14 jo kuchh karate ho praem se karo.. 
1Corinthians16:15 he bhaiyo, tum staifanas ke gharane ko janate ho, ki ve akhya ke pahile fal haai, aur pavitra logon kee seva ke liye taaiyar rahate haain." 
1Corinthians16:16 so maain tum se binatee karata hoon ki aeeson ke adhaeen raho, baran har aek ke jo is kam men paarishramee aur sahakarmee haain." 
1Corinthians16:17 aur maain staifanas aur fooratoonatus aur akhikus ke ane se anaandait hoo, kyonki unhon ne tumharee dhattee ko pooree kee haai." 
1Corinthians16:18 aur unhon ne meree aur tumharee atma ko chaain diya haai isaliye aeeson ko mano.. 
1Corinthians16:19 aasiya kee kaleesiyaon kee or se tum ko namaskara akvaila aur pirsaka ka aur un ke ghar kee kaleesiya ko bhee tum ko prabhu men bahut bahut namaskara. 
1Corinthians16:20 sab bhaiyon ka tum ko namaskara: paavitra chumban se apas men namaskar karo.. 
1Corinthians16:21 mujh paulus ka apane hath ka likha hua namaskara: yadi koi prabhu se praem n rakhe to vah srapit ho. 
1Corinthians16:22 hamara prabhu anevala haai. 
1Corinthians16:23 prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tum par hota rahe. 
1Corinthians16:24 mera praem maseeh yeeshu men tum sab se rahe. ameena.. 
2Corinthians1:1 paulus kee or se jo parameshvar kee ichchha se maseeh yeeshu ka praearit haai, aur bhai teemuathaiyus kee or se parameshvar kee us kaleesiya ke nam jo kuarinthus men haai aur sare akhma ke sab pavitra lagon ke nama.." 
2Corinthians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe.. 
2Corinthians1:3 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke parameshvar, aur pita ka dhanyavad ho, jo daya ka pita, aur sab prakar kee shaaantai ka parameshvar haai." 
2Corinthians1:4 vah hamare sab kleshaen men shaaantai deta haai taki ham us shaaantai ke karan jo parameshvar hamen deta haai, unhen bhee shaaantai de sake, jo kisee prakar ke klesh men hon." 
2Corinthians1:5 kyonaki jaaise maseeh ke dukh ham ko aadhaik hote haai, vaaise hee hamaree shaaantai bhee maseeh ke dara adhaik hatee haai." 
2Corinthians1:6 yaadi ham klesh pate haai, to yah tumharee shaantai aur uddhar ke liye haai aur yaadi shaaantai pate haai, to yah tumharee shaantai ke liye haai jis ke prabhav se tum dhaeeraj ke sath un kleshaen ko sah lete ho, jinhen ham bhee sahate haain." 
2Corinthians1:7 aur hamaree asha tumhare vishay men draddh haai kyonaki ham janate haai, ki tum jaaise dukhon ke vaaise hee shaantai ke bhee sahabhagee ho." 
2Corinthians1:8 he bhaiyo, ham naheen chahate ki tum hamare us klesh se anajan raho, jo aasiya men ham par pada, ki aeese bharee bojh se dab gaae the, jo hamaree samarth se bahar tha, yahan tak ki ham jeevan se bhee hath dhae baaitte the." 
2Corinthians1:9 baran ham ne apane man men samajh liya tha, ki ham par mratyu kee agyaa ho chukee haai ki ham apana bhrosa n rakhe, baran parameshvar ka jo mare huon ko jilata haai." 
2Corinthians1:10 usee ne hamen aeesee badee mratyu se bachaya, aur bachaega aur us se hamaree yah asha haai, ki vah age ko bhee bachata rahega." 
2Corinthians1:11 aur tum bhee milakar praarthna ke dara hamaree sahayata karoge, ki jo baradan bahuton ke dara hamen mila, usake karan bahut log hamaree or se dhanyavad karen.." 
2Corinthians1:12 kyonaki ham apane vivek kee is gavahee par ghamand karate haai, ki jagat men aur vishosh karake tumhare beech hamara chaaritra parameshvar ke yogy aeesee paavitrata aur sachchai saahit tha, jo shaareerik gyaan se nahee, parantu parameshvar ke anugrah ke sath tha." 
2Corinthians1:13 ham tumhen aur kuchh naheen likhte, keval vah jo tum paddhte ya manate bhee ho, aur mujhe asha haai, ki ant tak bhee manate rahoge." 
2Corinthians1:14 jaaisa tum men se kitanon ne man liya haai, ki ham tumhare ghamand ka karan haai vaaise tum bhee prabhu yeeshu ke din hamare liye ghamand ka karan ttharoge.." 
2Corinthians1:15 aur is bhrose se maain chahata tha ki pahile tumhare pas aun ki tumhen aek aur dan mile. 
2Corinthians1:16 aur tumhare pas se hokar maakiduaniya ko jau, aur tum muchhe yahoodiya kee or kud door tak pahunchao." 
2Corinthians1:17 isaliye maain ne jo yah ichchha kee thee to kya maain ne chanchalata dikhai? ya jo karana chahata hoon kya shareer ke anusar karana chahata hoo, ki maain bat men ha, han bhee karoon" 
2Corinthians1:18 aur naheen naheen bhee karoon? parameshvar sachcha gavah haai, ki hamare us vachan men jo tum se kaha han aur naheen danon pai naheen jateen." 
2Corinthians1:19 kyonaki parameshvar ka putra yeeshu maseeh jisaka hamare dara arthata mere aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus ke dara tumhare beech meen prachar hua us men han aur naheen donon n thee parantu, us men han hee han hui." 
2Corinthians1:20 kyanaki parameshvar kee jitanee pratigyaaaen haai, ve sab usee men han ke sath haain: isaliye usake dara ameen bhee hui, ki hamare dara parameshvar kee maahima ho." 
2Corinthians1:21 aur jo hamen tumhare sath maseeh men draddh karata haai, aur jis ne hamen aabhaishok kiya vahee parameshvar haai." 
2Corinthians1:22 jis ne ham par chhap bhee kar dee haai aur bayan men atma ko hamare manon men diya.. 
2Corinthians1:23 maain parameshvar ko gavah karata hoo, ki maai ab tak kurinthus men isaaliye naheen aya, ki mujhe tum par taras ata tha." 
2Corinthians1:24 yah nahee, ki ham vishvas ke vishay men tum par prabhuta jatana chahate haain parantu tumhare anand men sahayak haain kyonki tum vishvas hee se sthiar rahate ho." 
2Corinthians2:1 maainne apane man men yahee ttan liya tha ki fir tumhare pas udas hokar n aun. 
2Corinthians2:2 kyonaki yadi maain tumhen udas karoo, to mujhe anand denevala kaun hoga, keval vahee jis ko maain ne udas kiya?" 
2Corinthians2:3 aur maain ne yahee bat tumhen isaliye likhee, ki kaheen aeesa n ho, ki mere ane par jin se anand milana chahia, maain un se udas houn kyonaki mujhe tum sab par is bat ka bhrosa haai, ki jo mera anand haai, vahee tum sab ka bhee haai." 
2Corinthians2:4 bade klesha, aur man ke kashtt se, maain ne bahut se ansu baha bahakar tumhen likha, isaliye nahee, ki tum udas ho, parantu isaaliye ki tum us bade praem ko jan lo, jo mujhe tum se haai.." 
2Corinthians2:5 aur yaadi kisee ne udas kiya haai, to mujhe hee naheen baran ki usake sath bahut kadai n karoon kuchh kuchh tum sab ko bhee udas kiya haai." 
2Corinthians2:6 aeese jan ke liye yah dand jo bhaiyon men se bahuton ne diya, bahut haai." 
2Corinthians2:7 isaliye is se yah bhla haai ki usaka aparadha kshama karo aur shaantai do, n ho ki aeesa manushy udasee men oob jaae." 
2Corinthians2:8 is karan maain tum se binatee karata hoo, ki us ko apane praem ka praman do." 
2Corinthians2:9 kyonaki maain ne isaliye bhee likha tha, ki tumhen parakh loo, ki sab baton ke manane ke liye taaiyar ho, ki naheen." 
2Corinthians2:10 jis ka tum kuchh kshama karate ho us maain bhee kshama karata hoo, kyonki maain ne bhee jo kuchh kshama kiya haai, yadi kiya ho, to tumhare karan maseeh kee jagah men hokar kshama kiya haai." 
2Corinthians2:11 ki shautan ka ham par danv n chale, kyonki ham us kee yuktaiyon se anajan naheen." 
2Corinthians2:12 aur jab maain maseeh ka susamachar, sunane ko traeas men aya, aur prabhu ne mere liye aek dar khol diya." 
2Corinthians2:13 to mere man men chaain ne mila, isaliye ki maain ne apane bhai titus ko naheen paya so un se vida hokar maain maakiduaniya ko chala gaya." 
2Corinthians2:14 parantu parameshvar ka dhanyavad ho, jo maseeh men sada ham ko jay ke utsav men liye firata haai, aur apane gyaan ka sugandha hamare dara har jagah faailata haai." 
2Corinthians2:15 kyonaki ham parameshvar ke nikatt uddhar panevalo, aur nash honevalo, dono ke liye maseeh ke sugandha haain." 
2Corinthians2:16 kitano ke liye to marane ke nimitt mranyu kee gandha, aur kitano ke liye jeevan ke nimitt jeevan kee sugandha, aur in baton ke yogy kaun haai?" 
2Corinthians2:17 kyonaki ham un bahuton ke saman nahee, jo parameshvar ke vachan men milavatt karate haain parantu man kee sachchai se, aur parameshvar kee or se parameshvar ko upaasthiat janakar maseeh men bolate haain.." 
2Corinthians3:1 kya ham fir apanee badai karane lage? ya hamen kitanon ki nai sifaaarish kee paatraiyan tumhare pas lanee ya tum se lenee haain? 
2Corinthians3:2 hamaree patraee tum hee ho, jo hamare dayon par likhee hui haai, aur use sab manushy pahichanate aur paddhte haai." 
2Corinthians3:3 yah pragatt haai, ki tum maseeh kee patraee ho, jis ko ham ne sevakon kee nai likha aur jo siyahee se nahee, parantu jeevate parameshvar ke atma se patthr kee paattyaien par nahee, parantu day kee mans roopee paattyaien par likhee haai." 
2Corinthians3:4 ham maseeh ke dara parameshvar par aeesa hee bhrosa rakhte haain. 
2Corinthians3:5 yah nahee, ki ham apane ap se is yogy haai, ki apanee or se kisee bat ka vichar kar saken par hamaree yogyata parameshvar kee or se haai." 
2Corinthians3:6 jis ne hamen nai vacha ke sevak hone ke yogy bhee kiya, shabd ke sevak naheen baran atma ke kyonaki shabd marata haai, par atma jilata haai." 
2Corinthians3:7 aur yahad mratyu kee yah vacha jis ke akshar patthron par khod gaae the, yahan tak tejomay hui, ki moosa ke munh par ke tej ke karan jo ghattta bhee jata tha, israael usake munh par draashtti naheen kar sakate the." 
2Corinthians3:8 to atma kee vacha aur bhee tejomay kyon n hogee? 
2Corinthians3:9 kyonaki jab doshaee ttharanevalee vacha tejomay thee, to dharmee ttharanevalee vacha aur bhee tejomay kyon n hogee?" 
2Corinthians3:10 aur jo tejomay tha, vah bhee us tej ke karan jo us se baddhkar tejamay tha, kuchh tejomay n tthara." 
2Corinthians3:11 kyonaki jab vah jo ghattta jata tha tejomay tha, to vah jo sthiar rahega, aur bhee tejomay kyon n hoga?" 
2Corinthians3:12 so aeesee asha rakhkar ham hiyav ke sath bolate haain. 
2Corinthians3:13 aur moosar kee nain nahee, jis ne apane munh par parada dala tha taki israaelee us ghattnevalee vastu ke ant ko n dekhen." 
2Corinthians3:14 parantu ve matimand ho gaa, kyonaki aj tak purane niyam ke paddhte samay un ke dayon par vahee parada pada rahata haai par vah maseeh men utt jata haai." 
2Corinthians3:15 aur aj tak jab kabhee moosa kee pustak paddhee jatee haai, to un ke day par parada pada rahata haai." 
2Corinthians3:16 parantu jab kabhee un ka day prabhu kee or firega, tab vah parada utt jaaega." 
2Corinthians3:17 prabhu to atma haai: aur jahan kaheen prabhu ka atma haai vahan svatantrata haai. 
2Corinthians3:18 parantu jab ham sab ke ughaade chehare se prabhu ka pratap is prakar pragatt hota haai, jis prakar darpan me, to prabhu ke dara jo atma haai, ham usee tejasvee roop men ansh ansh kar ke badalate jate haain.." 
2Corinthians4:1 isaliye jab ham par aeesee daya hui, ki hamen yah seva milee, to ham hiyav naheen chhodte." 
2Corinthians4:2 parantu ham ne lajja ke gupt kamon ko tyag diya, aur n chaturai se chalate, aur n parameshvar ke vachan men milavatt karate haai, parantu saty ko pragatt karake, parameshvar ke samhane har aek manushy ke vivek men apanee bhlai baaittate haain." 
2Corinthians4:3 parantu yadi hamare susamachar par parada pada haai, to yah nash honevalon hee ke liye pada haai." 
2Corinthians4:4 aur un aavishvasiyon ke liye, jin kee buddh iko is sansar ke ishvar ne andhaee kar dee haai, taki maseeh jo parameshvar ka praatiroop haai, usake tejomay susamachar ka prakash un par n chamake." 
2Corinthians4:5 kyonaki ham apane ko nahee, parantu maseeh yeeshu ko prachar karate haai, ki vah prabhu haai aur usake vishay men yah kahate haai, ki ham yeeshu ke karan tumhare sevak haain." 
2Corinthians4:6 isaliye ki parameshvar hee haai, jis ne kaha, ki andhakar men se jyoti chamake aur vahee hamare dayon men chamaka, ki parameshvar kee mahima kee paahichan kee jyoti yeeshu maseeh ke chehare se prakashaman ho.." 
2Corinthians4:7 parantu mahare pas yah dhan mitthee ke baratanon men rakha haai, ki yah aseem samarth hamaree or se nahee, baran parameshvar hee kee or se tthare." 
2Corinthians4:8 ham charon or se klesh to bhogate haai, par sankatt men naheen padte niroopay to haai, par nirash naheen hote." 
2Corinthians4:9 sataae to jate haain par tyage naheen jate giraae to jate haai, par nash naheen hote." 
2Corinthians4:10 ham yeeshu kee mratyu ko apanee deh men har samay liye firate haain ki yeeshu ka jeevan bhee hamaree deh men pragatt ho. 
2Corinthians4:11 kyonaki ham jeete jee sarvada yeeshu ke karan mratyu ke hath men saunpe jate haain ki yeeshu ka jeevan bhee hamare maranahar shareer men pragatt ho. 
2Corinthians4:12 so mratyu to ham par prabhav dalatee haai aur jeevan tum para. 
2Corinthians4:13 aur isaliye ki ham men vahee vishvas kee atma haai, jis ke vishay me likha haai, ki maain ne vishvas kiya, isaliye maain bola so ham bhee vishvas karate haai, isee liye bolate haain." 
2Corinthians4:14 kyonaki ham jatane haai, jis ne prabhu yeeshu ko jilaya, vahee hamen bhee yeeshu men bhagee janakar jilaaega, aur tumhare sath apane samhane upaasthiat karega." 
2Corinthians4:15 kyonaki sab vastuen tumhare liye haai, taki anugrah bahuton ke dara aadhaik hokar parameshvar kee maahima ke liye dhanyavad bhee baddhaae.." 
2Corinthians4:16 isaliye ham hiyav naheen chhodte yadhypi hamara baharee manushyatv nash bhee hota jata haai, taubhee hamara bheetaree manushyatv din pratidin naya hota jata haai." 
2Corinthians4:17 kyonaki hamara pal bhr ka halka sa klesh hamare liye bahut hee mahatvapoorn aur anant jeevan maahima utpann karata jata haai. 
2Corinthians4:18 aur ham to dekhee hui vastuon ko naheen parantu anadekhee vastuon ko dekhte rahate haai, kyonki dekhee hui vastuen thode hee din kee haai, parantu anadekhee vastuen sada banee rahatee haain." 
2Corinthians5:1 kyonaki ham janate haai, ki jab hamara prathvee par ka dera sareekha ghar giraya jaaega to hamen parameshvar kee or se svarga par aek aeesa bhvan milega, jo hathon se bana hua ghar naheen parantu chirasthai haai." 
2Corinthians5:2 is men to ham kaharate, aur badee lalasa rakhte haain ki apane svargeey ghar ko pahin len." 
2Corinthians5:3 ki is ke pahinane se ham nange n paae jaaen. 
2Corinthians5:4 aur ham is dere men rahate huae bojh se dabe kaharate rahate haain kyonaki ham utarana nahee, baran aur paahinana chahate haai, taki vah jo maranahar haai jeevan men oob jaae." 
2Corinthians5:5 aur jis ne hamen isee bat ke liye taaiyar kiya haai vah parameshvar haai, jis ne hamen bayane men atma bhee diya haai." 
2Corinthians5:6 so ham sada ddhaddhs bandho rahate haain aur yah janate haain ki jab tak ham deh men rahate haai, tab tak prabhu se alag haain." 
2Corinthians5:7 kyonaki ham roop ko dekhkar nahee, par vishvas se chalate haain." 
2Corinthians5:8 isaliye ham ddhaddhs bandho rahate haai, aur deh se alag hokar prabhu ke sath rahana aur bhee uttm samajhte haain." 
2Corinthians5:9 is karan hamare man kee umang yah haai, ki chahe sath rahe, chahe alag rahen par ham use bhate rahen." 
2Corinthians5:10 kyonaki avashy haai, ki ham sab ka hal maseeh ke nyay asan ke samhane khul jaa, ki har aek vyaaktai apane apane bhle bure kamon ka badala jo us ne deh ke dara kiae hon paae.." 
2Corinthians5:11 so prabhu ka bhy manakar ham logon ko samajhate haain aur parameshvar par hamara hal pragatt haai aur meree asha yah haai, ki tumhare vivek par bhee pragatt hua hoga." 
2Corinthians5:12 ham fir bhee apanee badai tumhare samhane naheen karate baran ham apane vishay men tumhen ghamand karane ka avasar dete haai, ki tum unhen uttr de sako, jo man par nahee, baran dikhvattee baton par ghamand karate haain." 
2Corinthians5:13 yaadi ham besudha haai, to parameshvar ke liye aur yaadi chaaitany haai, to tumhare liye haain." 
2Corinthians5:14 kyonaki maseeh ka praem hamen vivash kar deta haai isaaliye ki ham yah samajhte haai, ki jab aek sab ke liye mara to sab mar gaae." 
2Corinthians5:15 aur vah is nimitt sab ke liye mara, ki jo jeevit haai, ve age ko apane liye n jeeaen parantu usake liye jo un ke liye mara aur fir jee utta." 
2Corinthians5:16 so ab se ham kisee ko shareer ke anusar n samajhenge, aur yaadi ham ne maseeh ko bhee shareer ke anusar jana tha, taubhee ab se us ko aeesa naheen janenge." 
2Corinthians5:17 so yaadi koi maseeh men haai to vah nai sraashtti haai: puranee baten beet gai haain dekho, ve sab nai ho gain." 
2Corinthians5:18 aur sab baten parameshvar kee or se haai, jis ne maseeh ke dara apane sath hamara mel milap kee seva hamen saunp dee haai." 
2Corinthians5:19 arthata parameshvar ne maseeh men hokar apane sath sansar ka mel milap kar liya, aur un ke aparadhaen ka dosh un par naheen lagaya aur us ne mel milap ka vachan hamen saunp diya haai.." 
2Corinthians5:20 so ham maseeh ke rajadoot haain mano parameshvar hamare dara samajhata haai: ham maseeh kee or se nivedan karate haai, ki parameshvar ke sath mel milap kar lo." 
2Corinthians5:21 jo pap se agyaat tha, usee ko us ne hamare liye pap ttharaya, ki ham us men hokar parameshvar kee dhaarmikata ban jaaen.." 
2Corinthians6:1 aur ham jo usake sahakarmee haain yah bhee samajhate haai, ki parameshvar ka anuganh jo tum par hua, vyarth n rahane do." 
2Corinthians6:2 kyonaki vah to kahata haai, ki apanee prasannata ke samay maain ne teree sahayata kee: dekho, abhee uddhar ka din haai." 
2Corinthians6:3 ham kisee bat men ttokar khane ka koi bhee avasar naheen dete, ki hamaree seva par koi dosh n aae." 
2Corinthians6:4 parantu har bat men parameshvar ke sevakon kee nai apane sadagunon ko pragatt karate haai, bade dhaurya se, kleshaen se, daridrata se, sankatto se." 
2Corinthians6:5 kode khane se, kaaid hone se, hulladon se, parishram se, jagate rahane se, upavas karane se." 
2Corinthians6:6 paavitrata se, gyaan se, dhaeeraj se, krapaluta se, paavitra atma se." 
2Corinthians6:7 sachche praem se, saty ke vachan se, parameshvar kee samarth se dhaaarmikata ke hathaiyaron se jo dahine, baaen haain." 
2Corinthians6:8 adar aur niradar se, duranam aur sunam se, yadhypi bhramanevalon ke aeese maloom hote haain taubhee sachche haain." 
2Corinthians6:9 anajanon ke sadrashy haain taubhee praasiddh haain marate huon ke aeese haain aur dekhon jeevit haain marakhanevalon ke sadrash haain parantu praan se mare naheen jate. 
2Corinthians6:10 shaek karanevale ke saman haai, parantu sarvada anand karate haai, kangalon ke aeese haai, parantu bahuton ko dhanavan bana dete haain aeese haain jaaise hamare pas kuchh naheen taubhee sab kuchh rakhte haain." 
2Corinthians6:11 he kuarinthiayo, ham ne khulakar tum se baten kee haai, hamara day tumharee or khula hua haai." 
2Corinthians6:12 tumhare liye hamare man men kuchh saketee nahee, par tumhare hee manon men saketee haai." 
2Corinthians6:13 par apane ladke-bale janakar tum se kahata hoo, ki tum bhee usake badale men apana day khol do.." 
2Corinthians6:14 aavishvasiyon ke sath asaman jooae men n juto, kyonki dhaaarmikata aur adharma ka kya mel jola? ya jyoti aur andhakar kee kya sangati?" 
2Corinthians6:15 aur maseeh ka baliyal ke sath kya lagava? ya vishvasee ke sath aavishvasee ka kya nata? 
2Corinthians6:16 aur mooraton ke sath parameshvar ke mandair ka kya sambandha? kyonaki ham to jeevate parameshvar ka mandair haain jaaisa parameshvar ne kaha haai ki maain un men basoonga aur un men chala fira karoonga aur maain un ka parameshvar hoonga, aur ve mere log honge." 
2Corinthians6:17 isaliye prabhu kahata haai, ki un ke beech men se nikalo aur alag raho aur ashuuddh vastu ko mat chooo, to maain tumhen grahan karoonga." 
2Corinthians6:18 aur tumhara pita hoonga, aur tum mere bette aur bettyaian hoge: yah sarvashaktaiman prabhu parameshvar ka vachan haai.." 
2Corinthians7:1 so he pyaro jab ki ye pratigyaaaen hamen milee haai, to ao, ham apane ap ko shareer aur atma kee sab malinata shuuddh kare, aur parameshvar ka bhy rakhte huae paavitrata ko siddh karen.." 
2Corinthians7:2 hamen apane day men jagah do: ham ne n kisee se anyay kiya, n kisee ko bigada, aur n kisee ko ttga." 
2Corinthians7:3 maain tumhen doshaee ttharane ke liye yah naheen kahata: kyonki maain paahile hee kah chooka hoo, ki tum hamare day men aeese bas gaae ho ki ham tumhare sath marane jeene ke liye taaiyar haain." 
2Corinthians7:4 maain tum se bahut hiyav ke sath bol raha hoo, mujhe tum par bada ghamand haai: maain shaantai se bhr gaya hoon apane sare klesh men maain anand se aati bhrapoor rahata hoon.." 
2Corinthians7:5 kyonaki jab ham makiduaniya men aa, tab bhee hamare shareer ko chaain naheen mila, parantu ham charon or se klesh pate the bahar ladaiyan thee, bheetar bhyankar baten thee." 
2Corinthians7:6 taubhee danon ko shaantai denevale parameshvar ne titus ke ane se ham ko shaaantai dee. 
2Corinthians7:7 aur n keval usake ane se parantu us kee us shaantai se bhee, jo us ko tumharee or se milee thee aur us ne tumharee lalasa, aur tumhare dukh or mere liye tumharee dhaun ka samachar hamen sunaya, jis se mujhe aur bhee anand hua." 
2Corinthians7:8 kyoki yadhyapi maain ne apanee patraee se tumhen shaeakit kiya, parantu us se pachhtata naheen jaaisa ki pahile pachhtata tha kyonki maain dekhta hoo, ki us patraee se tumhen shaek to hua parantu vah thodee der ke liye tha." 
2Corinthians7:9 ab maain anaandait hoon par isaliye naheen ki tum ko shaek pahuncha baran isaliye ki tum ne us shaek ke karan man firaya, kyonki tumhara shaek parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar tha, ki hamaree or se tumhen kisee bat men haani n pahunche." 
2Corinthians7:10 kyonaki parameshvara-bhaktai ka shaek aeesa pashchatap utpann karata haai jis ka parinam uddhar haai aur fir us se pachhtana naheen padta: parantu sansaree shaek mratyu utpann karata haai. 
2Corinthians7:11 so dekho, isee bat se ki tumheen parameshvara-bhktai ka shaek hua tum men kitanee uttejana aur pratyattr aur ris, aur bhy, aur lalasa, aur dhaun aur palaa lene ka vichar utpann hua? tum ne sab prakar se yah siddh kar dikhaya, ki tum is bat men nirdosh ho." 
2Corinthians7:12 fir maain ne jo tumhare pas likha tha, vah n to usake karan likha, jis ne anyay kiya, aur n usake karan jis par anyay kiya gaya, parantu isaliye ki tumharee uttejana jo hamare liye haai, vah parameshvar ke samhane tum par pragatt ho jaae." 
2Corinthians7:13 isaliye hamen shaaantai hui aur hamaree is shaantai ke sath titus ke anand ke karan aur bhee anand hua kayonaki usaka jee tum sab ke karan hara bhra ho gaya haai. 
2Corinthians7:14 kyonaki yadi maain ne usake samhane tumhare vishay men kuchh ghamand dikhaya, to lajjait naheen hua, parantu jaaise ham ne tum se sab baten sach sach kah dee thee, vaaise hee hamara dhamand dikhana titus ke samhane bhee sach nikala." 
2Corinthians7:15 aur jab us ko tum sab ke agyaakaree hone ka smaran ata haai, ki kyonkar tum ne drate aur kanpate huae us se bhentt kee to usaka praem tumharee or aur bhee baddhta jata haai." 
2Corinthians7:16 maain anand karata hoo, ki tumharee or se mujhe har bat men ddhaddhs hota haai.." 
2Corinthians8:1 ab he bhaiyo, ham tumhen parameshvar ke us anugrah ka samachar dete haai, jo makiduaniya kee kaleesiyaon par hua haai." 
2Corinthians8:2 ki klesh kee badee pareeksha men un ke bade anand aur bharee kangalapan ke baddh jane se un kee udarata bahut baddh gai. 
2Corinthians8:3 aur unake vishay men meree yah gavahee haai, ki unhon ne apanee samarth bhr baran samarth se bhee bahar man se diya." 
2Corinthians8:4 aur is dan men aur paavitra logon kee seva men bhagee hone ke anugrah ke vishay men ham se bar bar bahut binatee kee. 
2Corinthians8:5 aur jaaisee ham ne agyaa kee thee, vaaisee hee nahee, baran unhon ne prabhu ko, fir parameshvar kee ichchha se ham ko bhee apane tai de diya." 
2Corinthians8:6 isaliye ham ne titus ko samajhaya, ki jesa us ne paahile arambh kiya tha, vaaisa hee tumhare beech men is dan ke kam ko poora bhee kar le." 
2Corinthians8:7 so jaaise har bat men arthata vishvas, vachan, gyaan aur sab prakar ke yatn me, aur us praem me, jo ham se rakhte ho, baddhte jate ho, vaaise hee is dan ke kam men bhee baddhte jao." 
2Corinthians8:8 maain agyaa kee reeati par to nahee, parantu aur ke utsah se tumhare praem kee sachchai ko parakhne ke liye kahata hoon." 
2Corinthians8:9 tum hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah janate ho, ki vah dhanee hokar bhee tumhare liye kangal ban gaya taki usake kangal ho jane se tum dhanee ho jao." 
2Corinthians8:10 aur is bat men mera vichar yahee haai, kyonaki yah tumhare liye achchha haai jo aek varsha se n to keval is kam ko karane hee me, parantu is bat ke chahane men bhee prathm huae the." 
2Corinthians8:11 isaliye ab yah kam poora karo ki ichchha karane men tum taaiyar the, vaaisa hee apanee apanee poonjee ke anusar poora bhee karo." 
2Corinthians8:12 kayonaki yadi man kee taaiyaree ho to dan usake anusar grahan bhee hota haai jo usake pas haai n ki usake anusar jo usake pas naheen. 
2Corinthians8:13 yah naheenkh ki auro ko chaain aur tum ko klesh mile. 
2Corinthians8:14 paranatu barabaree ke vichar se is samay tumharee baddhtee unakee ghattee men kam aa, taki un kee baddhtee bhee tumharee ghattee men kam aa, ki barabaree ho jaae." 
2Corinthians8:15 jesa likha haai, ki jis ne bahut battora usaka kuchh aadhaik n nikala aur jis ne thoda battora usaka kuchh kam n nikala.." 
2Corinthians8:16 aur parameshvar ka dhanyavad ho, jis ne tumhare liye vahee utsah titus ke day men dal diya haai." 
2Corinthians8:17 ki us ne hamara samajhana man liya baran bahut utsahee hokar vah apanee ichchha se tumhare pas gaya haai. 
2Corinthians8:18 aur ham ne usake sath us bhai ko bheja haai jis ka nam susamachar ke vishay men sab kaleesiya men faaila hua haai. 
2Corinthians8:19 aur itana hee nahee, parantu vah kaleesiya se ttharaya bhee gaya ki is dan ke kam ke liye hamare sath jaae aur ham yah seva isaliye karate haai, ki prabhu kee maahima aur hamare man kee taaiyaree pragatt ho jaae." 
2Corinthians8:20 ham is bat men chaukas rahate haai, ki is udarata ke kam ke vishay men jis kee seva ham karate haai, koi ham par dosh n lagate paae." 
2Corinthians8:21 kyeanki jo baten keval prabhu hee ke nikatt nahee, parantu manushyon ke nikatt bhee bhlee haain ham un kee chinta karate haain." 
2Corinthians8:22 aur ham ne usake sath apane bhai ko bheja haai, jis ko ham ne bar bar parakh ke bahut baton men utsahee paya haai parantu ab tum par us ko bada bhrosa haai, is karan vah aur bhee aadhaik utsahee haai." 
2Corinthians8:23 yaadi koi titus ke vishay men poochhe, to vah mera sathee, aur tumhare liye mera sahakarmee haai, aur yadi hamare bhaiyon ke vishay men poochhe, to ve kaleesiyaon ke bheje huae aur maseeh kee maahima haain." 
2Corinthians8:24 so apana praem aur hamara vah ghamand jo tumhare vishay men haai kaleesiyaon ke samhane unhen siddh karake dikhao.. 
2Corinthians9:1 ab us seva ke vishay men jo paavitra logon ke liye kee jatee haai, mujhe tum ko likhna avashy naheen." 
2Corinthians9:2 kyonaki maain tumhare man kee taaiyaree ko janata hoo, jis ke karan maain tumhare vishay men maakiduaniyon ke samhane ghamand dikhata hoo, ki akhya ke log aek varsha se taaiyar huae haai, aur tumahare utsah ne aur bahuton ko bhee ubhara haai." 
2Corinthians9:3 parantu maain ne bhaiyon ko isaliye bheja haai, ki ham ne jo ghamand tumhare vishay men dikhaya, vah is bat men vyarth n tthare parantu jaaisa maain ne kaha vaaise hee tum taaiyar ho raho." 
2Corinthians9:4 aeesa n ho, ki yadi koi maakidunee mere sath aa, aur tumhen taaiyar n paa, to kya jane, is bhrose ke karan ham yah naheen kahate ki tuma laajjait hon." 
2Corinthians9:5 isaliye maain ne bhaiyon se yah binatee karana avashy samajha ki ve pahile se tumhare pas jaae, aur tumharee udarata ka fal jis ke vishay men paahile se vachan diya gaya tha, taaiyar kar rakhe, ki yah dabav se naheen parantu udarata ke fal kee nai taaiyar ho.." 
2Corinthians9:6 parantu bat to yah haai, ki jo thoda bota haai vah thoda kattega bhee aur jo bahut bota haai, vah bahut kattega." 
2Corinthians9:7 har aek jan jaaisa man men ttane vaaisa hee dan kareddh n kuddh kuddh ke, aur n dabav se, kyonki parameshvar harsha se denevale se praem rakhta haai." 
2Corinthians9:8 aur parameshvar sach prakar ka anugrah tumhen bahutayat se de sakata haai jis se har bat men aur har samay, sab kuch, jo tumhen avashyak ho, tumhare pas rahe, aur har aek bhle kam ke liye tumhare pas bahut kuchh ho." 
2Corinthians9:9 jesa likha haai, us ne bithraya, us ne kangalon ko dan diya, usaka dharma sada bana rahega." 
2Corinthians9:10 so jo bonevale ko beej, aur bhojan ke liye rottee deta haai vah tumhen beej dega, aur use falavant karega aur tumhare dharma ke falon ko baddhaaega." 
2Corinthians9:11 ki tum har bat men sab prakar kee udarata ke liye jo hamare dara parameshvar ka dhanyavad karavatee haai, dhanavan kiae jao." 
2Corinthians9:12 kyonaki is seva ke poora karane se, n keval paavitra logon kee ghattyaian pooree hotee haai, parantu logon kee or se parameshvar ka bahut dhanyavad hota haai." 
2Corinthians9:13 kyonaki is seva se praman lekar parameshvar kee maahima pragatt karate haai, ki tum maseeh ke susamachar ko man kar usake adhaeen rahate ho, aur un kee, aur sab kee sahayata karane men udarata pragatt karate rahate ho." 
2Corinthians9:14 or ve tumhare liye praarthna karate haain aur isaaliye ki tum par parameshvar ka bada hee anugrah haai, tumharee lalasa karate rahate haain." 
2Corinthians9:15 parameshvar ko usake us dan ke liye jo varnn se bahar haai, dhanyavad ho.." 
2Corinthians10:1 maain vahee paulus jo tumhare samhane deen hoo, parantu peett peechhe tumharee or sahas karata hoon tum ko maseeh kee namrata, aur komalata ke karan samajhata hoon."
