2Corinthians10:2 maain yah binatee karata hoo, ki tumhare samhane mujhe nirbhy hokar sahas karana n pade jaaisa maain kitanon par jo ham ko shareer ke anusar chalanevale samajhte haai, veerata dikhane ka vichar karata hoon." 
2Corinthians10:3 kyonaki yadhyapi ham shareer men chalate firate haai, taubhee shareer ke anusar naheen ladte." 
2Corinthians10:4 kyeaaki hamaree ladai ke haathaiyar shaareearik nahee, par gaddhon ko ddha dene ke liye parameshvar ke dara samarthee haain." 
2Corinthians10:5 so ham kalpanaon ko, aur har aek unchee bat ko, jo parameshvar kee paahichan ke virodha men utttee haai, khndn karate haain aur har aek bhavana ko kaaid karake maseeh ka agyaakaree bana dete haain." 
2Corinthians10:6 aur taaiyar rahate haain ki jab tumhara agyaa manana poora ho jaa, to har aek prakar ke agyaa n manane ka palatta len." 
2Corinthians10:7 tum inheen baton ko dakhte ho, jo ankhon ke samhane haai, yadi kisee ka apane par yah bhrosa ho, ki maain maseeh ka hoo, to vah yah bhee jan le, ki jaaisa vah maseeh ka haai, vaaise hee ham bhee haain." 
2Corinthians10:8 kyonaki yadi maain us aadhaikar ke vishay men aur bhee ghamand dikhau, jo prabhu ne tumhare bigadne ke liye naheen par banane ke liye hamen diya haai, to lajjait n hoonga." 
2Corinthians10:9 yah maain isaaliye kahata hoo, ki patraiyon ke dara tumhen dranevala n ttharoon." 
2Corinthians10:10 kyonaki kahate he, ki us kee patraiyan to gambheer aur prabhavashaalee haain parantu jab dekhte haai, to vah deh ka nirbal aur vaktavy men halka jan padta haai." 
2Corinthians10:11 so jo aeesa kahata haai, ki samajh rakhe, ki jaaise peett peechhe paatraiyon men hamare vachan haai, vaaise hee tumhare samhane hamare kam bhee honge." 
2Corinthians10:12 kyonaki hamen yah hiyav naheen ki ham apane ap ko un men se aeese kitanon ke sath gine, ya un se apane ko milaae, jo apanee prashansa karate haai, aur apane ap ko apas men nap taulakar aek doosare se milan karake moorkh ttharate haain." 
2Corinthians10:13 ham to seema se bahar ghamand kadapi n karenge, parantu usee seema tak jo parameshvar ne hamare liye tthara dee haai, aur us men tum bhee a gaae ho aur usee ke anusar ghamand bhee karenge." 
2Corinthians10:14 kyonaki ham apanee seema se bahar apane ap ko baddhana naheen chahate, jaaise ki tum tak n pahunchane kee dasha men hota, baran maseeh ka susamachar sunate huae tum tak pahunch chuke haain." 
2Corinthians10:15 aur ham seema se bahar auron ke parishram par ghaman naheen karate parantu hamen asha haai, ki jyon jyon tumhara vishvas baddhta jaaega tyon tyon ham apanee seema ke anusar tumhare karan aur bhee baddhte jaaenge." 
2Corinthians10:16 ki ham tumhare sivanon se age baddhkar susamachar sunaae, aur yah nahee, ki ham auron kee seema ke bheetar bane banaae kamon par ghamand karen." 
2Corinthians10:17 paranatu jo ghamand kare, vah prabhu par ghamand karen." 
2Corinthians10:18 kyonaki jo apanee badai karata haai, vah nahee, parantu jis kee badai prabhu karata haai, vahee grahan kiya jata haai.." 
2Corinthians11:1 yaadi tum meree thodee moorkhta sah lete to kya hee bhla hota ha, meree sah bhee lete ho." 
2Corinthians11:2 kyonaki maain tumhare vishay me ishvareey dhaun lagaae rahata hoo, isaaliye ki maain ne aek hee puroosh se tumharee bat lagai haai, ki tumhen pavitra kunvaree kee nai maseeh ko saunp doon." 
2Corinthians11:3 parantu maain drata hoon ki jaaise sanp ne apanee chaturai se havva ko bahakaya, vaaise hee tumhare man us seedhaai aur paavitrata se jo maseeh ke sath honee chahiae kaheen bhrashtt n kiae jaaen." 
2Corinthians11:4 yaadi koi tumhare pas akar, kisee doosare yeeshu ko prachar kare, jis ka prachar ham ne naheen kiya: ya koi aur atma tumhen mile jo paahile n mila tha ya aur koi susamachar jise tum ne paahile n mana tha, to tumhara sahana tteek hota." 
2Corinthians11:5 maain to samajhta hama, ki maain kisee bat men bade se bade praeriton se kam naheen hoon." 
2Corinthians11:6 yaadi maain vktavay men anadee hoo, taubhee gyaan men naheen baran ham ne is ko har bat men sab par tumhare liye pragatt kiya haai." 
2Corinthians11:7 kya is men maain ne kuchh pap kiya ki maain ne tumhen parameshvar ka susamachar sent ment sunaya aur apane ap ko neecha kiya, ki tum unche ho jao?" 
2Corinthians11:8 maain ne aur kaleeasiyaon ko lootta arthata maain ne un se majadooree lee, taaki tumharee seva karoon." 
2Corinthians11:9 or jab tumhare sath tha, aur mujhe ghattee hui, to maain ne kisee par bhar naheen diya, kyonaki bhaiyon ne, makiduaniya se akar meree ghattee ko paree kee: aur maain ne har bat men apane ap ko tum par bhar hone se roka, aur roke rahoonga." 
2Corinthians11:10 yaadi maseeh kee sachchai mujh men haai, to akhya desh men koi mujhe is ghamand se n rokega." 
2Corinthians11:11 kis liye? kya isaaliye ki maain tum se praem naheen rakhta? parameshvar yah janata haai. 
2Corinthians11:12 parantu jo maain karata hoo, vahee karata rahoonga ki jo log danv ddoonddhte haai, unhen maain danv pane doo, taki jis bat men ve ghamand karate haai, us men ve hamare hee saman ttharen." 
2Corinthians11:13 kyonaki aeese log jootte praerit, aur chhl se kam karanevale, aur maseeh ke praeariton ka roop dharanevale haain." 
2Corinthians11:14 aur yah kuchh achambhe kee bat naheen kyonaki shautan ap bhee jyotimarya svargadoot ka roop dhaaran karata haai. 
2Corinthians11:15 so yaadi usake sevak bhee dharma ke sevakon ka sa roop dhare, to kuchh badee bat naheen parantu un ka ant un ke kamon ke anusar hoga." 
2Corinthians11:16 maain fir kahata hoo, koi mujhe moorkh n samajhe naheen to moorkh hee samajhkar meree sah lo, taki thoda sa maain bhee ghamand karoon." 
2Corinthians11:17 is bedhadk ghamand se bolane men jo kuchh maain kahata hoon vah praboo kee agyaa ke anusar naheen par manon moorkhta se hee kahata hoon. 
2Corinthians11:18 jab ki bahut log shareer ke anusar ghamand karate haai, to maain bhee ghamand karoonga." 
2Corinthians11:19 tum to samajhdar hokar anand se moorkhon kee sah lete ho. 
2Corinthians11:20 kyeanki jab tumhen koi das bana leta haai, ya kha jata haai, ya fasa leta haai, ya apane ap ko bada banata haai, ya tumhare munh par thppad marata haai, to tum sah lete ho." 
2Corinthians11:21 mera kahata anadar kee reeti par haai, mano ki ham nirbal se the parantu jis kisee bat men koi hiyav karata haai maain moorkhta se kahata hoon to maain bhee hiyav karata hoon." 
2Corinthians11:22 kya ve hee ibraanee haain? maain bhee hoon: kya ve hee ibraaheem ke vansh ke haain? maain bhee hoon: kya ve hee maseeh ke sevak haain? 
2Corinthians11:23 maain pagal kee nai kahata hoon maain un se baddhkar hoon! aadhaik parishram karane men bar bar kaaid hone men kode khate men bar bar mratyu ke jokhaimon men. 
2Corinthians11:24 panch bar maain ne yahoodiyon ke hath se untalees untalees kode khaae. 
2Corinthians11:25 teen bar maain ne benteen khai aek bar patthravah kiya gaya teen bar jahaj jin par maain chaddha tha, toott gaae aek raj din maain ne samudra men katta." 
2Corinthians11:26 maain bar bar yatraaon men nadiyon ke jokhaimon men dakuon ke jokhaimon men apane jativalon se jokhaimon men anyajaatiyon se jokhaimon men nagaron men ke jakhaimon men jangal ke jokhaimon men samudra ke jakhaimon men jootte bhaiyon ke beech jokhaimon men 
2Corinthians11:27 paarishram aur kashtt men bar bar jagate rahane men bookh-apiyas men bar bar upavas karate men jade men ughaade rahane men. 
2Corinthians11:28 aur aur baton ko chhodkar jin ka varnn maain naheen karata sab kaleesiyaon kee chinta pratidin mujhe dabatee haai. 
2Corinthians11:29 kis kee nirbalata se maain nirbal naheen hota? kis ke ttokar khane se mera jee naheen dukhta? 
2Corinthians11:30 yaadi ghaman karana avashy haai, to maain apanee nirbalata kee baton par karoonga." 
2Corinthians11:31 prabhu yeeshu ka parameshvar aur pita jo sada dhany haai, janata haai, ki maain joott naheen bolata." 
2Corinthians11:32 daamishk men aaritas raja kee or se jo hakim tha, us ne mere pakadne ko daamishiikayon ke nagar par pahara baaitta rakha tha." 
2Corinthians11:33 aur maain ttokare men khaidkee se hokar bheet par se utara gaya, aur usake hath se bach nikala.." 
2Corinthians12:1 yadhypi ghamand karana to mere liye tteek naheen taubhee karana padta haai so maain prabhu ke diae huae darshanon aur prakashaen kee charcha karoonga. 
2Corinthians12:2 maain maseeh men aek manushy ko janata hoo, chaudah varsha huae ki n jane dehasahit, n jane deharaahit, parameshvar janata haai, aeesa manushy teesare svarga tak utta liya gaya." 
2Corinthians12:3 maain aeese manushy ko janata hoon n jane dehasahit, n jane deharaahit parameshvar hee janata haai." 
2Corinthians12:4 ki svarga lok par utta liya gaya, aur aesee baten suneen jo kahane kee naheen aur jin ka munh men lana manushy ko uchit naheenn." 
2Corinthians12:5 aeese manushy par to maain ghamand karoonga, parantu apane par apanee nirbalataon ko chhod, apane vishay men ghamand n karoonga." 
2Corinthians12:6 kyonaki yadi maain ghamand karana chahoon bhee to moonrkh n hoonga, kyonki sach boloonga tobhee rook jata hoo, aeesa n ho, ki jaaisa koi mujhe dekhta haai, ya mujh se sunata haai, mujhe us se baddhkar samajhe." 
2Corinthians12:7 aur isaliye ki maain prakashaen kee bahutayat se fool n jau, mere shareer men aek kantta chubhaya gaya arthata shautan ka aek doot ki mujhe ghoose mare taaki maain fool n jaun." 
2Corinthians12:8 is ke vishay men maain ne prabhu se teen bar binatee kee, ki mujh se yah door ho jaae." 
2Corinthians12:9 aur us ne mujh se kaha, mera anugrah tere liye bahut haai kyonaki meree samarth nirbalata men siddh hotee haai isaaliye maain bade anand se apanee nirbalataon par ghamand karoonga, ki maseeh kee samarth mujh par chhaya karatee rahe." 
2Corinthians12:10 is karan maain maseeh ke liye nirbalatao, aur nindaon me, aur daridrata me, aur upadravon me, aur sankatton me, prasann hoon kyonki jab maain nirbal hota hoo, tabhee balavant hota hoon.." 
2Corinthians12:11 maain moorkh to bana, parantu tum hee ne mujh se yah barabas karavaya: tumhen to meree prashansa karanee chaahiae thee, kyonki yadhyapi maain kuchh bhee nahee, taubhee un bade se bade praariton se kisee bat men kam naheen hoon." 
2Corinthians12:12 praarit ke lakshan bhee tumhare beech sab prakar ke dhaeeraj saahit chinho, aur adabhut kamo, aur samarth ke kamon se dikhaae gaae." 
2Corinthians12:13 tum koain see bat men aur kaleeasiyon se kam the, keval is men ki maain ne tum par apana bhar n rakha: mera yah anyay kshama karo." 
2Corinthians12:14 dekho, maain teesaree bar tumhare pas ane ko taaiyar hoo, aur maain tum par koi bhar n rakoonga kyonaki maain tumharee sampati nahee, baran tum hee ko chahata hoon: kyonaki ladke-balon ko mata-pita ke liye dhan battorana n chaahia, par mata-apita ko ladke-balon ke liye." 
2Corinthians12:15 maain tumharee atmaon ke liye bahut anand se khrcha karoonga, baran ap bhee khrcha ho jaunga: kya jitana baddhkar maain tum se praem rakhta hoo, utana hee ghattkar tum mujh se praem rakhoge?" 
2Corinthians12:16 aeesa ho sakata haai, ki maain ne tum par bojh naheen dala, parantu chaturai se tumhen dhaekha dekar fansa liya." 
2Corinthians12:17 bhla, jinhen maain ne tumhare pas bheja, kya un men se kisee ke dara maain ne chhl karake tum se kuchh le liya?" 
2Corinthians12:18 maai ne titus ko samajhakar usake sath us bhai ko bheja, to kya teetus ne chhl karake tum se kuchh liya? kya ham aek hee atma ke chalaae n chale? kya aek hee leek par n chale?" 
2Corinthians12:19 tum abhee tak samajh rahe hoge ki ham tumhare samane pratyuttr de rahe haai, ham to parameshvar ko upaasthiat janakar maseeh men bolate haai, aur he piryo, sab baten tumharee unnati hee ke liye kahate haain." 
2Corinthians12:20 kyonaki mujhe dr haai, kaheen aeesa n ho, ki maain akar jaaise chahata hoo, vaaise tumhen n paun aur mujhe bhee jaaisa tum naheen chahate vaaisa hee pao, ki tum men jhgada, dah, krodha, viradha, ishrya, chugalee, abhaiman aur bakhede hon." 
2Corinthians12:21 aur mera parameshvar kaheen mere fir se tumhare yahan ane par mujh par dabav dale aur mujhe bahuton ke liye fir shaek karana pade, jinhon ne pahile pap kiya tha, aur us gande kam, aur vyaabhaichar, aur luchapan se, jo unhon ne kiya, man naheen firaya.." 
2Corinthians13:1 ab teesaree bar tumhare pas ata hoon: do ya teen gavahon ke munh se har aek bat ttharai jaaegee. 
2Corinthians13:2 jaaise jab doosaree bar tumhare sath tha, so vaaise hee ab door rahate huae un logon se jinhon ne pahile pap kiya, aur aur sab logon se ab pahile se kahe deta hoo, ki yadi maain fir aunga, to naheen chhooonga." 
2Corinthians13:3 tum to is ka praman chahate ho, ki maseeh mujh men bolata haai, jo tumhare liye nirbal naheen parantu tum men samarthee haai." 
2Corinthians13:4 vah nirbalata ke karan kroos par chaddhaya to gaya, taubhee parameshvar kee samarth se jeevit haai, ham bhee to us men nirbal haain parantu parameshvar kee samarth se jo tumhare liye haai, usake sath jeeaenge." 
2Corinthians13:5 apane praan ko parakho, ki vishvas men ho ki naheen apane ap ko jancho, kya tum apane vishay men yah naheen janate, ki yeeshu maseeh tum men haai? naheen to tum nikamme nikale ho." 
2Corinthians13:6 par meree asha haai, ki tum jan loge, ki ham nikamme naheen." 
2Corinthians13:7 aur ham apane parameshvar se praarthna karate haai, ki tum koi burai n karo isaliye hanee, ki ham khre dekh pade, par isaaliye ki tum bhlai karo, chahe ham nikamme hee ttharen." 
2Corinthians13:8 kyonaki ham saty ke virodha men kuchh naheen kar sakate, par saty ke liye kar sakate haain." 
2Corinthians13:9 jab ham nirbal haai, aur tum balavant ho, to ham anandait hote haai, aur yah praarthna bhee karate haai, ki tum siddh ho jao." 
2Corinthians13:10 is karan maain tumhare peett peechhe ye baten likhta hoo, ki upaasthiat hokar mujhe us aadhaikar ke anusar jise prabhu ne bigadne ke liye naheen par banane ke liye mujhe diya haai, kaddhai se kuchh karana n pade.." 
2Corinthians13:11 nidan, he bhaiyo, anaandait raho siddh banate jao ddhaddhs rakho aek hee man rakho mel se raho, aur praem aur shaaantai ka data parameshvar tumhare sath hoga." 
2Corinthians13:12 aek doosare ko pavitra chumban se namaskar karo. 
2Corinthians13:13 sab paavitra log tumhen namaskar karate haain. 
2Corinthians13:14 prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah aur parameshvar ka praem aur paavitra atma kee sahabhaagita tum sab ke sath hotee rahe.. 
Galatians1:1 paulus kee, jo n manushyon kee or se, aur n manushy ke dara, baran yeeshu maseeh aur parameshvar pita ke dara, jis ne mare huon men se jilaya, praearit haai." 
Galatians1:2 aur sare bhaiyon kee are se, jo mere sath haain galaatiya kee kaleesiyaon ke nama." 
Galatians1:3 parameshvar pita, aur hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee are se tumhen anuganh aur shaaantai milatee rahe." 
Galatians1:4 usee ne apane ap ko hamare papon ke liye de diya, taaki hamare parameshvar aur pita kee ichchha ke anusar hamen is vartaman bure sansar se chhudae." 
Galatians1:5 us kee stuti aur badai. yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena.. 
Galatians1:6 mujhe ashcharya hota haai, ki jis ne tumhen maseeh ke anugrah se bulaya us se tum itanee jaldee fir kar aur hee prakar ke susamachar kee or jhukane lage." 
Galatians1:7 parantu vah doosara susamachar haai hee naheen: par bat yah haai, ki kitane aeese haai, jo tumhen ghabara dete, aur maseeh ke susamachar ko bigadna chahate haain." 
Galatians1:8 parantu yadi ham ya svarga se koi doot bhee us susamachar ko chhod jo ham ne tum ko sunaya haai, koi aur susamachar tumhen sunaa, to srmit ho." 
Galatians1:9 jaaisa ham paahile kah chuke haai, vaaisa hee maain ab fir kahata hoo, ki us susamachar ko chhod jise tum ne grahan kiya haai, yadi koi aur susamachar sunata haai, to srapit ho. ab maain kya manushyon ko manata hoon ya parameshvar ko? kya maain manushyon ko prasann karana chahata hoon?" 
Galatians1:10 yaadi maain ab tak manushyon ko prasann karata rahata, to maseeh ka das n hota.." 
Galatians1:11 he bhaiyo, maain tumhen jataae deta hoo, ki jo susamachar maain ne sunaya haai, vah manushy ka sa naheen." 
Galatians1:12 kyonaki vah mujhai manushy kee or se naheen pahuncha, aur n mujhe sikhaya gaya, par yeeshu maseeh ke prakash se mila." 
Galatians1:13 yahoodee mat men jo pahile mera chal chalan tha, tum sun chuke ho ki maain parameshvar kee kaleesiya ko bahut hee satata aur nash karata tha." 
Galatians1:14 aur apane bahut se jativalon se jo meree avastha ke the yahoodee mat men baddhta jata tha aur apane bapadadon ke vyavaharon men bahut hee utteajit tha. 
Galatians1:15 parantu parameshvar kee, jis ne meree mata ke garbh hee se mujhe ttharaya aur apane anugrah se bula liya," 
Galatians1:16 jab ichchha hui, ki mujh men apane putra ko pragatt kare ki maain anyajatiyon men usaka susamachar sunaun to n maain ne mans aur lohoo se salah lee" 
Galatians1:17 aur n yarooshalem ko un ke pas gaya jo mujh se pahile praerit the, par turant arab ko chala gaya: aur fir vahan se daamishk ko lautt aya.." 
Galatians1:18 fir teen baras ke bad maain kaaifaa se bhentt karane ke liye yarooshalem ko gaya, aur usake pas pandrah din tak raha." 
Galatians1:19 parantu prabhu ke bhai yakoob ko chhod aur praeriton men se kisee se n mila. 
Galatians1:20 jo baten maain tumhen likhta hoo, dekho parameshvar ko upasthiat janakar kahata hoo, ki ve joottee naheen." 
Galatians1:21 is ke bad maain sooriya aur kilaakiya ke deshaen men aya. 
Galatians1:22 parantu yahoodiya kee kaleesiyaon ne jo maseeh men thee, mera muh to kabhee naheen dekha tha." 
Galatians1:23 parantu yahee suna karatee thee, ki jo hamen paahile satata tha, vah ab usee dharma ka susamachar sunata haai, jise paahile nash karata tha." 
Galatians1:24 aur mere vishay men parameshvar kee maahima karatee theen.. 
Galatians2:1 chaudah varsha ke bad maain baranabas ke sath yarooshalem ko gaya aur titus ko bhee sath le gaya. 
Galatians2:2 aur mera jana ishvareey prakash ke anusar hua: aur jo susamachar maain anyajatiyon men prachar karata hoo, us ko maain ne unhen bata diya, par aekant men unheen ko jo bade samajhe jate the, taki aeesa n ho, ki meree is samay kee, ya agalee daud dhoop vyarth tthare." 
Galatians2:3 parantu titus bhee jo mere sath tha aur jo yoonanee haai khtana karane ke liye vivash naheen kiya gaya. 
Galatians2:4 aur yah un jootte bhaiyon ke karan hua, jo choree se ghaus aae the, ki us svatantrata ka jo maseeh yeeshu men hamen milee haai, bhed lekar hamen das banaaen." 
Galatians2:5 un ke adhaeen hona ham ne ek ghadee bhr n mana, isaaliye ki susamachar kee sachchai tum men banee rahe." 
Galatians2:6 fir jo log kuchh samajhe jate the ve chahe kaaise hee the, mujhe is se kuchh kam nahee, parameshvar kisee ka pakshapat naheen karata un se jo kuchh bhee samajhe jate the, mujhe kuchh bhee naheen praapt hua." 
Galatians2:7 parantu isake vipareet jab unhon ne dekha, ki jaaisa khtana kiae huae logon ke liye susamachar ka kam pataras ko saunpa gaya vaaisa hee khtanarahiton ke liye mujhe susamachar sunana saunpa gaya." 
Galatians2:8 kyonaki jis ne pataras se khtana kiae huon men praeritai ka kayrya bade prabhav saahit karavaya, usee ne mujh se bhee anyajaatiyon men prabhavashaalee kayrya karavaya" 
Galatians2:9 aur jab unhon ne us anugrah ko jo mujhe mila tha jan liya, to yakoob, aur kaaifaa, aur yoohanna ne jo kaleeasiya ke khmbhe samajhe jate the, mujh ko aur baranabas ko daahina hath dekar sang kar liya, ki ham anyajaatiyon ke pas jaae, aur ve khtana kiae huon ke pasa." 
Galatians2:10 keval yah kaha, ki ham kangalon kee suadhai le, aur isee kam ke karane ka maain ap bhee yatn kar raha tha." 
Galatians2:11 par jab kaaifaa antaakiya men aya to maain ne usake munh par usaka samhana kiya, kyonaki vah doshaee tthara tha." 
Galatians2:12 isaliye ki yakoob kee or se kitane logon ke ane se pahile vah anyajatiyon ke sath khaya karata tha, parantu jab ve aa, to khtana kiae huae logon ke dr ke mare un se hatt gaya aur kinara karane laga." 
Galatians2:13 aur usake sath shosh yahoodiyon ne bhee kapatt kiya, yahan tak ki baranabas bhee un ke kapatt men pad gaya." 
Galatians2:14 par jab maain ne dekha, ki ve susamachar kee sachchai par seedhaee chal naheen chalate, to maain ne sab ke samhane kaaifaa se kaha ki jab too yahoodee hokar anyajaatiyon kee nai chalata haai, aur yahoodiyon kee nain naheen to too anyajatiyon ko yahoodiyon kee nain chalane ko kyon kahata haai?" 
Galatians2:15 ham jo janm ke yahoodee haai, aur papee anyajatiyon men se naheen." 
Galatians2:16 taubhee yah janakar ki manushy vyavastha ke kamon se nahee, par keval yeeshu maseeh par vishvas karane ke dara dharmee ttharata haai, ham ne ap bhee maseeh yeeshu par vishvas kiya, ki ham vyavastha ke kamon se naheen par maseeh par vishvas karane se dharmee ttharen isaaliye ki vyavastha ke kamon se koi praanee dharmee n ttharega." 
Galatians2:17 ham jo maseeh men dharmee ttharana chahate haai, yadi ap hee papee nikale, to kya maseeh pap ka sevak haai? kadaapi naheen." 
Galatians2:18 kyonaki jo kuchh maain ne gira diya, yaadi usee ko fir banata hoo, to apane ap ko aparadhaee ttharata hoon." 
Galatians2:19 maain jo vyavasai ke dara vyavastha ke liye mar gaya, ki parameshvar ke liye jeeun." 
Galatians2:20 maain maseeh ke sath kroos par chaddhaya gaya hoo, aur ab maain jeeavit n raha, par maseeh mujh men jeeavit haai: aur maain shareer men ab jo jeeavit hoon to keval us vishvas se jeevit hoo, jo parameshvar ke putra par haai, jis ne mujh se praem kiya, aur mere liye apane ap ko de diya." 
Galatians2:21 maain parameshvar ke anugrah ko vyarth naheen ttharata, kyonki yadi vyavastha ke dara dhaarmikata hotee, to maseeh ka marana vyarth hota.." 
Galatians3:1 he nirbuaddh igalatiyo, kis ne tumhen moh liya? tumharee to manon ankhon ke samhane yeeshu maseeh kroos par dikhaya gaya!" 
Galatians3:2 maain tum se keval yah janana chahata hoo, ki tum ne atma ko, kya vyavastha ke kamon se, ya vishvas ke samachar se paya?" 
Galatians3:3 kya tum aeese nirbuaddh iho, ki atma kee reeti par arambh karake ab shareer kee reeati par ant karoge?" 
Galatians3:4 kya tum ne itana dukh yonhee uttaya? parantu kadachit vyarth naheen. 
Galatians3:5 so jo tumhen atma dan karata aur tum men samarth ke kam karata haai, vah kya vyavastha ke kamon se ya vishvas ke susamachar se aeesa karata haai?" 
Galatians3:6 ibraaheem ne to parameshvar par vishvas kiya aur yah usake liye dhaarmikata ginee gai. 
Galatians3:7 to yah jan lo, ki jo vishvas karanevale haai, ve hee ibraaheem kee santan haain." 
Galatians3:8 aur paavitrashaasr ne pahile hee se yah janakar, ki parameshvar anyajaatiyon ko vishvas se dharmee ttharaaega, pahile hee se ibraaheem ko yah susamachar suna diya, ki tujh men sab jatiyan ashaeesh paaengee." 
Galatians3:9 to jo vishvas karanevale haai, ve vishvasee ibraaheem ke sath ashaeesh pate haain." 
Galatians3:10 so jitane log vyavastha ke kamon par bhrosa rakhte haai, ve sab srap ke adhaeen haai, kyonki likha haai, ki jo koi vyavastha kee pustak men likhee hui sab baton ke karane men sthiar naheen rahata, vah sraapit haai." 
Galatians3:11 par yah bat pragatt haai, ki vyavastha ke dara parameshvar ke yahan koi dharmee naheen ttharata kyonki dharmee jan vishvas se jeevit rahega." 
Galatians3:12 par vyavastha ka vishvas se kuchh sambandha naheen par jo un ko manega, vah un ke karan jeeavit rahega." 
Galatians3:13 maseeh ne jo hamare liye srapit bana, hamen mol lekar vyavastha ke srap se chhudaya kyonaki likha haai, jo koi katt par lattkaya jata haai vah srapit haai." 
Galatians3:14 yah isaliye hua, ki ibraahim kee ashaeesh maseeh yeeshu men anyajatiyon tak panhuche, aur ham vishvas ke dara us atma ko praapt kare, jis kee pratigyaa hui haai.." 
Galatians3:15 he bhaiyo, maain manushy kee reeati par kahata hoo, ki manushy kee vacha bhee jo pakkee ho jatee haai, to n koi use ttalata haai aur n us men kuchh baddhata haai." 
Galatians3:16 nidan, pratigyaaaen ibraaheem ko, aur usake vansh ko dee gain vah yah naheen kahata, ki vashaen ko jese bahuton ke vishay men kaha, par jaaise aek ke vishay men ki tere vansh ko: aur vah maseeh haai." 
Galatians3:17 par maain yah kahata hoon kee jo vacha parameshvar ne pahile se pakkee kee thee, us ko vyavastha char sau tees baras ke bad akar naheen ttal detee, ki pratigyaa vyarth tthare." 
Galatians3:18 kyonaki yadi meeras vyavastha se milee haai, to fir pratigyaa se nahee, parantu parameshvar ne ibraaheem ko pratigyaa ke dara de dee haai." 
Galatians3:19 tab fir vyavastha kya rahee? vah to aparadhaen ke karan bad men dee gai, ki us vansh ke ane tak rahe, jis ko pratigyaa dee gai thee, aur vah svargadooton ke dara aek madhyasth ke hath ttharai gai." 
Galatians3:20 madhyasth to aek ka naheen hota, parantu parameshvar aek hee haai." 
Galatians3:21 to kya vyavastha parameshvar kee pratigyaaon ke virodha men haai? kadapi n ho? kyonaki yadi aeesee vyavastha dee jatee jo jeevan de sakatee, to sachamuch dhaarmikata vyavastha se hotee." 
Galatians3:22 parantu pavitra shaasr ne sab ko pap ke adhaeen kar diya, taaki vah pratigyaa jis ka adhaar yeeshu maseeh par vishvas karana haai, vishvas karanevalon ke liye pooree ho jaae.." 
Galatians3:23 par vishvas ke ane se paahile vyavastha kee adhaeenata men hamaree rakhvalee hotee thee, aur us vishvas ke ane tak jo pragatt honevala tha, ham usee ke bandhan men rahe." 
Galatians3:24 isaliye vyavastha maseeh tak pahunchane ko hamara shaikshak hui haai, ki ham vishvas se dharmee ttharen." 
Galatians3:25 parantu jab vishvas a chuka, to ham ab shaikshak ke adhaeen n rahe." 
Galatians3:26 kyonaki tum sab us vishvas karane ke dara jo maseeh yeeshu par haai, parameshvar kee santan ho." 
Galatians3:27 aur tum men se jitanon ne maseeh men bapatisma liya haai unhon ne maseeh ko pahin liya haai. 
Galatians3:28 ab n koi yahoodee raha aur n yoonanee n koi das, n svatantra n koi nar, n naree kyonki tum sab maseeh yeeshu men aek ho." 
Galatians3:29 aur yaadi tum maseeh ke ho, to ibraaheem ke vansh aur pratigyaa ke anusar vaaris bhee ho.." 
Galatians4:1 maain yah kahata hoo, ki varis jab tak balak haai, yadhyapi sab vastuon ka svamee haai, taubhee us men aur das men kuchh bhed naheen." 
Galatians4:2 parantu pita ke ttharaae huae samay tak rakshakon aur bhndariyon ke vash men rahata haai. 
Galatians4:3 vaaise hee ham bhee, jab balak the, to sansar kee adi shaiksha ke vash men hokar das bane huae the." 
Galatians4:4 parantu jab samay poora hua, to parameshvar ne apane putra ko bheja, jo sree se janma, aur vyavastha ke adhaeen utpann hua." 
Galatians4:5 taaki vyavastha ke adhaeenon ko mol lekar chhuda le, aur ham ko lepalak hone ka pad mile." 
Galatians4:6 aur tum jo putra ho, isaaliye parameshvar ne apane putra ke atma ko, jo he abba, he pita kahakar pukarata haai, hamare day men bheja haai." 
Galatians4:7 isaliye too ab das nahee, parantu putra haai aur jab putra hua, to parameshvar ke dara varis bhee hua." 
Galatians4:8 bhla, tak to tum parameshvar ko n janakar unake das the jo svabhav se parameshvar naheen." 
Galatians4:9 par ab jo tum ne parameshvar ko pahachan liya baran parameshvar ne tum ke pahachana, to un nirbal aur nikammee aadi-ashaiksha kee baton kee or kyon firate ho, jin ke tum dobara das hona chahate ho?" 
Galatians4:10 tum dinon aur maheenon aur niyat samayon aur vasharen ko manate ho. 
Galatians4:11 maain tumhare vishay men drata hoo, kaheen aeesa n ho, ki jo parishram maain nan tumhare liye kiya haai vyarth tthare.." 
Galatians4:12 he bhaiyo, maain tum se binatee karata hoo, tum mere saman ho jao: kyonaki maain bhee tumhare saman hua hoon tum ne mera kuchh bigada naheen." 
Galatians4:13 par tum janate ho, ki pahile paahil maain ne shareer kee nirbalata ke karan tumhen susamachar sunaya." 
Galatians4:14 aur tum ne meree shaareerik dasha ko jo tumharee pareeksha ka karan thee, tuchchh n jana n us ne gharana kee aur parameshvar ke doot baran maseeh ke saman mujhe grahan kiya." 
Galatians4:15 to vah tumhara anand manana kahan gaya? maain tumhara gavah hoo, ki yadi ho sakata, to tum apanee ankhen bhee nikalakar mujhe de dete." 
Galatians4:16 to kya tum se sach bolane ke karan maain tumhara baairee ho gaya hoon. 
Galatians4:17 ve tumhen mitra banana to chahate haai, par bhlee manasa se naheen baran tumhen alag karana chahate haai, ki tum unheen ko mitra bana lo." 
Galatians4:18 par yah bhee achchha haai, ki bhlee bat men har samay mitra banane ka yatn kiya jaa, n keval usee samay, ki jab maain tumhare sath rahata hoon." 
Galatians4:19 he mere balako, jab tak tum men maseeh ka roop n ban jaa, tab tak maain tumhare liye fir jachcha kee see peedaaen sahata hoon." 
Galatians4:20 ichchha to yah hotee haai, ki ab tumhare pas akar aur hee prakar se bolo, kyonaki tumhare vishay men mujhe sandeh haai.." 
Galatians4:21 tum jo vyavastha ke adhaeen hona chahate ho, mujh se kaho, kya tum vyavastha kee naheen sunate?" 
Galatians4:22 yah likha haai, ki ibraaheem ke do putra hue aek dasee se, aur aek svatantra sree se." 
Galatians4:23 parantu jo dasee se hua, vah shaareerik reeti se janma, aur jo svatantra sree se hua, vah praatigyaa ke anusar janma." 
Galatians4:24 in baton men drashttant haai, ye striayan manon do vachaaen haai, aek to seena pahad kee jis se das hee utpann hote haain aur vah hajira haai." 
Galatians4:25 aur haajira mano arab ka seena pahad haai, aur adhaunik yarooshalem use tuly haai, kyonki vah apane balakon samet dasatv men haai." 
Galatians4:26 par upar kee yarooshalem svatantra haai, aur vah hamaree mata haai." 
Galatians4:27 kyonaki likha haai, ki he banj, too jo naheen janatee anand kar, tu jis ko peedaaen naheen uttteen gala kholakar jay jayakar kar, kyonki tyagee hui kee santan suhagin kee santan se bhee adhaik haai." 
Galatians4:28 he bhaiyo, ham isahak kee nain pratigyaa kee santan haain." 
Galatians4:29 aur jaaisa us samay shareer ke anusar janma hua atma ke anusar janme huae ko satata tha, vaaisa hee ab bhee hota haai." 
Galatians4:30 parantu pavitra shaasr kya kahata haai? dasee aur usake putra ko nikal de, kyonaki dasee ka putra svatantra sree ke putra ke sath uttraadhaikaree naheen hoga." 
Galatians4:31 isaliye he bhaiyo, ham dasee ke naheen parantu svatantra sree ke santan haain." 
Galatians5:1 maseeh ne svatantrata ke liye hamen svatantra kiya haai so isee men sthiar raho, aur dasatv ke jooae men fir se n juto.." 
Galatians5:2 dekho, maain paulus tum se kahata hoo, ki yadi khtana karaoge, to maseeh se tumhen kuchh labh n hoga." 
Galatians5:3 fir bhee maain har aek khtana karanevale ko jataae deta hoo, ki use saree vyavastha mananee padegee." 
Galatians5:4 tum jo vyavastha ke dara dharmee ttharana chahate ho, maseeh se alag aur anugrah se gir gaae ho." 
Galatians5:5 kyonaki atma ke kara, ham vishvas se, asha kee hui dhaaarmikata kee batt johate haain." 
Galatians5:6 aur maseeh yeeshu men n khtana, n khtanarahit kuchh kam ka haai, parantu keval vishvas ka jo praem ke dara prabhav karata haai." 
Galatians5:7 tum to bhlee bhanati daud rahe the, ab kis ne tumhen rok diya, ki saty ko n mano." 
Galatians5:8 aeesee seekh tumhare bulanevale kee or se naheen. 
Galatians5:9 thoda sa khmeer sare goondho huae atte ko khmeer kar dalata haai. 
Galatians5:10 maain prabhu par tumhare vishay men bhrosa rakhtah hoo, ki tumhara koi doosara vichar n hoga parantu jo tumhen ghabara deta haai, vah koi kyon n ho dand paaega." 
Galatians5:11 parantu he bhaiyo, yadi maain ab tak khtana ka prachar karata hoo, to kyon ab tak sataya jata hoon fir to kroos kee ttokar jatee rahee." 
Galatians5:12 bhla hota, ki jo tumhen danvadol karate haai, ve katt dale jate!" 
Galatians5:13 he bhaiyo, tum svatantra hone ke liye bulaae gaae ho parantu aeesa n ho, ki yah svatantrata shaareearik kamon ke liye avasar bane, baran praem se aek doosare ke das bano." 
Galatians5:14 kyonaki saree vyavastha is aek hee bat men pooree ho jatee haai, ki too apane padosee se apane saman praem rakh." 
Galatians5:15 par yaadi tum aek doosare ko dant se kattte aur faad khate ho, to chaukas raho, ki aek doosare ka satyanash n kar do.." 
Galatians5:16 par maain kahata hoo, atma ke anusar chalo, to tum shareer kee lalasa kisee reeati se pooree n karoge." 
Galatians5:17 kyonaki shareer atma ke virodha men lalasa karatee haai, aur ye aek doosare ke virodhaee haain isaaliye ki jo tum karana chahate ho vah n karane pao." 
Galatians5:18 aur yaadi tum atma ke chalaae chalate ho to vyavastha ke adhaeen n rahe. 
Galatians5:19 shareer ke kam to pragatt haai, arthata vyaabhaichar, gande kam, luchapana." 
Galatians5:20 mooti pooja, ttona, baair, jhgada, ishrya, krodha, virodha, foot, vidharma." 
Galatians5:21 dah, malavalapan, leelakreeda, aur in ke aeese aur aur kam haai, in ke vishay men maain tum ko pahile se kah deta hoon jaaisa paahile kah bhee chuka hoo, ki aeese aeese kam karanevale parameshvar ke rajy ke vaaris n honge." 
Galatians5:22 par atma ka fal praem, anand, mel, dhaeeraj," 
Galatians5:23 aur krapa, bhalai, vishvas, namrata, aur sanyam haain aeese aeese kamon ke virodha men koi vyavastha naheen." 
Galatians5:24 aur jo maseeh yeeshu ke haai, unhon ne shareer ko us kee lalasaon aur abhailashaen samet kroos par chaddha diya haai.." 
Galatians5:25 yaadi ham atma ke dara jeeavit haai, to atma ke anusar chalen bhee." 
Galatians5:26 ham ghamandee hokar n aek doosare ko chhede, aur n aee doosare se dah karen." 
Galatians6:1 he bhaiyo, yadi koi manushy kisee aparadha men pakada jaa, to tum jo aatmaik jo, namrata ke sath aeese ko sanbhalo, aur apanee bhee chaukasee rakho, ki tum bhee pareeksha men n pado." 
Galatians6:2 tum aek doosare ke bhar uttao, aur is prakar maseeh kee vyavastha ko pooree karo." 
Galatians6:3 kyonaki yadi koi kuchh n hone par bhee apane ap ko kuchh samajhta haai, to apane ap ko dhaekha deta haai." 
Galatians6:4 par har aek apane hee kam ko janch le, aur tak doosare ke vishay men naheen parantu apane hee vishay men usako ghamand karane ka avasar hoga." 
Galatians6:5 kyonaki har aek vyaaktai apana hee bojh uttaaega.. 
Galatians6:6 jo vachan kee shaiksha pata haai, vah sab achchhee vastuon men sikhanevale ko bhagee kare." 
Galatians6:7 dhaekha n khao, parameshvar tttthon men naheen udaya jata, kyonaki manushy jo kuchh bota haai, vahee kattega." 
Galatians6:8 kyonaki jo apane shareer ke liye bota haai, vah shareer ke dara vinash kee kattnee kattega aur jo atma ke liye bota haai, vah atma ke dara anant jeevan kee kattnee kattega." 
Galatians6:9 ham bhle kam karane men hiyav n chhode, kyonki yadi ham ddheele n hane, to tteek samay par kattnee kattenge." 
Galatians6:10 isaliye jahan tak avasar mile ham sab ke sath bhlai karen vishosh karake vishvasee bhaiyon ke sath.. 
Galatians6:11 dekho, maain ne kaaise bade bade aksharon men tum ko apane hath se likha haai." 
Galatians6:12 jitane log shareearik dikhv chahate haain ve tumhare khtana karavane ke liye dabav dete haai, keval isaliye ki ve maseeh ke kroos ke karan sataae n jaaen." 
Galatians6:13 kyonaki khtana karanevale ap to, vyavastha par naheen chalate, par tumhara khtana karana isaaliye chahate haai, ki tumharee shaareearik dasha par ghamand karen." 
Galatians6:14 par aeesa n ho, ki maain aur kisee bat ka ghamand karoo, keval hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke kroos ka jis ke dara sansar meree drashtti men aur maain sansar kee draashtti men kroos par chaddhaya gaya hoon." 
Galatians6:15 kyonaki n khtana, aur n khtanaraahit kuchh haai, parantu nai sraashtti." 
Galatians6:16 aur jitane is niyam par chalenge un par, aur parameshvar ke israael par, shaantai aur daya hotee rahe.." 
Galatians6:17 age ko koi mujhe dukh n de, kyonaki maain yeeshu ke dagon ko apanee deh men liye firata hoon.." 
Galatians6:18 he bhaiyo, hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tumharee atma ke sath rahe. ameena.." 
Ephesians1:1 paulus kee or se jo parameshvar kee ichchha se yeeshu maseeh ka praearit haai, un paavitra aur maseeh yeeshu men vishvasee logon ke nam jo ifisus men haain.." 
Ephesians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe.. 
Ephesians1:3 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke parameshvar aur pita ka dhanyavad ho, ki us ne hamen maseeh men svargeey sthanon men sab prakar kee ashaeesh dee haai." 
Ephesians1:4 jaaisa us ne hamen jagat kee utpaati se pahile us men chun liya, ki ham usake nikatt praem men pavitra aur nirdosh hon." 
Ephesians1:5 aur apanee ichchha kee sumati ke anusar hamen apane liye paahile se ttharaya, ki yeeshu maseeh ke dara ham usake lepalak putra ho," 
Ephesians1:6 ki usake us anugrah kee mahima kee stuti ho, jise us ne hamen us pyare men sent ment diya." 
Ephesians1:7 ham ko us men usake lohoo ke dara chhuttkara, arthata aparadhaen kee kshama, usake us anugrah ke dhan ke anusar mila haai." 
Ephesians1:8 jise us ne sare gyaan aur samajh saahit ham par bahutayat se kiya. 
Ephesians1:9 ki us ne apanee ichchha ka bhed us sumaati ke anusar hamen bataya jise us ne apane ap men ttan liya tha. 
Ephesians1:10 ki samayon ke poore hone ka aeesa prabandha ho ki jo kuchh svarga men haai, aur jo kuchh prathvee par haai, sab kuchh vah maseeh men aekatra kare." 
Ephesians1:11 usee men jis men ham bhee usee kee manasa se jo apanee ichchha ke mat ke anusar sab kuchh karata haai, pahile se ttharaae jakar meeras bane." 
Ephesians1:12 ki ham jinhon ne pahile se maseeh par asha rakhee thee, us kee mahima kee stuti ke karan hon." 
Ephesians1:13 aur usee men tum par bhee jab tum ne saty ka vachan suna, jo tumhare uddhar ka susamachar haai, aur jis par tum ne vishvas kiya, praatigyaa kiae huae paavitra atma kee chhap lagee." 
Ephesians1:14 vah usake mol liae huon ke chhuttkare ke liye hamaree meeras ka bayana haai, ki us kee mahima kee stuti ho.." 
Ephesians1:15 is kara, maain bhee us vishvas ka samachar sunakar jo tum logon men prabhu yeeshu par haai aur sab paavitra logon par pragatt haai." 
Ephesians1:16 tumhare liye dhanyavad karana naheen chhodta, aur apanee praarthnaon men tumhen smaran kiya karata hoon." 
Ephesians1:17 ki hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka parameshvar jo maahima ka pita haai, tumhen apanee pahachan me, gyaan aur prakash ka atma de." 
Ephesians1:18 aur tumhare man kee ankhen jyotirmay hon ki tum jan lo ki usake bulane se kaaisee asha hotee haai, aur paavitra logon men us kee meeras kee maahima ka dhan kaaisa haai." 
Ephesians1:19 aur us kee samarth hamaree or jo vishvas karate haai, kitanee mahan haai, s kee shaaktai ke prabhav ke us kayrya ke anusara." 
Ephesians1:20 jo us ne maseeh ke vishay men kiya, ki us ko mare huon men se jilakar svargeey sthanon men apanee dahinee ora." 
Ephesians1:21 sab prakar kee pradhaanata, aur adhaikar, aur samarth, aur prabhuta ke, aur har aek nam ke upar, jo n keval is lok me, par anevale lok men bhee liya jaaega, baaittaya." 
Ephesians1:22 aur sab kuchh usake panvon tale kar diya: aur use sab vastuon par shairomanai ttharakar kaleesiya ko de diya. 
Ephesians1:23 yah usakee deh haai, aur usee kee paaripoornta haai, jo sab men sab kuchh poorn karata haai.." 
Ephesians2:1 aur us ne tumhen bhee jilaya, jo apane aparadhaen aur papon ke karan mare huae the." 
Ephesians2:2 jin men tum pahile is sansar kee reeati par, aur akash ke aadhaikar ke haakim arthata us atma ke anusar chalate the, jo ab bhee agyaa n mananevalon men kayrya karata haai." 
Ephesians2:3 in men ham bhee sab ke sab paahile apane shareer kee lalasaon men din bitate the, aur shareer, aur man kee manasaaen pooree karate the, aur aur logon ke saman svabhav hee se krodha kee santan the." 
Ephesians2:4 parantu parameshvar ne jo daya ka dhanee haai apane us bade praem ke kara, jis se us ne ham se praem kiya." 
Ephesians2:5 jab ham aparadhaen ke karan mare huae the, to hamen maseeh ke sath jilaya anugrah hee se tumhara uddhar hua haai." 
Ephesians2:6 aur maseeh yeeshu men usake sath uttaya, aur svargeey sthanon men usake sath baaittaya." 
Ephesians2:7 ki vah apanee us krapa se jo maseeh yeeshu men ham par haai, anevale samayon men apane anugrah ka aseem dhan dikhaae." 
Ephesians2:8 kyonaki vishvas ke dara anugrah hee se tumhara uddhar hua haai, aur yah tumharee or se nahee, baran parameshvar ka dan haai." 
Ephesians2:9 aur n karmon ke kara, aeesa n ho ki koi ghamand kare." 
Ephesians2:10 kyonaki ham usake banaae huae haain aur maseeh yeeshu men un bhle kamon ke liye sraje gaae jinhen parameshvar ne pahile se hamare karane ke liye taaiyar kiya.. 
Ephesians2:11 is karan smaran karo, ki tum jo shaareerik reeti se anyajaati ho, aur jo log shareer men hath ke kiae huae khtane se khtanavale kahalate haai, ve tum ko khtanaraahit kahate haain." 
Ephesians2:12 tum log us samay maseeh se alag aur israae kee praja ke pad se alag kiae hua, aur pratigyaa kee vachaon ke bhagee n the, aur ashaaheen aur jagat men ishvararaahit the." 
Ephesians2:13 par ab to maseeh yeeshu men tum jo paahile door the, maseeh ke lohoo ke dara nikatt ho gaae ho." 
Ephesians2:14 kyonaki vahee hamara mel haai, jis ne donon ko aek kar liya: aur alag karaneval deevar ko jo beech men thee, ddha diya." 
Ephesians2:15 aur apane shareer men baair arthata vah vyavastha jis kee agyaaaen vidhaiyon kee reeati par thee, mitta diya, ki donon se apane men aek naya manushy utpann karake mel kara de." 
Ephesians2:16 aur kroos par baair ko nash karake is ke dara danon ko aek deh banakar parameshvar se milaae. 
Ephesians2:17 aur us ne akar tumhen jo door the, aur unhen jo nikatt the, danon ko mela-milap ka susamachar sunaya." 
Ephesians2:18 kyonaki us hee ke dara ham danon kee aek atma men pita ke pas panhuch hotee haai. 
Ephesians2:19 isaliye tum ab videshaee aur musaafir naheen rahe, parantu paavitra logon ke sangee svadeshaee aur parameshvar ke gharane ke ho gaae." 
Ephesians2:20 aur praeriton aur bhavishyadvktaon kee nev par jis ke kone ka patthr maseeh yeeshu ap hee haai, banaae gaae ho." 
Ephesians2:21 jis men saree rachana aek sath milakar prabhu men aek paavitra maandair banatee jatee haai. 
Ephesians2:22 jis men tum bhee atma ke dara parameshvar ka nivasasthan hone ke liye aek sath banaae jate ho.. 
Ephesians3:1 isee karan maain paulus jo tum anyajatiyon ke liye maseeh yeeshu ka bandhaua hoon 
Ephesians3:2 yaadi tum ne parameshvar ke us anugrah ke prabandha ka samachar suna ho, jo tumhare liye mujhe diya gaya." 
Ephesians3:3 arthata yah, ki vah bhed mujh par prakash ke dara pragatt hua, jaaisa maain pahile sankshop men likh chuka hoon." 
Ephesians3:4 jis se tum paddhkar jan sakate ho, ki maain maseeh ka vah bhed kahan tak samajhta hoon." 
Ephesians3:5 jo aur aur samayon men manushyon kee santanon ko aeesa naheen bataya gaya tha, jaaisa ki atma ke dara ab usake paavitra praariton aur bhavishyadvktaon par pragatt kiya gaya haain." 
Ephesians3:6 arthata yah, ki maseeh yeeshu men susamachar ke dara anyajateey lag meeras men sajhee, aur aek hee deh ke aur pratigyaa ke bhagee haain." 
Ephesians3:7 aur maain parameshvar ke anugrah ke us dan ke anusar, jo samarth ke prabhav ke anusar mujhe diya gaya, us susamachar ka sevak bana." 
Ephesians3:8 mujh par jo sab paavitra logon men se chhotte se bhee chhotta hoo, yah anugrah hua, ki maain anyajatiyon ko maseeh ke agamy dhan ka susamachar sunaun." 
Ephesians3:9 aur sab par yah bat prakashait karoo, ki us bhed ka prabandha kya haai, jo sab ke srajanahar parameshvar men adi se gupt tha." 
Ephesians3:10 taaki ab kaleeasiya ke dara, parameshvar ka nana prakar ka gyaan, un pradhaanon aur adhaikaariyon par, jo svargeey sthanon men haain pragatt kiya jaae." 
Ephesians3:11 us sanatan manasa ke anusar, jo us ne hamare prabhu maseeh yeeshu men kee theen." 
Ephesians3:12 jis men ham ko us par vishvas rakhne se hiyav aur bhrose se nikatt ane ka adhaikar haai. 
Ephesians3:13 isaliye maain binatee karata hoon ki jo klesh tumhare liye mujhe ho rahe haai, unake karan hiyav n chhodo, kyonki un men tumharee maahima haai.." 
Ephesians3:14 maain isee karan us pita ke samhane ghauttne ttekata hoo," 
Ephesians3:15 jis se svarga aur prathvee par, har aek gharane ka nam rakha jata haai." 
Ephesians3:16 ki vah apanee mahima ke dhan ke anusar tumhen yah dan de, ki tum usake atma se apane bheetaree manushyatv men samarth pakar balavant hote jao." 
Ephesians3:17 aur vishvas ke dara maseeh tumhare day men base ki tum praem men jad pakadkar aur nev dal kara. 
Ephesians3:18 sab paavitra lagon ke sath bhlee bhanti samajhne kee shaaktai pao ki usakee chaudai, aur lambai, aur unchai, aur gaharai kitanee haai." 
Ephesians3:19 aur maseeh ke us praem ko jan sako jo gyaan se pare haai, ki tum parameshvar kee saree bhrapooree tak paaripoorn ho jao.." 
Ephesians3:20 ab jo aeesa samarthee haai, ki hamaree binatee aur samajh se kaheen adhaik kam kar sakata haai, us samarth ke anusar jo ham men kayrya karata haai," 
Ephesians3:21 kaleesiya me, aur maseeh yeeshu me, us kee mahima peeddhee se peeddhee tak yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena.." 
Ephesians4:1 so maain jo prabhu men bandhaua hoon tum se binatee karata hoo, ki jis bulahatt se tum bulaae gaae the, usake yogy chal chalo." 
Ephesians4:2 arthata saree deenata aur namrata sahit, aur dhaeeraj dharakar praem se aek doosare ko sah lo." 
Ephesians4:3 aur mel ke bandha men atma kee aekata rakhne ka yatn karo. 
Ephesians4:4 aek hee deh haai, aur aek hee atma jaaise tumhen jo bulaae gaae the apane bulaae jane se aek hee asha haai." 
Ephesians4:5 aek hee prabhu haai, aek hee vishvas, aek hee bapatisma." 
Ephesians4:6 aur sab ka aek hee parameshvar aur pita haai, jo sab ke upar aur sab ke madhy me, aur sab men haai." 
Ephesians4:7 par ham men se har aek ko maseeh ke dan ke pariman se anugrah mila haai. 
Ephesians4:8 isaliye vah kahata haai, ki vah unche par chaddha, aur bandhauvai ko bandha le gaya, aur manushyon ko dan diae." 
Ephesians4:9 usake chaddhne se, aur kya paya jata haai keval yah, ki vah prathvee kee nichalee jagahon men utara bhee tha." 
Ephesians4:10 aur jo utar gaya yah vahee haai jo sare akash ke upar chaddh bhee gaya, ki sab kuchh paripoorn kare." 
Ephesians4:11 aur us ne kitanon ko bhvishyadvkata niyukt karake, aur kitanon ko susamachar sunanevale niyukt karake, aur kitanon ko rakhvale aur upadeshak niyukt karake de diya." 
Ephesians4:12 jis se pavitra log siddh jo jaae, aur seva ka kam kiya jaa, aur maseeh kee deh unnati paae." 
Ephesians4:13 jab tak ki ham sab ke sab vishvas, aur parameshvar ke putra kee pahichan men aek n ho jaae, aur aek siddh manushy n ban jaaen aur maseeh ke poore deel daul tak n baddh jaaen." 
Ephesians4:14 taaki ham age ko balak n rahe, jo manushyon kee ttga-avidha aur chaturai se un ke bhram kee yuktaiyon kee, aur upadesh kee, har aek bayar se uchhale, aur idhara-udhar ghaumaae jate hon." 
Ephesians4:15 baran praem men sachchai se chalate hua, sab baton men us men ja sir haai, arthata maseeh men baddhte jaaen." 
Ephesians4:16 jis se saree deh har aek jod kee sahayata se aek sath milakar, aur aek sath gattkar us prabhav ke anusar jo har aek bhag ke pariman se us men hata haai, apane ap ko baddhatee haai, ki vah praem men unnaati karatee jaae.." 
Ephesians4:17 isaliye maain yah kahata hoo, aur prabhu men jataae deta hoon ki jaaise anyajateey log apane man kee anarth kee reeti par chalate haai, tum ab se fir aeese n chalo." 
Ephesians4:18 kyonaki unakee buddh iandhoree ho gai haai aur us agyaanata ke karan jo un men haai aur unake man kee kattorata ke karan ve parameshvar ke jeevan se alag kiae huae haain. 
Ephesians4:19 aur ve sunn hokar, luchapan men lag gaae haai, ki sab prakar ke gande kam lalasa se kiya karen." 
Ephesians4:20 par tum ne maseeh kee aeesee shaiksha naheen pai. 
Ephesians4:21 baran tum ne sachamuch usee kee sunee, aur jaaisa yeeshu me saty haai, usee men sikhaae bhee gaae." 
Ephesians4:22 ki tum agale chalachalan ke purane manushyatv ko jo bhramanevalee abhailashaaon ke anusar bhrashtt hota jata haai, utar dalo." 
Ephesians4:23 aur apane man ke aatmaik svabhav men naye banate jao. 
Ephesians4:24 aur naye manushyatv ko pahin lo, jo parameshvar ke anusar saty kee dhaarmikata, aur pavitrata men sraja gaya haai.." 
Ephesians4:25 is karan joott bolana chhodkar har aek apane padosee se sach bole, kyonaki ham apas men aek doosare ke ang haain." 
Ephesians4:26 krodha to karo, par pap mat karo: soorya ast hone tak tumhara krodha n rahe." 
Ephesians4:27 aur n shautan ko avasar do. 
Ephesians4:28 choree karanevala fir choree n kare baran bhle kam karane men apane hathon se parishram kare isaaliye ki jise prayojan ho, use dene ko usake pas kuchh ho." 
Ephesians4:29 koi gandee bat tumhare munh se n nikale, par avashyakata ke anusar vahee jo unnati ke liye uttm ho, taki us se sunanevalon par anugrah ho." 
Ephesians4:30 aur parameshvar ke paavitra atma ko shaekit mat karo, jis se tum par chhuttkare ke din ke liye chhap dee gai haai." 
Ephesians4:31 sab prakar kee kadvahatt aur prakop aur krodha, aur kalah, aur ninda sab baairabhav samet tum se door kee jaae." 
Ephesians4:32 aur aek doosare par krapal, aur karoonamay ho, aur jaaise parameshvar ne maseeh men tumhare aparadha kshama kia, vaaise hee tum bhee aek doosare ke aparadha kshama karo.." 
Ephesians5:1 isaliye piry, balakon kee nai parameshvar ke sadrash bano." 
Ephesians5:2 aur praem men chalo jaaise maseeh ne bhee tum se praem kiya aur hamare liye apane ap ko sukhdayak sugandha ke liye parameshvar ke age bhentt karake baalidan kar diya. 
Ephesians5:3 aur jaaisa paavitra lagon ke yogy haai, vaaisa tu men vyaabhaichar, aur kisee prakar ashuuddh kam, ya lobh kee charcha tak n ho." 
Ephesians5:4 aur n nirlajjata, n mooddhta kee batacheet kee, n tttthe kee, kyonaki ye baten sohatee nahee, baran dhanyavad hee suna jaaen." 
Ephesians5:5 kyonaki tum yah janate ho, ki kisee vyabhaicharee, ya ashuuddh jan, ya lobhee manushy kee, jo moorat poojanevale ke barabar haai, maseeh aur parameshvar ke rajy men meeras naheen." 
Ephesians5:6 koi tumhen vyarth baton se dhaekha n de kyonki in hee kamon ke karan parameshvar ka krodha agyaa ne mananevalon par bhdkata haai. 
Ephesians5:7 isaliye tum un ke sahabhagee n ho. 
Ephesians5:8 kyonaki tum to pahale andhakar the parantu ab prabhu men jyoti ho, so jyoti kee santan kee nai chalo." 
Ephesians5:9 kyonaki jyonti ka fal sab prakar kee bhlai, aur dhaarmikata, aur saty haai." 
Ephesians5:10 aur yah parakho, ki prabhu ko kya bhata haai?" 
Ephesians5:11 aur andhakar ke nishfal kamon men sahabhagee n ho, baran un par ulahana do." 
Ephesians5:12 kyonaki un ke gupt kamon kee charcha bhee laj kee bat haai. 
Ephesians5:13 par jitane kamon par ulahana diya jata haai ve sab jyoti se pragatt hote haai, kyonki jo sab kuchh ko pragatt karata haai, vah jyonti haai." 
Ephesians5:14 is karan vah kahata haai, he sonevale jag aur murdon men se jee utt to maseeh kee jyoti tujh par chamakegee.." 
Ephesians5:15 isaliye dhyan se dekho, ki kaaisee chal chalate ho nirbuaddhyaien kee nain naheen par buaddhmaianon kee nain chalo." 
Ephesians5:16 aur avasar ko bahumol samajho, kyonaki din bure haain." 
Ephesians5:17 is karan nirbuaddh in ho, par dhyan se samajho, ki prabhu kee ichchha kya haai?" 
Ephesians5:18 aur dakhras se matavale n bano, kyonki is se luchapar hota haai, par atma se paripoorn hote jao." 
Ephesians5:19 aur apas men bhjan aur stutigan aur aatmaik geet gaya karo, aur apane apane man men prabhu ke samhane gate aur keertan karate raho." 
Ephesians5:20 aur sada sab baton ke liye hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke nam se parameshvar pita ka dhanyavad karate raho. 
Ephesians5:21 aur maseeh ke bhy se aek doosare ke adhaeen raho.. 
Ephesians5:22 he paatnaiyo, apane apane pati ke aeese adhaeen raho, jaaise prabhu ke." 
Ephesians5:23 kyonaki pati patnee ka sir haai jaaise ki maseeh kaleesiya ka sir haai aur ap hee deh ka uddharakarta haai. 
Ephesians5:24 par jaaise kaleesiya masahee ke adhaeen haai, vaaise hee patnaiyan bhee har bat men apane apane paati ke adhaeen rahen." 
Ephesians5:25 he paatiyo, apanee apanee patnee se praem rakho, jaaisa maseeh ne bhee kaleesiya se praem karake apane ap ko usake liye de diya." 
Ephesians5:26 ki us ko vachan ke dara jal ke snan se shuuddh karake pavitra banaae. 
Ephesians5:27 aur use aek aeesee tejasvee kaleeasiya banakar apane mas khdee kare, jis men n kalank, n jhurree, n koi aeesee vastu ho, baran pavitra aur nirdosh ho." 
Ephesians5:28 isee prakar uchit haai, ki pati apanee apanee patnee se praem rakhta haai, vah apane ap se praem rakhta haai." 
Ephesians5:29 kyonaki kisee ne kabhee apane shareer se baair naheen rakha baran usaka palana-poshan karata haai, jaaisa maseeh bhee kaleeasiya ke sath karata haai" 
Ephesians5:30 isaliye ki ham us kee deh ke ang haain. 
Ephesians5:31 is karan manushy mata pita ko chhodkar apanee patnee se mila rahega, aur ve donon aek tan honge." 
Ephesians5:32 yah bhed to bada haai par maain maseeh aur kaleeasiya ke vishay men kahata hoon. 
Ephesians5:33 par tum men se har aek apanee patnee se apane saman praem rakhe, aur patnee bhee apane pati ka bhy mane.." 
Ephesians6:1 he balako, prabhu men apane mata pita ke agyaakaree bano, kyonaki yah uchit haai." 
Ephesians6:2 apanee mata aur pita ka adar kar yah paahilee agyaa haai, jis ke sath pratigyaa bhee haai." 
Ephesians6:3 ki tera bhla ho, aur too dharatee par bahut din jeevit rahe." 
Ephesians6:4 aur he bachchevalon apane bachchon ko ris n dilao parantu prabhu kee shaiksha, aur chitavanee dete hua, un ka palana-poshan karo.." 
Ephesians6:5 he daso, jo log shareer ke anusar tumhare svamee haai, apane man kee seedhaai se drate, aur kanpate hua, jaaise maseeh kee, vaaise hee un kee bhee agyaa mano." 
Ephesians6:6 aur manushyon ko prasann karanevalon kee nai dikhane ke liye seva n karo, par maseeh ke dason kee nai man se parameshvar kee ichchha par chalo." 
Ephesians6:7 aur us seva ko manushyon kee nahee, parantu prabhu kee janakar suichchha se karo." 
Ephesians6:8 kyonaki tum janate ho, ki jo koi jaaisa achchha kam karega, chahe das ho, chahe svatantra prabhu se vaaisa hee paaega." 
Ephesians6:9 aur he svamiyo, tum bhee dhamaakiyan chhodkar un ke sath vaaisa hee vyavahar karo, kyonaki janate ho, ki un ka aur tumhara danon ka svamee svarga men haai, aur vah kisee ka paksha naheen karata.." 
Ephesians6:10 nidan, prabhu men aur us kee shaaktai men balavant bano." 
Ephesians6:11 parameshvar ke sare hathaiyar bandha lo ki tum shautan kee yuaktaiyon ke samhane khde rah sako. 
Ephesians6:12 kyonaki hamara yah mallayudd, lohoo aur mans se nahee, parantu pradhaanon se aur adhaikaariyon se, aur is sansar ke andhakar ke hakimon se, aur us dushttta kee atmaik senaon se haai jo akash men haain." 
Ephesians6:13 isaliye parameshvar ke sare hathaiyar bandha lo, ki tum bure din men samhana kar sako, aur sab kuchh poora karake sthiar rah sako." 
Ephesians6:14 so saty se apanee kamar kasakar, aur dhaarmeekata kee jhlaim pahin kara." 
Ephesians6:15 aur panvon men mel ke susamachar kee taaiyaree ke joote paahin kara. 
Ephesians6:16 aur un sab ke sath vishvas kee ddhal lekar sthiar raho jis se tum us dushtt ke sab jalate huae teeron ko bujha sako. 
Ephesians6:17 aur uddhar ka ttop, aur atma kee talavar jo parameshvar ka vachan haai, le lo." 
Ephesians6:18 aur har samay aur har prakar se atma men praarthna, aur binatee karate raho, aur isee liye jagate raho, ki sab pavitra logon ke liye lagatar binatee kiya karo." 
Ephesians6:19 aur mere liye bhee, ki mujhe bolane ke samay aeesa prabal vachan diya jaa, ki maain hiyav se susamachar ka bhed bata sakoon jis ke liye maain janjeer se jakada hua rajadoot hoon." 
Ephesians6:20 aur yah bhee ki maain us ke vishay men jaaisa mujhe chahiae hiyav se boloon.. 
Ephesians6:21 aur tuakhaikus jo piry bhai aur prabhu men vishvasayogy sevak haai tumhen sab baten bataaega, ki tum bhee meree dasha jano ki maain kaaisa rahata hoon." 
Ephesians6:22 use maain ne tumhare pas isee liye bheja haai, ki tum hamaree dasha jano, aur vah tumhare manon ko shaaantai de.." 
Ephesians6:23 parameshvar pita aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se bhaiyon ko shaaantai aur vishvas sahit praem mile. 
Ephesians6:24 jo hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh se sachcha praem rakhte haai, un sab par anugrah hota rahe.." 
Philippians1:1 maseeh yeeshu ke das paulus aur teemuathaiyus kee or se sab paavitra logon ke nam, jo maseeh yeeshu men hokar filippee meen rahate haai, adhyakshaen aur sevakon sameta." 
Philippians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe.. 
Philippians1:3 maain jab jab tumhen smaran karata hoo, tab tab apane parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoon." 
Philippians1:4 aur jab kabhee tum sab ke liye binatee karata hoo, to sada anand ke sath binatee karata hoon." 
Philippians1:5 isaliye, ki tum pahile din se lekar aj tak susamachar ke faailane men mere sahabhagee rahe ho." 
Philippians1:6 aur mujhe is bat ka bhrosa haai, ki jis ne tum men achchha kam arambh kiya haai, vahee use yeeshu maseeh ke din tak poora karega." 
Philippians1:7 uchit haai, ki maain tum sab ke liye aeesa hee vichar karoon kyonki tum mere man men a base ho, aur meree kaaid men aur susamachar ke liye uttr aur praman dene men tum sab mere sath anugrah men sahabhagee ho." 
Philippians1:8 is men parameshvar mera gavah haai, ki maain maseeh yeeshu kee see praeeti karake tum sab kee lalasa karata hoon." 
Philippians1:9 aur maain yah praarthna karata hoo, ki tumhara praem, gyaan aur sab prakar ke vivek saahit aur bhee baddhta jaae." 
Philippians1:10 yahan tak ki tum uttm se uttm baton ko piry jano, aur maseeh ke din tak sachche bane raho aur ttokar n khao." 
Philippians1:11 aur us dhaarmikata ke fal se jo yeeshu maseeh ke dara hote haai, bhrapoor hote jao jis se parameshvar kee mahima aur stuti hotee rahe.." 
Philippians1:12 he bhaiyo, maain chahata hoo, ki tum yah jan lo, ki mujh par jo beeta haai, us se susamachar hee kee baddhtee hui haai." 
Philippians1:13 yahan tak ki kaaisaree rajy kee saree palattn aur shosh sab logon men yah pragatt ho gaya haai ki maain maseeh ke liye kaaid hoon. 
Philippians1:14 aur prabhu men jo bhai haai, un men se bahudha mere kaaid hone ke kara, hiyav bandha kar, parameshvar ka vachan nidhadk sunane ka aur bhee hiyav karate haain." 
Philippians1:15 kitane to dah aur jhgade ke karan maseeh ka prachar karate haain aur kitane bhlee manasa se. 
Philippians1:16 kai aek to yah jan kar ki maain susamachar ke liye uttr dene ko ttharaya gaya hoon praem se prachar karate haain. 
Philippians1:17 aur kai aek to seedhaai se naheen par virodha se maseeh kee katha sunate haai, yah samajh kar ki meree kaaid men mere liye klesh utpann karen." 
Philippians1:18 so kya hua? keval yah, ki har prakar se chahe bahane se, chahe sachchai se, maseeh kee katha sunai jatee haai, aur maain is se anandait hoo, aur anaandait rahoonga bhee." 
Philippians1:19 kyonaki maain janata hoo, ki tumharee binatee ke dara, aur yeeshu maseeh kee atma ke dan ke dara is ka pratifal mera uddhar hoga." 
Philippians1:20 maain to yahee haardik lalasa aur asha rakhta hoo, ki maain kisee bat men laajjait n hou, par jaaise mere prabal sahas ke karan maseeh kee badai meree deh ke dara sada hotee rahee haai, vaaisa hee ab bhee ho chahe maain jeevit rahoon va mar jaun." 
Philippians1:21 kyonaki mere liye jeeavit rahana maseeh haai, aur mar jana labh haai." 
Philippians1:22 par yaadi shareer men jeeavit rahana hee mere kam ke liye labhdayak haai to maain naheen janata, ki kis ko chunoon." 
Philippians1:23 kyonaki maain donon ke beech adhar men lattka hoon jee to chahata haai ki kooch karake maseeh ke pas ja rahoo, kyonki yah bahut hee achchha haai." 
Philippians1:24 parantu shareer men rahana tumhare karan aur bhee avashyak haai. 
Philippians1:25 aur isaliye ki mujhe is ka bhrosa haai so maain janata hoon ki maain jeeavit rahoonga, baran tum sab ke sath rahoonga jis se tum vishvas men draddh hote jao aur us men anandait raho." 
Philippians1:26 aur jo ghamand tum mere vishay men karate ho, vah mere fir tumhare pas ane se maseeh yeeshu men adhaik baddh jaae." 
Philippians1:27 keval itana karo ki tumhara chala-chalan maseeh ke susamachar ke yogy ho ki chahe maain akar tumhen dekoo, chahe n bhee au, tumhare vishay men yah sunoo, ki tum aek hee atma men sthiar ho, aur aek chitt hokar susamachar ke vishvas ke liye paarishram karate rahate ho." 
Philippians1:28 aur kisee bat men virodhaiyon se bhy naheen khate? yah un ke liye vinash ka spashtt chinh haai, parantu tumhare liye uddhar ka, aur yah parameshvar kee or se haai." 
Philippians1:29 kyonaki maseeh ke karan tum par yah anugrah hua ki n keval us par vishvas karo par usake liye dukh bhee uttao. 
Philippians1:30 aur tumhen vaaisa hee paarishram karana haai, jaaisa tum ne mujhe karate dekha haai, aur ab bhee sunate ho, ki maain vaaisa hee karata hoon.." 
Philippians2:1 so yaadi maseeh men kuchh shaantai aur praem se ddhaddhs aur atma kee sahabhagita, aur kuchh karoona aur daya haai." 
Philippians2:2 to mera yah anand poora karo ki aek man raho aur aek hee praem, aek hee chit, aur aek hee manasa rakho." 
Philippians2:3 virodha ya joottee badai ke liye kuchh n karo par deenata se aek doosare ko apane se achchha samajho. 
Philippians2:4 har aek apanee hee hit kee nahee, baran doosaron kee hit kee bhee chinta kare." 
Philippians2:5 jaaisa maseeh yeeshu ka svabhav tha vaaisa hee tumhara bhee svabhav ho. 
Philippians2:6 jis ne parameshvar ke svaroop men hokar bhee parameshvar ke tuly hone ko apane vash men rakhne kee vastu n samajha. 
Philippians2:7 baran apane ap ko aeesa shoony kar diya, aur das ka svaroop dhaaran kiya, aur manushy kee samanata men ho gaya." 
Philippians2:8 aur manushy ke roop men pragatt hokar apane ap ko deen kiya, aur yahan tak agyaakaree raha, ki mratyu, ha, kroos kee mratyu bhee sah lee." 
Philippians2:9 is karan parameshvar ne usako ati mahan bhee kiya, aur usako vah nam diya jo sab namon men shraeshtt haai." 
Philippians2:10 ki jo svarga men aur prathvee par aur jo prathvee ke neeche haai ve sab yeeshu ke nam par ghauttna tteken. 
Philippians2:11 aur parameshvar pita kee maahima ke liye har aek jeebh angeekar kar le ki yeeshu maseeh hee prabhu haai.. 
Philippians2:12 so he mere pyaro, jis prakar tum sada se agyaa manate aae ho, vaaise hee ab bhee n keval mere sath rahate huae par vishosh karake ab mere door rahane par bhee drate aur kanpate huae apane apane uddhar ka kayrya poora karate jao." 
Philippians2:13 kyonaki parameshvar hee haai, jis n apanee suichchha nimitt tumhare man men ichchha aur kam, donon baton ke karane ka prabhav dala haai." 
Philippians2:14 sab kam bina kudkudaae aur bina vivad ke kiya karo. 
Philippians2:15 taaki tum nirdosh aur bhole hokar tteddhe aur hatteele logon ke beech parameshvar ke nishkalank santan bane raho, jin ke beech men tum jeevan ka vachan liae huae jagat men jalate deepakon kee nain dikhai dete ho." 
Philippians2:16 ki maseeh ke din mujhe ghamand karane ka karan ho, ki n mera daudna aur n mera paarishram karana vyarth hua." 
Philippians2:17 aur yaadi mujhe tumhare vishvas ke balidan aur seva ke sath apana lohoo bhee bahana pade taubhee maain anandait hoo, aur tum sab ke sath anand karata hoon." 
Philippians2:18 vaaise hee tum bhee anandait ho, aur mere sath anand karo.." 
Philippians2:19 mujhe prabhu yeeshu men asha haai, ki maain teemuthaiyus ko tumhare pas turant bhejoonga, taki tumharee dasha sunakar mujhe shaantai mile." 
Philippians2:20 kyonaki mere pas aeese svabhav ka koi nahee, jo shuuddh man se tumharee chinta kare." 
Philippians2:21 kyonaki sab apane svarth kee khoj men rahate haai, n ki yeeshu maseeh kee." 
Philippians2:22 par usako to tum ne parakha aur jan bhee liya haai, ki jaaisa putra pita ke sath karata haai, vaaisa hee us ne susamachar ke faailane men mere sath paarishram kiya." 
Philippians2:23 so mujhe asha haai, ki jyon hee mujhe jan padega ki meree kya dasha hogee, tyon hee maain use turant bhej doonga." 
Philippians2:24 aur mujhe prabhu men bhrosa haai, ki maain ap bhee shaeegha aunga." 
Philippians2:25 par maain ne ipadeetus ko jo mera bhai, aur sahakarmee aur sangee yoddha aur tumhara doot, aur avashyak baton men meree seva tthal karanevala haai, tumhare pas bhejana avashy samajha." 
Philippians2:26 kyonaki usaka man tum sab men laga hua tha, is karan vah vyakul rahata tha kyonaki tum ne us kee beemaree ka hal suna tha." 
Philippians2:27 aur nishchay vah beemar to ho gaya tha, yahan tak ki marane par tha, parantu parameshvar ne us par daya kee aur keval us hee par nahee, par mujh par bhee, ki mujhe shaek par shaek n ho." 
Philippians2:28 isaliye maain ne use bhejane ka aur bhee yatn kiya ki tum us se fir bhentt karake anandait ho jao aur mera shaek ghatt jaae. 
Philippians2:29 isaliye tum prabhu men us se bahut anand ke sath bhentt karana, aur aeeson ka adar kiya karana." 
Philippians2:30 kyonaki vahee maseeh ke kam ke liye apane praanon par jokhaim uttakar marane ke nikatt ho gaya tha, taki jo ghattee tumharee or se meree seva men hui, use poora kare.." 
Philippians3:1 nidan, he mere bhaiyo, prabhu men anaandait raho: ve hee baten tum ko bar bar likhne men mujhe to koi kashtt naheen hota, aur is men tumharee kushalata haai." 
Philippians3:2 kuton se chaukas raho, un bure kam karanevalon se chaukas raho, un katt koott karanevalon se chaukas raho." 
Philippians3:3 kyonaki khtanavale to ham hee haain jo parameshvar ke atma kee aguvai se upasana karate haai, aur maseeh yeeshu par ghamand karate haain aur shareer par bhrosa naheen rakhte." 
Philippians3:4 par maain to shareer par bhee bhrosa rakh sakata hoon yadi kisee aur ko shareer par bhrosa rakhne ka vichar ho, to maain us se bhee baddhkar rakh sakata hoon." 
Philippians3:5 attven din mera khtana hua, israael ke vansha, aur binyameen ke gotra ka hoon ibraaniyon ka ibraanee hoon vyavastha ke vishay men yaadi kaho to fareesee hoon." 
Philippians3:6 utsah ke vishay men yaadi kaho to kaleesiya ka satanevala aur vyavastha kee dhaarmikata ke vishay men yaadi kaho to nirdosh tha. 
Philippians3:7 parantu jo jo baten mere labh kee thee, unheen ko maain ne maseeh ke karan haani samajh liya haai." 
Philippians3:8 baran maain apane prabhu maseeh yeeshu kee pahichan kee uttmata ke karan sab baton ko hani samajhta hoon: jis ke karan maain ne sab vastuon kee haani uttai, aur unhen kooda samajhta hoo, jis se maain maseeh ko praapt karoon." 
Philippians3:9 aur us men paya jaun n ki apanee us dhaaarmikata ke sat, jo vyavastha se haai, baran us dhaarmikata ke sath jo maseeh par vishvas karane ke karan haai, aur parameshvar kee or se vishvas karane par milatee haai." 
Philippians3:10 aur maain usako aur usake mratyunjay kee samarth ko, aur usake sath dukhon men sahabhagee hane ke marma ko jano, aur us kee mratyu kee samanata ko praapt karoon." 
Philippians3:11 taaki maain kisee bhee reeati se mare huon men se jee uttne ke pad tak pahunchoon. 
Philippians3:12 yah matalab nahee, ki maain pa chuka hoo, ya siddh ho chuka hoon: par us padarth ko pakadne ke liye dauda chala jata hoo, jis ke liye maseeh yeeshu ne mujhe pakada tha." 
Philippians3:13 he bhaiyo, meree bhavana yah naheen ki maain pakad chuka hoon: parantu keval yah aek kam karata hoo, ki jo baten peechhe rah gai haain un ko bool kar, age kee baton kee or baddhta hua." 
Philippians3:14 nishaane kee or dauda chala jata hoo, taki vah inam pau, jis ke liye parameshvar ne mujhe maseeh yeeshu men upar bulaya haai." 
Philippians3:15 so ham men se jitane siddh haai, yahee vichar rakhe, aur yadi kisee bat men tumhara aur hee vichar ho to parameshvar use bhee tum par pragatt kar dega." 
Philippians3:16 so jahan tak ham pahunche haai, usee ke anusar chalen.." 
Philippians3:17 he bhaiyo, tum sab milakar meree see chal chalo, aur unhen pahichan rakho, jo is reeti par chalate haain jis ka udaharan tum ham men pate ho." 
Philippians3:18 kyonaki bahutere aeesee chal chalate haai, jin kee charcha maain ne tum se bar bar kiya haai aur ab bhee ro rokar kahata hoo, ki ve apanee chalachalan se maseeh ke kroos ke baairee haain." 
Philippians3:19 un ka ant vinash haai, un ka ishvar pett haai, ve apanee lajja kee baton par ghamand karate haai, aur prathvee kee vastuon par man lagaae rahate haain." 
Philippians3:20 par hamara svadesh svarga par haai aur ham par uddharakarta prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke vahan se an hee batt joh rahe haain. 
Philippians3:21 vah apanee shaaktai ke us prabhav ke anusar jis ke dara vah sab vastuon ko apane vash men kar sakata haai, hamaree deena-heen deh ka roop badalakar, apanee maahima kee deh ke anukool bana dega.." 
Philippians4:1 isaliye he mere piry bhaiyo, jin men mera jee laga rahata haai jo mere anand aur mukutt ho, he piry bhaiyo, prabhu men isee prakar sthiar raho.." 
Philippians4:2 maain yooadiya ko bhee samajhata hoo, aur suntukhe ko bhee, ki ve prabhu men aek man rahen." 
Philippians4:3 aur he sachche sahakarmee maain tujh se bhee binatee karata hoo, ki too un striayon kee sahayata kar, kyonki unhon ne mere sath susamachar faailane me, klemens aur mere un aur sahakarmiyon samet parishram kiya, jin ke nam jeevan kee pustak men likhe huae haain." 
Philippians4:4 prabhu men sada anandait raho maain fir kahata hoo, anaandait raho." 
Philippians4:5 tumharee komalata sab manushyon par pragatt ho: prabhu nikatt haai. 
Philippians4:6 kisee bhee bat kee chinta mat karo: parantu har aek bat men tumhare nivedan, praarthna aur binatee ke dara dhanyavad ke sath parameshvar ke sammukh apaasthiat kiae jaaen." 
Philippians4:7 tab parameshvar kee shaantai, jo samajh se bilakul pare haai, tumhare day aur tumhare vicharon ko maseeh yeeshu men suraakshiat rakhegee.." 
Philippians4:8 nidan, he bhaiyo, jo jo baten saty haai, aur jo jo baten adaraneey haai, aur jo jo baten uchit haai, aur jo jo baten paavitra haai, aur jo jo baten suhavanee haai, aur jo jo baten manabhavanee haai, nidan, jo jo sadagun aur prashansa kee baten haai, unheen par dhyan lagaya karo." 
Philippians4:9 jo baten tum ne mujh se seekhee, aur grahan kee, aur sunee, aur mujh men dekhee, unheen ka palan kiya karo, tab parameshvar jo shaaantai ka sota haai tumhare sath rahega.." 
Philippians4:10 maain prabhu men bahut anaandait hoon ki ab itane dinon ke bad tumhara vichar mere vishay men fir jagrat hua haai nishchay tumhen arambh men bhee is ka vichar tha, par tumhen avasar n mila." 
Philippians4:11 yah naheen ki maain apanee ghattee ke karan yah kahata hoon kyonaki maain ne yah seekha haai ki jis dasha men hoo, usee men santosh karoon." 
Philippians4:12 maain deen hona bhee janata hoon aur baddhna bhee janata hoon: har aek bat aur sab dashaaon men trapt hona, bookha rahana, aur baddhna-ghattna seekha haai." 
Philippians4:13 jo mujhe samarth deta haai us men maain sab kuchh kar sakata hoon. 
Philippians4:14 taubhee tum ne bhla kiya, ki mere klesh men mere sahabhagee huae." 
Philippians4:15 aur he filippaiyo, tum ap bhee janate ho, ki susamachar prachar ke arambh men jab maain ne maakiduaniya se kooch kiya tab tumhen chhod aur kisee mandlee ne lene dene ke vishay men meree sahayata naheen kee." 
Philippians4:16 isee prakar jab maain thaissaluneeke men tha tab bhee tum ne meree ghattee pooree karane ke liye aek bar kya baran do bar kuchh bheja tha. 
Philippians4:17 yah naheen ki maain dan chahata hoon parantu maain aeesa fal chahata hoo, jo tumhare labh ke liye baddhta jaae." 
Philippians4:18 mere pas sab kuchh haai, baran bahutayat se bhee haai: jo vastuen tum ne ipaudeetus ke hath se bhejee theen unhen pakar maain trapt ho gaya hoo, vah to sugandha aur grahan karane ke yogy baalidan haai, jo parameshvar ko bhata haai." 
Philippians4:19 aur mera paramashevar bhee apane us dhan ke anusar jo mahima saahit maseeh yeeshu men haai tumharee har aek ghattee ko pooree karega. 
Philippians4:20 hamare parameshvar aur pita kee maahima yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena.. 
Philippians4:21 har aek paavitra jan ko jo yeeshu maseeh men haain namaskar kaho. jo bhai mere sath haain tumhen namaskar kahate haain. 
Philippians4:22 sab paavitra log, vishosh karake jo kaaisar ke gharane ke haain tum ko namaskar kahate haain.." 
Philippians4:23 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tumharee atma ke sath rahe.. 
Colossians1:1 paulus kee or se, jo parameshvar kee ichchha se maseeh yeeshu ka praearit haai, aur bhai teemuathaiyus kee or se." 
Colossians1:2 maseeh men un pavitra aur vishvasee bhaiyon ke nam jo kulusse men rahate haain.. hamare pita parameshvar kee or se tumhen anugrah aur shaantai praapt hotee rahe.. 
Colossians1:3 ham tumhare liye nit praarthna karake apane prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke pita arthata parameshvar ka dhanyavad karate haain. 
Colossians1:4 kyonaki ham ne suna haai, ki maseeh yeeshu par tumhara vishvas haai, aur sab paavitra logon se praem rakhte ho." 
Colossians1:5 us asha kee hui vastu ke karan jo tumhare liye svarga men rakhee hui haai, jis ka varnn tum us susamachar ke saty vachan men sun chuke ho." 
Colossians1:6 jo tumhare pas pahuncha haai aur jaaisa jagat men bhee fal lata, aur baddhta jata haai arthata jis din se tum ne us ko suna, aur sachchai se parameshvar ka anugrah pahichana haai, tum men bhee aeesa hee karata haai." 
Colossians1:7 usee kee shaiksha tum ne hamare piry sahakarmee ipaas se pai, jo hamare liye maseeh ka vishvasayogy sevak haai." 
Colossians1:8 usee ne tumhare praem ko jo atma men haai ham par pragatt kiya.. 
Colossians1:9 isee liye jis din se yah suna haai, ham bhee tumhare liye yah praarthna karane aur binatee karane se naheen chookate ki tum sare aatmaik gyaan aur samajh saahit parameshvar kee ichchha kee pahichan men paaripoorn ho jao." 
Colossians1:10 taaki tumhara chala-chalan prabhu ke yogy ho, aur vah sab prakar se prasann ho, aur tum men har prakar ke bhle kamon ka fal lage, aur parameshvar kee pahichan men baddhte jao." 
Colossians1:11 aur us kee maahima kee shaaktai ke anusar sab prakar kee samarth se balavant hote jao, yahan tak ki anand ke sath har prakar se dhaeeraj aur sahanashaeelata dikha sako." 
Colossians1:12 aur pita ka dhanyavad karate raho, jis ne hamen is yogy banaya ki jyoti men pavitra logon ke sath meeras men samabhagee hon." 
Colossians1:13 usee ne hamen andhakar ke vash se chhudakar apane piry putra ke rajy men pravesh karaya. 
Colossians1:14 jis se hamen chhuttkara arthata papon kee kshama praapt hotee haai. 
Colossians1:15 vah to adrashy parameshvar ka praatiroop aur saree srashtti men pahilautta haai. 
Colossians1:16 kyonaki usee men saree vastuon kee sraashtti hui, svarga kee ho athva prathvee kee, dekhee ya anadekhee, kya sinhasan, kya prabhutana, kya pradhaanataae, kya aadhaikar, saree vastuaen usee ke dara aur usee ke liye srajee gai haain." 
Colossians1:17 aur vahee sab vastuon men prathm haai, aur sab vastuaen usee men sthiar rahatee haain." 
Colossians1:18 aur vahee deh, arthata kaleesiya ka sir haai vahee adi haai aur mare huon men se jee uttnevalon men pahilautta ki sab baton men vahee pradhaan tthare." 
Colossians1:19 kyonaki pita kee prasannata isee men haai ki us men saree paaripoornta vas kare. 
Colossians1:20 aur usake kroos par bahe huae lohoo ke dara mel milap karake, sab vastuon ko usee ke dara se apane sath mel kar le chahe ve prathvee par kee ho, chahe svarga men kee." 
Colossians1:21 aur us ne ab usakee shaareearik deh men mratyu ke dara tumhara bhee mel kar liya jo paahile nikale huae the aur bure kamon ke karan man se baairee the. 
Colossians1:22 taaki tumhen apane sammukh pavitra aur nishkalank, aur nirdosh banakar upasthiat kare." 
Colossians1:23 yaadi tum vishvas kee nev par draddh bane raho, aur us susamachar kee asha ko jise tum ne suna haai n chhodo, jis ka prachar akash ke neeche kee saree sraashtti men kiya gaya aur jis ka maain paulus sevak bana.." 
Colossians1:24 ab maain un dukhon ke karan anand karata hoo, jo tumhare liye uttata hoo, aur maseeh ke kleshaen kee ghattee us kee deh ke liye, arthata kaleesiya ke liye, apane shareer men pooree kiae deta hoon." 
Colossians1:25 jis ka maain parameshvar ke us prabandha ke anusar sevak bana, jo tumhare liye mujhe saunpa gaya, taaki maain parameshvar ke vachan ko poora poora prachar karoon." 
Colossians1:26 arthata us bhed ko samayon aur peeaddhiyon se gupt raha, parantu ab usake un pavitra logon par pragatt hua haai." 
Colossians1:27 jin par parameshvar ne pragatt karana chaha, ki unhen gyaat ho ki anyajaatiyon men us bhed kee maahima ka mooly kya haai? aur vah yah haai, ki maseeh jo maahima kee asha haai tum men rahata haai." 
Colossians1:28 jis ka prachar karake ham har aek manushy ko jata dete haain aur sare gyaan se har aek manushy ko sikhate haai, ki ham har aek vyaaktai ko maseeh men siddh karake upaasthiat karen." 
Colossians1:29 aur isee ke liye maain us kee us shaktai ke anusar jo mujh men samarth ke sath prabhav dalatee haai tan man lagakar paarishram bhee karata hoon. 
Colossians2:1 maain chahata hoon ki tum jan lo, ki tumhare aur un ke jo laudeekiya men haai, aur un sab ke liye jinhon ne mera shaareearik munh naheen dekha maain kaaisa parishram karata hoon." 
Colossians2:2 taaki un ke manon men shaantai ho aur ve praem se apas men gatte rahe, aur ve pooree samajh ka sara dhan praapt kare, aur parameshvar pita ke bhed ko arthata maseeh ko pahichan len." 
Colossians2:3 jis men buddh iddh aur gyaan se sare bhndar chhpai huae haain. 
Colossians2:4 yah maain isaaliye kahata hoo, ki koi manushy tumhen lubhanevalee baton se dhaekha n de." 
Colossians2:5 kyonaki maain yaadi shareer ke bhav se tum se door hoo, taubhee aatmaik bhav se tumhare nikatt hoo, aur tumhare vidhai-anusar charitra aur tumhare vishvas kee jo maseeh men haai draddhta dekhkar prasann hota hoon.." 
Colossians2:6 so jaaise tum ne maseeh yeeshu ko prabhu karake grahan kar liya haai, vaaise hee usee men chalate raho." 
Colossians2:7 aur usee men jad pakadte aur baddhte jao aur jaaise tum sikhaae gaae vaaise hee vishvas men draddh hote jao, aur atyant dhanyavad karate raho.." 
Colossians2:8 chaukas raho ki koi tumhen us tatva-gyaan aur vyarth dhaekhe ke dara aher n kare le, jo manushyon ke paramparai mat aur sansar kee aadi shaiksha ke anusar haai, par maseeh ke anusar naheen." 
Colossians2:9 kyonaki us men ishvaratv kee saree paaripoornta sadeh vas karatee haai. 
Colossians2:10 aur tum usee men bhrapoor ho gaae ho jo saree pradhaanata aur adhaikar ka shairomanai haai. 
Colossians2:11 usee men tumhara aeesa khtana hua haai, jo hath se naheen hota, arthata maseeh ka khtana, jis se shaareerik deh utar dee jatee haai." 
Colossians2:12 aur usee ke sath bapaatisma men gade gaa, aur usee men parameshvar kee shaktai par vishvas karake, jis ne us ko mare huon men se jilaya, usake sath jee bhee utte." 
Colossians2:13 aur us ne tumhen bhee, jo apane aparadhae, aur apane shareer kee khtanarahit dasha men murda the, use sath jilaya, aur hamare sab aparadhaen ko kshama kiya." 
Colossians2:14 aur vidhaiyon ka vah lekh jo hamare nam par aur hamare virodha men tha mitta dala aur us ko kroos par keelon se jadkar samhane se hatta diya haai. 
Colossians2:15 aur us ne pradhaanataon aur adhaikaron ko apane upar se utar kar un ka khullamakhulla tamasha banaya aur kroos ke karan un par jaya-jaya-kar kee ghvaani sunai.. 
Colossians2:16 isaliye khane peene ya pabrba ya naae chand, ya sabton ke vishay men tumhara koi faaisala n kare." 
Colossians2:17 kyonaki ye sab anevalee baton kee chhaya haai, par mool vastuaen maseeh kee haain." 
Colossians2:18 koi manushy deenata aur svargadooton kee pooja karake tumhen dod ke pratifal se vanchit n kare. aeesa manushy dekhee hui baton men laga rahata haai aur apanee shaareearik samajh par vyarth foolata haai. 
Colossians2:19 aur us shairomanai ko pakade naheen rahata jis se saree deh jodon aur patthon ke dara palana-poshan pakar aur aek sath gattkar, parameshvar kee or se baddhtee jatee haai.." 
Colossians2:20 jab ki tum maseeh ke sath sansar kee aadi shaiksha kee or se mar gaae ho, to fir un ke saman jo sansar men jeevan bitate haain manushyon kee agyaaon aur shaikshaanusar" 
Colossians2:21 aur aeesee vidhaiyon ke vash men kyon rahate ho? ki yah n choona, use n chakhna, aur use hath n lagana." 
Colossians2:22 kyonaki ye sab vastu kam men late late nash ho jaaengee. 
Colossians2:23 in vidhaiyon men apanee ichchha ke anusar gaddhee hui bhktai kee reeti, aur deenata, aur shaareerik yogabhyas ke bhav se gyaan ka nam to haai, parantu shaareearik lalasaon ko rokane men in ke kuchh bhee labh naheen hota.." 
Colossians3:1 so jab tum maseeh ke sath jilaae gaa, to svargeey vastuon kee khoj men raho, jahan maseeh vartaman haai aur parameshvar ke daahinee or baaitta haai." 
Colossians3:2 prathvee par kee naheen parantu svargeey vastuon par dhyan lagao. 
Colossians3:3 kyonaki tum to mar gaa, aur tumhara jeevan maseeh ke sath parameshvar men chhpai hua haai."
