Colossians3:4 jab maseeh jo hamara jeevan haai, pragatt hoga, tab tum bhee usake sath mahima saahit pragatt kiae jaoge." 
Colossians3:5 isaliye apane un ango ko mar dalo, jo prathvee par haai, arthata vyaabhaichar, ashuuddhta, dushkamana, buree lalasa aur lobh ko jo moorti pooja ke barabar haai." 
Colossians3:6 in hee ke karan parameshvar ka prakop agyaa n mananevalon par padta haai. 
Colossians3:7 aur tum bhee, jab in buraiyon men jeevan bitate the, to inheen ke anusar chalate the." 
Colossians3:8 par ab tum bhee in sab ko arthata krodha, rosha, baairabhav, ninda, aur munh se gaaliyan bakana ye sab baten chhod do." 
Colossians3:9 aek doosare se joott mat bolo kyonki tum ne purane manushyatv ko usake kamon samet utar dala haai. 
Colossians3:10 aur naae manushyatv ko paahin liya haai jo apane srajanahar ke svaroop ke anusar gyaan praapt karane ke liye naya banata jata haai. 
Colossians3:11 us men n to yoonanee raha, n yahoodee, n khtana, n khtanaraahit, n jangalee, n skootee, n das aur n svatantra: keval maseeh sab kuchh aur sab men haai.." 
Colossians3:12 isaliye parameshvar ke chune huon kee nain jo pavitra aur piry haai, badee karoona, aur bhlai, aur deenata, aur namrata, aur sahanashaeelata dhaaran karo." 
Colossians3:13 aur yaadi kisee ko kisee par dosh dene ko koi karan ho, to aek doosare kee sah lo, aur aek doosare ke aparadha kshama karo: jaaise prabhu ne tumhare aparadha kshama kia, vaaise hee tum bhee karo." 
Colossians3:14 aur in sab ke upar praem ko jo siddhta ka kattbaindha haai bandha lo. 
Colossians3:15 aur maseeh kee shaaantai jis ke liye tum aek deh hokar bulaae bhee gaae ho, tumhare day men rajy kare, aur tum dhanyavadee bane raho." 
Colossians3:16 maseeh ke vachan ko apane day men aadhaikai se basane do aur siddh gyaan sahit aek doosare ko sikhao, aur chitao, aur apane apane man men anugrah ke sath parameshvar ke liye bhjan aur stuatigan aur aatmaik geet gao." 
Colossians3:17 aur vachan se ya kam se jo kuchh bhee karo sab prabhu yeeshu ke nam se karo, aur usake dara parameshvar pita ka dhanyavad karo.." 
Colossians3:18 he paatnaiyo, jesa prabhu men uchit haai, vaaisa hee apane apane paati ke adhaeen raho." 
Colossians3:19 he paatiyo, apanee apanee patnee se praem rakho, aur un se kattorata n karo." 
Colossians3:20 he balako, sab baton men apane apane mata-pita kee agyaa ka palan karo, kyonki prabhu is se prasann hota haai." 
Colossians3:21 he bachchevalo, apane balakon ko tang n karo, n ho ki un ka sahas toott jaae." 
Colossians3:22 he sevako, jo shareer ke anusar tumhare svamee haai, sab baton men un kee agyaa ka palan karo, manushyon ko prasann karanevalon kee nain dikhane ke liye nahee, parantu man kee seedhaai aur parameshvar ke bhy se." 
Colossians3:23 aur jo kuchh tum karate ho, tan man se karo, yah samajhkar ki manushyon ke liye naheen parantu prabhu ke liye karate ho." 
Colossians3:24 kyonaki tum janate ho ki tumhen is ke badale prabhu se meeras milegee: tum prabhu maseeh kee seva karate ho. 
Colossians3:25 kyonaki jo bura karata haai, vah apanee burai ka fal paaega vahan kisee ka pakshapat naheen." 
Colossians4:1 he svamiyo, apane apane dason ke sath nyay aur tteek tteek vyavahar karo, yah samajhkar ki svarga men tumhara bhee aek svamee haai.." 
Colossians4:2 praarthna men lage raho, aur dhanyavad ke sath us men jagrat raho." 
Colossians4:3 aur is ke sath hee sath hamare liye bhee praarthna karate raho, ki parameshvar hamare liye vachan sunane ka aeesa dar khol de, ki ham maseeh ke us bhed ka varnn kar saken jis ke karan maain kaaid men hoon." 
Colossians4:4 aur use aeesa pragatt karoo, jaaisa mujhe karana uchit haai." 
Colossians4:5 avasar ko bahumooly samajhkar baharavalon ke sath buddhmaianee se bartav karo. 
Colossians4:6 tumhara vachan sada anugrah sahit aur salona ho, ki tumhen har manushy ko uchit reeti se uttr dena a jaae." 
Colossians4:7 piry bhai aur vishvasayogy sevak, tuakhaikus jo prabhu men mera sahakarmee haai, meree sab baten tumhen bata dega." 
Colossians4:8 use maain ne isaliye tumhare pas bheja haai, ki tumhen hamaree dasha maloom ho jaae aur vah tumhare dayon ko shaaantai de." 
Colossians4:9 aur usake sath unesimus ko bhee bheja haai jo vishvasayogy aur piry bhai aur tum hee men se haai, ye tumhen yahan kee saree baten bata denge.." 
Colossians4:10 aaristarkhus jo mere sath kaaidee haai, aur marakus jo baranaba ka bhai lagata haai. jis ke vishay men tum ne agyaa pai thee ki yadi vah tumhare pas aa, to us se achchhee tarah vyavahar karana." 
Colossians4:11 aur yeeshu jo yoostus kahalata haai, tumhen namaskar kahate haain. khtana kiae huae logon men se keval ye hee parameshvar ke rajy ke liye mere sahakarmee aur meree shaaantai ka karan rahe haain." 
Colossians4:12 ipaas jo tum men se haai, aur maseeh yeeshu ka das haai, tum se namaskar kahata haai aur sada tumhare liye praarthnaon men prayatn karata haai, taki tum siddh hokar poorn vishvas ke sath parameshvar kee ichchha par sthiar raho." 
Colossians4:13 maain usaka gavah hoo, ki vah tumhare liye aur laudeekiya aur hiyarapualisavalon ke liye bada yatn karata rahata haai." 
Colossians4:14 piry vaaidh looka aur demas ka tumhen namaskara. 
Colossians4:15 laudeekiya ke bhaiyon ko aur tumafaas aur un ke ghar kee kaleesiya ko namaskar kahana. 
Colossians4:16 aur jab yah patra tumhare yahan paddh liya jaa, to aeesa karana ki laudeeakiya kee kaleesiya men bhee paddha jaa, aur vah patra jo laudeeakiya se aae use tum bhee paddhna." 
Colossians4:17 fir akhairppus se kahana ki jo seva prabhu men tujhe saunpee gai haai, use savadhaanee ke sath pooree karana.." 
Colossians4:18 mujh paulus ka apane hath se likha hua namaskara. meree janjeeron ko smaran rakhna tum par anugrah hota rahe. ameena.. 
1Thessalonians1:1 paulus aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus kee or se thaissaluanikiyon kee kaleesiya ke nam jo parameshvar pita aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh men haai.. anugrah aur shaaantai tumhen milatee rahe.. 
1Thessalonians1:2 ham apanee praarthnaon men tumhen smaran karate aur sada tum sab ke vishay men parameshvar ka dhanyavad karate haain. 
1Thessalonians1:3 aur apane parameshvar aur pita ke samhane tumhare vishvas ke kam, aur praem ka parishram, aur hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh men asha kee dhaeerata ko lagatar smaran karate haain." 
1Thessalonians1:4 aur he bhaiyo, parameshvar ke piry logon ham janaten haai, ki tum chune huae ho." 
1Thessalonians1:5 kyonaki hamara susamachar tumhare pas n keval vachan matra hee men baran samarth aur paavitra atma, aur bade nishchay ke sath pahuncha haai jaaisa tum janate ho, ki ham tumhare liye tum men kaaise ban gaae the." 
1Thessalonians1:6 aur tum bade klesh men paavitra atma ke anand ke sath vachan ko manakar hamaree aur prabhu kee see chal chalane lage. 
1Thessalonians1:7 yahan tak ki makiduaniya aur akhya ke sab vishvasiyon ke liye tum adarsha bane. 
1Thessalonians1:8 kyonaki tumhare yahan se n keval makiduaniya aur akhya men prabhu ka vachan sunaya gaya, par tumhare vishvas kee jo parameshvar par haai, har jagah aeesee charcha faail gai haai, ki hamen kahane kee avashyakata hee naheen." 
1Thessalonians1:9 kyonaki ve ap hee hamare vishay men batate haain ki tumhare pas hamara ana kaaisa hua aur tum kyonaki mooraton se parameshvar kee or firen taaki jeevate aur sachche parameshvar kee seva karo. 
1Thessalonians1:10 aur usake putra ke svarga par se ane kee batt johate raho jise us ne mare huon men se jilaya, arthata yeeshu kee, jo hamen anevale prakop se bachata haai.." 
1Thessalonians2:1 he bhaiyo, tum ap hee janate ho ki hamara tumhare pas ana vyarth n hua." 
1Thessalonians2:2 baran tum ap hee janate ho, ki pahile paahil filippee men dukh uttane aur upadrav sahane par bhee hamare parameshvar ne hamen aeesa hiyav diya, ki ham parameshvar ka susamachar bharee virodhaen ke hote huae bhee tumhen sunaaen." 
1Thessalonians2:3 kyonaki hamara upadesh n bhram se haai aur n ashuuddhta se, aur n chhl ke sath haai." 
1Thessalonians2:4 par jaaisa parameshvar ne hamen yogy ttharakar susamachar saunpa, ham vaaisa hee varnn karate haain aur is men manushyon ko nahee, parantu parameshvar ko, jo hamare manon ko janchata haai, prasann karate haain." 
1Thessalonians2:5 kyonaki tum janate ho, ki ham n to kabhee lallopato kee baten kiya karate the, aur n lobh ke liye bahana karate the, parameshvar gavah haai." 
1Thessalonians2:6 aur yadhypi ham maseeh ke praerit hone ke karan tum par bojh dal sakate the, taubhee ham manushyon se adar naheen chahate the, aur n tum se, n aur kisee se." 
1Thessalonians2:7 parantu jis tarah mata apane balakon ka palana-poshan karatee haai, vaaise hee ham ne bhee tumhare beech men rahakar komalata dikhai haai." 
1Thessalonians2:8 aur vaaise hee ham tumharee lalasa karate hua, n keval parameshvar ko susamachar, par apana apana praan bhee tumhen dene ko taaiyar the, isaaliye ki tum hamare pyare ho gaae the." 
1Thessalonians2:9 kyonaki, he bhaiyo, tum hamare parishram aur kashtt ko smaran rakhte ho, ki ham ne isaaliye rat din kam andha karate huae tum men parameshvar ka susamachar prachar kiya, ki tum men se kisee par bhar n hon." 
1Thessalonians2:10 tum ap hee gavah ho: aur parameshvar bhee, ki tumhare beech men jo vishvas rakhte ho ham kaaisee pavitrata aur dhaaarmikata aur nirdoshata se rahe." 
1Thessalonians2:11 jaaise tum janate ho, ki jaaisa pita apane balakon ke sath bartav karata haai, vaaise hee ham tum men se har aek ko bhee upadesh karate, aur shaaantai dete, aur samajhate the." 
1Thessalonians2:12 ki tumhara chal chalan parameshvar ke yogy ho, jo tumhen apane rajy aur mahima men bulata haai.." 
1Thessalonians2:13 isaliye ham bhee parameshvar ka dhanyavad nirantar karate haain ki jab hamare dara parameshvar ke susamachar ka vachan tumhare pas pahuncha, to tum ne us manushyon ka nahee, parantu parameshvar ka vachan samajhkar aur sachamuch yah aeesa hee haai grahan kiya: aur vah tum men jo vishvas rakhte ho, prabhavashaalee haai." 
1Thessalonians2:14 isaliye ki tum, he bhaiyo, parameshvar kee un kaleesiyaon kee see chal chalane lage, jo yahoodiya men maseeh yeeshu men haai, kyonki tum ne bhee apane logon se vaaisa hee dukh paya, jaaisa unhon ne yahoodiyon se paya tha." 
1Thessalonians2:15 jinhon ne prabhu yeeshu ko aur bhvishyadvktaon ko bhee mar dala aur ham ko sataya, aur parameshvar un se prasann naheen aur ve sab manushyon ko virodha karate haain." 
1Thessalonians2:16 aur ve anyajatiyon se un ke uddhar ke liye baten karane se hamen rokate haai, ki sada apane papon ka napua bhrate rahen par un par bhyanak prakop a pahuncha haai.." 
1Thessalonians2:17 he bhaiyo, jab ham thodee der ke liye man men naheen baran pragatt men tum se alag ho gaae the, to ham ne badee lalasa ke sath tumhara munh dekhne ke liye aur bhee aadhaik yatn kiya." 
1Thessalonians2:18 isaliye ham ne arthata mujh paulus ne aek bar nahee, baran do bar tumhare pas ana chaha, parantu shautan hamen roke raha." 
1Thessalonians2:19 bhla hamaree asha, ya anand ya badai ka mukutt kya haai? kya hamare prabhu yeeshu ke sammukh usake ane ke samay tum hee n hoge?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 hamaree badai aur anand tum hee ho.. 
1Thessalonians3:1 isaliye jab ham se aur bhee n raha gaya, to ham ne yah ttharaya ki aethens men akele rah jaaen." 
1Thessalonians3:2 aur ham ne teemuthaiyus ko jo maseeh ke susamachar men hamara bhai, aur parameshvar ka sevak haai, isaaliye bheja, ki vah tumhen sthiar kare aur tumhare vishvas ke vishay men tumhen samajhaae." 
1Thessalonians3:3 ki koi in kleshaen ke karan dgamaga n jaae kyonaki tum ap janate ho, ki ham in hee ke liye ttharaae gaae haain." 
1Thessalonians3:4 kyonaki pahile bhee, jab ham tumhare yahan the, to tum ne kaha karate the, ki hamen klesh uttane padenge, aur aeesa hee hua haai, aur tum janate bhee ho." 
1Thessalonians3:5 is karan jab mujh se aur n raha gaya, to tumhare vishvas ka hal janane ke liye bheja, ki kaheen aeesa n ho, ki pareeksha karanevale ne tumharee pareeksha kee ho, aur hamara paarishram vyarth ho gaya ho." 
1Thessalonians3:6 par abhee teemuathaiyus ne jo tumhare pas se hamare yahan akar tumhare vishvas aur praem ka susamachar sunaya aur is bat ko bhee sunaya, ki tum sada praem ke sath hamen smaran karate ho, aur hamare dekhne kee lalasa rakhte ho, jaaisa ham bhee tumhen dekhne kee." 
1Thessalonians3:7 isaliye he bhaiyo, ham ne apanee saree saketee aur klesh men tumhare vishvas se tumhare vishay men shaantai pai." 
1Thessalonians3:8 kyonaki ab yadi tum prabhu men sthiar raho to ham jeevit haain. 
1Thessalonians3:9 aur jaaisa anand hamen tumhare karan apane parameshvar ke samhane haai, usake badale tumhare vishay men ham kis reeti se parameshvar ka dhanyavad karen?" 
1Thessalonians3:10 ham raj din bahut hee praarthna karate rahate haai, ki tumhara munh dekhe, aur tumhare vishvas kee ghattee pooree karen.." 
1Thessalonians3:11 ab hamara parameshvar aur pita ap hee aur hamara prabhu yeeshu, tumhare yahan ane ke liye hamaree aguvai kare." 
1Thessalonians3:12 aur prabhu aeesa kare, ki jesa ham tum se praem rakhte haain vaaisa hee tumhara praem bhee apas me, aur sab manushyon ke sath baddhe, aur unnaati karata jaae." 
1Thessalonians3:13 taaki vah tumhare manon ko aeesa sthiar kare, ki jab hamara prabhu yeeshu apane sab pavitra logon ke sath aa, to ve hamare parameshvar aur pita ke samhane pavitrata men nirdosh ttharen.." 
1Thessalonians4:1 nidan, he bhaiyo, ham tum se binatee karate haai, aur tumhen prabhu yeeshu men samajhate haai, ki jaaise tum ne ham se yogy chal chalana, aur parameshvar ko prasann karana seekha haai, aur jaaisa tum chalate bhee ho, vaaise hee aur bhee baddhte jao." 
1Thessalonians4:2 kyonaki tum janate ho, ki ham ne prabhu yeeshu kee or se tumhen kaun kaun see agyaa pahunchai." 
1Thessalonians4:3 kyonaki parameshvar kee ichchha yah haai, ki tum pavitra bano: arthata vyaabhaichar se bache raho." 
1Thessalonians4:4 aur tum men se har aek paavitrata aur adar ke sath apane patra ko praapt karana jane. 
1Thessalonians4:5 aur yah kam aabhailasha se nahee, aur n un jaatiyon kee nai, jo parameshvar ko naheen janateen." 
1Thessalonians4:6 ki is bat men koi apane bhai ko n ttge, aur n us par danv chalaa, kyonaki prabhu is sab baton ka palatta lenevala haai jaaisa ki ham ne pahile tum se kaha, aur chitaya bhee tha." 
1Thessalonians4:7 kyonaki parameshvar ne hamen ashuuddh hone ke liye nahee, parantu paavitra hone ke liye bulaya haai." 
1Thessalonians4:8 is karan jo tuchchh janata haai, vah manushy ko nahee, parantu parameshvar ko tuchchh janata haai, jo apana paavitra atma tumhen deta haai.." 
1Thessalonians4:9 kintu bhaichare kee praeeti ke vishay men yah avashy nahee, ki maain tumhare pas kuchh likoon kyonaki apas men praem rakhna tum ne ap hee parameshvar se seekha haai." 
1Thessalonians4:10 aur sare makiduaniya ke sab bhaiyon ke sath aeesa karate bhee ho, par he bhaiyo, ham tumhen samajhate haai, ki aur bhee baddhte jao." 
1Thessalonians4:11 aur jaaisee ham ne tumhen agyaa dee, vaaise hee chupachap rahane aur apana apana kam kaj karane, aur apane apane hathon se kamane ka prayatn karo." 
1Thessalonians4:12 ki baharavalon ke sath sabhyata se bartav karo, aur tumhen kisee vastu kee ghattee n ho.." 
1Thessalonians4:13 he bhaiyo, ham naheen chahate, ki tum unake vishay men jo sote haai, agyaan raho aeesa n ho, ki tum auron kee nai shaek karo jinhen asha naheen." 
1Thessalonians4:14 kyonaki yadi ham prateeati karate haai, ki yeeshu mara, aur jee bhee utta, to vaaise hee parameshvar unhen bhee jo yeeshu men so gaae haai, usee ke sath le aaega." 
1Thessalonians4:15 kyonaki ham prabhu ke vachan ke anusar tum se yah kahate haai, ki ham jo jeevit haai, aur prabhu ke ane tak bache rahenge to soae huon se kabhee age n baddhenge." 
1Thessalonians4:16 kyonaki prabhu ap hee svarga se utarega us samay lalakar, aur pradhaan doot ka shabd sunai dega, aur parameshvar kee turahee foonkee jaaegee, aur jo maseeh men mare haai, ve pahile jee uttenge." 
1Thessalonians4:17 tab ham jo jeeavit aur bache rahenge, un ke sath badalon par utta liae jaaenge, ki hava men prabhu se mile, aur is reeti se ham sada prabhu ke sath rahenge." 
1Thessalonians4:18 so in baton se aek doosare ko shaantai diya karo.. 
1Thessalonians5:1 par he bhaiyo, isaka prayojan nahee, ki samayon aur kalon ke vishay men tumhare pas kuchh likha jaae." 
1Thessalonians5:2 kyonaki tum ap tteek janate ho ki jaaisa rat ko chor ata haai, vaaisa hee prabhu ka din anevala haai." 
1Thessalonians5:3 jab log kahate honge, ki kushal haai, aur kuchh bhy nahee, to un par aekaaek vinash a padega, jis prakar garbhvatee par peeda aur ve kisee reeati se bachenge." 
1Thessalonians5:4 par he bhaiyo, tum to andhakar men naheen ho, ki vah din tum par chor kee nai a pade." 
1Thessalonians5:5 kyonaki tum sab jyoti kee santan, aur din kee santan ho, ham n rat ke haai, n andhakar ke haain." 
1Thessalonians5:6 isaliye ham auron kee nai sote n rahe, par jagate aur savadhaan rahen." 
1Thessalonians5:7 kyonaki jo sote haai, ve rat hee ko soten haai, aur jo matavale hote haai, ve rat hee ko matavale hote haain." 
1Thessalonians5:8 par ham to din ke haai, vishvas aur praem kee jhlaim pahinakar aur uddhar kee ttop paahinakar savadhaan rahen." 
1Thessalonians5:9 kyonaki parameshvar ne hamen krodha ke liye nahee, parantu isaliye ttharaya ki ham apane prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke dara uddhar praapt karen." 
1Thessalonians5:10 vah hamare liye is karan mara, ki ham chahe jagate ho, chahe sote hon: sab milakar usee ke sath jeeaen." 
1Thessalonians5:11 is karan aek doosare ko shaantai do, aur aek doosare kee unnaati ke karan bano, nidan, tum aeesa karate bhee ho.." 
1Thessalonians5:12 aur he bhaiyo, ham tum se binatee karate haai, ki jo tum men parishram karate haai, aur prabhu men tumhare aguve haai, aur tumhen shaiksha dete haai, unhen mano." 
1Thessalonians5:13 aur un ke kam ke karan praem ke sath un ko bahut hee adar ke yogy samajho: apas men mela-amilap se raho. 
1Thessalonians5:14 aur he bhaiyo, ham tumhen samajhate haai, ki jo tteek chal naheen chalate, un ko samajhao, kayaron ko ddhaddhs do, nirbalon ko sanbhalo, sab kee or sahanashaeelata dikhao." 
1Thessalonians5:15 savadhaana! koi kisee se burai ke badale burai n kare par sada bhlai karane par tatpar raho apas men aur sab se bhee bhlai hee kee cheshtta karo. 
1Thessalonians5:16 sada anaandait raho. 
1Thessalonians5:17 nirantar praarthna me lage raho. 
1Thessalonians5:18 har bat men dhanyavad karo: kyonaki tumhare liye maseeh yeeshu men parameshvar kee yaheen ichchha haai. 
1Thessalonians5:19 atma ko n bujhao. 
1Thessalonians5:20 bhavishyadaanaiyon ko tuchchh n jano. 
1Thessalonians5:21 sab baton ko parakho: jo achchhee haai use pakade raho. 
1Thessalonians5:22 sab prakar kee burai se bache raho.. 
1Thessalonians5:23 shaantai ka parameshvar ap hee tumhen pooree reeti se pavitra kare aur tumharee atma aur praan aur deh hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke ane tak poore poore aur nirdosh surakshiat rahen. 
1Thessalonians5:24 tumhara bulanevala sachcha haai, aur vah aeesa hee karega.." 
1Thessalonians5:25 he bhaiyo, hamare liye praarthna karo.." 
1Thessalonians5:26 sab bhaiyon ko paavitra chumban se namaskar karo. 
1Thessalonians5:27 maain tumhen prabhu kee shapath deta hoo, ki yah patraee sab bhaiyon ko paddhkar sunai jaae.." 
1Thessalonians5:28 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tum par hota rahe.. 
2Thessalonians1:1 paulus aur silavanus aur teemuthaiyus kee or se thaissaluneekiyon kee kaleesiya ke nam, jo hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh men haai.." 
2Thessalonians1:2 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh men tumhen anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe.. 
2Thessalonians1:3 he bhaiyo, tumhare vishay men hamen har samay parameshvar ka dhanyavad karana chahia, aur yah uchit bhee haai isaaliye ki tumhara vishvas bahut baddhta jata haai, aur tum sab ko praem apas men bahut hee hota jata haai." 
2Thessalonians1:4 yahan tak ki ham ap parameshvar kee kaleeasiya men tumhare vishay men ghamand karate haai, ki jitane upadrav aur klesh tum sahate ho, un sab men tumhara dhaeeraj aur vishvas pragatt hota haai." 
2Thessalonians1:5 yah parameshvar ke sachche nyay ka spashtt praman haai ki tum parameshvar ke rajy ke yogy ttharo, jis ke liye tum dukh bhee uttate ho." 
2Thessalonians1:6 kyonaki parameshvar ke nikatt yah nyay haai, ki jo tumhen klesh dete haai, unhen badale men klesh de." 
2Thessalonians1:7 aur tumhen jo klesh pate ho, hamare sath chaain de us samay jab ki prabhu yeeshu apane samarthee dooton ke sat, dhadhakatee hui ag men svarga se pragatt hoga." 
2Thessalonians1:8 aur jo parameshvar ko naheen pahachanate, aur hamare prabhu yeeshu ke susamachar ko naheen manate un se palatta lega." 
2Thessalonians1:9 ve prabhu ke samhane se, aur usakee shaaktai ke tej se door hokar anant vinash ka dand paaenge." 
2Thessalonians1:10 yah us din hoga, jab vah apane paavitra logon men mahima pane, aur sab vishvas karanevalon men ashcharya ka karan hone ko aaega kyonaki tum ne hamaree gavahee kee prateeati kee." 
2Thessalonians1:11 isee liye ham sada tumhare nimitt praarthna bhee karate haai, ki hamara parameshvar tumhen is bulahatt ke yogy samajhe, aur bhlai kee har aek ichchha, aur vishvas ke har aek kam ko samarth sahit poora kare." 
2Thessalonians1:12 ki hamare parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke anugrah ke anusar hamare prabhu yeeshu ka nam tum men maahima paa, aur tum us men.." 
2Thessalonians2:1 he bhaiyo, tum apane prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke ane, aur usake pas apane ikatthe hone ke vishay men tum se binatee karate haain." 
2Thessalonians2:2 ki kisee atma, ya vachan, ya patraee ke dara jo ki manon hamaree or se ko, yah samajhkar ki prabhu ka din a pahuncha haai, tumhara man achanak aasthiar n ho jaae aur n tum ghabarao." 
2Thessalonians2:3 kisee reeati se kisee ke dhaekhe men n ana kyonaki vah din n aaega, jab tak dharma ka tyag n ho le, aur vah pap ka puroosh arthata vinash ka putra pragatt n ho." 
2Thessalonians2:4 jo virodha karata haai, aur har aek se jo parameshvar, ya poojy kahalata haai, apane ap ko bada ttharata haai, yahan tak ki vah parameshvar ke mandair men baaittkar apane ap ko parameshvar pragatt karata haai." 
2Thessalonians2:5 kya tumhen smaran nahee, ki jab maain tumhare yahan tha, to tum se ye baten kaha karata tha?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 aur ab tum us vastu ko janate ho, jo use rok rahee haai, ki vah apane hee samay men pragatt ho." 
2Thessalonians2:7 kyonaki adharma ka bhed ab bhee kayrya karata jata haai, par abhee aek rokanevala haai, aur jab tak vah door n ho jaa, vah roke rahega." 
2Thessalonians2:8 tab vah adharmee pragatt hoga, jise prabhu yeeshu apane munh ko faook se mar dalega, aur apane agaman ke tej se bhsm karega." 
2Thessalonians2:9 us adharmee ka ana shautan ke kayrya ke anusar sab prakar kee joottee samarth, aur chinh, aur adabhut kam ke sath." 
2Thessalonians2:10 aur nash honevalon ke liye adharma ke sab prakar ke dhaekhe ke sath hoga kyonaki unhonne saty ke praem ko grahan naheen kiya jis se un ka uddhar hota. 
2Thessalonians2:11 aur isee karan parameshvar un men aek bhttka denevalee samarth ko bhejega taki ve joott kee prateeti karen. 
2Thessalonians2:12 aur jitane log saty kee prateeti naheen karate, varan adharma se prasann hote haai, sab dand paaen.." 
2Thessalonians2:13 par he bhaiyo, aur prabhu ke piry logo chahiye ki ham tumhare vishay men sada parameshvar ka dhanyavad karate rahe, ki parameshvar ne adi se tumhen chun liya ki atma ke dara paavitra banakar, aur saty kee prateeti karake uddhar pao." 
2Thessalonians2:14 jis ke liye us ne tumhen hamare susamachar ke dara bulaya, ki tum hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee maahima ko praapt karo." 
2Thessalonians2:15 isaliye, ye bhaiyo, sthiara aur jo jo baten tum ne kya vachan, kya patraee ke dara ham se seekhee haai, unhen thame raho.." 
2Thessalonians2:16 hamara prabhu yeeshu maseeh ap hee, aur hamara pita parameshvar jis ne ham se praem rakha, aur anugrah se anant shaaantai aur uttm asha dee haai." 
2Thessalonians2:17 tumhare manon men shaantai de, aur tumhen har aek achchhe kam, aur vachan men draddh kare.." 
2Thessalonians3:1 nidan, he bhaiyo, hamare liye praarthna kiya karo, ki prabhu ka vachan aeesa shaeegha faaile, aur maahima paa, jaaisa tum men hua." 
2Thessalonians3:2 aur ham tteddhe aur dushtt manushyon se bache rahen kyonaki har aek men vishvas naheen.. 
2Thessalonians3:3 parantu prabhu sachcha haai vah tumhen draddhta se sthiar karega: aur us dushtt se suraakshiat rakhega. 
2Thessalonians3:4 aur hamen prabhu men tumhare upar bhrosa haai, ki jo jo agyaa ham tumhen dete haai, unhen tum manate ho, aur manate bhee rahoge." 
2Thessalonians3:5 parameshvar ke praem aur maseeh ke dhaeeraj kee or prabhu tumhare man kee aguvai kare.. 
2Thessalonians3:6 he bhaiyo, ham tumhen apane prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke nam se agyaa dete haain ki har aek aeese bhai se alag raho, jo anuachit chal chalata, aur jo shaiksha us ne ham se pai usake anusar naheen karata." 
2Thessalonians3:7 kyonaki tum ap janate ho, ki kis reeti se hamaree see chal chalanee chahiae kyonaki ham tumhare beech men anuchit chal n chale." 
2Thessalonians3:8 aur kisee kee rottee sent men n khai par paarishram aur kashtt se rat din kam dhandha karate the, ki tum men se kisee par bhar n ho." 
2Thessalonians3:9 yah nahee, ki hamen aadhaikar naheen par isaliye ki apane ap ko tumhare liye adarsha ttharaae, ki tum hamaree see chal chalo." 
2Thessalonians3:10 aur jab ham tumhare yahan the, tab bhee yah agyaa tumhen dete the, ki yadi koi kam karana n chahe, to khane bhee n paae." 
2Thessalonians3:11 ham sunate haai, ki kitane log tumhare beech men anuchit chal chalate haain aur kuchh kam naheen karate, par auron ke kam men hath dala karate haain." 
2Thessalonians3:12 aeeson ko ham prabhu yeeshu maseeh men agyaa dete aur samajhate haai, ki chupachap kam karake apanee hee rottee khaya karen." 
2Thessalonians3:13 aur tum, he bhaiyo, bhlai karane men hiyav n chhodo." 
2Thessalonians3:14 yaadi koi hamaree is patraee kee bat ko n mane, to us par drashtti rakho aur us kee sangaati n karo, jis se vah lajjait ho" 
2Thessalonians3:15 taubhee use baairee man samajho par bhai janakar chitao.. 
2Thessalonians3:16 ab prabhu jo shaaantai ka sota haai ap hee tumhen sada aur har prakar se shaantai de: prabhu tum sab ke sath rahe.. 
2Thessalonians3:17 maain paulus apane hath se namaskar likhta hoon: har patraee men mera yahee chinh haai: maain isee prakar se likhta hoon. 
2Thessalonians3:18 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tum sab par hota rahe.. 
1Timothy1:1 paulus kee or se jo hamare uddharakarta parameshvar, aur hamaree ashaa-sthan maseeh yeeshu kee agyaa se maseeh yeeshu ka praerit haai, timuathaiyus ke nam jo vishvas men mera sachcha putra haai.." 
1Timothy1:2 pita parameshvar, aur hamare prabhu maseeh yeeshu se, tujhe anugrah aur daya, aur shaantai milatee rahe.." 
1Timothy1:3 jaaise maain ne makiduaniya ko jate samay tujhe samajhaya tha, ki ifisus men rahakar kitanon ko agyaa de ki aur prakar kee shaiksha n den." 
1Timothy1:4 aur un aeesee kahaaniyon aur anant vanshaavaaliyon par man n lagaae, jin se vivad hote haain aur parameshvar ke us prabandha ke anusar nahee, jo vishvas se sambandha rakhta haai vaaise hee fir bhee kahata hoon." 
1Timothy1:5 agyaa ka saransh yah haai, ki shuuddh man aur achchhe vivek, aur kapattraahit vishvas se praem utpann ho." 
1Timothy1:6 in ko chhodkar kitane log firakar bakavad kee or bhttk gaae haain. 
1Timothy1:7 aur vyavasthapak to hona chahate haai, par jo baten kahate aur jin ko draddhta se bolate haai, un ko samajhte bhee naheen." 
1Timothy1:8 par ham janate haai, ki yadi koi vyavastha ko vyavastha kee reeati par kam men laa, to vah bhlee haai." 
1Timothy1:9 yah janakar ki vyavastha dharmee jan ke liye nahee, par adhaarmiyo, nirankushae, bhktaiheeno, papeeyo, apaavitraen aur ashuuddho, man-bap ke ghaat karanevalo, hatyaron." 
1Timothy1:10 vyabhaichaariyo, purooshagaamiyo, manushy ke bechanevalo, jootto, aur joottee shapath khanevalo, aur in ko chhod khre upadesh ke sab virodhaiyon ke liye ttharai gai haai." 
1Timothy1:11 yahee paramadhany parameshvar kee mahima ke us susamachar ke anusar haai, jo mujhe saunpa gaya haai.." 
1Timothy1:12 aur maai, apane prabhu maseeh yeeshu ka, jis ne mujhe samarth dee haai, dhanyavad karata hoon ki us ne mujhe vishvasayogy samajhkar apanee seva ke liye ttharaya." 
1Timothy1:13 maain to pahile ninda karanevala, aur satanevala, aur andhor karanevala tha taubhee mujh par daya hui, kyonaki maain ne aavishvas kee dasha men bin samajhe boojhe, ye kam kiae the." 
1Timothy1:14 aur hamare prabhu ka anugrah us vishvas aur praem ke sath jo maseeh yeeshu men haai, bahutayat se hua." 
1Timothy1:15 yah bat sach aur har prakar se manane ke yogy haai, ki maseeh yeeshu papiyon ka uddhar karane ke liye jagat men aya, jin men sab se bada maain hoon." 
1Timothy1:16 par mujhpar isaliye daya hui, ki mujh sab se bade papee men yeeshu maseeh apanee pooree sahanashaeelata dikhaa, ki jo log us par anant jeevan ke liye vishvas karenge, un ke liye maain aek adarsha banoon." 
1Timothy1:17 ab sanatan raja arthata avinashaee anadekhe advait parameshvar ka adar aur mahima yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena.. 
1Timothy1:18 he putra teemuathaiyus, un bhvishyadvvanaiyon ke anusar jo paahile tere vishay men kee gai thee, maain yah agyaa saunpata hoo, ki too un ke anusar achchhee ladai ko ladta rahe." 
1Timothy1:19 aur vishvas aur us achchhe vivek ko thamen rahe jise door karane ke karan kitanon ka vishvas roopee jahaj oob gaya. 
1Timothy1:20 unheen men se huaminayus aur sikandar haain jinhen maain ne shautan ko saunp diya, ki ve ninda karana n seekhen.." 
1Timothy2:1 ab maain sab se pahile yah upadesh deta hoo, ki binatee, aur praarthna, aur nivedan, aur dhanyavad, sab manushyon ke liye kiae jaaen." 
1Timothy2:2 rajaon aur sab unche padavalon ke nimitt isaaliye ki ham vishraam aur chaain ke sath saree bhaktai aur gambheerata se jeevan bitaaen. yah hamare uddharakarta parameshvar ko achchha lagata, aur bhata bhee haai." 
1Timothy2:3 yah hamare uddharakarta parameshvar ko achchha lagata, aur bhata bhee haai." 
1Timothy2:4 vah yah chahata haai, ki sab manushyon ka uddhar ho aur ve saty ko bhlee bhanati pahichan len." 
1Timothy2:5 kyonaki parameshvar aek hee haai: aur parameshvar aur manushyon ke beech men bhee aek hee bichavai haai, arthata maseeh yeeshu jo manushy haai." 
1Timothy2:6 jis ne apane ap ko sab ke chhuttkare ke dam men de diya taaki us kee gavahee tteek samayon par dee jaae. 
1Timothy2:7 maain sach kahata hoo, joott naheen bolata, ki maain isee ueshy se pracharak aur praearit aur anyajaatiyon ke liye vishvas aur saty ka upadeshak ttharaya gaya.." 
1Timothy2:8 so maain chahata hoo, ki har jagah puroosh bina krodha aur vivad ke paavitra hathon ko uttakar praarthna kiya karen." 
1Timothy2:9 vaaise hee striayan bhee sankoch aur sanyam ke sath suhavane vasren se apane ap ko sanvare n ki bal goonthne, aur sone, aur motiyo, aur bahumol kapadon se, par bhle kamon se." 
1Timothy2:10 kyonaki parameshvar kee bhktai grahan karanevalee striayon ko yahee uchit bhee haai. 
1Timothy2:11 aur sree ko chupachap pooree adhaeenata men seekhna chaahiae. 
1Timothy2:12 aur maain kahata hoo, ki sree n upadesh kare, aur n puroosh par agyaa chalaa, parantu chupachap rahe." 
1Timothy2:13 kyonaki adam paahile, usake bad havva banai gai." 
1Timothy2:14 aur adam bahakaya n gaya, par sree bahakane men akar aparaadhainee hui." 
1Timothy2:15 taubhee bachche janane ke dara uddhar paaengee, yadi ve sanyam sahit vishvas, praem, aur paavitrata men sthiar rahen.." 
1Timothy3:1 yah bat saty haai, ki jo adhyaksha hona chahata haai, to vah bhle kam kee ichchha karata haai." 
1Timothy3:2 so chaahia, ki adhyaksha nirdosha, aur aek hee patnee ka paati, sanyamee, sushaeel, sabhy, pahunai karanevala, aur sikhane men nipun ho." 
1Timothy3:3 piyakkad ya marapeett karanevala n ho baran komal ho, aur n jhgadalo, aur n lobhee ho." 
1Timothy3:4 apane ghar ka achchha prabandha karata ho, aur ladke-balon ko saree gambheerata se adhaeen rakhta ho." 
1Timothy3:5 jab koi apane ghar hee ka prabandha karana n janata ho, to parameshvar kee kaleeasiya kee rakhvalee kyonkar karega." 
1Timothy3:6 fir yah ki naya chela n ho, aeesa n ho, ki abhaiman karake shautan ka sa dand paae." 
1Timothy3:7 aur baharavalon men bhee usaka sunam ho aeesa n ho ki nindait hokar shautan ke fande men fans jaae. 
1Timothy3:8 vaaise hee sevakon ko bhee gambheer hona chahia, do rangee, piyakkad, aur neech kamai ke lobhee n hon." 
1Timothy3:9 par vishvas ke bhed ko shuuddh vivek se surakshiat rakhen. 
1Timothy3:10 aur ye bhee paahile parakhe jaae, tab yadi nirdosh nikale, to sevak ka kam karen." 
1Timothy3:11 isee prakar se striayon ko bhee gambheer hona chaahiae dosh laganevalee n ho, par sachet aur sab baton men vishvasayogy hon." 
1Timothy3:12 sevak aek hee patnee ke pati hon aur ladkebalon aur apane gharon ka achchha prabandha karana janate hon. 
1Timothy3:13 kyonaki jo sevak ka kam achchhee tarah se kar sakate haai, ve apane liye achchha pad aur us vishvas me, jo maseeh yeeshu par haai, bada hiyav praapt karate haain.." 
1Timothy3:14 maain tere pas jald ane kee asha rakhne par bhee ye baten tujhe isaaliye likhta hoon. 
1Timothy3:15 ki yadi mere ane men der ho to too jan le, ki parameshvar ka ghar, jo jeevate parameshvar kee kaleesiya haai, aur jo saty ka khnbha, aur nev haai us men kaaisa bartav karana chaahiae." 
1Timothy3:16 aur is men sandeh nahee, ki bhktai ka bhed gambheer haai arthata vah jo shareer men pragatt hua, atma men dharmee tthara, svargadooton ko dikhai diya, anyajatiyon men usaka prachar hua, jagat men us par vishvas kiya gaya, aur mahima men upar uttaya gaya.." 
1Timothy4:1 parantu atma spashttta se kahata haai, ki anevale samayon men kitane log bhramanevalee atmao, aur dushttatmaon kee shaikshaaon par man lagakar vishvas se bahak jaaenge." 
1Timothy4:2 yah un jootte manushyon ke kapatt ke karan hoga, jin ka vivek manon jalate huae lohe se daga gaya haai." 
1Timothy4:3 jo byah karane se rokenge, aur bhojan kee kuchh vastuon se pare rahane kee agyaa denge jinhen parameshvar ne isaaliye sraja ki vishvasee, aur saty ke pahichananevale unhen dhanyavad ke sath khaaen." 
1Timothy4:4 kyonaki parameshvar kee srajee hui har aek vastu achchhee haai: aur koi vastu asveekar karane ke yogy naheen par yah ki dhanyavad ke sath khai jaae. 
1Timothy4:5 kyonaki parameshvar ke vachan aur praarthna se shuuddh ho jatee haai.. 
1Timothy4:6 yaadi too bhaiyon ko in baton kee suadhai dilata rahega, to maseeh yeeshu ka achchha sevak ttharega: aur vishvas aur us achchhe upadesh kee baton se, ja too manata aya haai, tera palana-poshan hota rahega." 
1Timothy4:7 par ashuuddh aur booddhiyon kee see kahaniyon se alag raha aur bhaktai ke liye apana sadhan kara. 
1Timothy4:8 kyonaki deh hee sadhana se kam labh hota haai, par bhktai sab baton ke liye labhdayak haai, kyonaki is samay ke aur anevale jeevan kee bhee praatigyaa isee ke liye haai." 
1Timothy4:9 aur yah bat sach aur har prakar se manane ke yogy haai. 
1Timothy4:10 kyonaki ham parishram aur yatn isee liye karate haai, ki hamaree asha us jeevate parameshvar par haai jo sab manushyon ka, aur nij karake vishvasiyon ka uddharakarta haai." 
1Timothy4:11 in baton kee agyaa kar, aur sikhata raha." 
1Timothy4:12 koi teree javanee ko tuchchh n samajhne paae par vachan, aur chal chalan, aur praem, aur vishvas, aur paavitrata men vishvasiyon ke liye adarsha ban ja." 
1Timothy4:13 jab tak maain n au, tab tak paddhne aur upadesh aur sikhane men lauleen raha." 
1Timothy4:14 us varadan se jo tujh men haai, aur bhvishyadanee ke dara praacheenon ke hath rakhte samay tujhe mila tha, nishchaint n raha." 
1Timothy4:15 un baton ko sochata rah, taaki teree unnaati sab par pragatt ho. apanee aur apane upadesh kee chaukasee rakh." 
1Timothy4:16 in baton par sthiar rah, kyonki yadi aeesa karata rahega, to too apane, aur apane sunanevalon ke liye bhee uddhar ka karan hoga.." 
1Timothy5:1 kisee booddhe ko n dantt par use pita janakar samajha de, aur javanon ko bhai janakara booddhee striayon ko mata janakara." 
1Timothy5:2 aur javan striayon ko pooree pavitrata se bahin janakar, samajha de." 
1Timothy5:3 un vidhavaon ka jo sachamuch vidhava haain adar kara. 
1Timothy5:4 aur yaadi kisee vidhava ke ladkebale ya nateepote ho, to ve pahile apane hee gharane ke sath bhaktai ka bartav karana, aur apane mata-apita aadi ko un ka hak dena seekhe, kyonki yah parameshvar ko bhata haai." 
1Timothy5:5 jo sachamuch vidhava haai, aur usaka koi naheen vah parameshvar par asha rakhtee haai, aur rat din binatee aur praarthna men lauleen rahatee haai." 
1Timothy5:6 par jo bhogavilas men pad gai, vah jeete jee mar gai haai." 
1Timothy5:7 in baton kee bhee agyaa diya kar, taki ve nirdosh rahen." 
1Timothy5:8 par yaadi koi apanon kee aur nij karake apane gharane kee chinta n kare, to vah vishvas se mukar gaya haai, aur aavishvasee se bhee bura ban gaya haai." 
1Timothy5:9 usee vidhava ka nam likha jaa, jo satt varsha se kam kee n ho, aur ek hee paati kee patnee rahee ho." 
1Timothy5:10 aur bhle kam men sunam rahee ho, jis ne bachchon ka palana-poshan kiya ho pahunon kee seva kee ho, pavitra logon ke panv dhaeae ho, duakhaiyon kee sahayata kee ho, aur har aek bhle kam men man lagaya ho." 
1Timothy5:11 par javan vidhavaon ke nam n likhna, kyonki jab ve maseeh ka virodha karake sukh-vilas men pad jatee haai, to byah karana chahatee haain." 
1Timothy5:12 aur doshaee ttharatee haai, kyonki unhon ne apane pahile vishvas ko chhod diya haai." 
1Timothy5:13 aur is ke sath hee sath ve ghar ghar firakar alasee hona seekhtee haai, aur keval alasee nahee, par bakabak karatee rahatee aur auron ke kam men hath bhee dalatee haain aur anuachit baten bolatee haain." 
1Timothy5:14 isaliye maain yah chahata hoo, ki javan vidhavaaen byah karen aur bachche janen aur gharabar sanbhale, aur kisee virodhaee ko badanam karane ka avasar n den." 
1Timothy5:15 kyonaki kai aek to bahakakar shautan ke peechhe ho chukee haain. 
1Timothy5:16 yaadi kisee vishvasinee ke yahan vidhavaaen ho, to vahee un kee sahayata kare, ki kaleeasiya par bhar n ho taki vah un kee sahayata kar sake, jo sachamuch men vidhavaaen haain.." 
1Timothy5:17 jo praacheen achchha prabandha karate haai, vishosh karake ve jo vachan sunane aur sikhane men parishram karate haai, do gune adar ke yogy samajhe jaaen." 
1Timothy5:18 kyonaki pavitra shaasr kahata haai, ki danvanevale baail ka munh n bandhana, kyonaki majadoor apanee majadooree ka hakkadar haai." 
1Timothy5:19 koi dosh kisee praacheen par lagaya jaae to bina do ya teen gavahon ke us ko n suna. 
1Timothy5:20 pap karanevalon ko sab ke samhane samajha de, taki aur log bhee dren." 
1Timothy5:21 parameshvar, aur maseeh yeeshu, aur chune huae svargadooton ko upasthiat janakar maain tujhe chitaunee deta hoon ki too man kholakar in baton ko mana kar, aur koi kam pakshapat se n kara." 
1Timothy5:22 kisee par shaeegha hath n rakhna aur doosaron ke papon men bhagee n hona: apane ap ko paavitra banaae rakh. 
1Timothy5:23 bhavishy men keval jal hee ka peenevala n rah, par apane pett ke aur apane bar bar beemar hone ke karan thoda thoda dakhras bhee kam men laya kara." 
1Timothy5:24 kitane manushyon ke pap pragatt ho jate haai, aur nyay ke liye paahile se pahunch jate haai, par kitanon ke peechhe se ate haain." 
1Timothy5:25 vaaise hee kitane bhle kam bhee pragatt hote haai, aur jo aeese naheen hote, ve bhee chhpai naheen sakate.." 
1Timothy6:1 jitane das jooae ke neeche haai, ve apane apane svamee ko bade adar ke yogy jane, taki parameshvar ke nam aur upadesh kee ninda n ho." 
1Timothy6:2 aur jin ke svamee vishvasee haai, inhen ve bhai hone ke karan tuchchh n janen baran un kee aur bhee seva kare, kyonki is se labh uttane vale vishvasee aur praemee haain: in baton ka upadesh kiya kar aur samajhata raha.." 
1Timothy6:3 yaadi koi aur hee prakar ka upadesh dena haai aur khree baton ko, arthata hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee baton ko aur us upadesh ko naheen manata, jo bhaktai ke anusar haai." 
1Timothy6:4 to vah aabhaimanee ho gaya, aur kuchh naheen janata, baran use vivad aur shabdon par tarka karane ka rog haai, jin se dah, aur jhgade, aur ninda kee bate, aur bure bure sandeha." 
1Timothy6:5 aur un manushyon men vyarth ragade jhgade utpann hote haai, jin kee buddh ibigad gai haai aur ve saty se viheen ho gaae haai, jo samajhte haain ki bhktai kamai ka dar haai." 
1Timothy6:6 par santosh sahit bhktai badee kamai haai. 
1Timothy6:7 kyonaki n ham jagat men kuchh laae haain aur n kuchh le ja sakate haain. 
1Timothy6:8 aur yaadi hamare pas khane aur paahinane ko ho, to inheen par santosh karana chaahiae." 
1Timothy6:9 par jo dhanee hona chahate haai, ve aeesee pareeksha, aur fande aur bahutere vyarth aur haanikarak lalasaon men fansate haai, jo manushyon ko bigad detee haain aur vinash ke samudra men ooba detee haain." 
1Timothy6:10 kyonaki roopaye ka lobh sab prakar kee buraiyon kee jad haai, jise praapt karane ka prayatn karate huae kitanon ne vishvas se bhttkakar apane ap ko nana prakar ke dukhon se chhlanee bana liya haai.." 
1Timothy6:11 par he parameshvar ke jan, too in baton se bhaga aur dharma, bhaktai, vishvas, praem, dhaeeraj, aur namrata ka peechha kara." 
1Timothy6:12 vishvas kee achchhee kushtee lad aur us anant jeevan ko dhar le, jis ke liye too bulaya, gaya, aur bahut gavahon ke samhane achchha angeekar kiya tha." 
1Timothy6:13 maain tujhe parameshvar ko jo sab ko jeeavit rakhta haai, aur maseeh yeeshu ko gavah karake jis ne puntaiyus peelatus ke samhane achchha angeekar kiya, yah agyaa deta hoo," 
1Timothy6:14 ki too hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke pragatt hone tak is agyaa ko nishkalank aur nirdosh rakh. 
1Timothy6:15 jise vah tteek samayon men dikhaaega, jo paramadhany aur advait aadhaipaati aur rajaon ka raja, aur prabhuon ka prabhu haai." 
1Timothy6:16 aur amarata keval usee kee haai, aur vah agamy jyoti men rahata haai, aur n use kisee manushy ne dekha, aur n kabhee dekh sakata haai: us kee praatishtta aur rajy yuganuyug rahega. ameena.." 
1Timothy6:17 is sansar ke dhanavanon ko agyaa de, ki ve abhaimanee n hon aur chanchal dhan par asha n rakhe, parantu parameshvar par jo hamare sukh ke liye sab kuchh bahutayat se deta haai." 
1Timothy6:18 aur bhlai kare, aur bhle kamon men dhanee bane, aur udar aur sahayata dene men tatpar hon." 
1Timothy6:19 aur age ke liye aek achchhee nev dal rakhe, ki saty jeevan ko vash men kar len.." 
1Timothy6:20 he teemuthaiyus is thatee kee rakhvalee kar aur jis gyaan ko gyaan kahana hee bool haai, usake ashuuddh bakavad aur virodha kee baton se pare raha." 
1Timothy6:21 kitane is gyaan ka angeekar karake, vishvas se bhttk gaae haain.. tum par anugrah hota rahe.." 
2Timothy1:1 paulus kee or se jo us jeevan kee praatigyaa ke anusar jo maseeh yeeshu men haai, parameshvar kee ichchha se maseeh yeeshu ka praearit haai." 
2Timothy1:2 piry putra teemuathaiyus ke nama.. parameshvar pita aur hamare prabhu maseeh yeeshu kee or se tujhe anugrah aur daya aur shaaantai milatee rahe.. 
2Timothy1:3 jis parameshvar kee seva maain apane bapadadon kee reeati par shuuddh vivek se karata hoo, usaka dhanyavad ho ki apanee praarthnaon men tujhe lagatar smaran karata hoon." 
2Timothy1:4 aur tere ansuon kee suadhai kar karake rat din tujh se bhentt karane kee lalasa rakhta hoon ki anand se bhr jaun. 
2Timothy1:5 aur mujhe tere us nishkapatt vishvas kee sudhai atee haai, jo pahile teree nanee lois, aur teree mata yooneeke men thee, aur mujhe nishchay hua haai, ki tum men bhee haai." 
2Timothy1:6 isee karan maain tujhe suadhai dilata hoo, ki too parameshvar ke us varadan ko jo mere hath rakhne ke dara tujhe mila haai chamaka de." 
2Timothy1:7 kyonaki parameshvar ne hamen bhy kee naheen par samarth, aur praem, aur sanyam kee atma dee haai." 
2Timothy1:8 isaliye hamare prabhu kee gavahee se, aur mujh se jo usaka kaaidee hoo, lajjait n ho, par us parameshvar kee samarth ke anusar susamachar ke liye mere sath dukh utta." 
2Timothy1:9 jis ne hamara uddhar kiya, aur paavitra bulahatt se bulaya, aur yah hamare kamon ke anusar naheen par apanee manasa aur us anugrah ke anusar haai jo maseeh yeeshu men sanatan se ham par hua haai." 
2Timothy1:10 par ab hamare uddharakarta maseeh yeeshu ke pragatt hone ke dara prakash hua, jis ne mratyu ka nash kiya, aur jeevan aur amarata ko us susamachar ke dara prakashaman kar diya." 
2Timothy1:11 jis ke liye maain pracharak, aur praerit, aur upadeshak bhee tthara." 
2Timothy1:12 is karan maain in dukhon ko bhee uttata hoo, par lajata nahee, kyonki maain use jis kee maain ne prateeti kee haai, janata hoon aur mujhe nishchay haai, ki vah meree thatee kee us din tak rakhvalee kar sakata haai." 
2Timothy1:13 jo khree baten too ne mujh se sunee haain un ko us vishvas aur praem ke sath jo maseeh yeeshu men haai, apana adarsha banakar rakh." 
2Timothy1:14 aur paavitra atma ke dara jo ham men basa hua haai, is achchhee thatee kee rakhvalee kara.." 
2Timothy1:15 too janata haai, ki asiyavale sab mujh se fir gaae haai, jin men foogilus aur hiramugines haain." 
2Timothy1:16 unesifauroos ke gharane par prabhu daya kare, kyonaki us ne bahut bar mere jee ko ttnda kiya, aur meree janjeeron se laajjait n hua." 
2Timothy1:17 par jab vah roma men aya, to bade yatn se ddoonddhkar mujh se bhentt kee." 
2Timothy1:18 prabhu kare, ki us din us par prabhu kee daya ho. aur jo jo seva us ne iafisus men kee haai unhen bhee too bhlee bhanati janata haai.." 
2Timothy2:1 isaliye he mere putra, too us anugrah se jo maseeh yeeshu men haai, balavant ho ja." 
2Timothy2:2 aur jo baten too ne bahut gavahon ke samhane mujh se sunee haai, unhen vishvasee manushyon ko saunp de jo auron ko bhee sikhane ke yogy hon." 
2Timothy2:3 maseeh yeeshu ke achchhe yoddha kee nai mere sath dukh utta. 
2Timothy2:4 jab koi yoddha ladai par jata haai, to isaaliye ki apane bhratee karanevale ko prasann kare, apane ap ko sansar ke kamon men naheen fansata" 
2Timothy2:5 fir akhade men ladnevala yaadi vidhai ke anusar n lade to mukutt naheen pata. 
2Timothy2:6 jo grahasth paarishram karata haai, fal ka ansh pahile use milana chahiae." 
2Timothy2:7 jo maain kahata hoo, us par dhyan de aur prabhu tujhe sab baton kee samajh dega." 
2Timothy2:8 yeeshu maseeh ko smaran rak, jo daud ke vansh se hua, aur mare huon men se jee utta aur yah mare susamachar ke anusar haai." 
2Timothy2:9 jis ke liye maain kukarmee kee nai dukh uttata hoo, yahan tak ki kaaid bhee hoon parantu parameshvar ka vachan kaaid naheen." 
2Timothy2:10 is karan maain chune huae logon ke liye sab kuchh sahata hoo, ki ve bhee us uddhar ko jo maseeh yeeshu men haain anant mahima ke sath paaen." 
2Timothy2:11 yah bat sach haai, ki yadi ham usake sath mar gaae haain to usake sath jeeaenge bhee." 
2Timothy2:12 yaadi ham dhaeeraj se sahate rahenge, to usake sath rajy bhee karenge: yadi ham usaka inkar karenge to vah bhee hamara inkar karega." 
2Timothy2:13 yaadi ham avishvasee bhee hon taubhee vah vishvasayogy bana rahata haai, kyonaki vah ap apana inkar naheen kar sakata.." 
2Timothy2:14 in baton kee sudhai unhen dila, aur prabhu ke samhane chita de, ki shabdon par tarka-vitarka n kiya kare, jin se kuchh labh naheen hota baran sunanevale bigad jate haain." 
2Timothy2:15 apane ap ko parameshvar ka grahanyogy aur aeesa kam karanevala ttharane ka prayatn kar, jo lajjait hone n paa, aur jo saty ke vachan ko tteek reeti se kam men lata ho." 
2Timothy2:16 par ashuuddh bakavad se bacha raha kyonaki aeese log aur bhee abhktai men baddhte jaaenge. 
2Timothy2:17 aur un ka vachan sade-ghaav kee nain faailata jaaega: huminayus aur filetus unheen men se haain. 
2Timothy2:18 jo yah kahakar ki punarootthan ho chuka haai saty se bhttk gaae haai, aur kitanon ke vishvas ko ulatt pulatt kar dete haain." 
2Timothy2:19 taubhee parameshvar kee pakkee nev banee rahatee haai, aur us par yah chhap lagee haai, ki prabhu apanon ko paahichanata haai aur jo koi prabhu ka nam leta haai, vah adharma se bacha rahe." 
2Timothy2:20 bade ghar men n keval sone-chandee hee ke, par katt aur mittee ke baratan bhee hote haain koi koi adar, aur koi koi anadar ke liye." 
2Timothy2:21 yaadi koi apane ap ko in se shuuddh karega, to vah adar ka baratan, aur pavitra ttharega aur svamee ke kam aaega, aur har bhle kam ke liye taaiyar hoga." 
2Timothy2:22 javanee kee aabhailashaaon se bhaga aur jo shuuddh man se prabhu ka nam lete haai, un ke sath dharma, aur vishvas, aur praem, aur mela-amilap ka peechha kara." 
2Timothy2:23 par moorkhta, aur avidha ke vivadon se alag raha kyonki too janata haai, ki un se jhgade hote haain." 
2Timothy2:24 aur prabhu ke das ko jhgadaloo hona n chahia, par sab ke sath komal aur shaiksha men nipu, aur sahanashaeel ho." 
2Timothy2:25 aur virodhaiyon ko namrata se samajhaa, kya jane parameshvar unhen man firav ka man de, ki ve bhee saty ko paahichanen." 
2Timothy2:26 aur is ke dara us kee ichchha pooree karane ke liye sachet hokar shautan ke fande se choott jaae.. 
2Timothy3:1 par yah jan rak, ki antaim dinon men kaattnai samay aaenge." 
2Timothy3:2 kyonaki manushy apasvarthee, lobhee, deengamar, aabhaimanee, nindak, mata-apita kee agyaa ttalanevale, krataghn, apavitra." 
2Timothy3:3 mayaraahit, kshamaraahit, dosh laganevale, asanyamee, kattor, bhle ke baairee." 
2Timothy3:4 vishvasaghaatee, ddheet, ghamandee, aur parameshvar ke naheen baran sukhavilas hee ke chahanevale honge." 
2Timothy3:5 ve bhaktai ka bhesh to dharenge, par us kee shaktai ko n manenge aeeson se pare rahata." 
2Timothy3:6 inheen men se ve log haai, jo gharon men dabe panv ghaus ate haain aur chhchhiaairee striayon ko vash men kar lete haai, jo papon se dabee aur har prakar kee aabhailashaaon ke vash men haain." 
2Timothy3:7 aur sada seekhtee to rahatee haain par saty kee pahichan tak kabhee naheen pahunchateen. 
2Timothy3:8 aur jaaise yannes aur yambraes ne moosa ka virodha kiya tha vaaise hee ye bhee saty ka virodha karate haain: ye to aeese manushy haai, jin kee buddh ibhrashtt ho gai haai aur ve vishvas ke vishay men nikamme haain." 
2Timothy3:9 par ve is se age naheen baddh sakate, kyonki jaaise un kee agyaanata sab manushyon par pragatt ho gai thee, vaaise hee in kee bhee ho jaaegee." 
2Timothy3:10 par too ne upadesha, chal chalan, manasa, vishvas, sahanashaeelata, praem, dhaeeraj, aur sataae jane, aur dukh uttane men mera sath diya." 
2Timothy3:11 aur aeese dukhon men bhee jo antaakiya aur ikuniyum aur lusr men mujh par pade the aur aur dukhon men bhee, jo maain ne uttaae haain parantu prabhu ne mujhe un sab se chhuda liya." 
2Timothy3:12 par jitane maseeh yeeshu men bhktai ke sath jeevan bitana chahate haain ve sab sataae jaaenge. 
2Timothy3:13 aur dusht, aur bahakanevale dhaekha dete hua, aur dhaekha khate hua, bigadte chale jaaenge." 
2Timothy3:14 par too in baton par jo too ne seekheen haain aur prateeati kee thee, yah janakar draddh bana raha ki too ne unhen kin logon se seekha tha?" 
2Timothy3:15 aur balakapan se pavitra shaasr tera jana hua haai, jo tujhe maseeh par vishvas karane se uddhar praapt karane ke liye buaddhmaian bana sakata haai." 
2Timothy3:16 har aek paavitrashaasr parameshvar kee praerana se racha gaya haai aur upadesha, aur samajhane, aur sudhaarane, aur dharma kee shaiksha ke liye labhdayak haai." 
2Timothy3:17 taaki parameshvar ka jan siddh bane, aur har aek bhle kam ke liye tatpar ho jaae.." 
2Timothy4:1 parameshvar aur maseeh yeeshu ko gavah karake, jo jeevaton aur mare huon ka nyay karega, use aur usake pragatt hone, aur rajy ko suadhai dilakar maain tujhe chitata hoon." 
2Timothy4:2 ki too vachan ko prachar kara samay aur asamay taaiyar rah, sab prakar kee sahanashaeelata, aur shaiksha ke sath ulahana de, aur dant, aur samajha." 
2Timothy4:3 kyonaki aeesa samay aaega, ki log khra upadesh n sah sakenge par kanon kee khujalee ke karan apanee abhailashaaon ke anusar apane liye bahutere upadeshak battor lenge." 
2Timothy4:4 aur apane kan saty se faerakar katha-kahaniyon par lagaaenge. 
2Timothy4:5 par too sab baton men savadhaan rah, dukh utta, susamachar prachar ka kam kar aur apanee seva ko poora kara." 
2Timothy4:6 kyonaki ab maain ardha kee nai undela jata hoo, aur mere kooch ka samay a pahuncha haai." 
2Timothy4:7 maain achchhee kushtee lad chuka hoon maain ne apanee daud pooree kar lee haai, maain ne vishvas kee rakhvalee kee haai." 
2Timothy4:8 bhavishy men mere liye dharma ka vah mukutt rakha hua haai, jise prabhu, jo dharmee, aur nyayee haai, mujhe us din dega aur mujhe hee nahee, baran un sab ko bhee, jo usake pragatt hone ko piry janate haain.." 
2Timothy4:9 mere pas shaeegha ane ka prayatn kara. 
2Timothy4:10 kyonaki demas ne is sansar ko piry janakar mujhe chhod diya haai, aur thaissaluneeke ko chala gaya haai, aur kresakens galatiya ko aur teetus dalamatiya ko chala gaya haai." 
2Timothy4:11 keval looka mere sath haai: marakus ko lekar chala a kyonki seva ke liye vah mere bahut kam ka haai. 
2Timothy4:12 tuakhaikus ko maain ne ifisus ko bheja haai. 
2Timothy4:13 jo baga maain traeas men karapus ke yahan chhod aya hoo, jab too aa, to use aur pustaken vishosh karake chamrmapatraen ko lete ana." 
2Timothy4:14 sikandar ttttere ne mujh se bahut buraiyan kee haain prabhu use usake kamon ke anusar badala dega. 
2Timothy4:15 too bhee us se savadhaan rah, kyonaki us ne hamaree baton ka bahut hee virodha kiya." 
2Timothy4:16 mere pahile pratyuttr karane ke samay men kisee ne bhee mera sath naheen diya, baran sab ne mujhe chhod diya tha: bhla ho, ki is ka unako lekha dena n pade." 
2Timothy4:17 parantu prabhu mera sahayak raha, aur mujhe samarth dee: taki mere dara poora poora prachar ho, aur sab anyajati sun le aur maain to sinh ke munh se chhudaya gaya." 
2Timothy4:18 aur prabhu mujhe har aek bure kam se chhudaaega, aur apane svargeey rajy men uddhar karake pahunchaaega: usee kee maahima yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena.." 
2Timothy4:19 pirsaka aur aakvaila ko, aur unesifauroos ke gharane ko namaskara." 
2Timothy4:20 irastus kurinthus men rah gaya, aur traufimus ko maain ne meeletus men beemar chhoda haai." 
2Timothy4:21 jade se paahile chale ane ka prayatn kara: yooboolus, aur poodens, aur leenus aur klauadiya, aur sab bhaiyon ka tujhe namaskara.." 
2Timothy4:22 prabhu teree atma ke sath rahe: tum par anugrah hota rahe.. 
Titus1:1 paulus kee or se jo parameshvar ka das aur yeeshu maseeh ka praearit haai, parameshvar ke chune huae logon ke vishvas, aur bhaktai ke anusar haai." 
Titus1:2 us anant jeevan kee asha par, jis kee pratigyaa parameshvar ne jo joott bol naheen sakata sanatan se kee haai." 
Titus1:3 par tteek samay par apane vachan ko us prachar ke dara pragatt kiya, jo hamare uddharakarta parameshvar kee agyaa ke anusar mujhe saunpa gaya." 
Titus1:4 teetus ke nam jo vishvas kee sahabhagita ke vichar se mera sachcha putra haai: parameshvar pita aur hamare uddharakarta maseeh yeeshu se anugrah aur shaantai hotee rahe.. 
Titus1:5 maain isaaliye tujhe krete men chhod aya tha, ki too shosh rahee hui baton ko sudhaare, aur meree agyaa ke anusar nagar nagar praacheenon ko niyukt kare." 
Titus1:6 jo nirdosh aur aek hee patnee ke paati ho, jin ke ladkebale vishvasee ho, aur jinhen luchapan aur nirankushata ka dosh naheen." 
Titus1:7 kyonaki adhyaksha ko parameshvar ka bhndaree hone ke karan nirdosh hona chahiae n hattee, n krodhae, n piyakkad, n marapeett karanevala, aur n neech kamai ka lobhee." 
Titus1:8 par pahunai karanevala, bhlai ka chahanevala, sanyamee, nyayee, paavitra aur jiteandairy ho." 
Titus1:9 aur vishvasayogy vachan par jo dharmopadesh ke anusar haai, sthiar rahe ki khree shaiksha se upadesh de sake aur vivaadiyon ka munh bhee band kar sake.." 
Titus1:10 kyonaki bahut se log nirankush bakavadee aur dhaekha denevale haain vishosh karake khtanavalon men se. 
Titus1:11 in ka munh band karana chaahiae: ye log neech kamai ke liye anuchit baten sikhakar ghar ke ghar bigad dete haain. 
Titus1:12 unheen men se ek jan ne jo unheen bhavishyadakta haai, kaha haai, ki kretee log sada jootte, dushtt pashu aur alasee petoo hote haain." 
Titus1:13 yah gavahee sach haai, isaaliye unahen kadai se chitaunee diya kar, ki ve vishvas men pakke ho jaaen." 
Titus1:14 aur ve yahoodiyon kee katha kahaaniyon aur un manushyon kee agyaaon par man n lagaae, jo saty se bhttk jate haain." 
Titus1:15 shuuddh logon ke liye sab vastu shuuddh haai, par ashuuddh aur avishvasiyon ke liye kuchh bhee shuuddh naheen: baran un kee buaddh iddh aur vivek donon ashuuddh haain." 
Titus1:16 ve kahate haai, ki ham parameshvar ko janate haain: par apane kamon se usaka inkar karate haai, kyonki ve gharaanait aur agyaa n mananevale haain: aur kisee achchhe kam ke yogy naheen.." 
Titus2:1 par too aeesee baten kaha kar, jo khre upadesh ke yogy haain." 
Titus2:2 arthata booddhe puroosha, sachet aur gambheer aur sanyamee ho, aur un ka vishvas aur praem aur dhaeeraj pakka ho." 
Titus2:3 isee prakar booddhee striayon ka chal chalan paavitra logon sa ho, dosh laganevalee aur piyakkad naheen par achchhee baten sikhanevalee hon." 
Titus2:4 taaki ve javan striayon ko chitaunee detee rahe, ki apane patiyon aur bachchon se praeeti rakhen." 
Titus2:5 aur sanyamee, pativrata, ghar ka karabar karanevalee, bhlee aur apane apane paati ke adhaeen rahanevalee ho, taki parameshvar ke vachan kee ninda n hone paae." 
Titus2:6 aeese hee javan purooshaen ko bhee samajhaya kar, ki sanyamee hon." 
Titus2:7 sab baton men apane am ko bhle kamon ka namoona bana: tere upadesh men safaai, gambheerata." 
Titus2:8 aur aeesee khrai pai jaa, ki koi use bura n kah sake jis se virodhaee ham par koi dosh lagane kee gaun n pakar lajjait hon." 
Titus2:9 dason ko samajha, ki apane apane svamee ke adhaeen rahe, aur sab baton men unhen prasann rakhe, aur ulattkar javab n den." 
Titus2:10 choree chalakee n karen par sab prakar se poore vishvasee nikale, ki ve sab baton men hamare uddharakarta parameshvar ke upadesh kee shaebha den." 
Titus2:11 kyonaki parameshvar ka anugrah pragatt haai, jo sab manushyon ke uddhar ka karan haai." 
Titus2:12 aur hamen chitata haai, ki ham abhaktai aur sansarik abhailashaaon se man faerakar is yug men sanyam aur dharma aur bhaktai se jeevan bitaaen." 
Titus2:13 aur us dhany asha kee arthata apane mahan parameshvar aur uddharakarta yeeshu maseeh kee mahima ke pragatt hone kee batt johate rahen. 
Titus2:14 jis ne apane ap ko hamare liye de diya, ki hamen har prakar ke adharma se chhuda le, aur shuuddh karake apane liye aek aeesee jati bana le jo bhle bhle kamon men saragarma ho.." 
Titus2:15 poore aadhaikar ke sath ye baten kah aur samajha aur sikhata raha: koi tujhe tuchd n janane paae.. 
Titus3:1 logon ko sudhai dila, ki hakimon aur aadhaikaariyon ke adhaeen rahe, aur un kee agyaa mane, aur har aek achchhe kam ke liye taaiyar raha." 
Titus3:2 kisee ko badanam n karen jhgadaloo n hon: par komal svabhav ke ho, aur sab manushyon ke sath badee namrata ke sath rahen." 
Titus3:3 kyonaki ham bhee pahile, nirbuaddh,i aur agyaa n mananevale, aur bhram men pade hua, aur rang rang ke abhailashaaon aur sukhavilas ke dasatv men the, aur baairabhav, aur dah karane men jeevan nirvah karate the, aur gharanait the, aur aek doosare se baair rakhte the." 
Titus3:4 par jab hamare uddharakarta parameshvar kee krapa, aur manushyon par usakee praeeti pragatt hui." 
Titus3:5 to us ne hamara uddhar kiya: aur yah dharma ke kamon ke karan nahee, jo ham ne ap kia, par apanee daya ke anusar, naae janm ke snan, aur pavitra atma ke hamen naya banane ke dara hua." 
Titus3:6 jise us ne hamare uddharakarta yeeshu maseeh ke dara ham par adhaikai se undela. 
Titus3:7 jis se ham usake anugrah se dharmee ttharakar, anant jeevan kee asha ke anusar vaaris banen." 
Titus3:8 yah bat sach haai, aur maain chahata hoo, ki too in baton ke vishay men draddhta se bole isaaliye ki jinhon ne parameshvar kee prateeati kee haai, ve bhle-bhle kamon me lage rahate ka dhyan rakhen: ye baten bhlee, aur manushyon ke labh kee haain." 
Titus3:9 par moorkhta ke vivado, aur vanshaavaliyo, aur baair virodha, aur un jhgadon se, jo vyavastha ke vishay men hon bacha raha kyonaki ve nishfal aur vyarth haain." 
Titus3:10 kisee pakhndee ko aek do bar samajha bujhakar us se alag raha. 
Titus3:11 yah janakar ki aeesa manushy bhttk gaya haai, aur apane ap ko doshaee ttharakar pap karata rahata haai.." 
Titus3:12 jab maain tere pas aratimas ya tuakhaikus ko bhejoo, to mere pas neekupualis ane ka yatn karana: kyonki maain ne vaheen jada kattne kee ttanee haai." 
Titus3:13 jenas vyavasthapak aur apullos ko yatn karake age pahuncha de, aur dek, ki unhen kisee vastu kee ghattee n hone paae." 
Titus3:14 aur hamare log bhee avashyakataon ko poora karane ke liye achchhe kamon men lage rahana seekhen taki nishfal n rahen.. 
Titus3:15 mere sab sathaiyon ka tujhe namaskar aur jo vishvas ke karan ham se praeeti rakhte haai, un ko namaskara.. tum sab par anugrah hota rahe.." 
Philemon1:1 paulus kee or se jo maseeh yeeshu ka kaaidee haai, aur bhai timuathaiyus kee or se hamare piry sahakarmee filemona." 
Philemon1:2 aur baahin afaafiya, aur hamare sathee yoddha arakhaippus aur filemon ke ghar kee kaleeasiya ke nama.." 
Philemon1:3 hamare pita parameshvar aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee or se anugrah aur shaaantai tumhen milatee rahe.. 
Philemon1:4 maain tere us praem aur vishvas kee charcha sunakar, jo sab pavitra logon ke sath aur prabhu yeeshu par haai." 
Philemon1:5 sada parameshvar ka dhanyavad karata hoon aur apanee praarthnaon men bhee tujhe smaran karata hoon. 
Philemon1:6 ki tera vishvas men sahabhagee hona tumharee saree bhlai kee pahichan men maseeh ke liye prabhavashaalee ho. 
Philemon1:7 kyonaki he bhai, mujhe tere praem se bahut anand aur shaantai milee, isaliye, ki tere dara pavitra logon ke man hare bhre ho gaae haain.." 
Philemon1:8 isaliye yadhypi mujhe maseeh men bada hiyav to haai, ki jo bat tteek haai, us kee agyaa tujhe doon." 
Philemon1:9 taubhee mujh booddhe paulus ko jo ab maseeh yeeshu ke liye kaaidee hoo, yah aur bhee bhla jan pada ki praem se binatee karoon." 
Philemon1:10 maain apane bachche uneasimus ke liye jo mujh se meree kaaid men janma haai tujh se binatee karata hoon. 
Philemon1:11 vah to paahile tere kuchh kam ka n tha, par ab tere aur mere donon ke bade kam ka haai." 
Philemon1:12 usee ko arthata jo mere day ka ttukada haai, maain ne use tere pas lautta diya haai." 
Philemon1:13 use maain apane hee pas rakhna chahata tha ki teree or se is kaaid men jo susamachar ke karan haai, meree seva kare." 
Philemon1:14 par maain ne teree ichchha bina kuchh bhee karana n chaha ki teree yah krapa dabav se naheen par anand se ho. 
Philemon1:15 kyonaki kya jane vah tujh se kuchh din tak ke liye isee karan alag hua ki sadaaiv tere nikatt rahe. 
Philemon1:16 parantu ab se das kee nai nahee, baran das se bhee uttm, arthata bhai ke saman hare jo shareer men bhee aur vishosh kar prabhu men bhee mera piry ho." 
Philemon1:17 so yaadi too mujhe sahabhagee samajhta haai, to use is prakar grahan kar jaaise mujhe." 
Philemon1:18 aur yaadi us ne teree kuchh haani kee haai, ya us par tera kuchh ata haai, to mere nam par likh le." 
Philemon1:19 maain paulus apane hath se likhta hoo, ki maain ap bhr doonga aur ham ke kahane kee kuchh avashyakata nahee, ki mera karja jo tujh par haai vah too hee haai." 
Philemon1:20 he bhai yah anand mujhe prabhu men teree or se mile: maseeh men mere jee ko hara bhra kar de. 
Philemon1:21 maain tere agyaakaree hone ka bhrosa rakhkar, tujhe likhta hoon aur yah janata hoo, ki jo kuchh maain kahata hoo, too us se kaheen baddhkar karega." 
Philemon1:22 aur yah bhee, ki mere liye utarane kee jagah taaiyar rakh mujhe asha haai, ki tumharee praarthnaon ke dara maain tumhen de diya jaunga.." 
Philemon1:23 ipaas jo maseeh yeeshu men mere sath kaaidee haai. 
Philemon1:24 aur marakus aur aaristarkhus aur demas aur looka jo mere sahakarmee haai in ka tujhe namaskara.. 
Philemon1:25 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka anugrah tumharee atma par hota rahe. ameena.. 
Hebrews1:1 poorva yug men parameshvar ne bapadadon se thoda thoda karake aur bhanati bhanati se bhvishyadvktaon ke dara baten karake. 
Hebrews1:2 in dinon ke ant men ham se putra ke dara baten kee, jise us ne saree vastuon ka vaaris ttharaya aur usee ke dara us ne saree srashtti rachee haai." 
Hebrews1:3 vah us kee maahima ka prakasha, aur usake tatv kee chhap haai, aur sab vastuon ko apanee samarth ke vachan se sanbhalata haai: vah papon ko dhaekar unche sthanon par mahamaahiman ke daahine ja baaitta." 
Hebrews1:4 aur svargadooton se utana hee uttm tthara, jitana us ne un se bade pad ka varis hokar uttm nam paya." 
Hebrews1:5 kyonaki svargadooton men se us ne kab kisee se kaha, ki too mera putra haai, aj too mujh se utpann hua? aur fir yah, ki maain usaka pita hoonga, aur vah mera putra hoga?" 
Hebrews1:6 aur jab paahilautte ko jagat men fir lata haai, to kahata haai, ki parameshvar ke sab svargadoot use dandvat karen." 
Hebrews1:7 aur svargadooton ke vishay men yah kahata haai, ki vah apane dooton ko pavan, aur apane sevakon ko dhadhakatee ag banata haai." 
Hebrews1:8 parantu putra se kahata haai, ki he parameshvar tera sinhasan yuganuyug rahega: tere rajy ka rajadand nyay ka rajadand haai." 
Hebrews1:9 too ne dharma se praem aur adharma se baair rakha is karan parameshvar tere parameshvar ne tere sathaiyon se baddhkar harsharoopee tel se tujhe aabhaishok kiya. 
Hebrews1:10 aur yah ki, he prabhu, aadi men too ne prathvee kee nev dalee, aur svarga tere hathon kee kareegaree haai." 
Hebrews1:11 ve to nash ho jaaenge parantu too bana rahega: aur ve sab vasr kee nai purane ho jaaenge. 
Hebrews1:12 aur too unhen chadar kee nain lapettega, aur ve vasr kee nai badal jaaenge: par too vahee haai aur tere vasharen ka ant n hoga." 
Hebrews1:13 aur svargadooton men se un ne kis se kab kaha, ki too mere daahine baait, jab ki maain tere baaiariyon ko tere panvon ke neeche kee peeddhee n kar doon?" 
Hebrews1:14 kya ve sab seva tthal karanevalee atmaaen naheen jo uddhar panevalon ke liye seva karane ko bhejee jatee haain? 
Hebrews2:1 is karan chahia, ki ham un baton par jo ham ne sunee haain aur bhee man lagaae, aeesa n ho ki bahakar un se door chale jaaen." 
Hebrews2:2 kyonaki jo vachan svargadooton ke dara kaha gaya tha jab vah sthiar raha or har aek aparadha aur agyaa n manane ka tteek tteek badala mila. 
Hebrews2:3 to ham log aeese bade uddhar se nishchaint rahakar kyonkar bach sakate haain? jis kee charcha paahile paahil prabhu ke dara hui, aur sunanevalon ke dara hamen nishchay hua." 
Hebrews2:4 aur sath hee parameshvar bhee apanee ichchha ke anusar chinho, aur adabhut kamo, aur nana prakar ke samarth ke kamo, aur pavitra atma ke varadanon ke banttne ke dara is kee gavahee deta raha.." 
Hebrews2:5 us ne us anevale jagat ko jis kee charcha ham kar rahe haai, svargadooton ke adhaeen n kiya." 
Hebrews2:6 baran kisee ne kahee, yah gavahee dee haai, ki manushy kya haai, ki too us kee sudhai leta haai? ya manushy ka putra kya haai, ki too us par drashtti karata haai?" 
Hebrews2:7 too ne use svargadooton se kuchh hee kam kiya too ne us par maahima aur adar ka mukutt rakha aur use apane hathon ke kamon par aadhaikar diya. 
Hebrews2:8 too ne sab kuchh usake panvon ke neeche kar diya: isaliye jab ki us ne sab kuchh usake adhaeen kar diya, to us ne kuchh bhee rakh n chhoda, jo usake adhaeen n ho: par ham ab tak sab kuchh usake adhaeen naheen dekhte." 
Hebrews2:9 par ham ko yeeshu jo svargadooton se kuchh hee kam kiya gaya tha, mratyu ka dukh uttane ke karan maahima aur adar ka mukutt paahine huae dekhte haain taki parameshvar ke anugrah se har aek manushy ke liye mratyu ka svad chakhe." 
Hebrews2:10 kyonaki jis ke liye sab kuchh haai, aur jis ke dara sab kuchh haai, use yahee achchha laga ki jab vah bahut se putraen ko maahima men pahunchaa, to un ke uddhar ke karta ko dukh uttane ke dara siddh kare." 
Hebrews2:11 kyonaki pavitra karanevala aur jo paavitra kiae jate haai, sab aek hee mool se haain: isee karan vah unhen bhai kahane se naheen lajata." 
Hebrews2:12 par kahata haai, ki maain tera nam apane bhaiyon ko sunaunga, sabha ke beech men maain tera bhjan gaunga." 
Hebrews2:13 aur fir yah, ki maain us par bhrosa rakoonga aur fir yah ki dek, maain un ladkon saahit jise parameshvar ne mujhe diae." 
Hebrews2:14 isaliye jab ki ladke mans aur lohoo ke bhagee haai, to vah ap bhee un ke saman un ka sahabhagee ho gaya taaki mratyu ke dara use jise mratyu par shaaktai milee thee, arthata shautan ko nikamma kar de." 
Hebrews2:15 aur jitane mratyu ke bhy ke mare jeevan bhr dasatv men fanse the, unhen chhuda le." 
Hebrews2:16 kyonaki vah to svargadooton ko naheen baran ibraaheem ke vansh ko sanbhalata haai. 
Hebrews2:17 is karan usako chahiae tha, ki sab baton men apane bhaiyon ke saman bane jis se vah un baton men jo parameshvar se sambandha rakhtee haai, aek dayalu aur vishvasayogy mahayajak bane taaki logon ke papon ke liye praayaashchaitt kare." 
Hebrews2:18 kyonaki jab us ne pareeksha kee dasha men dukh uttaya, to vah un kee bhee sahayata kar sakata haai, jin kee pareeksha hotee haai.." 
Hebrews3:1 so he paavitra bhaiyon tum jo svargeey bulahatt men bhagee ho, us praearit aur mahayajak yeeshu par jise ham angeekar karate haain dhyan karo." 
Hebrews3:2 jo apane niyukt karanevale ke liye vishvasayogy tha, jaaisa moosa bhee usake sare ghar men tha." 
Hebrews3:3 kyonaki vah moosa se itana baddhkar maahima ke yogy samajha gaya haai, jitana ki ghar bananevala ghar se baddhkar adar rakhta haai." 
Hebrews3:4 kyonaki har aek ghar ka koi n koi bananevala hota haai, par jis ne sab kuchh banaya vah parameshvar haai." 
Hebrews3:5 moosa to usake sare ghar men sevak kee nai vishvasayogy raha, ki jin baton ka varnn honevala tha, un kee gavahee de." 
Hebrews3:6 par maseeh putra kee nai usake ghar ka adhaikaree haai, aur usaka ghar ham haai, yadi ham sahas par, aur apanee asha ke ghamand par ant tak draddhta se sthiar rahen." 
Hebrews3:7 so jaaisa paavitra atma kahata haai, ki yadi aj tum usaka shabd suno." 
Hebrews3:8 to apane man ko kattor n karo, jaaisa ki krodha dilane ke samay aur pareeksha ke din jangal men kiya tha." 
Hebrews3:9 jahan tumhare bapadadon ne mujhe janchakar parakha aur chalees varsha tak mere kam dekhe. 
Hebrews3:10 is karan maain us samay ke logon se rootta raha, aur kaha, ki in ke man sada bhttkate rahate haai, aur inhon ne mere magorn ko naheen paahichana." 
Hebrews3:11 tab maain ne krodha men akar shapath khai, ki ve mere vishraam men pravesh karane n paaenge." 
Hebrews3:12 he bhaiyo, chaukas raho, ki tum men aeesa bura aur avishvasee n man ho, jo jeevate parameshvar se door hatt jaae." 
Hebrews3:13 baran jis din tak aj ka din kaha jata haai, har din aek doosare ko samajhate raho, aeesa n ho, ki tum men se koi jan pap ke chhl men akar kattor ho jaae." 
Hebrews3:14 kyonaki ham maseeh ke bhagee huae haai, yadi ham apane prathm bhrose par ant tak draddhta se sthiar rahen." 
Hebrews3:15 jaaisa kaha jata haai, ki yadi aj tum usaka shabd suno, to apane manon ko kattor n karo, jaaisa ki krodha dilane ke samay kiya tha." 
Hebrews3:16 bhla kin logon ne sunakar krodha dilaya? kya un sab ne naheen jo moosa ke dara misar se nikale the? 
Hebrews3:17 aur vah chalees varsha tak kin logon se rootta raha? kya unheen se nahee, jinhon ne pap kiya, aur un kee lothen jangal men padee raheen?" 
Hebrews3:18 aur us ne kin se shapath khai, ki tum mere vishraam men pravesh karane n paoge: keval un se jinhon ne agyaa n manee?" 
Hebrews3:19 so ham dekhte haai, ki ve avishvas ke karan pravesh n kar sake.." 
Hebrews4:1 isaliye jab ki usake vishraam men pravesh karane kee praatigyaa ab tak haai, to hamen drana chaahiae aeesa ne ho, ki tum men se koi jang us se rahit jan pade." 
Hebrews4:2 kyonaki hamen unheen kee nai susamachar sunaya gaya haai, par sune huae vachan se unhen kuchh loth n hua kyonki sunanevalon ke man men vishvas ke sath naheen baaitta." 
Hebrews4:3 aur ham jinhon ne vishvas kiya haai, us vishraam men pravesh karate haain jaaisa us ne kaha, ki maain ne apane krodha men shapath khai, ki ve mere vishraam men pravesh karane n paaenge, yadhyapi jagat kee utpaati ke samay se use kam ho chuke the." 
Hebrews4:4 kyonaki sataven din ke vishay men us ne kaheen yon kaha haai, ki parameshvar ne sataven din apane sab kamon ko nipatta karake vishraam kiya." 
Hebrews4:5 aur is jagah fir yah kahata haai, ki ve mere vishraam men pravesh n karane paaenge." 
Hebrews4:6 to jab yah bat bakee haai ki kitane aur haain jo us vishraam men pravesh kare, aur jinhen usaka susamachar paahile sunaya gaya, unhon ne agyaa n manane ke karan us men pravesh n kiya." 
Hebrews4:7 to fir vah kisee vishosh din kee ttharakar itane din ke bad daud kee pustak men use aj ka din kahata haai, jaaise paahile kaha gaya, ki yadi aj tum usaka shabd suno, to apane manon ko kattor n karo." 
Hebrews4:8 aur yaadi yahoshoo unhen vishraam men pravesh kar leta, to usake bad doosare din kee charcha n hotee." 
Hebrews4:9 so jan lo ki parameshvar ke logon ke liye sabt ka vishraam bakee haai. 
Hebrews4:10 kyonaki jis ne usake vishraam men pravesh kiya haai, us ne bhee parameshvar kee nai apane kamon ko poora karake vishraam kiya haai." 
Hebrews4:11 so ham us vishraam men pravesh karane ka prayatn kare, aeesa n ho, ki koi jan un kee nai agyaa n manakar gir pade." 
Hebrews4:12 kyonaki parameshvar ka vachan jeeavit, aur prabal, aur har aek dodhaaree talavar se bhee bahut chokha haai, aur jeev, aur atma ko, aur gantt gant, aur goode goode ko alag karake, var par chhedata haai aur man kee bhavanaon aur vicharon ko janchata haai." 
Hebrews4:13 aur sraashtti kee koi vastu us se chhpaiee naheen haai baran jis se hamen kam haai, us kee ankhon ke samhane sab vastuaen khulee aur beparad haain.." 
Hebrews4:14 so jab hamara aeesa bada mahayajak haai, jo svagorn se hokar gaya haai, arthata parameshvar ka putra yeeshuu to ao, ham apane angeekar ko draddhta se thamen rahe." 
Hebrews4:15 kyonaki hamara aeesa mahayajak nahee, jo hamaree nirbalataon men hamare sath dukhee n ho sake baran vah sab baton men hamaree nai parakha to gaya, taubhee nishpap nikala." 
Hebrews4:16 isaliye ao, ham anugrah ke sinhasan ke nikatt hiyav bandhakar chale, ki ham par daya ho, aur vah anugrah paae, jo avashyakata ke samay hamaree sahayata kare.." 
Hebrews5:1 kyonaki har aek mahayajak manushyon men se liya jata haai, aur manushyon hee ke liye un baton ke vishay men jo parameshvar se sambandha rakhtee haai, ttharaya jata haai: ki bhentt aur pap baali chaddhaya kare." 
Hebrews5:2 aur vah agyaano, aur boole bhttkon ke sath narmee se vyavahar kar sakata haai isaaliye ki vah ap bhee nirbalata se ghaira haai." 
Hebrews5:3 aur isee liye use chahia, ki jaaise logon ke liye, vaaise hee apane liye bhee papa-bali chaddhaya kare." 
Hebrews5:4 aur yah adar ka pad koi apane ap se naheen leta, jab tak ki haroon kee nai parameshvar kee or se ttharaya n jaae." 
Hebrews5:5 vaaise hee maseeh ne bhee mahayajak banane kee badai apane ap se naheen lee, par us ko usee ne dee, jis ne us se kaha tha, ki too mera putra haai, aj maain hee ne tujhe janmaya haai." 
Hebrews5:6 vah doosaree jagah men bhee kahata haai, too malikisidak kee reeati par sada ke liye yajak haai." 
Hebrews5:7 us ne apanee deh men rahane ke dinon men unche shabd se pukar pukarakar, aur ansoo baha bahakar us se jo us ko mratyu se bacha sakata tha, praarthnaen aur binatee kee aur bhktai ke karan us kee sunee gai." 
Hebrews5:8 aur putra hone par bhee, us ne dukh utta uttakar agyaa mananee seekhee." 
Hebrews5:9 aur siddh banakar, apane sab agyaa mananevalon ke liye sada kal ke uddhar ka karan ho gaya." 
Hebrews5:10 aur use parameshvar kee or se malikisidak kee reeati par mahayajak ka pad mila.. 
Hebrews5:11 is ke vishay men hamen bahut see baten kahanee haai, jin ka samajhna bhee kaattnai haai isaliye ki tum uncha sunane lage ho." 
Hebrews5:12 samay ke vichar se to tumhen guroo ho jana chahiae tha, taubhee kya yah avashyak haai, ki koi tumhen parameshvar ke vachanon kee aadi shaiksha fir se sikhaae? or aeese ho gaae ho, ki tumhen ann ke badale ab tak doodha hee chaahiae." 
Hebrews5:13 kyonaki doodha peenevale bachche ko to dharma ke vachan kee paahichan naheen hotee, kyonaki vah balak haai." 
Hebrews5:14 par ann sayanon ke liye haai, jin ke gyaaneandairy abhyas karate karate, bhle bure men bhed karane ke liye pakke ho gaae haain.." 
Hebrews6:1 isaliye ao maseeh kee shaiksha kee arambh kee baton ko chhodkar, ham siddhta kee or baddhte jaae, aur mare huae kamon se man firane, aur parameshvar par vishvas karane." 
Hebrews6:2 aur bapatismon aur hath rakhne, aur mare huon ke jee uttne, aur antaim nyay kee shaikshaaroopee nev, fir se n dalen." 
Hebrews6:3 aur yaadi parameshvar chahe, to ham yaheen karenge." 
Hebrews6:4 kyonaki jinhon ne aek bar jyoti pai haai, jo svargeey varadan ka svad chakh chuke haain aur paavitra atma ke bhagee ho gaae haain." 
Hebrews6:5 aur parameshvar ke uttm vachan ka aur anevale yug kee samathorn ka svad chakh chuke haain. 
Hebrews6:6 yaadi ve bhttk jaaen to unhen man firav ke liye fir naya banana anhona haai kyonaki ve parameshvar ke putra ko apane liye fir kroos par chaddhate haain aur pragatt men. us par kalank lagate haain. 
Hebrews6:7 kyonaki jo boomi vashara ke panee ko jo us par bar bar padta haai, pee peekar jin logon ke liye vah jotee-boi jatee haai, un ke kam ka saga-pat upajatee haai, vah parameshvar se ashaeesh patee haai." 
Hebrews6:8 par yaadi vah jhadee aur unttkattare ugatee haai, to nikammee aur sraapit hone par haai, aur usaka ant jalaya jana haai.." 
Hebrews6:9 par he piryo yadhyapi ham ye baten kahate haain taubhee tumhare vishay men ham is se achchha aur uddharavalee baton ka bhrosa karate haain. 
Hebrews6:10 kyonaki parameshvar anyayee nahee, ki tumhare kam, aur us praem ko bool jaa, jo tum ne unake nam ke liye is reeati se dikhaya, ki pavitra logon kee seva kee, aur kar rahe ho." 
Hebrews6:11 par ham bahut chahate haai, ki tum men se har aek jan ant tak pooree asha ke liye aeesa hee prayatn karata rahe." 
Hebrews6:12 taaki tum alasee n ho jao baran un ka anukaran karo, jo vishvas aur dhaeeraj ke dara praatigyaaon ke varis hote haain." 
Hebrews6:13 aur parameshvar ne ibraaheem ko pratigyaa dete samay jab ki shapath khane ke liye kisee ko apane se bada n paya, to apanee hee shapath khakar kaha." 
Hebrews6:14 ki maain sachamuch tujhe bahut ashaeesh doonga, aur teree santan ko baddhata jaunga." 
Hebrews6:15 aur is reeati se us ne dhaeeraj dharakar pratigyaa kee hui bat praapt kee. 
Hebrews6:16 manushy to apane se kisee bade kee shapath khaya karate haain aur un ke har aek vivad ka faaisala shapath se pakka hota haai. 
Hebrews6:17 isaliye jab parameshvar ne praatigyaa ke vaarison par aur bhee safa reeati se pragatt karana chaha, ki usakee manasa badal naheen sakatee to shapath ko beech men laya." 
Hebrews6:18 taaki do be-badal baton ke dara jin ke vishay men parameshvar ka jootta ttharana anhona haai, hamara draddhta se ddhaddhs bandha jaa, jo sharan lene ko isaaliye daude haai, ki us asha ko jo samhane rakhee hui haai praapt karen." 
Hebrews6:19 vah asha hamare praan ke liye aeesa langar haai jo sthiar aur draddh haai, aur parade ke bheetar tak pahunchata haai." 
Hebrews6:20 jahan yeeshu maalikisidak kee reeati par sada kal ka mahayajak banakar, hamare liye agua kee reeati par pravesh hua haai.." 
Hebrews7:1 yah maalikisidak shaalem ka raja, aur paramapradhaan parameshvar ka yajak, sarvada yajak bana rahata haai jab ibraaheem rajaon ko marakar lautta jata tha, to isee ne us se bhentt karake use ashaeesh dee." 
Hebrews7:2 isee ko ibraaheem ne sab vastuon ka dasavan ansh bhee diya: yah paahile apane nam ke arth ke anusar, dharma ka raja haai." 
Hebrews7:3 jis ka n pita, n mata, n vanshaavalee haai, jis ke n dinon ka aadi haai aur n jeevan ka anat haai parantu parameshvar ke putra ke svaroop tthara.." 
Hebrews7:4 ab is par dhyan karo ki yah kaaisa mahan tha jis ko kulapati ibraaheem ne achchhe se achchhe mal kee loott ka dasavan ansh diya. 
Hebrews7:5 levee kee santan men se jo yajak ka pad pate haai, unhen agyaa milee haai, ki logo, arthata apane bhaiyon se chahe, ve ibraaheem hee kee deh se kyon n janmen ha, vyavastha ke anusar dasavan ansh len." 
Hebrews7:6 par is ne, jo un kee vanshaavalee men ka bhee n tha ibraaheem se dasavan ansh liya aur jise praatigyaaaen milee thee use ashaeesh dee." 
Hebrews7:7 aur us men sandeh nahee, ki chhotta bade se ashaeesh pata haai." 
Hebrews7:8 aur yahan to maranahar manushy dasavan ansh lete haain par vahan vahee leta haai, jis kee gavahee dee jatee haai, ki vah jeevit haai."
