Hebrews7:9 to ham yah bhee kah sakate haai, ki levee ne bhee, jo dasavan ansh leta haai, ibraaheem ke dara dasavan ansh diya." 
Hebrews7:10 kyonaki jis samay maalikisidak ne usake pita se bhentt kee, us samay yah apane pita kee deh men tha.." 
Hebrews7:11 tak yaadi leveey yajak pad ke dara siddh iho sakatee haai jis ke sahare se logon ko vyavastha milee thee to fir kya avashyakata thee, ki doosara yajak malikisidak kee reeati par khda ho, aur haroon kee reeati ka n kahalaae?" 
Hebrews7:12 kyonaki jab yajak ka pad badala jata haai? to vyavastha ka bhee badalana avashy haai. 
Hebrews7:13 kyonaki jis ke vishay men ye baten kahee jatee haain ki vah doosare gotra ka haai, jis men se kisee ne vedee kee seva naheen kee." 
Hebrews7:14 to pragatt haai, ki hamara prabhu yahooda ke gotra men se uday hua haai aur is gotra ke vishay men moosa ne yajak pad kee kuchh charcha naheen kee." 
Hebrews7:15 or jab maalikisidak ke saman aek aur aeesa yajak utpann honevala tha. 
Hebrews7:16 jo shaareearik agyaa kee vyavastha ke anusar nahee, par avinashaee jeevan kee samarth ke anusar niyukt ho to hamara dava aur bhee spashttta se pragatt ho gaya." 
Hebrews7:17 kyonaki usake vishay men yah gavahee dee gai haai, ki too malikisidak kee reeati par yuganuyug yajak haai." 
Hebrews7:18 nidan, pahilee agyaa nirbala aur nishfal hone ke karan lop ho gai." 
Hebrews7:19 isaliye ki vyavastha ne kisee bat kee siddh inaheen ki aur usake sthan par aek aeesee uttm asha rakhee gai haai jis ke dara ham parameshvar ke sameep ja sakate haain. 
Hebrews7:20 aur isaliye ki maseeh kee niyuaktai bina shapath naheen hui. 
Hebrews7:21 kyonaki ve to bina shapath yajak ttharaae gaae par yah shapath ke sath us kee or se niyukt kiya gaya jis ne usake vishay men kaha, ki prabhu ne shapath khai, aur vah us se fir ne pachhtaaega, ki too yuganuyug yajak haai." 
Hebrews7:22 so yeeshu aek uttm vacha ka jamin tthara. 
Hebrews7:23 ve to bahut se yajak banate aa, is ka karan yah tha ki mratyu unhen rahane naheen detee thee." 
Hebrews7:24 par yah yuganuyug rahata haai is karan usaka yajak pad attl haai. 
Hebrews7:25 isee liye jo usake dara parameshvar ke pas ate haai, vah un ka poora poora uddhar kar sakata haai, kyonki vah un ke liye binatee karane ko sarvada jeevit haai.." 
Hebrews7:26 so aeesa hee mahayajak hamare yogy tha, jo pavitra, aur nishkapatt aur nirmal, aur papiyon se alag, aur svarga se bhee uncha kiya hua ho." 
Hebrews7:27 aur un mahayajakon kee nai use avashyak naheen ki prati din pahile apane papon aur fir logon ke papon ke liye baalidan chaddhaae kyonki us ne apane ap ko balidan chaddhakar use aek hee bar nipatta diya. 
Hebrews7:28 kyonaki vyavastha to nirbal manushyon ko mahayajak niyukt karatee haai parantu us shapath ka vachan jo vyavastha ke bad khai gai, us putra ko niyukt karata haai jo yuganuyug ke liye siddh kiya gaya haai.." 
Hebrews8:1 ab to baten ham kah rahe haai, un men se sab se badee bat yah haai, ki hamara aeesa mahayajak haai, jo svarga par mahamaahiman ke sinhasan ke daahine ja baaitta." 
Hebrews8:2 aur paavitra sthan aur us sachche tamboo ka sevak hua, jise kisee manushy ne nahee, baran prabhu ne khda kiya tha." 
Hebrews8:3 kyonaki har aek mahayajak bhent, aur baalidan chaddhane ke liye ttharaya jata haai, is karan avashy haai, ki is ke pas bhee kuchh chaddhane ke liye ho." 
Hebrews8:4 aur yaadi prathvee par hota to kabhee yajak n hota, isaliye ki vyavastha ke anusar bhentt chaddhanevale to haain." 
Hebrews8:5 jo svarga men kee vastuon ke pratiroop aur praatibimb kee seva karate haai, jaaise jab moosa tamboo banane par tha, to use yah chitavanee milee, ki dekh jo namoona tujhe pahad par dikhaya gaya tha, usake anusar sab kuchh banana." 
Hebrews8:6 par us ko un kee sevakai se baddhkar milee, kyonaki vah aur bhee uttm vacha ka madhyasth tthara, jo aur uttm pratigyaaon ke sahare bandhaee gai haai." 
Hebrews8:7 kyonaki yadi vah pahilee vacha nirdosh hotee, to doosaree ke liye avasar n ddoonddha jata." 
Hebrews8:8 par vah un par dosh lagakar kahata haai, ki prabhu kahata haai, dekho ve din ate haai, ki maain israael ke gharane ke sat, aur yahooda ke gharane ke sat, nai vacha bandhoonga." 
Hebrews8:9 yah us vacha ke saman n hogee, jo maain ne un ke bapadadon ke sath us samay bandhaee thee, jab maain un ka hath pakadkar unhen misar desh se nikal laya, kyonki ve meree vacha par sthiar n rahe, aur maain ne un kee sudhai n lee prabhu yahee kahata haai." 
Hebrews8:10 fir prabhu kahata haai, ki jo vacha maain un dinon ke bad israael ke gharane ke sath bandhoonga, vah yah haai, ki maain apanee vyavastha ko un ke manon men daloonga, aur use un ke day par likoonga, aur maain un ka parameshvar ttharoonga, aur ve mere log ttharenge." 
Hebrews8:11 aur har aek apane deshavale ko aur apane bhai ko yah shaiksha n dega, ki too prabhu ko paahichan kayonaki chhotte se bade tak sab mujhe jan lenge." 
Hebrews8:12 kyonaki maain un ke adharma ke vishay me dayavant hoonga, aur un ke papon ko fir smaran n karoonga." 
Hebrews8:13 nai vacha ke sthapan se us ne prathm vacha ko puranee ttharai, aur jo vastu puranee aur jeern jo jatee haai usaka mitt jana aanivarya haai.." 
Hebrews9:1 nidan, us pahilee vacha men bhee seva ke niyam the aur aeesa pavitrasthan jo is jagat ka tha." 
Hebrews9:2 arthata aek tamboo banaya gaya, pahile tamboo men deevat, aur mej, aur bhentt kee rottyaian thee aur vah paavitrasthan kahalata haai." 
Hebrews9:3 aur doosare parade ke peechhe vah tamboo tha, jo param pavitrasthan kahalata haai." 
Hebrews9:4 us men sone kee dhoopadanee, aur charon or sone se maddha hua vacha ka sandook aur is men manna se bhra hua sone ka martaban aur haroon kee chhdee jis men fool fal a gaae the aur vacha kee pattyaian theen." 
Hebrews9:5 aur usake upar donon tejomay karoob the, jo praayashchaitt ke ddhkane par chhaya kiae huae the: inheen ka aek aek karake bakhan karane ka abhee avasar naheen haai." 
Hebrews9:6 jab ye vastuaen is reeati se taaiyar ho chukee, tak paahile tamboo men to yajak har samay pravesh karake seva ke kam nibahate haain" 
Hebrews9:7 par doosare men keval mahayajak varsha bhr men aek hee bar jata haai aur bina lohoo liye naheen jata jise vah apane liye aur logon kee bool chook ke liye chaddhava chaddhata haai. 
Hebrews9:8 is se paavitra atma yahee dikhata haai, ki jab tak pahila tamboo khda haai, tab tak pavitrasthan ka marga pragatt naheen hua." 
Hebrews9:9 aur yah tamboo to vartaman samay ke liye aek drashttant haai jis men aeesee bhentt aur balidan chaddhaae jate haai, jin se aradhana karanevalon ke vivek siddh naheen ho sakate." 
Hebrews9:10 isaliye ki ve keval khane peene kee vastuo, aur bhanati bhanati ke snan vidhai ke adhaar par shaareerik niyam haai, jo sudhaar ke samay tak ke liye niyukt kiae gaae haain.." 
Hebrews9:11 parantu jab maseeh anevalee achchhee achchhee vastuon ka mahayajak hokar aya, to us ne aur bhee bade aur siddh tamboo se hokar jo hath ka banaya hua nahee, arthata srashtti ka naheen." 
Hebrews9:12 aur bakaron aur bachhdon ke lohoo ke dara nahee, par apane hee lohoo ke dara aek hee bar pavitra sthan men pravesh kiya, aur anant chhuttkara praapt kiya." 
Hebrews9:13 kyonaki jab bakaron aur baailon ka lohoo aur kalor kee rakh apaavitra logon par chhdike jane se shareer kee shuuddhta ke liye paavitra karatee haai. 
Hebrews9:14 to maseeh ka lohoo jis ne apane ap ko sanatan atma ke dara parameshvar ke samhane nirdosh chaddhaya, tumhare vivek ko mare huae kamon se kyon n shuuddh karega, taaki tum jeevate parameshvar kee seva karo." 
Hebrews9:15 aur isee karan vah nai vacha ka madhyasth haai, taaki us mratyu ke dara jo paahilee vacha ke samay ke aparadhaen se chhuttkara pane ke liye hui haai, bulaae huae log pratigyaa ke anusar anant meeras ko praapt karen." 
Hebrews9:16 kyonaki jahan vacha bandhaee gai haai vahan vacha bandhanevale kee mratyu ka samajh lena bhee avashy haai. 
Hebrews9:17 kyonaki aeesee vacha marane par pakkee hotee haai, aur jab tak vacha bandhanevala jeevit rahata haai, tab tak vacha kam kee naheen hotee." 
Hebrews9:18 isee liye paahilee vacha bhee bina lohoo ke naheen bandhaee gai. 
Hebrews9:19 kyonaki jab moosa sab logon ko vyavastha kee har aek agyaa suna chuka, to us ne bachhdon aur bakaron ka lohoo lekar, panee aur lal un, aur joofaa ke sat, us pustak par aur sab logon par chhdik diya." 
Hebrews9:20 aur kaha, ki yah us vacha ka lohoo haai, jis kee agyaa parameshvar ne tumhare liye dee haai." 
Hebrews9:21 aur isee reeti se us ne tamboo aur seva ke sare saman par lohoo chhdika. 
Hebrews9:22 aur vyavastha ke anusar praaya: sab vastuaen lohoo ke dara shuuddh kee jatee haain aur bina lohoo bahaae kshama naheen hotee.. 
Hebrews9:23 isaliye avashy haai, ki svarga men kee vastuon ke praatiroop in ke dara shuuddh kiae jaaen par svarga men kee vastuaen ap in se uttm balidanon ke dara." 
Hebrews9:24 kyonaki maseeh ne us hath ke banaae huae pavitra sthan men jo sachche pavitra sthan ka namoona haai, pravesh naheen kiya, par svarga hee men pravesh kiya, taaki hamare liye ab parameshvar ke samhane dikhai de." 
Hebrews9:25 yah naheen ki vah apane ap ko bar bar chaddhaa, jaaisa ki mahayajak praati varsha doosare ka lohoo liye paavitrasthan men pravesh kiya karata haai." 
Hebrews9:26 naheen to jagat kee utpaati se lekar us ko bar bar dukh uttana padta par ab yug ke ant men vah aek bar pragatt hua haai, taaki apane hee balidan ke dara pap ko door kar de." 
Hebrews9:27 aur jaaise manushyon ke liye aek bar marana aur usake bad nyay ka hona niyukt haai. 
Hebrews9:28 vaaise hee maseeh bhee bahuton ke papon ko utta lene ke liye aek bar baalidan hua aur jo log us kee batt johate haai, un ke uddhar ke liye doosaree bar bina pap ke dikhai dega.." 
Hebrews10:1 kyonaki vyavastha jis men anevalee achchhee vastuon ka pratibimb haai, par un ka asalee svaroop nahee, isaaliye un aek hee prakar ke balidanon ke dara, jo praati varsha achook chaddhaae jate haai, pas anevalon ko kadapi siddh naheen kar sakateen." 
Hebrews10:2 naheen to un ka chaddhana band kyon n ho jata? isaliye ki jab seva karanevale aek hee bar shuuddh ho jate, to fir un ka vivek unhen papee n ttharata." 
Hebrews10:3 parantu un ke dara praati varsha papon ka smaran hua karata haai. 
Hebrews10:4 kyonaki anahona haai, ki baailon aur bakaron ka lohoo papon ko door kare." 
Hebrews10:5 isee karan vah jagat men ane samay kahata haai, ki balidan aur bhentt too ne n chahee, par mere liye aek deh taaiyar kiya." 
Hebrews10:6 homa-baliyon aur papa-baliyon se too prasann naheen hua. 
Hebrews10:7 tab maain ne kaha, dek, maain a gaya hoo, paavitra shasr men mere vishay men likha hua haai taaki he parameshvar teree ichchha pooree karoon." 
Hebrews10:8 upar to vah kahata haai, ki n too ne baalidan aur bhentt aur homa-baaliyon aur papa-baliyon ko chaha, aur n un se prasann hua yadhyapi ye balidan to vyavastha ke anusar chaddhaae jate haain." 
Hebrews10:9 fir yah bhee kahata haai, ki dek, maain a gaya hoo, taki teree ichchha pooree karoon nidan vah paahile ko utta deta haai, taki doosare ko niyukt kare." 
Hebrews10:10 usee ichchha se ham yeeshu maseeh kee deh ke ek hee bar balidan chaddhaae jane ke dara paavitra kiae gaae haain. 
Hebrews10:11 aur har aek yajak to khde hokar praati din seva karata haai, aur aek hee prakar ke baalidan ko jo papon ko kabhee bhee door naheen kar sakate bar bar chaddhata haai." 
Hebrews10:12 par yah vyaktai to papon ke badale aek hee baalidan sarvada ke liye chaddhakar parameshvar ke dahine ja baaitta. 
Hebrews10:13 aur usee samay se is kee batt joh raha haai, ki usake baairee usake panvon ke neeche kee peeddhee banen." 
Hebrews10:14 kyonaki us ne aek hee chaddhave ke dara unhen jo pavitra kiae jate haai, sarvada ke liye siddh kar diya haai." 
Hebrews10:15 aur paavitra atma bhee hamen yahee gavahee deta haai kyonaki us ne pahile kaha tha 
Hebrews10:16 ki prabhu kahata haai ki jo vacha maain un dinon ke bad un se bandhoonga vah yah haai ki maain apanee vyavasthaon ko unake day par likoonga aur maain un ke vivek men daloonga. 
Hebrews10:17 fir vah yah kahata haai, ki maain un ke papon ko, aur un ke adharma ke kamon ko fir kabhee smaran n karoonga." 
Hebrews10:18 aur jab in kee kshama ho gai haai, to fir pap ka balidan naheen raha.." 
Hebrews10:19 so he bhaiyo, jab ki hamen yeeshu ke lohoo ke dara us naae aur jeevate marga se paavitra sthan men pravesh karane ka hiyav ho gaya haai." 
Hebrews10:20 jo us ne parade arthata apane shareer men se hokar, hamare liye aabhaishok kiya haai," 
Hebrews10:21 aur isaliye ki hamara aeesa mahan yajak haai, jo parameshvar ke ghar ka adhaikaree haai." 
Hebrews10:22 to ao ham sachche man, aur poore vishvas ke sat, aur vivek ko dosh door karane ke liye day par chhdikav lekar, aur deh ko shuuddh jal se dhaulavakar parameshvar ke sameep jaaen." 
Hebrews10:23 aur apanee asha ke angeekar ko draddhta se thamen rahen kyonki jis ne pratigyaa kiya haai, vah sachcha haai." 
Hebrews10:24 aur praem, aur bhle kamon men uskane ke liye aek doosare kee chinta kiya karen." 
Hebrews10:25 aur aek doosare ke sath ikattha hona ne chhode, jaaise ki kitanon kee reeti haai, par aek doosare ko samajhate rahen aur jyon jyon us din ko nikatt ate dekho, tyon tyon aur bhee aadhaik yah kiya karo.." 
Hebrews10:26 kyonaki sachchai kee paahichan praapt karane ke bad yaadi ham jan boojhkar pap karate rahe, to papon ke liye fir koi baalidan bakee naheen." 
Hebrews10:27 ha, dand ka aek bhyanak batt johana aur ag ka jvalan bakee haai jo virodhaiyon ko bhsm kar dega." 
Hebrews10:28 jab ki moosa kee vyavastha ka n mananevala do ya teen janon kee gavahee par, bina daya ke mar dala jata haai." 
Hebrews10:29 to soch lo ki vah kitane aur bhee bharee dand ke yogy ttharega, jis ne parameshvar ke putra ko panvon se raunda, aur vacha ke lohoo ko jis ke dara vah paavitra ttharaya gaya tha, apavitra jana haai, aur anugrah kee atma ka apaman kiya." 
Hebrews10:30 kyonaki ham use janate haai, jis ne kaha, ki palatta lena mera kam haai, maain hee badala doonga: aur fir yah, ki prabhu apane logon ka nyay karega." 
Hebrews10:31 jeevate parameshvar ke hathon men padna bhyanak bat haai.. 
Hebrews10:32 parantu un pahile dinon ko smaran karo, jin men tum jyoti pakar dukhon ke bade jhmele men sthiar rahe." 
Hebrews10:33 kuchh to yo, ki tum ninda, aur klesh sahate huae tamasha bane, aur kuchh yo, ki tum un ke sajhee huae jin kee durdasha kee jatee theen." 
Hebrews10:34 kyonaki tum kaaiadiyon ke dukh men bhee dukhee hua, aur apanee sanpati bhee anand se luttne dee yah janakar, ki tumhare pas aek aur bhee uttm aur sarvada ttharanevalee sanpaati haai." 
Hebrews10:35 so apana hiyav n chhodo kyonki usaka pratifal bada haai. 
Hebrews10:36 kyonaki tumhen dhaeeraj dharana avashy haai, taaki parameshvar kee ichchha ko pooree karake tum pratigyaa ka fal pao." 
Hebrews10:37 kyonaki ab bahut hee thoda samay rah gaya haai jab ki anevala aaega, aur der n karega." 
Hebrews10:38 aur mera dharmee jan vishvas se jeevit rahega, aur yadi vah peechhe hatt jaae to mera man us se prasann n hoga." 
Hebrews10:39 par ham hattnevale nahee, ki nash ho jaaen par vishvas karanevale haai, ki praanon ko bachaaen.." 
Hebrews11:1 ab vishvas asha kee hui vastuon ka nishchay, aur man dekhee vastuon ka praman haai." 
Hebrews11:2 kyonaki isee ke vishay men praacheenon kee achchhee gavahee dee gain. 
Hebrews11:3 vishvas hee se ham jan jate haai, ki saree sraashtti kee rachana parameshvar ke vachan ke dara hui haai. yah nahee, ki jo kuchh dekhne men ata haai, vah dekhee hui vastuon se bana ho." 
Hebrews11:4 vishvas kee se habil ne kaain se uttm balidan parameshvar ke liye chaddhaya aur usee ke dara usake dharmee hone kee gavahee bhee dee gai: kyonaki parameshvar ne us kee bhentton ke vishay men gavahee dee aur usee ke dara vah marane par bhee ab tak baten karata haai. 
Hebrews11:5 vishvas hee se hanok utta liya gaya, ki mratyu ko n dekhe, aur usaka pata naheen mila kyonaki parameshvar ne use utta liya tha, aur usake uttaae jane se paahile us kee yah gavahee dee gai thee, ki us ne parameshvar ko prasann kiya haai." 
Hebrews11:6 aur vishvas bina use prasann karana anahona haai, kyonki parameshvar ke pas anevale ko vishvas karana chahia, ki vah haai aur apane khojanevalon ko praatifal deta haai." 
Hebrews11:7 vishvas hee se nooh ne un baton ke vishay men jo us samay dikhai n padtee thee, chitaunee pakar bhaktai ke sath apane gharane ke bachav ke liye jahaj banaya, aur usake dara us ne sansar ko doshaee ttharaya aur us dharma ka varis hua, jo vishvas se hota haai." 
Hebrews11:8 vishvas hee se ibraaheem jab bulaya gaya to agyaa manakar aeesee jagah nikal gaya jise meeras men lenevala tha, aur yah n janata tha, ki maain kidhar jata hoon taubhee nikal gaya." 
Hebrews11:9 vishvas hee se us ne pratigyaa kiae huae desh men jaaise paraae desh men paradeshaee rahakar isahak aur yakoob samet jo usake sath usee pratigyaa ke vaaris the, tambooon men vas kiya." 
Hebrews11:10 kyonaki vah us sthiar nevavale nagar kee batt johata tha, jis ka rachanevala aur bananevala parameshvar haai." 
Hebrews11:11 vishvas se sara ne ap booddhee hone par bhee garbh dhaaran karane kee samarth pai kyonaki us ne pratigyaa karanevale ko sachcha jana tha. 
Hebrews11:12 is karan aek hee jan se jo mara hua sa tha, akash ke taron aur samudra ke teer ke baloo kee nai, anaaginit vansh utpann hua.." 
Hebrews11:13 ye sab vishvas hee kee dasha men mare aur unhon ne pratigyaa kee hui vastuen naheen pai par unhen door se dekhkar anandait huae aur man liya, ki ham prathvee par paradeshaee aur baharee haain." 
Hebrews11:14 jo aeesee aeesee baten kahate haai, ve pragatt karate haai, ki svadesh kee khoj men haain." 
Hebrews11:15 aur jis desh se ve nikal aae the, yaadi us kee sudhai karate to unhen lautt jane ka avasar tha." 
Hebrews11:16 par ve aek uttm arthata svargeey desh ke aabhailashaee haai, isee liye parameshvar un ka parameshvar kahalane men un se naheen lajata, so us ne un ke liye aek nagar taaiyar kiya haai.." 
Hebrews11:17 vishvas hee se ibraaheem ne, parakhe jane ke samay me, isahak ko balidan chaddhaya, aur jis ne pratigyaaon ko sach mana tha." 
Hebrews11:18 aur jis se yah kaha gaya tha, ki isahak se tera vansh kahalaaega vah apane aekalaute ko chaddhane laga." 
Hebrews11:19 kyonaki us ne vichar kiya, ki parameshvar samarthee haai, ki mare huon men se jilaa, so unheen men se drashttant kee reeti par vah use fir mila." 
Hebrews11:20 vishvas hee se isahak ne yakoob aur aesav ko anevalee baton ke vishay me ashaeesh dee. 
Hebrews11:21 vishvas hee se yakoob ne marate samay yoosufa ke donon putraen men se aek aek ko ashaeesh dee, aur apanee lattee ke sire par sahara lekar dandvat kiya." 
Hebrews11:22 vishvas hee se yoosufa ne, jab vah marane par tha, to israael kee santan ke nikal jane kee charcha kee, aur apanee haaddiyon ke vishay men agyaa dee." 
Hebrews11:23 vishvas hee se moosa ke mata pita ne us ko, utpann hone ke bad teen maheene tak chhpai rakha kyonaki unhon ne dekha, ki balak sundar haai, aur ve raja kee agyaa se n dre." 
Hebrews11:24 vishvas hee se moosa ne sayana hokar firaun kee bettee ka putra kahalane se inkar kiya. 
Hebrews11:25 isaliye ki use pap men thode din ke sukh bhogane se parameshvar ke logon ke sath dukh bhogana aur uttm laga. 
Hebrews11:26 aur maseeh ke karan nindait hone ko misar ke bhndar se bada dhan samajha: kyonaki us kee ankhe fal pane kee or lagee theen. 
Hebrews11:27 vishvas hee se raja ke krodha se n drakar us ne misar ko chhod diya, kyonaki vah anadekhe ko manon dekhta hua draddh raha." 
Hebrews11:28 vishvas hee se us ne fasah aur lohoo chhdikane kee vidhai manee, ki pahilautton ka nash karanevala israaeliyon par hath n dale." 
Hebrews11:29 vishvas hee se ve lal samudra ke par aeese utar gaa, jaaise sookhee boomi par se aur jab misriyon ne vaaisa hee karana chaha, to sab oob mare." 
Hebrews11:30 vishvas hee se yareeho kee shaharapanah, jab sat din tak usaka chakkar laga chuke to vah gir padee." 
Hebrews11:31 vishvas hee se rahab veshya agyaa ne mananevalon ke sath nash naheen hui isaliye ki us ne bhediyon ko kushal se rakha tha. 
Hebrews11:32 ab aur kya kahoo? kyonki samay naheen raha, ki gidon ka, aur barak aur samasoon ka, aur yifatah ka, aur daud ka aur shaamuael ka, aur bhavishyadvktaon ka varnn karoon." 
Hebrews11:33 inhon ne vishvas hee ke dara rajy jeete dharma ke kam kiae praatigyaa kee hui vastuen praapt kee, sinhon ke munh band kiae." 
Hebrews11:34 ag hee jvala ko ttnda kiya talavar kee dhaar se bach nikale, nirbalata men balavant hue ladai men veer nikale videashaiyon kee faojon ko mar bhgaya." 
Hebrews11:35 striayon ne apane mare huon ko fir jeevate paya kitane to mar khate khate mar gaae aur chhuttkara n chaha isaaliye ki uttm punarootthan ke bhagee hon. 
Hebrews11:36 kai aek tttthon men udaae jane aur kode khane varan bandho jane aur kaaid men padne ke dara parakhe gaae. 
Hebrews11:37 patthravah kiae gaae are se cheere gaae un kee pareeksha kee gai talavar se mare gaae ve kangalee men aur klesh men aur dukh bhogate huae bhedon aur bakariyon kee khalen oddhe hua, idhar udhar mare mare fire." 
Hebrews11:38 aur jangalo, aur pahado, aur gufaaon me, aur prathvee kee dararon men bhttkate fire." 
Hebrews11:39 sansar un ke yogay n tha: aur vishvas hee ke dara in sab ke vishay men achchhee gavahee dee gai, tobhee unhen praatigyaa kee hui vastu n milee." 
Hebrews11:40 kyonaki parameshvar ne hamare liye paahile se aek uttm bat ttharai, ki ve hamare bina siddhta ko n pahunche.." 
Hebrews12:1 is karan jab ki gavahon ka aeesa bada badal ham ko ghore huae haai, to ao, har aek rokanevalee vastu, aur ulajhanevale pap ko door karake, vah daud jis meen hamen daudna haai, dhaeeraj se dauden." 
Hebrews12:2 aur vishvas ke karta aur siddh karanevale yeeshu kee or se takate rahen jis ne us anand ke liye jo usake age dhara tha, lajja kee kuchh chinta n karake, kroos ka dukh saha aur sinhasan par parameshvar ke daahine ja baaitta." 
Hebrews12:3 isaliye us par dhyan karo, jis ne apane virodha men papiyon ka itana vada-avivad sah liya ki tum nirash hokar hiyav n chhod do." 
Hebrews12:4 tum ne pap se ladte huae us se aeesee muttbhed naheen kee, ki tumhara lohoo baha ho." 
Hebrews12:5 aur tum us upadesh ko jo tum ko putraen kee nai diya jata haai, bool gaae ho, ki he mere putra, prabhu kee tadna ko halakee bat n jan, aur jab vah tujhe ghaudke to hiyav n chhod." 
Hebrews12:6 kyonaki prabhu, jis se praem karata haai, us kee tadna bhee karata haai aur jise putra bana leta haai, us ko kode bhee lagata haai." 
Hebrews12:7 tum dukh ko tadna samajhkar sah lo: parameshvar tumhen putra janakar tumhare sath bartav karata haai, vah kaun sa putra haai, jis kee tadna pita naheen karata?" 
Hebrews12:8 yaadi vah tadna jis ke bhagee sab hote haai, tumharee naheen hui, to tum putra nahee, par vyaabhaichar kee santan tthare!" 
Hebrews12:9 fir jab ki hamare shaareerik pita bhee hamaree tadna kiya karate the, to kya atmaon ke pita ke aur bhee adhaeen n rahen jis se jeevit rahen." 
Hebrews12:10 ve to apanee apanee samajh ke anusar thode dinon ke liye tadna karate the, par yah to hamare labh ke liye karata haai, ki ham bhee us kee pavitrata ke bhagee ho jaaen." 
Hebrews12:11 aur vartaman men har prakar kee tadna anand kee nahee, par shaek hee kee bat dikhai padtee haai, taubhee jo us ko sahate sahate pakke ho gaae haai, peechhe unhen chaain ke sath dharma ka praatifal milata haai." 
Hebrews12:12 isaliye ddheele hathon aur nirbal ghauttnon ko seedho karo. 
Hebrews12:13 aur apane panvon ke liye seedho marga banao, ki langada bhttk n jaa, par bhla changa ho jaae.." 
Hebrews12:14 sab se mel milap rakhne, aur us paavitrata ke khojee ho jis ke bina koi prabhu ko kadapi n dekhega." 
Hebrews12:15 aur dhyan se dekhte raho, aeesa n ho, ki koi parameshvar ke anugrah se vanchit rah jaa, ya koi kadvee jad foottkar kashtt de, aur usake dara bahut se log ashuuddh ho jaaen." 
Hebrews12:16 aeesa n ho, ki koi jan vyabhaicharee, ya aesav kee nai adharmee ho, jis n aek bar ke bhojan ke badale apane pahilautte hone ka pad bech dala." 
Hebrews12:17 tum janate to ho, ki bad ko jab us ne ashaeesh panee chahee, to ayogy gina gaya, aur ansoo baha bahakar khojane par bhee man firav ka avasar use n mila.." 
Hebrews12:18 tum to us pahad ke pas jo chooa ja sakata tha aur ag se prajvaalit tha, aur kalee ghatta, aur andhora, aur andhaee ke pasa." 
Hebrews12:19 aur turahee kee dhvani, aur bolanevale ke aeese shabd ke pas naheen aa, jis ke sunanevalon ne binatee hee, ki ab ham se aur baten n kee jaaen." 
Hebrews12:20 kyonaki ve us agyaa ko n sah sake, ki yadi koi pashu bhee pahad ko chooa, to patthravah kiya jaae." 
Hebrews12:21 aur vah darshan aeesa dravana tha, ki moosa ne kaha maain bahut drata aur kanpata hoon." 
Hebrews12:22 par tum siyyon ke pahad ke pas, aur jeevate parameshvar ke nagar svargeey yarooshalem ke pasa." 
Hebrews12:23 aur lakhon svargadooton aur un paahilautton kee sadhaaran sabha aur kaleeasiya jin ke nam svarga men likhe huae haain: aur sab ke nyayee parameshvar ke pas, aur siddh kiae huae dhaarmiyon kee atmaon." 
Hebrews12:24 aur nai vacha ke madhyasth yeeshu, aur chhdikav ke us lohoo ke pas aae ho, jo haabil ke lohoo se uttm baten kahata haai." 
Hebrews12:25 savadhaan raho, aur us kahanevale se munh n faero, kyonki ve log jab prathvee par ke chitavanee denevale se munh modkar n bach sake, to ham svarga par se chitavanee karanevale se munh modkar kyonkar bach sakenge?" 
Hebrews12:26 us samay to usake shabd ne prathvee ko hila diya par ab us ne yah praatigyaa kee haai, ki ek bar fir maain keval prathvee ko nahee, baran akash ko bhee hila doonga." 
Hebrews12:27 aur yah vaky 'aek bar firan is bat ko pragatt karata haai, ki jo vastuen hilai jatee haai, ve srajee hui vastuen hone ke karan ttl jaaengee taki jo vastuen hilai naheen jatee, ve attl banee rahen." 
Hebrews12:28 is karan ham is rajy ko pakar jo hilane ka nahee, us anugrah ko hath se n jane de, jis ke dara ham bhaktai, aur bhy sahit, parameshvar kee aeesee aradhana kar sakate haain jis se vah prasann hota haai." 
Hebrews12:29 kyonaki hamara parameshvar bhsm karanevalee ag haai.. 
Hebrews13:1 bhaichare kee praeeati banee rahe. 
Hebrews13:2 pahunai karana n boolana, kyonki is ke dara kitanon ne anajane svargadooton kee pahunai kee haai." 
Hebrews13:3 kaaidiyon kee aeesee sudhai lo, ki mano un ke sath tum bhee kaaid ho aur jin ke sath bura bartav kiya jata haai, un kee bhee yah samajhkar sudhai liya karo, ki hamaree bhee deh haai." 
Hebrews13:4 vivah sab men adar kee bat samajhee jaa, aur bichhauna nishkalank rahe kyonaki parameshvar vyaabhaichaariyo, aur parasreegamiyon ka nyay karega." 
Hebrews13:5 tumhara svabhav lobhrahit ho, aur jo tumhare pas haai, usee par santosh kiya karo kyonki us ne ap hee kaha haai, ki maain tujhe kabhee n chhooonga, aur n kabhee tujhe tyagoonga." 
Hebrews13:6 isaliye ham bedhadk hokar kahate haai, ki prabhu, mera sahayak haai maain n droonga manushy mera kya kar sakata haai.." 
Hebrews13:7 jo tumhare aguve the, aur jinhon ne tumhen parameshvar ka vachan sunaya haai, unhen smaran rakho aur dhyan se un ke chala-chalan ka ant dekhkar un ke vishvas ka anukaran karo." 
Hebrews13:8 yeeshu maseeh kal aur aj aur yuganuyug aekasa haai. 
Hebrews13:9 nana prakar ke aur uparee upadeshaen se n bhramaae jao, kyonki man ka anugrah se draddh rahana bhla haai, n ki un khane kee vastuon se jin se kam rakhnevalon ko kuchh labh n hua." 
Hebrews13:10 hamaree aek aeesee vedee haai, jis par se khane ka aadhaikar un logon ko nahee, jo tamboo kee seva karate haain." 
Hebrews13:11 kyonaki jin pashuuon ka lohoo mahayajak papa-bali ke liye paavitra sthan men le jata haai, un kee deh chhavanee ke bahar jalai jatee haai." 
Hebrews13:12 isee kara, yeeshu ne bhee logon ko apane hee lohoo ke dara pavitra karane ke liye faattk ke bahar dukh uttaya." 
Hebrews13:13 so ao us kee ninda apane upar liae huae chhavanee ke bahar usake pas nikal chalen. 
Hebrews13:14 kyonaki yahan hamara koi sthiar rahanevala nagar nahee, baran ham aek anevale nagar kee khoj men haain." 
Hebrews13:15 isaliye ham usake dara stuatiroopee balidan, arthata un hotton ka fal jo usake nam ka angeekar karate haai, parameshvar ke liye sarvada chaddhaya karen." 
Hebrews13:16 par bhlai karana, aur udarata n boolo kyonaki parameshvar aeese baalidanon se prasann hota haai." 
Hebrews13:17 apane aguvon kee mano aur unake adhaeen raho, kyonaki ve un kee nai tumhare praanon ke liye jagate rahate, jinhen lekha dena padega, ki ve yah kam anand se kare, n ki ttndee sans le lekar, kyonaki is dasha men tumhen kuchh labh naheen." 
Hebrews13:18 hamare liye praarthna karate raho, kyonaki hamen bhrosa haai, ki hamara vivek shuuddh haai aur ham sab baton men achchhee chal chalana chahate haain." 
Hebrews13:19 aur is ke karane ke liye maain tumhen aur bhee samajhata hoo, ki maain shaeegha tumhare pas fir a sakoon.." 
Hebrews13:20 ab shaantaidata parameshvar jo hamare prabhu yeeshu ko jo bhedon ka mahan rakhvala haai sanatan vacha ke lohoo ke gun se mare huon men se jilakar le aya. 
Hebrews13:21 tumhen har aek bhlee bat men siddh kare, jis se tum us kee ichchha pooree karo, aur jo kuchh us ko bhata haai, use yeeshu maseeh ke dara ham men utpann kare, jis kee badai yuganuyug hotee rahe. ameena.." 
Hebrews13:22 he bhaiyon maain tum se binatee karata hoo, ki in upadesh kee baton ko sah leo kyonaki maain ne tumhen bahut sankshop men likha haai." 
Hebrews13:23 tum yah jan lo ki teemuathaiyus hamara bhai choott gaya haai aur yadi vah shaeegha a gaya, to maain usake sath tum se bhentt karoonga." 
Hebrews13:24 apane sab aguvon aur sab paavitra logon ko namaskar kaho. itaaliyavale tumhen namaskar kahate haain.. 
Hebrews13:25 tum sab par anugrah hota rahe. ameena.. 
James1:1 parameshvar ke aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke das yakoob kee or se un barahon gotraen ko jo tittr bittr hokar rahate haain namaskar pahunche.. 
James1:2 he mere bhaiyo, jab tum nana prakar kee pareekshaaon men pado" 
James1:3 to ise poore anand kee bat samajho, yah janakar, ki tumhare vishvas ke parakhe jane se dhaeeraj utpann hota haai." 
James1:4 par dhaeeraj ko apana poora kam karane do, ki tum poore aur siddh ho jao aur tum men kisee bat kee ghattee n rahe.." 
James1:5 par yaadi tum men se kisee ko buaddh ikee ghattee ho, to parameshvar se mange, jo bina ulahana diae sab ko udarata se deta haai aur us ko dee jaaegee." 
James1:6 par vishvas se mange, aur kuchh sandeh n kare kyonki sandeh karanevala samudra kee lahar ke saman haai jo hava se bahatee aur uchhlatee haai." 
James1:7 aeesa manushy yah n samajhe, ki mujhe prabhu se kuchh milega." 
James1:8 vah vyaktai duchitta haai, aur apanee saree baton men chanchal haai.." 
James1:9 deen bhai apane unche pad par ghamand kare. 
James1:10 aur dhanavan apanee neech dasha para: kyonaki vah ghaas ke fool kee nai jata rahega. 
James1:11 kyonaki soorya uday hote hee kadee dhoop padtee haai aur ghaas ko sukha detee haai, aur usaka fool jhd jata haai, aur us kee shaebha jatee rahatee haai usee prakar dhanavan bhee apane marga par chalate chalate dhool men mil jaaega." 
James1:12 dhany haai vah manushy, jo pareeksha men sthiar rahata haai kyonki vah khra nikalakar jeevan ka vah mukutt paaega, jis kee pratigyaa prabhu ne apane praem karanevalon ko dee haai." 
James1:13 jab kisee hee pareeksha ho, to vah yah n kahe, ki meree pareeksha parameshvar kee or se hotee haai kyonaki n to buree baton se parameshvar kee pareeksha ho sakatee haai, aur n vahee kisee kee pareeksha ap karata haai." 
James1:14 parantu pratyek vyaaktai apanee hee abhailasha men khainchakar, aur fansakar pareeksha men padta haai." 
James1:15 fir abhailasha garbhvatee hokar pap ko janata haai aur pap baddh jata haai to mratyu ko utpann karata haai. 
James1:16 he mere piry bhaiyo, dhaekha n khao." 
James1:17 kyonaki har aek achchha varadan aur har aek uttm dan upar hee se haai, aur jyotiyon ke pita kee or se milata haai, jis men n to koi parivartan ho sakata haai, or n adal badal ke karan us par chhaya padtee haai." 
James1:18 us ne apanee hee ichchha se hamen saty ke vachan ke dara utpann kiya, taaki ham us kee srashtti kee hui vastuon men se ek prakar ke prathm fal hon.." 
James1:19 he mere piry bhaiyo, yah bat tum janate ho: isaliye har aek manushy sunane ke liye tatpar aur bolane men dhaeera aur krodha men dhaeema ho." 
James1:20 kyonaki manushy ka krodha parameshvar ke dharma ka nirvah naheen kar sakata haai. 
James1:21 isaliye saree malinata aur baair bhav kee baddhtee ko door karake, us vachan ko namrata se grahan kar lo, jo day men boya gaya aur jo tumhare praanon ka uddhar kar sakata haai." 
James1:22 parantu vachan par chalanevale bano, aur keval sunanevale hee naheen jo apane ap ko dhaekha dete haain." 
James1:23 kyonaki jo koi vachan ka sunanevala ho, aur us par chalanevala n ho, to vah us manushy ke saman haai jo apana svabhavik munh darpan men dekhta haai." 
James1:24 isaliye ki vah apane ap ko dekhkar chala jata, aur turant bool jata haai ki maain kaaisa tha." 
James1:25 par jo vyaktai svatantrata kee siddh vyavastha par dhyan karata rahata haai, vah apane kam men isaaliye ashaeesh paaega ki sunakar nahee, par vaaisa hee kam karata haai." 
James1:26 yaadi koi apane ap ko bhkt samajhe, aur apanee jeebh par lagam n de, par apane day ko dhaekha de, to us kee bhaktai vyarth haai." 
James1:27 hamare parameshvar aur pita ke nikatt shuuddh aur nirmal bhaktai yah haai, ki anathon or vidhavaon ke klesh men un kee suadhai le, aur apane ap ko sansar se nishkalank rakhen.." 
James2:1 he mere bhaiyo, hamare mahimayukt prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka vishvas tum men pakshapat ke sath n ho." 
James2:2 kyonaki yadi aek puroosh sone ke chhlle aur sundar vasr pahine huae tumharee sabha men aae aur aek kangal bhee maaile kuchaaile kapade paahine huae aae. 
James2:3 aur tum us sundar vasrvale ka munh dekhkar kaho ki too vahan achchhee jagah baaitt aur us kangal se kaho, ki too yahan khda rah, ya mere panv kee peeddhee ke pas baaitt." 
James2:4 to kya tum ne apas men bhed bhav n kiya aur kuavichar se nyay karanevale n tthare? 
James2:5 he mere piry bhaiyon suno kya parameshvar ne is jagat ke kangalon ko naheen chuna ki vishvas men dharmee, aur us rajy ke adhaikaree ho, jis kee pratigyaa us ne un se kee haai jo us se praem rakhte haain?" 
James2:6 par tum ne us kangal ka apaman kiya: kya dhanee log tum par atyachar naheen karate aur kya ve hee tumhen kachahariyon men ghaseett ghaseett kar naheen le jate? 
James2:7 kya ve us uttm nam kee ninda naheen karate jis ke tum kahalaae jate ho? 
James2:8 taubhee yadi tum pavitra shaasr ke is vachan ke anusar, ki too apane padosee se apane saman praem rak, sachamuch us rajy vyavastha ko pooree karate ho, to achchha karate ho." 
James2:9 par yaadi tum pakshapat karate ho, to pap karate ho aur vyavastha tumhen aparadhaee ttharatee haai." 
James2:10 kyonaki jo koi saree vyavastha ka palan karata haai parantu aek hee bat men chook jaae to vah sab baton me doshaee tthara. 
James2:11 isaliye ki jis ne yah kaha, ki too vyaabhaichar n karana usee ne yah bhee kaha, ki too hatya n karana isaliye yaadi too ne vyaabhaichar to naheen kiya, par hatya kee taubhee too vyavastha ka ulanghan karane vala tthara." 
James2:12 tum un logon kee nai vachan bolo, aur kam bhee karo, jin ka nyay svatantrata kee vyavastha ke anusar hoga." 
James2:13 kyonaki jis ne daya naheen kee, usaka nyay bina daya ke hoga: daya nyay par jayavant hotee haai.." 
James2:14 he mere bhaiyo, yadi koi kahe ki mujhe vishvas haai par vah karma n karata ho, to us se kya labh? kya aeesa vishvas kabhee usaka uddhar kar sakata haai?" 
James2:15 yaadi koi bhai ya bahin nagen ughaade ho, aur unhen prati din bhojan kee ghattee ho." 
James2:16 aur tum men se koi un se kahe, kushal se jao, tum garam raho aur trapt raho par jo vastuaen deh ke liye avashyak haain vah unhen n de, to kya labh?" 
James2:17 vaaise hee vishvas bhee, yadi karma saahit n ho to apane svabhav men mara hua haai." 
James2:18 baran koi kah sakata haai ki tujhe vishvas haai, aur maain karma karata hoon: too apana vishvas mujhe karma bina to dikha aur maain apana vishvas apane karmon ke dara tujhe dikhaunga." 
James2:19 tujhe vishvas haai ki aek hee parameshvar haai: too achchha karata haai: dushttatma bhee vishvas rakhte, aur thrathrate haain." 
James2:20 par he nikamme manushy kya too yah bhee naheen janata, ki karma bina vishvas vyarth haai?" 
James2:21 jab hamare pita ibraaheem ne apane putra isahak ko vedee par chaddhaya, to kya vah karmo se dhaaarmik n tthara tha." 
James2:22 so too ne dekh liya ki vishvas ne us ke kamon ke sath milakar prabhav dala haai aur karmo se vishvas siddh hua. 
James2:23 aur paavitra shaasr ka yah vachan poora hua, ki ibraaheem ne parameshvar kee prateeti kee, aur yah usake liye dharma gina gaya, aur vah parameshvar ka mitra kahalaya." 
James2:24 so tum ne dekh liya ki manushy keval vishvas se hee nahee, baran kamorn se bhee dharmee ttharata haai." 
James2:25 vaaise hee rahab veshya bhee jab us ne dooton ko apane ghar men utara, aur doosare marga se vida kiya, to kya karmon se dhaaarmik n ttharee?" 
James2:26 nidan, jaaise deh atma bina maree hui haai vaaisa hee vishvas bhee karma bina mara hua haai.." 
James3:1 he mere bhaiyo, tum men se bahut upadeshak n bane, kyonki janate ho, ki ham upadeshak aur bhee doshaee ttharenge." 
James3:2 isaliye ki ham sab bahut bar chook jate haain: jo koi vachan men naheen chookata, vahee to siddh manushy haai aur saree deh par bhee lagam laga sakata haai." 
James3:3 jab ham apane vash men karane ke liye ghaedon ke munh men lagam lagate haai, to ham un kee saree deh ko bhee faer sakate haain." 
James3:4 dekho, jahaj bhee, yadhypi aeese bade hote haai, aur prachand vayu se chalaae jate haai, taubhee aek chhottee see patavar ke dara manjhee kee ichchha ke anusar ghaumaae jate haain." 
James3:5 vaaise hee jeebh bhee aek chhotta sa ang haai aur badee badee deenge maratee haai: dekho, thodee see ag se kitane bade ban men ag lag jatee haai." 
James3:6 jeebh bhee aek ag haai: bhee hamare angon men adharma ka aek lok haai aur saree deh par kalank lagatee haai, aur bhvachakr men ag laga detee haai aur narak kund kee ag se jalatee rahatee haai." 
James3:7 kyonaki har prakar ke bana-pashu, pakshae, aur renganevale jantu aur jalachar to manushy jaati ke vash men ho sakate haain aur ho bhee gaae haain." 
James3:8 par jeebh ko manushyon men se koi vash men naheen kar sakata vah aek aeesee bala haai jo kabhee rookatee hee naheen vah praan nashak vish se bhree hui haai. 
James3:9 isee se ham prabhu aur pita kee stuti karate haain aur isee se manushyon ko jo parameshvar ke svaroop men utpann huae haain srap dete haain. 
James3:10 aek hee munh se dhanyavad aur srap donon nikalate haain. 
James3:11 he mere bhaiyo, aeesa nahee hona chaahiae." 
James3:12 kya sote ke aek hee munh se meetta aur khara jal donon nikalata haai? he mere bhaiyo, kya anjeer ke ped men jaaitoon, ya dakh kee lata men anjeer lag sakate haain? vaaise hee khare sote se meetta panee naheen nikal sakata.." 
James3:13 tum men gyaanavan aur samajhdar kaun haai? jo aeesa ho vah apane kamon ko achchhe chalachalan se us namrata sahit pragatt kare jo gyaan se utpann hotee haai. 
James3:14 par yaadi tum apane apane man men kadvee dah aur virodha rakhte ho, to saty ke virodha men ghamand n karana, aur n to joott bolana." 
James3:15 yah gyaan vah nahee, jo upar se utarata haai baran sansaarik, aur shaareearik, aur shautanee haai." 
James3:16 isaliye ki jahan dah aur virodha hota haai, vahan bakheda aur har prakar ka dushkarma bhee hota haai." 
James3:17 par jo gyaan upar se ata haai vah paahile to paavitra hota haai fir milanasar, komal aur mradubhav aur daya, aur achchhe falon se lada hua aur pakshapat aur kapatt rahit hota haai." 
James3:18 aur milap karanevalon ke liye dhaarmikata ka fal mela-milap ke sath boya jata haai.. 
James4:1 tum men ladaiyan aur jhgade kahan se a gaae? kya un sukh-avilason se naheen jo tumhare angon men ladte-bhaidte haain? 
James4:2 tum lalasa rakhte ho, aur tumhen milata naheen tum hatya aur dah karate ho, or kuchh praapt naheen kar sakate tum jhgadte aur ladte ho tumhen isaliye naheen milata, ki mangate naheen." 
James4:3 tum mangate ho aur pate nahee, isaaliye ki buree ichchha se mangate ho, taki apane bhog vilas men uda do." 
James4:4 he vyabhaichaarinaiyo, kya tum naheen janatee, ki sansar se mitrata karanee parameshvar se baair karana haai? so jo koi sansar ka mitra hona chahata haai, vah apane ap ko parameshvar ka baairee banata haai." 
James4:5 kya tum yah samajhte ho, ki pavitra shaasr vyarth kahata haai? jis atma ko us ne hamare bheetar basaya haai, kya vah aeesee lalasa karata haai, jis ka pratifal dah ho?" 
James4:6 vah to aur bhee anugrah deta haai is karan yah likha haai, ki parameshvar abhaimaaniyon se virodha karata haai, par deenon par anugrah karata haai." 
James4:7 isaliye parameshvar ke adhaeen ho jao aur shautan ka samhana karo, to vah tumhare pas se bhag nikalega." 
James4:8 parameshvar ke nikatt ao, to vah bhee tumhare nikatt aaega: he paapiyo, apane hath shuuddh karo aur he duchitte logon apane day ko paavitra karo." 
James4:9 dukhee hoo, aur shaek kara, aur roo: tumharee hansee shaek se aur tumhara anand udasee se badal jaae." 
James4:10 prabhu ke samhane deen bano, to vah tumhen shairomanai banaaega." 
James4:11 he bhaiyo, aek doosare kee badanamee n karo, jo apane bhai kee badanamee karata haai, ya bhai par dosh lagata haai, vah vyavastha kee badanamee karata haai, aur vyavastha par dosh lagata haai, to too vyavastha par chalanevala nahee, par us par hakim tthara." 
James4:12 vyavastha denevala aur hakim to aek hee haai, jise bachane aur nash karane kee samarth haai too kaun haai, jo apane padosee par dosh lagata haai?" 
James4:13 tum jo yah kahate ho, ki aj ya kal ham kisee aur nagar men jakar vahan aek varsha bitaaenge, aur vyapar karake labh uttaaenge." 
James4:14 aur yah naheen janate ki kal kya hoga: sun to lo, tumhara jeevan haai hee kya? tum to mano bhap saman ho, jo thodee der dikhai detee haai, fir lop ho jatee haai." 
James4:15 is ke vipareet tumhen yah kahana chahia, ki yadi prabhu chahe to ham jeevit rahenge, aur yah ya vah kam bhee karenge." 
James4:16 par ab tum apanee deeng par ghamand karate ho aeesa sab ghamand bura hota haai. 
James4:17 isaliye jo koi bhlai karana janata haai aur naheen karata, usake liye yah pap haai.." 
James5:1 he dhanavanon sun to lo tum apane anevale kleshaen par chillakar roo. 
James5:2 tumhara dhan bigad gaya aur tumhare vasren ko keede kha gaae. 
James5:3 tumhare sone-chandee men kai lag gai haai aur vah kai tum par gavahee degee, aur ag kee nai tumhara mans kha jaaegee: tum ne antaim yug men dhan battora haai." 
James5:4 dekho, jin majadooron ne tumhare khet katte, un kee vah majadooree jo tum ne dhaekha dekar rakh lee haai chilla rahee haai, aur lavanevalon kee dohai, senaon ke prabhu ke kanon tak pahunch gai haai." 
James5:5 tum prathvee par bhoga-avilas men lage rahe aur bada hee sukh bhoga tum ne is vadha ke din ke liye apane day ka palana-poshan karake motta taja kiya. 
James5:6 tum ne dharmee ko doshaee ttharakar mar dala vah tumhara samhana naheen karata.. 
James5:7 so he bhaiyo, prabhu ke agaman tak dhaeeraj dharo, dekho, grahastha prathvee ke bahumooly fal kee asha rakhta hua prathm aur aantaim vashara hone tak dhaeeraj dharata haai." 
James5:8 tum bhee dhaeeraj dharo, aur apane day ko draddh karo, kyonaki prabhu ka shuubhagaman nikatt haai." 
James5:9 he bhaiyo, aek doosare par dosh n lagao taaki tum doshaee n ttharo, dekho, haakim dar par khda haai." 
James5:10 he bhaiyo, jin bhvishyadvktaon ne prabhu ke nam se baten kee, unhen dukh uttane aur dhaeeraj dharane ka aek adarsha samajho." 
James5:11 dekho, ham dhaeeraj dharanevalon ko dhany kahate haain: tum ne aeeyoob ke dhaeeraj ke vishay men to suna hee haai, aur prabhu kee or se jo usaka pratifal hua use bhee jan liya haai, jis se prabhu kee atyant karoona aur daya pragatt hotee haai." 
James5:12 par he mere bhaiyo, sab se shraeshtt bat yah haai, ki shapath n khana n svarga kee n prathvee kee, n kisee aur vastu kee, par tumharee batacheet han kee ha, aur naheen kee naheen ho, ki tum dand ke yogy n ttharo.." 
James5:13 yaadi tum men koi dukhee ho to vah praarthna kare: yadi anaandait ho, to vah stuati ke bhjan gaae." 
James5:14 yaadi tum men koi rogee ho, to kaleeasiya ke praacheenon ko bulaa, aur ve prabhu ke nam se us par tel mal kar usake liye praarthna karen." 
James5:15 aur vishvas kee praarthna ke dara rogee bach jaaega aur prabhu us ko uttakar khda karega aur yaadi us ne pap bhee kiae ho, to un kee bhee kshama ho jaaegee." 
James5:16 isaliye tum apas men aek doosare ke samhane apane apane papon ko man lo aur aek doosare ke liye praarthna karo, jis ke change ho jao dharmee jan kee praarthna ke prabhav se bahut kuchh ho sakata haai." 
James5:17 aeliyyah bhee to hamare saman dukh-sukh bhogee manushy tha aur us ne gidgida kar praarthna kee ki menh n barase aur saddhe teen varsha tak boomi par menh naheen barasa. 
James5:18 fir us ne praarthna kee, to akash se vashara hui, aur boomi falavant hui.." 
James5:19 he mere bhaiyo, yadi tum men koi saty ke marga se bhttk jaa, aur koi us ko faer laae." 
James5:20 to vah yah jan le, ki jo koi kisee bhttke huae papee ko faer laaega, vah aek praan ko mratyu se bachaaega, aur anek papon par parada dalega.." 
1Peter1:1 pataras kee or se jo yeeshu maseeh ka praerit haai, un paradeashaiyon ke nam, jo puntus, galatiya, kappadukiya, aasiya, aur bithuaniya men tittr bittr hokar rahate haain." 
1Peter1:2 aur parameshvar pita ke bhavishy gyaan ke anusar, atma ke pavitra karane ke dara agyaa manane, aur yeeshu maseeh ke lohoo ke chhdike jane ke liye chune gaae haain. tumhen atyant anugrah aur shaaantai milatee rahe.." 
1Peter1:3 hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke parameshvar aur pita ka dhanyavad do, jis ne yeeshu maseeh ko mare huon men se jee uttne ke dara, apanee badee daya se hamen jeeavit asha ke liye naya janm diya." 
1Peter1:4 arthata aek aavinashaee aur nirmal, aur ajar meeras ke liye." 
1Peter1:5 jo tumhare liye svarga men rakhee haai, jin kee raksha parameshvar kee samarth se, vishvas ke dara us uddhar ke liye, jo anevale samay men pragatt honevalee haai, kee jatee haai." 
1Peter1:6 aur is karan tum magan hote ho, yadhyapi avashy haai ki ab kuchh din tak nana prakar kee pareekshaaon ke karan udas ho." 
1Peter1:7 aur yah isaliye haai ki tumhara parakha hua vishvas, jo ag se taae huae nashaman sone se bhee kahee, adhaik bahumooly haai, yeeshu maseeh ke pragatt hone par prashansa, aur mahima, aur adar ka karan tthare." 
1Peter1:8 us se tum bin dekhe praem rakhte ho, aur ab to us par bin dekhe bhee vishvas karake aeese anandait aur magan hote ho, jo varnn se bahar aur mahima se bhra hua haai." 
1Peter1:9 aur apane vishvas ka pratifal arthata atmaon ka uddhar praapt karate ho. 
1Peter1:10 isee uddhar ke vishay men un bhavishyadvktaon ne bahut ddoonddh-ddhanddh aur jancha-padtal kee, jinhon ne us anugrah ke vishay men jo tum par hone ko tha, bhvishyadanee kee thee." 
1Peter1:11 unhon ne is bat kee khoj kee ki maseeh ka atma jo un men tha, aur paahile hee se maseeh ke dukhon kee aur un ke bad honevalee mahima kee gavahee deta tha, vah kaun se aur kaaise samay kee or sanket karata tha." 
1Peter1:12 un par yah pragatt kiya gaya, ki ve apanee naheen baran tumharee seva ke liye ye baten kaha karate the, jin ka samachar ab tumhen un ke dara mila jinhon ne pavitra atma ke dara jo svarga se bheja gaya: tumhen susamachar sunaya, aur in baton ko svargadoot bhee dhyan se dekhne kee lalasa rakhte haain.." 
1Peter1:13 is karan apanee apanee buddh ikee kamar bandhakar, aur sachet rahakar us anugrah kee pooree asha rakho, jo yeeshu maseeh ke pragatt hone ke samay tumhen milanevala haai." 
1Peter1:14 aur agyaakaree balakon kee nai apanee agyaanata ke samay kee puranee aabhailashaaon ke sadrash n bano. 
1Peter1:15 par jaaisa tumhara bulanevala pavitra haai, vaaise hee tum bhee apane sare chal chalan men pavitra bano." 
1Peter1:16 kyonaki likha haai, ki pavitra bano, kyonki maain paavitra hoon." 
1Peter1:17 aur jab ki tum, he pita, kah kar us se praarthna karate ho, jo bina pakshapat har aek ke kam ke anusar nyay karata haai, to apane paradeshaee hone ka samay bhy se bitao." 
1Peter1:18 kyonaki tum janate ho, ki tumhara nikamma chala-chalan jo bapadadon se chala ata haai us se tumhara chhuttkara chandee sone arthata nashaman vastuon ke dara naheen hua." 
1Peter1:19 par nirdosh aur nishkalank memne arthata maseeh ke bahumooly lohoo ke dara hua. 
1Peter1:20 usaka gyaan to jagat kee utpati ke pahile hee se jana gaya tha, par ab is aantaim yug men tumhare liye pragatt hua." 
1Peter1:21 jo usake dara us parameshvar par vishvas karate ho, jis ne use mare huon men se jilaya, aur mahima dee ki tumhara vishvas aur asha parameshvar par ho." 
1Peter1:22 so jab ki tum ne bhaichare kee nishkapatt praeeti ke nimitt saty ke manane se apane manon ko pavitra kiya haai, to tan man lagakar aek doosare se aadhaik praem rakho." 
1Peter1:23 kyonaki tum ne nashaman naheen par aavinashaee beej se parameshvar ke jeevate aur sada ttharanevale vachan ke dara naya janm paya haai. 
1Peter1:24 kyonaki har aek praanee ghaas kee nain haai, aur us kee saree shaebha ghaas ke fool kee nain haai: ghaas sookh jatee haai, aur fool jhd jata haai." 
1Peter1:25 parantu prabhu ka vachan yuganuyug sthiar rahega: aur yah hee susamachar ka vachan haai jo tumhen sunaya gaya tha.. 
1Peter2:1 isaliye sab prakar ka baairabhav aur chhl aur kapatt aur dah aur badanamee ko door karake. 
1Peter2:2 naye janmen huae bachchon kee nai nirmal aatmaik doodha kee lalasa karo, taaki usake dara uddhar pane ke liye baddhte jao." 
1Peter2:3 yaadi tum ne prabhu kee krapa ka svad chakh liya haai. 
1Peter2:4 usake pas akar, jise manushyon ne to nikamma ttharaya, parantu parameshvar ke nikatt chuna hua, aur bahumooly jeevata patthr haai." 
1Peter2:5 tum bhee ap jeevate patthron kee nai aatmaik ghar banate jate ho, jis se yajakon ka pavitra samaj banakar, aeese atmaik balidan chaddhao, jo yeeshu maseeh ke dara parameshvar ko graa ho." 
1Peter2:6 is karan pavitra shaasr men bhee aya haai, ki dekho, maain siyyon men kone ke sire ka chuna hua aur bahumooly patthr dharata hoon: aur jo koi us par vishvas karega, vah kisee reeati se lajjait naheen hoga." 
1Peter2:7 so tumhare liye jo vishvas karate ho, vah to bahumooly haai, par jo vishvas naheen karate un ke liye jis patthr ko rajaamisreeyon ne nikamma ttharaya tha, vahee kone ka sira ho gaya." 
1Peter2:8 aur ttes lagane ka patthr aur ttokar khane kee chattan ho gaya haai: kyonki ve to vachan ko n manakar ttokar khate haain aur isee ke liye ve ttharaae bhee gaae the. 
1Peter2:9 par tum aek chuna hua vansha, aur raja-padadhaaree, yajakon ka samaj, aur pavitra log, aur parameshvar kee nij praja ho, isaliye ki jis ne tumhen andhakar men se apanee adabhut jyoti men bulaya haai, usake gun pragatt karo." 
1Peter2:10 tum paahile to kuchh bhee naheen the, par ab parameshvar hee praja ho: tum par daya naheen hui thee par ab tum par daya hui haai.." 
1Peter2:11 he piryon maain tum se binatee karata hoo, ki tum apane ap ko paradeshaee aur yatraee janakar us sansarik abhailashaaon se jo atma se yuddh karatee haai, bache raho." 
1Peter2:12 anyajatiyon men tumhara chalachalan bhla ho isaaliye ki jin jin baton men ve tumhen kukarmee janakar badanam karate haai, ve tumhare bhle kamon ko dekhkara unheen ke karan krapa drashtti ke din parameshvar kee mahima karen.." 
1Peter2:13 prabhu ke liye manushyon ke ttharaae huae har aek prabandha ke adhaeen men raho, raja ke isaliye ki vah sab par pradhaan haai." 
1Peter2:14 aur haakimon ke, kyonaki ve kukaarmiyon ko dand dene aur sukarmiyon kee prashansa ke liye usake bheje huae haain." 
1Peter2:15 kyonaki parameshvar kee ichchha yah haai, ki tum bhle kam karane se nirbuaddh ilogon kee agyaanata kee baton ko band kar do." 
1Peter2:16 aur apane ap ko svatantra jano par apanee is svatantrata ko burai ke liye ad n banao, parantu apane ap ko parameshvar ke das samajhkar chalo." 
1Peter2:17 sab ka adar karo, bhaiyon se praem rakho, parameshvar se dro, raja ka samman karo.." 
1Peter2:18 he sevako, har prakar ke bhy ke sath apane svamiyon ke adhaeen raho, n keval bhlon aur namraen ke, par kuattlaien ke bhee." 
1Peter2:19 kyonaki yadi koi parameshvar ka vichar karake anyay se dukh uttata hua klesh sahata haai, to yah suhavana haai." 
1Peter2:20 kyonaki yadi tum ne aparadha karake ghoose khaae aur dhaeeraj dhara, to us men kya badai kee bat haai? par yadi bhla kam karake dukh uttate ho aur dhaeeraj dharate ho, to yah parameshvar ko bhata haai." 
1Peter2:21 aur tum isee ke liye bulaae bhee gaae ho kyonaki maseeh bhee tumhare liye dukh uttakar, tumhen aek adarsha de gaya haai, ki tum bhee usake chinh par chalo." 
1Peter2:22 n to us ne pap kiya, aur n usake munh se chhl kee koi bat nikalee." 
1Peter2:23 vah galee sunakar galee naheen deta tha, aur dukh uttakar kisee ko bhee dhamakee naheen deta tha, par apane ap ko sachche nyayee ke hath men saupata tha." 
1Peter2:24 vah ap hee hamare papon ko apanee deh par liae huae kroos par chaddh gaya jis se ham papon ke liye mar karake dhaarmikata ke liye jeevan bitaaen: usee ke mar khane se tum change hue. 
1Peter2:25 kyonaki tum pahile bhttkee hui bhedon kee nain the, par ab apane praanon ke rakhvale aur adhyaksha ke pas fir a gaae ho." 
1Peter3:1 he paatnaiyo, tum bhee apane pati ke adhaeen raho." 
1Peter3:2 isaliye ki yadi in men se koi aeese ho jo vachan ko n manate ho, taubhee tumhare bhy sahit pavitra chalachalan ko dekhkar bina vachan ke apanee apanee patnee ke chalachalan ke dara khainch jaaen." 
1Peter3:3 aur tumhara singar, dikhavattee n ho, arthata bal goonthne, aur sone ke gahane, ya bhanti bhanati ke kapade paahinana." 
1Peter3:4 baran tumhara chhpai hua aur gupt manushyatv, namrata aur man kee deenata kee aavinashaee sajavatt se susaajjait rahe, kyonaki parameshvar kee drashtti men isaka mooly bada haai." 
1Peter3:5 aur poorvakal men pavitra striayan bhee, jo parameshvar par asha rakhtee thee, apane ap ko isee reeati se sanvaratee aur apane apane pati ke adhaeen rahatee theen." 
1Peter3:6 jaaise sara ibraaheem kee agyaa men rahatee aur use svamee kahatee thee: so tum bhee yaadi bhlai karo, aur kisee prakar ke bhy se bhyabheet n ho to us kee benttyaian ttharogee.." 
1Peter3:7 vaaise hee he paatiyo, tum bhee buddhmaianee se patnaiyon ke sath jeevan nirvah karo aur sree ko nirbal patra janakar usaka adar karo, yah samajhkar ki ham donon jeevan ke varadan ke varis haai, jis se tumharee praarthnaaen rook n jaaen.." 
1Peter3:8 nidan, sab ke sab aek man aur krapamay aur bhaichare kee praeeti rakhnevale, aur karoonamay, aur namra bano." 
1Peter3:9 burai ke badale burai mat karo aur n galee ke badale galee do par is ke vipareet ashaeesh hee do: kyonaki tum ashaeesh ke vaaris hone ke liye bulaae gaae ho. 
1Peter3:10 kyonaki jo koi jeevan kee ichchha rakhta haai, aur achchhe din dekhna chahata haai, vah apanee jeebh ko burai se, aur apane hontton ko chhl kee baten karane se roke rahe." 
1Peter3:11 vah burai ka sath chhode, aur bhlai kee kare vah mel milap ko ddoonddhe, aur us ke yatn men rahe." 
1Peter3:12 kyonaki prabhu kee ankhe dhaarmiyon par lagee rahatee haai, aur usake kan us kee binatee kee or lage rahate haai, parantu prabhu burai karanevalon ke vimukh rahata haai.." 
1Peter3:13 aur yaadi tum bhlai karane men utteajit raho to tumharee burai karanevala fir kaun haai? 
1Peter3:14 aur yaadi tum dharma ke karan dukh bhee uttao, to dhany ho par un ke drane se mat dro, aur n ghabarao." 
1Peter3:15 par maseeh ko prabhu janakar apane apane man men paavitra samajho, aur jo koi tum se tumharee asha ke vishay men kuchh poochhe, to use uttr dene ke liye sarvada taaiyar raho, par namrata aur bhy ke sath." 
1Peter3:16 aur vivek bhee shuuddh rakho, isaliye ki jin baton ke vishay men ve jo tumhare maseehee achchhe chalachalan ka apaman karate haain lajjait hon." 
1Peter3:17 kyonaki yadi parameshvar kee yahee ichchha ho, ki tum bhlai karane ke karan dukh uttao, to yah burai karane ke karan dukh uttane se uttm haai." 
1Peter3:18 isaliye ki maseeh ne bhee, arthata adharmiyon ke liye dharmee ne papon ke karan aek bar dukh uttaya, taki hamen parameshvar ke pas pahunchaae: vah shareer ke bhav se to ghaat kiya gaya, par atma ke bhav se jilaya gaya." 
1Peter3:19 usee men us ne jakar kaaidee atmaon ko bhee prachar kiya. 
1Peter3:20 jinhon ne us beete samay men agyaa n mana jab parameshvar nooh ke dinon men dhaeeraj dharakar tthara raha, aur vah jahaj ban raha tha, jis men baaittkar thode log arthata att praanee panee ke dara bach gaae." 
1Peter3:21 aur usee panee ka drashttant bhee, arthata bapaatisma, yeeshu maseeh ke jee uttne ke dara, ab tumhen bachata haai us se shareer ke maail ko door karane ka arth naheen haai, parantu shuuddh vivek se parameshvar ke vash men ho jane ka arth haai." 
1Peter3:22 vah svarga par jakar parameshvar ke dahinee or baaitt gaya aur svargadoot aur aadhaikaree aur samarthee usake adhaeen kiae gaae haain.. 
1Peter4:1 so jab ki maseeh ne shareer men hokar dukh uttaya to tum bhee us hee manasa ko dhaaran karake haathaiyar bandha lo kyonaki jis shareer men dukh uttaya, vah pap se choott gaya." 
1Peter4:2 taaki bhvishy men apana shosh shaareerik jeevan manushyon kee abhailashaaon ke anusar naheen baran parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar vyateet karo. 
1Peter4:3 kyonaki anyajaatiyon kee ichchha ke anusar kam karane, aur luchapan kee buree abhailashaao, matavalapan, leelakreeda, piyakkadpan, aur gharaanait mootiapooja men jahan tak ham ne paahile se samay ganvaya, vahee bahut hua." 
1Peter4:4 is se ve achambha karate haai, ki tum aeese bharee luchapan men un ka sath naheen dete, aur isaaliye ve bura bhla kahate haain." 
1Peter4:5 par ve us ko jo jeevaton aur mare huon ka nyay karane ko taaiyar haai, lekha denge." 
1Peter4:6 kyonaki mare huon ko bhee susamachar isee liye sunaya gaya, ki shareer men to manushyon ke anusar un ka nyay ho, par atma men ve parameshvar ke anusar jeeavit rahen.." 
1Peter4:7 sab baton ka ant turant honevala haai isaliye sanyamee hokar praarthna ke liye sachet raho. 
1Peter4:8 aur sab men shraeshtt bat yah haai ki aek doosare se aadhaik praem rakho kyonki praem anek papon ko ddhap deta haai. 
1Peter4:9 bina kudkudaae aek doosare kee pahunai karo. 
1Peter4:10 jis ko jo varadan mila haai, vah use parameshvar ke nana prakar ke anugrah ke bhle bhndariyon kee nai aek doosare kee seva men lagaae." 
1Peter4:11 yaadi koi bole, to aeesa bole, manon parameshvar ka vachan haai yaadi koi seva kare to us shaaktai se kare jo parameshvar deta haai jis se sab baton me yeeshu maseeh ke dara, parameshvar kee mahima pragatt ho: mahima aur samraajy yuganuyug usee kee haai. ameena.." 
1Peter4:12 he piryo, jo dukh roopee aagnai tumhare parakhne ke liye tum men bhdkee haai, is se yah samajhkar achambha n karo ki koi anokhee bat tum par beet rahee haai." 
1Peter4:13 par jaaise jaaise maseeh ke dukhon men sahabhagee hote ho, anand karo, jis se usakee mahima ke pragatt hote samay bhee tum anaandait aur magan ho." 
1Peter4:14 fir yadi maseeh ke nam ke liye tumharee ninda kee jatee haai, to dhany ho kyonaki mahima ka atma, jo parameshvar ka atma haai, tum par chhaya karata haai." 
1Peter4:15 tum men se koi vyaaktai hatyara ya chor, ya kukarmee hone, ya paraae kam men hath dalane ke karan dukh n paae." 
1Peter4:16 par yaadi maseehee hone ke karan dukh paa, to lajjait n ho, par is bat ke liye parameshvar kee maahima kare." 
1Peter4:17 kyonaki vah samay a pahuncha haai, ki pahile parameshvar ke logon ka nyay kiya jaa, aur jab ki nyay ka arambh ham hee se hoga to un ka kya ant hoga jo parameshvar ke susamachar ko naheen manate?" 
1Peter4:18 aur yaadi dharmee vyaktai hee kattnaita se uddhar paaega, to bhaktaiheen aur papee ka kya ttkaiana?" 
1Peter4:19 isaliye jo parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar dukh uttate haai, ve bhlai karate hua, apane apane praan ko vishvasayogy srajanahar ke hath men saunp den.." 
1Peter5:1 tum men jo praacheen haai, maain un kee nain praacheen aur maseeh ke dukhon ka gavah aur pragatt honevalee maahima men sahabhagee hokar unhen yah samajhata hoon." 
1Peter5:2 ki parameshvar ke us jhund kee, jo tumhare beech men haain rakhvalee karo aur yah dabav se nahee, parantu parameshvar kee ichchha ke anusar anand se, aur neecha-kamai ke liye nahee, par man laga kara." 
1Peter5:3 aur jo log tumhen saunpe gaae haai, un par adhaikar n jatao, baran jhund ke liye adarsha bano." 
1Peter5:4 aur jab pradhaan rakhvala pragatt hoga, to tumhen mahima ka mukutt diya jaaega, jo murajhane ko naheen." 
1Peter5:5 he navayuvako, tum bhee praacheenon ke adhaeen raho, baran tum sab ke sab aek doosare kee seva ke liye deenata se kamar bandho raho, kyonaki parameshvar abhaimaaniyon ka samhana karata haai, parantu deenon par anugrah karata haai." 
1Peter5:6 isaliye parameshvar ke balavant hath ke neeche deenata se raho, jis se vah tumhen uchit samay par baddhaae." 
1Peter5:7 aur apanee saree chinta usee par dal do, kyonaki us ko tumhara dhyan haai." 
1Peter5:8 sachet ho, aur jagate raho, kyonaki tumhara virodhaee shautan garjanevale sinh kee nai is khoj men rahata haai, ki kis ko faad khaae." 
1Peter5:9 vishvas men draddh hokar, aur yah janakar usaka samhana karo, ki tumhare bhai jo sansar men haai, aeese hee dukh bhugat rahe haain." 
1Peter5:10 ab parameshvar jo sare anugrah ka data haai, jis ne tumhen maseeh men apanee anant maahima ke liye bulaya, tumhare thodee der tak dukh uttane ke bad ap hee tumhen siddh aur sthiar aur balavant karega." 
1Peter5:11 usee ka samraajy yuganuyug rahe. ameena.. 
1Peter5:12 maain ne silavanus ke hat, jis maain vishvasayogy bhai samajhta hoo, sankshop men likhkar tumhen samajhaya haai aur yah gavahee dee haai ki parameshvar ka sachcha anugrah yahee haai, isee men sthiar raho." 
1Peter5:13 jo babul men tumharee nain chune huae log haai, vah aur mera putra marakus tumhen namaskar kahate haain." 
1Peter5:14 praem se chumban le lekar aek doosare ko namaskar karo.. tum sab ko jo maseeh men ho shaaantai milatee rahe.. 
2Peter1:1 shamaun pataras kee aur se jo yeeshu maseeh ka das aur praearit haai, un logon ke nam jinhon ne hamare parameshvar aur uddharakarta yeeshu maseeh kee dhaaarmikata se hamara sa bahumooly vishvas praapt kiya haai." 
2Peter1:2 parameshvar ke aur hamare prabhu yeeshu kee pahachan ke dara anugrah aur shaaantai tum men bahutayat se baddhtee jaae. 
2Peter1:3 kyonaki usake ishvareey samarth ne sab kuchh jo jeevan aur bhktai se sambandha rakhta haai, hamen usee kee pahachan ke dara diya haai, jis ne hamen apanee hee maahima aur sadagun ke anusar bulaya haai." 
2Peter1:4 jin ke dara us ne hamen bahumooly aur bahut hee badee praatigyaaaen dee haain: taki in ke dara tum us sadahatt se choottkar jo sansar men buree abhailashaaon se hotee haai, ishvareey svabhav ke samabhagee ho jao." 
2Peter1:5 aur isee karan tum sab prakar ka yatn karake, apane vishvas par sadagu, aur sadagun par samajh." 
2Peter1:6 aur samajh par sanyam, aur sanyam par dhaeeraj, aur dhaeeraj par bhktai." 
2Peter1:7 aur bhaktai par bhaichare kee praeeti, aur bhaichare kee praeeti par praem baddhate jao." 
2Peter1:8 kyonaki yadi ye baten tum men vartaman rahe, aur baddhtee jaae, to tumhen hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke pahachanane men nikamme aur nishfal n hone dengee." 
2Peter1:9 aur jis men ye baten nahee, vah andha haai, aur dhaundhala dekhta haai, aur apane poorvakalee papon se dhaulakar shuuddh hone ko bool baaitta haai." 
2Peter1:10 is karan he bhaiyo, apane bulaae jane, aur chun liye jane ko siddh karane ka bhlee bhanti yatn karate jao, kyonki yadi aeesa karoge, to kabhee bhee ttokar n khaoge." 
2Peter1:11 baran is reeti se tum hamare prabhu aur uddharakarta yeeshu maseeh ke anant rajy men bade adar ke sath pravesh karane paoge. 
2Peter1:12 isaliye yadhypi tum ye baten janate ho, aur jo saty vachan tumhen mila haai, us men bane rahate ho, taubhee maain tumhen in baton kee sudhai dilane ko sarvada taaiyar rahoonga." 
2Peter1:13 aur maain yah apane liye uchit samajhta hoo, ki jab tak maain is dere men hoo, tab tak tumhen sudhai dilakar ubharata rahoon." 
2Peter1:14 kyonaki yah janata hoo, ki maseeh ke vachan ke anusar mere dere ke giraae jane ka samay shaeegha anevala haai." 
2Peter1:15 isaliye maain aeesa yatn karoonga, ki mere kooch karane ke bad tum in sab baton ko sarvada smaran kar sako." 
2Peter1:16 kyonaki jab ham ne tumhen apane prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee samarth ka, aur agaman ka samachar diya tha to vah chaturai se gaddhee hui kahaniyon ka anukaran naheen kiya tha baran ham ne ap hee usake pratap ko dekha tha." 
2Peter1:17 ki us ne parameshvar pita se adar, aur maahima pai jab us pratapamay maahima men se yah vanee ai ki yah mera piry putra haai jis se maain prasann hoon." 
2Peter1:18 aur jab ham usake sath paavitra pahad par the, to svarga se yahee vanee ate suna." 
2Peter1:19 aur hamare pas jo bhavishyadvktaon ka vachan haai, vah is ghattna se draddh tthara haai aur tum yah achchha karate ho, ki jo yah samajhkar us par dhyan karate ho, ki vah aek deeya haai, jo andhiayare sthan men us samay tak prakash deta rahata haai jab tak ki pau n fatte, aur bhor ka tara tumhare dayon men n chamak utte." 
2Peter1:20 par paahile yah jan lo ki pavitra shaasr kee koi bhee bhvishyadanee kisee ke apane hee vicharadhaara ke adhaar par poorn naheen hotee. 
2Peter1:21 kyonaki koi bhee bhavishyadanee manushy kee ichchha se kabhee naheen hui par bhkt jan pavitra atma ke dara ubhare jakar parameshvar kee or se bolate the.. 
2Peter2:1 aur jis prakar un logon men jootte bhvishyadvkta the usee prakar tum men bhee jootte upadeshak honge, jo nash karanevale pakhnd ka udaghaattn chhpai chhpaikar karenge aur us svamee ka jis ne unhen mol liya haai inkar karenge aur apane ap ko shaeegha vinash men dal denge." 
2Peter2:2 aur bahutere un kee nai luchapan karenge, jin ke karan saty ke marga kee ninda kee jaaegee." 
2Peter2:3 aur ve lobh ke liye baten gaddhkar tumhen apane labh ka karan banaaenge, aur jo dand kee agyaa un par paahile se ho chukee haai, usake ane men kuchh bhee der nahee, aur un ka vinash unghata naheen." 
2Peter2:4 kyonaki jab parameshvar ne un svargadooton ko jinhon ne pap kiya naheen chhoda, par narak men bhejakar andhore kundon men dal diya, taaki nyay ke din tak bandee rahen." 
2Peter2:5 aur prathm yug ke sansar ko bhee n chhoda, baran bhktaiheen sansar par maha jala-pralay bhejakar dharma ke pracharak nooh samet att vyaktaiyon ko bacha liya." 
2Peter2:6 aur sadom aur amora ke nagaron ko vinash ka aeesa dand diya, ki unhen bhsm karake rakh men mila diya taaki ve anevale bhaktaiheen logon kee shaiksha ke liye aek drashttant banen." 
2Peter2:7 aur dharmee loot ko jo adharmiyon ke ashuuddh chala-chalan se bahut dukhee tha chhuttkara diya. 
2Peter2:8 kyonki vah dharmee un ke beech men rahate hua, aur un ke adharma ke kamon ko dekh dekhkar, aur sun sunakar, har din apane sachche man ko peedit karata tha." 
2Peter2:9 to prabhu ke bhkton ko pareeksha men se nikal lena aur adhaarmiyon ko nyay ke din tak dand kee dasha men rakhna bhee janata haai. 
2Peter2:10 nij karake unhen jo ashuuddh abhailashaaon ke peechhe shareer ke anusar chalate, aur prabhuta ko tuchchh janate haain: ve ddheet, aur hattee haai, aur unche padavalon ko bura bhla kahane se naheen drate." 
2Peter2:11 taubhee svargadoot jo shaktai aur samarth men un se bade haai, prabhu ke samhane unhen bura bhla kahakar dosh naheen lagate." 
2Peter2:12 par ye log nirbuaddh ipashuuon hee ke tuly haai, jo pakade jane aur nash hone ke liye utpann huae haain aur jin baton ko janate hee nahee, un ke vishay men auron ko bura bhla kahate haai, ve apanee sadahatt men ap hee sad jaaenge." 
2Peter2:13 auron ka bura karane ke badale unheen ka bura hoga: unhen din dopahar sukh-vilas karana bhla lagata haai yah kalank aur dosh haai- jab ve tumhare sath khate peete haai, to apanee or se praem bhoj karake bhoga-avilas karate haain." 
2Peter2:14 un hee ankhon men vyabhaichaarinee basee hui haai, aur ve pap kiae bina rook naheen sakate: ve chanchal manavalon ko fausala lete haain un ke man ko lobh karane ka abhyas ho gaya haai, ve santap ke santan haain." 
2Peter2:15 ve seedho marga ko chhodkar bhttk gaae haai, aur baor ke putra bilam ke marga par ho liae haain jis ne adharma kee majadooree ko piry jana." 
2Peter2:16 par usake aparadha ke vishay men ulahana diya gaya, yahan tak ki abol gadahee ne manushy kee bolee se us bhvishyadvkta ko usake bavalepan se roka." 
2Peter2:17 ye log andho kuna, aur andhaee ke udaae huae badal haai, un ke liye anant andhakar ttharaya gaya haai." 
2Peter2:18 ve vyarth ghamand kee baten kar karake luchapan ke kamon ke dara, un logon ko shaareearik abhailashaaon meen fansa lete haai, jo bhttke huon men se abhee nikal hee rahe haain." 
2Peter2:19 ve unhen svatantra hone kee pratigyaa to dete haai, par ap hee sadahatt ke das haai, kyonki jo vyaaktai jis se har gaya haai, vah usaka das ban jata haai." 
2Peter2:20 aur jab ve prabhu aur uddharakarta yeeshu maseeh kee pahachan ke dara sansar kee nana prakar kee ashuuddhta se bach nikale, aur fir un men fansakar har gaa, to un kee pichhlee dasha paahilee se bhee buree ho gai haai." 
2Peter2:21 kyonaki dharma ke marga men n janana hee un ke liye is se bhla hota, ki use janakar, us pavitra agyaa se fir jate, jo unhen saunpee gai thee. un par yah kahavat tteek baaitttee haai," 
2Peter2:22 ki kutta apanee chhantt kee or aur dhaei hui suaranee keechad men lottne ke liye fir chalee jatee haai.. 
2Peter3:1 he piryo, ab maain tumhen yah doosaree patraee likhta hoo, aur donon men suadhai dilakar tumhare shuuddh man ko ubharata hoon." 
2Peter3:2 ki tum un baton ko, jo paavitra bhavishyadvktaon ne pahile se kahee haain aur prabhu, aur uddharakarta kee us agyaa ko smaran karo, jo tumhare praeriton ke dara dee gai thee." 
2Peter3:3 aur yah paahile jan lo, ki antaim dinon me hansee ttttha karanevale aaenge, jo apanee hee abhailashaaon ke anusar chalenge." 
2Peter3:4 aur kahenge, usake ane kee praatigyaa kahan gai? kyonaki jab se bapa-dade so gaae haai, sab kuchh vaaisa hee haai, jaaisa sraashtti ke arambh se tha?" 
2Peter3:5 ve to jan boojhkar yah bool gaa, ki parameshvar ke vachan ke dara se akash praacheen kal se vartaman haai aur prathvee bhee jal men se banee aur jal men sthiar haai." 
2Peter3:6 inheen ke dara us yug ka jagat jal men oob kar nash ho gaya. 
2Peter3:7 par vartaman kal ke akash aur prathvee usee vachan ke dara isaaliye rakhe haai, ki jalaae jaaen aur vah bhaktaiheen manushyon ke nyay aur nash hone ke din tak aeese hee rakhe rahenge.." 
2Peter3:8 he piryo, yah aek bat tum se chhpaiee n rahe, ki prabhu ke yahan aek din hajar varsha ke barabar haai, aur hajar varsha aek din ke barabar haain." 
2Peter3:9 prabhu apanee pratigyaa ke vishay men der naheen karata, jaaisee der kitane log samajhte haain par tumhare vishay men dhaeeraj dharata haai, aur naheen chahata, ki koi nash ho baran yah ki sab ko man firav ka avasar mile." 
2Peter3:10 parantu prabhu ka din chor kee nain a jaaega, us din akash badee hadhadahatt ke shabd se jata rahega, aur tatv bahut hee tapt hokar pighal jaaenge, aur prathvee aur us par ke kam jal jaaeenge." 
2Peter3:11 to jab ki ye sab vastue, is reeti se pighalanevalee haai, to tumhen pavitra chalachalan aur bhktai men kaaise manushy hona chaahiae."

1John4:1 he piryo, har aek atma kee prateeati n karo: baran atmaon ko parakho, ki ve parameshvar kee or se haain ki naheen kyonki bahut se jootte bhavishyadvkta jagat men nikal khde huae haain." 
1John4:1 he piryo, har aek atma kee prateeati n karo: baran atmaon ko parakho, ki ve parameshvar kee or se haain ki naheen kyonki bahut se jootte bhavishyadvkta jagat men nikal khde huae haain." 
1John4:2 parameshvar ka atma tum isee reeti se pahachan sakate ho, ki jo koi atma man letee haai, ki yeeshu maseeh shareer men hokar aya haai vah parameshvar kee or se haai." 
1John4:2 parameshvar ka atma tum isee reeti se pahachan sakate ho, ki jo koi atma man letee haai, ki yeeshu maseeh shareer men hokar aya haai vah parameshvar kee or se haai." 
1John4:3 aur jo koi atma yeeshu ko naheen manatee, vah parameshvar kee or se naheen aur vahee to maseeh ke virodhaee kee atma haai jis kee charcha tum sun chuke ho, ki vah anevala haai: aur ab bhee jagat men haai." 
1John4:3 aur jo koi atma yeeshu ko naheen manatee, vah parameshvar kee or se naheen aur vahee to maseeh ke virodhaee kee atma haai jis kee charcha tum sun chuke ho, ki vah anevala haai: aur ab bhee jagat men haai."

1John4:6 ham parameshvar ke haain: jo parameshvar ko janata haai, vah hamaree sunata haai jo parameshvar ko naheen janata vah hamaree nahanee sunata isee prakar ham saty kee atma aur bhram kee atma ko pahachan lete haain."

3John1:10 so jab maain aunga, to usake kamon kee jo vah kar raha haai suadhai dilaunga, ki vah hamare vishay men buree buree baten bakata haai aur is par bhee santosh n karake ap hee bhaiyon ko grahan naheen karata, aur unhen jo grahan karana chahate haai, mana karata haai: aur mandlee se nikal deta haai." 
3John1:11 he piry, burai ke nahee, par bhlai ke anuyayee ho, jo bhlai karata haai, vah parameshvar kee or se haai par jo burai karata haai, us ne parameshvar ko naheen dekha."

3John1:12 demetraiyus ke vishay men sab ne baran saty ne bhee ap hee gavahee dee: aushra ham bhee gavahee dete haai, aur too janata haai, ki hamaree gavahee sachcha haai.." 
3John1:12 demetraiyus ke vishay men sab ne baran saty ne bhee ap hee gavahee dee: aushra ham bhee gavahee dete haai, aur too janata haai, ki hamaree gavahee sachcha haai.."

Jude1:1 yahooda kee or se jo yeeshu maseeh ka das aur yakoob ka bhai haai, un bulaae huon ke nam jo parameshvar pita men piry aur yeeshu maseeh ke liye surakshiat haain.." 
Jude1:2 daya aur shaaantai aur praem tumhen bahutayat se praapt hota rahe.. 
Jude1:3 he piryo, jab maain tumhen us uddhar ke vishay men likhne men atyant paarishram se prayatn kar raha tha, jis men ham sab sahabhagee haain to maain ne tumhen yah samajhana avashyak jana ki us vishvas ke liye poora yatn karo jo paavitra logon ko aek hee bar saunpa gaya tha." 
Jude1:4 kyonaki kitane aeese manushy chupake se ham men a mile haai, jin se is dand ka varnn purane samay men paahile hee se likha gaya tha: ye bhktaiheen haai, aur hamare parameshvar ke anugrah ko luchapan men badal dalate haai, aur hamare advait svamee aur prabhu yeeshu maseeh ka inkar karate haain.." 
Jude1:5 par yadhypi tum sab bat aek bar jan chuke ho, taubhee maain tumhen is bat kee suadhai dilana chahata hoo, ki prabhu ne aek kul ko misr desh se chhudane ke bad vishvas n lanevalon ko nash kar diya." 
Jude1:6 fir jo srvagadooton ne apane pad ko sthiar n rakha varan apane nij nivas ko chhod diya, us ne un ko bhee us bheeshan din ke nyay ke liye andhakar men jo sada kal ke liye haai bandhanon men rakha haai." 
Jude1:7 jis reeti se sadom aur amora aur un ke as pas ke nagar, jo in kee nai vyaabhaicharee ho gaae the aur paraye shareer ke peechhe lag gaae the ag ke anant dand men padkar drashttant tthare haain." 
Jude1:8 usee reeti se ye svapnadasharee bhee apane apane shareer ko ashuuddh karate, aur prabhuta ko tuchchh janate haain aur unche padavalon ko bura bhla kahate haain." 
Jude1:9 parantu pradhaan svargadoot meekail ne, jab shautan se moosa kee loth ke vishay men vada-avivad karata tha, to us ko bura bhla kahake dosh lagane ka sahas n kiya par yah kaha, ki prabhu tujhe dantte." 
Jude1:10 par ye log jin baton ko naheen janate, un ko bura bhla kahate haain par jin baton ko achetan pashuuon kee nai svabhav hee se janate haai, un men apane ap ko nash karate haain." 
Jude1:11 un par haya! ki ve kaain kee see chal chale, aur majadooree ke liye bilam kee nai bhrashtt ho gaae haain: aur korah kee nai virodha karake nash huae haain." 
Jude1:12 yah tumharee praem sabhaon men tumhare sath khate-peete, samudra men chhpaiee hui chattan sareekhe haai, aur bedhadk apana hee pett bhranevale rakhvale haain ve nirjal badal haain jinhen hava uda le jatee haai patajhd ke nishfal ped haai, jo do bar mar chuke haain aur jad se ukhd gaae haain." 
Jude1:13 ye samudra ke prachand hilakore haai, jo apanee lajja ka faen uchhalate haain: ye danvadol tare haai, jin ke liye sada kal tak ghaer andhakar rakha gaya haai." 
Jude1:14 aur hanok ne bhee jo adam se sataveen peeddhee men tha, in ke vishay men yah bhavishyadvvanee kee, ki dekho, prabhu apane lakhon paavitraen ke sath aya." 
Jude1:15 ki sab ka nyay kare, aur sab bhktaiheenon ko un ke abhaktai ke sab kamon ke vishay me, jo bhktaiheen paapiyon ne usake virodha men kahee haai, doshaee ttharaae." 
Jude1:16 ye to asantusht, kudkudanevale, aur apane abhailashaaon ke anusar chalanevale haain aur apane munh se ghamand kee baten bolate haain aur ve labh ke liye munh dekhee badai kiya karate haain.." 
Jude1:17 par he piryo, tum un baton ko smaran rakho jo hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke praerit pahile kah chuke haain." 
Jude1:18 ve tum se kaha karate the, ki pichhle dinon men aeese ttttha karanevale honge, jo apanee abhktai ke abhailashaaon ke anusar chalenge." 
Jude1:19 ye to ve haai, jo foott dalate haain ye shaareearik log haai, jin men atma naheen." 
Jude1:20 par he piryon tum apane ati pavitra vishvas men apanee unnati karate huae aur paavitra atma men praarthna karate hue. 
Jude1:21 apane ap ko parameshvar ke praem men banaae rakho aur anant jeevan ke liye hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh kee daya kee asha dekhte raho. 
Jude1:22 aur un par jo shanka men haain daya karo. 
Jude1:23 aur bahuton ko ag men se jhpattkar nikalo, aur bahuton par bhy ke sath daya karo baran us vasr se bhee gharana karo jo shareer ke dara kalanakit ho gaya haai.." 
Jude1:24 ab jo tumhen ttokar khane se bacha sakata haai, aur apanee maahima kee bhrapooree ke samhane magan aur nirdosh karake khda kar sakata haai." 
Jude1:25 us advait parameshvar hamare uddharakarta kee maahima, aur gaurav, aur parakram, aur adhaikar, hamare prabhu yeeshu maseeh ke dara jaaisa sanatan kal se haai, ab bhee ho aur yuganuyug rahe. ameena.." 
Revelation1:1 yeeshu maseeh ka prakashaitavaky jo use parameshvar ne isaaliye diya, ki apane dason ko ve bate, jin ka shaeegha hona avashy haai, dikhaae: aur us ne apane svargadoot ko bhejakar usake dara apane das yoohanna ko bataya." 
Revelation1:2 jis ne parameshvar ke vachan aur yeeshu maseeh kee gavahee, arthata jo kuchh us ne dekha tha us kee gavahee dee." 
Revelation1:3 dhany haai vah jo is bhvishyadanee ke vachan ko paddhta haai, aur ve jo sunate haain aur is men likhee hui baton ko manate haai, kyonki samay nikatt aya haai.." 
Revelation1:4 yoohanna kee or se aasiya kee sat kaleesiyaon ke nama: us kee or se jo haai, aur jo tha, aur jo anevala haai aur un sat atmaon kee or se, jo usake sinhasan ke samhane haai." 
Revelation1:5 aur yeeshu maseeh kee or se, jo vishvasayogy sakshaee aur mare huon men se jee uttnevalon men pahilautta, aur prathvee ke rajaon ka hakim haai, tumhen anugrah aur shaantai milatee rahe: jo ham se praem rakhta haai, aur jis ne apane lohoo ke dara hamen papon se chhudaya haai." 
Revelation1:6 aur hamen aek rajy aur apane pita parameshvar ke liye yajak bhee bana diya usee kee mahima aur parakram yuganuyug rahe. ameena.

Revelation1:9 maain yoohanna jo tumhara bhai, aur yeeshu ke klesha, aur rajy, aur dhaeeraj men tumhara sahabhagee hoo, parameshvar ke vachan, aur yeeshu kee gavahee ke karan patamus nam ttapoo men tha." 
Revelation1:10 ki maain prabhu ke din atma men a gaya, aur apane peechhe turahee ka sa bada shabd yah kahate suna." 
Revelation1:11 ki jo kuchh too dekhta haai, use pustak men likhkar saton kaleesiyaon ke pas bhej de, arthata ifisus aur smurana, aur piragamun, aur tooateera, aur saradees, aur fileadilaafiya, aur laudeekiya men." 
Revelation1:12 aur maain ne use jo mujh se bol raha tha dekhne ke liye apana munh faera aur peechhe ghoomakar maain ne sone kee sat deevatten dekhee. 
Revelation1:13 aur un deevatton ke beech men manushy ke putra sareekha aek puroosh ko dekha, jo panvon tak ka vasr pahine, aur chhatee par sunahala pattuka bandho huae tha." 
Revelation1:14 usake sir aur bal shvet un varan pale ke se ujjaval the aur us kee ankhe ag kee jvala kee nain thee. 
Revelation1:15 aur usake panv uttm peetal ke saman the jo mano bhttee men tapaae gaae hon aur usaka shabd bahut jal ke shabd kee nai tha.
